Comment: In touch. Gave ground to midfield final turn. Weakened.
Led or in the leading pair. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Crept closer turning in. Kept on until weakened 250 M.
Behind midfield to final turn. Made ground steadily to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away, pushed along to join the lead 1100 M. Took over narrowly 800 M out. Still there until weakening out of contention 250 M.
Steadied soon after start, towards rear. Made up good ground final 250 M.
Mainly 7th to 600 M where he made some progress to be 5th early straight. Ran on steadily to take control 200 M. Held on well.
Behind midfield. Found no clear run early straight. Kept on when in clear final 200 M.
Began very awkwardly, stayed at the back. Recovered good ground inside 250 M.
Taken back to the rear from the widest draw. Very minor progress in straight.
In touch to 400 M. Dropped out.
Raced 3rd before dropping to 5th rounding home bend. Ran on in straight to take 2nd 200 M. Found no extra final 100 M.
Never in contention.
Left awkwardly, towards rear. Made up good ground from outside 300 M until one-paced close home.
Raced 3-wide most of way in forward of midfield. Kept on steadily to finish.
Crossed to lead gingerly far side. Held up behind pace rounding home bend. Dropped away quickly upon straightening.
Midfield throughout. Kept on without quickening.
Raced keenly outside leader. Took over coming out of back straight. Weakened out of contention shortly after straightening.
Never in contention. (Bled.)
Settled at the back. Produced good late impression final 200 M.
Settled just worse than midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Ran on steadily to reach 3rd late.
Behind midfield early. Made swift progress coming out of back straight to settle outside leader home bend. Hit front turning in and soon went 1L clear but grabbed near post.
Always at the back.
Well there to 200 M, then weakened.
Raced keenly just off the pace. Lost position rounding home bend. Baulked for a run early in straight before fading final 200 M.
Never far off. Plugged on under pressure closing stages.
Well back. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide and settled in midfield or worse. Commenced move upon straightening and responded well to assert authority close home.
Rear. Widest turning in. Made ground steadily in straight.
Midfield or behind throughout.
Among the front runner. Took clear lead approaching 1200 M. Was joined near 1000 M. Held on until weakening out of contention 250 M.
In touch and was always 3-wide. Faded soon after straightening.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit far side. Held up inside 150 M. Unable to run on.
Towards rear. 5-wide in midfield turning in. Responded well final 250 M just missed 2nd place.
Behind midfield. Steadied at 650 M and again at 500 M. Towards rear final turn. Ran on well final 200 M.
Always there on inside. Unable to find clear passage early straight. One-paced when in clear inside 200 M.
Prominent from widest draw. In midfield stable bend before making progress to join the lead 1000 M out. Maintained advantage until weakened inside 200 M.
Well there, 1-1/2Ls 4th far side. Ran on early straight to take lead briefly passing 200 M. Caught close home.
Near rear. Ran on well soon after turning in. Nearest at finish.
Prominent early, raced in better than midfield far side. Sustained effort in straight to take charge close home.
Never able to feature.
Never better than midfield. Kept on well.
Forward of midfield. Made modest progress early in straight but found no extra late.
Well there to 300 M then gradually weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made no show.
Wide around midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Settled well back. Ran on down centre of straight doing best work at finish.
Near better than midfield. Kept on one pace under pressure.
Began fairly but quickly improved to forward of midfield. Dropped out shortly after straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in rear. Ran on steadily in straight.
Broke well. Settled in first few. Finished well to miss narrowly.
Close up. Kept on steadily in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Settled in close up position from poor draw. Took lead coming out of back straight. Went some 1-1/2L clear after straightening and just defied runner-up's strong late challenge.
Never nearer.
Began fairly and settled in mid-division towards the outside through to straight. Did not quicken and further weakened over the concluding stages.
Hard ridden but outpaced to race 4Ls off leader around 2-wide through to straight. Made up steady ground in straight and doing best work in the final stages to be closest at finish.
Ridden hard to lead narrowly and soon headed after 1000 M. Still 2nd turning for home and soon dropped out badly.
Niggled along to race a better than midfield position on rail. Around 400 M was placed under pressure and shifted out to obtain running but only kept on one-paced in the straight.
Slowly away and soon recovered to race in midfield position around 3-wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out but stayed one-paced to the line.
Began well but unable to muster early speed to settle in rear section out wide. Hung out at home turn and made no impression in straight.
Taken back to the rear section and shifted in closer to the rail. From 600 M steadily improved to midfield entering straight. Made up some ground in straight but never troubled the placegetters.
Missed the start and dropped to the rail of the field 2 to 3-wide. Stayed in similar position entering straight. When asked 300 M out ran on strongly to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slow to begin and raced in worse than midfield position through to straight. Under pressure 500 M out and made no impression.
Began fairly and hard ridden to race 2-wide 1-1/2L off leader through to straight. All out 350 M out and ran on well but never in position to overhaul the winner.

Broke well and pushed along to race in a forward section towards the outside. Took lead after 1000 M and steadily shifted inwards with around 1L advantage entering straight. Ran home strongly to win readily.
Slow to begin and pushed hard to race in mid-division on fence. At 600 M commenced to lose position and dropped out after 400 M.
On fence 9Ls off the pace 1400 M out, 5Ls down at the 800 M, 4Ls down and 3-wide on the swing, no threat once the tempo quickened.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 11Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4-wide and 5Ls down turning for home, 3Ls down at the 200 M, ran on very strongly to lead 80 M out, kept on.
Driven along to race 2-wide about half a length off pace in 2nd from 1600 M out until top of home straight, led for a few strides but was swamped before 300 M out.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off the pace from 1600 M to 500 M out, kept on okay in straight without quickening up.
Slowly away, 10Ls off the pace on the fence 1000 M out, 3-wide and 7Ls down 600 M out and niggled along, stayed on well in the straight to be nearest at the finish.
On fence about 10Ls off the lead 1200 M out, 2-wide and 6Ls off the front and driven along 600 M out, no impression.
5Ls off the pace on the fence in 5th place 1400 M out, raced 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, disputing lead 300 M out, stayed on well but had no chance with winner.
Slowly away, keen early on when settled towards rear, unbalanced 1200 M out, raced 3-wide 5Ls off 600 M out, 5-wide into home straight, tended to hang in, beaten well over 200 M out.
Raced 2-wide and between 5Ls and 7Ls off lead down the back, 4-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, led briefly over 100 M out, headed by winner very soon afterwards, no extra.
6Ls off speed in 6th place on fence 1400 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down on straightening, held up for a run from 400 M to 200 M when checked, didn't recover.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off the pace in 4th place from 1600 M out, disputing lead entering straight, still in front at the 200 M out, no extra inside final 100 M.
Soon led by about half a length from over 1700 M out until about 500 M out, dropped right out very rapidly at the top of the home straight.
Slowly away and settled towards rear over 10Ls off pace early on, 3-wide without cover from 1200 M, sent on to be 3Ls off the pace and 4-wide 700 M out, faded from top of stretch.
Towards centre of track, about 7Ls off the pace 800 M out, never got any closer than that.
Always about 3Ls off speed until the 200 M, kept on well to be nearest at the finish.
About 3Ls down 800 M out, always outpaced, 5Ls down 400 M out, stayed on a little again close home.
Niggled along very early on, never in with any kind of chance.
Slowly away, always struggling.
Awkwardly away, 6Ls off the pace 800 M out, stayed on fairly well late on.
On fence and about 4Ls off the speed from 800 M out to 200 M out, picked up well to do best work at the end.
Never better than 6Ls off the pace until 200 M out, made some moderate late headway.
Was a neck back in 2nd place about 800 M out, disputed lead with SUPER BROSE 3Ls clear of the pace from 400 M to 200 M, kept on strongly and asserted inside final 100 M.
Held a narrow lead from gates to about 400 M to 200 M out when disputing the lead with winner who managed to pull clear inside final 100 M.
Prominent early on about half a length off the pace 800 M out, grew steadily detached from the 600 M.
About 3Ls off the pace from 800 M out until 400 M, slightly better off at the 200 M, kept finding and nearest at the finish.
Got quite a way back through early stages, some 7Ls down 500 M out, still about 4Ls or 5Ls down at the 200 M, stayed on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
7Ls off the pace 800 M out, kept on fairly late on.
Settled about 6Ls off the pace and 2 and 3-wide down the back straight, closer but 5-wide turning for home, picked up well to lead over 200 M out, drew clear final 100 M.
Settled 3-wide and 6Ls off the pace through to home straight, kept on quite well but never a threat to principals.
Awkwardly away, recovered and was quite well placed towards inner and about 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace through to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Was bumped exiting gates, about 3Ls off the pace and 2-wide 800 M out, closer entering straight, could only keep on at the same pace.
Always raced wide, 5-wide and 6Ls off the pace 800 M out, even wider again turning for home, never competitive.
No speed early on, 7Ls off the pace and 3-wide 800 M out, 6-wide into home straight, moderate late headway in home straight out wide.
About 5Ls off the pace and 2-wide down the back, 4-wide and 3Ls down on the swing, every chance 300 M out, no extra close home.

Was bumped exiting gates, raced freely early on, sent on to be right on the speed out 2-wide in 2nd position 800 M out, disputing lead at top of the straight, soon under pressure and faded out. (Lame.)
Steadied 1000 M out when 6Ls down and 2-wide, checked 800 M out, 4-wide into the straight and 4Ls down, didn't have a clear run until 200 M out, ran on well but too late.
In midfield on fence abut 4Ls off the speed until home straight when niggled along, found little off the bridle, not extended through final stages.
No speed early on, about 5Ls or 6Ls down on fence through to home straight, had to weave his way through beaten rivals and was nearest at the finish.
Away well and led by 2Ls on the fence 1000 M out, 1L to the good turning for home, headed about 300 M out, no extra.
Awkwardly away, 2nd early on, 2Ls off the pace and 2-wide in 4th place, under pressure entering straight, found nothing.
Slowly away, raced 2-wide and 6Ls off the pace 900 M out, travelled smoothly entering straight when about 5Ls down, kept on well to be nearest at the finish.
Keen early on, 10Ls off the pace 800 M out, detached from main body of field entering straight, no chance.
About 8Ls off the lead when 3-wide down the back straight, was 5-wide into home straight and 5Ls down, no impression.
Raced 2-wide and 3Ls off the speed 1000 M out, improved to be 3-wide and 1L down entering straight, led about 300 M out, soon headed by the winner, kept on well but winner too good.
Awkwardly away, 6Ls off the pace and 3-wide down the back, 4-wide into the home straight when 4Ls down, quickened up well to lead about 180 M out, only needed pushing out.
No speed early on, crossed to fence from widest gate by 800 M out when over 10Ls down, kept on steadily towards the rail in the straight but had too much ground to make up.
On the fence about 6Ls off the fence 900 M out, slightly closer on straightening, one-paced from then on.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the speed until home straight when niggled along, didn't have a clear run until about 250 M out, ran on okay late on but had no chance with quinella pair.
On fence 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, 6Ls down and 3-wide entering straight, kept on well to be nearest at the finish.
Raced 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace 600 M out, closer and 3-wide into the home straight, could only stay on at the same pace to line.
Led on fence 1000 M out by about half a length, a length to the good at the top of the home straight, headed about 300 M out, no extra.
2-wide and 8Ls off the speed 800 M out, 4-wide and 5Ls off the speed, no further impression. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Half a length off the pace out 2-wide 1000 M out, had every chance turning for home, didn't quicken up and was beaten 200 M out.
Keen early on, 4Ls down on fence 800 M out, 2-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, no acceleration.
Well there to straight where he made no show.
Worse than midfield home bend. Ran on a bit final 250 M.
Was prominent before taking lead passing 1000 M. Could find no extra when challenged and headed 200 M.
Settled midfield to home turn. Moved up to lead passing 200 M, holding on well under pressure when threatened close home.
Towards rear before making up some ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to 800 M and was still in touch early in straight. Faded under pressure from the 300 M.
Well there before giving ground shortly on straightening.
Never troubled leaders.
Never in contention.
About 7th or 8th into home bend. Kept on same pace final 250 M.
Settled in rear to straight where he ran on strongly despite not reaching winner.
Close up into straight where he held every chance 200 M. Found no extra.
Never far off to straight. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
Last virtually throughout.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Soon recovered ground to be in midfield. Ran on steadily 250 M but failed to match speed with winner closing stages.
Led field to 200 M. Found no extra.
Prominent on the rail. Took brief lead passing 200 M, however effort not sustained.
Never better than midfield. Weakened in straight. (Bled.)
Better than midfield. Became prominent when 3-wide final turn. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Never a factor.
In touch. Dropped to midfield rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Prominent. 2nd from 850 M. Failed to hold place 250 M out.
Behind midfield. Responded well soon after straightening. Sustained effort 200 M to assert authority passing 100 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Progressed to 4th when 4-wide final turn. Kept on until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Slowly away, near rear. Ran past a few tiring horses in straight.
Towards rear. Severely hampered 200 M. Unable to recover.
Badly unbalanced soon after start, last early. Made ground from outside 1000 M to reach midfield home bend. Dropped out straightening. Hung out badly throughout. (Lame.)
Towards rear. Shifted out 200 M. Ran on.
Travelled well in midfield into straight. Ran home one-paced. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced behind leaders to straight. Dropped out.
Missed the start. Travelled in last few. Not much room in straight and steadied 200 M out. Kept on.
Never nearer.
Behind midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Midfield. Kept on well in straight.
Raced mainly 3-wide in midfield. Produced modest progress under pressure in straight.
Missed the break badly. Settled at the back. Ran on past beaten horses closing stages.
Settled just off the pace. Moved up to lead shortly after straightening going 1L clear 200 M out. Scored well.
Led briefly far side. Settled for 2nd home bend. Weakened shortly after straightening.
Never far off. Ran on without threatening in straight.
Broke well. Steadied to midfield before home bend. Switched out for a run upon straightening and ran on well.
Began quickly and raced keenly. Took up running home bend and led till headed shortly after straightening. Soon weakened.
Raced very wide when shortlived effort rounding home bend. Dropped away quickly from prominent position into straight.
Led or disputed lead. Headed 250 M. Weakened.
Towards rear. Was held up when lack of clear run early straight. Ran on when in clear.
In touch. Inconvenienced near 300 M. Dropped back steadily.
Midfield or slightly better. Dropped back a bit near 1000 M. Kept on quite well inside 200 M.
Behind midfield. Gave ground near 800 M. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
At rear throughout.
Led early, then disputing for lead to straight. Soon faded.
Always there in 3-wide without cover. Kept on without quickening.
Rear. Made up some ground from outside final 200 M.
Midfield and 4-wide. Recovered some ground in straight but found no extra closing stages.
Behind midfield throughout.
Towards rear. Crept closer to midfield turning in. Ran on well to take control final 100 M. Won readily.
Towards rear from widest draw. Kept on early straight but found no extra inside 200 M.
In touch. Ran on well along rail 400 M to take lead 250 M. Unable to resist winner's challenge 100 M out.
Forward of midfield. Faded under pressure in straight.
Well back. Raced tightly between runners early in straight. Ran home one-paced.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened over 300 M out.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Raced freely in rear of midfield. Weakened shortly after straightening.
Never better than midfield. Dropped out upon straightening.
Attempted to make all. Swamped close home.
Towards rear. Kept on well closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Never in contention.
4th into straight. Weakened.
Wide in midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled in 3rd. Boxed in on rails in straight until obtaining split 200 M out. Quickened well to take charge closing stages.
Raced in prominent position through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out but unable to quicken and further weakened 250 M out.
Began well and soon eased to race in midfield position towards the outside through to straight. Hung in in straight and stayed one-paced to the line.
Ridden along to race in midfield position on fence. From 650 M out made steady improvement to be 1L off leader entering straight. When asked 350 M out only ran on evenly to the line.
Ridden along but outpaced to be in worse than midfield position. Made no impression in straight.
Soon raced in better than midfield position 3 wide from 1000 M steadily dropped to worse than midfield section entering straight. Did not respond to pressure and further weakened after 200 M.
Began well and pushed along to lead around 2 wide through to straight. Did not quicken in straight and was headed around 300 M out. Further weakened over the concluding stages.
Began well from wide draw but soon taken back to worse than midfield position about 3 wide through to straight. Shifted out to obtain clear running but only made up little ground.
Began slowly and raced in rear position on fence through to straight. Unable to find clear running until the final 100 M and ran home strongly from there to be closest at finish.
Pushed along to race inside leader on rail. Took lead around 400 M and ran on fairly but was unable to fend off the challenges from the first pair and surrended position in the final stages.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield section out wide through to straight. Failed to respond to pressure and soon dropped out.
Jumped well from wide draw and soon eased to race 6Ls off leader but closer to rail. Switched out turning for home and drove home strongly from 200 M to score a narrow victory.
Unable to muster early speed to settle in mid-division. Around 450 M out was put under pressure to hold position, further weakened after 300 M.
Slow to begin and tailed off throughout.
Tardy start and ridden along to race 4 to 5Ls off pace on rail. Made slight improvement turning for home and ran home strongly in the final 200 M to grab 2nd place on the line.
Disputed 2nd place out 2-wide and about two and a half lengths off the pace through to about 500 M out, soon off the bridle and found absolutely nothing.
Had a nice spot on the fence disputing 2nd place about two and a half lengths off the pace until home straight, soon under pressure and dropped out tamely.
In rear about 12Ls off the pace 1200 M out, about 6Ls off the pace and 4-wide 600 M out, 6-wide entering straight, 4Ls down in 3rd place at the 200 M, stayed on well to be runner-up.
About 4Ls off pace on fence 4th place down the back straight, 3-wide into home straight and still 4Ls down, in 2nd place 200 M out by same margin, collared for third place close home.
Caught 4-wide early on and sent on to sit 2-wide about 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, came under pressure over 600 M out, grew further detached from the top of home straight.
Caught 3-wide without cover and about 6Ls off the speed from 1200 M out until home straight when under pressure, didn't pick up at all.
On fence 7Ls off the pace 1200 M out, closer and still on the rails entering straight, no acceleration.
Led on fence 1600 M out, was about two and a half lengths in front through to straightening, over 3Ls in front of pack passing the 200 M, pushed out, easily.
Held up early on, raced 3-wide 8Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4-wide and driven along when 7Ls down on the swing, stayed on fairly well but unable to get runner-up spot. (See Racing Incidents.)
2-wide and 10Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 6-wide and about 8Ls behind leader entering straight, never competitive.
Never travelled, driven along on fence from about 1400 M out when 10Ls behind lead, still struggling when 4-wide into home straight, no chance.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, niggled along when 3-wide and 5Ls off the pace turning for home, could only stay on at the same pace.
Awkwardly into stride and lost ground, on fence about 8Ls off the pace 1200 M out, about 6Ls down and 3-wide off the home turn, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide and 7Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 4-wide and 6Ls down turning for home, stayed on at the same pace to line.
Travelled okay early on out 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace, grew steadily detached from 600 M out.
Settled about 7Ls or 8Ls off the lead until home straight when one from rear, ran on quite well past several beaten rivals.
Shuffled back 1000 M out, 5Ls down and 2-wide from 800 M to home straight, 7Ls down in 5th place 200 M out, kept on fairly well to be a remote 3rd on line.
Never better than 8Ls off the pace at any stage.
Led narrowly out 3-wide passing 800 M marker, headed by winner at the top of the straight, faded rapidly.
About 3-wide and 4-wide and 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace through to home straight, inconvenienced about 300 M out, was very one-paced anyway.
Was no more than 1L off the pace out 2-wide until about 500 M out, under pressure at top of home straight, very weak from then on.
Driven along early to race prominently out 4-wide about 1L off the pace 800 M out, hard pressed to keep position at the top of the home straight, dropped out feebly.
On fence about 2Ls off the speed from 900 M out to home turn, left a poor 2nd 4Ls behind winner 200 M out, lost 3rd place final strides.
About 3-wide and 6Ls off the speed from back straight to top of home straight when checked off heels, inconvenienced 300 M out, very one-paced from then on.
2Ls off pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, lost position and was about 4Ls down 800 M out, 3-wide off home turn, 5Ls down in 3rd place 200 M out, stayed on okay but no chance with winner.
About 10Ls off the pace and 3-wide until home straight, ran on past a few beaten rivals through concluding stages.
Broke very well, soon settled on fence and right on the speed, went 1L clear of field at top of home straight, 4Ls clear 200 M out, pushed out, impressive.
Slowly away, steadied 800 M out when about 3Ls off the pace on fence, similarly placed turning for home, severely checked when disappointed for running 300 M out, didn't recover.
Slowly away, quietly ridden about 6Ls off the pace down the back straight, 5Ls down and 2-wide entering straight, picked up well to hold place chances 300 M out, didn't follow through.
On fence about 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, closer turning for home, very one-paced through final 300 M.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, carried out wider about 900 M out, 3Ls down and 4-wide on the swing, 1L down 200 M out, kept on well to claim a place.
3-wide and 2Ls off the pace 800 M out, held narrow lead at top of home straight, soon headed and faded steadily.
8Ls off the speed and 2-wide 800 M out, about 5Ls or 6Ls down entering home stretch, never threatened.
About 6Ls off the pace on the fence down the back straight, closer turning for home, found very little off the bridle.
Was bumped exiting gates, 2-wide and about 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide but closer on straightening, 3Ls down 200 M out, one-paced through final stages.
Led out 2-wide 1100 M out, never more than half a length clear, headed at top of straight, dropped out tamely.
Raced 2-wide and 3Ls off the speed 1000 M out, closer 600 M out, outpaced from top of home straight.
Sat 3Ls off the pace on fence 1000 M out in 5th position, 1L down and 2-wide entering straight, led 250 M out, stayed on strongly.
Caught 3-wide 6Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 4-wide and about 4Ls down off home turn, threatened 300 M when just 1L down, didn't follow through and was one-paced through final 200 M.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, caught 4-wide turning for home when 2Ls down, loomed up with every chance 300 M out, lacked an extra gear to overhaul winner.
Led narrowly from about 1200 M out on fence, disputed lead entering straight, quickly headed and faded rapidly.
Totally blew the start staying flatfooted in the gates and lost about 10Ls as a result, not sighted thereafter.
About 10Ls off the pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, in rear about 7Ls off the pace entering stretch, made some late headway without ever threatening.
Slowly away, 3-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, a bit closer on straightening but under pressure, rather one-paced from then on.
Had the run of the race on the fence 2Ls off the pace through to home straight, picked up well to lead narrowly from 300 M to 200 M out, soon headed and held.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace from 1200 M to home straight when hard pressed to maintain this position, soon faded.
Settled 2-wide and 1L off the lead in 2nd place from about 1100 M out, driven along to hold position when 3-wide into home straight, dropped out very quickly.
In rear about 6Ls or 7Ls off the speed and 2-wide 1000 M out, on fence in rear off the home turn, switched out wider 300 M out when 4Ls down, quickened up very well to lead close home.
A bit slowly away, was 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed 1000 M out, about 4Ls down and 2-wide on the swing, short of running room and severely checked 200 M out, didn't recover.
Led on the fence 1200 M out, never clear by more than 2Ls, 1L to the good but driven along entering home straight, headed 300 M out, weakened rapidly.
On fence about 3Ls off the speed 1000 M out, slightly closer on straightening, driven through gap passing the 200 M, on terms with and every chance 1000 M out, failed to match winner's late kick.
Caught 3-wide and 6Ls or 7Ls off the speed at the 1000 M, not much better off on straightening, stayed on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
3-wide and 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, crept closer steadily to be 2Ls down and 3-wide off home turn, a neck down passing the 200 M, soon overhauled, short of room through final strides.
Raced freely early, caught 4-wide without cover from 1100 M out when 5Ls off pace, 3Ls down and 5-wide turning for home, all out to be 2Ls off the lead at the 200 M, faded quickly.
No speed early, 3-wide and about 7Ls off the pace 800 M out, 4-wide and about 5Ls behind leader off the final bend, picked up to be 3Ls down at the 200 M, one-paced through final stages.
Raced 3 and 4-wide down back straight when 5Ls or 6Ls off pace, 4Ls down entering straight, picked up well to be 1L down and very dangerous 200 M out, outpaced by quinella pair close home.
Was 6th 800 M and similar position on straightening. Faded under pressure 200 M out.
Led or shared lead to 150 M where he failed to hold place.
Towards rear before running on quite well inside final 200 M.
Mostly midfield to home turn. Came under pressure 250 M and stayed on for 3rd close home.
Never far off to straight where he quickened to lead 150 M. Kept on under pressure.
Never on terms.
Mostly midfield to straight. Plugged on under pressure closing stages.
Never troubled leaders.
Well there to straight where he kept on same pace under pressure.
Never a factor and dropped out quickly on straightening.
Was 4th, pulling hard before 800 M. Could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Towards rear before making rapid headway approaching 800 M to join leader home bend. Held every chance 200 M but effort not sustained near finish.
Settled in rear to straight where he ran on strongly despite not reaching winner.
Well there early and was worse than midfield home bend. Stayed on strongly close home despite not having a smooth run for most part of straight.
Remained 4th on the rail. Ran on from 3rd early straight, just failing to catch the winner.
Midfield early, soon moved up to lead or disputing for lead 800 M out. Dropped out of contention from 2nd final turn.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear. Made some moderate progress in straight.
Midfield or better. Made no show in straight.
Soon prominent. Led or disputing for lead 1000 M out. Kept on when headed 200 M.
Prominent early. Dropped back steadily to midfield passing 1000 M. Remained there until making up some ground 250 M.
Jumped well and led early. Soon raced 3rd before regaining advantage 200 M. Just held on.
Slowly away, towards rear. Was steadied while making progress final turn. Never recovered.
Midfield from widest draw. Dropped back steadily.
Slowly away, near rear. Widest final turn. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Crept closer order turning in. Kept on one-paced in straight.
Soon last. Stayed on passing a few tiring horses in straight.
Never far off. Quickened to hold every chance early in straight but failed to sustain effort close to home.
Settled at the back. Travelling strongly when no room behind runners early in straight. Kept on steadily closing stages.
Settled behind leaders. Raced tightly between runners early in straight. Made modest progress under pressure closing stages.
Held narrow lead to straight and soon swamped.
Midfield. Came to challenge under pressure rounding home bend. Held every chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Wide throughout. Shortlived effort in midfield around Rock. Dropped out approaching home turn.
Lost considerable ground at start. Travelled in last few to straight. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Disputed lead. Tightened and lost position about 200 M out. Never recovered.
Settled in rear. Ran on well to grab victory inside 200 M.
Around midfield. No clear run early in straight. Kept on steadily to the line.
Settled just worse than mid-division. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight.
Prominent to 200 M. Weakened.
In the last pair. Made progress home bend. Ran on from outside in straight.
Better than midfield. Mainly 4th far side. Hesitated for a run early straight. One-paced.
Restrained to the rear on inside from widest draw. Waited with until running on well 250 M to take control final 100 M. Won readily.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered some ground from outside far side. Dropped out from 600 M.
Prominent early, soon in midfield or better. Made no show final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Slightly progress from outside 600 M. Wide into straight. Unable to quicken.
Behind midfield. Stayed on a bit in straight.
Slightly better than midfield. Dropped out sharply from 800 M. (Lame.)
Slowly away, behind midfield. Pushed along to be prominent stable bend. Came to tackle leader passing 1000 M. Led briefly early straight. Soon found no extra.
Led field from 1400 M. Headed early straight. Soon faded.
Soon led. 3rd from 1200 M. Responded well early straight to take lead 200 M. Kept on until headed 100 M.
Midfield early. Dropped towards rear from stable bend. Recovered some ground home bend. Ran on to tackle leaders from 250 M. Effort not sustained.
Towards rear. Gained midfield into straight. Kept on.
Well there to straight. Found no extra under pressure.
Settled behind midfield. Effort rounding home bend. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Tailed off into straight. Finished off race well. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led until weakened over 500 M out.
Well there. Took lead coming out of back straight but went off the rail making home bend. Weakened.
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Midfield. Steadied and lost position 600 M out. Kept on well closing stages.
Always in rear.
Prominent. Hampered and lost ground up Rock. Gained lead turning for home. Held on well.
Midfield. Ran on to hold every chance in straight but failed to peg back winner. (Bled.)
Well there. Went wide into straight. One-paced.

Niggled along to lead narrowly on fence through to straight. Responded well to pressure in straight but unable to hold off challenges from 1st pair to be overhauled on the line. (Throughout the race hung out.)
Jumped well but soon eased to race 3Ls off pace 2-wide. Took up rail running at 400 M and made up good ground in straight to grab 2nd place on the line.
Unable to muster early speed and race wide towards the rear. Made no impression in the straight.
Ridden hard to race beside leaders in the early stages. From 900 M steadily dropped to race just off pace and commenced to lose its position 500 M out. Dropped out after 200 M.
Began well and raced in forward position 3-wide making 1st turn. From 800 M steadily dropped to midfield turning for home. Tailed out in straight.

Began fairly from wide draw but was taken back to rearward position closer to rail. Under pressure from 500 M out but only made up steady ground in straight. Never in position to trouble the placegetters.
Missed the start slightly and niggled along to race 3-wide 3 to 4Ls off pace through to straight. All out 300 M out and ran home well to win narrowly.
Ridden hard but outpaced to settle in rear position on inner through to straight. Made up good ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped well but soon taken to midfield. Proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Improved its position on home bend to be 4th turning in. Unable to quicken and stayed on evenly to the line.
Niggled along to race in midfield on rail. From 800 M steadily dropped to worse than midfield and stayed there until straightening. Only ran on evenly to the line.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield position on inner. Shifted out to find clear running turning for home but failed to quicken and further weakened in the final stages.
Pushed along to share lead and was caught wide making the 1st turn. Shifted in closer to rail after 800 M. Unable to go up a gear in straight and missed the placings by a short margin.
Led by about 1 length from 1100 M out racing 2-wide, only got to the fence 600 M out, all out to still be 1L clear 200 M out, no extra close home.
Awkwardly away and lost ground at the start, on fence about 7Ls off the pace from the 1200 M to home straight, no impression.
Raced 2-wide 7Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4-wide and 5Ls off the pace entering straight, could only keep on at the same pace.
3Ls off the pace on fence 1200 M out, 5Ls behind on the fence 600 M out, didn't have that much room to work with in straight but still stayed on quite well.
On fence 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 5Ls down entering straight, 4Ls down at the 200 M, kept on very strongly to lead on line.
Had the run of the race on the fence about 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace until about 600 M out, 2-wide into home straight, one-paced to line.
Bit keen early on, restrained to sit 1L off pace on fence until home straight, caught in a pocket until the final 100 M, ran on well once clear, just failed.
Settled 2-wide about 3Ls off the pace from 1200 M out to home straight, had a chance at the top of the straight, didn't pick up, beaten 200 M out.
Always rear, never got within 10Ls of the main body of runners.
Raced 3-wide 2Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 2-wide and about 1L off the pace from 800 M to home straight, had every chance and was rather one-paced to line.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the speed 1200 M out, a little closer turning for home, no impression.
Always one from rear and never closer than 7Ls off the pace at any stages.
Near rear 1000 M out, 2-wide and 8Ls or 9Ls off the pace in back straight, 6Ls down entering straight, shifted out and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield on fence 10Ls off pace 600 M out, shifted ground 4-wide and 4Ls down entering home straight, ran on strongly to be closest at finish.
2-wide and 4Ls behind pace throughout back straight, weakening before home turn.
About 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until home straight, no extra in final 200 M.
Settled on fence 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until home straight, ran on strongly and grab lead final 200 M, held on to win.
Rider lost use of stirrup on jump and raced never regained use of it. Never in contention.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. 4-wide and near rear entering straight, one-paced to line.
2-wide in midfield. Ridden from 500 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls behind pace rounding home, kept on well but unable to gain ground on winner.
Inconvenienced shortly after leaving the gates and was at rear until rounding home. 7Ls or 8Ls down entering straight, quickened and made up some ground in the straight.
On fence and 6Ls or 7Ls off pace 600 M out, every chance 300 M out, kept on well but no chance with winner.
No more than 2Ls off pace under final 400 M. Every chance entering straight but found no extra when headed 250 M out.
Led no more than 2Ls on fence from 1400 M out until home straight, weakened final 200 M.
On fence 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace from 1000 M to home straight, kept on well to be nearest at finish.
5Ls off the speed and 2-wide 1200 M out, 4-wide and 6Ls off the speed entering home straight, never competitive.
Slowly away, never got within 7Ls off the lead at any stage.
Slowly away and niggled along early on, 7Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 5Ls down and 3-wide entering straight, stayed on well to be nearest at finish. (Lame.)
Caught 4-wide without cover throughout and about 3Ls off the pace until 600 M when position was lost somewhat, 5Ls down entering straight, soon beaten.
Raced 3-wide 3Ls off the pace from 1200 M out to home straight, was always without cover, one-paced to line.
On fence 4Ls off the pace from 1200 M out, similarly placed and travelling well turning for home, one-paced to line.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off the pace until home straight, every chance 300 M out but was quite one-paced through final stages.
3-wide without cover and 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, sent on at the 800 M to race 2-wide and half a length off pace until home straight, soon faded.
Always 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace from 1200 M to home straight, still about 3Ls down 200 M out, stayed on very well to lead on the line.
2-wide and 1L off the pace from the 1200 M until 600 M, faded steadily from that point on.
Soon led, never clear by more than a length until home straight, picked up well off home turn to go 2Ls clear 200 M out, was caught on line.
In the leading pair. 2nd 250 M out. Failed to quicken closing stages.
Slightly behind midfield. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
In the leading pair. Obtained nearly 1L advantage 250 M. Unable to match speed with winner inside 200 M.
Soon in touch. Improved to 3rd near 600 M. Ran on strongly from 300 M to assert authority passing 200 M. Won going away.
In touch. Mainly 4th until failing to maintain position passing 200 M.
Midfield to course proper. Dropped back steadily.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Kept on steadily final 400 M.
Raced greenly at the back throughout. Hung in.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Soon moved up to be in midfield. Found no extra final 250 M.
Midfield. Kept on steadily 400 M for a remote 3rd.
Behind midfield throughout.
Made no show.
Mostly in midfield. Found no room throughout straight.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Close up. Came under pressure to hold place early in straight. Swamped closing stages.
Towards rear. One-paced.
Settled in midfield. Weakened gradually in straight.
Never far off to straight. One-paced.
Always prominent. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Around midfield. Ran on without threatening.
Led until headed into straight, then soon weakened.
Never far off. No room in straight. Kept on closing stages.
Well there. Hit front entering straight going some 2-1/2Ls clear 200 M out. Unchallenged.
Well back. Came under pressure and went wide into straight. Ran on without threatening.
Settled in last few. Niggled along from halfway. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
In last few most of way.
Lost ground at start, near rear. Gradually recovered ground to be midfield far side. Was hampered 300 M, never recovered.
Jumped well, settled behind midfield along inner. Ran on steadily in straight until one-paced closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield. Dropped back steadily 800 M out, becoming last final turn. Tailed off in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Moved up from 1500 M when 3-wide, taking the lead passing 900 M. Was headed final turn. Weakened badly final 200 M.
Well there early, dropped back to just better than midfield far side. Behind midfield early straight, kept on without quickening.
Rear. Made steady progress from outside inside 250 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Ran on from 12th early straight to take command close to home.
In touch. Dropped back steadily early straight. Severely checked 300 M. Dropped out.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made progress final turn and was 5-wide early straight. Ran on quite well 300 M.
Behind midfield. Made up some ground final 300 M.
Pushed along to take lead from 1700 M. Lost advantage 850 M out. Weakened from 4th early straight.
Midfield or slightly better. Responded well final turn, taking the lead inside 300 M. Held on well but was beaten final strides.
Led field to 1700 M. Remained prominent before under pressure final turn to re-gain advantage upon straightening. Found no extra when headed passing 300 M.
Never far off to straight. Kept on before fading final 200 M.
Midfield. Quickened to hit front over 150 M out but caught close home.
Led to 200 M. Weakened.
In last few. Found no clear passage early in straight. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Well back. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Disputed lead into straight. Weakened passing 200 M.
Well back. Ran on well down centre of straight to take charge close to home.
Never seen with a chance.
Around midfield. Not much room early in straight. One-paced.
Chased leaders to straight. Weakened.
Towards rear. Made only modest progress early in straight.
Midfield. Quickened to hold every chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Well there to straight. Dropped out.
Midfield into straight when no clear run on rails. Finished well final 200 M but steadied final stages.

Began well and steadily eased to race around 4Ls off pace on fence. Was held up slightly in the early part of the straight. Obtained running around 250 M and ran on well but was overhauled by winner on the line.
Slow to begin and settled at back on rail through to straight. Made up some late ground inside the final 200 M.
Soon raced around 1L off pace. Under pressure at 600 M to maintain position, dropped out in straight.
Niggled along to share lead 1 off from rail through to straight. Found nothing when asked 400 M out and further weakened 150 M out.
Broke well and raced behind leaders on fence through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened 250 M out.
Soon raced in worse than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Around 250 M out shifted out abruptly to find clear running and closed the race off well.
Raced at back towards the outside. Caught wide turning for home and made no impression in straight.
Jumped well from wide draw and soon taken back to race 4Ls off pace 2 wide through to straight. Made up some ground in straight but was never in position to trouble the placegetters.
Jumped well from an outside draw and soon eased to race in better than midfield around 2 wide. One-paced in straight and further weakened in the final stages. (Lame left fore.)
Shared lead on rail through to straight. Headed at 200 M and soon weakened steadily.

Began fairly from wide draw but soon eased to race 5Ls off leader 3 wide. Shifted out to find running turning for home and made up good ground in the early part of straight, but was no match for the 1st pair in the closing stages.
Niggled along to race around 2Ls off leader 1 off from fence. Switched out turning for home and ran on fairly in straight but weakened over the concluding stages.
Soon raced towards rear on rail. Headway from 500 M. Unable to obtain clear running in the early part of the straight. Found running 200 M out and ran home strongly to snatch win on the line.
Jumped fairly but soon taken to rear section out wide. From 1000 M made steady improvement to midfield. Did not respond well to pressure 350 M out and stayed one-paced to the line.
Awkwardly away, on fence 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, under pressure 800 M out, dropped out very quickly, tailed off.
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls off the pace in 4th place 1200 M out, 2Ls down and 3-wide entering straight, every chance 200 M out, couldn't overhaul winner final stages.
Raced 2-wide 7Ls off the pace 1000 M out, caught 3-wide 600 M out but still at least 5Ls down, faded in straight.
Raced 2 and 3-wide and 10Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 4-wide and 5Ls off leader 600 M out, kept on well to be 2Ls down at the 200 M, no extra.
Led on fence by 2Ls 1200 M out, 1L clear entering straight, headed inside 200 M out, caught for 3rd place on the line.
Away well but settled to race 2-wide and 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, on fence and about 3Ls off the lead entering straight, one-paced from then on.
Checked early on, was 3-wide and 8Ls off pace 1000 M out, 5Ls behind leader and 3-wide 700 M out, 2Ls down and with place chances 200 M out, no extra thereafter.
3-wide and 7Ls off the pace 1000 M out, driven along to be 4Ls off the pace but still wide from 700 M out to home straight, faded rapidly.
Awkwardly away, ridden quietly in rear bunch on fence, 6Ls down entering straight on inside, made little impression.
Always 2 or 3-wide and never better than 7Ls off the pace until home straight, never competitive.
Never competitive at any stage.
On fence 8Ls off the pace 1000 M out, soon niggled along, 2-wide and 5Ls down entering straight and still 4Ls down at the 200 M, kept on to grab 3rd on line.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace until home straight, quickened up to share lead 200 M out, stayed on well, always holding runner-up.
Raced 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace 1200 M out, at leader's quarters entering straight, soon under pressure and faded through final 300 M.
2Ls clear on the fence 1000 M out, skipped 5Ls clear at the 600 M, headed about 250 M out, weakened.
2-wide and about 8Ls off the speed 800 M out, closer on the swing, about 4Ls behind 200 M out, never got any closer.
In 2nd place behind EASTERN PURPLE about 5Ls off the pace from 800 M to 500 M, under pressure and losing position entering straight, faded out.
On fence and driven along 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, 6Ls down and driven along at top of home straight, kept on one-paced under pressure.
10Ls off the pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, 8Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, 3Ls down at the 200 M, no extra.
Slowly into stride, never competitive at any stage.
4-wide without cover and 7Ls off the pace down the back straight, 3-wide entering straight when 5Ls down, 3Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Settled nicely in 5th or 6th place about 7Ls off the pace and 2-wide 800 M out, 4Ls down in 4th place entering straight, led about 250 M out, pushed out.
In rear about 12Ls off the pace down the back straight, a little closer but 5-wide entering home straight, ran on quite well to be nearest at the finish.
About 5Ls off the pace in 3rd when 2-wide 800 M out, 3Ls behind in 2nd place at top of home straight, ran on well enough but winner was too strong.
About 8Ls off the pace and 3-wide 800 M out, slightly closer entering home straight, kept on at the same pace.
Never better than 10Ls off the pace down the back straight, all out and beaten turning for home.
Keen early on, raced 10Ls off the pace down the back, 4-wide and 7Ls down entering straight, switched out wider 300 M out, ran on strongly to be nearest at finish.
Had a decent run about 5Ls or 6Ls off the pace until home stretch, failed to quicken up and was beaten over 200 M out.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off the pace 800 M out, loomed up to be 3Ls down with definite place chances 300 M out, could only stay on at the same pace to line.
Awkwardly away and keen early on, 8Ls off pace on fence 800 M out, 2-wide 600 M out and 4-wide and 8Ls down off home turn, no impression.
Raced 3-wide and was 2Ls off the pace 1200 M out, similarly placed entering home straight, dropped out tamely.
In rear about 11Ls off the pace 800 M out, a little closer and 3-wide entering home straight, picked up well to be 4Ls down 200 M out, didn't follow through.
Raced 3-wide about 4Ls off the pace from 1000 M out to home stretch, 2Ls off the pace 200 M out, one-paced to line but just about clung on for 3rd position.
2-wide and 4Ls or 5Ls off pace from 1000 M out to home straight, didn't have much running room from 400 M to 200 M, one-paced when clear final stages.
7Ls off pace and on fence 1000 M out, 2-wide and 6Ls down and hard driven from 700 M out to home straight, ran on well under pressure final 250 M.
Raced 2-wide between 3Ls and 5Ls off the pace from 1100 M out until home straight, 3Ls down at the 200 M, was rather one-paced.
Keen very early on, on fence 3Ls off the pace 1100 M out, still on inner but 5Ls down entering straight, finished off weakly.
Never travelled well, driven along to be 5Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, clipped heels and pecked 800 M out, struggling entering straight and with no chance.
Raced 2-wide 1L or 2Ls off the pace from 1200 M out to home straight, all out to be 1L off the pace 300 M out, couldn't follow through.
Keen early on, led 1200 M out, never more than 2Ls clear at any point, headed by winner 180 M out, no extra and faded out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 3-wide and about 6Ls off the pace from 800 M out to home straight, quickened up well to lead about 180 M out, drew clear.
Switched across towards fence from wide draw upon exiting, 2-wide and 10Ls off pace 800 M out, 3-wide and 7Ls behind 600 M out, made some ground in straight.
Always outpaced and was never better than 7Ls off the pace at any stage.
Outpaced early on and was between 8Ls and 10Ls off the pace until 400 M out, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.
Up against far rail and on the early speed, led by about 1L 400 M out, headed 300 M out and had no extra from then on.
Was fairly prominent about 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace until 400 M out, weakened from that point onwards.
Settled about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace towards stand's rail until 400 M out, led narrowly 200 M out, kept on well but had no chance with winner.
Awkwardly away and was bumped upon exiting gates, 3Ls down until about 400 M out, disputing lead 200 M out, asserted through concluding stages.
Prominent early towards stand's rail about 3Ls off the pace, under pressure 400 M out to pick up, found nothing and was soon well beaten.
Raced prominently alone down centre of track, 1L down 400 M out, only half a length down at the 200 M, couldn't follow through.
Outpaced from the off, was hardly sighted.
Led on stand's rail early on, headed about 400 M but battled back well to dispute lead 200 M out, no extra through concluding stages.
Always struggling and all out to be 7Ls down 600 M out, no chance.
Slowly away, about 3Ls off the pace towards far side until 400 M out, soon under pressure and faded from 300 M out.
Was about 5Ls off the pace until 400 M out, 3Ls down 200 M out, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.
Settled 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace until 400 M out, didn't find much under pressure.
Never in contention.
About 7th or 8th 1000 M and similar position turning into straight. Challenged under pressure 200 M when shifting in. Unable quicken with winner close home.
Towawrds rear into straight. Plugged on under pressure closing stages.
Never far off to straight. Was checked 200 M and dropped out.
Led or shared pace from 1400 M to straight where he could find no more from the 300 M.
Always at the back.
Led or shared lead from 1000 M to straight. Dropped out steadily from 250 M.
Midfield rounding home bend. Unable quicken to challenge in straight.
Was 4th halfway before improving to be alongside leaders turning into straight. Hit front 250 M but could find no extra inside 150 M.
Soon in rear and remained there into straight. Made up considerable ground closing stages to snatch 2nd place final stride.
Among rear group into home bend and was just worse than midfield early in straight. Switched out 200 M and ran on resolutely to lead close home.
Well there to straight where he kept on till hampered 200 M. Not in contention thereafter.
Well there before failing to hold place from 1200 M.
Midfield into straight where he was steadied 250 M, then made no show.
Checked soon after start, remained at rear until running on from outside 200 M, just missed a minor placing.
In touch on the rail. Ran on steadily from 3rd early straight to take lead passing 200 M. Held on.
Behind midfield throughout.
Led field to 200 M. No extra.
In touch. About 2Ls 4th when 3-wide 300 M. Soon one-paced.
Always 2nd. Gained upper hand very briefly near 200 M. Kept on for 2nd closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made up some ground on inside final 250 M.
Mainly midfield. 6-wide early straight. Made up steady ground to claim 3rd closing stages.
Mainly 5th. Kept on until finding no extra 200 M.
Never a factor.
Towards rear early. Picked up some ground to be midfield 1200 M. Remained in similar position thereafter.
Disputed lead gaining narrow advantage briefly leaving Rock. Soon headed rounding home bend and then weakened.
Led till narrowly headed leaving Rock. Weakened home bend.
Midfield. Ran on determinedly down straight to assert authority closing stages.
Well back. Kept on without quickening in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Never far off before losing position rounding home bend. No clear run over 200 M out but produced late impression closing stages.
In last few. Ran on steadily in straight but swamped for placing close to home.
Trailed field to straight. Made significant progress despite hanging in.
Never far off. Clipped heels and stumbled badly shortly after straightening. Never recovered. (Lame.)
Behind midfield to straight. Kept on one pace.
Ridden early vying for lead before stable bend. Settled in forward of midfield to straight before weakening.
Behind midfield. Made rapid progress approaching home bend to gain commanding break early in straight. Flattered and worn down closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Rear from widest draw. Recovered some ground from 1100 M to reach 7th far side. Steadied 500 M. Ran on in straight.
Led field to 1300 M. Stayed better than midfield on inside. Weakened passing 200 M.
Last to final turn. Ran on well from outside but unable to threaten the winner closing stages.
2nd last to final turn. Ran on well to take command passing 100 M. Held on.
Better than midfield. Dropped back a bit to behind midfield far side. Recovered some ground early straight. No extra.
Led field from 1300 M to 850 M. Remained 2nd until failing to hold place 100 M.
Midfield. Moved up to be 4th from 1000 M. Remained there till weakening badly in straight.
Better than midfield. Made progress far side to be 3rd at Rock. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Lost ground at start, behind midfield. Recovered a little ground home bend. Made no show in straight.
4-wide midfield. Improved to 3rd 1000 M. Dropped back to midfield 650 M. Gave ground from home bend.
Well there. Took lead from 850 M. One-paced when headed inside 100 M.
Behind midfield. No clear run until over 150 M out. Finished well.
Prominent. No extra closing stages.
Prominent and wide before losing some ground approaching home turn. Kept on steadily in straight.
Rear to straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Close up. Hit front under pressure 200 M out. Hung on well.
Well back. Steadied for a run early in straight. Kept on.
Midfield when lost position at 1000 M bend. Renewed effort approaching home turn and kept on steadily without quickening.
Led until overhauled final 200 M.
Midfield. Ran on under pressure without threatening.
Prominent to 500 M then gave ground rapidly.
Mainly in midfield. Took closer order home bend. Faded steadily from joint 3rd 200 M out.
Never seen with a chance.
Slow to begin and raced 2-wide around 5Ls off pace. Crept closer to the leader turning in and ran on strongly in straight to grab winner spot on the line.
Broke well and led briefly before being eased to better than midfield 3-wide. At 500 M out was placed under pressure to hold position. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Soon crowded for room and dropped to the tail on rail. Switched wide turning for home. Stayed one-paced in straight and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Began well but outpaced to race in midfield out wide. Steadily dropped to worse than midfield after 800 M. Found nothing in straight.
Pushed along but outpaced to race in mid-division towards the outside through to straight. When asked 300 M out kept on same pace to the line.
Began well and led comfortably on fence with no more than 1-1/2Ls advantage through to straight. Ran on well in straight but was overhauled by the winner on the line.
Pushed along to race behind leader on rail. Switched out turning for home and made up some ground in straight to be closest at finish.

Jumped fairly and soon eased to midfield around 2-wide. From 600 M steadily improved to race 2Ls behind leader turning for home. Made up little ground in straight but never in position to trouble the placegetters.
Pushed along but outpaced to race in mid-division on rail. Commenced to give ground after 800 M. Made no impression in straight.
Unable to muster early speed to race in rearward position around 3-wide through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M.
Soon raced in better than midfield. Under pressure at 450 M out to maintain position. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened after 200 M.
Ridden along to race behind leader and commenced to weaken from 450 M out. Dropped out in straight.
Always about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace until home straight when travelling well, finished off well along fence, 2Ls down 200 m out, joined HIGH SKY on the line in the final stride.
On fence in rear about 10Ls off the pace at the 1400 M, 8Ls down 800 M out, 6Ls down entering straight, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Led early on, never more than 2L clear at any stage, joined by BOUNTIFUL 600 M out but pressed on again to be 1L clear off home turn, headed by BOUNTIFUL over 200 M out, no extra.
2-wide 3Ls off the pace 1200 M out, sent on 800 M out to dispute lead out 2-wide 600 M out, 1L down off home turn, picked up again to lead narrowly over 200 M out, headed 100 M out, no extra.
Had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off the pace, driven along to lie up 600 M out, responded well for pressure and led about 100 M out, joined by NEW PLANET on line.
Raced 5Ls off the pace and 2-wide from 1400 M to 600 M out, 4Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, didn't pick up.
Settled about 1L off the pace in 2nd place and out 2-wide until about 600 M out, 2Ls down and hard ridden entering straight, kept on quite well under pressure.
Raced 3-wide early on but soon got in and was 2-wide 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, ran on okay late on but was no threat to principals.
Caught 3 and 4-wide without cover through early stages in midfield, pressed on to be 3-wide and 3Ls off the pace from 800 M to home straight, steadily faded out of contention.
Held up 6Ls or 7Ls off speed and out 2-wide until 600 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down on the swing, stayed on very strongly down centre of track and missed only narrowly.
On fence 7Ls off the pace 1400 M out, was about 5Ls down from 800 M to home straight, ran on well but didn't have much running room inside final 200 M, nearest at finish.
In rear out 2-wide and 10Ls off the pace from 1400 M out, improved to be 3-wide and 5Ls down from 900 M to home straight, stayed on well but couldn't overhaul principals.
Eased to rear section from start until 500 M out. Hung out badly rounding home turn. Made up some ground in final 100 M.
Near midfield. 5Ls or 6Ls off pace and 2-wide rounding home turn. Found no extra in straight.
On fence near rear until entering straight, shifted all the way to the outside and closed off well. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away and was at rear throughout. Never a factor.
Broke well and raced outside leader until entering home straight. Disputed lead 250 M out, kept on well under pressure.
Led by no more than 1L until 300 M out. Stayed on one-paced to line.
Ridden along to keep pace from start to maintain position and was 6Ls or 7Ls behind pace from 800 M out until entering home turn 3-wide. Made up ground in straight to be closest at finish.
On fence and 2Ls off pace at 800 M out. Steadied 600 M when crowded. 5Ls behind pace rounding home turn. Responded well under pressure and drew clear from 50 M out.
3Ls or 4Ls off pace and 3-wide until 600 M out. Improved to near pace and 3-wide rounding home turn. Led momentarily at 200 M out but was headed by winner in final 50 M.
Broke well. 2Ls or 3Ls off pace and 2-wide until 600 M out. On fence and 3Ls off pace rounding home turn, one-paced to line.
On fence and no more than 5Ls off pace 700 M out. Checked near 600 M out and lost ground momentarily. Unable to quicken in straight.
Near midfield and 3-wide from 800 M out until entering straight. Ran on and weakened 100 M out.
Settled about 5Ls or 6Ls off the pace and 2-wide until 600 M out, similarly placed but 3-wide into home straight, stayed on well but didn't have much chance of catching winner.
Raced 2-wide about 3Ls or 4Ls off the pace from 1200 M to 600 M out when steadied briefly, was quite laboured and one-paced from that point on.
In midfield when unbalanced 1300 M out, raced 6Ls or 7Ls off the pace from 1200 M to home straight, had a chance of a place when 5Ls down in about 5th position 200 M out, no extra.
Raced 2-wide about 10Ls off the pace from 1200 M out to home turn, was checked over 200 M and forced to switch out wider about 100 M out when finishing off purposefully albeit too late.
Was 8Ls or 9Ls off the pace from 1200 M out, under pressure 600 M out, was never remotely competitive.
Had the run of the race from 1200 M out on fence 2Ls off the pace, 2.5Ls down in 2nd place and hard pressed to chase DYNAMIC FUN entering straight, soon swamped by pursuers.
Settled 1Ls off DYNAMIC FUN out 2-wide 1400 M out in 2nd place, 2Ls down 800 M out and already under pressure, faded rapidly and beaten a long way out.
Always about 7Ls or 8Ls off the pace on the fence from 1400 M to home straight when checked, didn't recover and no sign of quickening up either.
Slowly away, on fence 10Ls off the pace 1200 M out, hampered entering straight when 8Ls down on fence, ran on strongly final stages to be nearest at the finish.
On fence 4Ls off the speed 1200 M out, niggled along to keep this position from 700 M out until home straight, faded out steadily.
Raced 2-wide about 6Ls or 7Ls off the pace from the 1200 M to home straight, ran on fairly well through final stages to be nearest at the finish.
Awkwardly away, soon led, 2Ls clear down the back straight, 2.5Ls clear off home turn and 4Ls to the good 200 M out, tired a little close home but had done enough to hang okay.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd but was 4-wide early straight. Soon weakened.
Midfield early. Dropped back a bit to the rear group 900 M. No subsequent progress.
Behind midfield. Raced from outside to reach midfield 800 M. Made no show from final turn. Wide without cover throughout.
Midfield or behind. Kept on quite well inside 250 M.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Was last from 1050 M. Ran past a few beaten runner inside 250 M.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit when steadied near 800 M. Ran on from 5th early straight to take 2nd 200 M. No match with winner.
In touch. Improved to 3rd 800 M. Was checked when raced ungenerously while hanging out 600 M. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Always prominent. Took brief lead 750 M to 600 M. Kept on but lost a minor placing near finish.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear early. Pushed along on inside to be midfield or behind. Recovered steady ground in straight, doing best work final 200 M.
Led field until headed momentarily 750 M. Regained advantage 600 M. Held on well to win convincingly.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Recovered ground steadily to be 8th turning in. Kept on.
Towards rear. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Raced keenly early stages. In forward of midfield turning for home. No clear run after straightening.
Last into straight. Made significant progress down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Rear to straight. Ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Slightly sluggish at start. Remained in last few throughout. Found nothing.
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Never better than midfield. Faded steadily in straight.
Well there to straight. Dropped out quickly.
Midfield far side. Took closer order turning in. Not much room early on. Kept on.
Always well there. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Around midfield throughout. Kept on same pace in straight.
Never far off. Kept on one pace under pressure.
Quickly ridden to lead from widest draw and made all. Hung on well.
Wide in forward of midfield to straight. Faded under pressure.
Well back. No clear passage early in straight before producing late impression final 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered good ground from 12th 400 M to be nearest at finish.
In touch. Faded rapidly 800 M out.
Slowly away, near rear. Difficult to find clear run from 400 M to 250 M. Ran on when in clear.
Jumped well, was prominent inside the leader along rail. Failed to hold place when 2nd early straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Lost ground at start, last to 600 M. No significant progress in straight.
Behind midfield. No progress in straight.
Settled towards rear. Made up some ground early straight but was one-paced inside 200 M.
Midfield or slightly better. One-paced.
Towards rear from widest draw. Widest final turn. Recovered steady ground to obtain a remote 4th closing stages.
Ridden forward to lead from 1400 M until headed 600 M. Dropped out rapidly from 3rd soon after turning in.
Around midfield. Gradual progress rounding home bend to be 4th 600 M. Responded well early straight to take lead 250 M out. Held on well.
In touch. Moved up to 2nd 1200 M. Came to tackle leader home bend, gaining upper hand 600 M. Kept on when headed 250 M.
Midfield or behind. Ran on 300 M out but found no extra closing stages.
In touch. Weakened final 200 M.
Midfield. Lost position rounding home bend. Not much room early in straight. Kept on steadily closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Close up. Dropped away quickly inside 300 M.
Prominent to straight. Failed to quicken and gradually faded in straight.
Never better than midfield. Ran home one pace.
Waited with. Ran on strongly down centre of straight to grab lead close home.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Rear to straight. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
In similar position throughout. Kept on same pace.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent early. Steadied to midfield home bend. Gave further ground under pressure in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Last few. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield. Quickened well to hold every chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort near finish.
Always struggling in last few.
Attempted to make all. Headed inside 200 M.
Raced towards the rear around 4 wide. Made slight improvement round the home bend. Kept on one-paced in straight and further weakened over the concluding stages.
On jumping stood flat-footed and raced at back out wide. Made slight improvement turning for home. Did not quicken in straight and tailed off after 300 M.
Soon raced in midfield around 2 wide through to straight. Did not obtain clear running until 200 M and made up some ground inside the final 150 M.
Began well from wide draw and soon eased to rearward position but closer to rail. At 600 M commenced to improve from the outside to be 4Ls down at 400 M. Ran home strongly to snatch win on the line.
Slow to begin and raced in rear section on rail through to straight. Made no impression thereafter.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Did not quicken when asked 350 M out and stayed on evenly to the line.
Jumped fairly and raced in midfield on fence through to straight. Under pressure around 300 M out but stayed one-paced and ran past couple of beaten runners in the final stages.
Broke well from wide draw and steadily shifted in to race 3 wide behind leaders through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and was checked around 300 M. Soon dropped out.
Best out and soon led on rail with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Headed at 200 M and plugged on evenly to the line.

Soon steadied to rear section around 2 wide and raced keenly in the early stages. Stayed in similar through to straight. Only obtain clear running after 200 M and closed off strongly without threatening the first pair.
Niggled along to race 2 wide around 1 to 2Ls off pace through to straight. Under pressure around 350 M out. Ran home fairly but was overhauled by 3rd placegetter near the line.

Soon taken to rearward position and shifted in closer to rail. Switched out turning for home. Responded well to pressure in straight but was unable to fend off repeated challenge from winner to be overhauled on the line.
Ridden along to race beside leader through to 200 M and soon weakened steadily.

Pushed along but outpaced to race in mid-division around 3 wide. Steadily dropped to rear section turning for home. Kept on evenly in early part of straight but made up some ground inside final 200 M.
Didn't break that well but recovered to be 3Ls off the pace on fence 800 M out, 2Ls down entering straight but was quickly outpaced by principals, kept on evenly to line.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls down turning for home, switched out wider to challenge 350 M out, ran on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
Slowly away, was very keen early on, settled 7Ls or 8Ls towards down the back straight, 5-wide (widest of all) and 6Ls down entering straight, made no impression down centre of track.
On fence 9Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 6Ls down and still on the rails entering straight, no acceleration.
5Ls down and 3-wide 1000 M out, 4Ls down and 5-wide turning for home, one-paced from then on.
Sent on to lead 900 M from home when out 3-wide, disputing lead out 3-wide at top of home stretch, faded out rapidly.
Raced 3-wide 3Ls off pace early on, 4-wide 1000 M out, 4-wide but just 2Ls down off home turn, half a length and with every chance 200 M out, found winner too strong close home.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace until 900 M when 2-wide, sent on to dispute the lead entering straight, narrowly in front 200 M out, soon headed and faded.
On fence 8Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 2-wide and 6Ls down 800 M out, in rear turning for home, made moderate late headway past beaten horses.
2-wide and 2Ls 1000 M out, 3-wide from 900 M and 1L off the pace until home straight, didn't quicken up and was beaten 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, raced 3-wide 7Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 4-wide and 6Ls down on the home turn, dropped right out very tamely.
On fence 11Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 7Ls down entering straight, ran on fairly well to be nearest at the finish.
Best away, led by 2Ls out 3-wide very early on, disputing lead on fence from 900 M out to home straight, all out to still be disputing the lead at the 200 M, no extra thereafter.
2-wide and about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed down back straight, 4-wide into home straight and 3Ls down, quickened up well to be 1L down at the 200 M, led 100 M out, driven out.
Raced 2-wide with cover and 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 2Ls down, didn't really quicken up and was rather one-paced inside final 200 M.
Raced 2-wide 1L off the pace from 1200 M to 600 M out, disputing lead entering straight, kept on at the same pace in straight.
Settled 5Ls or 6Ls off the pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down turning for home, staying on but similarly positioned 200 M out, went into 3rd place 50 M out, ran on.
Bit slowly away, was 11Ls off the pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, 5Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, no impression.
Had the run of the race on the fence 2Ls off the pace from 1200 M out to home straight when under pressure to keep up, faded very quickly.
Bit slow to start, on fence 5Ls or 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, similarly placed but hard driven at top of home straight, found nothing and soon gone.
7Ls off the speed and 2-wide 1200 M out, smooth progress to be 3Ls down and 4-wide turning for home, quickened up to lead 300 M out, ran on strongly, impressive.
On fence 8Ls off the pace 1200 M out, niggled along to be 7Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, never competitive.
Raced 3-wide without cover and 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3Ls down and 3-wide off the final bend, soon outpaced.
Led early on, 1L clear on fence 1200 M out, disputing lead turning for home, soon headed and could only stay on at the one pace.
Raced 3Ls or 4Ls off the pace on fence or 2-wide through to home straight, always outpaced from then on.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off the pace 1200 M out, raced keenly when without cover in places, sent on to dispute lead out 3-wide entering straight, headed by winner 300 M out, kept on well for 2nd place.
Always towards rear, never better than 9Ls off the pace at any stage.
Awkwardly away, raced 2 and 3-wide 10Ls off the pace until the 1000 M, straightened up 5Ls down and 5-wide, no chance.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3-wide into home straight and 2Ls down, all out to maintain this margin over 200 M out, couldn't overhaul runner-up either.
6Ls off the pace and 3-wide 1000 M out, sent on to 2Ls down but 4-wide 600 M out, 4-wide into home straight, capitulated quickly.
Raced 2-wide and 5Ls off the pace 800 M out, a little closer off the home turn, stayed on well enough but never looked like figuring in the money.
2-wide and 8Ls or 9Ls off the pace down the back straight, wide and outpaced entering straight, produced nothing widest down centre of track.
Tightened exiting gates, 2-wide and in rear 10Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 6-wide into home straight 8Ls down, took a long time to get balanced, no chance.
Slowly away, was always struggling, detached from main body of field when about 15Ls down entering straight, eased down.
7Ls off the speed and 2-wide 800 M out, 3-wide into home straight, no impression.
About 7Ls off the speed on the fence down the back straight, 5Ls down on the swing, no impression in straight.
Vied for early lead with JOLLY GAINS, on fence and 1L clear from 900 M out to home straight, smooth acceleration to go 2Ls clear 180 M out, unextended.
Raced 3-wide 10Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 5-wide and 6Ls down turning for home, posed no threat whatsoever.
Bit slowly away, on fence in rear about 10Ls off the pace 1000 M out, about 7Ls down turning for home, no impression.
Disputed early lead with winner before settling 1L off the speed and 2-wide 900 M out, at winner's quarters entering straight, every chance 300 M out, winner had too many gears.
Held up 5Ls or 6Ls off the pace on fence down the back straight, 4Ls off pace and 2-wide into home straight, kept on at same pace in straight.
Settled in 3rd place 3Ls off the speed on fence until home straight, 2Ls down into home straight, soon outpaced by principals, kept on at same pace.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight and travelling well, every chance 200 M out when just half a length down, no extra.
Raced 2-wide 8Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide into home straight and 5Ls down, kept on well without threatening principals.
Took a narrow lead from winner out 2-wide 800 M out, vied for the lead from then on until the 200 M when all out, no extra and lost runners-up spot at the 100 M.
Raced 2-wide 7Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down into home straight, no impression.
Very keen early on, throwing head about, 3-wide without cover and 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3Ls down into home straight, soon beaten.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 1L down and 3-wide at top of home straight, had every chance 200 M out, couldn't peg back the winner.
Raced 3-wide 6Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 4-wide without cover from 600 M out, 5Ls down entering straight, lacked pace of principals.
On fence 8Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 8Ls down but 4-wide into home straight, no chance.
On fence 7Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 5Ls down entering straight, kept on at same pace.
Awkwardly away, 5Ls or 6Ls off the pace on fence 1000 M out, driven along 600 M out and was 4Ls down entering straight, one-paced from then on.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off the pace on fence from early stages until home straight, could only keep on at the one pace through final stages.
Bumped at the start, 2-wide and 7Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 5Ls down turning for home, held up for a run from 300 M to 200 M when switched out wider, no impression.
Led 1200 M out on fence but soon disputing lead with PLANET RULER until home straight and then 200 M out, asserted about 100 M out, kept on well.
Slowly away, always detached from the main body of field, never competitive.
About 6th, 3Ls off lead, approaching home turn. Moved up comfortably to take command 200 M. Kept on well to line.
Last into straight where he made up some ground.
Midfield into home bend. Kept on steadily final 250 M.
Was 3rd halfway and 2nd on straightening. Disputed for lead 250 M. Found no extra close home.
Never troubled leaders.
Behind leaders in 4th into straight. Held every chance 250 M but found winner too strong.
