At back into straight where he stayed on a bit.
Led soon after start and was 2nd passing 1200 M. 3rd into straight where he dropped out steadily final 250 M.
Worse than midfield passing 1200 M and about 6th or 7th turning into straight. Switched out 300 M and kept on steadily.
In touch to straight where he ran on well closing stages to be nearest at finish.
Never on terms.
Was midfield, pushing hard home bend. Lost ground quickly on straightening.
Was prominent before taking control passing 1200 M and led field to straight. Was headed approaching 200 M and weakened.
About 9th 1000 M and same position on straightening. Unable quicken under pressure.
Steadied after start, behind midfield. Recovered ground to be 5th, 4Ls behind leader at 800 M. Made ground passing 400 M to reach 2nd very briefly 200 M. Soon found no extra.
Well there to 200 M. Faded.
Midfield. Kept on in straight until finding no extra passing 200 M.
Behind midfield. Crept closer to 4th early straight. Ran on without threatening.
Mainly 4th before improving to 3rd final turn. Only one-paced final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Made up good ground inside 200 M to grab 3rd near finish.
Always at the back.
Led field to 700 M. Held 3rd and was 3-wide final turn. Dropped out in straight.
Soon prominent. Took lead from 700 M. Held on well to win convincingly.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily in straight. Just missed 3rd final strides.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Never far off to home bend then faded gradually.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Well back. Finished strongly down centre of straight to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Well there. Came to tackle leader upon straightening despite slightly inconvenienced. Hit front inside 200 M only to be worn down in the shadows of the post.
Midfield. Lost position rounding home bend. Not much room early in straight. Produced some late headway.
In last few into straight. Ran on determinedly down straight to just get up on line.
Just behind midfield early stages. Improved steadily down back straight. Held every chance upon straightening but only kept on steadily without threatening.
Towards rear. Took closer order rounding home bend. Kept on same pace from midfield into straight.
Always struggling at the back.
Chased leader to straight, then weakened.
Led till finding no extra early in straight. Faded gradually.
Led, still holding 2Ls advantage 200 M. Kept on for 3rd when headed close home.
Prominent from a wide draw. Unable to hold place when 2nd early straight.
Held 2nd or 3rd to 150 M. Failed to quicken.
Last to final turn. Made up good ground on inner but failed to catch the winner.
Raced 5th to 400 M when he improved a bit to 4th. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Slightly behind midfield. Faded 200 M out.
Held 6th before dropping to 7th when checked passing 600 M. Ran on 250 M, just missed a minor placing.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Mainly 4th, gave a little ground when checked passing 600 M. Ran on steadily 250 M out to take lead close home.
Blundered at start, behind midfield. Made up some ground when wide in straight.
Was 2nd last to home bend. Made some moderate progress in straight.
Prominent. Shifted in for a run early in straight gaining 1L advantage 200 M out. Just held on.
Forward of midfield. Took closer order off Rock. Kept on from prominent position into straight before finding no extra closing stages.
Missed the break but picked up quickly to join rear of field. Not clear run 200 M out and kept on well to the line. (See Racing Incidents.)
Disputed lead to straight. Gradually weakened.
Prominent to home bend then gave ground gradually.
Towards rear throughout.
Attempted to make all. Headed inside 200 M.
Never seen with a chance.
Wide towards rear. Made up late ground. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Not clear run early in straight. Ran on late to be nearest at finish.
Always thereabouts but failed to quicken under pressure to threaten.
Well back. Made moderate progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Broke fairly from wide draw and soon eased to rear but closer to rail. Switched wide and pushed along to go forward turning for home. Made up steady ground in straight to grab 3rd place on the line.
Began well and pushed along to race behind leader on fence. Commenced to go forward after 400 M to be 1/2L down entering straight. Ran home well and was just edged out by winner on the line.
Slowly away and hard ridden to improve position. Passing winning post 1st time blundered and dropped to rear on rail. Made up good ground in straight and missed the placing by a short margin.
Raced in worse than midfield around 2-wide and was difficult to settle in the early stages. Hard ridden and switched out when making the home turn. Made up some ground inside final 200 M.
Began fairly and raced in mid-division on rail. Made steady improvement turning for home. Ran on well in straight and grabbed the winner spot in a ding-dong finish.
Slow to begin. Ridden hard to lead on fence from 1300 M. At 600 M commenced to lose ground quickly and tailed out thereafter.
Soon raced in mid-division around 2-wide. From 600 M was hard ridden to maintain position. Did not quicken in straight and stayed on evenly to the line.

Ridden hard but outpaced and was caught wide making 1st turn. From 1000 M steadily improved to race behind leader 3-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Began slowly and raced in rear section out wide making 1st turn. From 1200 M commenced to go forward to race 1-1/2L off leader going up Rock. From 400 M steadily lost position and weakened badly 200 M out.

Niggled along to race in forward position and steadily shifted in to be 2-wide. Took lead around 700 M with about 1L advantage through to straight. Headed at 200 M and further weakened in the closing stages.
Unable to muster early speed and raced in midfield 3-wide. Under pressure around 500 M out to maintain position. Made no impression in straight.

Broke well and soon settled in midfield. Hampered winning post 1st time and dropped to last on rail. At 400 M switched wide to obtain clear running and made slight improvement. Kept on one-paced in straight.
On fence 8Ls off speed 1200 M out, steadied 400 M out when 5Ls down on fence, stayed on without posing any kind of a threat to be nearest at the finish.
Slowly away, on fence 12Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 2-wide and 8Ls off the speed 600 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Raced 3-wide without cover 3Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 2Ls down but still 3-wide and driven along 600 M out, weakened in home straight.
On fence 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, raced keenly 1000 M out, 3Ls down on the fence turning for home, didn't quicken up and beaten over 200 M out.
Led on the fence 1200 M out, never more than three-parts of a length clear, headed 300 M out, kept on at same pace.
3-wide and 7Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 5Ls off speed down back straight, 4-wide into home straight, kept on well to nick 3rd place on the line.
Caught 3-wide 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, keen and 4-wide without cover 900 M out, 3Ls down and 4-wide entering straight, kept on evenly.
Bounded in air exiting gates, 2-wide and 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace from 1200 M to home straight, lengthened and led over 100 M out, readily.
1L off pace in 2nd place and 2-wide until home straight, led about 300 M out, headed by winner about 100 M out, no extra.
Crossed towards rail from wide gate, on fence 10Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 5Ls down and 2-wide 600 M out, short of running room from 500 M to 200 M, ran on well once in the clear.
Keen early on, raced 2-wide about 4Ls off the pace from 1200 M to 600 M out, soon under pressure and faded right out off home turn.
Had the run of the pace on fence 2Ls off the pace until home straight, didn't quicken up, one-paced to line.
Slow to begin. Settled near the rear. Slightly held up turning in. Made some ground in straight without threatening.
Eased back to rear from wide draw. Raced in last position until improved around field from 500 M out. Widest turning in. Made up good ground in straight.
Forward early but soon eased to shift towards rail. Raced midfield thereafter. Widest turning in, placed under pressure, never threatened.
On rails and 4Ls behind pacesetter at 800 M out. Under pressure from 300 M out and stayed on well. Unable to match pace with winner in straight but just made dead-head 2nd.
Just behind pace first turn. Travelled comfortably. Under pressure from 500 M. One-paced in the straight.
Nearly made all. Unable to defy winner in final 25 M and just held on dead-head 2nd place.
Pushed forward but 4-wide into first turn. Travelled in handy position until placed under pressure at 500 M. Never responded and weakened in straight.
Settled on rails near rear until final 400 M. 2-wide and 7Ls behind pace entering straight, ran on strongly and grabbed lead final 25 M.
Ridden hard early from inside draw to maintain midfield position. Remained there throughout until turning in. Made steady ground in straight without threatening placegetters.
Went forward from good draw and raced behind leader, began to weaken after 600 M, eased down in straight.
No early pace to be rearward 3-wide. Remained there until turning in where soon put under pressure but never made any ground.
Behind midfield early, niggled along early stages to maintain position. Under pressure on home bend, only one-paced.
Bumped exiting gates, ridden along to be 5-wide 3Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3-wide and 2Ls down 500 M out, 4-wide turning for home, dropped out.
Best away, disputed lead out 2-wide from start until 200 M out, no extra closing stages.
Disputed lead on fence from start until 200 M out, no extra and faded quickly.
Always towards rear, raced 3-wide 7Ls off the pace 600 M out, moderate late headway in home stretch.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls or 3Ls off speed down back straight, niggled along 500 M out, kept on gamely in straight to claim 3rd place in final strides.
Raced 3-wide and 3Ls off the pace until 600 M out, faded out rapidly from then on.
4-wide down the back straight when about 4Ls off the pace, hung in from the 600 M, 6-wide turning for home, no impression.
Race 4-wide 3Ls off the pace 800 M out, hung in from 600 M until turning for home when 5-wide, faded.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off the pace on fence through to 500 M out, 2-wide into the straight, didn't have much running room through closing stages, wasn't fully extended.
A little slowly away, on fence about 6Ls off the pace 700 M out, closer turning into home straight, stayed on well close to fence in straight to take 2nd place close home.
Missed the start and lost about 5Ls, recovered quite well to be 2-wide 5Ls off the pace 600 M out, under pressure at top of straight, found nothing.
Bit slowly away, on fence 4Ls off the pace until home straight, picked up well along rails to lead 180 M out, ran on strongly.
Around midfield. Kept on quite well final 200 M for a 4th.
Soon 2nd last. Ran on steadily passing course proper to take 2nd near 100 M.
In touch. Unable to quicken 250 M out.
Was there early, soon dropped back to behind midfield. Recovered a little ground 250 M but was one-paced closing stages.
Always prominent. Kept on for a remote 3rd. Hung out throughout.
Last throughout.
Never better than midfield.
Began awkwardly, raced in midfield. Dropped back steadily inside 300 M. Hung in throughout.
Led field to 400 M. Kept on well but found no extra while hanging out closing stages.
Prominent. Took lead 400 M out. Won going away.
Always well there. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Never better than midfield. Found nothing closing stages.
Well back. Finished well late.
Made no show.
Always thereabouts. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Midfield throughout. Kept on one pace.
Mostly in midfield. Steadied twice between 300 M and 200 M. No extra closing stages.
Never seen with a chance.
Always prominent. Fought on gamely for placing.
Around midfield. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Made all.
Well there to 300 M. Faded gradually.
Shared pace onto course proper then gradually weakened.
Prominent onto course proper then faded gradually.
Led. Held on well early straight. Unable to resist winner's challenge while headed closing stages.
Near rear. Made up good ground from outside final 300 M to take 3rd final 100 M.
Midfield. Moved up from outside to be 2nd 1000 M. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Soon moved up to be better than midfield passing 1200 M. Progressed to 4th briefly 250 M. Soon faded.
Never a factor.
Slowly away, at the rear. Only moderate progress under whip inside 300 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Moved up rounding home bend to be 3rd 650 M. Further improved to 2nd 300 M. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit when under pressure 250 M.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily from 600 M.
In touch early, soon steadied back towards rear. Recovered some ground rounding home bend to be in midfield. Only one-paced in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Dropped back from 800 M to be behind midfield. Recovered some ground final 250 M.
Raced 4th before dropping back to midfield 1000 M. Weakened from 300 M.
Well there. Mainly 1-1/2Ls behind lead on inner far side. Ran on well final 250 M to take command closing stages.
Settled just off the pace. Shifted out for a run shortly after straightening and gained upper hand closing stages.
Towards rear. Effort when wide rounding home bend. Ran on to be nearest at finish in straight.
Rear. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Well back. Made short-lived effort coming out of back straight. Kept on steadily to the line.
Took up running stables bend and led till headed inside 700 M. Faded gradually from 2nd into straight.
Prominent to straight. Faded.
Settled behind leaders. Took lead approaching home turn. Headed passing 200 M but fought on well for 2nd.
Midfield. Ran on in straight.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Mostly around midfield to straight. Found nothing.
Behind midfield to straight. Kept on well.
Always struggling at the back.
Took no part.
Settled in midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Jumped well from wide draw but soon taken back to mid-division out wide. Hung out and made up some ground turning for home. Ran on evenly in straight.
Jumped awkwardly and raced towards the tail around 3 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and only able to run past several beaten runners.
Began well but soon eased to worse than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M and made up little ground inside final 200 M but was never in position to trouble the placegetters.
Soon eased to the tail and shifted in closer to the rail. Switched out turning for home. Under pressure 300 M out and made up some ground inside final 200 M.

Did not jump well and hard ridden in the early stages to race outside leader. Stayed in similar position through to straight. Took lead from 400 M till 200 M, kept on well in straight but was no match for the 1st pair.
Ridden along but outpaced to race in rear section on rail through to straight. Made up some ground in early part of straight before being slightly held up near 200 M. One-paced thereafter.
Slowly away and soon recovered to race 3 wide 3Ls off race through to straight. When asked 250 M out made up steady ground but unable to find an extra gear to overhaul the winner.
Soon raced in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Unable to up a gear when put under pressure 300 M out and stayed one-pace to the line.

Began well and niggled along to race 3-wide around 2Ls off leader. At 800 M whilst racing awkwardly was checked. All out 350 M out and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.
Soon raced towards the rear around 3 wide and remained there till straightening. Made no impression in straight.
Best out and led briefly on fence. Headed at 1200 M and raced 1L off leader through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Niggled along to race in mid-division on fence through to straight. Steadied after 400 M and soon faded thereafter.
Slowly away and raced in rear towards the outside. Made steady improvement from the outside when making the turn. Did not quicken in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M. (Bled.)
Took lead at 1200 M and steadily shifted onto rail. Soon headed after straightening and weakened badly 250 M out.
Lost position 1500 M out to be 3-wide 4Ls off the pace, 2-wide and 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed from back straight to home straight, kept on evenly to be nearest at the finish.
Caught 4-wide 4Ls off the pace 1400 M out, always 3-wide and about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed down the back straight, under pressure 600 M out, weakened steadily.
Switched towards rail from wide gate early on, on fence 10Ls off the pace 1400 M out, 8Ls down in rear on fence and driven along off the final bend, no impression.
Raced 3-wide 7Ls off the pace 1400 M out, 5Ls down and 4-wide without cover 600 M out, 4-wide into home straight, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
On fence 8Ls off the pace 1400 M out, 2-wide and 5Ls or 6Ls down from 800 M to home straight, kept on okay but never better than midfield.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off the pace 1400 M out, on fence 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3Ls down turning for home, soon faded out.
Raced 3-wide 1L off the pace 1400 M out, similarly positioned but without cover through to home straight, soon had every chance, didn't pick up and was collared for 3rd place close home.
Bumped exiting gates, disputed lead early on out 2-wide before assuming advantage on fence from 1000 M out, headed at top of home straight and faded.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off the pace 1400 M out, towards inner and 5Ls off the pace from 800 M to home straight, made some late headway but was never dangerous.
On fence disputing lead 1400 M out, 1Ls down in 2nd place 1000 M out, 2-wide from 900 M out, led at top of home straight, three-quarters of a length up 200 M out and hard ridden, hung on gamely.
On fence 4Ls off the pace 1400 M out, was closer from 1000 M, 2Ls off the speed on inner entering home stretch, didn't quicken up, soon beaten.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace 1400 M out, was a bit keen in stages, still fairly close up turning for home, stayed on well without threatening principals.
3-wide 3Ls off the pace 1400 M out, always had cover down the back straight, 4-wide and 2Ls down entering straight, every chance 200 M out, just couldn't overhaul winner.
Raced 2-wide 9Ls off the pace 1400 M out, 2-wide and at least 7Ls behind leaders from 900 M out until home straight, drew a little closer inside final 200 M.
Raced 6-wide down the back straight when at least 8Ls off the pace, 5-wide turning for home and with no chance barring a miracle, kept on at same pace to be nearest at the finish.
Driven along from rear to be 3-wide and 5Ls off the pace 800 M out, all out to maintain this position entering straight, faded.
Always driven along on the inner, never better than 7Ls off the pace at any stage.
2-wide and 5Ls off the pace 800 M out, 6Ls or 7Ls down entering straight, still 6Ls down in 4th place 200 M out, ran on very strongly to lead on line.
Led narrowly on the fence 1000 M out, disputed lead until the top of the home straight, faded to be 2Ls down 200 M out, continued fading.
Raced 3-wide half a length off the pace 1000 M out, soon 3Ls off the pace in 3rd position from 800 M out to home straight and then 200 M out, kept on at the same pace throughout.
Never travelled a yard, always hard ridden, 3Ls down and driven along 800 M out, 5Ls down and struggling entering straight, became further detached. (Lame.)
Awkwardly away, 5-wide off the pace and 6Ls down 800 M out, 7Ls down and 3-wide entering straight and 200 M out, drew closer through final 200 M.
Slowly away, always driven along, 7Ls down 800 M out and 4-wide, worse off turning for home, kept on at same pace and was nearest at the finish.
Raced 2-wide in 2nd place a neck off the pace 1000 M out, led by half a length at top of home straight, 2Ls clear 200 M out, tired noticeably as the post approached and was caught on the line.
Was outpaced early on, over 8Ls down 800 M out and 5-wide, 7Ls down and 2-wide turning for home, 6Ls down alongside winner 200 M out, kept on well to be nearest at the finish.
Always tended to hang out, raced 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace 800 M out, 5Ls down and 2-wide entering straight, weakened further. (Bled.)
Raced keenly out 3-wide and 7Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 6Ls down and struggling entering home straight, no impression.
Slow to begin, on fence about 6Ls off the pace from 1000 M out to home straight, posed no sort of threat.
3-wide 2Ls off the pace 1100 M out, 2-wide and 2Ls down entering home straight, all out to hold this position at the 200 M out, no extra and faded close home.
Raced 4-wide without cover 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, struggling turning for home, tailed off.
Raced 3-wide and about 4Ls off the pace from 1000 M out until home straight, weakened steadily.
Awkwardly away, disputed lead on fence until 1100 M out when winner forged ahead, on the fence 2Ls or 3Ls off the speed until home straight, dropped out tamely.
Held up in rear 4-wide without cover and 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, 6Ls down and still rather wide turning for home, weakened.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down turning for home, kept on evenly to be nearest at the finish.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls or 3Ls off the speed from 1000 M out to 800 M, 3-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, one-paced from then on.
Was a bit keen early on, raced 2-wide 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 5Ls down entering straight, disappointed for running until 200 M out, no impression.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, no impression.
Always prominent, led 1100 M out, 2Ls clear on fence 900 M out, still 2Ls to the good 200 M out, quickened clear, decisively.
Over-raced in parts, was 4Ls off the pace on the fence 800 M out, niggled along 600 M out, 4Ls down turning for home, soon flattened out.
On fence 7Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 2-wide and 5Ls down entering straight, 4Ls down and vying for a place 200 M out, stayed on quite well to claim runners-spot close home.
Raced 2-wide 10Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 4-wide and 6Ls behind turning for home, ran on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
Checked exiting gates, on fence 6Ls off the speed 1200 M out, raced keenly in stages, 5Ls down turning for home, 4Ls down 200 M out, one-paced to line.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, travelled well when 4-wide and 3Ls off the pace entering straight, led about 100 M out, ran on well.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off the speed on the fence until home straight, dropped out rapidly after straightening.
Keen and 3-wide and 6Ls off the speed 1200 M out, was without cover down the back straight, 4-wide into home straight and 5Ls off the speed, faded.
Badly checked exiting gates, over-raced early on, on fence 10Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 6Ls down and 3-wide off home turn, 4Ls down 200 M out, ran on strongly to be nearest at finish.
On fence about 9Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 6Ls down and 5-wide into home straight, no acceleration.
Keen early on, raced 3-wide 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 2Ls down, all out to maintain this position 200 M out, no extra and faded.
Led on fence 1300 M out, never clear by more than 1L, still in front turning for home, headed 200 M out, kept on dourly at the same speed.
Was severely hampered exiting gates, 2-wide 12Ls off the speed 1100 M out, 6-wide into home straight when about 9Ls down, no chance.
Bounded exiting gates, was keen early on, raced 2-wide 6Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls down entering straight, could only stay on at the one pace to line.
On fence 4Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 2-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, didn't pick up and was backtracking 200 M out.
Raced 2-wide 1L off the pace 1300 M out, briefly led at the top of the home straight, still well there 200 M out, was suddenly eased down with jockey clearly concerned for horse's welfare.
Raced 2-wide and about 3Ls off the speed from 1200 M to 600 M, 1L down and 3-wide into home straight, led 200 M out, soon grabbed by winner 100 M out, no extra.
Prominent early, soon raced 4th until finding no extra inside 150 M.
Began awkwardly, remained in midfield until weakened steadily final 200 M.
Slowly away, was 2nd last to 250 M. Made up some ground from outside, never nearer.
Prominent. Led or disputed for lead from 1000 M. Gained upper hand final turn. Unable to quicken when headed 200 M.
Behind midfield. Found not much room 300 M. Ran on quite well when in clear inside 200 M.
Behind midfield. Ran on strongly from 9th on outside near 300 M to assert authority final 100 M. Won impressively.
Prominent. Led or disputed for lead from 1000 M. Headed final turn but regained advantage 200 M. Unable to resist place-getters' fast finish closing stages.
Moved up from widest draw to be 3rd 1000 M out. Weakened out of contention soon after straightening.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to take 2nd closing stages.
Jumped well, was prominent before dropping to 5th 900 M. Found no clear run and was not ridden out final 200 M.
At the back. Soon tailed off. (Lame.)
Towards rear throughout.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on well final 300 M to take command close home. Won readily.
Midfield to final turn. Weakened.
Never able to feature.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered some ground final turn and was 5-wide early straight. Ran on solidly to take 3rd passing 200 M.
Towards rear. Last from 1400 M to 400 M. Recovered some ground in straight, doing best work final 200 M.
Prominent. Pushed along passing 1200 M to take lead 950 M. Weakened when headed 300 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Jumped well and led field to 950 M. Remained 3rd on inner rounding home bend. Regained advantage 300 M but unable to resist winner's challenges closing stages.
Tardy start, near rear. Ran on steadily final 250 M.
In touch early, settled behind midfield. Found not much room from 400 M to 250 M. Ran on when in clear.
Behind midfield. Made progress to 4th 800 M. Weakened inside 300 M.
Well there to 900 M, then dropped back to midfield. Kept on moderately until finding no extra inside 200 M.
In touch. Improved to 2nd 800 M. Kept on until failing to hold place inside 250 M.
Slowly away, soon recovered ground to be better than midfield. Dropped back steadily from 5th early straight.
Close up. Made modest progress without threatening in straight.
Well there. Took up running rounding home bend. Headed shortly after straightening and gradually faded inside 300 M.
Settled in last few. Improved to midfield on rail turning in. Kept on well to the line. (Bled.)
Midfield to straight. Soon weakened.
In last few throughout. One-paced.
Held up behind midfield. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Always well there. Behind runners upon straightening. Ran on steadily without threatening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never nearer.
Led briefly far side. Regained lead shortly after straightening and gradually drew clear. Comfortably.
Mostly in forward of midfield. One-paced in straight.
Rear. Making headway when hampered coming out of back straight. Ran on past beaten runners in straight.
Towards rear. Made progress past beaten runners down centre of straight.
Raced keenly behind midfield early. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Never far off to 200 M then weakened.
Behind midfield. Weakened 200 M.
Midfield. Gradual progress to 5th turning in. Kept on.
Better than midfield. Slightly improved to pair up 3rd early straight. One-paced final 200 M.
Well there early, settling 4th. Dropped back steadily from home turn.
Towards rear. Slight improvement final turn. Made no show in straight.
Soon led. Held on well until headed inside 100 M.
Sat outside leader passing 1200 M. Gained slender advantage 100 M but was caught narrowly near finish.
Towards rear. Made up some ground when given reminders inside 250 M.
Pushed along from inner to be 3rd from 1000 M. Remained there until running on strongly final 200 M to gain upper hand close home.
Restrained to the rear on inside from a wide gate. Made up some ground in straight.
Towards rear. Held up when lack of galloping room early straight. Ran on well when in clear final 250 M.
Midfield. Unable to make any impression in straight.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Jumped best. Settled just off the pace. Hit front over 300 M out but swamped closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent early. Settled in midfield. Shifted out turning in. Kept on well.
Made no show.
Around midfield. Ran on early in straight without threatening.
Led till overhauled over 300 M out.
Steadied to rear early. Produced good late headway final 300 M to reach 4th position home.
Behind midfield. Found no room on rail before 200 M in straight. Kept on.
Towards rear. Ran on to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Around midfield. Commenced run upon straightening and gained upper hand close to home. (Lame.)
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Raced wide in midfield. Kept on one pace under pressure closing stages.
Around midfield to straight. Weakened.
Towards rear. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled in 3rd to straight then gradually weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke fairly and was taken back to worse than midfield 3 wide. Only ran on moderately when asked 350 M out and ran past several beaten runners inside the final 200 M.
Ridden handy in the early stages and took lead from 1100 M till 150 M out. Kept on well there after and missed the placing by a short margin.
Soon raced in rear. Dropped to the tail turning for home. One-paced in straight and only ran past several beaten horses in the final stages.
Slowly away and soon recovered to race behind leader through to straight. Did not quicken when asked 350 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Raced in rear section on rail and was inconvenienced at 800 M. Made no impression in straight.
Began very awkwardly and raced at back on inner. Switched out turning for home. Only kept on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.
Began well and niggled along to race 2Ls off pace 2 wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out but was unable to match speed with the first pair.

Niggled along to race in forward position on fence. In the early stages proved difficult to settle. Kept in similar position through to straight. No extra in straight and further weakened after 200 M mark.
Jumped fairly and soon raced in mid-division 2 wide through to straight. Was slightly held up in the early part of straight. Made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Soon raced around 3Ls off pace 3 wide through to straight. All out 300 M out and ran on well but unable to fend the challenge from winner to settle for 2nd place.
Soon raced in midfield on rail through to straight. Only obtained clear running 150 M out and made up little ground in the closing stages.
Began well and soon eased to race 2 wide around 5 to 6Ls off pace through to straight. Switched out and ran home strongly when asked 300 M out to win convincingly.
Best out and led briefly before being headed around 1100 M. Soon raced behind leader on rail through to straight. One-paced in straight and further weakened in the closing stages.
Began fairly from wide draw and soon eased to rear but closer to rail. Switched out and made some improvement turning for home. Plugged on evenly in straight and ran past several beaten runners.
2Ls off the pace nearest far rail until 600 M out, driven along to little effect thereafter.
Raced 1L or 2Ls off the pace in about 4th place until final 200 M, kept on well to claim 3rd spot despite being hit on head at the 100 M and being carried out wider nearer line.
Never better than 5Ls off the lead at any stage.
Reared up exiting gates and lost at least 5Ls as a result, tailed off a long way out.
Always chasing principals from about 3Ls or 4Ls off the pace until 200 M out, one-paced and further behind when checked near the line.
Managed to get within 3Ls of the lead 800 M out, struggling to keep up 600 M out, not competitive thereafter.
Fractious in the gates, slowly away, never competitive and never better than 5Ls off the lead at any point.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Raced half a length off the pace in 3rd until 500 M out, driven along thereafter, weakened markedly and appeared to lose action inside final 200 M.
About 2Ls or 3Ls off the speed until 200 M out, kept on at the same pace.
Always led, clear by about half a length 400 M out, 1L to the good 200 M out, asserted further, impressive.
Awkwardly into stride, never a factor.
Always on the speed but tended to hang out, in 2nd or 3rd place no worse off than 1L behind until 200 M out, kept on well for 2nd place.
2Ls off the pace 800 M out, driven along to keep up 500 M out, soon faded out.
Raced towards far rail about 2Ls off the pace until 500 M out when driven along, kept on well for pressure but never looked like sticking his head in front.
Always in rear, 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, never got any closer.
Up against the far rail 1L off the pace 800 M out, 2Ls down and all out at the 400 M out, weakened.
Awkwardly away but recovered to be half a length off the pace 800 M out, under pressure to keep up from 500 M out, dropped away gradually.
Always close up, about 1L off the pace, down centre of track until the 400 M, loomed up with every chance 200 M out when a neck down, no extra close home.
Led early on, never clear by more than half a length until 200 M out, battled well but overpowered by winner 50 M out, hung on well for 2nd place.
Inconvenienced exiting gates, raced about 2Ls off the pace until 300 M out, kept on well to hit the front 50 M out, won going away.
Prominent about half a length off the speed through first half of the race, couldn't sustain effort through final 400 M.
Slowly into stride, soon recovered to be no worse than half a length off the pace until 300 M when holding every chance of success, faded noticeably inside final 50 M.
Held up to race 3Ls off the pace until 400 M out, a little closer 200 M out but never really threatened principals.
2Ls off the pace 800 M out, lost position when crowded out at the 600 M, 3Ls down 200 M out, faded steadily.
Kept within 3Ls off the pace until 400 M out, soon under pressure and faded out.
Inconvenienced exiting gates, off the bridle 700 M out when 4Ls down, never a factor.
Keen early on racing 2-wide 3Ls or 4Ls off the front from back to homestretch, soon outpaced.
Was 2 and 3-wide and about 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed down the back straight until home straight, soon outpaced and left with no chance.
Disputed lead out 2-wide 1000 M out, tended to over-race in places, half a length behind in 2nd place entering straight, 2Ls down in 3rd 200 M out, no extra and soon lost 3rd place.
Slowly away, raced 2-wide and about 5Ls off the pace from back to home straight, plugged on at the one pace to line.
Raced 2-wide and about 2Ls or 3Ls off the speed until home straight, never quickened up and was beaten 300 M out.
Raced 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace out 3-wide down the back, worse off and under pressure off the home bend, weakened right out.
Slowly away, raced 4-wide 8Ls off the pace down the backstretch, 7-wide into home straight, soon with no chance.
Raced 4 and 5-wide down the back straight, advanced from being 5Ls off the pace 1100 M out to 2Ls off the pace 800 M out, was spent not long after straightening.
Slowly away, held up towards the rear down the back straight, travelled well racing 3-wide 7Ls off the pace 600 M out, awkwardly placed off home turn, no acceleration.
Led 1100 M out on the fence, but was headed by GREEN CENTURY soon after, led again turning for home, joined by winner from 250 M to 200 M, headed soon after, no extra.
Slowly away, raced 4 and 5-wide down the back straight when about 6Ls off the leaders, 6-wide into home straight, soon with no chance.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off the speed until home straight, disputing lead from 250 M to 200 M, asserted soon after, stayed on.
On fence 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace until home stretch, ran on fairly to claim 3rd spot late on.
Severely checked back to 3-wide and 5Ls off the pace 1100 M out, 5-wide and 6Ls down entering straight, no impression.
Raced on the fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace from 1400 M out to home straight, picked up well to lead at the 200 M, ran on strongly.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off the pace from 1400 M out until the 800 M, was no better off turning for home, kept on at the pace to the line.
Raced 3-wide 3Ls off the pace 1400 M out, was caught without cover for most of back straight, 1L down and 2-wide turning for home in 2nd place, weakened grudgingly in homestretch.
Crowded exiting gates, keen early on racing 8Ls or 9Ls off the pace and out 3-wide 1400 M out, 4-wide into the home straight, faded rapidly.
Crowded exiting gates, 2-wide and 10Ls off the pace 1400 M out, struggling when 4-wide into the home straight, dropped out.
Led narrowly on the fence at the mile pole, headed by IDOL 1200 M out, raced about 2Ls off the pace on fence until home straight, kept on fairly well through closing stages.
Settled 2-wide and about 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace 1400 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down turning for home, running on strongly when 2Ls down 200 M out, couldn't sustain effort.
Had a good sit 2-wide and about 3Ls off the speed from 1400 M out to 800 M, under pressure to hold this position turning for home, didn't quicken up and beaten over 200 M out.
Crowded exiting gates, 2 and 3-wide and well over 10Ls off the pace until 600 M, straightened up still well behind and 3-wide, 6Ls down at the 200 M, kept on well to be nearest at the finish.
Crowded exiting gates, raced 2-wide and over 10Ls off the lead down the back straight, 3-wide and 9Ls down on the swing, no impression.
On fence and 5Ls off the pace 1400 M out, hard ridden to lie up from 1200 M out, no chance from 600 M out.
Slowly away, checked 1400 M out to being 10Ls off the pace and 2-wide, 8Ls down 800 M out, 4-wide and 7Ls down into homestretch, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Prominent but 3-wide around the stable bend, led 1200 M out, 2Ls clear 600 M out, grabbed by winner at the 200 M, weakened.
Never better than 12 Ls off the pace at any stage. (Lame.)
Well there to halfway and was about midfield home turn. Dropped out quickly on straightening.
Ran 4th into straight. Unable quicken to challenge and faded close home.
Well there before dropping to midfield 1000 M. Made no show thereafter.
Midfield 1200 M and similar position early straight. Doing best work inside final 200 M.
About 8th into home bend and 6th on straightening. Ran on steadily to claim 3rd near finish.
Prominent to straight where he dropped out steadily from the 250 M.
Settled in rear to straight. Switched out 300 M and stayed on under pressure.
Was 5th or 6th rounding home bend before improving to be 4th 400 M. Reached 3rd 200 M out before finding no extra near finish.
Always handy. Was 2nd early in straight before staying on to hit front and gain narrow advantage 150 M. Looked winner but caught towards finish.
Made steady headway approaching 1000 M to be midfield on straightening. Kept on but didn't find much room closing stages.
Slowly away and was in rear to straight. Made up some late ground inside 200 M.
Well there briefly.
Led field to 200 M when challenged. Was headed 150 M but rallied gamely to regain lead final strides.
Never a factor.
Midfield from widest draw. Improved gradually to 3-wide 5th 1st turn. 4-wide entering straight. Ran on well to take control 150 M. Won readily.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily from outside final 250 M.
Soon towards rear. No progress. (Bled.)
Prominent. Pushed along to take lead passing 1000 M. Held on until headed 150 M.
Slowly away, in the last pair. Recovered some late ground closing stages.
Prominent briefly early before settling in midfield. Held up early straight, then one-paced when in clear 250 M.
In touch. Weakened soon after straightening.
Behind midfield. Crept closer order on inner turning in. Kept on.
Towards rear. Held up early straight. Recovered good ground when in clear final 250 M.
Led field to 1000 M. Remained 2nd until failing to hold place inside 200 M.
Given reminders early to be in touch. Faded inside 250 M.
Slowly away, in the last pair. Ran past a few beaten horses 200 M.
Made no show.
Prominent to 300 M. No extra. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame.)
In last few most of way.
Broke best and made all to win convincingly.
Raced on its own along inside rails. Dropped out passing 350 M.
Soon in rear.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent to 200 M then gradually faded.
Began well. Chased leader onto course proper but never able to threaten.
Mostly in midfield. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening.
Jumped awkwardly. Settled in midfield. One-paced.
Mainly 4th before moving up early straight to assert authority near 300 M. Won unchallenged.
Midfield. Steady progress from 1000 M to be 5th home bend. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Better than midfield. Kept on until finding no extra inside 200 M. (Bled.)
Led early stages. Remained prominent before weakening out of contention 250 M out.
Soon last. Widest in straight. Made up good ground under pressure 250 M.
Prominent. Moved up to tackle leader 800 M. Joint lead early straight. Found no extra when beaten 200 M.
Midfield. Made ground steadily passing 300 M. Hung in closing stages.
Behind midfield. Made moderate progress in straight.
Behind midfield throughout.
Near rear. Ran on steadily in straight to take 2nd 150 M. Never able to threaten.
Moved up early stages to take lead from 1300 M. Was joined home turn. Faded when headed near 300 M.
Never a factor.
Slowly away, near rear. Recovered some late ground closing stages.
Midfield. Checked near 1400 M. Dropped back steadily.
Always struggling at the back.
Never better than midfield. Faded gradually in straight.
Rear into straight. Made up ground past beaten runners in straight.
Midfield throughout. Kept on one pace in straight.
Remote 4th to straight. Gave ground under pressure.
Never seen with a chance.
Behind leader throughout. Failed to quicken to challenge in straight.
Virtually made all. Hung on well under pressure.
Always thereabouts. Unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily on inner to be nearest at finish.
Mostly in forward of midfield. Faded into straight. (Lame.)
Forward of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily to the line.
Forward of midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Raced in mid-division. Under pressure around 400 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.
Raced in mid-division. Pushed along to maintain position at 600 M and kept on evenly to the line.
Soon raced in midfield. Commenced to lose ground at 400 M and weakened badly inside final 200 M.
Raced in mid-division and commenced to weaken 450 M out. Tailed off from 200 M.
Jumped well and was immediately taken back to rear section with cover. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M.
Outpaced in the early stages to race at back. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Broke well and raced in prominent position. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and stayed one-paced to the line.
Jumped fairly. Soon raced in prominent position. All out about 300 M and ran on steadily to grab 2nd place in the closing stages.
Raced in prominent position till 400 M. Did not quicken thereafter and further weakened in the closing stages.
Missed the start and raced at back. Stayed one-paced when asked 350 M out and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Began slowly. Steadily shifted out and improved to prominent position 750 M out. Ran on fairly when asked 300 M out but was overhauled by 2nd placegetter in the final stages.
Began well and soon led with around 1L advantage. Under pressure 300 M out and ran home strongly to win comfortably.
Slowly away. Unable to master early speed to race in rear section. Under pressure 350 M out and made up some ground inside final 300 M.
Niggled along but outpaced to race in worse than midfield. Made no impression when asked 300 M out.
Led by 1L out 2-wide 1300 M out, half a length clear 800 M out, went 2Ls to the good on straightening, over 1L in front 200 M out, hung out under pressure but kept on gamely.
8Ls off the speed and 2-wide 1200 M out, 5Ls behind from 800 M to straightening up out 5-wide, 3Ls down at the 200 M, no extra.
Had a good position down the back straight on fence about 3Ls off the pace, was very one-paced in home straight.
Shifted sharply left exiting gates, 4-wide without cover about 1L or 2Ls off the pace from 1200 M out to 800 M, 2-wide and 2Ls down 600 M out, faded rapidly from top of straight.
Slowly away, 9Ls off the pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 6-wide and 6Ls down off the home turn, no impression.
Raced keenly early on, 4Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 3Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, stayed on at the same pace.
Very keen down the back straight, was always 3-wide and 1L or 2Ls off the pace, 3-wide and 2Ls behind turning for home, faded rapidly.
On fence 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, niggled along when 2-wide and 5Ls down 900 M out, disappointed for running 500 M out, never threatened principals in straight. (Lame.)
2-wide and 7Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down 800 M out, 4-wide and 4Ls down turning for home, 2Ls down in 3rd place 200 M out, stayed on well but no threat to winner.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off the speed 1200 M out, driven along when 4-wide into home straight and 3Ls down, every chance when in 2nd place 250 M out, one-paced from then on. (See Racing Incidents.)
On fence 10Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 5-wide and 6Ls behind the lead on straightening, remained in rear.
On fence between 6Ls and 8Ls off the pace from 1200 M to 800 M out, switched inside off heels about 300 M out, stayed on at the one pace in straight and never dangerous.
Driven to lead on fence very early on, ceded advantage to winner 1300 M out, on fence 1L or 2Ls off the pace until home straight, weakened steadily.
Caught 5-wide 1400 M out, moved inside 1300 M out, 2-wide and 5Ls off the pace when niggled along 800 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, one-paced and always tended to hang in.
Always tended to hang out, 3-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls off the speed and driven along to keep up 600 M out, 4-wide into home straight, soon no chance.
Slowly away, on fence 10Ls off the pace 1200 M out, travelled smoothly out 2-wide and 5Ls behind turning for home, picked up well to lead about 80 M out, ran on strongly.
Never travelled that well, was 2-wide and 10Ls off the pace down the back straight, 8Ls down on the home turn, never a factor.
Was prominent early until 1000 M out, began fading from then on, tailed off even before the turn for home. (Lame.)
About 8Ls off the pace and 3 and 4-wide without cover from 1200 M to home straight, never competitive.
3-wide 3Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 1L down 800 M out, disputing lead turning out 3-wide turning for home, 1L to the good 200 M out, collared by winner about 80 M out, no extra.
Slowly away, raced 2-wide and 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 4-wide and 4Ls down turning for home, 3Ls down 200 M out, found no extra.
Shifted across to rails from widest gate and exiting stalls, 10Ls off the pace on the fence down the back straight, hard pressed to get within 6Ls off the lead turning for home, no impression.
On the fence half a length off the speed in 2nd place 1200 M out, soon driven along to remain in touch, 2Ls down and 2-wide at top of home straight, dropped out very quickly.
Awkwardly away and driven along early on, couldn't lead, settled 2Ls or 3Ls off pace on fence from about 1200 M out to home straight, soon weakened.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off the pace from 1200 M to 800 M out, 3-wide and still 2Ls down on straightening, all out to be 1L down 200 M out, soon passed by winner.
Raced 3-wide half a length off the pace 1200 M out, disputed lead out 2-wide turning for home, weakened steadily.
Ridden to lead by half a length out 2-wide 1200 M out, headed about 600 M out, faded out tamely from then on.
Awkwardly away, jockey appeared uncomfortable with saddle position, 10Ls off the pace and 2-wide 900 M out, 10Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, was never competitive. (See Racing Incidents.)
No speed early on, on fence 10Ls off the pace as early as 1000 M out, 8Ls down turning for home, made some moderate headway through beaten rivals.
Always tended to hang out, 6Ls off the pace in 6th place 800 M out, soon off the bridle and struggling turning into home straight, finished tailed off down centre of track.
Disputed lead out 2-wide until 800 M out, weakening in 3rd place when 3Ls down at top of home straight, continued to fade out.
4Ls off the speed on the fence in 4th place 800 M out, similarly placed but a bit wider on straightening, ran on quite well to be nearest at the finish.
Raced 2 and 3-wide and about 5Ls or 6Ls off the pace until the home straight, very one-paced from then on.
Caught 4-wide and 10Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 6Ls down and 3-wide turning for home, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
About 10Ls off the speed and 3-wide at the 1000 M, was without cover in parts of the back straight, 4-wide turning for home when 6Ls down, posed no sort of threat.
Disputed early lead racing 2 and 3-wide, went in front by about half a length from the 800 M, headed by winner about 600 M out and was a length down entering straight, weakened steadily.
Best away but soon restrained to sit 8Ls off the lead and 2-wide 800 M out, 3-wide into home straight and still 8Ls down, ran on well enough to be nearest at the finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced about 1L off the pace on the fence until about 600 M out, went about half a length in front at top of home straight, 2Ls clear 200 M out, pulled further clear, easily.
Slowly away, was always outpaced and was never better than 8Ls off the pace at any stage.
Shifted out exiting gates, raced 3 and 4-wide without cover in place, was 4Ls behind the leader 800 M out, hard ridden and 4Ls down entering home straight, soon faded.
Raced 2-wide half a length off pace 1000 M out, dropped back to take the run of the race 2Ls off the lead on fence until home straight, still 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on at same pace.
Bounded in the air on exiting gates, 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace 900 M out, a little closer but niggled along 600 M out, was 3-wide into the home straight, no acceleration.
Broke well, held up to be 10Ls off the pace on the fence 900 M out, soon driven along and detached from main body of field entering straight, no chance.
Inconvenienced exiting gates, was almost 10Ls off the lead 1000 M out, 3-wide and 7Ls off the speed 600 M out, staying on well when 3Ls down 200 M out, couldn't sustain effort.
Fractious in gates, slowly away and was already 10Ls detached from main body of field at the 1000 M, never a factor. (Lame.)
Never better than 7Ls off the pace after the 1000 M, was struggling along way from home.
About 6Ls off the speed down the back straight when 3-wide, 5Ls down and 4-wide on the swing for home, was rather one-paced to the line.
Was half a length off the pace out 3-wide 1000 M out, still well there at the turn for home, all out to be a neck behind in 2nd place 200 M out, faded inside final 150 M.
Sluggishly into stride, recovered quickly to lead on the fence 1000 M out, never more than half a length clear until home straight, still in front at the 200 M, headed 100 M out, no extra.
On the fence about 4Ls off the lead down the back straight, 3Ls behind and travelling well off the home turn, didn't quicken up and was beaten 200 M out. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Settled about 5Ls off the pace and 2-wide through to home straight, picked up well to be 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on finding and led about 100 M out, won going away.
Never better than midfield.
4th approaching home turn. Kept on till finding no extra close home.
Never troubled leaders.
Midfield into straight. Unable quicken when asked.
Soon took up running and led field to straight. Was challenged 200 M and found one-pace near finish.
In touch to straight where he failed to find much room on the inside 200 M out. Kept on near finish.
Never on terms.
Soon in rear where he stayed.
Midfield halfway and was about 5th or 6th 300 M. Unable quicken to challenge.
Well there and was 2nd into straight. Challenged under pressure and held every chance passing 200 M. Caught by winner close home.
Well there before dropping to 6th 1000 M and was about 9th early in straight. Came under pressure 300 M and kept on closing stages.
Never far off to straight where he ran on to threaten inside final 200 M.
Settled worse than midfield to straight. Ran on well from 250 M to lead near finish.
Last early and was among rear group swinging into straight. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Last from 800 M.
Soon prominent. Held 3rd on the rail far side. Sustained effort in straight to take lead close home.
Prominent. Dropped back to 8th after hampered 950 M. Never able to recover.
Slightly behind midfield. Weakened 250 M.
In touch. Inconvenienced near 1000 M. Maintained 4th or 5th until losing touch in straight. Raced greenly throughout.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Took lead to 250 M. Just held on for a minor placing.
Towards rear early. Moved up from outside to be 5th 800 M. Further improved to 3rd home bend. Found no extra soon after straightening.
In touch. Improved to 2nd 800 M out. Took over from 250 M. Kept on but was headed close home.
Midfield early. Soon dropped to the rear group. No progress.
Towards rear. Crept closer turning in. Ran on in straight to be nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield along rail. Kept on in straight.
Mostly 4-wide behind midfield. Kept on steadily down centre of track.
Hampered at start. Quickly recovered to midfield along rails. No clear passage upon straightening and shifted out for a run 200 M out. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Never rearer.
Prominent. Quickened to lead 200 M out and hung on well.
Began awkwardly but improved to prominent position. Disputed lead into straight but unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Never better than midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Towards rear. Took closer order turning in and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Attempted to make all. Gradually gave ground under pressure and headed passing 200 M.
Midfield to home bend. Dropped out.
Never far off to home bend when faded under pressure.
Behind midfield. Effort when wide far side. Weakened under pressure passing 400 M.
Well back. Made up good ground from last into straight.
Towards rear. Crept closer to midfield turning in. Ran on but failed to catch the first pair.
Made most. Was joined 200 M. Held on well but lost narrowly close home.
2nd last from a wide draw. Widest turning in. Made up some ground when under pressure in straight.
Mostly 10th to 250 M. Stayed on.
In touch along rail. Responded well early straight to join the lead 200 M. Gained upper hand close home.
Midfield or slightly behind. One-paced.
Slowly away. Soon recovered ground to the 3rd. Was 2nd approaching 1000 M. Kept on until failing to hold place 350 M.
Slightly better than midfield and was 3-wide without cover. Hung out home turn. Faded.
Behind midfield and 3-wide. Made no show when wide into straight.
Midfield. Improved to 4th 600 M. Dropped back a bit to midfield home turn. One-paced.
Well there. Mainly 3rd on inner before gaining 2nd briefly final turn. Unable to quicken thereafter.
Led until overhauled over 200 M out.
Rear early. Made good headway rounding home bend. Ran on steadily from midfield into straight.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield throughout. Kept on one pace.
Around midfield. Made modest progress final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Chased leader to straight, then gradually weakened.
Settled at the back. Ran on past beaten runners in straight.
Never in contention.
Broke well. Settled just off the pace. Hit front shortly after straightening but caught near finish.
In last few to straight. Ran on past beaten horses closing stages.
Settled in 5th in forward of midfield. Not clear run upon straightening. Ran on to gain upper hand closing stages.
Never far off. Ran on steadily to hold some chance 200 M out.
Soon led on rail with no more than 1-1/2Ls advantage through to straight. Ran home strongly when asked 200 M out to win comfortably.
Raced in worse than midfield out wide. Placed under pressure turning for home to hold position. Made up little ground in the closing stages.
Raced at back on rail through to straight. Made no impression when asked 200 M out.
Ridden hard but outpaced to race in worse than midfield around 3-wide. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Unable to muster early speed to race in worse than midfield on rail. Turning for home and in the straight hung out. Did not quicken in straight and stayed one-paced to the line.
Soon raced in worse than midfield 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 200 M out but failed to respond.
Began awkwardly and soon recovered to race outside leader through to straight. Under pressure 200 M out and ran on fairly but was no match for the winner.
Slowly away to race at back on rail. Tailed off 450 M out.
Niggled along to race around 1-1/2Ls off pace 2-wide. Under pressure 450 M out to maintain position, and kept on evenly to the line.
Jumped fairly but was taken to a rearward position towards the outside. Made up some ground inside the final 200 M.
Broke well and raced on fence around 1-1/2Ls off leader through to straight. All out 250 M out but only kept on evenly and was overhauled by 3rd placegetter on the line.
Began well from outside draw. Soon eased to race 3Ls off pace and shifted in to take rail running. Made up steady ground in straight to grab 3rd place on the line.
About 5Ls or 6Ls off the pace on the fence 1000 M out, struggling to keep up when 8Ls down on straightening, weakened further.
Disputed lead out 3-wide 1000 M out, raced 2-wide half a length off the pace 600 M out, 2Ls down and steadily weakening 200 M out, kept fading.
Switched towards inside rail upon exiting gates, 10Ls off the pace and 2-wide 900 M out, 3-wide into home straight when same distance off lead, never a factor.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off the pace from 900 M to home straight, made some late headway final 200 M but was much too late.
Disputed lead out 2-wide at the 1000 M, left with the run on fence 2Ls off the pace from 800 M to home straight, still 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on well up the fence to lead final strides.
Bounded in air exiting gates, on fence 8Ls off the pace 900 M out, was no closer when 4-wide into home straight, finished off at same pace.
Caught 3-wide and 2Ls off the pace at the 1000 M, tended to race greenly throughout, 4Ls down when veering extremely wide turning for home, no chance from then on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Didn't break well, disputed lead on fence 1000 M out, was 1L clear 800 M to home straight when travelling well, still 1L to the good 200 M out, all out but collared by winner final strides.
Was very wide and awkward round first bend with head up, raced 3-wide 4Ls off the speed 700 M out, hard ridden at the 500 M, one-paced and not dangerous in homestretch.
Carried wider from outside gate early on, went from 5 and 6-wide and 3Ls off the pace 900 M to 3-wide without cover 1L off the pace 600 M out, one-paced in straight and beaten 250 M out.
Raced 3Ls off the pace and 4-wide 1000 M out, drifted back to be 2-wide and about 7Ls off the front at the 600 M, never competitive from then on.
3-wide and 3Ls off the pace at the 1000 M out, got onto fence 4Ls off the pace 600 M out, travelled well turning for home, ran on okay but never quite threatened quinella pair.
Eased back from wide draw to near rear. On rails and 6Ls or 7Ls behind pace 600 M out. Made up steady ground along rails rounding home turn. Ran on without threatening.
3-wide and 5Ls behind pace entering first turn. At midfield throughout backstraight. Did not respond under pressure and only ran past some weakening runners.
Settled near rear until commencing its move at 600 M out. Made up good ground from 4-wide position at the home turn. Stayed on well but had no chance with winner.
Settled slightly behind midfield and 2-wide. Ridden hard from 600 M out and was 3-wide rounding home bend. Kept on well but was unable to close in on winner.
Soon settled near pace and 2-wide. Took lead 600 M out and led by 1L entering home straight. Weakened.
Widest entering first turn. Remained behind midfield and 3-wide in backstraight. Ridden hard from 600 M out and was unable to hold position when pace quickened. Never a factor.
3-wide and near pace early. No response when put under pressure from 600 M out and dropped out rapidly.
Travelled comfortably on rails at midfield. 3-wide turning in, under pressure. Led momentarily 250 M out, one-paced and was overtaken by placegetters at 100 M.
Just behind pace first turn. Remained 1L or 2Ls behind pace entering straight. Found nothing thereafter.
Ridden hard early to be 2Ls behind pace at the first turn. Under pressure from 800 M out to keep position. 4-wide turning in. Ran on well in straight and took control 100 M out.
Led until 700 M out. Under pressure 400 M out, never quickened.
Settled at rear early until placed under pressure from 500 M out. Unable to find clear run in the early part of the straight. Ran on strongly and made up some late ground in the closing stages.
Shifted in at the 1400 M to race 2 and 3-wide and about 6Ls off the pace in 4th place 800 M out, niggled along 600 M out to get closer, all out to remain 3Ls off the pace entering straight, faded.
Settled on fence in rear early on, at least 15Ls off the lead at the 900 M, still rear and 8Ls down turning for home, 6Ls down 200 M out, ran on very strongly to be nearest at the finish.
On fence 10Ls in rear 1200 M out, 7Ls behind on the fence on straightening, could only stay on at the same pace and no kind of threat.
Was crowded and became unbalanced 1400 M out, 8Ls off pace and 2-wide 800 M out, 5Ls down and 2-wide entering homestretch, didn't quicken up.
Worse than midfield when bumping rail 1300 M out, on fence about 8Ls off the speed down the back straight, 5Ls down entering straight, ran on well without reaching winner.
Caught 3-wide from 1400 M to 1200 M out when about 10Ls off the speed, managed to go 7Ls down and 3-wide turning for home but never really looked like getting into the race. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon led, shot 4Ls clear from 1200 M to 600 M out, was headed at top of home straight, weakened very rapidly.
On fence about 7Ls off pace down back straight, 3Ls down entering home straight, severely checked 250 M out when angling for a run on inside, ran on again but missed a place.
Settled in 3rd pace about 6Ls off the leader RUN AND WIN down the back straight, 2-wide and 3Ls off the pace turning for home, led 200 M out, ran on well.
Soon in 2nd place about 4Ls behind the leader RUN AND WIN, led upon straightening, headed by winner 200 M out, kept on quite well.
Always in rear, on fence 10Ls off the pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 8Ls down and 2-wide into home straight, never a factor.
Checked 1400 M out and forced wider, raced 3-wide without cover down back straight when no better than 8Ls off the pace, 5Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, soon faded.
Prominent to 600 M. Maintained in midfield along rail until failing to hold position closing stages.
Slowly away, always at the back.
Mainly 2Ls behind front runners. Steady progress halfway to reach 4th 250 M. Kept on.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground 250 M. Soon one-paced.
Well there. Took lead passing 600 M. Held on well but unable to match speed with the winner final 100 M.
Among front runners. Dropped back to 3rd 400 M. Soon found no extra.
Soon in touch. Steady progress to 2nd 400 M. Ran on to assert authority inside 100 M. Won readily.
Among front runners. Dropped back steadily from the course proper.
About 6th or 7th early but never far off. Improved to 4th 400 M. Kept on well until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Made some impression early in straight. No extra closing stages. (Lame.)
Jumped best and led until headed approaching home turn. Regained 1L advantage shortly after straightening but unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Forward of midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled in forward of midfield. Held 5th into straight and ran on quite well to take charge closing stages.
Around midfield to straight. Produced good late impression at the finish.
Wide in midfield or worse to straight. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Midfield to straight. Weakened. (Bled.)
Tracked leader before taking over approaching home turn. Headed shortly after straightening and soon dropped out.
Never far off to straight. One-paced.
Rear to straight. Ran on steadily past beaten horses down centre of track.
Prominent to straight, then soon weakened.
Never better than midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Towards rear to straight. Never nearer.
Began awkwardly and rider lost use of iron early. Made no show.
Given reminders early to take lead 1500 M. Found no extra when headed 250 M.
Behind midfield throughout.
Settled 5th. Weakened 250 M out.
Better than midfield. Moved up far side to be 2nd 1200 M. Stayed on well until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Good progress along rail soon after straightening. Unable quicken to challenge closing stages.
Rear. Hung out rounding home bend. Modest progress in straight.
Lost considerable ground at start, never in contention.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Recovered a little late ground final 200 M.
Midfield. Stayed on a bit inside 200 M. (Mucus in trachea.)
Began well, settled 3rd. Raced 4th 1200 M out. Ran on well 250 M to take lead near 100 M. Just held off runner-up's late challenge.
Slightly better than midfield. Responded well inside 200 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Towards rear throughout.
Took lead briefly soon after start, raced 3rd from 1200 M. Regained advantage 250 M until 100 M out. Just held on for a minor placing.
Chased leader. Came to challenge under pressure upon straightening. Held some chance but unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Forward of midfield to halfway before steadied coming out of back straight. Made no show in the run home.
Led until finding no extra over 200 M out. (Lame.)
Last into straight. Made moderate progress down centre of track.
Midfield until steadied and lost position coming out of back straight. One-paced in the run home.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out under pressure.
Midfield. Took closer order when 4-wide rounding home bend. Held some chance upon straightening but failed to quicken to match pace with winner.
Raced in 5th. Steadied and lost position on rail coming out of back straight. Midfield turning in and ran on steadily closing stages without threatening.
Towards rear. Ran on late to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to halfway. Lost position coming out of back straight. Baulked and steadied for a stride over 300 M out. Kept on one pace under pressure closing stages.
Rear and wide to straight. Ran on to hold every chance inside 200 M but outstayed close to home.
Around midfield to straight, then dropped out under pressure.
Never far off. Not clear passage upon straightening. Pushed through tight gap about 100 M out to assert authority close to home.
Towards rear. Took closer order 5-wide rounding home bend. Quickened from midfield into straight to hit front inside 200 M but soon swamped.
Niggled along to race in midfield 2 wide. Steadied at 600 M. Around 3Ls down entering straight. Only ran on evenly to the line when asked 200 M out.
Soon raced in rear section. Caught wide when making the turn and tailed out in straight.
Began fairly and niggled along to lead with about 1/2L advantage on fence through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out to fend off challenge from 2nd placegetter to win convincingly.
Began fairly and eased to rear sections towards the outside. Switched out to find running turning for home but made no impression in straight.
Jumped awkwardly but soon recovered to race in prominent position. Proved difficult to settle in the early stages and hung out when making the turn. One-paced and continue to hang out in straight.
Unable to muster early speed to race at back on rail through to straight. Made no impression in straight.
Ridden along to race in better than midfield 3 wide. Moved up to join leader when turning for home. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.

On jumping bounded in the air. Soon recovered to race around 1-1/2Ls off pace on rail through to straight. Obtained clear running at 200 M and made up good ground there after to miss the 1st pair by a short margin.

Soon settled around 4Ls off pace 3 wide. Made steady improvement turning for home to be 1-1/2Ls down entering straight. All out 300 M out and ran on well but unable to up a gear to overhaul the winner.

Began well from wide draw but was soon taken back to a rearward position closer to rail. Difficult to settle in the early stages. Found nothing in straight and checked to rear after 200 M. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Began well from wide draw and steadily moved across to race outside leader through to straight. Unable to quicken when placed under pressure 350 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Settled in midfield around 3 wide through to straight. Kept on evenly to the finish.
Settled in rear section around 2 wide. Made little improvement from the outside turning for home. Made up little ground in early part of straight but no extra inside the final 200 M.
On jumping knuckled and raced in mid-division on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M and kept on one-paced to the line.
In rear exiting gates and switched from wide gate to rails, on the fence 6Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 5Ls down entering straight, one-paced to line.
Steadied at the 1200 M and lost ground, on fence 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, was steadied again at the 600 M and dropped back to 5Ls off the front, soon under pressure, found very little.
Was always very deep on the track, 5-wide early on and 6Ls off the pace, was at least 3-wide 800 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 6Ls down, never got into it.
Raced 2-wide 8Ls off the pace in rear down the back straight, 4-wide into home straight and still in rear, kept on okay to be nearest at the finish, never posed any kind of threat, however.
Soon led, was always at least a length to the good until home straight, eased 2Ls clear at the 200 M, not extended, impressive.
Always 3-wide and about 3Ls off the pace through to home straight, all out to be 2Ls behind 200 M out, had no chance with winner but still kept on well.
Bumped at the start, 3-wide and 6Ls off the speed at the 1000 M, 5Ls down and 4-wide and driven along entering straight, no impression.
Had the run of the race about 2Ls off the pace on the fence through to home straight, dropped away very quickly.
Raced keenly when 4-wide without cover and 5Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, kept on fairly but could never reach principals.
Shifted in and bumped exiting gates, driven along to be prominent early on, raced 3-wide without cover and 1L or 2Ls off speed till home turn, kept on fairly well despite missing a place.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, slightly wider off the final bend, soon struggling.
Bumped exiting gates, was 2-wide and 6Ls off the pace at the 1000 M, similarly placed off the home turn, made some late headway through beaten rivals.
Was keen early on, raced 2-wide 3Ls off the speed from the 1000 M to home turn, 3Ls down in 5th place and steadied when disappointed for running, didn't recover but was outpaced anyway.
About 2Ls off the speed and 2-wide until turning for home, ran on quite well without ever looking like a winner.
Awkwardly away, 7Ls off the speed on the fence 1200 M out, improved to be 4Ls behind and 2-wide into home straight, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Bumped exiting gates, was always hanging in, 4-wide and 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, couldn't sustain the effort.
Caught 4-wide 6Ls off the speed at the 1200 M, sent on to be 4-wide and 3Ls down 1000 M out, 3-wide and 1L off the pace 800 M out, close up into home straight, faded very rapidly.
Caught 4-wide 7Ls off the lead 1200 M out, 3-wide and 7Ls down 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight, 3Ls down out wider 200 M out, kept on well to be nearest at the finish.
Disputed lead early on, less than 1L off the pace and 2-wide 800 M out, struggling to keep up 500 M out, dropped out from the top of the home straight.
Had a nice run 2Ls off the pace when about 2-wide through to 600 M out, led at the top of the home straight, a neck to the good 200 M out, headed 50 M out, no extra.
Disputed early lead, led narrowly from 1200 M out to top of home straight, faded right out once headed.
2-wide and 5Ls off the speed at the 1200 M, 3-wide and 4Ls down entering straight, still 4Ls down and very short of room with nowhere to go at the 200 M, didn't recover.
On fence 4Ls behind leader at the 1200 M, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls off the front, still 3Ls behind at the 200 M, was short of room final 100 M and was not fully tested close home.
Slowly away, on fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed through to 800 M out, 2-wide and 3Ls down on straightening, every chance 300 M out, was outpaced through final 200 M.
Bumped exiting gates, settled 2-wide and 7Ls off the speed early on, 5Ls down on the fence turning for home, was very one-paced to line.
4Ls off the front and 2-wide 1200 M out, 3-wide with cover and 2Ls off pace 800 M out, 4-wide and 1L down turning for home, a neck down at the 200 M, kept on gamely to lead 50 M out, ran on.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off the pace at the 1200 M, steadied off heels 1000 M out, 3-wide and 6Ls down in rear entering straight, never competitive.
Raced 3-wide 7Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4-wide into homestretch when 4Ls down, staying on strongly when 2Ls down 200 M out, couldn't follow through and one-paced thereafter.
Bounded exiting gates, driven along down centre of track when 5Ls off the pace, never a factor.
No better than 5Ls off the lead until the 400 M when under pressure, dropped away.
Was hardly sighted, tailed off 400 M out.
Awkwardly away, was always driven along, at least 10Ls down 400 M out, no chance.
Slowly away, 5Ls down from the 800 M to the 400 M, 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on very strongly, just missed.
Never better than 8Ls off the pace at any stage.
Prominent against far rail 800 M out, all out to dispute lead at the 400 M, couldn't follow through, faded out.
Never better than 3Ls or 4Ls off the pace towards the far rail at any point, never really looked like figuring in the finish.
Always struggling, hard pressed to be 8Ls off the speed 800 M out, soon with no chance.
Soon led by about a length down centre of track, joined 400 M by challengers on far rail, asserted again to lead 300 M out, headed by winner 100 M out, no extra.
1L off the lead 800 M out, all out to dispute lead at the 400 M, 2Ls down and fading 200 M out, faded further.
Kept within 3Ls off the pace until about 400 M out, soon weakened.
Knuckled exiting gates, recovered quickly to be 1L off the speed 800 M out, disputing lead at the 400 M, all out when 1L down 200 M out, lost more ground close home.
3Ls off the pace 800 M out, travelled well when 2Ls down at the 400 M, picked up well to be half a length down 200 M out, led 100 M, just hung on.
Broke very badly, on fence 8Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 3-wide into home straight and 6Ls down, 2Ls down at the 200 M, kept on strongly, just failed.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide 600 M out and still 5Ls down, staying on well when 3Ls down 200 M out, battled on well to be nearest at the finish.
Bumped exiting gates, 2-wide and about 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace from 1200 M out to home straight, 4Ls behind 200 M out, was always outpaced by leading pack.
In 2nd place out 2-wide 1L off the speed from 1200 M out, led turning for home by 1L, headed by winner 250 M out, dropped away steadily.
On fence 3Ls off the lead 1200 M to 600 M out, 2Ls down and 2-wide at top of homestretch, led 250 M out, 2Ls clear at the 200 M out, kept on gamely, just held on.
Raced 2-wide 9Ls off the pace 1200 M out, had cover down the back straight when 8Ls down, nearest at the finish.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace through to 600 M out, 3-wide into home straight and 2Ls down, all out to remain within 2Ls of the lead 200 M out, faded steadily.
Shifted in exiting gates, raced 6Ls off the speed out 2-wide 1200 M out, driven along when 5Ls down and 3-wide entering straight, made no impression.
Awkwardly away, raced keenly early on, caught 3-wide without cover 4Ls off the speed at the 1200 M, 3-wide and 4Ls off the pace entering straight, no acceleration.
Switched from wide gate to fence to be 10Ls off the pace 1200 M out, raced keenly in parts, 6Ls down and 2-wide into home straight, was short of room 200 M out when 3Ls down, didn't recover.
Raced 2-wide 8Ls off the speed 1200 M out, had head up and keen 800 M out, 4-wide and 6Ls down entering straight, picked up nicely to be 3Ls down 200 M out, couldn't sustain run.
Soon led, 2Ls clear 1400 M out, was 1L to the good from 1200 M to 500 M out, headed at the top of the homestretch, dropped out steadily.
Checked exiting gates, caught 4-wide without cover in places down back straight, 8Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 8Ls off the pace, never a factor.

On fence 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, similarly placed but niggled along 600 M out, 4Ls down at top of home straight, staying on well to be 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on well but couldn't get to winner.
Worse than midfield to straight where he kept on steadily.
Never a factor.
Never far off to straight where he ran on to lead close home. Just held on to retain advantage on the line.
Mostly in 4th to straight where he moved up to threaten 200 M. Found no extra near finish.
In rear to straight. Unable quicken to threaten.
Midfield to straight where he failed to hold place.
Among rear group into straight. Ran on well final 250 M to challenge strongly close home.
Last into straight where he made up some late ground final 200 M.
Soon in front and led field to 250 M where he could find no more.
Midfield halfway and similar place on straightening. Stayed on without threatening first two.
Well there and was 2nd turning into straight. Took lead approaching 250 M before headed and faded under pressure close home.
Never on terms despite running on a bit closing stages.
Midfield to straight where he made no show.
In touch to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Was 5th before losing position from 900 M.
Never better than mid-division.
Always handy. Ran on very strongly close home to snatch race on post.
About 9th or 10th before home turn. Unable to make any impression on leaders.
