Led field to straight. Was headed 250 M out and found no extra.
Always struggling.
Always prominent. Led approaching 250 M and looked winner. Just pipped final stride.
In rear to straight where he ran on quite well close home.
Never troubled leaders.
Towards rear till making up some progress in straight.
Never a factor.
Was midfield before improving from 1000 M to be 3rd rounding home bend. Kept on same pace on straightening.
Towards rear before pulling his way forward from 900 M. Was in touch and held wide turning into straight where he failed to run on.
In touch to straight. Held some chance 300 M but found first two too strong.
Behind midfield from widest draw. Ran on well in straight to take command inside 100 M. Held on.
Near rear. Steady progress rounding home bend. Widest turning in. Recovered good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield. Found no clear run when trying to improve closing stages.
Began awkwardly, never a factor.
Prominent. Improved to 2nd approaching the Rock. Gained lead briefly passing 200 M. Soon headed.
Midfield. Weakened 200 M.
In touch to 200 M. Weakened.
Pushed along to lead soon after start. Found no extra when headed passing 200 M.
Jumped well and led briefly after start. Remained in touch until being steadied when finding no room 200 M to 100 M.
Towards rear. Checked 550 M. Made no show in straight.
Midfield or slightly better. Kept on quite well in straight.
Slowly away. Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Improving under pressure when hampered on rails about 200 M out. Produced some late impression close to home.
Never seen with a chance.
Midfield. Made moderate progress in straight.
Led to home bend then weakened into straight.
Settled behind leaders. Quickened to take charge over 150 M out.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Prominent to home bend. Gradually weakened.
Well back. Ran on well past beaten runners down home straight. (Lame.)
Never better than midfield. (Slightly lame.)
Led briefly then raced in prominent position to 200 M and faded.
Raced keenly in forward of midfield. Raced on steadily in straight without threatening.
Disputed lead on rail. Took over rounding home bend but caught by fast-finishing winner inside 200 M.
Well there. 3rd from stable bend. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Behind midfield. Slightly improved home turn. One-paced.
Midfield or slightly behind. Dropped back steadily passing the Rock. Wide without cover throughout.
Behind midfield and 4-wide. Improved passing 1200 M to be 3rd 900 M. Gave ground rounding the home bend.
Prominent. 2nd from 1200 M. Failed to hold place inside 150 M.
Mainly 2nd last to final turn. Severely checked 250 M. Recovered some ground thereafter.
Midfield. Dropped back towards rear far side. Tailed off closing stages.
Mainly midfield. Weakened closing stages. (Bled.)
Checked to become last soon after start. Recovered good ground 250 M but unable to match speed with the winner.
Lunged forward at start, losing ground. Recovered ground to be better than midfield 1200 M. Weakened in straight.
Taken to the inner from widest draw, towards rear. Crept closer to midfield final turn. Ran on well 250 M to assert authority near 100 M.
Took lead from 1400 M, holding 2Ls advantage to straight. Only one-paced when headed near 100 M.
Mostly in last few. Found no clear passage closing stages.
Unseated rider 200 M out.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without threatening.
Never far off to 400 M then weakened.
Forward of midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure but unable to match speed of winner close home.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Steadied for a run 200 M out. Kept on steadily but steadied again near finish.
Waited with. Romped home to assert authority closing stages.
Never on terms.
Behind midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Chased leader to straight then gradually tired.
Midfield. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Attempted to make all. Kicked some 3Ls clear upon straightening but unable to sustain effort and caught near finish.
Settled in worse than midfield around 2-wide. Switched wide on straightening. Under pressure 250 M out but unable to quicken and kept on one-paced to the line.
Broke well and steadily eased to race in mid-division on rail. Only ran on evenly to the line when asked 250 M out.
Unable to match early speed to race in rear section on fence through to straight. One-paced in straight and only ran past couple of beaten runners over the concluding stages.
Soon raced in better than midfield 2-wide. Under pressure to maintain position turning for home. No response in straight and dropped out after 200 M. (Saddle shifted back on jumping.)

Best out from wide and niggled along to race 1L behind leader around 2-wide through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but unable to hold off the challenge from winner to surrender lead near the line.
Soon raced around 3Ls off pace on rail. Pushed along to hold position turning for home. Made up steady ground in early part of the straight but unable to find clear running inside final 200 M.
Began well from wide draw and raced 3 to 4Ls off pace 2-wide. Switched out turning for home and ran on well in straight to overhaul the 2nd placegetter near the line.
Boxed seated behind leader to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M. (Finished distressed.)
Began awkwardly and raced in rear section. Tailed out in straight.
Slowly away and raced at the tail on fence through to straight. One-pace in straight and ran past couple of beaten runners in the final stages.
Pushed early to lead and took rail running after the 800 M mark. Headed around 150 M out and was just overhauled by the 3rd placegetter on the line.
Raced in midfield out wide without cover throughout the race. Made no impression in the straight.
On fence 2Ls off the speed 1200 M out, niggled along to maintain this position 700 M out, weakened right out from top of home straight.
Was a bit keen early on, raced 2-wide 8Ls off the lead 1200 M out, about 7Ls behind and 5-wide turning for home, kept on at the same pace.
Raced prominently 2Ls off the pace and 2-wide from 1200 M out to home straight, no acceleration.
Soon led, never clear by more than 2Ls, all out to be still 2Ls to the good 200 M out, got tired and was headed about 50 M out, weakened.
Awkwardly into stride, on fence about 7Ls off the lead 1200 M out, about 5Ls behind and travelling well entering home straight, kept on very well to finish close up.

On fence 8Ls off the speed from 1200 M to 600 M when niggled along, hard ridden entering straight, 5Ls down at the 200 M, ran on well through closing stages, nearest at the finish. (See Racing Incidents.)

On fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off the pace in 4th place until 600 M out, travelled well 3Ls down and 2-wide into home straight, 2Ls down 200 M out, held every chance, stayed on well. (See Racing Incidents.)
On fence 5Ls or 6Ls off the pace from 1200 M to 600 M out, 3-wide into home straight when about 4Ls down, 3Ls down at the 200 M, kept on strongly to lead final strides.
Switched across from wide gate to fence on jumping, 10Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 5-wide and still well behind turning for home, no impression.
2-wide and 10Ls off the pace 1200 M out, caught 3-wide without cover in rear down much of the back straight, struggling on the home turn, no chance.
7Ls off the pace and 2-wide from 1200 M to about 600 M out, 5-wide into home straight when nearly 5Ls behind, 4Ls down at the 200 M, ran on strongly, went close.
Raced 5Ls off the pace out 2-wide 1200 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls off the lead, staying on well and with every chance 200 M out, ran on well, missed out narrowly on a place.
Jumped awkwardly from wide draw and was at rear. Remained at rear throughout back straight. On straightening was severely checked. Ran past couple of weakening runners in the straight.
Broke fairly but soon dropped back to rear section. On rails and 8Ls down at 400 M out. Ridden hard but unable to quicken in straight.
Jumped fairly and settled 3-wide near midfield until home straight. Did not quicken and one-paced to line.
Settled 4-wide at rear section early. Moved up to midfield at 600 M. Widest turning in and weakening final 200 M.
Soon settled at rear section and remained there throughout back straight. 3-wide and 6Ls or 7Ls behind pace turning for home. Made up some ground in the straight.
Broke well and settled 2-wide near pace from 1000 M until home straight. Responded well under pressure but unable to gain on winner final 200 M.
Ridden hard early to keep pace with leaders. 3-wide and 1L or 2Ls behind pace in back straight. 3-wide turning in. Unable to make up ground on winner.
Began well from wide draw and hit front at 1000 M. Led comfortably into straight. Hung on well in final 200 M to deny challenger.
Began fairly and was niggled along to be near midfield at 1000 M. On rails and 2Ls down rounding home turn. Ran on but was not a threat to winner.
Ridden to be near pace early. Remained 2-wide and 2Ls to 3Ls behind pace in back straight. One-paced to line.
Jumped slowly and was near rear soon. Moved up and settled 2-wide near midfield from 800 M. Made the home turn awkwardly and lost some ground. Made up little in straight.
Broke well and settled on rails near midfield until entering straight. Did not respond under pressure and commenced to weaken final stages.
Settled towards rear on fence 12Ls off the lead 1200 M out, about 7Ls behind on the inside turning for home, made no impression.
In 4th place on fence 7Ls off the pace 1200 M out, in 3rd place 2Ls off the lead on fence at the 400 M, led 300 M out, battled on well but was headed by winner 50 M out, no extra.
3Ls off the pace and 2-wide 1800 M out, 5Ls behind in 3rd place on fence 1200 M out, forced 3-wide at the 600 M when 3Ls down, bumped entering straight, didn't pick up and was beaten 300 M out.
Settled in rear about 14Ls off the speed on the fence 1200 M out, 3-wide on straightening when about 7Ls adrift, stayed on fairly well without posing much of a threat.
2-wide and 8Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls off the lead, kept on quite well but never looked like catching quinella pair.
Towards rear 2-wide and 12Ls off the front at the 1200 M, 3-wide into the home straight, kept on at the same pace to be nearest at finish.

Never really travelled that well, raced 10Ls off the speed when 2-wide 1200 M out, soon driven along, 5-wide on straightening up when 5Ls off the pace, kept on at the same tempo. (See Racing Incidents.)
Was keen early on, raced 2-wide 1L off the pace in 2nd position from 1400 M out to 600 M out, half a length down and 2-wide 400 M out, became unbalanced entering straight, faded out.
On fence 9Ls behind the leader 1200 M out, 5Ls down and travelling well entering home straight, didn't quicken up and posed no threat.
Settled on fence 7Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3Ls down on inside turning for home, 2Ls behind at the 200 M, kept on well to lead 50 M out, gamely.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down 400 M out, soon struggling.
Soon led on the fence, never clear by more than 2Ls at any stage, half a length up turning for home, headed about 300 M out, faded.
Towards rear. Lack of galloping room when improving from 400 M. Made up some ground when in clear.
Midfield or slightly better. Gradually improved to 4th passing 400 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Behind midfield throughout.
Prominent. Took lead from 600 M until headed 250 M out. Kept on.
Around midfield. Quickened well from 250 M for a minor placing.
Never a factor.
Prominent. Weakened out of contention inside 400 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Failed to quicken inside 200 M.
Behind midfield. Made progress inside 300 M. Kept on well closing stages.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield on outside. Recovered some ground inside 300 M. Hung in.
Jumped awkwardly, just behind midfield to 250 M. No extra.
Well there. Mainly 2nd before taking lead 250 M out. Held on well to win readily.
Prominent briefly early. Soon dropped back steadily to the rear.
Wide behind midfield. Kept on steadily before coming one-paced closing stages.
Settled behind leaders. Responded well to assert authority 200 M out.
Attempted to make all. Headed about 250 M out.
Midfield. Shifted in for clear passage closing stages and sustained steady headway to the line.
Never nearer.
Forward of midfield to straight. No extra.
Towards rear. Ran on well between runners final 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Midfield. Kept on same pace without quickening closing stages.
Midfield. Commenced move turning in. Ran on steadily to reach 2nd place closing stages.
Improved to prominent position quickly. Dropped out from 4th into straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Chased leader to straight then faded gradually.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
In the front early. Dropped steadily to 4th near 1000 M. Renewed effort from 5th 400 M to be 2nd passing 200 M. Failed to hold place closing stages.
Towards rear. Slight progress to midfield home bend. Made no show in straight.
Behind midfield. No progress.
Rear. Crept closer to midfield turning in. Ran on well through runners in straight, doing best work final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Dropped out when turning for home.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield. Moved up quickly from 800 M to take lead final turn. Found no extra when headed 250 M.
In touch. Steady progress from 1200 M to be 3rd. Ran on from final turn to take lead 250 M. Just held on.
Never in contention.
Midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Around midfield throughout.
Slowly away, towards rear. Steady progress far side to be just behind midfield home bend. Steadied on straightening. Ran on until one-paced close home.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Shifted to the outside turning into straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Made 2nd from 1200 M to final turn. Weakened steadily when 4th 400 M.
Began fairly. Moved up to take lead passing 1200 M until final turn. Faded in straight.
Jumped well, then settled in midfield. Dropped further back coming out of back straight. Kept on same pace in the run home.
Led till headed about 300 M out when no extra.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Held up in rear early. Pulled to rear of midfield far side. Ran on strongly to challenge shortly after straightening only to be denied by the narrowest of margins.
Well back. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Always in last few.
Settled in midfield. Shifted out for a run early in straight. Ran on well final 200 M to just defy runner-up's strong late challenge.
Around midfield throughout. Kept on same pace in straight.
Never better than midfield. Made modest impression closing stages.
Mostly in 5th to straight then soon weakened.
Settled in 4th. Quickened well to hit front over 100 M out but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Held up in prominent position. Hit front briefly about 200 M out then soon weakened.
Tracked leader. Held every chance inside 200 M but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Well back. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Raced in worse than midfield. Commenced to lose position 250 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Jumped well and raced 1/2L off leader. All out 250 M out and ran on well but was no match for the winner.
Raced in mid-division on inner. Under pressure 350 M out and steadied at 300 M. Faded thereafter.
On jumping bounded in the air and raced in rear section. Steadied at 800 M and made no impression thereafter.
Raced in midfield till 400 M. Steadily dropped off thereafter.
Soon raced in midfield on inner. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but unable to match speed with 1st pair and just held on for 3rd place.
Soon raced around 1-1/2Ls off leader. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out and missed the 3rd placegetter by a short margin.
Broke well and raced in mid-division. Did not quicken when asked 350 M out and weakened closing stages.
Jumped well and raced in midfield. Under pressure 400 M out to hold position and gradually faded 250 M out.
Began well and steadily eased to rear section with cover. Only obtained clear running after 200 M and made up some ground to be closest at finish.
Raced in better than midfield. Kept on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.
Raced at back and tailed off from 300 M.
Began well and soon led with about 1/2L advantage. Under pressure 200 M out and found the line strongly to win comfortably.
Raced in worse than midfield. Under pressure 400 M and made up little ground inside final 200 M.
Shifted in exiting gates, raced 3-wide with cover down the back between 6Ls and 10Ls off the pace, 4-wide into home straight and about 3Ls down, kept on okay without threatening principals.
Led from early on, never clear by more than a length until home straight, soon headed, faded.
Checked exiting gates, settled in rear 12Ls off the pace 1000 M out, niggled along 600 M out, 6-wide into home straight when 6Ls down, ran on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
Raced 7Ls off the pace when 2-wide 1200 M out, 4-wide and 4Ls behind entering home straight, only 2Ls behind in 4th place 200 M out, faded through closing stages.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off the pace in 3rd place 1200 M out, 3-wide and 2Ls down into home straight and under pressure to lie up, faded rapidly.
In 2nd place out 2-wide about a length off the pace from the 1400 M to home straight, dropped away very tamely.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the pace in 5th place 1200 M out, 3Ls down entering straight, repeatedly disappointed for on the run-in to line, severely checked 200 M out, was not properly tested.
On fence 8Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, 1L down in 2nd place 200 M out, led at the 100 M, kept on well.
Raced 2-wide 8Ls off the pace 1200 M out, driven along when 5Ls down and 5-wide turning for home, never competitive.
2-wide and keen about 10Ls off the pace when checked 1200 M out, 5-wide and 4Ls down off home turn, all out to be two and a half lengths off the pace at the 200 M, no extra.
Awkwardly away losing ground at the start, on fence 10Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 2-wide and 5Ls off the pace travelling well entering straight, stayed on at only the same pace.
Raced 3-wide without cover down the back straight, 8Ls off the pace at the 1200 M and 5Ls down 800 M out, 4-wide into straight and led 350 M out, headed about 100 M out, no extra.
Raced 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed on the fence from 1400 M to top of home stretch, dropped out rapidly.
Checked 1400 M out, on fence 7Ls off pace 1200 M out, 5Ls off the pace 800 M out on the inner, 3Ls down at top of home straight, ran on well close home to be nearest at the finish.
Never had any cover at any stage, 4-wide and about 5Ls off the pace from back straight to home straight, beaten 300 M out.
Niggled along to remain in 2nd place 2-wide and 1L off the pace from 800 M to home straight, 2Ls down 200 M out, faded further.
Raced 3-wide about 2Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down off the home turn, dropped out very quickly.
Flew the gates and showed great early pace to lead by 2Ls on the fence 900 M out, over a length in front 200 M out, headed 100 M out, kept on well for a place.
Raced 3-wide and 4Ls off the speed 800 M out, 4-wide and 5Ls off the lead entering the straight, soon faded out.
Slowly away, raced 2-wide 6Ls off the front 900 M out, similarly placed and under pressure entering home straight, faded rapidly.
Raced 3-wide 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, similarly placed and niggled along turning for home, held up 300 M out, ran on strongly through closing stages to be nearest at the finish.
Checked 1000 M out but recovered to be 2-wide and about 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace from the 800 M to home straight, ran on well without seriously threatening principal players.
Settled 3-wide and 7Ls off the pace 800 M out, 4-wide and still towards rear on the swing, 4Ls down staying on down centre of track 200 M out, couldn't reach leaders.
Bumped at the start, on fence 6Ls off the speed at the 800 M, 4Ls down entering straight, steadied 300 M out, 2Ls down 200 M out, 1L down 100 M out, kept on very well to lead on the line.
Slowly into stride, settled 2-wide and 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, similarly placed at the back of the field off the home turn, no impression.
On fence about 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, about 6Ls down entering straight, was awkwardly placed before switching out wider over 200 M out, ran on well but was never dangerous.
Bumped at the gates, raced 2-wide 3Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3-wide and travelling well off the home turn, led 100 M out, grabbed by winner on the line.
Bumped exiting gates, had the box-seat position on the fence 2Ls off the pace from back straight to home straight, faded from about 300 M out.
Raced 3-wide about 6Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 4-wide and 4Ls off the pace entering straight, picked up well to be half a length down at the 200 M, led 100 M out, held on gamely.
Very keen early on when better than midfield, sent on from 1200 M out to lead at the 1000 M, still in front off the home turn but was under pressure, soon headed, faded.
On fence 8Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 7Ls down and 3-wide at top of home straight, no impression.
2Ls off the pace in 2nd position 1200 M out, about 3Ls down in 3rd place at top of home straight, dropped out quickly.
On fence 10Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 5-wide and driven along entering straight when 5Ls down, still 5Ls behind 200 M out, weakened right out.
Settled 2-wide and about 5Ls or 6Ls off the pace down back straight, 4Ls down when held up for a run at top of home stretch, 3Ls down at the 200 M out, kept on very strongly, unlucky.
Bit keen early, on fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace from 1600 M to home straight when driven along, half a length down with every chance 200 M out, kept on bravely but couldn't overhaul winner.
Raced 8Ls off the pace 1200 M out, under pressure entering straight when 4-wide and 6Ls off the pace, about 4Ls down 200 M out, couldn't get any closer. (See Racing Incidents.)
On fence 6Ls off the pace down the back straight, 4Ls down entering straight, 2Ls down at the 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
Led 1600 m out, 2Ls clear 1200 M out, headed by CARACOLER 1000 M out, led again from top of home straight to 100 M out when headed by winner, no extra.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, all out and still 3Ls down at the 200 M out, faded a little close home.
Very awkwardly into stride and lost plenty of ground, raced 2-wide 10Ls off the pace 1200 M out, improved to be 3-wide and 4Ls off the pace on straightening, found nothing under pressure, faded.
No speed early on, settled about 10Ls off the pace in rear down the back straight, about 8Ls down in rear entering straight, no impression.
Didn't break well, on fence 4Ls off the lead 800 M out, 3Ls down and 2-wide entering home straight, still 3Ls down 200 M out, faded right out through closing stages.
3-wide and 5Ls off the speed at the 800 M, travelling well when 4-wide and 4Ls off the pace at top of home straight, quickened up well to lead 200 M out, drew clear, impressive.
Tracked leader about 1L off the speed in 2nd place out 2-wide from 1000 M to 600 M, led at top of home straight, headed by winner 200 M out, just about hung on for 2nd place.
Checked 1000 M out, checked again 800 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls off the pace 700 M out, 4-wide and 4Ls down entering straight, weakened and beaten over 200 M out.
In rear about 8Ls off the pace down the back, 6Ls down and 2-wide on the swing, was never in the hunt.
Settled 3-wide and about 7Ls or 8Ls off the speed down the back straight, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls off the lead, ran on well to be 2Ls down at the 200 M, one-paced closing stages.
Had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off the pace until home straight, 2Ls down when briefly held up for a run about 250 M out, was very one-paced through final 200 M in any case.
Bumped exiting gates, 5Ls off the pace and 2-wide 800 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down entering straight, found nothing under pressure and beaten 200 M out.
Led early on, over 1L clear 900 M out, under pressure but still in front turning for home, soon headed, faded away.
Caught 4-wide without cover and 3Ls off the pace 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 2Ls down, didn't quicken up and beaten 300 M out.
Badly checked 1000 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls off the pace 800 M out, 4Ls down and 3-wide at top of home straight, could never get into it.
Raced 2-wide 7Ls off the speed 800 M out, 4-wide and 6Ls off the front at the top of the home straight, staying on well when 3Ls down 200 M out, battled on well to line.
Slowly away, on fence and 6Ls off the speed 1000 M out, travelled well towards inner when 4Ls down at top of home straight, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Prominent racing 2-wide 3Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3-wide and 1L down entering home straight, disputed lead 300 M out, 1L down 200 M out, weakened further close home.
In rear throughout.
In touch to straight where he ran on to lead near finish.
Always prominent. Held every chance under pressure final 200 M.
About 6th halfway and similar position home turn. Kept on without threatening in straight.
Made no show.
Never troubled leaders.
Never seen with a chance.
Never far off to home bend. Ran on and was doing best work at the finish.
Never on terms.
Worse than midfield into home bend. Ran on strongly inside final 200 M but late.
Well there to straight. Kept on under pressure close home.
Made running most of way, having every chance.
Always at the back.
Midfield into straight. Kept on to be closest at the finish.
Soon last.
Mostly 8th to straight. One-paced.
Raced 3rd to 150 M. Failed to quicken.
Held 4th until dropping back steadily final 600 M.
Towards rear. Made slight progress 500 M. Unable to quicken in straight.
Slightly better than midfield. Improved from final turn to be 2nd 200 M. Kept on.
Towards rear. Made up some ground from outside final 200 M.
Mainly 7th to straight. Ran on steadily to miss narrowly at finish.
Towards rear. Stayed on well final 250 M to claim victory close home.
Pushed along to be 2nd early. Held on but was weakened inside 250 M.
Remained 5th before improving to 4th passing the Rock. Weakened steadily 250 M.
Made most. Found no extra when headed close home.
Well back. Made good progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Always in last few.
Attempted to make all. Broke some 3Ls clear upon straightening but flattered and overhauled nearing home.
Midfield. Ran on steadily to reach 3rd late.
Never better than midfield in similar position throughout. Only one-paced under pressure.
Forward of midfield. Ran on under pressure to assert authority closing stages.
Well back. Ran on doggedly down straight to be nearest at finish.
Never far off to straight then found nothing.
In similar position throughout. Kept on one pace without quickening closing stages.
Prominent to straight then gradually weakened.
Never a danger.
Disputed lead to 500 M then lost position approaching home bend. Dropped away upon straightening. (Lame.)
Better than midfield. Steadied 200 M. Weakened.
Rear. Made up some ground in straight.
Prominent. Held 4th from 1200 M. Ran on after final turn to reach front briefly approaching 200 M. Soon found no extra.
Held 9th to straight. Ran on well under pressure from outside to win narrowly on the line.
Prominent. Settled 5th along rail 1300 M. Ran on in straight to reach front passing 200 M. Just beaten by a short margin.
Remained 10th to straight. Responded well 200 M out from outside to just miss marginally.
Behind midfield. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Mainly 3rd. Kept on well until one-paced closing stages.
Rear. Recovered some ground final 200 M.
Led field to 1200 M. Remained 2nd before joining the leader 700 M. Faded 200 M out.
Well there. Led field from 1200 M. Was joined near 700 M. Weakened when headed 200 M.
Behind midfield. Moderate progress final 300 M. (Lame.)
Raced keenly in midfield. Faded under pressure in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Towards rear. Made up some ground down centre of straight.
Never nearer.
Towards rear. Made short-lived effort early in straight.
Led until joined after straightening. Unable to sustain effort and headed passing 100 M.
Well there. Went wide into straight and found nothing under pressure.
Prominent. Gained upper hand under pressure about 200 M out. Just held on.
Always thereabouts. Came to challenge upon straightening and held some chance 200 M out but never able to draw level.
Mostly in midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Settled in 4th never far off. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Never seen with a chance. (Lame.)
Raced in mid-division around 2-wide through to straight. On straightening was checked and faded thereafter. (Lame.)
Raced in worse than midfield and proved difficult to settle in the middle stages. Only kept on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.
Soon settled in rearward position through to straight. Only obtained clear running 200 M out and made up some ground over the concluding stages. (Did not stride out freely in front after the race.)
Niggled along to race in prominent position around 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and ran on well but was overhauled by the winner on the line.
Soon raced in rear section on rail. Switched wide turning for home and made up little ground inside final 100 M.
Pushed along to race in prominent position. Hard ridden from 600 M but failed to hold position. Dropped out in straight.
Outpaced in the early stages to be in midfield. Made move to go forward at 1000 M and took lead at about 900 M. Headed at 600 M and commenced to lose ground. Made no impression in straight.
Jumped awkwardly and ridden along to race in midfield but caught wide without cover. Under pressure to hold position turning for home. Unable to quicken in straight and stayed one-paced to the line.
Raced in forward position on rail. Under pressure to hold lead going up Rock. Responded well when asked 350 M out to snatch victory in a ding-dong finish.
Led briefly. Headed around 1400 M and raced behind leader on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on evenly to the line.

Shortly after the start was crowded for room and dropped to the rail on inner. Ridden along to make steady improvement turning for home. Switched out entering straight and made up steady ground to be closest at finish.
Broke fairly and raced in mid-division on fence through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened in the closing stages.
Awkwardly away, raced 2-wide 8Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 7Ls off pace, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.
Checked at the start, on the fence 10Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 8Ls off the pace entering home straight, 5Ls behind 200 M out, kept on okay to be nearest at the finish.
Raced 2-wide about 3Ls or 4Ls off the pace from 1200 M to home straight, one-paced on run-in to winning line.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 6Ls off the speed and 3-wide from 800 M out to home straight, was held up for a run 300 M out and 200 M out, didn't recover. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 2-wide 1L off the pace 1200 M out, hampered and shoved out 4-wide at the 1000 M out, prominent but caught 3-wide without cover down the back straight, faded entering straight.
On fence 3Ls off the speed 1200 M out, niggled along when 5Ls down 600 M out, 3Ls down and staying on 200 M out, led briefly about 70 M out, headed close home.
On fence about 6Ls off the pace from 1200 M through to home straight, 3Ls down at the 200 M, kept on well to lead close home.
Had the box-seat position 1200 M out, raced keenly and sent on to lead at the 800 M out 2-wide, led entering straight, headed 300 M out, one-paced from then on.
Caught 3-wide 1L off the pace 1200 M out, led briefly at the 1000 M, in 2nd place 1L off the pace 800 M out, 3Ls behind on fence and driven along entering straight, no impression.
Raced 2-wide 6Ls off the speed 1200 M out, went 3-wide when trying to improve 450 M out, was always struggling to come on, beaten 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)

Keen early on, led on fence 1200 M out, headed 1000 M out, raced prominently thereafter, half a length down entering straight, led again 250 M out, headed again about 70 M out, no extra. (See Racing Incidents.)
Just behind pace early. On fence and 3Ls down at 800 M. Every chance 200 M out and just got beaten by placegetters final stages.
2-wide and 3Ls down entering first turn. 3Ls or 4Ls behind pace throughout back straight. Every chance 300 M out. One-paced to straight.
Near pace and caught 3-wide rounding first turn. 2-wide and 2Ls down 800 M out until entering straight. Weakened final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and was at rear on fence until entering home straight. Ran on well and made up late ground closing stages.
Broke well and lead until straight. One-paced and unable to hold off challengers final 150 M.
Settled near rear on fence until entering home straight. Responded strongly under pressure and managed to lead final strides.
On fence behind pace early. Commence to move up the field from 2-wide position 800 M out. 3-wide rounding home turn. One-paced to line.
On fence near midfield early. Did not go with the quickened pace and was at rear section near 800 M out. Widest turning in. Ran on strongly in straight and just missed 2nd place.
From a wide barrier was soon eased back to settled 2-wide near rear. Remained at rear entering straight. Kept on well and made up late ground.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace 1200 M out. Remained behind midfield throughout back straight. 2-wide rounding home turn. Shifted out to obtain clear running and kept on strongly to line.
On fence and 4Ls behind pace 1200 M out. Settled midfield throughout back straight. Bumped with another runner early in home straight. Quickened under pressure but unable to gain on winner.
Always tended to hang in, raced 2 and 3-wide about 2Ls or 3Ls off the speed until turning for home, 5Ls down in 3rd place 200 M out, kept on quite well to take 2nd place on the line.
On the fence 4Ls off the pace 800 M out, 2Ls down in 3rd place and travelling well entering straight, outpaced by winner and was grabbed for 2nd on the wire.
Raced 2-wide 2Ls off the pace 800 M out, inconvenienced about 600 M out when 3Ls off the speed, soon under pressure, found nothing.
Bumped at the start, advanced to be 4-wide and half a length off the speed 600 M out, didn't handle the bend that well, weakened in straight.
Awkwardly into stride, raced 3Ls off the speed out 2-wide 800 M out, 5Ls off the pace when inconvenienced 500 M out, at least 6Ls down at the 200 M, made some late headway.
Raced 3-wide 3Ls off the pace 800 M out, 4-wide and 6Ls behind entering home straight, 8Ls down 200 M out, no impression.
On fence 2Ls off the pace 800 M out, under pressure to lie up turning for home when in 2nd place out 2-wide and 1L off the speed, faded rapidly. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always wide and in rear, hung out and was very wide (6-wide) and 9Ls off the pace entering straight, no chance.
3-wide and 5Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3-wide and 7Ls off the speed entering home straight, still well behind at the 200 M, kept on well close home.
Soon led, clear by 2Ls on the fence at the 800 M, 1L clear entering the home straight, shot 3Ls to the good at the 200 M, easily.
Awkwardly away, switched across from wide gate to fence to be 7Ls off the pace 700 M out, 8Ls down entering straight, nearest at finish.
Never competitive, never better than 6Ls off the pace at any stage, beaten over 300 M out.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Recovered some ground halfway. Kept on same pace final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Weakened 300 M.
Never far off. Responded well 350 M but failed to quicken closing stages.
Midfield. Failed to quicken closing stages.
Made all. Won unchallenged. Hung out badly 300 M.
Never a factor.
Always prominent. Kept on to snatch a minor placing final stride.
Prominent. Faded rapidly inside 300 M. (Heart irregularity.)
Towards rear. Quickened up passing course proper to be 2nd 200 M. No match with the winner.
Slightly slowly away, towards rear. Made up some ground closing stages.
In touch. Raced 3rd inside 300 M. Just lost a minor placing narrowly at finish.
Forward of midfield. Slightly hampered upon straightening. Came to challenge strongly but just staved off by winner through final stages.
Niggled at wide in midfield early. Lost position rounding home bend but recovered good ground past beaten horses in straight.
Made no show.
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace in straight.
Midfield early. Improved to prominent position coming out of back straight. Kept on one pace in the run home.
Never better than midfield. Faded closing stages.
Well there far side. Quickened well from 5th into straight to hit front 200 M out. Fought on doggedly to defy runner-up closing stages.
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Never seen with a chance.
Prominent. Held some chance among leaders early in straight. Kept on without quickening.
Never in contention. (Lame.)
Towards rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there. Took lead rounding home bend. Overhauled final 200 M.
Led far side. Well there to 200 M. No extra.
Towards rear from widest draw. Made ground steadily in straight for a minor placing close home.
Rear. Made ground steadily in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Improved to 6th turning in. Kept on.
Towards rear early. Pushed along to recover some ground to be in touch. Ran on from 4th early straight to claim 2nd final 100 M.
Behind midfield. Made no show final 250 M.
Midfield. Weakened from 450 M.
Led field from 1200 M. Maintained 1-1/2Ls advantage final turn. Held on well to win comfortably.
Pushed along to sit outside leader. Dropped back steadily soon after straightening.
Midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Near rear. Moderate progress on outside soon after straightening.
Led early. Held 3rd from 1100 M before advancing to 2nd final turn. Kept on same pace final 200 M.
Towards rear. Last turning in. Ran past a few tiring horses inside 200 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made up some ground on inside final 400 M.
In touch. Weakened final 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Waited with. Finished well down centre of straight to just get up on line.
Never better than midfield.
Close up. Took up running approaching home bend going some 3Ls clear upon straightening. Flattered and caught final strides.
Unseated rider home bend.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Towards rear. Ran on well down straight but outsprinted by winner close home.
Never seen with a chance. Made no impression in straight.
Midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend gaining 2nd some 3Ls back turning in but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield to straight. Kept on same pace without quickening.
In similar position throughout. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Led to halfway. Dropped out approaching home straight.
Pushed along to race in prominent position 3 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out but unable to quicken and kept on evenly to the line.
Hard ridden to race outside leader. Took lead around 400 M and ran on fairly in straight. Unable to match speed with winner and surrended lead around 150 M out. Just held on for 2nd place.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. Under pressure to hold position turning for home. Did not quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Began well but was soon taken back to rear section from wide draw closer to rail through to straight. Made up some ground inside the final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Soon raced in rear section around 2 wide through to straight. Made no impression in straight.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield 3 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out but stayed one-paced and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Began well and niggled along to race around 2Ls off pace on rail through to straight. Made up steady ground when asked 350 M out and missed the 2nd placegetter by a short margin.
Best out from wide draw and led narrowly on rail. Headed at 400 M and unable to quicken. After 200 M steadied and faded thereafter. (Lame.)
Slowly away and soon recovered to race in mid-division on rail. Made up little ground in early part of straight and became one-paced after 200 M.
Shortly after the start was checked and soon recovered to race in worse than midfield around 2 wide through to straight. Found the line well when asked 350 M out to win convincingly.
Unable to muster early speed to be in worse than midfield around 3 wide through to straight. Made no impression in straight.
Outpaced and raced at the tail on rail through to straight. Never a factor.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Well back. Ran on well down straight to assert authority close to home.
Always in last few.
Prominent. Held every chance in straight but unable to sustain close to home.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Behind midfield. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Rear. Effort rounding home bend. Making moderate progress when steadied inside 200 M.
Well there. Hit front briefly over 200 M out before overhauled.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Quickened to hit front about 200 M out but caught final stages.
Made running to 200 M. No extra when headed.
Around midfield. No clear passage early in straight before producing good late impression final 200 M.
Midfield. Made modest progress closing stages.
Tracked leader. Tightened on rails and lost position about 200 M out. No impression thereafter.
Slowly away, in the last pair. Made ground steadily from final turn.
Towards rear. Very minor progress in straight.
Midfield. Made no show in straight.
Tracked leader before taking over near 100 M. Held on.
Better than midfield. Weakened 250 M.
In touch. 4th from 1000 M. Kept on quite well inside 300 M.
Rear. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Towards rear throughout.
Soon 3rd. Failed to hold place closing stages.
Towards rear. Inconvenienced approaching 800 M. No recovery.
Led field from widest draw. Held on until headed 100 M. Kept on but unable to fight back.
Towards rear. Made up some ground on outside passing 200 M.
Better than midfield. Ran on final 250 M, just failing to obtain a minor placing.
Slightly behind mifield. Ran on well final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Ran on from 400 M to be better than midfield until 150 M. Soon weakened.
Behind midfield. Kept on well early straight but failed to quicken passing 200 M.
Midfield. Gradual progress rounding home bend to be 5th on straightening. Ran on solidly to take command 250 M out. Won readily.
Held 5th to 1000 M. Ran on steadily from 6th early straight to claim 2nd passing 150 M. No threat to the winner.
Last. Recovered good ground from outside final 200 M.
Behind midfield throughout.
Midfield. Gave ground rounding home bend. No significant progress in straight.
Held 4th until weakening out of contention 300 M.
Near rear. 2nd last to straight. Ran on steadily from outside to be nearest at finish.
Set strong pace to home bend. Stopped quickly final turn. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame.)
Raced 2nd and was several lengths behind lead, reaching front briefly 400 M. Soon faded.
Towards rear. Made ground in straight to obtain a minor placing close home.
Remained 3rd to final turn. Moved up to reach front very briefly 350 M. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Towards rear before making up some good ground final 250 M.
Well there to straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
Among rear group before home turn. Ran on well in straight to challenge inside final 200 M, having every chance.
Midfield into straight. Quickened from 250 M to challenge strongly close home.
Tracked leader to straight where he failed quicken to challenge. Dropped out steadily inside final 200 M.
Was midfield before dropping out quickly approaching 250 M.
Well there to straight where he ran on to reach 2nd 200 M before severely checked near finish.
Worse than midfield to straight where he kept on from the 250 M. Found one-pace near finish.
Slowly away and was last approaching 600 M. Switched in 250 M and ran on a bit.
Midfield to straight where he stayed on steadily. Was steadied and lost position close home.
Settled in rear to straight where he stayed on well to be nearest at finish.
Worse than midfield home bend. Ran on strongly closing stages to snatch race final strides.
Mostly in 5th to home turn. Kept on without threatening in straight. Found no extra towards finish.
Made most, just headed near finish.
Was midfield before dropping to 2nd last home bend. Renewed effort on straightening and ran on well despite having no chance with winner.
Prominent to straight where he dropped out of contention 250 M.
Never on terms.
Well there before settling in midfield 1400 M and was among rear group into straight. Unable to obtain clear passage before making up some late ground close home.
Slowly away and was at back to straight. Ran on well from the 250 M, doing best work at the finish.
Towards rear before making steady headway passing 1200 M to be 5th or 6th home turn. Came under pressure 300 M and kept on but failed to sustain effort near finish.
Midfield 1000 M and remained there to straight where he made no show.
Well there before losing ground from 900 M and was worse than midfield into straight. Made short-lived effort from 300 M before finding no extra close home.
Soon improved towards leaders and was well there before failing to hold place 250 M out.
Soon took up running and led field before finding no more halfway down the straight.
Always handy. About 4th into straight where he moved up nicely to take charge 200 M. Won readily.
About 5th or 6th into straight where he was baulked 250 M. Made no show after.
Improved from rear passing 800 M and continued to make steady headway to line.
Jumped well and was in the front. Was joined 600 M out to straight. Kicked clear inside 300 M. Held on.
Behind midfield. Ran on quite well from outside final 200 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made ground while hanging out badly rounding home bend. Weakened.
Prominent early, soon dropped to 5th. Slightly hampered at 700 M and near 600 M. One-paced.
Midfield early. Dropped back steadily from 1000 M.
In touch. Remained 3rd or 4th early straight. Weakened closing stages.
Towards rear. Made up some ground along inside turning in. Failed to quicken in straight.
Midfield. Crept closer and was 3-wide turning in. Ran on well from 5th 200 M but failed to catch the winner.
Well there early. Settled 3rd or 4th on the rail. Kept on but failed to quicken inside 200 M.
Better than midfield. Quickened up gradually to reach lead approaching 600 M. Kept on when headed early straight.
Lost ground at start, never a factor.
Wide in midfield to straight. Produced good impression down centre of track.
Behind midfield. Ran on well to just get up on line.
Never nearer.
Led to 350 M when broken down.
Forward of midfield. Quickened but found no room about 300 M out. Made no impression thereafter.
Chased leader to straight then gradually weakened.
Well there. Hit front briefly shortly after straightening. Fought on doggedly but unable to peg back leader the length of straight.
Last to straight. Ran on down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Quickened to challenge shortly after straightening gaining slender lead but caught final strides.
Forward of midfield to straight then one-paced. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Kept on well in straight.
Forward of midfield to straight then ran home one-paced.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Tardy start, towards rear. Recovered ground gradually to be midfield home bend. Weakened 250 M.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Tracked leader before taking over at 400 M. Found no extra when headed 100 M.
In touch. Moved up to 3rd from 1100 M. Kept on well in straight.
Soon led. Headed 400 M. Held on for 2nd until weakening out of contention closing stages.
Rear. Made some minor progress from 800 M to 600 M. Made no show in straight.
Prominent early, settled in midfield. Made some progress from 800 M to be 3rd 600 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Near rear. Ran on well when obtaining a clear run passing 300 M. Took lead 100 M. Won readily.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Stayed on inside 200 M.
Always there. Dropped to midfield 700 M. Recovered ground on inside final turn. Kept on well in straight.
Better than midfield. In midfield rounding home bend. Ran on a bit closing stages.
Prominent briefly, soon behind midfield. Recovered some ground on outisde home bend. Failed to quicken in straight.
Midfield or behind. Made some minor progress in straight.
Around midfield. Took closer order turning for home. Dropped out from joint 4th into straight.
Well back. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to home bend, then gradually weakened.
Settled in midfield. Finished well to snatch victory short of line.
Rear. Snuck up on rails turning in but made no impression in straight.
Wide throughout. Behind midfield early. Made swift progress far side. Dropped out before home turn.
Around midfield to straight then dropped out quickly.
Sluggish at start. Remained in last few before taking closer order rounding home bend. Kept on steadily without quickening from joint 4th into straight.
Attempted to make all but unable to stave off winner's strong late burst of speed.
Prominent to straight. One-paced.
Well there, holding every chance in straight. Unable to sustain effort and overhauled closing stages.
Never in contention.
Well there. Disputed lead on rails turning in but before quickly dropping out of contention. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Soon raced around 4Ls off speed 2 wide through to straight. Made up little ground when asked 300 M out but was never in position to trouble the placegetters.
Pushed along to lead on rail with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Headed around 400 M and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
Shortly after the start was steadied and raced in rear section on fence. Unable to obtain clear running in early part of straight. Made up little ground in the final stages.
Unable to match early speed to race at back on rail through to straight. Did not quicken in straight and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Ridden hard to race in forward position but was caught deep without cover. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Raced in mid-division around 3 wide through to straight. Made no impression in straight.
Raced in midfield on fence. Ridden along to maintain position turning for home. Soon dropped out in straight.
Began well and raced around 1L off leader 2 wide. Hung out badly turning for home. Took lead 400 M out and ran home strongly to score an easy victory.
Raced in forward position around 3 wide. Under pressure to hold position turning for home. Steadily dropped out from 300 M.
Broke fairly but was taken back to race 5Ls off pace 3 wide through to straight. All out 300 M out and made up good ground inside final 200 M whilst hanging in.
Pushed along but outpaced to rear around 6Ls off pace 2 wide through to straight. Made up steady ground when asked 400 M out but unable to match speed with the first pair.
Bumped exiting gates, settled 8Ls off the pace and 2-wide 1100 M out, raced 3-wide and 6Ls down 800 M out, 4-wide and 5Ls down on the swing, led at the 100 M, kept on well.
Raced 3-wide 2Ls off the speed 1100 M out, driven along when 3-wide and 1L down entering straight, faded out.
On fence 4Ls off the speed about 1100 M out, similarly placed turning for home, didn't quicken up and soon beaten.
Disputed early lead, raced keenly once forced to race about 2Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, no impression from then on.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls 1000 M out, was a bit awkwardly placed off heels 600 M out, posed no threat in straight.
Sent on to lead on fence by 1L at the 1000 M, half a length clear off home turn, a length to the good at the 200 M out, grabbed by winner 100 M out, no extra.
Slowly away, on fence 8Ls off the pace 1100 M out, 2-wide and 5Ls down entering straight, short of running room about 300 M out, into the clear at the 200 M, no impression.
Bumped at start, 2-wide and 5Ls off the pace at the 800 M, 4Ls down entering straight, held up for a run from 300 M to 200 M out when 3Ls down, ran on strongly once in the clear.
Shifted in from outside draw after leaving barriers, raced 2-wide 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls down and travelling quite well entering straight, found little under pressure.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off the lead 1200 M out, 3Ls off the pace and travelling well when 3-wide entering straight, every chance 300 M out, didn't pick up and soon outpaced.
Raced 3-wide 2Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 2-wide and half a length down in 2nd place entering straight, all out 300 M out, no acceleration.
3-wide and about 5Ls off the pace 800 M out, checked when awkwardly placed at the 600 M, 5-wide and 5Ls behind the lead into the home straight, kept on evenly through final 250 M.
4-wide and 3Ls off the speed 1100 M out, 2Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, kept on at the same pace.
Settled in rear 3-wide and 10Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3-wide entering straight when 6Ls down, 4Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Fractious in the gates, missed the break, caught very wide and towards rear 1400 M out, sent on to race 1L off the pace 800 M out, soon driven along, faded out.
Awkwardly away, bumped at start and forced back, on fence 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, driven along 600 M out, 4Ls down off home bend, kept on well without threatening front pair.
Caught 3-wide and racing a bit freely when about 10Ls off the pace 1000 M out, was struggling around home turn, never got into it. (Bled.)
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the pace from 1200 M out to 600 M out, forced 5-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, no impression.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off the pace from 1200 M to 600 M out, 4-wide and under pressure entering straight, weakened.
Always at least 3-wide and 10Ls off the pace until home straight, found nothing.
Raced 2-wide 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, 5Ls down and driven along entering straight, made little impression on principals.
On fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed from 1200 M to 600 M out, travelled well when 2Ls down off home turn, went a neck down 100 M out, couldn't overhaul winner.
Awkward away and steadied at the start, on fence 7Ls off the pace 800 M out, 2-wide and 4Ls down entering home straight, stayed on evenly.
Had the box seat run about 4Ls off the speed on the fence through to 600 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 2Ls down, led 250 M out, idled in front but had enough in reserve.
Raced 2Ls off the pace on fence 1200 M out, 2-wide and at leader's flank entering straight, briefly led about 300 M out, couldn't sustain effort and faded steadily.
Away well from wide gate, soon led on fence, never clear by much more than a length, travelled well entering straight, headed and unbalanced 300 M out, tended to lay out under pressure.
Raced 2-wide 8Ls off the pace 1200 M out, caught 4-wide 600 M out when 7Ls down, tailed off from 300 M out.
2-wide and 4Ls off the speed 1200 M out in 3rd place, driven along 600 M out to keep up, 5-wide into home straight when 4Ls behind, faded steadily.
Settled towards rear early on, 2-wide and 5Ls down 800 M out, 4Ls down entering straight, ran on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
Fractious in the gates, very awkwardly away and missed the start by about 4Ls, in rear wide and about 6Ls or 7Ls off the pace until home straight, never a factor.
3-wide down the back straight about 7Ls off the pace, at least 5-wide 600 M out, in rear and struggling entering straight, no chance.
Disputed early lead out 3-wide, 2-wide and still right there entering home straight, began to fade about 200 M out, no extra.
Disputed lead on the fence from gates until home straight, headed by winner 200 M out, one-paced through concluding stages and lost 2nd place on the line.
Raced 2-wide 1L off the pace 800 M out, steadied when short of room 700 M out, 3Ls down and under pressure of the home turn, kept on okay in the straight.
Always hung out, very awkward round the turns, never competitive.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace 1000 M out, travelled well 2-wide and 2Ls down entering straight, led at the 200 M marker, driven out and drew clear.
Awkwardly away, disputed early lead out 4-wide, 3-wide and 2Ls off the pace entering the straight, outpaced from 300 M out.
Knuckled exiting gates, about 4Ls off the pace and 3-wide down the back straight, staying on well and very dangerous when 1L off the pace 250 M out, didn't follow through.
On fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace from back through to home straight, was always a bit too one-paced. (Lame.)
Caught 3 and 4-wide down the back straight when about 4Ls off the pace, 3Ls down entering straight and with place chances 200 M out when 2Ls down, didn't come on.
2-wide and 7Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide 800 M out, 4-wide and 6Ls off the pace off home bend, 2Ls down and with place hopes 200 M out, didn't follow through.
Raced 3-wide 2Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3Ls behind and 3-wide at top of home straight, no acceleration and beaten 200 M out.
Best away, raced 2-wide about 1L off the pace from 1200 M out to home turn, led at the 400 M, headed 150 M out, no extra.
Settled 7Ls off the pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 6Ls down, picked up very well to lead 150 M out, ran on strongly.
Never got involved, raced 2-wide 10Ls off the pace 800 M out, not much better off when driven along entering straight, no chance.
Hard ridden to lead on the fence 1400 M out, driven along to maintain advantage entering home turn, headed and soon dropped away.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide into home straight when similar distance off pace, 2Ls down 200 M out, one-paced through closing stages.
Settled in rear early on, on fence 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3-wide and 6Ls down entering straight, held up for a run from 350 M to 200 M, ran on well once clear, no chance with winner.
Raced freely when 2-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls down entering straight, was struggling to pick before being caught a bit short of room 200 M out, no threat.
Bounded at start and lost ground, recovered quickly to be 4Ls off pace on fence from 1200 M through to home straight, held up for a run 200 M out, was still a bit one-paced however.
On fence 5Ls off pace from 1200 M out through to home straight, 3Ls behind 200 M out, never threatened.
Had the box seat on fence 2Ls off pace on fence from 1400 M to home straight, every chance, didn't pick up.
Raced 3-wide 5Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 4-wide into straight when 4Ls down, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on fairly well.
Caught 4-wide without cover down back straight when about 6Ls off the pace, 5-wide into the home straight when about 5Ls down, didn't come on.
Never in contention.
In rear to straight where he switched out approaching 200 M. Kept on quite well towards finish.
Worse than midfield approaching home bend. Unable to obtain a clear passage in straight till close home where he finished well.
In touch to straight where he failed to hold place.
Never far off to home turn. Could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Soon pulled his way forward and was well there to home bend. Made no show on straightening.
Was midfield before reaching 4th coming into straight. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Never troubled leaders.
About 4th or 5th approaching home turn. Unable quicken to challenge on straightening.
Made no show.
Always prominent. Led field from 1200 M till headed close home. Just held on for 2nd.
Always well there. Kept on under pressure closing stages.
Midfield halfway. Short-lived effort from 300 M. Found one-pace near finish.
Made steady headway from rear home bend. Quickened impressively from 200 M to take command close home.
Prominent. Weakened 400 M.
Slowly away, last to 600 M. Improved from outside turning in. Made up good ground in straight.
Well there and was mainly 2nd. Failed to hold place inside 200 M.
Raced 4th or 5th to 400 M where he dropped back to midfield. Unable to quicken in straight.
Started well and was prominent early, soon in midfield. Faded from halfway.
Slightly behind midfield. Kept on along rail early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Midfield or behind. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield turning into straight. Kept on.
Midfield. Progressed to 4th 1200 M. Quickened up final turn to be 3rd 350 M. Ran on to take command closing stages.
Soon led, still holding 2Ls advantage 200 M. Found no extra when headed closing stages.
Towards rear. Crept closer to midfield final turn. Kept on.
Never a factor.
Prominent into straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Behind midfield. Ran on well down straight but no clear run close to home.
Well back. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Prominent. Quickened to dispute lead into straight but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Midfield. Ran on steadily down straight doing best work at finish.
Never nearer.
Well there most of way. No extra close home.
Never better than midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Never far off. Came to challenge upon straightening and asserted authority close to home.
Led till joined into straight. Fought on but unable to sustain effort and swamped close home.
Slightly behind midfield. Stayed on in straight.
In touch. Dropped to midfield when steadied near 600 M. No subsequent progress.
Soon led. Headed approaching 600 M. Dropped out from 4th final turn.
Led briefly early, soon raced in 3rd and then 2nd. Mainly 1-1/2Ls behind lead until taking over approaching 600 M. Just held on.
Began awkwardly, remained at rear. Made progress from outside 400 M. Ran on steadily but unable to threaten the 1st pair.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield 800 M. Ran on well from 2nd early straight, just failing to catch the winner narrowly.
Towards rear. Improved steadily from 650 M to be 3rd 250 M. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Better than midfield. Gave a little ground rounding home bend. Made some minor progress in straight.
Better than midfield. Made progress 800 M out to be 2nd 550 M. Failed to hold place soon after straightening.
Behind midfield. Dropped to the rear when steadied 2000 M. Made no show.
Towards rear. Severely checked turning for home. Unable to recover.
Well there, settling 3rd near 600 M. Gave ground 600 M out to be midfield home bend. One-paced thereafter.
Forward of midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Lost considerable ground at start. Never recovered.
Better than midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Prominent to straight. Faded.
Led briefly. Well there into straight. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Broke well settling in midfield. Shifted out for a run entering straight. Produced some late progress final strides.
Towards rear throughout.
Crossed gradually to rails from wide draw, soon taking lead. Hung on well to finish.
Towards rear most of way.
Never better than midfield.
Soon in rear.
Raced in worse than midfield 2-wide through to straight. Kept on evenly when asked 250 M out and ran past weakening runners after 200 M.
Began well and raced around 3 to 4Ls off pace on fence. Made steady improvement going up Rock and turning for home. 1-1/2Ls down on straightening and found the line well to win by a narrow margin.
Jumped awkwardly and rider became unbalanced. Raced in rear section on rail through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and made up good ground inside final 200 M.
Ridden along to lead on fence with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Kept on well in straight and was only overhauled in the closing stages.
Niggled along to race in mid-division towards the outside through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M and further weakened inside final 200 M. (Hung in throughout the race.)
On jumping was immediately steadied to the tail to obtain rail running. Made no impression in home straight.
Began well and soon box seated behind leader. Switched out on straightening. Responded fairly when asked 300 M out but unable to overhaul the pacegetter to settle for 4th place.

Soon raced around 6Ls off pace on rail. Under pressure to improve turning for home. Around 2Ls down on straightening and switched out to obtain running. Made up good ground in straight only to miss the winner by a short margin.
Ridden along to race in forward position out wide without cover. Commenced to gave ground 450 M out and dropped out in straight.
Pushed along to race in forward position around 2-wide. Under pressure to hold position turning for home. Found nothing in straight and weakened badly inside final 300 M.
Began fairly and was taken back to rearward position but closer to rail. One-paced in straight and only ran past several beaten runners after the 200 M.

Began well and raced around 1-1/2Ls off pace. 2-wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 300 M out but unable to fend off challenge from the 1st pair to be overhauled in the closing stages.
Slowly away, raced 3-wide 7Ls off the pace 1200 M out, improved out 4-wide without cover down the back, 3Ls down entering straight, found little under pressure.
Awkwardly away, never really got balanced early on, 8Ls off the pace on fence 800 M out, never competitive.
Caught 4-wide without cover 4Ls off the pace, 3-wide and 3Ls down into home straight, very weak thereafter.
Slowly away, had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace through to home turn, still 2Ls down 200 M out, didn't follow through.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the pace until home straight, stayed on fairly to be nearest at the finish.
Steadied 1400 M out, on fence 4Ls off the pace until final bend, very one-paced on run-in.
Bounded exiting gates, very keen early on, 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, 6Ls down entering straight, posed no threat.
Soon led on fence, 2Ls clear down the back straight, picked up well in home straight, always holding runner-up.
Raced 1L off the pace out 2-wide early on, 2Ls down in 2nd place down back straight, stayed on determinedly in home straight but couldn't overhaul winner.
3-wide and 5Ls off the lead 1200 M out, improved steadily to be 4Ls down and 3-wide entering straight, stayed on quite well though tended to hang out through final stages.
Raced 2-wide about 4Ls off the pace until 600 M out, 2Ls down in home straight, still with place chances 100 M out, no extra.
Keen early on, raced 3-wide 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 6-wide and 5Ls down entering straight, didn't come on.
Jumped fairly. On fence and 2Ls behind pace at 1000 M. Under pressure 350 M out and kept on one-paced to line.

Raced 3-wide and near rear at 1000 M. Under pressure 500 M out and was 2-wide behind midfield rounding home turn. Whilst improving in the straight was severely checked at 200 M. Ran on after regaining composure.
Slowest out and settled on fence at rear until end of home turn. Ran on well and made up good ground in straight.
Soon raced near rear. Under pressure 800 M out but was unable to improve. Made no impression in the straight.
Niggled along to be close to pace at 2-wide position 800 M out. On fence and 2Ls behind pace rounding home turn. Ran on strongly in straight to overtake leader final 50 M.

Broke well from wide barrier. Caught wide at first turn. Near pace but 3-wide at 1000 M. Challenged leader and led momentarily from 2-wide position near 800 M but was soon overtaken. Weakened quickly in concluding stages.
Slow into stride. On fence and 2Ls behind pace at 1000 M. Remained 2-wide near midfield rounding home turn. Unable to quicken in straight. (Lame.)
Raced at least 3-wide and near rear throughout. Very wide turning in. Found nothing in the straight.
Raced 3-wide near midfield from 1000 M through to straight. Unable to quicken and kept on same pace to line.
Jumped fairly and settled on fence and 4Ls off pace. On fence and 6Ls off pace rounding home turn. Kept on well in straight but was no threat to winner.

Broke well and led on fence comfortably. Was challenged and lost leading position briefly near 800 M. Regained lead shortly after and continued to lead into straight. Responded well under pressure but unable to hold off winner final 50 M
Checked at the start, raced 3-wide 7Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls down entering straight, ran on okay but was never dangerous.
3-wide and 7Ls off the speed 1200 M out, raced on and off the bridle, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls off the pace, didn't quicken up.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4Ls down and 2-wide into home straight, no acceleration.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace until about 600 M out when under pressure, dropped out very quickly.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than a length, headed 500 M out, faded steadily.
On fence 8Ls off the lead 1200 M out, 5Ls down 600 M out, was checked about 500 M out, 4-wide and 6Ls down entering straight, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Checked at the start, on fence 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4Ls down into home straight, stayed on well, just hung on for 3rd.
In 2nd place out 2-wide 1L off the pace from 1200 M to 600 M, led entering straight, 1L clear 200 M out, grabbed by winner about 100 M out, no extra.
Raced 3-wide without cover 3Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 2Ls off lead from 800 M to home straight, one-paced to line.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 2Ls down entering straight, led 100 M out, kept on.
In rear 3-wide and 8Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls off the pace 600 M out, driven along entering straight, stayed on at same pace through closing stages.
Hampered at the start, on fence 4Ls off pace 800 M out, badly checked 500 M out, 6Ls down entering straight, didn't threaten thereafter.
Better than midfield. Crowded 300 M out. No extra.
In touch early, soon behind midfield. No significant progress.
Behind midfield. Made ground halfway to be 5th 400 M. One-paced thereafter.
In touch. Weakened inside 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Ran on quite well final 200 M, never nearer.
Midfield to halfway. Weakened.
Slowly away, soon last. Made up some ground 200 M out.
Mainly 2nd. Kept on well final 200 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Midfield. Moved up from 600 M. Ran on steadily inside 250 M.
Among front runners. Took clear lead passing course proper. Just held off runner-up's challenges closing stages.
Among the front runners. Dropped back steadily inside 400 M.
Settled behind leaders. Commenced move upon straightening gaining narrow advantage passing 200 M. Hung on gamely under pressure to finish.
Midfield into straight. Kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Hard driven to muster pace early on. Never seen with a chance.
Never in contention.
Midfield to straight. Dropped out. (Bled and heart irregularity.)
Midfield to straight. Made some impression early on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there. Hit front rounding home bend going 1L clear early in straight but unable to sustain effort and headed closing stages.
Towards rear into straight. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Never nearer.
Broke well and vied for early lead from poor draw. Settled for 3rd coming out of back straight and soon faded out after home turn.
Soon took up running holding slender advantage before headed around home bend. Dropped out in straight.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Towards rear, 2nd last final turn. Ran on well final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Raced 4th before moving up near 1250 M to soon be 2nd. Came to join the leader final turn, gaining lead 200 M. Kept on when headed 100 M.
Better than midfield. Weakened steadily soon after straightening.
Never a factor.
Behind midfield throughout.
Slowly away, at rear. Soon recovered ground to be behind midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Towards rear. Made ground on outside 900 M. Quickened well from 7th 400 M to take command 100 M. Held on.
Mainly midfield. Kept on closing stages.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield. Recovered some ground to be 3-wide 5th 1400 M. Kept on well in straight, just lost a minor placing near finish.
Prominent to 300 M. Dropped back steadily.
Took lead until joined final turn. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Prominent. Dropped back slightly to 4th 1100 M. Gave nothing when asked inside final 300 M.
Near rear throughout. (Bled.)
Started awkwardly from widest draw and became last. Moved up steadily 1000 M out. Ran on quite well from 9th 250 M, never nearer.
Well there. Quickened to hold every chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Towards rear to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Prominent. Ran on well to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Never better than midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Always prominent. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Prominent into straight then gradually faded.
Wide towards rear. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Well back into straight. Ran on well through field down centre of track to do best work at finish but baulked final strides.
Soon in rear. Last into straight but produced good late impression final 200 M.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace under pressure.
Began best from difficult draw to make all. Held on well under pressure.
Midfield to straight. Faded passing 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily on rails down straight.
Broke fairly and soon raced 2 to 3Ls off leader. Under pressure 400 M and made up steady ground but was unable to overhaul the winner. (Laid out throughout the race.)
Towards the rear in the early to middle stages. Kept on evenly to the line when asked 300 M out.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section. Under pressure 400 M out but made no impression.
Handy briefly. Pushed along to stay in midfield. Weakened from 200 M.
Ridden along but outpaced to race at back. Made up some ground inside the final 200 M.
Raced in worse than midfield. All out 200 M out but unable to quicken and stayed one-paced to the line.
Slowly away and niggled along to race around 2Ls off pace. Stayed one-paced when asked 400 M out and further weakened over the concluding stages.
Began well and soon led with around 1L advantage. Found the line well when asked 300 M out to win comfortably.
Slow to begin and raced in worse than midfield. Unable to quicken when asked 450 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Raced around 2Ls off pace. Under pressure 300 M out but only kept on evenly and was overhauled by 3rd placegetter on the line.
Niggled along to race 1L off pace. Ran on fairly when asked 300 M out to grab 3rd place on the line.
Soon at rear and tailed off from 500 M.
Tardy start and pushed along to race in rear section. Never a factor.
Raced in midfield with cover. Under pressure 400 M out but only ran on evenly to the line.
Had box seat run 2Ls off the pace on fence through to home straight, picked up to be half a length off the lead 200 M out, still with place prospects 100 M out, swamped close home.
Slowly away, on fence about 4Ls off the pace until home straight, was very one-paced from then on.
Tracked leader out 2-wide 1L off the pace through to home straight, quickly came under pressure, dropped out instantly.
Keen early on, raced 2-wide 3Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 4Ls down entering straight, 2Ls down 200 M out, stayed on well but couldn't get to principals.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 8Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 7Ls down entering straight, 5Ls down 200 M out, kept on okay at same pace, nearest at the finish.
Settled towards rear upon exiting, raced 3 and 4-wide without cover down the back straight when about 8Ls or 9Ls off the pace, posed no kind of threat in home straight.
Bumped exiting gates, led on fence by about 1L from 1300 M to home straight, still in front but all out at the 200 M, headed 180 M out, faded.
Had no cover when 3-wide about 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace until 800 M out, 2-wide until home straight when travelling well, led 180 M out, kept on but was tossed out of quinella in final strides.
Always about 2-wide and 5Ls off the pace from 1200 M to home straight, picked up well to be 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on finding, led final strides, tidily.
Bumped exiting gates, raced 2-wide 7Ls off the pace 1000 M out, driven along when 4-wide and 8Ls down into home straight, no impression.
Bit keen early on, had cover 3-wide about 5Ls off the pace from 1200 M to homestretch, staying on and 3Ls down 200 M out, ran on very strongly final 200 M, couldn't get there.
Bounded and was checked exiting gates, on fence 8Ls off the pace 1000 M out, already detached in rear and driven along when 10Ls off the pace entering home straight, no chance.
Bit keen early on, 3-wide with cover about 4Ls off the pace from 1200 M out to home straight, kept on at one pace to be nearest at the finish.
On fence 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, niggled along 700 M out, 2-wide and 6Ls down entering straight, 4Ls down 200 M out, kept on well for hard riding to be nearest at the finish.
Fractious and broke gate prior to jump, 2-wide and 7Ls off pace 1000 M out, advanced to be 3-wide and 5Ls off pace 800 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, didn't quicken up.
2-wide and 6Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls down off home bend, didn't threaten.
Raced about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace from 1000 M to home straight, 1L down in 2nd place 200 M out, shifted out under pressure, couldn't get to the front.
Raced 3-wide 6Ls off the lead 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight and driven along when 5Ls off the lead, weakened further.
Awkwardly away, tacked across to rail from outside barrier, about 11Ls off pace in rear 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight, ran on well down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
2-wide and 2Ls off the pace 1000 M out, on fence 2Ls off the pace from 700 M to home straight, 1L down in 2nd place 200 M out, kept finding to lead 50 M out, hung on.
Bumped at the start, on fence 3Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace into home straight, beaten 200 M out, eased down through final 100 M.
Raced 2-wide 8Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls off the pace, all out to be 3Ls down 200 M out, one-paced to line.
Attempted to lead on fence early on, couldn't muster enough pace to cross to fence, 2-wide with narrow advantage through to 500 M out, didn't quicken in straight and was beaten 200 M out.
Disputed lead on fence about half a length off the pace 1000 M out, led by 1L 400 M out, still about 1L to the good 200 M out, grabbed by winner about 50 M from home, no extra.
Bumped exiting gates, on fence about 7Ls off the pace and niggled along 1000 M out, 2-wide and 5Ls off the pace entering straight, one-paced to line.
Prominent early on, raced 2-wide 2Ls off the speed 1000 M out, on fence in 4th place and driven along when 4Ls off the pace 700 M out, faded out from top of home straight.
