Didn't travel that well one from rear about 10L off the pace 1000 M out, 6Ls down and 2-wide into home straight, 4Ls down 200 M out, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
3-wide 8Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 5-wide and in rear when still 8Ls down entering straight, no chance.
On fence 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3Ls behind 800 M out, still 3Ls down and 3-wide and driven along into straight, 2Ls down with every chance 200 M out, one-paced.
Slowly away, was at least 4-wide round first bend 1400 M out, about 12Ls off the pace 1100 M out, never remotely competitively.
Led on fence 1300 M out, never clear by much more than 2Ls, led at top of home straight, grabbed by winner 100 M out, just hung on for 2nd place.
Raced 3-wide 8Ls off the pace 1200 M out, was caught without cover down the back straight, 5-wide into home straight when about 7Ls behind leader, soon with no chance.

In 5th place on fence about 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 2-wide and 6Ls down when driven along 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight, 2Ls down 200 M out, couldn't follow through. (See Racing Incidents.)
Awkwardly away and lost ground, in rear about 14Ls off the lead 1200 M out, never better than 8Ls off the lead at any stage.
Raced 2-wide 9Ls off the pace 1100 M out, 4-wide into home straight and hanging out when 6Ls off the pace, no acceleration.
About 12Ls off the speed 1100 M out, steadily became more involved and was 6Ls down and hard ridden entering straight, 4Ls down 200 M out, never looked like reaching principals.
Raced 3Ls off the pace out 2-wide without cover 1200 M out, 1L down and 2-wide 800 M out, 2Ls down entering straight, was rather one-paced on run-in.
10Ls off the speed and 3-wide 1100 M out, hard pressed to be within 8Ls of leader at the 400 M, posed no threat.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off pace on fence from 1200 M to home straight, switched out to challenge, led 100 M out, drew clear.
Was unbalanced on the fence 1400 M out, on inner and 10Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 6Ls entering straight, beaten 300 M out.
Raced 2-wide and 10Ls off the pace 1100 M out, 7Ls down entering straight, never dangerous.
On fence 10Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 6Ls down on fence 800 M out, 3Ls down and driven off final bend, held up for a run from 300 M to 200 M, was still quite one-paced on run-in to line.
Soon led, never clear by more than 1L early on, headed by GRAND FIGHTER 400 M out, disputing lead 200 M out, headed by winner 150 M out, just hung on for 2nd place.
3-wide and about 7Ls off the pace 800 M out, 5Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, ran on well through closing stages to be nearest at the finish.
Settled towards rear early on, driven along on fence 9Ls off the pace at the 600 M, all out to get within 5Ls off the lead about 200 M out, no extra.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace through to home straight when travelling well, found nothing off the bridle, was quite one-paced through final 200 M.
2-wide 3Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 2-wide and 2Ls down into home straight, picked up well to join leading pair at the 200 M out, clear lead 150 M out, drew further clear on run-in to line.
On fence 5Ls off the pace and driven along 800 M out, 4Ls down entering straight, no threat.
Awkwardly away, settled in rear 9Ls off the pace on fence 800 M out, 3-wide and 6Ls down entering straight, never threatened.
Slowly away, raced 2-wide 6Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3Ls down and 2-wide 400 M out, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on well without reaching principals.
Awkwardly away, raced 3-wide 5Ls off the pace 800 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 4Ls off the pace and hard ridden, made little impression.
Raced 2-wide 1L off pace 1000 M out, advanced to take narrow lead 400 M out, disputing lead 200 M out, headed 150 M out, no extra close home and lost out on quinella spot.
Dropped out towards rear early on, 2-wide and 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 6Ls down, finished off down centre of track, nearest at the finish.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls 900 M out, 3-wide into home straight and 3Ls off the front, 2Ls down and with every chance 300 M out, didn't pick up and well beaten 150 M out.
Raced 3-wide without cover 2Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 1L off the lead 800 M out, 2Ls down and still 3-wide entering straight, faded out steadily from the 400 M marker.
Raced 3-wide with cover 2Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, all out to be 2Ls down 200 M out, weakened rapidly.
Never troubled leaders.
Never better than midfield.
Never far off to straight. Quickened approaching 200 M to lead close home.
4th into home bend. Kept on without threatening first 2.
Among rear group to straight where he made up some ground final 250 M.
Midfield into straight where he made no show.
Well there to straight where he failed quicken to challenge. Weakened close home.
Last into straight where he ran on a bit.
Well there. Reached 2nd 1000 M and same place into straight. Led 200 M out but unable to hold winner close home.
At back to straight where he switched out 300 M and ran on quite well.
Made running to straight. Was headed approaching 200 M and found no extra.
About 6th halfway. Dropped out quickly from 300 M.
Mostly midfield to home turn. Stayed on well final 200 M.
Never on terms.
Midfield early, soon moved up to be 2nd near 700 M. Sustained effort in straight to take lead 100 M. Held on well.
Midfield. Steady progress 600 M out to be 3rd 500 M. Kept on without threatening.
Led briefly early, dropped back steadily to behind midfield. Remained in similar position thereafter.
In the last pair. Advanced from 400 M on inner rail to be 5th early straight. Failed to quicken.
Led field soon after start. With 1/2L advantage turning in, held on when headed 100 M out.
Mainly 4th before dropping to 5th passing 600 M. Weakened 200 M out.
Towards rear. Gave ground when badly unbalanced near 500 M. No recovery.
Behind midfield. Made ground rounding home bend, improving to 4th final turn. One-paced thereafter.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground at the Rock, badly unbalanced near 500 M. Ran on a bit from 7th home turn but found no extra inside 200 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped to the last approaching the Rock. Made up some ground on outside final 250 M.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield to home bend. Faded.
Broke well. Settled some 3Ls off the pace. Quickened to hit front over 200 M out. Hung in well to the line.
Raced mostly 3-wide in prominent position to home bend. Dropped out.
Always towards rear. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Settled in midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Well there to straight. Found nothing.
Settled around midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening but unable to draw level.
Mostly in midfield. Kept on steadily to reach 5th place closing stages.
Led to 300 M. Weakened.
Settled behind leaders. Not clear run early in straight. Kept on steadily final 200 M.
Settled in rear. Ran on steadily down straight, doing best work at finish.
Never in contention.
Midfield. Improved a bit to 5th final turn. Kept on well early straight but failed to quicken closing stages.
Led field from 1300 M and never headed.
Prominent on inside. Steadied for a run 600 M and 200 M. Kept on.
Better than midfield. Weakened soon after straightening.
Mostly 4th and 3-wide. Given reminders approaching 400 M. One-paced.
Slowly away, behind midfield throughout.
Towards rear. No improvement.
Slowly away, towards rear. Crept closer turning in. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Led field to 1300 M, then remained 2nd to 200 M. Found no extra.
Rear. Made up good ground under pressure 250 M out to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Dropped to last 900 M. Fell at 600 M. (Bled.)
Near rear from widest draw. Never in contention.
Prominent to 400 M. Dropped out. (Bled.)
Never on terms.
Began awkwardly. Remained in last few to straight. Making headway when baulked inside 200 M.
Midfield. Effort early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Led to 300 M. Swamped. (See Racing Incidents.)
Well there. Quickened to take charge shortly after straightening and soon drew clear.
Raced in forward of midfield. Kept on same pace under pressure without quickening.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily to reach remote 2nd close to home.
Midfield most of way.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
In last few to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Always in last few. (See Racing Incidents.)
Pushed along to race 2Ls off pace on rail through to straight. Responded well when asked 300 M out and fended off challenge from 2nd placegetter to win convincingly.
Raced keenly in the early stages and hung out rounding the 1st turn. Soon settled in mid-division around 3-wide, made the home turn awkwardly and weakened badly inside final 200 M.
Slowly away and raced in rearward position on fence through to straight. Made up steady ground in straight but was crowded for rear in the final stages therefore it was not ridden out to the line.
Soon raced in rear position 2-wide through to straight. Made up little ground in straight but had a tendency to lay in over the concluding stages, as a consequence it was not ridden out to the line.
Unable to muster to early speed to race at back on inner through to straight. Made no impression when asked 300 M out.
Began well and soon raced 3Ls off pace on rail through to straight. Made up some ground in straight but was never in position to trouble the placegetters.
Began well wide draw and soon took up running on fence. Headed around 150 M and kept on fairly to hold on to 3rd place.
When the gates opened put its head down and refused to jump, as a consequence rider was dislodged.
Began well and soon asked to race 3 to 4Ls off pace 3-wide. Made steady improvement turning for home. Ran on well in straight but unable to up a gear to overhaul the winner to settle for 2nd place.
Raced in rear section out wide without cover through to straight. Only kept on evenly to the line.
Pushed along to race in prominent position 2-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and kept on one-paced to the line.
Raced in rear section 3-wide. Made some improvement going up Rock. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and kept on same paced to the line.
Tacked across to fence upon exiting from wide barrier, 7Ls off pace in rear 1200 M out, 2-wide and 5Ls off speed 600 M out, 4-wide entering stretch, ran on only fairly.
Raced 2-wide in rear 7Ls off the pace, 5Ls behind and 2-wide 600 M out, one-paced in stretch.
Slowly away, on fence 4Ls off the speed and on fence from 1200 M out to home straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, too one-paced to threaten.
Had the run of the race on the fence 2Ls off the pace from 1200 M out to home straight, loomed up with every chance when half a length down 200 M out, couldn't overhaul winner.
Caught 4-wide without cover 1400 M out when 2Ls off pace, 5Ls off pace 800 M out, sent on to dispute lead out 3-wide 500 M out, hard ridden entering straight, found nothing.
Led on fence early on, headed 1000 M out, led again at the 500 M, 1L clear entering straight, half a length to the good 200 M out, all out, just about held on.
Bumped at start, raced 3-wide with cover 2Ls off the pace 1400 M out, led by half a length out 2-wide 1000 M out, headed 500 M out, became very unbalanced, weakened badly.
Raced 2-wide 1L off the pace 1200 M out, under heavy pressure to hold position 500 M out, faded out.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4Ls off pace 800 M out, 3-wide and 2Ls down at the 600 M, hard ridden 400 M out, faded from top of home straight.
Bumped and checked exiting gates, on fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off speed from about 1200 M out to home straight, very one-paced in stretch.
Raced 2-wide about 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls off the pace 600 M out, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight, ran on past a few beaten rivals.
Fractious in gates beforehand, raced 2 and 3-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace through to home straight, didn't quicken up, beaten 300 M out.
Steadied to be towards midfield shortly after start. Travelled 3-wide into first turn. 3-wide and 2Ls behind pace 800 M out until home straight. No extra final 200 M.
3-wide and just behind pace entering first turn. Sat in 2-wide position behind leader from 1000 M out until home straight. Every chance 250 M out. One-paced to line.
Jumped well but was caught very wide rounding first turn. Travel wide without cover near midfield throughout the race. Widest turning in and weakened in straight.

Jumped fairly and settled on rails near midfield at 1200 M. On rails about 4Ls behind pace through backstraight. Responded well under pressure in straight. Took command final stages and won impressively.
Little slow to begin. Settled on rails and 7Ls behind pace 1200 M out. Behind midfield throughout backstraight. Ran on strongly final 200 M but was unable to threaten winner.
Slow to jump. Settled 2-wide near rear from 1000 M to 400 M. 3-wide turning in. One-paced to line.
From a wide barrier was niggled along to lead entering first turn. Led comfortably until final 200 M. Unable to hold off winner final stages.
Settled 2-wide and about 4Ls behind pace at 1200 M. Travelled behind midfield in backstraight. Under pressure 400 M out. 3-wide turning in. Unable to quicken in straight.
Ridden forward early to be in prominent position. Settled 2Ls behind pace until entering home straight. Weakened final 300 M. (Dropped whip 1500 M.)
Soon eased back to travel on fence near the rear of the field. Remained at similar position until 500 M out. Slightly held up for running prior to straightening. Ran on at same pace.
Jumped slow and was steadied to be at the rear of the field. Travelled 2-wide at rear until final 450 M. All out final 250 M and made up some late ground.
Jumped well. Travelled 2-wide and 3Ls behind pace from 1200 M to 400 M. No response when asked and weakened final stages.
On fence 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 5Ls down and travelling well entering straight, short of room 200 M out, ran on strongly once clear close home, just missed, unlucky.
Slowly away, on fence 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, still 4Ls down 200 M out, stayed on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
Bumped at the start, soon settled 3Ls off the pace on the fence, 2Ls down 400 M out, held up for a run for most of home straight, got clear close home, led final strides.
Too keen when 8Ls off the pace on fence 1200 M out, 6Ls down entering straight, never got any kind clear run, was barely extended, unlucky.
Raced 2-wide 8Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4-wide and driven along entering straight when 5Ls off the speed, stayed on fairly well to be nearest at finish.
2-wide and 9Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide without cover at the 1000 M, pressed forward to 3Ls off pace and 3-wide 400 M out, faded from top of home straight.
Awkwardly away, on fence 2Ls off pace in 2nd place 1200 M out, 2-wide and 1L off pace entering straight, still 1L down 200 M out, kept on at same pace.
About 10Ls off pace in rear 1200 M out, 4-wide entering straight when 6Ls down, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Raced 2-wide 4Ls off the speed from 1200 M out to home straight, didn't pick up and beaten 300 M out.
Awkwardly into stride, raced freely when 2-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls off speed at the 600 M, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Raced 2-wide without cover about 3Ls off the pace 1200 M out, still close up entering straight, was too one-paced thereafter to threaten.
Soon led on the fence, never clear by more than 2Ls dictating a steady tempo, still 1L clear 200 M out, headed close home, no extra.
Behind midfield. Improved to midfield 800 M. One-paced thereafter.
Slowly away, near rear. Dropped to the last when checked 850 M.
Towards rear. Very minor improvement final turn. No extra.
Prominent briefly, soon dropped to behind midfield. Kept on early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Tardy start, remained in rear. Made up considerable ground from outside 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Steady progress home bend to be midfield turning in. Responded well in straight but failed to catch the winner.
Led briefly early. Was prominent before giving ground steadily from 800 M. Made no show in straight.
Better than midfield. Checked 850 M. Recovered ground to 4th rounding home bend. Steadied for a run 300 M. Ran on well final 200 M to just miss 2nd.
Midfield from widest draw. Made good progress 900 M to be 3rd 800 M out. Ran on from 3-wide final turn to take lead passing 300 M. Held on.
Prominent. Took lead passing 800 M. Was headed 250 M out. Kept on until weakened closing stages.
Ridden along early to lead from 1000 M. Was headed passing 800 M. Kept on until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Soon prominent. Dropped back to midfield from 1st turn. No progress in straight.
Midfield. Dropped back when checked approaching 800 M. No recovery. (Bled.)
Soon took up running and never headed. Unextended.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield briefly. (Bled.)
Well back. Produced good impression in straight.
Well back to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Midfield or worse. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield to straight. Faded gradually.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Broke best. Settled behind leaders. Fought on under pressure but lost 3rd late.
Rear to straight. Made up some ground.
Always in last few.
Midfield to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Just better than midfield most of way. Kept on well in straight.
Chased leader around home bend. Weakened upon straightening.
In touch. Improved to 3rd 300 M. Failed to quicken closing stages.
In touch early. Dropped to midfield when steadied 1400 M. Further dropped towards the rear when inconvenienced home bend. Steadied again at 200 M followed by a late recovery.
Better than midfield. Moved up from 1200 M to take lead 600 M out. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Slowly away, at the rear. Very moderate progress inside 300 M.
Well there. Took lead from 1200 M to 600 M. Faded from 3rd early straight.
Led. 3rd when headed near 1200 M. Dropped back steadily from 500 M.
Soon in touch. Steady progress home bend to be 2nd final turn. Ran on steadily to take lead 200 M. Just held on.
Towards rear. Made up some ground early straight. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Began awkwardly, never able to feature.
Towards rear from widest draw. Improved passing 800 M to be 4-wide midfield turning in. Made up good ground when under pressure to just miss narrowly.
Midfield before progressing to 3rd briefly near 1300 M. Dropped back gradually to midfield from first turn. Kept on one-paced thereafter.
Near rear. Moved up from outside 600 M out. Ran on quite well in straight but was one-paced close home.
Midfield to final turn. Dropped back steadily.
Never in contention.
Around midfield. Weakened upon straightening.
In last few most of way.
Never far off. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Midfield to straight. Kept on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never nearer.
Settled in midfield. Made only modest progress in straight.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Settled behind midfield. Produced some late headway.
Led far side. Prominent into straight. No extra.
Soon led. Quickened to hold 2Ls break over 200 M out. Won readily.
Midfield. Kept on one pace.
Well there. Fought on dourly but unable to catch winner closing stages.
Midfield to straight. Weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Began well but soon eased to race around 2Ls off pace with cover. All out 400 M out and made up steady ground but was unable to overhaul the first pair to settle for 3rd place.
Raced in rearward position. Never a factor.
Prominent up to 400 M. Unable to quicken when asked and kept on evenly to the line.
Began well and raced around 1/2L off pace. Took lead shortly after 200 M and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to take the winner spot.
Led narrowly. Headed shortly after 200 M but kept on well to push the winner all the way to the line.
Soon raced in the rear section with cover. All out 350 M and made up little ground inside the final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Raced around 2Ls off pace. Made up some ground when asked 350 M but was never going to trouble the placegetters.
Raced in rearward position. Did not quicken when asked 350 M out and only ran past couple of beaten runners.
Raced prominently to 500 M. Steadily dropped back from 450 M.
Raced in midfield. Under pressure 400 M out but unable to quicken and kept on one-paced to the line.
On fence 7Ls off the pace 1600 M out, 5Ls down 800 M out, 4Ls down turning for home, was always held.
Led by 1L on fence 1600 M out, juoined by SONGS OF PRAISE 600 M out and disputed lead until home straight, faded out steadily.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the speed 1600 M out, 4Ls down 800 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down into home straight, 2Ls down in 4th place at the 200 M, couldn't sustain effort through closing stages.
Slowly away, on fence 10Ls off the pace 1600 M out, 8Ls off the pace near rear and driven along 600 M out, 4Ls down 200 M out, kept on for hard riding to nick 3rd place close home.
3-wide and 8Ls off pace from 1600 M to 1200 M out, advanced to be 1L off the speed and under pressure out 4-wide in 4th place turning for home, soon dropped out.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace from 1600 M to 800 M, 1L down and 3-wide into stretch, half a length down in 2nd place 200 M out, rallied gamely under pressur, couldn't get in front.
2-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1600 M out, 3-wide 800 M out, 5-wide and 4Ls down at top of home straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on at same pace to line.
Raced 2-wide 7Ls off the pace 1600 M out, similarly placed 800 M out, 4-wide and 4Ls down on the swing, kept on fairly well to be nearest at the finish without ever threatening.
Switched towards rail from wide barrier upon exiting, 2-wide and 10Ls off pace 1200 M out, 6-wide (widest of all) and 5Ls down entering straight, stayed on for pressure to be nearest at finish.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace on fence until home straight, weakened rapidly from then on.
On fence 5Ls off pace 1600 M out, 3Ls down at the 800 M, closer turning for home when 2-wide, was very one-paced through final stages.
2-wide 9Ls off the pace 1600 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down at the 800 M, 5-wide into home straight, picked up well to lead 100 M out, kept on under pressure.
1L off the pace out 2-wide from 1600 M out to 600 M, disputed lead entering straight, half a length in front at the 200 M, grabbed by winner 100 M out, no extra.
In rear about 14Ls off the pace 1400 M out, about 9Ls behind in rear entering straight, ran on past a couple of beaten rivals on run-in.
Settled 2-wide and 10Ls off pace 1000 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, quickened up impressively to lead 250 M out whilst shifting in somewhat, drew clear.
Raced 4Ls off the pace out 2-wide in 3rd spot 1000 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, had absolutely no chance with the winner but battled on well for 2nd place.
2Ls off the pace on fence in 2nd place from 1000 M out to the 600 M, 2-wide and 2Ls behind into home straight, tried hard but was always outpaced by principals.
About 12Ls off the speed in rear down the back straight, 8Ls down at top of home straight, no chance.
On fence 7Ls or 8Ls off the pace 1000 M out, ridden along when 6Ls down at top of home straight, never competitive.
Held up one from rear about 11Ls off the speed 1200 M out, driven along when 5-wide and 6Ls off the pace entering straight, ran on fairly well without reaching principals.
Slowly away, raced 2-wide 7Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 5Ls down entering straight when travelling well and 2-wide, short of racing room before shifting out 300 M out, finished off strongly.
Raced 3-wide without cover about 6Ls off the pace at the 1000 M, tended to over-race a bit, 3-wide and 4-wide into home straight when driven along, one-paced thereafter.
Soon led, 2Ls clear on fence from 1000 M to home straight, grabbed by winner 250 M out, no extra and faded steadily.
5Ls off pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down entering straight, staying on and with place prospects when severely checked 250 M out, didn't recover.
Raced 3-wide 8Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 4-wide and 5Ls down entering straight, 3Ls down 1600 M out, no extra.
On fence 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3Ls down at top of home straight, kept on at same pace to line and never dangerous.
On fence 10Ls off the pace at the 1000 M, 8Ls down and 3-wide on the swing, was always outpaced.
On fence 5Ls off the pace from 1400 M to 800 M out, 3-wide and driven along when 4Ls down into home straight, still 4Ls down 200 M out, no acceleration. (Heart irregularity.)
Bit keen early on, raced 2-wide and 3Ls off the pace from 1200 M out to home straight, was always too one-paced thereafter.
5Ls off pace and 2-wide 1400 M out, 3-wide with cover when 4Ls off pace 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight, picked up well to be about 2Ls down in 4th place 200 M out, couldn't sustain effort.
Was always caught without cover, 3-wide and 4Ls off pace 1400 M out, 3Ls down and 3-wide 800 M out, driven along entering straight when 2Ls down, no extra and beaten 300 M out.
Raced keenly out 2-wide 2Ls off the pace 1400 M out, 1L down at the 800 M, hard-pressed to keep tabs with pacesetters at top of home straight, soon wilted.
2-wide and 4Ls off the pace from 1400 M to 800 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, got clear 400 M out and picked up well to lead 150 M out, ran on strongly.
Best away, had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace from 1400 M out to home straight when under pressure to keep up, faded out steadily.
Led on fence by 2Ls 1400 M out, 1L clear at top of home straight and set sail for the winning post, grabbed by winner 150 M out, comfortably held on for 2nd place.
12Ls off the pace 1400 M out, 3-wide and 9Ls down 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 6Ls off leader, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
4-wide without cover 1200 M out when 5Ls off pace, 3Ls down and 4-wide 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight and 1L down in 2nd place, all out to be 2Ls down in 3rd at the 200 M, no extra.
Always on fence 4Ls off the speed down through to home straight, badly held up from 400 M to 200 M when switched into the clear, finished off well to nick 3rd on the line.
Raced 2-wide 10Ls off the speed towards rear 1400 M out, struggling when 8Ls off the pace turning for home, no chance.
Settled in rear, on fence 9Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 6Ls down 800 M out, 4Ls down at top of home straight, 3Ls down at the 200 M, no extra and weakened through concluding stages.
On fence 8Ls off the pace 1400 M out, 6Ls down and 2-wide 800 M out, 5Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, made a little late headway past beaten rivals.
Always about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace on fence until home straight, 1L off pace in clear 2nd place 200 M out, stuck on well but just couldn't get his head in front.
Raced 3-wide 10Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 5-wide and at least 7Ls off the pace entering straight, made some moderate late headway.
On fence 8Ls off the pace 1000 M out, still in rear when 7Ls off the pace and 3-wide into home straight, 6Ls down 200 M out, kept on well to be nearest at the finish.
Raced freely out 4-wide without cover when 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, sent on to be 1L off pace still out 4-wide from 800 M out to home straight, soon faded out.
Awkwardly away, 7Ls off the speed on fence from 800 M out to home straight when driven along, no chance.

2-wide and about 6Ls off the pace 800 M out, similarly placed when travelling into home straight, didn't have much running room until the 200 M, ridden out hands and heels, nearest at finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced 3-wide 8Ls off the pace 1000 M out, niggled along when 3-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, 3Ls down 200 M out, kept finding but winning post came too soon.
Bumped at the start, over-raced early on, 3-wide and 4Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down and under pressure entering straight, didn't pick up.
Slowly away, 8Ls down and 2-wide 800 M out, still 8Ls adrift at top of home straight, made no impression.
Bumped exiting gates, raced 2-wide 3Ls off the pace 1000 M out, already retreating off the home turn, faded right out.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace 800 M out, shuffled back to be 4Ls down turning for home, 3Ls down 200 M out, gamely sped through narrow gap to lead 40 M out, did it well.
Soon led, couldn't get to the fence until 700 M out, 1L to the good off home turn and 200 M out, collared by winner about 40 M out, lost place money on the line.
Raced keenly 1000 M out with the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace, under pressure turning for home, one-paced to line.
Blundered at the start, 4-wide without cover early on, 3-wide with cover and 1L off the pace 800 M out, all out to remain within 2Ls of the lead 200 M out, no extra close home.
Towards rear till making good headway final 250 M to threaten near finish.
Midfield at best.
Soon prominent. Took lead 1300 M and was 1L clear into straight. Was headed 250 M out and faded quickly.
Never better than midfield.
Mostly in 5th or 6th to home turn. Unable to obtain a clear run for most part of straight.
About 6th turning for home. Could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Well there to straight where he found nothing when asked.
Mostly 2nd to straight where he moved up to lead briefly 250 M out. Soon headed and gave ground quickly.
In rear to straight where he ran on well to lead passing 200 M.
At back to straight. Ran on strongly final 200 M despite not reaching winner.
Settled in rear to straight where he ran on a bit.
Was prominent before dropping to 5th 1000 M. Made steady headway home bend to share 3rd turning into straight. Held every chance 250 M but did not sustain effort.
Worse than midfield to home turn. Ran on in straight to challenge 200 M. Found no extra near finish.
Well there before losing ground passing 1000 M. Made no show after.
Slowly away, near rear. Made up some ground on outside final 300 M.
Towards rear, last from 900 M. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Always there. Kept on quite well along inside from final turn. Gained 2nd near 200 M but failed to quicken close home.
In touch. Weakened steadily soon after straightening.
Began awkwardly and lost ground. Never a factor.
Well there. Took led from 1100 M. Faded when headed 250 M.
Behind midfield. Towards rear turning in. Made up good ground from 4-wide in straight. Unable to trouble the winner.
Mostly 11th to straight. Ran on from outside to be nearest at finish.
Led field briefly soon after start, then remained 3rd to 300 M. Kept on until weakened closing stages.
Midfield or slightly better. Made no show in straight.
Behind midfield throughout.
Well there. Was 2nd before taking over 250 M. Held on well.
Midfield to 200 M. Weakened.
Behind midfield from widest draw. Kept on same pace in straight.
Wide in midfield to straight. Soon found no extra. (See Racing Incidents.)
Ridden in front early. Trailed the leader rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Always towards rear. Made no impression in straight.
Midfield. Lost position approaching home bend. Kept on steadily in straight.
Well back. Ran on well past beaten runners in straight.
Prominent 3-wide most of way to straight, then weakened.
In forward of midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Kept on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight, then weakened.
Well back. Made up ground along rails in straight to be nearest at finish.
Took up running approaching home bend going 2Ls clear upon straightening. Hung on under pressure.
Midfield to straight. One-paced.
Around midfield throughout. (Lame.)
Towards rear throughout.
Dropped back gradually to rear from a wide draw. Never in contention.
Towards rear. Found no clear run 450 M. Ran on strongly when in clear inside 300 M.
Better than midfield. Gained 2nd early straight. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Behind midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Better than midfield. Failed to quicken in straight.
Led field to 500 M. Faded.
Well there. Held 2nd until taking over 500 M. Weakened when headed 250 M.
Began awkwardly, always at the back.
Settled 4th. Responded well from final turn to take charge 250 M. Just held off runner-up's challenges closing stages.
Rear. Made ground from outside final turn. One-paced final 200 M.
Held 3rd until weakening out of contention final 300 M.
Towards rear. Ran on quite well down straight to grab 3rd place close to home.
Rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight.
Soon took up running and led until joined upon straightening. Dropped out approaching 200 M.
Remained well back throughout.
Midfield to straight. One-paced.
Settled in midfield. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M briefly before overhauled.
Prominent to straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Well there to straight then gradually weakened.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Mainly better than midfield to straight. Gradually faded.
Wide in midfield to straight. Found nothing.
Restrained behind midfield. Responded well in straight to assert authority closing stages.
Rear to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Missed the break. Rear to straight. Ran on past beaten horses under pressure.
Pushed along to race in prominent position on rail through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out but failed to respond and further weakened inside final 250 M.
Raced in mid-division on rail through to straight. Made up little ground in the early part of straight, became one-paced inside final 200 M.
Jumped well and raced in mid-division towards the outside through to straight. Did not respond when asked 350 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Led on rail. Headed on straightening and soon tailed out thereafter.

Eased to race around 8Ls off pace 3-wide. Checked at 1400 M when crowded for room. Made up ground turning for home to be 3Ls down on straightening. Ran on well in straight but was no match for the winner.

On jumping was bumped and lost ground. Soon raced around 9Ls off pace on rail. Switched out wide and made up steady ground turning for home. Found the line well when asked 300 M out to win convincingly.
Soon eased to race in rear section on rail. Only obtained clear running 200 M out and made up little ground thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section. At 1400 M checked when crowded for room. Made no impression in straight. (Lame left fore leg.)
Began awkwardly and niggled along to race 2-wide around 3Ls off leader through to straight. Responded well when asked 300 M out to snatch 3rd place on the line.
Began well and raced in better than midfield 2 to 3-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Unable to muster early speed to race in rear section on outer. Made no impression in straight.
Ridden along to race in prominent position 2-wide through to 250 M out, dropped out thereafter.

Soon settled around 6Ls off pace 2-wide and made up some ground at home turn to be 2Ls down on straightening. Ran on fairly in straight but failed to quicken in the closing stages to lose out on the placing by a short margin.
Ridden along in the early stages to race in better than midfield on fence through to straight. Obtained clear running at 200 M but only stayed one-paced to the line.
Advanced from being 4-wide early on to race 3-wide and 2Ls off speed from 1000 M out to home straight, didn't pick up and was beaten 350 M out.
3-wide and 6Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 5-wide and 4Ls down into home straight, kept on only fairly but still was nearest at the finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Squeezed for room 800 M out when on fence and about 3Ls off pace, similarly placed off home bend, 2Ls down and vying for a place 200 M out, one-paced and was swamped close home.
Very green almost fly-leaping down back straight, 2-wide and about 6Ls off the speed from 1000 M to home straight, 4Ls down at the 200 M, ran on strongly to claim 2nd close home.
Led 1L off the speed on fence 1200 M out, was never clear by more than 2Ls, 1L to the good turning for home and 200 M out, headed 100 M out, no extra.
Raced 4-wide when 4Ls off the speed from 1000 M out to home straight, never got any closer to the lead than that.
Awkwardly away, 4-wide and 7Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 6Ls down and still 4-wide and driven along entering straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, stayed on very strongly to lead 50 M out, drew away.
On fence 6Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and niggled along when 4Ls down off final bend, similarly placed 200 M out, made some late headway, never dangerous.
Slowest away, 3-wide about 8Ls off the pace early on, 2-wide and 7Ls down 800 M out, 3-wide in rear and 7Ls down on the swing, ran on very well to be nearest at the finish.
Always about 2-wide and 3Ls off pace from 1100 M out to home straight, briefly threatened 300 M out, soon flattened out and one-paced to line.
Half a length off pace out 2-wide 1000 M out, 1L down in 2nd place entering straight, still 1L down in 2nd and all out at the 200 M, kept on at the same pace through closing stages.
On fence 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, steadied 300 M out and lost position 200 M out, didn't recover.
Raced about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace out 3 and 4-wide from back stretch to home stretch, 2Ls down and vying for a place 200 M out, outpaced close home.
Awkwardly away, keen early, hung out 800 M out when 3-wide and 6Ls off speed, 4-wide and 5Ls down entering straight, 4Ls down at the 200 M out, stayed on well without threatening.
4-wide behind midfield 1000 M out. Slowly moved up the field rounding home turn from 4-wide position. Unable to quicken final stages.
Began well and soon raced in prominent position behind leader. Ran on nicely but was boxed in behind leader for good part of the straight and had to be steadied behind eventual winner final strides.

Slowly away and was ridden to be closer to midfield. Crowded and lost position 800 M out. Unable to find clear run 300 M out. Ran on strongly after obtaining clear run and made up good ground closing stages.
Began well from wide draw but was soon racing near rear. Widest turning in. No extra in straight.
Settled 3-wide and 2Ls behind pace 800 M out. 3-wide turning in. One-paced in the straight and no extra final stages.
Jumped awkwardly and soon raced near rear. 4-wide turning in. One-paced to line.
Soon raced 2-wide just outside leader into straight. Every chance 300 M out. Unable to match strides with winner final stages.
Soon steadied to be at rear from wide draw. On fence and 7Ls or 8Ls behind pace 800 M out. Ran on in straight without threatening.
Soon raced behind midfield. 2-wide and 5Ls behind pace 800 M out. Unable to find clear run in the straight until final 200 M. Ran on strongly and made up some late ground final stages.
Settled 3-wide and 3Ls behind pace 800 M out. 4-wide turning in. Responded fairly and made up some ground final stages.
Broke well and led comfortably until final 200 M. Responded well under pressure and held off challengers.
2-wide and 3Ls behind pace 800 M out. Responded fairly under pressure 400 M out. Ran on strongly final 200 M and made up ground on winner.

Steadied towards rear about 9Ls off the pace 1000 M out when 2-wide, 4-wide into stretch when 6Ls behind leader and one from rear, ran on very strongly to narrowly miss out on a place. (See Racing Incidents.)
On fence 6Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide into home straight and 5Ls down, staying on when 3Ls down 200 M out, finished off strongly along far rail.
Led on fence by 2Ls 1300 M out racing freely, headed by SHINING GEM 1100 M out, half a length off the pace until home straight, faded and beaten 300 M out.
Settled towards rear 3-wide and 8Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, stayed on well to be 3Ls down at the 200 M out, kept on but post came too soon.
Always 2Ls off pace and 2-wide until home straight, held up for a run by DESERT STORM until switching inside 250 M out, led 100 M out, kept on well, just hung on.
Slowly away, 6Ls off pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, lost position about 600 M out and was in rear about 7Ls adrift of leader entering straight, never got into it.
Raced 3-wide and 3Ls off the speed 1200 M out, improved to be 1L down into home straight when 3-wide, narrow lead 300 M to 150 M out when headed, no extra.
Awkwardly away, on fence 5Ls off speed 1000 M out, 4Ls down on fence entering straight, stayed on at same pace and never a threat.
2-wide and 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-widen and driven along when 3Ls down at top of home straight, 1L down 200 M out, ran on strongly, just missed.
Over-raced on fence 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, 2-wide and 3Ls off speed at top of home straight, didn't quicken up and was beaten 200 M out.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace from 1200 M out to home straight, disputing lead on fence 200 M out, no extra close home.
3Ls off the speed and 2-wide from the 1000 M to 600 M, 3-wide and over 2Ls down into home straight, 2Ls down at the 200 M, awkwardly placed and not fully extended through final 100 M.
Sent on to lead by half a length out 2-wide 1100 M out, driven along to stay in front entering straight, headed over 300 M out, faded out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Keen early on, raced 3-wide 6Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 4-wide and 4Ls down on the swing, always outpaced.
Always there. Kept on evenly to the line.
Led briefly early. Re-gained lead from 800 M until headed 300 M. Kept on but lost 2nd final strides.
Towards rear throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never a factor.
Midfield. Made some moderate progress final 200 M.
Towards rear, gradually recovered ground to be midfield 1000 M. Ran on well final 250 M to grab 2nd near finish.
Trailed the field soon after start.
Behind midfield. Kept on until weakened closing stages.
Slowly away, last early stages. Towards rear rounding home bend. Ran on a bit 100 M out.
Well there, led field from 1000 M to 800 M. No more than 1L behind lead before re-gaining advantage passing 300 M. Held on well.
In touch. Dropped back a bit to be 6th 800 M. Unable to quicken while hanging out in straight.
Prominent on outside. 3-wide 2nd or 3rd rounding home bend. Weakened out of contention final 250 M.
Prominent. Lost position to 5th when unbalanced 1000 M. Weakened 200 M out.
Towards rear. Kept on moderately closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent to 400 M. Dropped out.
Slightly slow out. Towards rear early. Made up good ground final 200 M to grab 2nd final stride.
Forward of midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Well back. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Prominent till lost touch over 200 M out.
Midfield briefly.
Well there. Quickened well to assert authority inside 200 M.
Prominent onto course proper. Dropped out.
Around midfield most of way.
Soon in rear.
Well there. Disputed lead over 200 M out before finding no extra shortly.
Well back. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Led to halfway. Tired under pressure passing 200 M.
Midfield on the rail. Ran on from 3-wide early straight to take 3rd near finish.
Towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Crept a bit closer final turn. Kept on early straight. Weakened close home.
Better than midfield. Improved to 4th 1400 M out. Came to tackle leader early straight. Held 2nd until failing to hold place closing stages.
Prominent. Failed to hold place soon after straightening.
Moved up steadily from a wide draw to take lead from 1200 M. Faded when headed early straight.
Towards rear. Made progress to midfield rounding home bend. Kept on quite well while finding difficulty to find clear run 200 M.
Midfield. Dropped back a bit stable bend. Made ground steadily in straight, just missed a minor placing.
Midfield on outside. Dropped back a bit far side. Checked to the last 600 M. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Towards rear. Recovered good ground when under pressure final 250 M.
Slowly away, behind midfield. Steady progress to midfield far side, further advanced to 3rd or 4th 250 M. Soon found no extra.
In touch, 5th far side. Made ground rounding home bend to be 2nd passing 600 M. Gained slender advantage early straight. Kept on until headed close home.
Led field to 1200 M. Tracked leader until dropping out passing 600 M.
Remained in rear from widest draw. Made ground turning for home. Ran on steadily to gain upper hand closing stages.
Prominent to straight then dropped away quickly.
Never far off till dropping out approaching home straight.
Well back to straight. Kept on well to produce good late impression closing stages.
Settled towards rear. Quickened well between runners shortly after straightening to take charge inside 200 M. Won easing down.
Towards rear. Made modest progress under pressure past beaten runners down centre of straight.
Broke well and led till 300 M, then dropped out.
Raced keenly in midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Never far off. Came to challenge upon straightening but unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Prominent when racing keenly early. Settled in midfield around home bend. Gained slender lead early in straight but found winner too good.
Midfield. Kept on without quickening for remote 4th.
Raced keenly in forward of midfield. Improved to hold some chance early in straight. Failed to sustain effort final 200 M.
Towards rear. Unable to quicken in straight. (Mucus in trachea.)
Well back. Ran past beaten horses along rails in straight.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Ridden along to race 2 wide 1L off leader through to straight. All out 400 M out and made up steady ground but unable to find extra to overhaul the winner to settle for 2nd place.
Soon settled in worse than midfield 3 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out but only kept on evenly to the line.
Pushed along to race in better than midfield 3 wide. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and stayed one-paced to the line.
Best out but was outpaced to race in midfield out wide. Under pressure to hold position turning for home. Found nothing in straight.

Began fairly and ridden along to lead on rail with around 1L advantage through to straight. Found the line well when asked 350 M out and fended off late challenge from 2nd placegetter to hold on to the winner spot.
Slow to begin and raced at back on rail through to straight. At 300 M was steadied when crowded for room. Made up good ground over the final 200 M.
Box-seated behind leader through to straight. Kept on evenly when asked 400 M out and further weakened in the final stages. (Hung in in the straight and proved difficult to ride out.)
Jumped awkwardly and soon recovered to race 2 wide 2Ls off pace. Responded fairly when asked 400 M out but was no match for the 1st pair and just held on for 3rd place.
Pushed along to race around 2Ls off pace on rail. Kept on same pace to the line when asked 350 M out.
Reluctant to stride out and tailed out from 1000 M.
Slowly away and raced around 5Ls off leader 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 350 M and made up good ground inside the final 200 M to miss the 3rd placegetter by a short margin.
Raced in rear section out wide without cover. Made up steady ground turning for home. Kept on evenly in straight and further weakened over the concluding stages.
Raced in worse than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Never a factor.
Slow to begin and raced in worse than midfield on fence. Made no impression in straight.
2-wide and 7Ls off the speed 1200 M out, still towards rear and driven along turning for home, no chance.
Stood flat-footed in gates and lost plenty of ground, 9Ls off pace on fence in rear 800 M out, never got involved.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace 1400 M out, 3Ls down 1000 M out, hard ridden to stay with 2Ls of leader from home straight to 200 M marker, weakened.
Slowly away, on fence 10Ls off the pace 1200 M out, never got into it.
On fence and 5Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 4Ls off pace 800 M out, similarly placed off home turn and 200 M out, made some late headway through concluding stages.
Led by 1L on fence 1400 M out, was 2Ls clear 1200 M out, still 1L to the good turning for home, headed 180 M out, kept on for 2nd place.
2-wide and 9Ls 1200 M out, 7Ls down and 3-wide 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 6Ls down, never posed any kind of threat.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, 3Ls down at the 800 M and 2Ls down off home turn, all out to remain within 2Ls of leader at the 200 M, no extra.
Caught 3-wide without cover when 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed down the back straight, 3-wide into home straight, very one-paced through closing stages.
On fence 7Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 5Ls down 800 M out, never managed to get any closer than that.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 6Ls down and 2-wide entering straight, found nothing.
Reared at start and lost plenty of ground, 9Ls off the pace 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 8Ls down, didn't come on.
About 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed and 3-wide down the back straight, 3-wide and 3Ls down entering home straight, quickened up very well to lead hard on the bridle 180 M out, easily.
2 wide and 1L off pace 1400 M out, was never worse than 2Ls off the speed until home straight, every chance of being placed 200 M out, couldn't sustain effort.
Soon led but was 3-wide until finally crossing to fence about 900 M out, narrow lead off home turn, picked up to be 1L to the good 200 M out, kept on well.
Always in rear, 2-wide and 7Ls off the pace at the 800 M, detached from main body of field and under pressure entering straight, never a factor.
Held up in rear early on, 8Ls off the pace 900 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls behind leader on the swing, ran on past several beaten rivals through closing stages.
Raced close-up 2-wide and under 2Ls off the pace until home straight, began to weaken about 300 M out, eased down close home.
3-wide and about 2Ls off the speed at the 900 M mark, raced freely 800 M out and was allowed to dispute lead out 2-wide from 600 M out to top of home straight, faded steadily.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 5Ls off the speed 800 M out, 2Ls down and 6-wide into homestretch, still 2Ls down 200 M out, weakened.
Caught 3 and 4-wide without cover about 4Ls off the pace down the back straight, 5-wide and 1L off the pace entering home straight, every chance 200 M out, one-paced close home.
On fence 4Ls off the pace at the 1000 M, 2-wide and 3Ls down entering home straight, 1L down and with good place prospects 200 M out, couldn't sustain effort.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls off the lead at the home turn, 1L behind 200 M out, stayed on well enough but found winner much too good.
2-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4-wide into home straight when vying for lead, all out to be 1L down 200 M out, faded further.
Checked 1200 M out, on fence 7Ls off speed 1000 M out, 4Ls down at top of home straight, faded quickly.
Caught 3-wide towards rear about 7Ls off the speed 800 M out, driven along 600 M out, 6-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, soon with no chance.
1L off pace in 3rd place on fence from 1000 M out to 600 M, 2Ls down at top of straight, faded out rapidly.
3-wide and 6Ls off the speed from 1200 M out to the 600 M, 4-wide and 4Ls down entering straight, never threatened.
Switched from wide draw to fence upon exiting gates, on fence 4Ls off the speed from 1200 M out to home straight, never looked like getting any closer.
Always caught 3 and 4-wide without cover about 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed until home straight, picked up well to lead 200 M out, battled on gamely.
On fence 6Ls off the speed 1200 M out, never got any closer than that, was struggling off the home turn.
Always in rear bunch, on fence 7Ls off the speed 1100 M out, 2-wide and 6Ls down 800 M out, 6Ls down into home straight and only 4Ls behind at the 200 M out, no extra.
2-wide and 4Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 3Ls off pace and 3-wide 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 2Ls down, checked 200 M out when 1L down, didn't recover.
Always driven along, slowly away, over 10Ls off the pace 1000 M out, never a factor.
2-wide and 5Ls off the speed 1200 M out, about 4Ls off the pace from 800 M to home straight, 2Ls down and with place prospects at the 200 M marker, weakened.
Raced 3-wide 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4Ls off the speed from 800 M to 400 M out, ran on well through closing stages to be nearest at the finish.
Soon led on fence, had head up and hung out 1400 M out, kicked for home when 1L to the good entering straight, grabbed at the 200 M out, weakened steadily.
On fence 9Ls off the pace 1000 M out, advanced to be 3-wide and 6Ls down 800 M out, impeded 700 M out, 5-wide and 5Ls off pace entering straight, one-paced to line.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace until home straight, about 1L down 200 M out, got rails run about 180 M out, ran on well without overhauling winner.
Never any worse than 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace from 1400 M to homestretch, every chance 200 M out when a neck off the lead, emptied out quite tamely.
Caught 3-wide 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, disputed lead out 3-wide 800 M out, 3-wide into home straight, disputing lead and with every chance 200 M out, no extra.
Slowly away, on fence 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3Ls down and travelling well entering straight, 2Ls behind 200 M out, couldn't get to winner.
2-wide and 7Ls off the speed 1000 M out, gradually became detached from main body of field, tailed off entering straight, finished in own time.
Slowly away, on fence about 6Ls off the speed from back straight to home straight, nearest at the finish.
Led on fence 900 M out, 1L to the good off home turn, headed by winner 250 M out, faded gradually.
Awkwardly away, sent on to dispute lead out 4-wide early on, 1L down and 3-wide from 800 M to home straight, very one-paced from then on.
On fence 8Ls off the speed in rear 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight, made some late headway past beaten rivals.
Bounded in air exiting gates, disputed early lead out 3-wide, soon settled 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3-wide and 2Ls down entering straight, soon faded.
On fence 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, crowded 800 M and checked 400 M out when 2-wide and 3Ls down, still 3Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Knuckled exiting gates and lost ground, 4-wide and 7Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 5Ls down and 6-wide into home straight when driven along, 3Ls down 200 M out, one-paced thereafter.
Led briefly early on before taking the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace from 900 M out to home straight, led over 200 M out, stayed on well.
Always 2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed from 1000 M to home straight, switched out into the clear 300 M out, quickened up well and with place hopes 200 M out, couldn't sustain effort.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 4-wide and 4Ls off the speed into home straight, no acceleration.
Slowly away, raced 3-wide 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, driven along 600 M out, 5-wide into home straight and 5Ls down, faded out.
Caught very wide early on, soon 3-wide without cover 3Ls off the pace 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight and 2Ls down, weakened steadily.
In touch into straight where he kept on well towards finish.
Trailed field to home bend. Improved on straightening but was denied a run 150 M.
Was 5th or 6th rounding home bend. Plugged on final 200 M.
Midfield most of way. Stayed on a bit close home.
Made no show.
Midfield into straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Prominent to straight where he kept on same pace.
Never far off to home bend. Stayed on to be nearest at finish.
Well there to straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
Well there before taking lead approaching 1000 M. Kept on under pressure inside final 200 M.
In rear to straight where he ran on strongly closing stages, doing best work at the finish.
Always at the back.
Never troubled leaders.
Among rear group to home turn. Found nothing when asked in straight.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Recovered some ground to midfield far side. Steadied on straightening. Never recovered.
In touch. Mainly 4th far side. Moved up from 400 M to take lead passing 200 M. Kept on until headed close home.
Began awkwardly. Rider lost iron and was dislodged.
Led. Severely checked by SILVER JET near 550 M and was steadied again 400 M. Headed passing 200 M and lost a minor placing near finish.
In touch. Dropped back a bit far side. Made no show in straight.
Prominent. Slightly inconvenienced near 400 M. Ran on steadily from 3rd early straight to take command inside final 50 M.
Midfield. Caught wide and dropped towards the rear far side. Last turning in. Made up a little ground final 250 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made up good ground in straight to claim 3rd close home.
Moved up from widest draw to be prominent. Weakened from 400 M.
Very slowly away, towards rear. Made ground from outside 400 M until finding no extra closing stages.
Slightly behind midfield. Inconvenienced passing 400 M. Unable to quicken in straight.
In last few. Gained midfield into straight. Soon one-paced.
Never far off before running wide into straight. Found nothing under pressure.
Raced freely in forward of midfield. Badly hampered and lost position around home bend. Kept on one pace in straight.
Well back. Kept on steadily past beaten horses in straight.
Settled in midfield. Fought on doggedly under hard driving to claim race final strides.
Settled in midfield. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Never seen with a chance.
Well back to straight. Never nearer. (Roarer.)
Tracked leaders on rail. Hit front shortly after straightening but caught final strides.
Forward of midfield. Gained 3rd into straight. Ran on well under pressure only to be denied in the bobbing of heads.
Chased leader to 500 M then dropped away quickly. Virtually pulled up in straight. (Distressed.)
Attempted to make all. Unable to sustain effort and swamped final 300 M.
Towards rear, soon recovered some ground to midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Checked soon after start, last throughout.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily rounding home bend.
Slightly behind midfield. Widest turning in. Kept on without quickening.
Better than midfield. Crept closer to 3rd turning in. Kept on without threatening.
Prominent. Weakened steadily 250 M out.
Jumped well and was in the front pair. Soon raced 2nd before regaining 300 M. Held on well to win convincingly.
In touch and was 3-wide. Dropped back steadily on straightening.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Took lead soon after start. Kept on when headed 300 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made ground steadily in straight.
Better then midfield to 400 M. Weakened.
Checked at start. Travelled towards rear to straight. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Mostly in midfield but dropped out into straight.
Towards rear. Ran on well down straight to grab 3rd place close home.
Prominent. Went wide into straight. One-paced.
Well there. Took up running passing Rock going some 2Ls clear into straight. Headed closing stages.
Rear. Effort on outside rounding home bend and sustained headway down centre of straight.
Prominent most of way. Overhauled passing 200 M.
Led to Rock. Dropped out from 2nd into straight.
Last into straight. Ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily down straight doing best work at finish.
Settled in midfield. Ran on down centre of straight to assert authority closing stages.
Niggled along to race in worse than midfield 3-wide. Commenced to lose ground turning for home. Made no impression in straight.
Raced in better than midfield towards the outside. Commenced to lose position 600 M out. Tailed out in straight. (Significant back pain and slightly lame in right fore leg.)
Ridden hard to force the issue on rail. Maintained speed in straight but was headed 100 M out and missed the placings by a short margin.
Raced in prominent position 2-wide through to straight. Responded fairly when asked 300 M out but weakened over the concluding stages.
Soon raced in rear section 2-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and stayed one-paced to the line.
Raced towards rear. Improved to around 4Ls off leader 4-wide at Rock. Made steady improvement turning for home. Made up good ground when asked 300 M out to snatch the winner spot on the line.

Raced in rearward position out wide in the early stages. Improved to race 2-1/2Ls off pace going up Rock. Ran on well in straight but unable to fend off challenge from winner to be overhauled on the line.
Niggled along to race in a forward position on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 300 M out to grab 3rd place near the line.
Raced keenly in mid-division on rail and was crowded for room on several occasions throughout the race. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in mid-division 2-wide. Throughout the race hung in. Under pressure to hold position turning for home. Made no impression in straight.
Led by about half a length on fence from 1000 M to home straight, all out when grabbed by winner 200 M out, no extra and faded nearer the line.
Badly checked 1100 M out, soon box-seated on fence 2Ls off pace until home straight, picked up to lead about 200 M out, all out, hung on.
Never travelled, niggled along when 3-wide and 6Ls off the speed 800 M out, behind and hard driven when 5-wide into home straight, well beaten 300 M out.
2-wide early on, on fence about 6Ls off the pace from 800 M out to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Slowly away, always caught wide without cover, 4-wide and 8Ls off pace 800 M out, very wide (6-wide) into home straight, over 3Ls down at the 200 M, ran on well, nearest at finish.
Raced 2-wide 7Ls off the speed in midfield 800 M out, 5Ls down turning for home, some progress to be 3Ls down 200 M out, couldn't sustain effort.
Caught 4-wide early on, raced 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace from 800 M out to home straight, all out to be 2Ls down at the 200 M out, no extra.
Awkwardly away and lost ground, in rear on fence 10Ls off the pace 800 M out, still 8Ls down on the swing, 4Ls down when switched inside 200 M out, tended to hang in, nearest at the finish.
Checked upon exiting gates, on fence 7Ls off lead from 900 M out to home straight, found nothing under pressure.
2-wide and 9Ls behind lead 800 M out, 4-wide and 7Ls down into home straight, impeded slightly 300 M out, ran on strongly, post came too soon.
Tended to over-race, 3-wide early on, 2-wide about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace from 800 M to home straight, staying on when clattered by SUPREME MOLLY 300 M out, didn't recover.

Trailed the field into straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran on stoutly down centre of straight to prevail by the narrowest of margins.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out. (Bled.)
Behind midfield. Awkwardly placed behind runners rounding home bend. Produced good impresison down straight doing best work at finish.
Mainly in midfield. One-paced in straight.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Mainly in midfield. Ran on determinedly to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Towards rear. Tight between runners early in straight before running on well to just fail to get up on line.
Around midfield. Made some headway under pressure early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages. (Bled.)
Attempted to make all. Swamped final 200 M.
Settled behind midfield. No clear run behind runners early in straight. Ran on but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Never far off before dropped out passing 200 M. (Roarer.)
Box-seated behind leader through to straight. Found nothing in straight and steadily dropped out.

Niggled along to race outside leader through to straight. Stayed one-paced when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M. (Made abnormal breathing noises after the race and was found to be a roarer.)
Jumped awkwardly but soon recovered to race in worse than midfield on rail through to straight. Made up some ground inside final 200 M but was no match for the placegetters.
Began fairly from the outside draw and was soon eased to race towards rear 2 wide. Switched out on straightening and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Unable to muster early speed to race in midfield 2 wide. Under pressure 450 M out but unable to quicken and stayed one-paced to the line.
Slowly away and raced at back towards the outside through to straight. Unable to quicken and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Raced at back wide without cover. Under pressure to go forward turning for home. Hung out in straight and proved difficult to ride out. (Lame right hind leg.)
Broke well and raced around 2Ls off pace 2 wide. Switched out to find clear running on straightening. Ran on strongly when asked 350 M out to win convincingly.
Eased to race in rear section on rail. Switched out turning for home. Unable to obtain clear running in early part of straight. Made up little ground in the closing stages.
Soon settled in midfield 3 wide. Made steady improvement turning for home. Responded fairly when asked 400 M out but unable to up a gear to overhaul the 2nd placegetter.
Began fairly and soon took lead on rail with around 1L advantage. Headed 150 M out but kept on well to fend off challenge from 3rd placegetter to hold onto 2nd place.
Raced in better than midfield 3 wide. Made little improvement at home bend. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and weakened steadily thereafter.
Tardy start. Soon recovered to race in mid-division on rail through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out but only able to stay one-paced to the line.
Slowly away and crowded at the start, 2-wide and 4Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, faded through closing stages.
Led by 2Ls on fence 1100 M out, 1L to the good entering home straight, shot over 2Ls clear 200 M out, tired and caught by winner 40 M from line.
2-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3Ls behind turning for home, just over 2Ls down and with place prospects 200 M out, no extra.
2-wide and 5Ls or 6Ls off pace down back straight, 3-wide turning for home, over 2Ls down and staying on strongly 200 M out, kept on to lead about 40 M from line.
4-wide but with cover when about 5Ls off the pace from back to home straight, finished off nearer stand's rail, 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on, couldn't reach principals.
On fence 4Ls off the speed in midfield 1000 M out, similarly placed when driven along to take closer order 500 M out, could never get to leaders.
Fractious in the gates, had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace 1100 M out, 2-wide and 1L off the pace 400 M out, lacked acceleration.
Awkwardly away, settled in rear about 7Ls or 8Ls off the pace until being checked 700 M out, 6Ls behind lead on the swing, finished off quite well, never nearer.
Bounded exiting gates, 3-wide and 2Ls off the speed 1100 M out, still 3-wide but 3Ls down off final bend, one-paced thereafter.
3-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, steadied 800 M out, 4Ls down when disappointed for running 350 M out and again about 200 M out, kept on well to be nearest at the finish.
Best away, 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace 1100 M out, 3-wide into home straight, beaten over 200 M out.
On fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace until 700 M out when badly checked and unbalanced, 4Ls down at top of home straight, stayed on well but never really looked like winning.
4-wide without cover and 4Ls off pace from 1000 M out to home straight, soon faded out.
Settled one from rear out 2-wide and 7Ls off the pace 1000 M out, got its head up 800 M out, hung out and was badly checked, 4-wide and struggling entering straight, no chance.
Didn't travel that well, got its head up every so often, 7Ls off pace on fence down the back straight, wider into home straight, no impression.
Soon led on fence, never more than 1L clear, half a length up off home turn, over 1L to the good 200 M out, grabbed and brushed by winner 50 M out and became unbalanced.
Raced 3-wide without cover when 2Ls off the speed through to home straight, always a bit one-paced in straight and never looked like winning.
Raced 2-wide no worse than a length off the pace in 2nd place through to home straight, faded out steadily from then on.
Fractious in the gates, raced 3-wide with cover when 7Ls off the pace 800 M out, similarly placed into home straight when driven along, never a factor.
On fence or 2-wide about 5Ls off the pace down back straight, 2-wide and 4Ls down off home turn, couldn't get much closer.
Bumped at the start, hung out 800 M out when 3-wide with cover 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 2Ls off pace, one-paced to line.
5Ls off pace and 4-wide 800 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, moderate headway inside final 200 M.
Fractious in gates, had run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace, very keen with head up about 600 M out, kept on well along fence to lead 50 M out, always tended to hang out.
Bumped at the start, 3Ls down and 2-wide when steadied 600 M out, similarly placed off home turn, 2Ls down 200 M out, made only a little late headway.
Steadied 1000 M out when about 4Ls off speed on fence 4Ls down on inner into home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Settled in rear 2-wide and 7Ls off pace 800 M out, 3-wide into home straight when same distance off lead, finished off very strongly down centre of course to be nearest at finish.
3Ls off pace nearer stands' rail until about 500 M out when driven along to keep up, faded steadily.
3Ls off pace early on, driven along to keep within this margin of leaders 400 M out, no extra.
Prominent early on, driven along 400 M out when 1L off the lead, switched towards far side when carried towards stands' side by FLASHING STAR 200 M out, ran on again, missed out on a place.
Soon led on stands' rail, 1L down in 2nd place 400 M out, faded steadily from then on.
In rear 8Ls off the speed 800 M out, hardly sighted thereafter.
Broke badly losing about 4Ls at the start, never on terms thereafter.
Always outpaced, niggled along 800 M out, never a factor.
Settled about 5Ls off the pace 800 M out, under pressure and no better off 400 M out, too one-paced.
No worse than 2Ls off pace in 4th place through to 400 M out, picked up nicely to go 1L down 200 M out, no chance with winner, still stayed on well for 2nd place.
Always prominent on his own down centre of track, led by 1L 400 M out, drifted left towards main body of field when still 1L clear 200 M out, drew further ahead.
Slowly away, settled in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until 500 M out when driven along, kept on well enough.
About 4Ls off the speed until 600 M out when outpaced, faded out.
4Ls off the pace 800 M out, under pressure 600 M out, dropped out rapidly.
3Ls off pace nearer centre of track until about 500 M out when driven along to keep up, faded steadily.
2-wide and 8Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3Ls down off home turn, 2Ls down 200 M out, ran on strongly, just failed.
Led by 2Ls on fence 1000 M out, joined and soon headed at top of home straight, faded out.
4Ls off pace in 3rd place 1000 M out and on fence, closer turning for home and 1L off the pace 200 M out, ran on well, just missed.
Bumped at the start, 2-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 2Ls down, kept on well to lead 100 M out, hung on gamely.
Squeezed out badly at the start, at least 9Ls off the speed down back straight, 6Ls down turning for home, never got to main body of runners.
Awkwardly away and bumped, at least 9Ls off pace down the back straight, 7Ls down entering straight, never competitive.
On fence about 8Ls off the speed 1200 M out, much closer out 2-wide and 3Ls off the lead entering straight, 2Ls down 200 M out, couldn't quite match pace of principals.
Caught 3-wide 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, had cover for most of back straight, however, 4-wide and 5Ls down into home straight, never threatened.
Caught 3 and 4-wide without cover down the back straight when between 6Ls and 9Ls off the pace, all out to get within 2Ls of the lead 200 M out, no extra.
Bumped 1100 M out when 2-wide and at least 8Ls off the speed, 3-wide and about 4Ls down into home straight, kept on quite well but never looked like winning.
Settled 2Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, led and 2-wide at top of home straight, headed 300 M out, faded steadily.
Raced 2-wide 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide into home straight and 1L down, led 300 M out, headed by winner 100 M out, no extra.
Bumped when shifted out 1100 M out when about 9Ls off the pace, 4Ls down on fence entering straight, switched inside 300 M out, finished off strongly, post came too soon.
Crowded at the jump, on fence about 6Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 1L off home turn, steadied 350 M out, struck on the nose by rival's whip 200 M out, still kept on strongly, unlucky.
Led or shared lead until finding no extra approaching 100 M.
In rear to straight where he ran on quite well final 200 M.
Never far off to home turn. Made no show on straightening.
Not far away to straight. Found nothing when asked 300 M.
Never in contention.
Midfield into home bend and remained there to straight. Quickened 200 M out to lead inside 100 M. Kept on under pressure.
Midfield into straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Mostly last to home turn. Ran on strongly to challenge close home, doing best work at the finish.
Mostly in 6th to home turn. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Never on terms.
Towards rear till running on well in straight to challenge inside final 150 M, having every chance.
Prominent to 100 M where he could do no extra.
Slightly worse than midfield home bend. Unable to get a clear passage in straight till close home where he stayed on.
Well there to straight where he failed to hold place approaching 200 M.
Settled 4th. Raced 5th from 1000 M. Found no extra closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield. Dropped back a bit on straightening. Stayed on closing stages.
Midfield early from widest draw, soon dropped back towards rear. Made up a little ground in straight. Wide throughout.
Began awkwardly, soon recovered ground to be prominent. Raced 2nd from 1300 M. Kept on well but just failed to catch the winner near finish.
Made all. Just held on close home.
Never seen with a chance.
Midfield early. Towards rear from 1400 M. No progress.
Near rear. Found no clear run early straight when improving. Ran on well when in clear.
Towards rear throughout.
Soon in touch. Kept on and gained 3rd 200 M. One-paced closing stages.
Mainly 3rd to 200 M. Weakened.
Midfield. Kept on quite well inside 250 M.
Towards rear. Inconvenienced near 600 M. Made ground steadily final 300 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made ground to midfield near 1200 M. Weakened soon after straightening.
Towards rear to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Commenced run entering straight to reach 3rd 200 M out, then unable to sustain effort.
Always well there. Fought on determinedly under pressure but worn down by fast-finishing winner.
Forward of midfield most of way.
Broke well then travelled wide in forward of midfield to straight and weakened.
Settled at the back. Finished well inside 300 M to just prevail on the line.
Broke well and travelled outside leader. Weakened shortly after straightening.
Took up running 200 M after start. Led till swamped nearing finish.
Prominent briefly. Dropped to midfield soon. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Behind midfield. Found no room behind runners in critical stage of race over final 200 M.
Never seen with a chance.
Never far off to straight then dropped out.
Began awkwardly, never a factor.
Behind midfield. Gradual progress from 900 M, taking the lead soon after straightening. Just held off placegetters' challenges closing stages.
Soon behind midfield. No improvement.
Midfield. Improved rounding home bend to be 5th turning in. Kept on well but lost a minor placing marginally at finish.
Well there early, soon in midfield or behind. Remained in similar position throughout.
Checked early stages, towards rear. Crept closer to 6th on inner final turn. Ran on steadily to just miss narrowly.
Behind midfield. Hung out final turn. Made no show in straight.
Slowly away, near rear. Recovered ground steadily to be midfield 800 M. Dropped out 300 M. (Heart irregularity.)
Lost significant ground at start, last to home bend. Made up good ground in straight, doing best work final 200 M.
Led field from 1000 M. Found no extra when headed near 350 M.
Well there. Was 2nd before dropping to 4th early straight. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Prominent. Kept on but failed to quicken close home.
Towards rear most of way.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Disputed lead. Took over turning in but overhauled inside 200 M.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Led till narrowly headed into straight then gradually weakened.
Never in contention. (Heart irregularity.)
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened upon straightening to assert authority inside 200 M.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear throughout.
Settled at the back. Ran past beaten horses in straight to claim remote 3rd.
Close up till dropped out home bend.
Never better than midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Around midfield to straight then weakened.
Unable to muster early speed to race in mid-division out wide without cover. Commenced to lost position 500 M out. Made no impression in straight.
Pushed along to race in forward position and steadily shifted in closer to rail. Remain there till straightening. Stayed one-paced when asked 350 M out and further weakened in the closing stages.
Soon settled in rear on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and stayed on evenly to the line.
Ridden along to race in midfield on rail. Under pressure to maintain position at home bend. Soon faded in straight.
Niggled along to race behind around 2-wide. Under pressure to go forward turning for home. Ran on fairly in straight but no match for the 1st pair and grabbed 3rd place near the line.
On jumping was crowded for room and soon recovered to race in mid-division. Under pressure to hold position turning for home. Found nothing in straight.
Jumped awkwardly and pushed along to lead. Headed at 1100 M to race behind leader on rail. Steadily lost position at home bend. Failed to respond in straight and dropped out over concluding stages.

Began awkwardly and rider became unbalanced. Soon recovered to race in better than midfield on inner through to straight. Kept on evenly when asked 350 M out and was overhauled by 3rd placegetter near the line.

Soon eased to race in rear section and gradually shifted in closer to rail. Remained there till straightening. Responded well when asked 350 M out but unable to match speed with winner to settle for 2nd place.
Slow to begin and raced at back. Under pressure and switched out turning for home, but failed to make any impression in the straight.

Raced in prominent position and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Dropped to better than midfield on rail after 1100 M. Under pressure at home bend but only able to run on evenly to the line.
Jumped awkwardly. Raced at back and made the 1st turn awkwardly. Remained in similar position through to straight. Failed to make impression in straight.
