Tardy start and pushed along to race in mid-division. Under pressure to improve position at home bend. All out 350 M out and ran home strongly to win comfortably.
Raced keenly in prominent position towards the outside in the early stages. Took up running on rail 1100 M out through to 250 M and steadily faded thereafter.
Always 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace on fence through to home straight, still 2Ls down and under pressure 200 M out, kept finding to lead about 30 M out.
Slowest away, on fence 6Ls off the speed towards near 800 M out, same entering straight, moderate late headway.
2-wide and about 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed through to home straight, no acceleration.
Always towards rear, began to get detached from field 600 M out when 8Ls off the pace and 4-wide, soon with no chance.
3-wide but with cover and 3Ls off the pace through to home straight, no impression thereafter.
Best away, led by 1L on fence 900 M out, all out to hold onto 1L advantage 200 M out, tired and grabbed by quinella pair close home.
Caught 3-wide without cover 1L off the pace 800 M out, under pressure to keep tabs with principals entering straight, faded.
2-wide and 2Ls off the pace 800 M out, hard pressed to hold position off home turn, weakened steadily in straight.
On fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace through to home straight, always much too one-paced.
Half a length off the lead out 2-wide in 2nd place 800 M out, 1L down from 400 M to 200 M out, no extra.
2-wide and 6Ls off the pace 800 M out, 5Ls down when held up at top of home straight, into the clear about 250 M out, ran on fairly to be nearest at the finish.
Slowly away, bit keen early on racing 3-wide about 5Ls off the pace 900 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, 3Ls down 200 M out, nearest at the finish.

Ridden early to be near pace rounding first turn. Settled near midfield for a good part of the back straight. Improved from 2-wide position rounding home turn. All out at 300 M out and one-paced to line.
Slowly away and trailed field into home straight. Unable to obtain clear run in early part of the straight. All out at 300 M and ran on strongly in the closing stages to be nearest at finish.

Settled on fence behind midfield in early and middle stages. Crept up along the fence rounding home turn to be closer to pace upon straightening. Responded well under pressure. Hit front 250 M out and coasted home.
Soon raced 2-wide and near rear until home straight. Kept on well in straight but was no threat to winner.
Ridden early to be in disputed lead until settling 2Ls to 3Ls behind pace in the middle stages. 4-wide turning in. Unable to quicken in straight.
Began well from wide draw but was caught wide in the first turn. Travelled near midfield until rounding home 4-wide. Made no impression in the straight. (Lame.)
Hung out badly rounding first turn and raced 3-wide near midfield in back straight. 4-wide turning in and found no extra in straight.
4-wide near pace entering first turn and gained lead 1200 M out. Commenced to weaken 600 M out and dropped out rapidly in the straight.
4-wide near midfield entering first turn. Remained in similar position until home straight. One-paced to line.
Caught wide near midfield entering first turn. Remained in rearward position until put under pressure 600 M out. Made up some ground in the early part of the straight and one-paced to line.
Soon raced near rear. Niggled along to be closer to midfield in the middle stages. Widest turning in and found nothing thereafter.
Broke well and led on fence until challenged 1200 M out. Settled just behind leader until regaining lead from 2-wide position 600 M out. Headed by winner final 250 M. One-paced to line.
Jumped well from wide draw but was caught very wide rounding first turn. Travelled near rear until home straight. Ran on well and made up some late ground final stages.
1L off the leader out 2-wide 1400 M out, never worse than 2Ls off the speed, disputing lead entering straight, led 250 M out, grabbed by winner 50 M out, no extra.
Slowly away, niggled along early, no better than 6Ls off pace at any stage, never competitive.
Unbalanced at the start then very hard ridden to race prominently, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace from 1400 M to 600 M out, dropped out very quickly.
Unbalanced at the start, niggled along when 2-wide and 7Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 6Ls down, no impression.
Raced 2-wide about 6Ls off the pace until 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, kept on well to be nearest at the finish, never quite looked like winning.
Settled about 12Ls off pace on fence in rear 1200 M out, 5-wide (widest of all) and 6Ls down into home straight, 4Ls down 200 M out, ran on strongly to lead 50 M out.
Caught 3-wide without cover about 2Ls or 3Ls off the speed through to home straight when hard ridden to lie up, faded out.
Led on fence by 1L 1400 M out, never clear by more than 2Ls clear, disputing lead entering straight, headed 250 M out, kept on at the same pace.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until home straight, faded out tamely.
About 7Ls off the speed on fence 1000 M out, slightly closer turning for home, never dangerous. (Significant amount of mucus and blood in trachea.)
Travelled well on fence about 5Ls off the pace until 600 M out, soon under pressure, found very little.
Always 2 and 3-wide about 8Ls or 9Ls off the pace until 800 M out, 6Ls down entering straight, always too one-paced.
Unbalanced at the start, 3-wide without cover when 8Ls off the pace 1400 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down into home straight, no extra.
Prominent. Led briefly 1000 M and was 2nd 850 M. Came to tackle the winner 200 M however effort not sustained.
Led very briefly early, settling better than midfield. Dropped back a bit rounding home bend. One-paced thereafter.
Around midfield. Kept on steadily in straight but no match with the placegetters.
Near rear. Last from 900 M. Ran past a couple of runners inside 200 M. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Near rear from widest draw. Held up 250 M while making some moderate progress in straight.
Slowly away, towards rear. Stayed on 400 M.
Never a factor. (Bled.)
Better than midfield. Improved to 4th 450 M. Lack of daylight from early straight to 100 M. Ran on well.
Soon behind midfield. Made good ground from outside 800 M to be 2nd or 3rd home bend. Weakened final 200 M.
Well there. Took lead approaching 800 M. Was joined 200 M. Fought on well to prevail closing stages.
Slowly away, towards rear. Steadied passing 600 M. Crept closer order to be 5th or 6th turning in. Kept on.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily from home bend. (Significant blood and mucus in trachea.)
Never seen with a chance.
Settled towards rear. Produced good late impression in the straight.
Never better than midfield. Kept on one pace in straight.
Took up running turning into home straight the first time. Led one circuit and headed turning in for the second time.
Never nearer.
Settled in midfield. Quickened into straight to gain upper hand near finish.
Settled in distant 4th. Commenced move under pressure rounding home bend. Hit front into straight but outstayed close to home.
Chased leader most of way to straight. Soon swamped after straightening.
Towards rear. Ran on down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Made ground on leaders turning in but badly baulked for a run early in straight. Finished race off well late.
Made no show.
Restrained in 3rd position some 6Ls off the pace before gaining on leaders home bend. Badly squeezed out for a run over 200 M out, then never recovered.
Prominent. Took lead from 700 M until joined early straight. Failed to quicken when headed 200 M.
Towards rear. Steadied 600 M. Never able to recover.
Midfield. Kept on inside 200 M.
Prominent early, soon settled better than midfield on inside. Improved from 400 M, ran on well but failed to catch the winner.
Better than midfield. One-paced. (Hung in in straight.)
Lost ground at start, at the back. Ran past a few weakening horses in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Better than midfield. 3rd briefly 800 M, dropping to 5th 650 M. Made no show final 400 M.
Better than midfield from a wide draw. Improved to 3rd 650 M. 3-wide turning in. Soon found no extra.
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Kept on closing stages.
Jumped well and led field to 750 M. Sat behind leader until joining early straight. Took over 200 M and held on well to the line.
Behind midfield throughout.
Around midfield to straight, then weakened.
Towards rear. Snuck up on rails turning in then kept on same pace.
Prominent to 400 M. Weakened.
Led till joined into straight. Swamped for placing closing stages.
Rear. Swung very wide into straight. Made no impression thereafter.
Began awkwardly and veered across to rail. Travelled in midfield far side and remained same until finding no extra final 200 M.
Well back. Took closer order home bend but baulked for a run early in straight before produced good late impression final 200 M.
Mostly in midfield. Weakened under pressure in straight.
Well there. Gained slender lead into straight. Caught final strides.
Settled in rear. Ran on well down straight to just get up on line.
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Always thereabouts. Held every chance down straight but failed to draw level.
Raced in mid-division out wide without cover. Commenced to lose ground after 600 M. Further weakened in straight.
Began awkwardly and raced at back on rail. Made slight improvement at latter part of home turn. Under pressure 250 M out but failed to quicken and stayed on evenly to the line.
Tardy start and soon raced in worse than midfield on fence. Made up some ground at home bend. Only ran on evenly to the line when asked 250 M out.
Raced in worse than midfield towards the outside through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and stayed one-paced to the line.
Soon raced in prominent position 2 wide and proved difficult to settle without cover in early to middle stages. Found nothing in straight and steadily dropped out after 200 M.
Raced in mid-division on fence. Switched out and made steady improvement turning for home. Responded well when asked 250 M out to overhaul 2nd placegetter near the line to claim the winner spot.
Slowly away. Raced in worse than midfield towards the outside and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Made no impression in straight.
Soon raced in rear section 2 wide. Switched wide to find running on straightening. Hung in and made up little ground in straight.
Raced in midfield wide without cover. Under pressure to hold position turning for home. Weakened badly in straight.
Pushed along to take up running on rail through to straight. Ran on well in straight but unable to find extra to fend off challenge from winner and just held on to 2nd place.
Box seated behind leader through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out, made up steady ground and doing best work in the closing stages.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. Went forward to join leader from 600 M. Kept on evenly in straight and weakened slightly in the closing stages.
Slowly away, in rear on fence about 12Ls off the speed 1200 M out, never competitive at any stage.
2-wide and about 5Ls off pace from 1200 M out to 400 M out, 4Ls down at the 200 M, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.
Didn't break well, 2-wide and 10Ls off the pace 1200 M out, niggled along to lie up 800 M out, always under pressure from then on, beaten entering straight.
Keen in places but 2-wide and 6Ls off the pace until 600 M out, went 3-wide 400 M out and was 5-wide turning for home when 4Ls down, hung in but ran on strongly to lead 50 M out.
Soon in 2nd place on fence 2Ls off pace, a little keen 1100 M out, still 2Ls down in 2nd off home turn, always a bit too one-paced in the straight.
On fence 10Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 7Ls down and driven along into home straight, moderate late headway.
Settled 2-wide and about 8Ls off the pace 1200 M out, niggled along to hold this spot 700 M out, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 5Ls down, ran on strongly, nearest at finish.
On fence 8Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4-wide and 5Ls down into home straight, very one-paced thereafter.
Soon led on the fence by 2Ls, remained this margin clear until home straight, tiring when headed by winner 50 M out, hung on for second place.
Caught 2-wide without cover 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, similarly placed on the swing, didn't pick up and beaten over 200 M out.
On fence 4Ls off the pace from 1200 M to 400 M out, all out to be 3Ls down in 3rd place 200 M out, no extra and soon swallowed up by pursuers.
On fence 6Ls off speed from 1200 M out to home straight, no impression on run-in to line.
Bumped at the start, checked 1500 M out, raced 3-wide without cover 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, 2-wide and 1L down from 1000 M out, 2Ls down and struggling entering straight, faded out.
Slowly away, on fence 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, 10Ls off pace in rear 800 M out, 6Ls down and 2-wide into home straight, never got involved.
On fence 6Ls or 7Ls off the speed from 1200 M to 600 M out, closer entering straight, staying on when 2Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Best away but settled 2Ls off pace on fence from 1100 M out to home straight, picked up fairly well to lead 200 M out, no extra and headed 100 M out, just hung on for 3rd place.
2-wide and 3Ls off the speed 1200 M out, driven along down back straight to hold position, 3-wide into home straight, stayed on well under pressure in straight to be nearest at the finish.
Bumped at the start, 3-wide without cover and 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, one-paced on run-in to line.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 9Ls off pace 1200 M out, advanced out 3-wide from 800 M out to be 6 wide (widest of all) into home straight and 5Ls down, didn't come on.
2-wide and 7Ls or 8Ls off pace from 1200 M to 800 M out, 5Ls down 400 M out, quickened up towards far rail to be 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on well but couldn't overhaul winner.
2-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, steadied 600 M out and soon under pressure, held up for a run at top of home straight, switched inside and kept on well to be nearest at the finish.
Led by 2Ls on fence 1200 M out, over-raced a bit, 2Ls clear off home turn, headed about 200 M out, faded rapidly.
Bit keen early on, 3-wide and 7Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 4-wide 400 M out when 5Ls down, one-paced to line.
On fence 4Ls or 5Ls off pace from 1200 M out to home straight, held up briefly at top of home straight, quickened to be 1L down 200 M out, led 100 M out, ran on.
2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed from 1200 M out to home straight, always too one-paced.
Led on fence by 2Ls 1200 M out, 1L clear 800 M out, joined for the lead turning for home, headed 250 M out, faded rapidly.
On fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace from 1200 M out until home straight, 2Ls down and with place prospects 200 M out, no extra final stages.
2-wide without cover and 2Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 1L off the pace 800 M out, disputing lead out 2-wide into home straight, led 250 M out, headed by winner 100 M out, no extra.
Bumped at start, 2-wide and 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, 6Ls down 800 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, found nothing under pressure.
On fence 7Ls 1200 M out, bumped out 3-wide and left in rear 7Ls off pace 600 M out, 5-wide (widest of all) and 6Ls down into home straight, moderate late headway only.
Slowly away, unbalanced after brushing rail 1300 M out, on fence 6Ls off speed 1200 M out, similarly placed entering straight, one-paced to line.
Bumped at start, 2-wide and 4Ls or 5Ls off pace from 1200 M out to home straight, very tame thereafter.
Bumped at the start, 2-wide and 6Ls off pace from 1200 M out to 600 M, 4-wide into home straight when 6Ls down, one-paced to line.
Took keen hold on fence 9Ls off pace in rear 1200 M out, bumped 600 M out and looped field from this point out 4-wide to be 4Ls down into stretch, ran on well without reaching principals.
Bumped at start, 3-wide without cover 6Ls off pace 1200 M to 800 M out, advanced out wide to be 2-wide and 2Ls down entering straight, led 100 M out, kept on.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the speed until home straight when travelling well, still well there but under pressure 200 M out, found very little. (Early roarer.)
3-wide and driven along 7Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 2-wide and 4Ls down at the 400 M, always outpaced but ran on past beaten rivals to claim a place in closing stages.
Niggled along on fence when 4Ls off the pace 900 M out, travelled better when 2Ls off the lead on fence on straightening, very one-paced from then on.
3-wide and 5Ls off the pace 900 M out, 5-wide (widest of all) into home staight, never looked like getting involved.
On fence 6Ls off pace 800 M out, closer turning for home, one-paced to line.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace 900 M out, similarly placed on the swing for home, 4Ls down in clear 3rd place 200 M out, didn't follow through.
Checked at the start, got back 9Ls off pace 900 M out, carried out 3-wide 500 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 6Ls off speed, no chance with winner but ran on well past remainder of field.
Slowly away, 5-wide and 7Ls off the pace 900 M out, closer when checked 600 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls down into straight, possible place chance when held up towards inner 200 M out.
2Ls clear on the fence 900 M out, 1L clear 400 M out, headed upon straightening, faded out tamely.
Always caught 4-wide without cover and 3Ls off the pace through to home straight, soon flattened out.
3-wide (with cover) and 3Ls off the speed 900 M out, unbalanced 600 M out, just over 2Ls down turning for home, found nothing under pressure.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace from 900 M to 600 M when switched out 2-wide, led at top of home straight, quickened right away.
2-wide and 5Ls off the pace 900 M out, checked 600 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 4Ls off pace, held up for a run until 200 M out, kept on fairly close home.
Never a factor.
Mostly 4th or 5th to straight where he failed to make any impression on leaders.
Made running to straight and was challenged 300 M. Headed 150 M and found no extra.
7th halfway and similar position on straightening where he dropped out quickly.
Slow into stride and was in rear before making up some good ground final 200 M.
Mostly 2nd to straight where he soon came to challenge. Led briefly 150 M and found winner too strong.
Midfield to home turn. Ran on well closing stages, doing best work at the finish.
Never troubled leaders.
Made no show.
Midfield rounding home bend. Made no show on straightening.
Trailed field into straight when under pressure. Ran on quite well final 200 M.
Always handy. Quickened to lead inside final 150 M. Kept on well to line.
Near rear. Recovered some late ground closing stages.
Midfield or behind. Ran on quite well inside 300 M but no match with speed of winner.
Prominent. Only one pace from halfway.
Led field to 250 M. Weakened.
Mainly midfield. Shifted to the inside passing 800 M. Ran on a bit final 50 M. (Hung out.)
Prominent early. Dropped back steadily from course proper.
Midfield. Made no show 400 M. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Slowly away, last throughout.
Midfield and hung in throughout.
Never a factor.
Better than midfield. Improved to 3rd 600 M. Kept on steadily but failed to maintain a minor placing closing stages.
In touch. Improved to 2nd 600 M. Took lead 250 M. Won going away.
Midfield. Made progress halfway to be 5th 400 M. Kept on for a 3rd closing stages.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Well back into straight. Finished strongly to snatch victory short of post.
Led early, then prominent before checked and dropped to midfield coming out of back straight. Soon weakened after home turn.
Around midfield when steadied and lost ground about 700 M out, kept on one-pace.
Always prominent. Held some chance early in straight but unable to quicken to threaten.
Lost considerable ground at start. Never in contention.
Midfield far side when inconvenienced approaching home bend. Well back into straight and produced some late impression closing stages.
Well there. Quickened upon straightening to hit front inside 300 M but unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Behind midfield. No clear run early in straight then one-paced close home.
Well there. Shared pace rounding home bend. Soon weakened after straightening.
Midfield when hampered and lost position home bend. Ran on steadily down straight to have every chance but outsprinted close to home.
Lost touch when hung out badly approaching home bend. Midfield into straight and weakened. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Niggled along in joint lead to straight then gradually overhauled.
Towards rear. Commenced move turning in. One-paced closing stages.
Began awkwardly losing ground. Raced towards rear to straight. Made modest progress without threatening.
Led very briefly after start, soon dropped back to 8th. Recovered some ground from 700 M. Kept on from 5th early straight.
Mainly 3rd to final turn. Kept on one-paced thereafter.
Settled 5th from widest draw. Crept closer to 3rd final turn. Took lead 200 M. Just held off runner-up's late challenges.
Well there. 1-1/2Ls behind leader home bend. Kept on under pressure in straight.
Never a factor.
Towards rear. Recovered some late ground closing stages.
Led briefly soon after start, dropped back to 5th 800 M. Unable to quicken in straight.
In the last pair. Widest turning in. Ran on strongly to just miss narrowly, doing best work at finish.
Towards rear early. Moved up to take lead from 1000 M. Headed 250 M out. Faded. (Lame.)
In touch early, dropped back steadily to behind midfield. Weakened 250 M.
Settled towards rear. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well to assert authority short of line.
Jumped best then settled in midfield. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Never in contention.
Never better than midfield.
Well back. Ran on down straight to do best work at finish.
In first few. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Well there. Took up running rounding home bend. Held slender lead till swamped final 100 M.
Midfield. Ran on steadily to hit front about 1000 M out but caught close to home.
Prominent briefly. Better than midfield into straight. Soon weakened.
Towards rear. Found no room inside 300 M then kept on steadily to the line.
In last few throughout. (Bled.)
Prominent to straight then gradually faded.
Ridden to first few. Maintained same until swamped final 100 M.
Niggled along to race in midfield around 2 wide. Moved up to better than midfield after 1000 M. All out 300 M out and ran on well but was overhauled by the winner on the line.
Raced in a forward position 2 wide through to straight. Kept on fairly in straight but unable to match speed with 1st pair and just held onto 3rd place.
Began awkwardly and raced in midfield out wide without cover. Made steady improvement after 1000 M to be in prominent position at home bend. Found nothing in straight and further weakened 350 M out.
Raced in rear section on fence through to straight. Stayed on evenly in straight and only ran past several beaten runners after the 200 M. (Rider had his whip knocked from his hand at 200 M.)
Jumped awkwardly and soon recovered to race in better than midfield 2-wide through to straight. Found nothing in straight and steadily weakened inside final 250 M.
Began fairly from wide draw and soon raced in midfield but closer to rail. Switched out to find clear running on straightening but only kept on evenly to the line.
Slowly away and ridden along to race in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Made no impression in straight.
Slow to begin and raced towards the rear around 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M when asked 400 M out.
Began well but was eased to race in worse than midfield 2 to 3 wide. Under pressure 450 M out and found the line well to snatch the winner spot on the line.
Raced in prominent position on rail. For some distance after the 1200 M raced keenly and proved difficult to settle. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Ridden hard in the early stages to take lead on rail. Headed shortly after 400 M. Only kept on evenly in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Settled in worse than midfield on inner. Switched out on straightening to find clear running. Made up little ground inside final 200 M but was awkwardly placed in closing stages and was not ridden out to the line.
Raced at the tail of the field. Switched out and made slight improvement at home bend. Made up steady ground in straight and missed the 3rd placegetter by a short margin.
On fence about 5Ls off the pace through to home straight, kept on fairly if a shade one-paced.
Slowly away, on fence 3Ls off pace from back straight through to home straight, 2Ls down in 2nd place 200 M out, kept on fairly but had no chance with the winner.
2-wide and 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight and 4Ls down, nearest at the finish but never really threatened.
3-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, travelled well when similarly placed entering stretch, found little under pressure and beaten 200 M out.
Settled 2-wide 2Ls off the pace from 1000 M out to home straight, struggling once tempo quickened, beaten 200 M out.
Disputed lead on fence from 1000 M out to home straight, headed 350 M out, faded rapidly, eased down from 200 M out.
Raced keenly without cover out 3-wide when about 2Ls off the pace until home straight, soon faded out.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down turning for home, kept on quite well to take 3rd place close home.
8Ls off pace and 2-wide 800 M out, driven along entering straight when 2-wide and 6Ls down, moderate late headway to be nearest at finish.
Knuckled exiting gates, on fence in rear 8Ls off pace 800 M out, unbalanced 600 M out, 5Ls down at top of home straight, moderate late headway past a few beaten horses.
Very awkwardly away and lost at least 5Ls at the start, 3-wide and 10Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 5-wide (widest of all) when 6Ls down entering straight, no impression.
Disputed lead out 2-wide 1000 M out, 3-wide and a neck down at top of home straight and with every chance, one-paced thereafter.
Best away, settled into the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace from 1100 M through to 500 M out, led about 350 M out, 2Ls clear 200 M out, kept on strongly.
Always 4-wide without cover down the back straight when about 3Ls off the pace, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, no acceleration.
Settled 3-wide and 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed down the back straight, 4-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 4Ls down, eased to the front 250 M out, drew clear, very easily.
2-wide and 5Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, 2Ls down 200 M out, one-paced thereafter.
Caught out 3-wide without cover 1200 M out when 3Ls off the pace, 2Ls down from 700 M out to home straight when still 3-wide, couldn't pick up and always a shade outpaced.
2-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3Ls down and 2-wide from 700 M out to home straight, didn't pick up and beaten 300 M out.
1L off the pace out 2-wide without cover 1200 M out, disputed lead with RED SUN 800 M out, half a length down into home straight, one-paced from then on.
Slowly away and bumped at start, 2-wide and 7Ls off pace in rear 1200 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls down into straight, no chance with winner but ran on well to take 2nd close home.
Led by 1L on fence 1200 M out, disputed lead with GOGGLES 800 M out, narrow lead into straight, headed by winner 250 M out, run out of 2nd close home but hung on gamely for a place.
On fence 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, moved 2-wide 600 M out when 4Ls off the pace, never got competitive in the straight.
On fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off the pace through to home straight, one-paced and weakened through final 200 M.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace from 1200 M through to home straight, kept on at the same pace to line, just missed out on a place.
Settled 2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls off the pace from 1600 M out to 600 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, 1L down 200 M out, led about 100 M out, pushed out to draw clear.
2-wide and 5Ls off the pace from 1600 M to 800 M out when steadied off heels, 4Ls down and travelling well into stretch, 3Ls down at the 200 M, kept on well to be nearest at the finish.
2-wide and 7Ls off the pace 1600 M out, 6Ls down at the 800 M, still 6Ls down in rear off home turn, made some moderate late headway.
Awkwardly away, checked when in rear out 2-wide and 8Ls off the pace 1600 M out, 7Ls down and 2-wide in rear 800 M out, 3-wide into home straight, ran on okay to be nearest at the finish.
Always 3-wide without cover and 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until the home straight, still 2Ls down at the 200 M, kept on well to take 2nd close home but had no chance with the winner.
2-wide and 2Ls off the speed 1600 M out, tended to over-race down the back straight, 1L down 800 M out, disputing lead entering straight, led 300 M out, headed 100 M out, lost 2nd place 50 M out.
3-wide and 7Ls off pace 1600 M out, 3-wide with cover and 5Ls off pace at the 800 M, no better off and under pressure into home straight, no impression.
On fence and 6Ls off pace about 1600 M out when checked twice, unbalanced when 5Ls down 800 M out, 2-wide and 5Ls down into home straight, stayed on well to be nearest at finish.
Driven from gates but couldn't lead, about 4Ls off pace 1600 M out on fence, tended to over-race in places, driven along 600 M out when 5Ls down, much too one-paced in straight.
Briefly led very early on, settled to take the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the speed 1600 M out, under pressure to lie up with the quickening pace entering straight, faded out.
Caught 3-wide without cover 1700 M out, found cover down backstretch 3-wide and about 4Ls off the speed, 4-wide and 3Ls down into home straight, just over 2Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Led by 1L on fence 1600 M out, never much more than 2Ls clear down back straight, joined by PAOLINI entering straight, headed 300 M out, no extra and one-paced to line.
2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls off the speed from 1000 M out to 600 M out, under pressure when 3-wide and 3Ls down on straightening, 2Ls down when steadied 200 M out, didn't recover.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1000 M out, under pressure 600 M out when 5Ls down, one-paced in the straight.
On fence about 3Ls off the pace down the back straight, 2Ls down at top of home straight, short of running room and not extended from 350 M to 100 M, too late when left in the clear.
3-wide and 7Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls down into home straight, no impression.
Caught 4-deep early on when 8Ls off pace, 3-wide and 7Ls down 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, no acceleration.
Advanced from midfield to be 1L off pace and 3-wide 1000 M out, disputed lead out 2-wide from 800 M to home straight, led 300 M out, ran on gamely to defy all comers.
Caught 4-wide without cover 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3-wide without cover and 2Ls down at the 800 M, 3-wide and 1L down into home straight, had every chance but couldn't head principals.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace until 1000 M out when left on fence and 2Ls off speed, 2-wide and 1L off lead at top of home straight, had every chance from 300 M out but couldn't overhaul winner.
3-wide and 2Ls off pace 1000 M out, 2-wide and 2Ls down from 800 M to home straight, 1L down 200 M out, short of running room 100 M out and not fully extended close home.
On fence 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 2-wide and 3Ls down into home straight, 2Ls down at the 200 M out, couldn't get any closer.
3-wide with cover and 5Ls off the lead 1000 M out, 4-wide and 4Ls down into home straight, picked up well to be 1L off the pace at the 200 M, no extra.
2-wide and 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, never threatened to get involved.
Led by 2Ls on the fence 1100 M out, headed at top of home straight, faded rapidly.
3-wide with cover and 3Ls or 4Ls off pace down back straight, closer but 4-wide into home straight, half a length down and with every chance 200 M out, couldn't follow through.
Made no show.
In rear to straight where he ran on quite well inside final 200 M.
In similar position throughout. Kept on under pressure close home.
Midfield to home turn. Made up some ground final 200 M. Never nearer.
Never in contention.
Never on terms.
Ran 5th into straight where he kept on without quickening.
Slightly worse than midfield home turn and was improving when fell 150 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led field to 200 M when headed, found no extra.
Always handy. Ran on well to take charge close home.
Midfield to straight where he kept on same pace. Found no extra near finish.
Always prominent. Led briefly 200 M but soon found winner too strong.
Towards rear till running on a bit passing 200 M.
Began awkwardly, soon recovered ground to be 6th. Remained there until running on steadily inside 300 M to take 2nd close home.
Never better than midfield. Weakened closing stages.
Mainly 8th before dropping back further rounding home bend.
Prominent. Held 3rd before responding well to take charge 250 M. Kept on well while hanging in.
Better than midfield. Crept closer to 5th 800 M. Failed to quicken when under pressure 250 M.
Mostly 4th or 5th. Kept on.
Mainly 2nd. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Lost ground soon after start, never a factor.
Made no show. Hung in throughout.
Slowly away, towards rear. Improved from outside 650 M to be midfield and widest turning in. Moderate progress closing stages.
Behind midfield. 5-wide turning in. No progress.
Midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Pushed along to lead soon after start. Found no extra when headed 250 M.
Never on terms.
Led or disputed lead. Unable to sustain effort 300 M out.
Midfield early. Pulled to the front approaching home bend. Soon weakened in straight.
Around midfield. Swung wide when took closer order into straight. Ran on steadily before coming one-paced closing stages.
Broke well then held up in midfield though never far off the pace. Quickened to challenge upon straightening and gained upper hand over 100 M out.
Amongst leaders far side. Still close up rounding home bend. Gradually faded in straight.
Never in contention.
Well there. Hit front shortly after straightening but swamped over 100 M out.
Mainly in midfield. Lost position into straight. Kept on one pace.
Wide far side. Improved steadily to prominent position approaching home bend. Dropped out in straight.
Awkward start. Remained last few into straight but finished strongly to grab 3rd final strides.
Soon in last few. Kept on past beaten runners closing stages.
Ridden along early. Travelled in forward of midfield to straight. One-paced.
Well there. Lost position into home bend. Just kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Prominent. Ran on from 3rd early straight to join the leader 200 M out. Looked like winner 100 M. Lost a placing by a narrow margin.
Never able to feature.
Towards rear throughout.
Slowly away, never in contention.
Soon last. Ran past some beaten horses 200 M out.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily in straight.
Settled 5th from widest draw. 4-wide home turn. Ran on well final 200 M to snatch victory near finish.
Behind midfield early, soon recovered some ground to be 6th. Ran on steadily final 300 M but was beaten narrowly at finish.
Led field soon after start. 2nd from 1100 M. Led or joint lead from 250 M. Failed to prevail close home.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily from outside in straight.
Ridden along to take lead from 1100 M. Weakened when headed 250 M.
Slowly away, behind midfield. Made up some ground 400 M but found no extra closing stages.
Midfield or slightly behind. Dropped back a bit upon straightening. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Well there early, settled 4th. Remained similar until losing touch inside 200 M.
Well back. Widest runner into straight. Hit front over 250 M out. Held on well.
Prominent to home straight. Dropped out.
Rear. Baulked for a run early in straight. Quickened to hold every chance 200 M out. Swamped closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Never better than midfield. Ran tightly on rails in straight.
Towards rear. Jostled between runners into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Well back. No clear passage early in straight. Ran on steadily final 250 M.
Led field until overhauled inside 300 M.
Behind midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Towards rear with some late headway closing stages.
Forward of midfield. Held 4th into straight. Ran home one-paced.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Towards rear. Made rapid progress to stalk leader home bend. Soon weakened in straight.
Chased leaders to home bend then weakened under pressure. (Significant amount of blood and mucus in trachea.)
Jumped well and took outright lead after 1400 M. Kept on well in straight but unable find any extra to fend off challenge from the 1st pair to settle for 3rd place.
Jumped awkwardly, then was steadied when crowded for room. Raced in rear section 3-wide through to straight. Made no impression in straight and weakened steadily closing stages.
Began fairly from wide draw and soon eased to rear section, closer to rail. Switched wide on straightening and made up some ground inside final 200 M without threatening the placegetters.
Raced in midfield on rail. Commenced to lose position on home bend. Tailed out in straight.
Slowly away and raced in worse than midfield on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and stayed one-paced to the line.
Eased to race in rear section on rail through to straight. Found nothing when asked 350 M out.
Began fairly and raced in midfield 2-wide. Made steady improvement turning for home. Ran on well in straight to take charge 150 M out and win readily.
Raced in better than midfield 2-wide. Went forward to join leader turning for home. Kept on evenly when asked 350 M out and further weakened over the concluding stages.
Soon raced in mid-division 2-wide. Sustained out on straightening to find clear running. Made up steady ground in straight to miss the placings by a short margin.
Raced in mid-division out wide without cover through to straight. Kept on evenly to the line.
Led briefly and soon raced behind leader on rail through to straight. Did not quicken when asked 350 M out and steadily weakened 250 M out.
Raced towards the rear section 2-wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Steady headway when asked 350 M out but kept on one pace to the line.
Jumped well and soon settled in front of midfield on rail through to straight. Kept on well in straight to be closest at finish.
Soon eased to race in mid-division 3-wide through to straight. All out 300 M out and made up steady ground to snatch 2nd place near the line.
Caught 3-wide without cover 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, travelled well when 3-wide and 2Ls off pace on straightening, one-paced to line.
2-wide and 7Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 5-wide and 6Ls off the speed into home straight, no impression.
3-wide and 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4-wide when 5Ls down on straightening, never competitive.
2-wide and 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3Ls down 800 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down into home straight, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on well but had no chance with the winner.
Raced 2-wide 3Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 2Ls down at top of home straight, led 150 M out, ran on well.
Had the run of the race on the fence 2Ls off the pace 1200 M out, niggled along to hold position entering straight, faded out.
On fence 5Ls off pace 1200 M out and 800 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down into home straight, never looked like getting into the finish.
Slowly away, 2-wide and about 9Ls off pace in rear 1200 M out, 5-wide (widest of all) when 7Ls down entering straight, nearest at the finish.
3-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down into home straight, 3Ls down at the 200 M, no extra through closing stages.
Couldn't lead so settled 2-wide 1L off pace in 2nd place 1200 M out, went a neck in front 500 M out, still half a length clear 200 M out, headed by winner 150 M out, no extra.
Fractious in gates and awkwardly away, on fence 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, under pressure and 4Ls off the pace entering home straight, faded out.
On fence 7Ls off pace 1200 M out, marginally closer on straightening, never got into it.
Keen with head up and caught 4-wide without cover 1200 M out when 6Ls off the pace, 3Ls down and 4-wide without cover 800 M out, under pressure entering straight, faded.
Led by 1L on fence 1200 M out, headed by LUCKY STALLION 500 M out, always a bit too one-paced through closing stages.
Keen early on, half a length off speed in 2nd place out 2-wide 1200 M out, 2Ls down and 2-wide from 800 M out to straightening, very one-paced thereafter.
2-wide and 5Ls off the pace and driven along 1200 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls off the pace, kept on evenly past beaten rivals.
3-wide and 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, closer but 5-wide into home straight, picked up well to lead 200 M out, hung on under pressure.
Bumped at the start, 3-wide and half a length off pace 1200 M out, 1L off pace and 3-wide into home straight, dropped out.
On fence 4Ls off pace from 1200 M out to home straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, one-paced closing stages.
2-wide when in rear 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, staying on and with every chance 100 M out, no extra.
Bumped at the start, always 5-wide without cover and between 3Ls and 5Ls off pace down the back straight, 4-wide and disputing lead at top of home straight, faded very rapidly.
Disputed lead out 4-wide 1200 M out, advanced to be 2-wide and vying for the lead 800 M out, 1L down entering home straight and 200 M out, faded rapidly nearer to line.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4Ls down and 2-wide 800 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, very weak in home stretch.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, 1L down on straightening, every chance 200 M out, couldn't follow through.
Keen early on, 4-wide and 3Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4-wide into stretch when 3Ls down, no impression.
Slowly away, on fence and driven along to lie up when 6Ls off pace 1200 M, struggling and detached from main body of field entering straight, hopeless.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down into home straight, no acceleration.
Held a narrow lead on the fence 1200 M out, 1L clear at top of home straight, headed 200 M out, faded rapidly.
4-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, advanced to be 2Ls off the pace and 3-wide 800 M out, all out to be 1L down at top of home straight, faded out very rapidly.
2-wide and 8Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 3Ls off the pace, 2Ls down at the 200 M out, one-paced through closing stages.
On fence 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, under pressure to lie up with pace when similarly placed into home straight, no chance.
No better off than 3-wide 8Ls off pace down back straight, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, 2Ls down 200 M out, ran on strongly despite hanging out to lead final strides.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace until 800 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down into home straight, no acceleration and beaten over 200 M out.
In 4th place 2-wide and 4Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 2-wide and 1L down into home stretch, always outpaced from then on.
Soon led, clear by 2Ls 1200 M out, headed at top of home straight, faded rapidly.
On fence 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, switched out when 2Ls off pace at top of home straight to challenge, led 250 M out, ran on well but was caught in final strides by winner, had every chance.
Slowly away, on fence 7Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4-wide and 4Ls down into home straight, no impression.
3-wide and 6Ls off pace 1200 M out, 2-wide and 4Ls down at the 800 M out, 4-wide entering straight and vying for the lead, still well there 200 M when 1L down, no extra.
Keen early on, 3-wide and 7Ls off the pace 1100 M out, 4-wide into home straight when vying for the lead out wide, led 300 M out, headed 250 M out, one-paced thereafter.
2Ls off pace in 2nd place 1200 M out, still 2Ls down off home turn when short of running room, nothing there when left in the clear about 250 M out, very tame.
Slowly away, settled in rear bunch 2-wide and no better 8Ls off pace down back straight, 5-wide into home straight, 1L down with every chance 200 M out, couldn't follow through.
On fence in rear bunch no better than 8Ls off the pace down the back straight, 6Ls down off home turn, never competitive.
Prominent until 800 M out, always outpaced thereafter.
Always prominent within 1L of the pace until the 400 M, 2Ls down at the 200 M, weakened but still hung on for 3rd place.
Fractious in the gates, led early on, 3Ls down 400 M out, no threat through closing stages.
1L off the pace 800 M out, 3Ls down from 500 M to 200 M out, weakened further.
Always tended to hang out, right on the pace early on but was 2Ls down 400 M out and 200 M out, ran on okay under pressure but winner was too good.
Slowly away, about 5Ls off the pace until 200 M out, kept on okay to be nearest at the finish.
Slowly away, always well behind, 5Ls down 400 M out and hard ridden, always a bit too one-paced.
Never better than 4Ls off the speed at any stage.
Kept within 2Ls of the lead until 400 M out, weakened thereafter.
2Ls off pace against far rail 800 M out, half a length down 400 M out, led 350 M out, 1L to the good 300 M out, held the margin well.
Awkwardly away, head up and outpaced 800 M out, never got into it.
Disputed lead from far side until emerging as at clear leader 500 M out, headed about 350 M out, 2Ls down in 2nd place at the 200 M, weakened further.
Managed to stay within 1L or 2Ls off the pace until the 200 M, no extra and faded out.
Prominent until 700 M out, always outpaced thereafter.
Clear last into straight. Never seen with a chance.
Mostly midfield to straight where he kept on well to the 200 M. Found no extra towards finish.
Settled in rear to straight where he ran on well from the 300 M to lead near finish.
In touch, pulling hard. About 4th or 5th into straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Towards rear till making up some ground closing stages.
About 5th 600 M and could make no impression on leaders from the 300 M.
Was prominent before going 1L clear in front 1000 M and led field to straight. Was headed and faded 200 M.
Was prominent before failing to hold place passing 200 M.
Well there early and was 5th 1000 M. About 8th on straightening where he failed to make any impression on leaders.
Worse than midfield to home bend. Improved on straightening to take lead passing 200 M before finding winner too strong near finish.
Among rear group into straight where he ran on well to threaten final 200 M.
In touch before being outpaced inside final 200 M.
Worse than midfield approaching home turn and was nearest at the 250 M. Did not sustain effort close home.
2nd last turning into straight where he stayed on a bit.
Began awkwardly, never a threat.
Made no show.
In the front until headed halfway. No extra.
Well there. Took lead halfway. Held on well to win readily.
Better than midfield. Failed to quicken final 400 M.
Behind midfield throughout.
Always prominent. Kept on for remote 3rd.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Improved to 5th near 500 M. One-paced.
Never far off. Kept on well inside 400 M but unable to threaten the winner.
Midfield. Made progress 600 M out to be 2nd course proper. Unable to quicken final 200 M.
Last. Tailed off 400 M.
Around midfield throughout.
Lost touch inside 200 M. No extra.
Never far off. Hit front over 200 M out. Hung on well.
Never nearer.
Settled behind midfield. Kept on same pace without quickening closing stages.
Began awkwardly but soon in rear of midfield. Quickened to hold some chance final 200 M but unable to draw even.
Never seen with a chance.
Never far off to 200 M then weakened.
Well there briefly. Midfield when steadied and lost position onto course proper. Kept on steadily under pressure closing stages.
Prominent to 200 M. Weakened.
Held slender lead until finding no extra final 200 M.
Prominent till dropped out over 200 M out. (Bled.)
Soon in last few. (Bled.)
In first few to 200 M. Weakened. (Saddle shifted.)
Midfield of main bunch on stand's side when squeezed out towards rear passing 500 M. Produced some late recovery closing stages.
Towards rear. Made some minor progress in straight.
Shifted out abruptly after start, broke down 300 M.
Behind midfield. Moved up from 1300 M to be 2nd 1100 M. Hung out from 800 M. Kept on until finding no extra 100 M out.
Was 2nd early, soon raced 4th on the rail. Weakened 200 M out.
In touch, dropped back steadily to be midfield 800 M. Weakened from 600 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Crept closer to 4th turning in. Ran on steadily but unable to catch the winner.
Soon rear. Made progress to 7th 400 M. Continued to make ground on inside to take 3rd close home.
Slowly away, pushed along to pick up pace to be 2nd 1250 M. Held 3rd from 1100 M until weakening out of contention final turn.
Towards rear. Progressed steadily to midfield rounding home bend. Continued to make up further ground in straight.
Prominent early, soon settled better than midfield. One-paced.
Towards rear throughout.
Never a factor.
Slowly away, recovered ground to be in midfield. Dropped back a bit halfway. Wide without cover throughout.
Pushed along to take lead from a wide draw. Never headed.
Led or disputed lead to 400 M then weakened.
Mostly in midfield with short-lived effort early in straight.
Around midfield into straight. Faded.
Behind midfield. Made moderate progress without threatening in straight.
Rear into straight. Made up good ground to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield. Made some progress early in straight. No further impression closing stages.
Well there. Joined leader rounding home bend but weakened up on straightening.
Settled in last few. Ran on well down straight to assert authority close to home.
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Tracked leaders. Hit front shortly after straightening only to be worn down close to home.
Forward of midfield. Took closer order home bend. Unable to sustain effort in straight.
Raced wide in midfield. Ran on well to produce good impression in straight.
Towards rear. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Last into straight. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Slow to begin and raced in rear section on rail. Switched out and made slight headway turning for home. Made up good ground inside final 200 M when asked 350 M out.
Jumped well and soon settled in midfield around 3 wide through to straight. Ran on well in straight but unable to find the extra gear to overhaul the winner.
Slowly away and raced at back on rail through to straight. Made no impression in straight.
Ridden along to dispute lead and took outright lead after 1200 M. Headed 200 M out and steadily faded out thereafter.
Unable to muster early speed to race in mid-division on rail through to straight. Found nothing in straight and only ran past couple of beaten runners.
Soon raced in a rearward position on inner. Switched wide and made little improvement at home bend. No extra in straight and kept on evenly to the line.

Niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. Made steady improvement at back straight to race in prominent position. Ran on fairly in straight but was overhauled by 3rd placegetter near the line.

Began fairly and raced in mid-division 2 wide. Switched out and niggled along to improve position turning for home. Responded well when asked 350 M out and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.
Raced in mid-division towards the outside. Made some improvement down back straight. Commenced to lose ground turning for home. Weakened steadily in straight.
Eased to race at back around 2 wide. Under pressure at home bend and made up little ground. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M and kept on evenly to the line.
Pushed along to race in a forward position on rail. Under pressure to go forward at home bend. Kept on well in straight to grab 3rd place near the line.
Niggled along to race in prominent position on inner. Steadily lost position from 800 M. Found nothing in straight and weakened badly inside final 200 M.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail. Under pressure to maintain position at home bend. Kept on evenly in straight and further weakened in the closing stages.
Raced in worse than midfield 2 wide. Under pressure at home turn but failed to quicken and stayed one-pace to the line.
Caught 4-wide disputing lead 1200 M out, dropped in 2-wide half a length off pace from 1000 M to 500 M out, led at top of stretch, headed 200 M out, narrowly missed out on a place.
Slowly away, never travelled well, 3-wide and 10Ls off pace 1200 M out and under pressure, 4-wide into home straight and detached from main body of field, no chance.
2Ls off lead and 3-wide 1200 M out, driven along 600 M, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, didn't pick up and beaten 200 M out.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace 1200 M out, keen in places, 3-wide and 4Ls down into home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Slowly away, driven along to sit 3Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, always under pressure, 4Ls down into home straight, soon beaten.
Caught 4-wide without cover and 2Ls off pace from 1200 M to 700 M out, weakening when 5-wide and 4Ls down into home straight, soon eased down.
5-wide and in rear 1400 M out, on fence and 10Ls off pace 1200 M out, 2-wide on straightening when travelling well 5Ls down, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on well, nearest at finish.
3-wide and 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, closer 800 M out, 4-wide and 3Ls down at top of home straight, could never get to principals.
2-wide and niggled along 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down 800 M out, pressured 5-wide and 5Ls down entering straight, kept on okay, nearest at the finish.
3-wide and 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, 2Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, led 200 M out, stayed on well.
On fence half a length off pace in 2nd place 1200 M out, 2Ls down on fence from the 800 M to home straight, always a shade too one-paced in home straight.
2-wide and 7Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 6-wide into home stretch when 4Ls down, never looked like landing a blow.
Led by half a length out 2-wide from 1200 M out to 500 M when headed, all out when 1L down in 3rd place 200 M out, swamped close home.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, 2-wide and 5Ls down into stretch, 4Ls down at the 200 M, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
3-wide and 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, still well adrift and 5-wide into home straight, much too one-paced on run-in to line.
2-wide about 2Ls or 3Ls off the pace down back straight, was a bit keen and awkward round the circle, 2-wide on straightening and 2Ls down, same 200 M out, one-paced on run-in.
On fence 6Ls off the speed 1000 M out, steadily lost place, never a factor.
Fractious at the start and broke through gates, led very early on, disputed lead on fence through to home straight, 1L down 200 M out, kept on at same pace.
Caught 4-wide half a length off the pace down the back straight, 3-wide into home straight and still disputing the lead, still bang there at the 200 M, no extra close home, encouraging debut.
Slowly away, driven along to dispute early lead, 2Ls off the pace 800 M, shuffled back 700 M out to be 3Ls down, still 3Ls down 200 M out, weakened through closing stages.
3-wide and 5Ls or 6Ls 800 M out, always under pressure and outpaced, 3-wide into home straight and 4Ls down, never looked like catching principals.
3-wide with cover down the back to home straight when about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace, kept on well to lead 100 M out, driven out.
Disputed lead out 3-wide early on, narrow lead out 2-wide 800 M out, disputing lead at top of home straight and at the 200 M, headed by winner 100 M out, no extra.
4-wide and 5Ls off the speed 800 M out, 6Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, dropped out tamely.
Slowly away, always driven along, struggling when 2-wide and 6Ls off the pace 800 M out, 8Ls down and toiling further entering straight, no chance.
On fence 7Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4Ls down and niggled along 500 M out, short of room at top of stretch, unbalanced and hit rail, no impression thereafter.
3-wide and 8Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4-wide and 5Ls off pace off home turn, progress to be 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on to lead 50 M out, ran on well.
Led by a neck out 2-wide 1200 M out, headed by SHERIFF BAMBOO 800 M out, half a length down and under pressure at top of home stretch, faded out quickly.
2-wide and 7Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 2-wide and 5Ls down from the 800 M to home straight, picked up well to be 2Ls down at the 200 M, kept on well.
Slowly away, 3-wide and 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls off the speed, 3Ls down and staying on 200 M out, couldn't follow through.
Best away, 2-wide and 3Ls off the pace 1000 M out, keen in places, driven along when 2-wide and 3Ls down entering straight, faded out tamely.
4-wide and 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, sent on and half a length down and 3-wide 800 M out, disputing lead and travelling well entering straight, led 300 M out, headed 100 M out, no extra.
On fence 1L off the pace 1000 M out, narrow lead from the 800 M to home straight, headed 300 M out, kept on gamely under strong pressure, encouraging debut.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, was always outpaced by principals.
Always wide without cover, 5-wide and 3Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight when just 1L off the pace, battled on very well to hang on for a place.
On fence 5Ls off pace 1000 M out, niggled along 600 M out when 3Ls down, 2-wide into home straight, place chances when 2Ls down 300 M out, one-paced thereafter.
Keen when 3-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, driven along when 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight, stayed on to have a brief lead 100 M out, soon headed, no extra.
On fence 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, not travelling well when 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace on straightening, dropped out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, detached from main body of field when 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, 6Ls down and 2-wide at top of home straight, never got into it.
2-wide and 7Ls off the speed 800 M out, struggling towards rear when 5-wide into home straight, no chance.
Raced 3-wide 4Ls off the pace 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight when driven along about 7Ls off the pace, no impression.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 5Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, shifting in when staying on well with every chance 200 M out, didn't follow through.
Best away, 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace 800 M out, 3-wide and 1L down at top of home straight, every chance at the 300 M, 1L down at the 200 M, always a bit too one-paced.
Slowly away, 3-wide and 8Ls off the pace 900 M out, 4-wide 600 M out, 6-wide into home stretch, carried towards stands rail by drifting LUCKY OWNERS, no chance.
Settled 1L off the pace on the fence 800 M out, led again 600 M out, 1L clear entering straight, under pressure and just half a length up 200 M out, found another gear and forged clear.
Niggled along when 3-wide and 5Ls off the pace 800 M out, driven when 4-wide and 5Ls down at top of home straight, stayed on well enough to be nearest at the finish.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, sent on to lead out 2-wide by 1L 800 M out, hung out entering straight to be 4-wide and disputing lead, faded rapidly.
On fence 4Ls off the pace 800 M out, 2Ls down entering stretch, every chance 300 M out, one-paced through closing stages.
2-wide and 4Ls off the pace 800 M out, took closer turning for home, all out when 2Ls down 250 M out, severely checked 200 M, didn't recover.
Bumped at the start, 4-wide with cover and 4Ls off the speed 900 M out, driven along when 5-wide and 6Ls down on straightening, hung out but still finished off well down centre of track.
Slowly away, in rear 2-wide and 9Ls off the speed 800 M out, under pressure when 5Ls off the speed at top of home straight, one-paced to line.
3-wide and 1L off the pace 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, soon faded out.
Bumped at the start, 3-wide and 3Ls off the speed 800 M out, 5-wide and under pressure entering home straight, beaten 300 M out.
About 5th turning into straight. Plugged on closing stages.
Well there before losing some ground home bend. Unable quicken under pressure on straightening.
Never a factor.
In touch early and was towards rear coming into straight where he made no show.
Never on terms.
About 5th rounding home bend and failed to make any impression on leader in straight.
Always at the back.
Well there to straight where he kept on same pace.
Soon took up running and made rest to win comfortably.
Ran 3rd to home turn before dropping out quickly shortly on straightening.
Was last turning into straight. Switched in 400 M and kept on. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always struggling.
Always prominent. Chased winner unavailingly in straight and lost 2nd close home.
About 8th rounding home bend. Kept on well in straight despite not reaching winner.
Reared and badly unbalanced at start, dislodging the rider.
Slowly away, near rear. Crept closer to 7th early straight. Made up further ground from outside final 200 M.
Better than midfield. Moved up to be prominent 900 M. Gave a little ground rounding home bend to be 5th turning in. One-paced.
Behind midfield. Was steadied on straightening. No significant recovery.
Towards rear. Made progress to midfield home turn. Kept on without quickening.
Checked soon after start, never a factor.
Led early stages, then raced 4th before re-gaining advantage 600 M. Won unchallenged.
Midfield or behind. Improved to 4th upon straightening. One-paced.
Well there early. Dropped back steadily to be midfield far side. Made no show in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Better than midfield. Steady progress rounding home bend to be 2nd final turn. Kept on without threatening. (Lame.)
In touch. Improved to 2nd 850 M. Failed to hold place from 3rd early straight.
Pushed along from outside to soon be prominent. Led from 850 M to 600 M. Remained in touch before fading out from final turn. (Hung out.)
Ridden early. Led till headed by winner about 150 M out. Kept on but lost placing late.
Never better than midfield.
Never seen with a chance.
Towards rear most of way.
Forward of midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Sluggish at start. Never in the hunt.
Well there to straight. No extra.
Never far off. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Jumped best, then held up behind pace. Commenced run upon straightening and gained upper hand over 150 M out.
Prominent briefly. Raced mostly in midfield to straight. No extra.
Ridden in midfield early. Lost position approaching home bend. Towards rear into straight but made up some late ground closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, never better than midfield.
Began awkwardly, never in the hunt.
In touch. Dropped back a bit to 6th far side. Kept on in straight but unable to match pace with the trio 200 M.
Midfield throughout.
Prominent. Led or joint lead from 1000 M. Kept on well when headed 200 M.
Pushed along from a wide draw to join the leader passing 1000 M. Found no extra inside 200 M. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
In similar position throughout.
Mainly 3rd to straight. Ran on solidly to take narrow lead 200 M. Lost marginally at finish.
Raced 4th before running on steadily from outside final 200 M to just get up on the line.
Soon last. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Towards rear. Failed off in straight. (Hung out.)
Made no show.
Very slowly away, towards rear. Made some progress early in straight. No further impression.
Forward of midfield. Dropped out home bend.
Settled without striking distance. Ran on determinedly from 4th into straight to gain upper hand close to home.
Never better than midfield.
Attempted to make all. Narrowly headed inside 200 M but fought on dourly to the line.
Midfield. Given reminders approaching home bend. Had no more the give upon straightening.
Trailed field into straight. Made up late ground without threatening.
Towards rear. Ran on to do best work at finish.
Never far off. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M but caught close to home.
Wide in midfield. Weakened upon straightening.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Towards rear throughout.
Slow to begin and raced in rear section. Under pressure home bend and switched out on straightening. Made no impression in straight.
Raced in mid-division on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 250 M out but was never in position to trouble the placegetters.
Unable to muster early speed to race in rear section on rail through to straight. Did not quicken when asked 250 M out and stayed one pace to the line.
Raced in mid-division 2-wide. Steadily lost position at home bend and dropped out in straight.
Niggled along to race 1L off leader. Under pressure to maintain position turning for home. Found nothing in straight and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Began well and pushed along to lead on rail with around 1L advantage through to straight. Kept on well when asked 250 M out to hold onto the winner spot by a short margin.
Soon raced in midfield around 2 to 3-wide through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out but did not respond well and only ran on evenly to the line.
Jumped fairly and soon settled behind midfield around 2-wide. Under pressure at home bend to improve position from the outside. Found the line well but just failed to run down the winner.
Shortly after the start was crowded for room and raced in worse than midfield on inner through to straight. Ran on evenly to the line when asked 200 M out.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Made up steady ground when asked 250 M out but was no match for the 1st pair.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield towards the outside. Pushed along to hold position turning for home. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Raced at back on rail. Switched out on straightening to find clear running. Did not quicken in straight and only ran past several beaten runners.
3-wide with cover about 4Ls off the pace until turning for home under pressure, dropped out quickly.
Always in rear, no better than 8Ls off the pace through to home straight, never remotely competitive. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always caught 3-wide without cover within 3Ls of the lead until turning for home, faded out very rapidly.
On fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed until home straight, made some late headway but never threatened principals.
2-wide and 3Ls off the speed until straightening up, one-paced thereafter.
No worse than 2Ls off the pace and 2-wide through to home straight, remained in the same position at the same pace.
Enjoyed the run of the race, 2Ls off the speed through to home straight, picked up to lead about 150 M out, kept on under pressure.
Waited with 2-wide and 5Ls off the front, tended to hang in 600 M out, steadied at top home straight when 4Ls down and 3-wide, no impression.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 2Ls, 1L to the good at top of home straight, headed by winner 150 M out, no extra.
Slowly away, on fence about 6Ls off the lead until top of home stretch, moderate lead headway.
2 and 3-wide with cover and about 6Ls off the speed until turning for home, no impression.
2-wide and about 6Ls or 7Ls off the pace towards rear until home straight, kept on fairly close home to be nearest at the finish.
Jumped fairly. 3-wide and 2Ls behind pace 800 M out. 3-wide and just outside leader 400 M out. Unable to quicken upon straightening and hung in. Weakened after 200 M.
Broke well and raced alongside leader until 800 M. Commence to lost ground despite being ridden and was near rear at 400 M. 3-wide turning in and weakened in the straight.
From wide draw settled near rear early stages. In last place on fence about 9Ls behind pace entering home turn. Ridden hard 400 M out and made up some ground in the straight.
Began fairly. Niggled along behind midfield and was unable to improve its position. Near rear and widest turning in. One-paced to line.
Unable to muster early speed and raced at rear until home turn. Steadied when tightened at 400 M. Kept on well after straightening and made up some late ground.
Began well from wide draw. Niggled along around midfield. 3-wide and 4Ls behind pace turning in. Responded well in straight and grabbed lead final stages.

Slowly away and failed to muster speed in early stages. On fence and 7Ls behind pace 600 M out. Improved slightly on fence rounding home turn. Ran on strongly after 250 M and made up some late ground.
Jumped well and pushed along to lead shortly after start. Continued to lead by no more than 2Ls until being overtaken by winner in final stages.
Jumped slowly and was ridden up to be 2Ls behind leader 700 M out. 2-wide and just behind leader turning in. Found nothing in the straight.
On fence and 2Ls behind pace 800 M out. Improved on fence rounding home turn. Responded well under pressure upon straightening but was unable to threaten winner.
Couldn't lead early on, settled half a length off pace out 2-wide 800 M out, struggling to keep up entering straight, hung out in straight and faded right out.
Slowly away, on fence about 7Ls or 8Ls off the pace through to straightening up, one-paced to line.
2-wide and 2Ls off the pace 800 M out, under pressure to hold position 600 M out, beaten turning for home.
Slowly away, 10Ls off pace in rear 1000 M out, marginally better off turning for home, no impression.
Midfield and 3-wide early on, struggling and about 8Ls off the pace 400 M out, dropped out tamely.
Slowly away, 2-wide and about 6Ls off the lead until the home straight, ran on past beaten rivals to take 3rd place close home.
No better than 7Ls or 8Ls off the pace in rear until home straight, moderate late headway past beaten rivals.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace 800 M out, under pressure and further back on straightening, weakened.
Settled about 4Ls or 5Ls off the speed on the fence before straightening up, kept on the one pace.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace through to home stretch, picked up to dispute lead 200 M out, met with interference from KING OF FISH. (Finished 2nd, placed 1st.)
Caught 3-wide without cover 3Ls off the pace 800 M out, 2Ls down and 2-wide entering straight, all out to be 4Ls down in 3rd place 200 M out, faded.
Soon led, never clear by much more than a length, hung out round the circle, joined by THUNDER MAN at the 200 M, continued to hang out. (Finished 1st, placed 2nd.)
Towards rear. Stayed on a bit inside 200 M.
Midfield. Steady progress rounding home bend to be 4th final turn. Ran on to take 2nd closing stages.
Sat outside leader before joining at 600 M. Took over 400 M out. Kept on moderately for a remote 3rd when headed 200 M out.
Soon led. Was joined 600 M. Weakened when headed on straightening.
In touch. Failed quicken to challenge in straight.
Better than midfield. Dropped back passing 600 M.
Towards rear. Made progress home bend to be 4th turning in. Kept on in straight.
Midfield. Improved steadily along rail to 5th far side. Advanced to 3rd 800 M. Sustained effort in straight to take control approaching 200 M. Held on.
Around midfield throughout.
Slowly away, pushed along to recover ground to be just behind midfield. Crept closer to 6th final turn. Soon found no extra.
In touch early from a wide draw, then was behind midfield from stable bend. Last on straightening. (Wide throughout.)
Towards rear, soon dropped to the last. Made some minor improvement from 500 M. One-paced in straight.
Never a factor.
Towards rear throughout.
Gradually faded under pressure to last place by home bend.
Behind leaders when checked and lost considerable ground about 900 M out. Never recovered.
Mostly in forward of midfield. Plugged on under pressure.
Disputed lead or led to straight. Weakened.
Restrained behind midfield far side. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Midfield early. Pulled to first few afterwards. Behind leaders turning in then gradually faded.
Well there. Shared pace early in straight but outsprinted closing stages.
Mainly in midfield. Awkwardly placed behind runners turning in. Hampered after 200 M out but sustained progress to the line.
In last few most of way and made no show in straight.
Wide in midfield. Made some effort early in straight but could find no more under pressure closing stages.
Disputed lead far side. Close up turning in. Quickened well to take charge over 200 M out. Won readily.
Lacked early pace. Took closer order from rear coming out of back straight. Midfield and wide rounding home bend and turning in. No further impression.
Slowly away. Never a factor.
Rear briefly. Mostly in midfield. Kept on same pace.
Towards rear. Last early straight. Ran past a couple of beaten runners closing stages.
Remained 3rd throughout. Kept on well in straight.
Held 7th to final turn. Made no show.
Led field to passing 600 M. Held 2nd until fading out of contention 250 M. (Mucus found in trachea.)
Settled 4th and held similar position throughout.
In similar position throughout.
Sat outside leader from the widest draw. Took over pasing 600 M. Just held off runner-up's challenge closing stages.
Held 5th before running on steadily in straight, just failing to catch the winner.
Last to straight. Made ground moderately.
Mostly in midfield. Came to challenge early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Led far side. Narrowly headed rounding home bend. Lost touch final 200 M.
Niggled along at the back. Ran on strongly in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to straight. Made some moderate headway.
Towards rear. Ran on stoutly down straight to just get up on line.
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Ran on well past beaten horses in straight.
Prominent before faded home bend.
Never far off. Hit front over 200 M out but worn down close to home.
Never nearer.
Forward of midfield to straight then weakened.
Well there to 250 M then faded.
Vied for early lead from poor draw eventually gaining slender advantage home bend. Unable to sustain effort final 200 M.

Began fairly and soon raced in mid-division on rail. Shifted out on straightening to find clear running. Ran on evenly and drifted in when asked 350 M out, weakened slightly over the concluding stages.
Settled in rear section around 2 wide. Drifted out on straightening. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and soon recovered to race in worse than midfield around 2 to 3 wide. Ran home fairly when asked 350 M out, but over the concluding stages was steadied when crowded for room.
Niggled along to race in mid-division on inner. Under pressure on straightening but did not respond well and kept on evenly to the line.
Led early and then raced outside the leader through to straight. Found nothing in straight and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Led narrowly on fence from 1000 M and hung out when making home turn. Soon tailed out in straight. (Lame left fore leg and lost its left fore plate.)
Ridden along to race in a forward position around 2 to 3 wide. Took lead shortly after 400 M and found the line well to fend off late challenge from 2nd and 3rd placegetter to win narrowly.
Soon eased to race in rear section towards the outside without cover and was carried wider on straightening. Ran on fairly in straight to be closest at finish.
Raced towards the rear on fence. Under pressure to maintain position turning for home. Stayed one-paced in straight and only ran past couple beaten runners in the final stages.
Began fairly and soon settled in worse than midfield on inner through to straight. All out 350 M out and made up good ground over the final 200 M to miss the winner by a short margin.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Made up steady ground when asked 350 M out to be closest at finish.
Raced towards the rear around 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Made up good ground when asked 200 M out but was overpowered by 2nd placegetter on the line.
Soon box-seated behind leader through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
Eased to race in rear section on inner through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
4Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover until 1200 M out, left without cover thereafter, 4-wide into straight when 2Ls down, no chance with winner but kept on gamely, lost 2nd on line.
A little keen when 3-wide without cover and 1L off pace until 1200 M out, got in 2-wide with cover from then on, 3-wide into home straight when 1L down, kept on at same pace.
Bit keen very early on, always about 1L off pace in 2nd and 2-wide through to 600 M out, led 400 M out, 2Ls clear at the 200 M, ran on strongly.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls or 3Ls off pace down back straight, 1L down on the swing, all out at the 200 M, one-paced closing stages. (Mucus in trachea.)
2-wide and 10Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide into home straight when 5Ls off pace, switched out wider 300 M out, 3Ls down at the 200 M, kept on well to nick 2nd place on the line.
Soon led, never clear by much more than 1L, headed at top of home straight, fading fast when very unbalanced at the 300 M, eased down.
2-wide and 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls off the speed, steadied when crowded for room at the 200 M, didn't recover.
2-wide and 8Ls off the speed 1200 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 4Ls off the pace, 3Ls down at the 200 M, just missed out on a place.
On fence 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4Ls down into home straight, didn't have a clear passage and was never fully extended in straight, wouldn't have won but was unlucky not to be placed.
Bit keen out 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, similarly placed but under strong pressure to lie up 600 M out, 3-wide into home straight, faded steadily.
On fence 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, slightly closer but under pressure to hold position 500 M out, 2-wide into home straight, retreated quickly.

Crossed from wide gate to fence, 11Ls off pace 1000 M out, in rear 6Ls off pace into straight, 3Ls down on fence when steadied when disappointed for running 300 M out, didn't recover. (See Racing Incidents.)
On fence 10Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 2-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, never got into it.
Very awkwardly away losing at least 3Ls, 11Ls off pace and 2-wide 1000 M out, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight and 5Ls down, always too one-paced on the run-in.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off the speed down the back straight, 1L down at top of home straight, never looked like reeling in the winner.
2-wide and 1L off pace down the back straight, similarly placed into home straight, never looked like getting past leading pair, hung on gamely for a place.
Slowly away, on fence 8Ls off pace 1000 M out, 5-wide into home straight when just over 2Ls down, couldn't get any closer on the run-in.
