Soon led, never clear by more than 2Ls down the back straight, still travelling well off home turn, 2Ls clear at the 200 M, kept on strongly despite hanging out a bit.
2-wide and 6Ls off the pace down the back straight, 4-wide into home straight when 2Ls down, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide and 4Ls off the pace down back straight, put in a pocket by improving KENWOOD MELODY 600 M out, switched out wider to challenge 300 M out, ran on at the same pace.
Caught 3-wide without cover for some of the back straight when 8Ls off pace, advanced to be 3-wide and 3Ls off the pace 600 M out, closer entering straight, soon faded.
On fence 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace down the back straight, 4Ls down at top of home straight, kept on fairly without threatening principals.
2-wide and 7Ls off the speed 1600 M out, advanced to be 3-wide 600 M out when 4Ls down, bumped out 4-wide by winner at top of home straight, outpaced thereafter.
Always caught wide without cover, 3-wide without cover down the back straight when about 4Ls off the pace, same position into home straight, soon weakened.
2-wide and 5Ls off the pace 1600 M out, driven along to lie up with the pace 800 M out when similarly placed, found nothing once tempo quickened, eased down. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Travelled well on fence about 5Ls off pace through to 1000 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down and pushed into the clear entering stretch, 1L down 200 M out, kept on well to lead final 20 M.
Very keen early on, 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1600 M out, off the bridle 800 M out, 6Ls down and struggling entering straight, soon well beaten.
Keen very early on, on fence 7Ls off the pace 1600 M out, similarly placed when short of running room at top of home straight, no impression.
Slowly away, on fence 4Ls down 1600 M out, similarly placed when checked 800 M out, 2-wide and 3Ls down into straight, 2Ls down and with every chance of a place 200 M out, no extra.
Soon led, never clear by much more than 2Ls, still just over 1L to the good off home turn and 200 M out, grabbed by winner final 20 M, game effort.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls or 3Ls off pace from 1600 M out to home straight, battled on well in straight but could never get to the front pair.
On fence 10Ls off the pace 1600 M out, crowded a bit at the 600 M when still a fair way off the pace, under pressure turning for home, no chance.
Always about 2Ls off pace and 2-wide without cover in 2nd place through to home straight, all out at the 200 M and headed by winner, one-paced closing stages.
2-wide and 10Ls off pace 1600 M out, 5-wide (widest of all) and 7Ls off pace into home straight, moderate late headway, nearest at the finish.
2-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 2-wide into home straight when 5Ls off the pace, always much too one-paced to get competitive.
Had the run of the race on the fence about 2Ls off the speed until the home straight, dropped out steadily.
Very keen racing 4-wide without cover 5Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls off the pace, dropped out.
2-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3Ls down entering the home straight, picked up well to lead 180 M out, driven out.
2-wide and 8Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 6Ls down at the 800 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight, 2Ls down at the 200 M, kept on at same pace through final 200 M.
On fence 6Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 5Ls down turning for home, picked up fairly but was short of running room over 200 M out, didn't recover.
On fence 4Ls off the speed from 1000 M out through to home straight, short of running room 200 M out, never threatened principals.
4-wide and 6Ls off the speed 1000 M out, under pressure when 3-wide and 5Ls down into home straight, ran on fairly but much too late through final 200 M.
Raced 3-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down into home straight, faded and beaten 250 M out.
Shot to an easy lead and was 3Ls clear 1200 M out, 1L to the good entering straight, headed 180 M out by winner, no extra.
2-wide and 1L off the speed in 2nd place from 1000 M out to home straight, still 1L down at the 200 M, couldn't match winner's speed.
Slowly away, on fence 8Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4-wide and 6Ls off pace in rear into home straight, 3Ls down at the 200 M, kept on well to be nearest at the finish.
Crowded at the jump, steadied off heels when 2-wide and 6Ls off pace 1000 M out, 4-wide into the home straight and 5Ls down, ran on strongly final stages to be nearest at the finish.
Settled in rear to straight where he made up considerable ground final 250 M.
Never far off to straight. Unable quicken to challenge final 200 M.
Midfield into back straight and similar position on straightening. Kept on well to take 2nd towards finish.
Worse than midfield home turn. Stayed on to be nearest at finish.
Among rear group into home bend. Ran on quite well final 250 M.
Prominent to straight where he kept on till finding no extra closing stages.
Pulled hard when hitting the front entering back straight. Was still having 1/2L advantage 400 M before headed and faded passing 200 M.
Worse than midfield to straight when he ran on well to take command inside final 200 M. Won readily.
Slowly away and was last before improving rapidly from 1000 M to be 3rd home turn. Ran on to hold every chance 200 M. Found one-paced near finish.
Well there to straight where he kept on to hold some chance 250 M. Soon outpaced and dropped out.
At back to straight. Kept on final 300 M.
Midfield 800 M and similar place 350 M. Was checked 200 M and lost ground.
Never on terms despite staying on a bit final 250 M.
5th halfway and about 7th home turn. Stayed on to dispute lead passing 200 M.
Led or joined lead from 800 M. Kicked clear final turn and won readily.
Always thereabout. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Never a factor.
Towards rear throughout.
Slightly better than midfield from widest draw. In similar position without cover throughout.
Led briefly soon after start. Remained 4th rounding home bend. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening.
Behind midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield throughout.
Lost ground at start, then recovered ground to be midfield at Rock. Kept on quite well early straight until one-paced closing stages.
Led briefly early. Remained prominent and joined the winner at Rock. Faded out of contention from 2nd early straight.
Slowly away, always at the back.
Mostly in 8th or 9th.
Settled some 3Ls behind pace. Came to challenge upon straightening but unable to draw even.
Jumped well. Settled in 4th some 4Ls off the lead. Plugged on in straight for placing.
Held up in rear. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Led early, joined approaching home bend. Regained 1L advantage upon straightening and hung on to the line.
Disputed lead to 300 M then unable to sustain effort.
Never better than midfield.
Always towards rear.
Mostly in midfield. Inconvenienced for a stride inside 200 M. Ran on.
Wide in midfield most of way. Faded 200 M out.
Behind midfield. Made moderate progress under pressure.
Never better than midfield.
Sat outside winner. Kept on quite well in straight.
Led briefly early, then remained 3rd to 250 M. Weakened.
Mostly 6th until advancing to 4th home bend. Kept on without quickening.
Last early, then raced in 7th before last again when steadied 600 M. Made no response when given reminders home bend.
Dropped to the last when checked 2200 M. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Soon led and made all.
Midfield or better. Weakened steadily from 600 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer to 6th final turn. One-paced thereafter.
Remained 4th or 5th to final turn. Stayed on well.
Settled behind leaders. Shifted out for a run turning in holding every chance briefly over 200 M out but stopped quickly.
Midfield. Disappointed for a run early in straight till 200 M. No further impression.
Never rearer.
Circled field round stables bend to join leader far side. Hit front turning for home but soon found no extra.
Behind midfield. Commenced move turning in. Ran on but never able to match speed of winner.
Settled behind leaders. Quickened well to hit front shortly after straightening but worn down final 200 M.
Settled at the back. Ran on well down centre of straight to swoop on leaders over 200 M out. Won convincingly.
Rear. Produced some late headway closing stages.
Midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
3-wide and never far off to straight then weakened.
Rear to midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Led or disputed lead to 400 M then weakened.

Broke well from wide draw but soon eased to race in worse than midfield closer to rail. Under pressure at home bend and switched out on straightening. Made up little ground inside final 200 M when asked 250 M out.
Began fairly and raced in midfield on rail. Shifted out abruptly on straightening to avoid heels. Kept on well in straight but unable to find an extra gear to trouble the placegetters.
Slowly away and raced in rear section on fence. Proved difficult to settle in back straight and was checked at 600 M. Found nothing thereafter and dropped out in straight.
Jumped awkwardly and raced at back on rail. Made up little ground at back straight. Under pressure 250 M out but stayed one-paced and only ran past several beaten horses in the closing stages.
Jumped well and raced in prominent position on rail through to straight. All out 200 M out and ran home fairly but was overpowed by 2nd placegetter near the line.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield around 2-wide. Switched wide on straightening to find clear running. Under pressure 250 M out but only able to stay one-paced to the line.
Jumped well and eased to race in midfield around 2-wide. Stayed along to maintain position and switched out turning for home. Unable to quicken in straight and stayed on evenly to the line.
Raced in prominent position out wide without cover. Ridden along to hold position turning for home. Did not respond to pressure in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Began well and niggled along to lead on fence with no more than 2Ls advantage through to straight. Ran home strongly when asked 200 M out to win comfortably.
Began well and soon raced outside leader through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Raced in rear section 2-wide. Made improvement on the outside going up Rock to be in mid-division turning for home. Made no impression in straight.
Soon raced around 6Ls off pace on rail. Under pressure on straightening and made up good ground inside final 200 M to snatch 2nd place near the line.
Slowly away, over-raced and bumped rail 1400 M out, on fence 5Ls off pace through to home straight travelling well, no chance with the winner, claimed 2nd place 100 M out.
Awkwardly into stride, 4-wide without cover and 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, niggled along 800 M out when 4-wide with cover and 8Ls down, never a factor.
Always rear until home straight, at least 10Ls off the speed and driven along 600 M out, moderate late headway, nearest at the finish.
Bumped at the start, 3-wide and 2Ls off pace 1300 M out, dropped back to sit 3-wide and 5Ls off the pace from 900 M out to home straight, didn't find much under pressure.

Very prominent early but couldn't lead, on fence 2Ls off the pace 1100 M out, 2-wide down back straight and within 3Ls off the lead until home straight when under pressure, faded out tamely. (See Racing Incidents.) (Stiff both hind.)
3-wide and 5Ls off the pace 1200 M out, caught 4-wide without cover down the back straight and 5Ls down until stretch, no impression.
4-wide and 2Ls off the pace 1300 M out, caught 3-wide and between 3Ls and 4Ls in 3rd place from back to home straight, one-paced on the run-in.
2-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, further back at the 800 M, 3-wide and 7Ls behind on straightening, still 7Ls down in midfield, plugged on to nick 3rd close home.
Bumped at the start, driven to lead on fence by 2Ls 1100 M out, 2.5Ls to the good at the 800 M and turning for home, driven out to be 3Ls clear 200 M out, easily.
2-wide and 4Ls off the pace 1200 M out, restrained to sit 2-wide and about 6Ls down from 900 M to home straight, one-paced and never dangerous on run-in.
On fence about 4Ls off the pace in 4th from 1200 M to home stretch, 5Ls down 200 M out and vying for 3rd place, no extra.
Never dangerous, 3-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, under pressure 600 M out, 4-wide into home straight when about 7Ls down, faded further. (Significant mucus in trachea.)
Soon race about 2-wide and 2Ls behind leader. Settled in prominent position on fence from 600M to home straight. Kept on well and missed 2nd place by narrow margin.
Broke well and was niggled along to maintain position on fence at midfield throughout backstraight. 2-wide and 2Ls down turning in. Kept on without threatening.

Broke fairly and soon raced 2-wide near midfield about 5Ls behind pace. Remained in similar position in back straight. Ridden to improve from 4-wide position turning in. Every chance 250M out, unable to keep momentum thereafter.

Last one out and was niggled along on fence to be 4Ls behind at 1000M. Remained on fence about 6Ls off pace until being crowded by a riderless horse at 600M. Commenced to improve on fence turning in and took command final 150M.
Eased back shortly after start to race at rear until home straight. In last place about 8Ls down upon straightening. Made up some ground final stages.
Broke fairly and soon led on fence by no more than 1L until being headed by winner final 150M. Stayed on well and just held on for 2nd place.
Broke well and was ridden for disputed lead 2-wide until 700M out. Remained 1L behind pace rounding home turn. Weakened final 200M.

Jumped fairly, unable to muster speed to keep up and soon raced near rear. Reminded 900M out but no improvement. In last place and 8Ls behind leader prior to straightening. Ran on strongly and made up good ground in the straight.
Stumbled at the start and was pushed along to be 3-wide and 2Ls behind pace at 1000M. Niggled along from 2-wide position just behind pace after 800M. 3-wide turning in. One-paced final 200M.
On jumping shifted out abruptly and dislodged jockey.

From wide gate was ridden along to be 3-wide and 5Ls behind pace near 1000M. Niggled along to be running behind midfield throughout back straight. On fence and about 5Ls down turning in. One-paced to line.
2-wide and 2Ls off the pace 1200 M out, had box seat run in 3rd place on fence 2Ls off pace from 1000 M to home straight, vain pursuit of winner in straight, all out to hang on for 2nd.
On fence 4Ls off pace 1200 M out in midfield, in 4th place when driven along entering straight and still 4Ls down, ran on fairly to go 3rd 150 M out, no extra.

Always caught at least 3-wide without cover, 2Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 3-wide and disputing 4th place 800 M out when 3Ls down, began to fade at the 600 M, no chance entering the stretch. (See Racing Incidents.)
2-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, driven along to hold this midfield position 600 M, beaten upon straightening.
Slowly away, keen 1200 M out when 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace in 4th, under pressure to hold this position 700 M out, 5Ls down entering straight, weakened further.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 1L until 500 M out, just over 1L to the good on straightening, shot 3Ls clear at the 200 M out, pushed out to draw a long way clear.
3-wide and 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, had cover when 2 and 3-wide through to the home straight when about 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace, weakened markedly thereafter.
Slowly away, on fence 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, niggled along 700 M out to get closer, 6Ls down in midfield on straightening, moderate late headway past beaten rivals.
Dwelt and lost about 4Ls at the start, on fence at least 10Ls off the pace 1200 M out, about 9Ls down on the swing, ran on past a few tired horses in the straight.
2-wide early on disputing lead, kept within 1L off the pace in 2nd until 500 M when under pressure, 4Ls down and weakening rapidly 200 M out, faded further.
3-wide and 7Ls off the pace 1200 M out, towards rear and 6Ls off pace and 2-wide at the 800 M and no better off turning for home, one-paced in the stretch.
Caught 5-wide round first bend, steadied and switched inside to race 2-wide 10Ls off the pace 1100 M out, 6-wide (widest of all) turning for home when still about 10Ls down, no chance.
Slightly behind midfield in 3-wide. Ran on steadily in straight but never able to match speed with winner.
Remained 4th or 5th throughout.
Prominent. Joined the lead 800 M. Headed early straight. Soon weakened.
Began awkwardly, soon last. Hung out badly approaching 800 M. No significant progress.
Near rear from widest draw. Made up good ground from 300 M until one-paced closing stages.
Prominent. Reached lead briefly 800 M. 3rd into straight. Kept on.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made very moderate progress final 200 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Faded soon after straightening.
Led field until joined 800 M. Regained advantage upon straightening. Won readily.
Slowly away, behind midfield throughout.
Around midfield on inside. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield to straight then gradually faded.
Raced wide far side but took up running before home bend. Led until swamped over 100 M out.
Never seen with a chance.
Well back. Produced good late progress final 200 M to do best work at finish.
Midfield or behind. Shifted in for clear run inside 200 M and kept on well to the line.
Broke well then travelled mainly in forward of midfield. Soon faded in straight.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Prominent early. Midfield most of way. Did not find much room final 200 M. Kept on well.
Prominent far side. Lost position coming out of back straight. Weakened further turning for home.
Never far off. Quickened well to assert authority inside 200 M.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on to do best work at finish despite a difficult ride final 200 M.
Led far side. Settled behind leaders home bend. Failed to quicken under pressure closing stages.
Well back to straight. Ran on past beaten horses. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.) (See Racing Incidents.)
Raced in midfield on rails. Improving when found no room behind runners final 200 M.
In touch to 400 M. Dropped back steadily.
Slowly away, last to 200 M. Just ran past a couple of beaten horses.
Led field until headed final stages.
Tracked leader before taking over close home.
Slightly behind midfield. Made gradual progress from halfway. Kept on.
Prominent to 250 M. Failed to quicken.
Midfield. Moved up gradually to take 3rd passing 200 M. Kept on.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Dropped back from 6th 400 M.
Was 2nd last before making up some ground from 300 M.
Midfield throughout. Made no show in straight.
Took up running turning into home bend. Hung in well under pressure.
Never better than midfield.
Broke well, then held up behind leader approaching home bend. Fought on under pressure but never able to peg back winner.
Well back. Ran on past beaten runners in straight.
Midfield. Produced moderate impression down straight.
Settled mainly in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Towards rear most of way.
Prominent. Steadied for a stride 800 M out. Dropped out upon straightening.
Always thereabouts. Kept on one pace.
Well back into straight. Made modest progress to be nearest at finish.
In last few throughout.
Last into straight. Never nearer.
Raced in rear section towards the inside. Under pressure and steadily shifted out turning for home. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Raced in worse than midfield around 3 to 4 wide and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Under pressure 400 M out and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Soon settled in rear section towards the outside through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.
Soon raced in rear section. Made slight improvement from the inside at home bend. No extra in straight and stayed one-pace to the line.
Niggled along to race in prominent position on rail through to straight. Was held up for running in early part of straight. All out 200 M and made up little ground to be closest at finish.
Niggled along to race in midfield towards the outside through to straight. Found nothing in straight and steadily dropped out after 250 M.

Slowly away and pushed along in the early stages to race around 1L off leader through to straight. Ran on well when asked 350 M out, 1/2L down 150 M out and fought back in the closing stages to miss the winner by a short margin.

Jumped well and raced around 2-1/2Ls off lead 3 wide. Made little improvement at home bend. Found the line well to take lead at 200 M and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.
Unable to muster early speed to race in worse than midfield 3 wide through to straight. Did not respond well when asked 350 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 300 M out and made up little ground in the closing stages.
Raced in mid-division out wide without cover through to straight. Made no impression in straight.
Ridden along in the early stages to take lead and obtain rail running after 1200 M. Kept on well in straight but unable to match speed with 1st pair and was headed at 200 M to settle for 3rd place.
Niggled along to race in mid-division on inner. Under pressure to maintain position turning for home. Did not quicken in straight and further weakened in the closing stages.
Began fairly and settled in midfield on rail. Near the 800 M was proving difficult to settle and became awkward when closed to heels. Unable to quicken in straight and stayed one-pace to the line.
4-wide without cover in midfield 1000 M out, 3-wide in 5th spot 3Ls off pace 800 M out, about 2Ls down 100 M out when clipped heels of TAKING THE LEAD, knuckled, eased down.
Settled worse than midfield 2-wide and about 6Ls off pace down back straight, still towards rear and 4-wide when 6Ls off pace entering straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, nearest at the finish.
Soon led on the fence, headed by OPERA MAGIC 1100 M out, raced in 3rd place 2Ls off the pace on the fence through to home straight, led about 180 M out, hung on gamely.
2-wide and roughly 5Ls off the speed in about 8th from back to home straight, hanging in under pressure when 3Ls off pace 200 M, kept hanging, was clipped 100 M out, eased close home.
Caught 3-wide without cover 2Ls off pace 1000 M out, in 2nd place half a length off pace out 3-wide from 800 M to home straight, in 3rd place but giving ground 200 M out, faded.
Checked at the start, niggled along on fence in rear when 10Ls off the pace, improved to midfield 5Ls off pace entering straight, still there and all out at the 200 M, same pace to line.
3-wide and 10Ls off the speed 1000 M out in rear bunch, 4-wide into home straight and last when still 10Ls down, no impression.
Bumped at the start, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in about 4th place through to home straight when hard ridden to lie up, kept on at the one speed.
Took no part.
Knuckled leaving gates, driven to lead 1100 M out, got to fence 2Ls in front 900 M out, 1L up into home straight, headed by winner 180 M out, kept on well under pressure and didn't fade.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace 1000 M out when 7th, niggled along 700 M out to keep up, still 4Ls down entering straight, always outpaced through closing stages.
2nd last when 2-wide and 3Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 7Ls down into home straight, held up for a clear run until 250 M out, 5Ls down 200 M out, finished off very strongly, went close.
2Ls off pace on fence 1200 M out, in midfield about 3Ls off the speed on the inner 800 M out, similarly placed but hard ridden entering straight, faded steadily.
3-wide 5Ls off the speed in midfield 1000 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls off pace from the 800 M to homestretch, under strong pressure 400 M out, found nothing, beaten 200 M out.
On fence 5Ls off the speed in 4th place at the 800 M, all out to get within 3Ls of the lead off home turn, faded through closing stages.
3-wide and 6Ls off the pace in 7th place 900 M out, hung in 800 M out, 5Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, weakened.
2-wide and 6Ls off the speed in 6th place 900 M out, driven along entering stretch when 7Ls down in midfield, weakened rapidly.
Got its head up at jump racing keenly and at 800 M when worse than midfield and 2-wide and 9Ls off the pace, further behind entering straight, faded right out.
Raced in 2nd place on fence about 2Ls off the pace 800 M out, loomed up to lead at top of home straight, shaken up to go over 2Ls clear 200 M out, went further clear, very easily.
Keen early, got to fence 2Ls clear at the 800 M, headed by winner at top of home straight, over 2Ls 2nd 200 M out and over 2Ls clear of 3rd place, lost 2nd place on the line.
In 5th place 2-wide and 5Ls off the speed 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, one-paced to line.
2-wide and 8Ls off lead in 8th place at the 800 M, 3-wide off home turn when 7Ls down and still in midfield, never able to challenge.
On fence 9Ls off the pace and towards rear 900 M out, 8Ls down and struggling on the turn for home, stayed on.
Settled in rear 3-wide and 10Ls off the speed 800 M out, 4-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 8Ls down, 6Ls down and still midfield 200 M out, ran on well to nick 2nd on the line.
2-wide and 3Ls off the pace 800 M out, forced out 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down and under pressure, faded steadily.
Bumped at start, 2-wide in rear group when 10Ls off lead 800 M out, 8Ls down on the turn for home, never dangerous.
On fence and about 5Ls off the speed down the back straight, 4-wide into the stretch when about 4Ls down and driven along, never able to challenge. (See Racing Incidents.)
Keen with head up until gaining cover out 2-wide and 3Ls off the speed 1400 M in 4th place, 3-wide and 2Ls down in 3rd place entering straight, 2nd at the 200 M, never likely to reel in winner.
In rear 9Ls off speed and 2-wide 1200 M out, improved out 3-wide 600 M out, widest of all (7-wide) into stretch when 4Ls down, quickened up to be 4th 2Ls off pace 200 M out, no extra.
Settled 2-wide about 1L off the speed in 2nd place until 600 M out, driven along when 2-wide and 2Ls off the speed entering stretch, unable to quicken, just hung on for 3rd.
Settled about 7Ls off the speed and 2-wide towards rear down the back straight, forced 6-wide into home straight when 4Ls off the speed, 3Ls down in midfield 200 M, kept on evenly.
Awkwardly into stride, on fence about 6Ls or 7Ls off the speed in midfield through to the 600 M, 2-wide and 3Ls down in 5th entering straight, similar margin at the 200 M, always outpaced.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace and disputing 5th spot 1200 M out, forced out 5-wide when 4Ls down into home straight, outpaced and 5Ls down towards rear at the 200 M, same pace to line.
Soon led, never clear by much more than 1L until the 600 M, went 2Ls clear off home turn, ran on well, always holding a margin.
In rear about 10Ls off the speed on the fence 1200 M out, niggled along at the 800 M, 2-wide and hard ridden when 7Ls down and detached entering straight, weakened further.
Had the box-seat run on the fence 2Ls off the speed in 3rd spot until home straight, unable to quicken and 3Ls down 200 M out, stayed on at the one-pace thereafter.
On fence 4Ls off the speed in 8th 1100 M out, 3-wide into stretch when 3Ls off the speed, every chance when 1L off speed in 3rd 200 M out, unable to sustain challenge.
Slowly away, driven early to race prominently, disputed lead on fence from 800 M out to home straight, soon under pressure and faded through final 200 M.
On fence 8Ls off pace in 11th 1100 M out, headway to be 3Ls down travelling well in midfield off home turn, picked up to be 2Ls down at the 200 M, kept finding, couldn't overhaul winner.
2-wide and 3Ls off the speed in 3rd place at the 1000 M, similarly placed but in 7th place from about 800 M out, under pressure to hold position entering straight, faded out.
Slowly away, in last place about 11Ls off the speed 1000 M out, 7Ls down at top of home straight and still in rear, moderate headway to be 5Ls down at the 200 M, no extra.
3-wide and 8Ls off pace 1100 M out, towards rear when no better than 6Ls off the speed and 3-wide at top of home straight, never able to challenge.
Crossed from wide gate to be 2-wide 1L off speed in 3rd place from 1200 M out to home straight, shaken up to lead 250 M out, driven out to score.
Never travelled well, niggled along when 3-wide and 10Ls off pace towards rear down back straight, 4-wide and 6Ls down entering straight, beaten over 200 M out.
Prominent when 3-wide and 3Ls off the speed 1100 M out, 3-wide with cover and 3Ls off pace in 5th place 800 M out, 4-wide into stretch, unable to quicken and soon beaten.
Keen in places, towards rear on fence 10Ls off pace 1000 M out, 2-wide into stretch when 5Ls off the lead, still worse than midfield when about 4Ls down at the 200 M, never dangerous.
On fence 3Ls off pace in 3rd place 1200 M out, similarly placed but in 6th place at the 800 M, under pressure when 2Ls down entering straight, unable to quicken, kept on gamely nonetheless.
Crossed from wide gate to dispute lead out 2-wide at the 1200 M, still disputing lead entering straight, brief lead 300 M out, headed by winner at the 250 M, kept on well to hang on for a place.
2-wide and 7Ls off speed in 9th 1100 M out, went 4-wide without cover 600 M out when 4Ls off pace, picked up well to be 2Ls off lead with place chances at least 200 M out, no extra.
Awkwardly away, advanced from midfield to be 3-wide without cover and 2Ls off the pace in 3rd or 4th 1100 M out, 4-wide and still prominent into straight, found nothing under pressure.
Made all to win comfortably.
Last virtually to straight where he made up some good ground.
Always there. Kept on without threatening winner.
About 5th or 6th into home bend and failed to hold place coming into straight.
Prominent to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Never troubled leaders.
Midfield rounding home bend and was about 4th passing 400 M. Improved to be 3rd 200 M and could make no further progress after.
Made no show.
Settled in rear and was 2nd last to straight. Never nearer.
Never seen with a chance.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear of main group turning for home. Found nothing when asked.
Never far off to straight where he kept on same pace.
Soon improved towards leaders and was 3rd or 4th rounding home bend. Unable quicken under pressure.
Soon led. Headed final turn. Kept on until weakened closing stages. (Blood in trachea.)
Behind midfield. Checked approaching 800 M. One-paced.
Towards rear. Gradual progress from 1st turn to be midfield turning in. Sustained effort to win narrowly in a ding-dong battle closing stages.
Slowly away, last early. Made ground from 2nd last 300 M, never nearer.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Made no show in straight. Wide throughout.
Prominent. Ran on in straight, doing best work final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Slightly behind midfield. Some improvement rounding home bend. 3-wide 5th final turn. Made up further ground from outside, never nearer.
Well there. Severely checked approaching 800 M, dropping to behind midfield. Faded in straight.
Never a factor.
Well there. Dropped back a bit to be 2Ls 4th final turn. Found no extra 250 M.
Midfield. Soon improved to a prominent position. Came to tackle leader 400 M. Held narrow lead in straight until headed final 100 M.
Never far off. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Well there. Hit front 200 M out then hung on dourly to finish.
Midfield into straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Hard ridden for pace early. Prominent before steadied to midfield approaching home bend. Dropped out upon straightening.
Towards rear till made modest progress down straight.
Always thereabouts. Fought on to miss 3rd place narrowly.
Never nearer. Produced late impression closing stages.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Always in last few.
Held slender lead most of way to 200 M then headed.
Soon outpaced.
Well there with brief lead rounding home bend. Dropped out in straight.
Near rear from a wide draw. Remained there until making up good ground from outside in straight.
Never in contention.
Well there. Tracked the winner to home turn. Soon faded.
Behind midfield from widest draw. 4-wide in midfield early straight. Soon weakened.
Midfield throughout.
Raced along from a wide draw to take lead from 1300 M. Held 3Ls advantage early straight. Just able to resist runner-up's challenge closing stages. (Finished distressed.)
In touch on inside. Weakened final 150 M. (Mucus in trachea.)
Rear. Made up some ground in straight.
In touch. 4th or 5th to straight. Kept on well until finding no extra closing stages.
Was 5th before dropping to midfield far side. Made no show in straight. (Blood in trachea.)
Behind midfield. Ran on well final 250 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Towards rear. Made up good ground 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Made progress far side to be 2nd final turn. Held on until failing to hold place passing 200 M.
Slowly away, near rear. Ran on well soon after straightening, just missing a minor placing.
Never far off to straight then gradually faded.
Wide throughout. Towards rear early. Made headway out wide far side. Dropped out before home turn.
Held slender lead to home bend. Weakened into straight.
Rear. Made steady progress between runners in straight.
Chased leader to straight. Weakened.
Midfield. In last few turning for home. Ran on steadily to claim remote 6th.
Tracked leaders. Quickened well upon straightening to assert authority over 200 M out.
Last to straight. Ran past beaten horses.
Prominent. Led into straight, but soon headed over 200 M out.
Behind midfield. Quickened to reach 3rd shortly after straightening. Sustained progress closing stages without ever catching first two.
Held up in midfield. Faded under pressure in straight.
Blundered shortly after start. Towards rear most of way.
Settled in last few. Commenced move turning in. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Midfield throughout. Kept on one pace without quickening.

Began awkwardly and pushed along to race in worse than midfield 3-wide. Switched out and pushed along to go forward at home bend. Ran on fairly in straight but was never in position to trouble the placegetters.

Jumped fairly and niggled along to race around 3Ls off pace 2-wide. Switched out and made steady improvement at home bend. Ran on well when asked 350 M out and overpowered the 2nd placegetter near the line.
Jumped well and raced in prominent position 2-wide through to straight. Kept on well when asked 350 M out, inside the final 100 M was inconvenienced and missed the 2nd placegetter by a short margin.
Slowly away and soon raced at the tail on rail. Made up little ground turning for home. Under pressure 350 M out and made up good ground inside final 200 M.
Soon settled in rear section on inner and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Remained in similar position to straight. Found nothing in straight and stayed same pace to the line.
Niggled along to race in mid-division around 3-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on evenly to the line.

Began well and niggled along to lead on rail with around 1/2L advantage from 1200 M through to straight. Ran on well and hung out in straight. Unable to fend off challenge from winner to be overhauled near the line.
Soon raced in midfield on rail through to straight. Only kept on one-paced in straight and further weakened over the concluding stages.
Began well and niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Stayed one-pace when asked 350 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Raced in mid-division out wide without cover. Under pressure to hold position at home bend. Gave ground quickly in straight and tailed out.

Raced in better than midfield in the early stages. From 1100 M steadily went forward to race outside the leader. Commenced to lose ground on straightening and weakened badly inside final 300 M. (Lame in left hind leg.)
Tardy start and raced in rear section towards the outside through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made up steady ground to be closest at finish.

Raced in worse than midfield on rail in the early stages. Steadily dropped to rear section at back straight through to home straight. Responded fairly when asked 250 M out and made up some ground inside final 250 M.
Slowly away, driven early, in rear 12Ls off pace 1400 M out and 800 M out, one from rear when 10Ls down on the swing, kept on fairly, never nearer.
Crossed to fence in midfield 5Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4Ls down on the fence turning for home, outpaced but still battled on gamely to nick 3rd place on the line.
Bumped at start, 2-wide and 6Ls down 1200 M out in midfield, 3-wide and 3Ls down in 3rd place into stretch, 2Ls down in 2nd place 200 M out, no extra and lost 3rd place on line.
2-wide and 8Ls off the pace towards rear 1200 M out, 6Ls down and still worse than midfield entering straight, kept on at the same pace.
Raced freely in the lead by 1L 1400 M out, headed by ACME OF SURPRISE 1000 M out, weakened from 800 M out, beaten well before turning for home.
Settled 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace in 4th spot at the 1200 M, advanced to dispute lead from 1000 M out, under pressure when headed by BOLD VISION entering straight, faded.
Crossed to be 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd place 1400 M out, 2-wide and 3Ls off the pace at the 800 M, led at top of home straight, 2Ls up 200 M out, caught close home.
Never really landed a blow, on fence towards rear 6Ls off the pace 1200 M out, 8Ls down at the 800 M, under pressure to lie up entering straight, faded.
Bumped at the start, one from rear on fence 10Ls off the pace 1200 M out, raced on and off the bridle, improving out 5-wide and 6Ls off pace entering straight, nearest at finish.
3-wide and 3Ls off the pace in 5th place 1200 M out, 4Ls down in 4th at the 800 M out, 3Ls down in 3rd when 2-wide entering straight, one-paced on the run-in.
Towards rear when 3-wide and 6Ls off the pace at the 1200 M, 8Ls down at the 800 M, 4-wide into straight and 4Ls down, 2Ls down at the 200 M, kept on well to lead close home.
Had the run of the race 2Ls off the pace on the fence 1200 M out in 4th place, unbalanced at the 1100 M, steadily lost position and was last entering the straight, no chance.
Always caught 3 and 4-wide without cover, 6Ls off the pace in midfield at the 1200 M and 800 M, 4Ls down into home straight but under pressure, weakened steadily.
Began fairly and raced close to pace until final 200M. Weakened thereafter.
Niggled along to travel near midfield early. Steadily improved its position near the outside fence. Within 2Ls off leader 400M out. Kept on well final stages without threatening winner.
Jumped slowly and raced near rear until being ridden hard final 400M. Responded well final stages and just missed a minor placing.
Jumped awkwardly and settled just behind midfield. Within 2Ls of leader when being asked at 400M but was unable to quicken much final stages.
Began fairly and travelled near inside fence around midfield. Moved steadily towards middle of track and about 3Ls behind pace at 400M. One-paced to line.
Broke fairly and soon raced near midfield. Remained in similar position within 3Ls of leader at halfway mark. Ridden hard and kept on fairly final stages.
Soon raced by itself along the inside fence just off pace. Remained on inside fence and within 1/2L at 400M. One-paced to line thereafter.
Broke well and led briefly in the early stages. Travelled towards the middle part of the track. Disputed lead around 400M. Unable to keep up with winner after 200M.
Slowly away and raced near inside fence behind midfield early. Moved across to centre of track and was within 3Ls of leader 400M out. Kept on one-paced and unable to get any closer.
Jumped well and raced near the pace in early stages. Travelled well near outer fence and pulled clear final 200M. Never challenged thereafter and won comfortably.
Slowly away and soon travelled near rear. Unable to improve position at any stage of the race.
Near rear on the inside part of the track early on. Shifted across and niggled along to be closer to the outside fence and about 3Ls down 400M out. Didn't pick up final stages.
Began well and raced for disputed lead until final 400M. Unable to quicken and was one-paced to line.
Always in rear through to home straight at least 9Ls or 10Ls off the pace, 7Ls down at the 200 M, stayed on fairly, never nearer.
3-wide and about 6Ls off the speed in midfield down back straight, caught 4-wide into home straight when 7Ls down, no impression.
About 9Ls off the pace when one from rear 800 M out, similarly placed turning for home, 6Ls down 200 M out, nearest at the finish.
Disputed lead from 1100 M on fence through to home straight, faded markedly through final 300 M.
2-wide and 6Ls off the speed at the 1000 M, driven along when 7Ls down and 2-wide into home straight, never got into it. (See Racing Incidents.)
Best away, vied for lead out 3-wide without cover until 500 M out, weakened steadily thereafter.
In midfield 6Ls off the speed down the back, still 5Ls down off home turn and 200 M out, kept on to nick 3rd place on the line.
Kept within 3Ls of leading trio through to 600 M out, carried head awkwardly, dropped out tamely in home straight.
Slowly away, got well back at least 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, no better off on straightening, made no impression whatsoever in the stretch. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in 5th place on fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace through to home straight, 3Ls down in 4th spot turning for home, 2Ls down in 2nd place 200 M out, kept on strongly, just failed.
Disputed lead out 2-wide through to home straight when travelling well, shot 2Ls clear at top of home straight, all out to just hang on.
2 and 3-wide from back to home straight when about 5Ls off pace in midfield, staying on when 4Ls down at the 200 M, in 3rd place at the 100 M, faded and lost 3rd place on the line.
Midfield. Kept on without quickening inside 200 M.
In touch. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily 400 M to grab 3rd near finish. (Hung out.)
Slowly away, behind midfield. Steady progress halfway to reach 2nd passing 200 M. Kept on without threatening.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Held 5th to course proper. Faded. (Mucus in trachea.)
Made all. Won going away.
Held 3rd to 400 M. Soon weakened.
Prominent. Kept on but lost a minor placing final strides.
Well there. Shared pace into straight and soon drew clear by 1-1/2Ls but collared close to home.
Midfield to straight and faded.
Tailed off throughout.
Mainly in midfield. Wide into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Soon dropped to rear but produced good late impression closing stages.
Squeezed out at start. Remained rear and in last few when no room early in straight. Obtained clear run out wide over 200 M out and ran on steadily.
Ridden to hold slender advantage far side before overhauled approaching home bend. Dropped out from prominent position after 400 M.
Sluggish at start. Soon in rear of field. Improved steadily through field to assert authority close to home.
Contested lead far side. Squeezed out onto midfield coming out of back straight. Ran home one-paced.
Mostly in forward of midfield to straight, then faded.
Caught wide far side. Well there with brief lead turning for home. Soon overhauled.
Never far off. Found no room behind runners early in straight then ran on steadily till no extra closing stages.
Never in contention. (Bled.)
Mostly in midfield. Did not find much room the length of straight.
Joint lead early stages, sat outside leader to 250 M. Soon faded.
Midfield to final turn. Dropped out.
Slowly away, towards rear. Kept on final 300 M.
Towards rear. Last turning in. Ran past a few beaten horses 250 M.
Never better than midfield.
Towards rear early, soon recovered some ground to be in midfield. Crept closer to 4th on straightening. Ran on to take control passing 200 M.
Led field soon after start. With 1L advantage 200 M out. Failed to quicken when headed 150 M.
Towards rear. Steady progress home bend to be 5th final turn. Kept on but just missed a minor placing.
Near rear. Crept closer to midfield on inside final turn. Ran on quite well final 200 M.
Towards rear. Dropped to last 950 M. Made up good ground inside 250 M.
Began awkwardly, soon recovered ground to be 3rd from 1200 M. Weakened out of contention final 250 M.
In touch. Dropped back steadily passing 500 M. Checked approaching 200 M. No recovery.
In touch from a wide draw, soon dropped to behind midfield. Recovered a little late ground on outside final 200 M.
Slightly better than midfield. 4-wide turning in. Ran on under pressure but failed to reach the winner.
Midfield. Lost some ground turning in but produced late impression closing stages.
Ridden then settled in prominent position mostly in 5th. Ran on down straight without threatening.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Lost position turning in. Made up late ground to reach 3rd late.
Broke well and settled in 3rd behind leaders. Held some chance between runners early in straight but faded out of contention inside 200 M.
Well there to straight. No extra final 200 M.
Trailed the field till running on past beaten horses final 200 M.
Made no show.
Midfield till dropped out abruptly final 200 M. (Distressed.)
Led to 200 M. No extra.
Never better than midfield.
Last few throughout.
Held up in forward of midfield. Quickened well from 4th into straight to take charge over 150 M out.
Soon raced in rear section 2 wide through to straight. Made no impression in straight and hung out over the concluding stages.
Raced in worse than midfield 3 wide through to straight. Had trouble obtaining clear running in early part of straight. Only ran on evenly to the line when clear running was obtained 350 M out.
Pushed along to race in a forward position on rail. Took lead after 400 M and ran home strongly thereafter to win comfortably.
Began well but soon eased to race at back on rail. Shortly after the 1200 M became detached and found nothing in the straight. (Stiff in both hind legs.)
Slow to begin and pushed along to race in midfield out wide without cover. Went forward at home bend to race in better than midfield. Found nothing in straight and weakened badly after 300 M.

Began well and shared lead in the early stages. Took outright lead after 1200 M with no more than 2Ls advantage through to straight. Headed at 400 M and only able to keep on evenly to line thereafter.
Began fairly and soon settled in worse than midfield on fence through to straight. Made up good ground when asked 350 M out but unable to find extra to trouble the winner.
Jumped awkwardly and niggled along to race in mid-division towards the outside. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and dropped out 300 M out.
Tardy start and raced in rear section on fence through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Began awkwardly and raced in rear section 3 wide. Switched wide on straightening and stayed one-pace to the line when asked 300 M out.
Began well from wide draw and soon eased to race in midfield around 3 wide. Switched out on straightening and made up some ground over the concluding stages to be closest at finish.
Jumped fairly and soon raced in mid-division on rail through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and doing best work inside final 200 M to hang onto 3rd place.
Settled in mid-division or better 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 600 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Kept on well when asked 400 M out and missed the 3rd placegetter by a short margin.
Raced freely early on, led by half a length on fence 1200 M out, 2Ls clear at the 1000 M, headed 800 M out, under pressure turning for home, dropped out tamely.
On fence 5Ls off pace in midfield 1200 M out, niggled along 800 M out in same position, 4Ls down off home turn, briefly threatened to run a place but was much too one-paced final 200 M.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 3Ls down in 5th spot 1200 M out, similarly placed into home straight, unable to quicken.
On fence in rear group 10Ls off pace 1200 M out, 2-wide into home straight when 6Ls off pace and still towards rear, no impression.

2Ls off pace in 3rd out 3-wide without cover 1200 M out, led at the 800 M, 2-wide and half a length up entering straight, headed 300 M out, one-paced through closing stages and lost 3rd spot 100 M out.
Bounded at start, 3-wide and 4-wide and about 9Ls off pace towards rear down back straight, detached entering straight, never looked like getting involved.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 5Ls off lead in midfield from 1200 M out to 800 M, 3-wide and 3Ls down into stretch, never able to challenge.
Towards rear when 8Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, 4-wide into home stretch when 5Ls down, never troubled leaders.
In rear out 2-wide and 11Ls off pace 1200 M out, hard driven 700 M out to take close order, 4-wide and 9Ls down entering stretch, dropped out.
Caught 4-wide without cover 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, improved to be 5-wide and within 1L of pace, vied for lead with winner from 300 M to 100 M, no extra close home.
3-wide with cover and 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in about 6th down back straight, 4-wide into home straight and less than 1L off pace, disputing lead from 300 M to 100 M, asserted through final 70 M.
Settled 2-wide half a length off pace in 2nd place 1200 M out, in 3rd place 1L down from 800 M out to home straight, faded steadily.
About 2Ls or 3Ls off pace down back stretch on fence and better than midfield, 2Ls down in 4th or 5th place turning for home, lost touch thereafter.
Settled on fence 11Ls off pace in rear 1100 M out, 3-wide into home stretch, when 5Ls down towards rear, ran on well, never nearer.
2-wide and 4Ls down 1200 M out in midfield, 5-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, loomed up 1L off pace at the 200 M with every chance, ran on well, just failed to collar quinella pair.
3-wide and 4-wide without cover towards rear down back straight when about 4Ls off pace, lost position from 600 M out, well adrift turning for home, no chance.
Caught 4-wide racing freely 5Ls off pace at the 1200 M, dropped in 3-wide and 6Ls down at the 800 M, 4-wide into straight, quickened up well to be just over 1L down at the 200 M, no extra.
Had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace through to home straight, on terms and with every chance 300 M out, ran on strongly but couldn't overhaul winner.
Slowly away, on fence 8Ls off pace 1000 M out when in rear, detached entering straight, never a factor.
Raced a little keenly early on, 2Ls off pace and 3-wide 1200 M out in midfield, well there and travelling smoothly entering straight, outpaced from 300 M out.
In 2nd place half a length or less off the speed and 2-wide until home straight, led briefly from 400 M to 250 M, faded out thereafter.
Led by half a length on fence 1200 M out, still in front but hanging out entering straight, headed briefly about 400 M out, led again 250 M out, hung on gamely under severe pressure.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace 1200 M out in midfield, 2Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, every chance 200 M out when 1L down, kept on well, couldn't grab principals.
2Ls off speed when 4-wide 1200 M out, took closer order in 3rd place 800 M out, still well there when 4-wide into home straight, faded steadily.
On fence 4Ls off pace 1200 M out, 2-wide and 3Ls down on the swing, 3Ls down 200 M out, never troubled leaders.
Slowly away, very keen when 2-wide and 5Ls down 1200 M out, advanced to be 4-wide without cover and 2Ls off pace in 5th 800 M out, 5-wide entering stretch, soon beaten.
On fence 5Ls off pace towards rear down the back straight, 4Ls down and driven along entering straight, all out to be 2Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 5th spot 1200 M out, niggled along 600 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down into home straight, kept on well under pressure, nearest at the finish.
3-wide and 4Ls off the speed 1200 M out in 6th place, 4-wide into home straight when in 5th place, just over 2Ls down and with good place prospects 200 M out, weakened through final 100 M.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 6Ls off the speed 1100 M out in midfield, 3-wide and 5Ls down into home stretch, always too one-paced.
3-wide and 6Ls off speed 1100 M out in 9th place, 4-wide into home straight when still 6Ls off the speed, never threatened.
Slowly away, towards rear about 9Ls off the speed down back straight, 3-wide into home straight when 7Ls off pace, 5Ls down at the 200 M, ran on fairly, nearest at the finish.
Caught 4-wide without cover down the back straight when about 7Ls off pace, detached and struggling when 4-wide into home straight, dropped out further.
In rear at least 12Ls off the speed down the back straight, 8Ls down at top of home straight, never troubled leaders.
2 and 3-wide and at least 11Ls off pace 1000 M out, driven along 700 M out, 3-wide into straight and 9Ls down, 5Ls down 200 M out, kept on strongly close home, post came too soon.
Soon led, never clear by much more than 2Ls down the back straight, headed at top of home straight, faded out and eased down.
Towards rear when about 8Ls off the pace through to 600 M out, closer entering straight, ran on well to be 3Ls down in 5th place 200 M out, won 3rd place close home.
Bumped at the start, raced 2-wide and 2Ls off the speed from 1200 M out in 3rd place, under pressure to lie up from 800 M out, 4Ls down off home bend, gave ground through final 200 M.
Settled in 2nd place about 2Ls off the pace until 600 M out, led at the top of the home straight, headed by winner over 100 M out, swamped by pursuers closing stages.
On fence 3Ls off pace in 4th place until 600 M out, 2Ls down in 3rd entering straight, 1L down in 2nd place 200 M out, led about 120 M out, driven out.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 7th place 1200 M out, unbalanced at the 800 M, 5Ls down and 2-wide into home stretch, never able to challenge.
3-wide and 6Ls off the speed in midfield 1000 M out, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 6Ls off the speed, ran on fairly to be nearest at the finish.
On fence about 2Ls or 3Ls off speed until 1000 M out in 5th place, 2-wide and 2Ls down in 3rd into home straight, led 200 M out, kept on well.
Bumped and checked at the start, keen but restrained to sit 2-wide and 8Ls off the speed in rear 1000 M out, 6Ls down in rear off home turn, no impression.
Slowly away, very keen when 4-wide and 3Ls off the speed in 6th 1000 M out, advanced to lead by 3Ls on the fence at the 800 M, disputing lead at top of home straight, dropped out.
2-wide and 6Ls off the speed towards rear 1000 M out, 5Ls down and one from the rear at top of home straight, never able to challenge.
Bumped and checked at the start, on fence 8Ls off pace in rear 1000 M out, 4Ls down on fence entering straight, 2Ls down and with place prospects 200 M out, no extra.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 7th place 1000 M out, 4-wide into home straight when still 4Ls off the pace, 1L down in 3rd place at the 200 M, ran on well but couldn't overhaul winner.
In 3rd place 1L off the speed on fence 1000 M out, left in clear 2nd place 3Ls off the pace 700 M out, led 300 M out, headed by winner at the 200 M, no extra.
3-wide and a neck off the speed in 2nd place 1000 M out, in 4th place 4Ls off the speed 800 M out, still just 3Ls down entering straight, all out to be 2Ls down at the 200 M, weakened.
Led by a neck out 2-wide 1000 M out, clear 3rd 2-wide and over 3Ls off the speed 700 M out, 3-wide and 2Ls down entering straight, very one-paced thereafter.
On fence 6Ls off pace in 8th place 1000 M out, 4Ls down taking closer order turning for home, 2Ls down vying for 3rd place 200 M out, stayed on well closing stages for a place.
2-wide and 3Ls off the speed in 5th place 1000 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down off home turn, one-paced to line.
Settled in rear and was last turning into straight. Came with strong run final 250 M to snatch race last stride.
Pulled hard in 5th 1000 M and found nothing when asked 300 M.
Never troubled leaders.
Never a factor.
Midfield rounding home bend. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Soon took up running and led till headed passing 400 M. Faded and dropped out from 300 M.
Towards rear till making up some ground close home.
Slightly worse than midfield 1/2 way. Plugged on under pressure final 200 M.
About 9th into home bend and 7th on straightening. Kept on well final 250 M.
Never far off to straight where he kept on to the 200 M. Found no extra.
Never on terms despite improving a bit inside final 200 M.
Well there before failing to hold place shortly on straightening.
In touch into straight when he dropped out steadily. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always prominent. Took command passing 400 M and looked winner when 2-1/2Ls clear 200 M. Just caught short of line.
In touch. Improved along rail to be 2nd from 1000 M. Joined the lead final turn and took over at 200 M. Held on well.
Midfield or better. One-paced.
Near rear. Crept a bit closer final turn. Kept on steadily in straight.
Behind midfield. Unable to make any progress in straight.
Led briefly early, settling 4th. Improved to 3rd 600 M. Kept on early straight until one-paced closing stages.
Last early stages. Made some progress far side to be 7th turning in. Ran on quite well 200 M but without threatening.
Towards rear. Soon made gradual advancement to be 5th 600 M. Insufficient daylight early straight. Ran on when in clear.
Took lead passing 1000 M. Was joined final turn. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
Well there. 4th passing 600 M. Kept on but checked 100 M when weakening.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent briefly early, soon dropped to behind midfield. Last from 400 M. (Wide without cover throughout.)
Midfield early, soon dropped to the rear group. No progress.
Wide in midfield throughout. One-paced.
Behind midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Always in rear. Ran past beaten horses closing stages.
Well back. Ran on past beaten horses in straight.
Around midfield. Commenced move turning in. Took charge over 150 M out. Readily.
Tracked leader on rails. Caught behind runners in box seat the length of straight.
Showed early place and took up running from widest draw. Led till swamped over 100 M out.
Well back. Made significant progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Stalked leader. Came to challenge upon straightening but found eventual winner too good.
Forward of midfield before dropped out in straight.
Towards rear. Shifted out for a run upon straightening and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Prominent. Held 3rd far side. Moved up to tackle leader 450 M. Weakened out of contention inside 200 M.
Slowly away, 2nd last to 600 M. Ran on well from 8th early straight to take command close home. Won well.
Never able to feature.
Midfield. Dropped to the rear group when crowded passing 600 M. Steadied 300 M. Stayed on a bit inside 200 M.
In the front early. 2nd from 1300 M. Weakened from 3rd final turn.
Always thereabout. Kept on well in straight to reach 2nd 200 M, failed to quicken closing stages.
In touch. Weakened 200 M.
Well there. Took lead from 1300 M. Faded when headed near 250 M. (Lame.)
Behind midfield from widest draw. Given reminders early straight. Made up some ground 250 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Moved up a bit from outside 800 M to be midfield 600 M out. Responded well final turn to take lead 250 M. Headed and lost 2nd close home.
Midfield. Dropped towards the rear when checked near 800 M. Only recovered some late ground closing stages.
Flat-footed at start, last to 450 M. Made up significant ground from outside final 250 M to grab 2nd near finish.
Midfield. Went wide into straight. Only produced moderate headway and never threatening.
Midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Attempted to make all. Hung on well under pressure but caught in the shadows of the post.
Always in last few.
Well back. Produced good late run down inner of straight.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield to straight then dropped out.
Midfield to straight. Ran on without threatening.
Chased leader. Failed to quicken to challenge upon straightening and faded closing stages.
Midfield. Ran on final stages to just get up on line.
Tardy start and soon raced in mid-division 2-wide. Near the 1200 M was steadied when awkwarded on heels. Made little improvement at home bend. Kept on evenly and raced tight throughout the straight.
Hard ridden to race in a forward position on rail through to straight. Found nothing in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Niggled along to race outside the leader in the early stages. Steadily eased to race in better than midfield at back straight. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and further weakened over the concluding stages.

Slow to begin and raced in rear section 2-wide. Near the 1200 M went forward from the outside to be in midfield at back straight without cover. Ran on fairly and hung in in straight, missed the 3rd placegetter by a short margin.
Settled in midfield or worse on rail. For some distance after the 400 M was held up for running. Made no impression in the straight.

Niggled along to race in better than midfield on fence through to straight. Responded fairly when asked 250 M out but had trouble obtaining a clear run over a concluding stages and was not ridden out to the line.

Raced towards the rear 3-wide and checked near the 1200 M when awkwarded on heels. Made improvement at home bend and steadied at 400 M. Took a while to get going in straight and made up a little ground in the final stages.

Jumped well from wide draw but soon eased to race at back on inner. Near 1200 M was checked when closed to heels. Switched out and made steady improvement at home bend. Made up steady ground in straight to grab 2nd place near the line

Raced in a forward position in the early stages. Steadily eased to race 2 to 3Ls off leader 2-wide passing winning post 1st time. Under pressure to go forward at home bend and found the line well in straight to win convincingly.

Raced in midfield in the early stages. Near the 1200 M went forward to join the leading pack. Placed under pressure at home bend and kept on well in straight, only to be caught by the 2nd placegetter near the line.

Slowly away. Raced in midfield or worse on rail and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Steadily dropped to the rear section after 1400 M. Blocked from 250 M to 100 M. Made up little ground thereafter.
6Ls off pace and one from rear 1200 M out, 7Ls down at the 800 M out, 5Ls down entering straight, disappointed for running when staying at the one pace on 200 M out, didn't recover.
On fence 5Ls off pace 1200 M out in 7th place, still 7th but only 3Ls off pace on inner entering straight, still 3Ls down 200 M out, stayed on well close home, nearest finish.
Couldn't lead and sat 2-wide half a length behind REWARD through to home straight when under pressure, dropped out tamely thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
2-wide and 3Ls off pace 1200 M out in 4th, forced 3-wide and about 2Ls off the speed on the circle, 2Ls down and disputing 2nd place 200 M out, no extra.
Settled in rear 7Ls off pace 1200 M out, still in rear when 4-wide and 5Ls off pace entering home straight, no impression.
Crowded at the jump, pulled up immediately. (See Racing Incidents.) (Lame.)
3-wide and 3Ls off pace in 6th 1200 M out, 5Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, 2Ls down and disputing 2nd place 200 M out, kept on well to lead close home.
Soon led, got to fence 1100 M out, never clear by more than half a length, still narrowly ahead entering straight, headed 250 M out, faded.
On fence 1L off pace in 3rd 1200 M out, about 2Ls off speed in 3rd down back straight, 3-wide into stretch when 1L off speed, led 250 M out, kept on, caught final strides.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 8th 1200 M out, 6Ls down at 800 M, still 8th when 3-wide into home straight and 4Ls off pace, 3Ls down 200 M out, finished off strongly.
On fence 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, 4Ls down in 5th 800 M out, travelled well entering straight 2Ls off pace, held up for a run until 200 M out, one-paced once in the clear.
Jumped awkwardly and was difficult to settle early. Raced 2-wide near midfield until 600M out. Only one-paced to line.

Jumped awkwardly but soon raced 2-wide just behind pace. Never more than 3Ls behind pace in back straight. Commenced its run 400M out and took control final 250M. Just held on final strides to deny challenger.
Eased back early to race on fence in rear section. Commenced its run 500M but unable to get much closer final stages.
Soon led on fence. Remained on lead by no more than 2Ls until challenged by winner entering home straight. Ran on well but was unable to match stride with winner final stages.
Soon raced in prominent position. Always within 4Ls of leader in back straight. Improved along fence rounding home turn. Kept on without threatening.
Soon settled 2-wide just behind midfield and travelled nicely until being pressured at 400M. Charged home impressively in the straight but fell just short of catching the winner.
Soon raced in last place and was niggled along to keep up with field. All out at 400M and was unable to quicken.
Settled on fence at midfield until being put under pressure final 300M. Kept on well but was unable to gain much ground on winner.
Soon raced 2-wide near rear. Remained in similar position throughout home turn. Made no impression in straight.
On fence 5Ls off speed 800 M out, 3Ls down on the fence entering straight in midfield, still 3Ls down at the 200 M, couldn't get any closer.
Caught 4-wide without cover towards rear when 6Ls off pace 800 M out, 7-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 4Ls off pace and still towards rear, 3Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
In rear about 7Ls or 8Ls off pace down back straight, 4-wide into home straight when still rear and 5Ls down, 2Ls down at the 200 M, led 100 M out, driven out.
Disputed lead out 2-wide until 900 M out, 1L off pace 600 M out, 3-wide into home straight and disputing lead again, all out to be a close 2nd at the 200 M, no extra.
Disputed lead out 3-wide until 900 M out, 1L off pace 600 M out, 3-wide into home straight and disputing lead again, headed 100 M out, no extra close home. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, unbalanced at the 1000 M, 3-wide and 6Ls off pace 800 M when towards rear, 6-wide into home straight when 3Ls off the speed, no impression thereafter.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th place 800 M out, closer when 3-wide into home straight, soon weakened.
Settled one from rear about 7Ls or 8Ls off pace down back straight, 3-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, bumped at 200 M out, ran on well but had no chance with winner.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th place 800 M out, 2-wide into stretch when 1L off pace in 3rd and with every chance, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on again well close home.
2-wide and 4Ls off the pace at 800 M out, 5-wide and 3Ls off the pace entering straight, still about 6th about 2Ls off pace when bumped 200 M out, one-paced to line.
Slowly away, 3-wide and 4Ls off the speed 800 M out, 3-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th entering straight, all out to be 2Ls off pace in 3rd place 200 M out, fading when checked 100 M out.
Disputed lead on fence until 900 M out, clear lead by 1L until 500 M out, disputing lead again entering straight, dropped out tamely upon straightening. (Heart Irregularity.)
Never in the hunt.
Slightly slowly away, pushed along to be 4th 1200 M. Dropped back rounding home bend to behind midfield. Faded in straight.
Better than midfield. Improved rounding home bend to be 3rd 600 M. Sustained effort to take command 300 M. Won readily.
Led early. Raced 3rd from 1200 M. Steady progress passing 800 M to regain advantage final turn. Unable to match with winner when headed 300 M.
Towards rear. Made up some ground final 300 M.
Began awkwardly, remained at rear. Stayed on in straight.
Raced 7th to 600 M. Moved up to be 4-wide 5th turning in. Stayed on to take 3rd 150 M.
Prominent. Took lead from 1200 M to final turn. Weakened from 3rd inside 150 M.
Well there. With the leader briefly approaching 1200 M. Held 2nd to 700 M. Soon weakened.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Never better than midfield. Found nothing in straight.
3-wide in prominent position to straight. No extra.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Slowly away. Raced towards rear most of way.
Settled in midfield. Moved up to lead over 200 M out and soon draw clear.
Midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Well back to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Midfield into straight. Quickened well to challenge but unable to match pace of winner.
Led till headed approaching home turn. Dropped out upon straightening. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Dropped out in straight. (Significant amount of blood and mucus in trachea.)
Behind midfield. Kept on same pace under pressure in straight.
Refused to settle and raced outside leader before taking over approaching home turn. Swamped over 200 M out.
Behind midfield. Checked approaching 200 M. Recovered good ground closing stages.
Around midfield. Ran on well under pressure inside 250 M.
Prominent. Took lead from 600 M to 200 M. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Midfield. Dropped out 300 M.
Prominent. Held some chance 200 M out. One-paced close home.
Last. Made up considerable ground 200 M.
Near the front to course proper. Faded out of contention 200 M out.
In touch to halfway. Dropped out.
Began awkwardly, near rear. Ran on very well 400 M to take control passing 200 M. Won comfortably.
Midfield. Steady progress halfway to be 4th passing 200 M. Weakened close home.
In touch on the inner rail. Found no extra closing stages.
Midfield. Kept on solidly final 250 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. 2nd last course proper. Ran on well final 250 M.
In touch early, soon dropped to midfield or behind. One-paced.
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Led to straight. Soon weakened.
Trailed field into straight. Finished off race well.
Wide in midfield. Made moderate progress early in straight but could find no extra closing stages.
Prominent to 200 M. Dropped out.
Amongst leaders turning in then soon dropped out.
Settled in midfield. No clear passage early in straight then produced good late impression closing stages.
Prominent. No room early in straight then ran home one-paced.
Wide towards rear. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Midfield far side. Took slender lead into straight. Soon weakened and overhauled.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield. Came to challenge early in straight but had no more to give final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Quickened to take charge shortly after straightening then hung on well.
Settled in last few. Made up a lot of ground down straight to be nearest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section on rail. Switched out on straightening and made up little ground in early part of straight but became one-pace shortly after the 200 M mark.
Niggled along to race in worse than midfield 2 wide. Switched wide to find clear running on straightening. Crowded for room at 300 M and kept on evenly to the line thereafter.
On jumping bounded in the air and pushed along to race in midfield 3 wide. In the early stages proved difficult to settle. Unable to quicken in straight and stayed one-paced to the line.
Broke fairly and soon raced in better than midfield 3 wide through to straight. Kept on well when asked 350 M out but was overpowered by 3rd placegetter near the line to settle for 4th place.

Unable to muster early speed to race in worse than midfield on fence. Ridden along at home bend to maintain position and switched out on straightening. Steadied at 300 M when disappointed for running and failed to quicken thereafter.
Soon settled in rear section around 2 wide. Shifted out to find running on straightening, unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Jumped well and pushed along to take lead on rail through to straight. Soon headed after the 400 M and steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to race in midfield 2 wide. Under pressure at latter part of home bend to maintain position. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Slow to begin and raced in midfield or worse out wide without cover. Ridden along to go forward turning for home. No extra in straight and kept on evenly to the line. (After the horse was found to be distressed.)
Jumped well and soon raced in midfield or better on rail. Under pressure to hold position turning for home. Found nothing in straight and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly from wide draw and was soon eased to the rear section closer to rail through to straight. Made no impression in the straight.
Began well and raced around 2Ls off leader 2 wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out and took charge final 100 M to win convincingly.

Began well from wide draw and soon eased to the back but closer to rail. Made steady improvement from the outside at home bend. Under pressure 350 M out and made up good ground inside final 200 M to grab 3rd place on the line.

Jumped well and raced in prominent position 2 wide. Went forward to join leader at home bend. Took lead after 400 M and ran on well but unable to fend off challenge from winner to be overhauled inside final 100 M.
Bumped at start and keen early, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 3rd 1200 M out, still 3rd and 2Ls off pace at top of home straight but under strong pressure, faded out steadily.
3Ls off pace on fence in 5th for most of back straight, niggled along to hold position 500 M out, midfield entering straight, never able to challenge.
Bumped at start, led on the fence 1500 M out, clear 2nd 2Ls off pace at the 900 M, headed 500 M out, 3Ls down and beaten when steadied and crowded for room 200 M out, faded.
10Ls off pace and 4-wide with cover in rear group 1100 M out, 6Ls down and 3-wide at 800 M in 10th place, 5-wide entering straight when 3Ls down, led 220 M out, driven out.
3-wide and 5Ls off pace in 6th place down most of back straight, 4-wide and 3Ls down disputing 4th place entering straight, 2Ls down in 4th 200 M out, same pace to line.
Bumped at start, keen early, 3-wide and 3Ls off the pace in 4th place 1200 M out, advanced to lead at 500 M, 4-wide entering straight, headed about 220 M out, tired close home.
2-wide and 10Ls off pace towards rear 1100 M out, 8Ls off pace in rear at 800 M, still rear and 7Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, soon beaten.
3-wide and 11Ls off pace and one from rear 1100 M out, 4-wide without cover and in rear 800 M, 5-wide and driven into straight when 5Ls down, 3Ls down at 200 M, no extra final stages.
Keen early on, disputed lead out 4-wide 1400 M out, led on fence by 2Ls 900 M out, headed 500 M out, faded out from top of home straight, eased down close home.
2-wide and 5Ls off the pace in 7th 1200 M out, 5Ls down 800 M out, steadied entering straight when 2-wide and still 5Ls down, 3Ls adrift at 200 M in 6th, kept on to be nearest at the finish.
Slowly away, in rear on fence 12Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 10Ls off pace in rear and hard ridden 700 M out, still well adrift entering straight, eased down close home.
Towards rear when 3-wide and 10Ls off pace 1100 M out, 4-wide and 5Ls down in midfield entering stretch, still midfield when 3Ls down at 200 M, one-paced to line.
2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 8th 1100 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down entering straight in 6th, staying on well 200 M out in 2nd place when 1L off the winner, no extra close home.
On fence 8Ls off speed in 9th place for most of back straight, one from rear and 7Ls down on fence entering straight, no impression.
7Ls off speed and 2-wide in 10th 1800 M out, niggled along 800 M out to hold position, detached entering straight, weakened further.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 2Ls through to home straight, headed about 300 M out, dropped out.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 6th 1800 M out, 3-wide without cover down back straight in 6th, 3Ls down in midfield when 5-wide driven along into straight and 200 M out, weakened close home.
On fence in 7th about 6Ls off pace 1800 M out until being steadied 700 M out, travelled well 3-wide into stretch when 3Ls down, 1L down in 3rd when steadied 200 M out, didn't recover.
On fence and 2-wide about 5Ls off speed in 5th until the 800 M, improved to 1L off pace and 4-wide entering straight, led from 300 M to 250 M out, couldn't peg back winner once headed.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th 1800 M out, still 8Ls down and 3-wide with cover 1000 M out, 4-wide into stretch when 3Ls down, quickened up while hanging in to lead 250 M, kept on strongly.
Keen early, on fence 7Ls off pace in 9th 1800 M out, 2-wide down back straight, 3-wide travelling well 3Ls off pace into straight, briefly held up 300 M out, 2Ls 200 M out in 4th, no extra.
8Ls off pace and 3-wide in 11th 1800 M out, still towards rear 9Ls down 800 M out, 4Ls down going well into home straight, 3Ls down in midifeld at the 200 M out, nearest at the finish.
Awkwardly away, over-raced early on, 4-wide in rear 8Ls off pace 1800 M out, never on terms at any stage.
Slowly away, 2Ls off pace in 3rd from 1800 M out to home straight, held up by tiring IDOL and CARACOLER until 150 M out, ran on once in the clear but much too late. (Lame.)
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th place 1800 M out, under pressure to hold this same position 800 M out, 2Ls down entering striaght, 3Ls down 200 M out in midfield, faded.
In rear on fence 9Ls off pace 1800 M out, improved to be 6Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, 4Ls down under pressure on the swing, 3Ls down 200 M out, faded close home.
Raced in 2nd place no worse than 2Ls off pace and 2-wide from 1800 M to home straight when all out to hold position, soon faded out.
6Ls off the pace and 3-wide down the back straight in about 11th place, 5Ls down and 4-wide into home straight in midfield, led 100 M out, caught by winner final strides.
On fence and about 8Ls off pace down back straight in rear, still about 8Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, ran on past a few beaten rivals on run-in.
Awkwardly away, in rear 8Ls off the speed and 3-wide 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 6Ls off pace in 10th, 3Ls down in 4th at 200 M, got up in the final strides.
Never dangerous, in midfield 3-wide and 5Ls off pace down back straight, under pressure and losing position out 5-wide entering straight, faded.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in midfield at the 1000 M, advanced to be 2Ls down in 3rd place entering straight with every chance, all out to be 1L down in 2nd place at the 200 M, no extra and faded.
Keen early on, 4-wide and 5Ls off pace in midfield 1000 M out, 6-wide and struggling into home straight when 7Ls off pace, dropped out further.
