Disputed lead out 3-wide 1200 M out, 3-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight and back-pedalling, dropped out.
3-wide about 5Ls off pace in midfield down back straight, in 4th place when 3-wide into homestretch and 4Ls down, never troubled principals.
4-wide disputing 4th place 1L off pace 1200 M out, 3-wide with cover and 4Ls down in 6th 800 M out, awkwardly placed entering straight when 5Ls off pace, no impression thereafter.
Awkwardly away, rushed up to sit 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide 800 M out, led at top of home straight, 2Ls clear 300 M out, headed 100 M out, no extra.
2-wide and about 6Ls off pace in midfield down backstretch, 8Ls down entering straight and under pressure to keep up, very one-paced.
Awkwardly away, settled near rear on fence 5Ls off pace 1100 M out, niggled along to hold position 800 M out, 7Ls down and all out entering straight, weakened further.
On fence 3Ls off speed when better than midfield 1000 M out, 4Ls down at 800 M, 5Ls down on inner and under pressure entering straight, no impression.
Best away, disputed lead out 2-wide 1200 M out, clear lead 1000 M out, never clear by more than 1L, headed 500 M out, weakened steadily in the stretch.
Awkwardly away, settled in rear about 7Ls or 8Ls off speed and 2-wide until 800 M, still in rear when 3-wide and 5Ls down entering straight, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.

6Ls down and 4-wide down back stretch and one from rear, 4-wide in rear and 5Ls off pace entering straight, about 4Ls down 200 M out, stayed on well final 200 M, nearest at the finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Awkwardly away, box-seat position on fence 2Ls off pace through to home straight, found nothing under pressure and beaten 300 M out.
5Ls down and 3-wide down back straight in about 9th place, 4-wide and still worse than midfield 4Ls off pace entering straight, 3Ls down 200 M out, stayed on well, nearest at the finish.
2-wide and about 3Ls off pace in 5th or 6th down back straight, 2Ls down at top of home straight, squeezed through gap to be 1L down at 200 M, led 100 M out, pushed out.
Prominent out 3-wide 1L off pace 800 M out and into home straight when under pressure, soon beaten.
Keen early on, 3-wide in midfield about 5Ls off speed down backstretch, 5-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, 2Ls down and with place hopes 200 M out, faded nearer line.
Best away, led on fence by 1L 1000 M out, all out to hang onto the lead at top of home straight, faded rapidly once headed.
Settled 3-wide with cover in 6th about 4Ls off pace until 700 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 2Ls down in 5th place, one-paced thereafter.
Keen early on, 2-wide and about 1L off pace down backstretch, disputed lead into home straight, faded quickly.
Caught 4-wide without cover down back straight, 4Ls off pace 800 M out, 1L down entering straight when 5-wide (widest of all), led 400 M out, headed by winner 100 M out, no extra.
Towards rear when 3-wide and about 6Ls off pace down back straight, improved 5-wide and 3Ls down in midfield into homestretch, 2Ls down disputing 3rd 200 M out, kept on well. (See Racing Incidents.)
Keen early on, on fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield through to home straight, beaten 200 M out.
Slowly away, raced near fence about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace towards through to 800 M, 2-wide into home straight when about 5Ls off pace and worse than midfield, never troubled principals.
Always prominent. Took command stable bend and led field till challenged inside 150 M. Caught final strides.
Never far off to straight where he soon dropped out.
Just behind midfield into straight. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Mostly midfield to home bend. Kept on but unable to get a clear passage for most of straight.
Last into straight where he ran on quite well final 250 M.
Prominent to straight where he dropped out steadily.
Made no show.
Pulled hard in midfield entering back straight and was about 5th 400 M. Unable quicken to challenge.
About 5th 1200 M and in touch into straight. Ran on well closing stages despite not reaching winner.
In rear to straight where he stayed on till finding no extra near finish.
Never on terms despite improving a bit close home.
Always well there. Ran on to challenge inside final 150 M. Gained upper hand last few strides.
6th halfway and similar place into straight. Kept on without threatening close home.
Among rear group of closely bunched field into straight. Ran on well under pressure closing stages.
Slowly away, last early. Recovered ground rounding home bend to be 7th turning in. One-paced thereafter.
Towards rear. Slight progress rounding home bend to be in midfield. Weakened soon after straightening.
Made all. Held on well.
Prominent. Failed quicken to challenge from 4th final turn. No extra closing stages.
Soon towards rear. Made no show in straight.
Well there early, soon raced 4th. Was 3-wide 2Ls behind lead turning in. One-paced.
Midfield or behind. Hung out badly home turn. Faded.
Towards rear. Dropped to the rear passing 1000 M. Made up some ground on outside in straight.
Lost ground at start, near rear. Soon recovered good ground along rail to be 5th 1000 M. Steadied on straightening and again at 300 M when crowded for room. Ran on a bit 200 M.
Soon in touch. Steady progress to 2nd passing 800 M. Kept on without threatening in straight.
In touch early, soon settled behind midfield. No improvement. (See Racing Incidents.)
Broke well. Chased leader most of way till found no extra inside 200 M.
Just better than midfield into straight. One-paced.
Never on terms.
Towards rear most of way.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Prominent into straight. Dropped out.
Settled in midfield. Jostled between runners turning in before running on well to reach 2nd place final stages.
Behind midfield into straight. Finished well down centre of track to be nearest at finish.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily to gain upper hand over 100 M out.
Soon in first few. Held 4th into straight but did not quicken.
Wide in midfield far side. Lost position rounding home bend.
Soon dropped towards rear. Ran home one-paced.
Around midfield. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Soon took up running and attempted to make all. Tired badly and overhauled 200 M out.
Behind midfield. Severely checked 350 M and steadied 300 M. Recovered a little ground closing stages.
Towards rear. Forced to race widest on straightening. Made ground steadily on outside to obtain a minor placing close home.
Prominent, no more than 3Ls behind lead until dropping back a bit to midfield turning in. One-paced thereafter.
Never a factor.
Midfield. Dropped back rounding home bend towards the rear. Kept on along rail without quickening.
Behind midfield. Kept on early straight but was soon weakened.
Led field to 100 M. Kept on without quickening to the line.
Midfield. Weakened inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on from 11th early straight to prevail near finish.
In touch. No more than 3Ls behind lead home bend. Improved along rail to 2nd turning in. Took lead briefly 100 M but unable to withhold the winner near finish.
Crowded soon after starts. Trailed the field throughout.
Well there to 400 M. Faded.
Always thereabout. Kept on same pace in straight.
In touch. Improved to 3rd 1000 M. Found no extra 250 M.
Broke well. Made all. Won unchallenged.
Always prominent but failed to peg back winner the length of straight.
Mostly 3 or 4-wide just better than midfield to straight. No extra.
Soon dropped to tail-end before home bend.
Brief lead early. Chased leader into straight and soon weakened.
Began awkwardly but raced mostly in midfield to straight.
In first few to straight. Weakened.
Settled in midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening but only produced modest progress to claim remote 3rd.
Refused to settle early. Around midfield turning in. No extra. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Driven along at the back only to run past beaten horses closing stages.
Outpaced early. Ran on steadily past beaten horses in straight.
Settled well behind midfield. Ran on under pressure past beaten runners in straight.

Jumped along and soon raced in rear section on rail. Switched out to find clear running on straightening. Made up good ground when asked 350 M out to overhaul 2nd placegetter near the line to win narrowly.
Ridden hard to lead narrowly on fence through to straight. Headed 300 M out and steadily dropped out inside final 250 M.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section on fence. Switched out and made little improvement at home bend. Ran on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.

Hard ridden to race in a forward position on rail. Steadily dropped to race in midfield at home bend. Shortly after straightening was steadied when disappointed for running and failed to respond to pressure thereafter.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in midfield 3-wide. Crept forward turning for home. Took lead 300 M out and kept on well but unable to match speed with 1st pair in the closing stages to settle for 3rd place.
Jumped well and soon raced in midfield on inner. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Ran on fairly in straight but was never in position to trouble the placegetters.
Soon settled in worse than midfield 2 to 3-wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out but unable to fend off the late challenge from winner to be overpowed near the line.
Niggled along to race outside leader through to straight. Failed to respond to pressure in straight and tailed out inside final 250 M. (Lost its left hind plate.)

Began fairly and ridden along to race 3-wide without cover outside leader. Under pressure to maintain position turning for home. Unable to quicken in straight and weakened badly inside final 200 M. (Bled.)
Raced in better than midfield 2-wide. Crept closer at home bend. Shortly after straightening blundered after clipping heels. Unable to quicken when asked 200 M and stayed one-paced to the line.
Soon eased to the tail of the field 2-wide. Switched wide and made slight improvement at home bend. All out 350 M out and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Soon raced in mid-division on rail. Was steadied at 700 M when disappointed for running. Switched out to find running at 350 M but unable to pick up speed and kept on same pace to the line.
Raced in worse than midfield around 3 to 4-wide. Made little improvement at home bend. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on evenly to the line.

Began awkwardly and soon recovered to race in better than midfield on inner through to straight. Baulked from 400 M to 250 M and made up some ground inside final 200 M when clear running was obtained. (Bled.)
Slowly away, caught 3-wide 1500 M out when 3-wide and 10Ls off pace, under pressure when 4-wide into home straight and 5Ls down in midfield, one-paced to the line.
Always rear, never better than 10Ls or 12Ls off pace at any stage.
2-wide and 10Ls off pace towards rear 1600 M out and down back stretch, 4-wide into home straight and still rear into stretch, finished off strongly, never nearer.
On fence 6Ls off pace in 7th 1600 M out, 7Ls down 1200 M out, 3-wide into home straight and still midfield when 6Ls down, 5Ls down 200 M out, kept on fairly without threatening.
Soon in front, 3Ls clear 1200 M out, 2Ls clear off home turn, still 1L to the good at the 200 M, caught by winner final 30 M.
Had the box-seat run on fence between 2Ls and 4Ls off speed on fence in 3rd place through to home straight when with every chance, one-paced to line.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 3rd 1600 M out, 4Ls off pace in 3rd 1200 M out, 2Ls off pace and ridden along in 2nd 500 M out, faded upon straightening.
2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 8th 1600 M out, crowded and lost position 800 M out and about 10Ls off pace, 4-wide into straight when 8Ls down worse than midfield, nearest at finish.
2-wide and 4Ls off speed in 5th 1600 M out, 6Ls down 1200 M out, driven along when 4-wide into home straight and still 5th, 3Ls down at 200 M out, kept on dourly, nearest at finish.
Best away, on fence 4Ls off pace in 4th 1600 M out, 6Ls back at 1200 M, in 5th place 4Ls down 800 M out, 3-wide into straight and 3rd when 3Ls down, 1L down in 2nd 200 M out, led final 30 M.

On fence 8Ls off pace in 9th or 10th from 1600 M to 800 M out, driven along and in same position but 6Ls down entering straight, 4Ls down in 5th 200 M out, kept on, nearest at the finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
Slowly away, keen early on, towards rear out 3-wide 10Ls off pace at 1600 M, still towards rear and under pressure when 5-wide and 7Ls off pace entering straight, never able to challenge.
Sluggishly away, towards rear 10Ls off pace on fence 1600 M out, similar margin off speed down back straight, 8Ls down into straight, no impression.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 6th 1600 M out, 7Ls down 1200 M out, 5Ls down in 6th 1200 M out, driven along at 800 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls down into straight, kept on at same pace.
Never travelled well, driven along 4-wide with cover disputing 4th place 800 M out, 5Ls down and weakening off home straight, eased down close home.
On fence and in rear about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace through to home straight, never got into it.
4-wide and 3Ls off pace down back straight in midfield, under pressure to hold position entering straight, one-paced to line.
Best away, led on fence 800 M out by less than 1L through to home straight, a neck to the good 200 M out, no extra final 100 M.
Caught 5-wide without cover when about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in midfield down back straight, 4-wide into home straight and under pressure to hold position, faded out.
2Ls off pace out 2-wide down back straight in 4th place, 3-wide into stretch when 2Ls off pace, 3Ls down 200 M out in 3rd, faded through closing stages.
Awkwardly away, towards rear about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace down back straight, struggling and detached entering straight, no chance.
Soon settled 2-wide less than 1L off pace in 2nd through to home straight when driven along, 1 neck down in 2nd 200 M out, kept on well to assert final 100 M.
Slowest away, 4Ls down in 9th 800 M out, still 4Ls down and worse than midfield entering straight, never able to challenge.
Awkwardly away, 2Ls off pace in pace in 6th 800 M out, driven along to keep up 600 M out, still 2Ls down into straight, 3Ls down in 4th 200 M out, kept on dourly for a place.
In rear early on, improved to be 2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 8th 800 M out, 3-wide and driven along entering straight in midfield, 4Ls down in 5th at 200 M, one-paced to line.
3-wide and 4Ls off pace down back straight when towards rear, 3-wide into home straight, no impression.
Narrow lead on fence 1200 M out, 2Ls clear 800 M out, 3Ls clear and travelling very easily off home turn, still 3Ls to the good 200 M out, unextended.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 5th 1100 M out, 4Ls down and 2-wide into home straight and under pressure, beaten 300 M out.
On fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd 1200 M out, driven along to be 2nd entering straight 3Ls off pace, faded rapidly.
Towards rear 2-wide and 10Ls off pace 1200 M out, driven along entering straight when still 8Ls down, no impression.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide down back straight in rear when at least 10Ls off speed, checked 500 M out and 4-wide entering straight when 9Ls down, no impression.
In 2nd last out 2 and 3-wide down back straight when at least 10Ls off pace, 3-wide into home straight when about 7Ls off pace, never able to challenge. (See Racing incidents.)
3-wide and 4Ls in 4th 1200 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down and vying for 4th place, very one-paced thereafter.
Awkwardly away, half a length off pace in 2nd out 2-wide 1200 M out, niggled along 800 M out, lost place and retreated rapidly at 600 M, beaten before home turn. (See Racing Incidents.)
On fence 4Ls off pace in 6th 1100 M out, 3-wide into home straight in 3rd when 3Ls off pace, all out to be 4Ls down in 3rd 200 M out, lots out on a place close home.
2-wide and 5Ls off speed in 7th 1200 M out, niggled along 4Ls off pace in 6th 800 M out, went clear 2nd at top of home straight 3Ls off lead, kept on fairly well but had no chance with winner.
On fence 9Ls off speed in 9th 1000 M out, 5Ls down in midfield hanging in off home turn, steadied at 300 M, one-paced to line.
In 8th 2-wide and 8Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3-wide and 5Ls off pace in midfield entering straight, 5Ls down in 4th at 200 M out, gained 3rd place near line.
In last racing 2 and 3-wide and at least 12Ls off speed down back straight, 6Ls down at top of home straight.
Slowly away, caught 4-wide without cover 5Ls off pace in midfield 1100 M out, improved to 3-wide and 2Ls down in 4th at 800 M out, 3-wide 1L down in 3rd into stretch.
Slowly away, settled 3-wide 6Ls off pace in 9th down back straight, travelling well 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, 2Ls down in 4th 200 M out, kept on well to get up close home.
Led on fence by 1L 1200 M out, similar margin clear entering straight, headed 300 M out, hung on quite well for a place.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 5th 1200 M out, still 5th 3Ls off pace into home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Driven from gates, settled on fence in midfield about 5Ls off pace through to home straight, hung out under pressure, soon beaten.
Awkwardly away, never better than 8Ls off pace at any stage, detached entering straight, never a factor.
Slowly away, on fence about 10Ls off pace in 2nd last down back straight, 6Ls down and still 2nd last into home straight, no impression.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd 1200 M out, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at top of home straight, faded rapidly.
3-wide and about 5Ls off pace in midfield down back straight, took closer order entering stretch, with place prospects 2Ls down in 5th when steadied 150 M out, stayed on again.
2-wide in 10th place about 8Ls off speed down back straight, 4-wide into straight when 6Ls off speed, briefly threatened when staying on into 4Ls off pace down wide outside at 200 M out, no extra.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th 1200 M out, niggled along to hold this position at 600 M and hard ridden entering straight, faded out.
Settled in rear 3-wide and at least 10Ls or 11Ls off pace down back straight, hard ridden into home straight when detached, never a factor.
Had box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd through to home straight, led 300 M out, half a length up 200 M out, grabbed by winner close home.
2-wide about 5Ls off pace in midfield down back stretch, driven along to get within 4Ls off pace into home straight, 3Ls down at 200 M out, no extra close home.
Never on terms.
Made no show.
Worse than midfield into straight. Never in contention.
Outpaced early. Improved coming into straight and continued to make steady headway to line.
Soon took up running and led field before headed approaching 200 M. Dropped out steadily.
Worse than midfield into straight where he kept on till finding no extra near finish.
Jumped best before dropping to midfield 800 M and was not far off behind leaders into straight. Plugged on under pressure.
Soon in rear and was 2nd last rounding home bend. Made up some ground under pressure closing stages.
Soon improved towards leaders and was 3rd rounding home bend. Kept on to take 2nd close home.
Always handy. Improved along rails to take command and go clear 200 M out. Won impressively.
About 5th into home bend and failed to quicken under pressure in straight.
Prominent to straight where he kept on under pressure. Found one-paced towards finish.
Midfield into straight where he failed to run on.
Slowly away, towards rear early. Recovered ground steadily to be 5th final turn. Weakened inside 150 M.
Prominent. Took lead passing 1000 M and was joined 800 M. Obtained clear advantage final turn. Won going away.
Soon towards rear. Ran past a few beaten runners inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily from 10th on straightening.
Better than midfield. 3-wide 5th home turn. Ran on quite well from outside 300 M.
Soon well there. Joined the leader 800 M. Faded from 2nd early straight. (Bled.)
Led early. Dropped back steadily to just behind midfield home bend. Ran on a bit early straight but found no extra closing stages.
In touch. Was 3rd or 4th rounding home bend. Weakened soon after straightening.
In touch. Mainly 3rd or 4th before gaining 2nd 400 M. Kept on without ever troubling the winner.
Slowly away, near rear. Recovered ground from 1000 M to be midfield home bend. Was checked on inside 500 M. Kept on in straight.
Last from 1000 M. Only very minor improvement in straight.
Never able to feature.
Never on terms.
Settled in midfield. Found no room on rails early in straight. Kept on one pace without quickening final 200 M.
Mostly in midfield. Kept on steadily down straight for remote 3rd.
Never seen with a chance.
Broke well and attempted to make all. Narrowly headed inside 200 M but fought on dourly to gain upper hand close to home.
Tracked leaders. Shifted out to tackle leader upon straightening hitting front briefly inside 200 M only to be denied close to home.
Never nearer. Kept on well in straight. (Lame.)
Chased leaders to straight. Weakened.
Travelled in midfield. Came under pressure upon straightening only to produce moderate impression briefly early in straight. No extra closing stages.
Forward of midfield to straight then weakened.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Always in last few.
Always there. Kept on well final 200 M but just failed to catch the 2nd.
Crowded at start, made no show.
Remained 4th throughout.
Made all. Won readily.
Near rear. Last from course proper. Ran past a couple of runners at 250 M.
Always 2nd. Unable to match speed with the winner final 200 M.
Crowded at start, never able to feature.
Midfield to straight then weakened. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Settled at the back. Accelerating well when forced to check badly over 300 M out, then kept on steadily to finish.
Tracked field most of way. Ran past well beaten horses in straight.
Led till joined early in striaght then soon weakened.
Never far off to 600 M then weakened.
Behind midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Settled in midfield. Kept on steadily for distant 3rd.
Settled behind leaders. Loomed up to hold some chance briefly early in straight but soon found no extra.
Well there to home bend then dropped out.
Settled at the back. Ran on through field down straight to be nearest at finish.
Mainly in midfield. Quickened well to take charge final 200 M.
Well there. Disputed lead into straight. Badly unbalanced about 300 M out then dropped out. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Well back. Ran on steadily past beaten horses in straight.
Prominent till gave ground under pressure rounding home bend.

Began fairly and raced in mid-division on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 450 M out but unable to fend off the challenges from 2nd and 3rd placegetters to be overhauled on the line.

Raced keenly in the early stages to take up running. Commenced to lose ground quickly from 800 M and was eased in the straight. (Probable displacement of the soft palate, distressed and moving stiffly behind.)
Jumped fairly and raced in mid-division 2 wide. Switched out and made steady improvement at home bend. Under pressure 400 M out and ran home well to win comfortably.
Niggled along to race in mid-division towards the outside without cover. Under pressure to maintain position at home bend. Failed to pick up in straight and soon weakened after 300 M.
Ridden along to race in midfield or better on inner through to straight. Kept on same pace when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Began well from wide draw and soon eased to tail but closer to rail. At 600 M whilst improving was steadied to avoid a weakening runner. Under pressure 400 M out and made up good ground inside final 200 M to grab 2nd place on the line.
Raced in a forward position on fence. Took lead at 800 M and only kept on evenly when asked 400 M out. Headed at 200 M and further weakened thereafter.
Niggled along to race in prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and stayed one-pace to the line.

Unable to muster early speed and steadily dropped to the rear section. Switched out to find clear running on straightening. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Soon settled in rear section around 2 wide. Made slight improvement on the outside turning for home. Kept on same pace in straight and weakened slightly inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly and soon settled in midfield or worse towards the outside. Under pressure to maintain position at home bend. Did not quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.

Slowly away and soon recovered to race in prominent position around 3 wide. Under pressure to maintain position at home bend but commenced to lose ground on straightening and weakened badly in the straight.

Slow to begin and raced in rear section around 2 wide. Switched out and ridden along to go forward at home bend. All out 300 M out and made up steady ground but was overhauled by 2nd placegetter on the line.
Soon eased to race towards the tail of the field on inner. Switched wide to find clear running turning for home. Under pressure 400 M out but failed to make any impression.
Led until 1100 M, 2Ls off pace on fence in 2nd at 800 M, loomed up to dispute lead with SENSIBLE WAY at top of home straight, narrow lead at 300 M, always held a narrow margin thereafter.
3-wide and half a length off pace in 3rd 1000 M out, 2Ls clear out 2-wide 800 M out, disputing lead with winner from top of stretch, headed 300 M out, kept on well but couldn't lead again.
On fence in 7th 3Ls off pace at 1000 M, 6Ls down at 600 M on fence when knocked sideways by fallers and unseating rider.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, similarly placed when brought down at the 600 M.
Slowly away, one from rear when 2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, similarly placed when severely hampered when others fell 600 M out, eased down entering straight.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, on fence 4Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th entering straight and at 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
On fence 4Ls off pace 1000 M out in 3rd place, 2-wide and 1L off pace 700 M out in 3rd, under pressure when 3-wide and 3Ls off pace entering straight, faded right out.
3-wide and about 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 5th or 6th from backstretch to 600 M, 1L down in 3rd and 3-wide into home straight, 2Ls down and still 3rd 200 M out, faded closing stages.
In 3rd last out 4-wide and 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, 6-wide into home straight when 5Ls down in 7th place, 4Ls down in 5th at 200 M, no extra.
3-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, over-racing slightly when 2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 6th 600 M out when clipping heels and falling.
Out 5-wide in 11th place 4Ls off pace 1000 M out, 5Ls off pace towards rear when severely baulked unseating rider at 600 M.
Slowest away, in last 2-wide and 8Ls off pace 800 M out, hampered 600 M when others fell, 5-wide into stretch when 7Ls down, 5Ls down at 200 M, stayed on to take 3rd close home.
3-wide and 4Ls off lead in midfield at 1000 M and at 600 M when others fell, pushed out 5-wide into stretch when 5Ls down in 2nd last, very one-paced thereafter.
Keen early on, 3-wide and 3Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, 4Ls off pace when severely baulked at the 600 M, unseating rider.
On fence 2Ls off speed in 3rd place at 800 M, similarly placed but hard pressed to lie up entering straight, faded rapidly.
8Ls off pace in 2nd last place when on fence at 1000 M, never got any closer than that.
Awkwardly away, 3Ls off pace on fence at 800 M, 2-wide and 3Ls down in 5th into stretch, one-paced in straight and never able to challenge.
Slowly away, in 3rd last 7Ls off front and 2-wide at 1000 M, still in 8th and 5Ls off pace and 4-wide entering stretch, in 5th and 4Ls down at 200 M, kept on strongly to lead 50 M out, ran on.
3-wide without cover about 2Ls off the pace in 3rd 700 M out, 3-wide into stretch when half a length down in 2nd and every chance, 1L down at 200 M, stayed on at the same pace closing stages.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, 3Ls down and 3-wide and 3Ls off pace in 6th into straight, all out to be 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, no extra close home.
Prominent early, unbalanced at 800 M, 5Ls off pace and driven along 600 M out and entering straight in 7th place, 4Ls down and staying 200 M out, kept on well to take 2nd place final 50 M.
Led by a neck at 1000 M, held similar advantage until home straight, 1L clear at the 200 M, all out to be still in front 100 M out, hung out and tired markedly through concluding stages.
Raced within 1L off the speed in 2nd through to 600 M out, 2Ls down and back-pedalling in 3rd entering straight, faded further.
Slowly away, in rear when 3-wide and 8Ls off pace 800 M out, detached in 2nd last into straight, never a factor.
Awkwardly away, on fence 9Ls off pace in 8th 1600 M out, 8Ls down at the 800 M, 3-wide into straight and still towards rear when squeezed for room 400 M out, posed no threat whatsoever.
Soon led, never clear by more than 2Ls clear through to home straight when travelling well, 1L clear and vulnerable 200 M out, stayed on gamely, just hung on.
Always rear, never better than 10Ls off lead at any stage.
7Ls off pace out 2-wide in 7th 1600 M out, 6Ls down in 4th at the 800 M, 3-wide into stretch when 5Ls down, 4Ls down and outpaced at 200 M, stayed on again close home to be nearest at finish.
4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 3rd until 600 M out, 3-wide and 3Ls down at top of home straight, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, finished off strongly, just failed.
Soon in 2nd place, never worse than 2Ls off pace, driven to get within 1L of DANEFACTOR at 1000 M, 2Ls down into home straight, faded steadily.
2-wide and 8ls off pace in 7th at 1600 M, niggled along 1200 M out, 7Ls down 800 M out, all out into straight when 6Ls off pace, beaten 300 M out.
On fence and between 6Ls and 8Ls off pace in 4th or 5th place until the 800 M, 2Ls down in 2nd entering straight, every chance when 1L down 300 M out, kept on at same pace.
On fence 12Ls off speed in 10th 1600 M out, 10Ls down 800 M out, 5-wide into straight when 4Ls off pace, stayed on well to be nearest at the finish.
2-wide and 10Ls off speed in 9th through to 800 M out, 4-wide into home stretch when 6Ls off pace, 4Ls down at the 200 M, never threatened.
Slowly away, on fence 7Ls off the pace in 6th 1600 M out, 8Ls down at the 800 M, 5Ls down on fence into home straight, never able to challenge.
2-wide and 12Ls off speed in 11th 1600 M out, 10Ls off pace at 800 M, 6-wide (widest of all) into straight when 7Ls down, no impression. (See Racing Incidents.)
2-wide and 6Ls off speed 1200 M out, 5Ls down in 6th at 800 M, 3-wide into stretch, 3Ls down when a bit short of room until 300 M out, one-paced thereafter.
On fence 2Ls off speed in 2nd 1300 M out, over-raced in places, 1L down in 2nd and driven along on straightening, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, one-paced to line.
In 2nd last 10Ls off speed and 2-wide at 1000 M, 3-wide at 600 M and sent on to be 4Ls down in 4th and 4-wide on straightening, still 3Ls down at 200 M out, ran on to nick 3rd on line.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, 3Ls down in 5th into home straight, went 1L 2nd 200 M out, led at the 100 M, driven out.
Keen in places racing 2 and 3-wide down back straight when about 4Ls off pace in 4th, 2Ls down in 3rd place into home straight and at 200 M, one-paced to line.
Led on fence by 1L 1300 M out, still 1L clear into home straight and 200 M out, grabbed by winner at the 100 M, no extra.
7Ls down and 2-wide in 7th at 1200 M, 5Ls down at 800 M, 3-wide into the straight when 4Ls down, always outpaced.
Slowly away, 11Ls off pace in rear at 1000 M, 8Ls down in rear at 800 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into stretch when 5Ls down, still about 5Ls down at 200 M, nearest at the finish.
2-wide and 9Ls off speed in 8th at 1100 M, 6Ls behind lead at 800 M, 4-wide and 5Ls down into home stretch, always too one-paced to challenge.
On fence 9Ls off speed in 9th 1100 M out, 7Ls down at 800 M, in last and 6Ls down off home turn, kept on at same pace to run past a few beaten rivals final 100 M.
4Ls off speed in 3rd out 2-wide 1200 M out, 2Ls down in box-seat position on fence in 3rd at 800 M, under pressure and lost position 500 M out, no impression in straight.
About midfield turning into straight where he made no show.
Never far off to straight where he stayed on to hit front briefly 200 M. Soon headed and dropped out of contention.
Prominent into straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Well there into straight where he failed to hold place passing 200 M.
Never on terms.
Settled in rear to striaght where he ran on strongly to lead close home.
Well there early and was 8th into home bend. Could make no impression on leaders in straight.
About 6th into straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Led briefly to 1000 M and was still there into straight. Dropped out rapidly from 300 M.
Midfield rounding home bend. Kept on from 250 M, found no extra near finish.
Among rear group approaching home turn. Kept on to reach 3rd 200 M, having every chance. Unable to hold first 2 close home.
Slowly away. Was worse than midfield and widest of all turning into straight. Plugged on under pressure.
Took narrow lead from 1000 M to striaght. Was headed 200 M and dropped out steadily.
Towards rear and wide into straight. Made up considerable ground closing stages, doing best work at the finish.
Slowly away, towards rear. Widest turning in. Recovered some ground in straight.
3rd early. Dropped back steadily to be midfield home bend. Faded from 400 M.
Never far off on inside. Made progress to 3rd final turn. Kept on but lost a minor placing closing stages.
Midfield or slightly behind. 6th turning into straight. Kept on steadily but unable to find clear run inside 100 M.
Behind midfield. Steady progress home bend to be 4-wide 5th turning in. Ran on quite well to hold some chance passing 150 M. Effort not sustained. (Hung in.)
In touch. Kept on well in straight. Just missed a minor placing.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Made ground when under pressure in straight to be nearest at finish.
2nd last to 400 M. Crept closer to just behind midfield early straight. Ran through a gap final 100 M to prevail close home.
Rear from widest draw. No impression.
Soon towards rear. Steadied on straightening. No improvement.
In the leading pair before gaining 1L advantage final turn. Kept on until headed close home.
In the leading pair to final turn. Found no extra from 2nd inside 150 M.
Never far off but unable to quicken to threaten.
Never on terms.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Towards rear. Not much room early in straight but make some late impression closing stages.
In last few throughout.
Well there to straight. Weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Never better than midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Prominent briefly, then travelled mainly better than midfield. Faded upon straightening. (Stiff both fore.)
Towards rear most of way.
Settled in midfield. Steadied twice 500 M and 200 M out. Produced good late impression final few strides.
Made all. Hung on well to win unchallenged.
Rear to straight. Ran on steadily.
Behind midfield from widest draw. Steady progress far side to be 3rd 800 M. Weakened badly from 5th passing 400 M.
In touch. Dropped back to midfield 800 M. Advanced to 5th final turn. Stayed on.
Sat outside winner to final turn. Weakened while hanging in soon after straightening.
Midfield. Dropped to the last from 400 M. Faded.
Slowly away, towards rear. Crowded 1300 M. Moderate progress to midfield turning in. Kept on without quickening.
Last to 400 M. Ran past a few beaten horses from home turn.
Behind midfield on inside. Ran on steadily in straight to claim 2nd close home.
Near rear. Ran on from 8th early straight until one-paced closing stages.
Soon led. Won going away.
Always there. Steady progress from 600 M to be 2Ls 2nd final turn. Kept on without quickening.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Improved from 800 M to soon be 3rd or 4th. Unable to quicken in straight. Weakened inside 200 M.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out. (Significant back pain.)
Ridden and took up running 200 M after start. Led till no extra 200 M out. Just held on for 2nd.
Broke well and travelled outside leader most of way till no extra final 200 M.
Always in last few.
Prominent to straight. One-paced.
Always well there. Held some chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Settled in midfield. Quickened well upon straightening to take charge over 200 M out.
Never in contention.
Forward of midfield most of way. No extra closing stages.
Towards rear with some late headway close to home.
Never better than midfield.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section on rail. On straightening was checked and shifted out abruptly when closed to heels. Failed to respond to pressure in straight.

Pushed along in the early stages to race in prominent position 2-wide. Under pressure to improve position turning for home. Kept on well in straight but was unable to match speed with 1st pair to settle for 3rd place.
Began well and niggled along to race outside leader. Ridden along to maintain position turning for home. Found nothing in straight and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
Ridden along to race in mid-division out wide without cover. Commenced to give ground shortly after the 600 M and tailed out in straight.

Jumped fairly and soon raced in midfield or worse on fence. Was held up at home turn and on straightening was checked when disappointed for a run. Made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Raced in midfield or worse 2-wide. Ridden along to make little improvement at home bend. On straightening was bumped and carried wider. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race around 1L off leader on rail through to straight. Ran on well when asked 250 M out but was unable to find an extra gear to overhaul the winner.

Began well and niggled along to lead on rail with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Responded well when asked 250 M out and fended off repeated challenge from 2nd placegetter to win by a narrow margin.
Began fairly and soon raced in better than midfield 2 to 3-wide. Made slight improvement turning for home. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Soon settled towards the rear around 2-wide. Was inconvenienced and carried wider on straightening. Made no impression in straight.

Began awkwardly and raced at back 2-wide. Ridden along to go forward at home bend and was carried wider on straightening. Under pressure 250 M out and made up good ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Ridden along to race in better than midfield on rail. Under pressure to hold position turning for home and made the turn awkwardly. Unable to quicken in straight and stayed one-pace to the line.
4Ls down and 3-wide in 5th at 800 M, 3Ls down in 4th entering straight, too one-paced to line.
Very awkwardly away losing about 4Ls, in rear 8Ls off pace at 600 M, staying on when 6Ls down at 200 M, nearest at the finish.
Fractious beforehand and broke gates, checked at 1000 M, 3-wide with cover when 5Ls down at 800 M, never got any closer than that.
3-wide without cover when 4Ls off pace in 4th at 800 M, under pressure and lost place rounding home turn, faded out.
Very wide (6-wide) without cover at 1000 M when at least 7Ls off pace, 4-wide at 600 M in rear when about 8Ls down no chance.
3-wide and prominent at 1000 M, led by 2Ls on fence at 700 M, all out to hold an advantage at 200 M, headed 150 M out, weakened further close home and just hung on for 3rd.
Best away, in 3rd place and niggled along 3Ls off pace from 800 M out to home straight, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, led about 150 M out, hung out close home, just held on.
Slowly away, in midfield 5Ls off pace and 2-wide in midfield through to home straight, 4Ls down at 200 M, stayed on well to be nearest at finish, just missed out on a place.
Caught 5-wide with cover when about 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, 8Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, no chance.
Slowly away, towards rear when about 7Ls off pace from 900 M to home straight, no impression.
Narrow lead early on out 2-wide, kept within 2Ls off pace from 900 M to home straight and 200 M out, one-paced in the finish.
Keen early on, on fence 4Ls off pace in 5th or 6th at 800 M, similarly placed when unbalanced brushing rail at 600 M, 3Ls down in 4th at 200 M, stayed on well closing stages, narrowly missed.
Quickest out and led comfortably until being pressured upon straightening. Continued well but had no answer to the winner's challenge final 200M.
Jumped well and was eased back to race along fence near rear. About 7Ls down at 400M and was crowded prior to straightening. Ran on strongly after 200M to beat opponent for 3rd place at the line.

Began well and raced alongside leader until 800M. Remained within a length of the lead until straightening. Every chance at 300M but found no extra to challenge winner. Caught right before the line to miss out on minor placing.
Unable to muster early speed and soon raced 2-wide near midfield. Under pressure prior to straightening but was unable to pick up speed in the straight.

Slowly away from wide draw. Travelled wide without cover behind midfield in the early stages. Niggled along from 800M to improve from the extreme outside. Widest turning in and found nothing thereafter.
Slowest out and raced at rear until final 300M. Ran on steadily in the straight and made up some late ground.
Race comfortably on fence near midfield until being pressure on straightening. Ran on one-paced without threatening.
Begin fairly and pushed along early to race 3-wide near midfield. Niggled along to remain in similar position middle stages. Found nothing in the straight and dropped out quickly.
Unable to muster early speed and raced wide near rear. Ridden along to keep pace with the field in the middle stages. Very wide turning for home. Ran past some beaten horses in the straight.
Broke well and travelled nicely in prominent position until home straight. Responded well in straight when asked and had the race in control 200M out. Won comfortably.
Ridden hard early but was unable to get to the lead from wide draw. Settled 3-wide behind midfield until straightening. 3-wide turning in and one-paced to line.
Begin fairly and was pushed along to raced 2-wide in forward position. 2-wide and 3Ls down at 600M. Commenced to weaken shortly after straightening.
Pecked exiting gates, on fence in rear 10Ls off pace at 1200 M, still in rear when about 7Ls down on straightening, kept on to be nearest at finish.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, still well placed but ridden along entering straight, every chance at 300 M, very weak closing stages.
Led out 2-wide early on, got to fence at 1000 M, 1L clear into home straight, headed at 200 M but still kept on quite well.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in midfield from 1200 M to home straight, one-paced and non-threatening thereafter.
5-wide at 1300 M, disputing lead out 3-wide without cover at 800 M, lost position from 600 M and beaten entering straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Switched towards fence from wide gate early on, 11Ls off pace in rear and 2-wide at 1200 M, 7Ls down in rear entering straight, never posed any kind of threat.
On fence about 3Ls or 4Ls off speed in about 5th place through to home straight, quickened up to go half a length 3rd at 200 M, couldn't sustain run close home.
5-wide without cover at 1300 M, keen about 1100 M out when 6Ls off pace in 8th, 3-wide down back straight, hard pressed to lie up entering straight when 8Ls down, faded further.
In 10th position on fence and 8Ls off pace at 1200 M, improving when 5Ls down entering straight, kept on fairly to be nearest at the finish.
Always caught wide, 3-wide and 5Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, 6-wide and 7Ls down entering straight, no impression.
3-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, 2-wide and disputing lead at 800 M, half a length down into home straight and 200 M out, faded closing stages.
Had box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace through to home straight, picked up to lead at 200 M, driven out.
In touch early, settled 5th. Responded well early straight to assert authority 200 M. Won going away.
Prominent. Took lead from 1200 M. Was headed 300 M out. Kept on without quickening.
Soon 2nd. Gained advantage briefly 300 M. Kept on same pace when headed 200 M.
Behind midfield. Recovered some ground near 500 M on the widest. Made up some ground on outside in straight.
Towards rear. Lost further ground when steadied 1200 M. Moderate progress from last early straight.
Led field to 1200 M, held 3rd to home bend when hanging out. Faded.
Towards rear from widest draw. No significant progress.
Towards rear early, soon recovered some ground to be 6th. Kept on early straight until weakened inside 200 M.
Lost ground at start, last early. Pushed along to recover some ground to just behind midfield passing 1200 M. Kept on same pace to the line.
Never in the hunt.
Always thereabout. Was 3rd briefly upon straightening. One-paced thereafter.
Towards rear. Made moderate progress early straight. Soon found no extra.
Always thereabouts racing 3-wide most of way. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Behind midfield. Ran on well to hold every chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort nearing finish.
Well back. Ran on steadily in straight.
Behind midfield. Weakened in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Steadied for a run early in straight. Hampered again closing stages.
Waited with. Finished well down grandstand rails to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield to straight. Weakened.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out.
Always well there. Fought on well down straight without threatening.
Midfield. Ran on well down inner to hold every chance inside 200 M but unable to sustain effort final strides.
Broke well and attempted to make all. Overhauled inside final 200 M.
Held up behind leaders. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Rear and wide into straight. Loomed up to hit front inside 200 M. Hung on well.
Held 4th until progressing a bit early straight. Soon weakened. (See Racing Incidents.)
Made all.
Began awkwardly, held 6th to 400 M. Ran on a bit to be 2nd briefly 200 M. Failed to quicken close home.
2nd last to 300 M. Ran on from outside to be 2nd inside 150 M.
Remained 3rd to home turn. Hung out and weakened.
Rear. Made up good ground on widest final 200 M. Just missed 2nd.
Tracked the winner to 200 M. Weakened.
In similar position throughout.
Well back. Produced good late impression down straight doing best work at finish.
Towards rear. Finished well down straight to just fail to get up on line.
Never seen with a chance.
Well back to straight. Never nearer. (See Racing Incidents.)
Led to 400 M. Dropped out.
Prominent. Hit front inside 200 M. Held on well.
Settled in better than midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening and hit front briefly over 200 M out. Fought on well for placing.
Well there, hitting front early in straight but unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Never better than midfield. (See Racing Incidents.)
Behind midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Midfield. Shifted out onto grandstand rails upon straightening. Kept on one pace.
Prominent to straight. Faded.
Well there to 200 M, then no extra.

Tardy start and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. Moved out and pushed along to maintain position on straightening. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly and soon took up running on fence. Headed around 600 M and ridden along to hold position thereafter. Found nothing in straight and lost ground quickly after 300 M.
Broke fairly and raced in rear section around 2 wide through to straight. All out 300 M out and made up good ground inside final 300 M to miss the winner by a short margin.
Broke awkwardly and raced at back towards the inside. Switched wide and ridden along to go forward at home bend. All out 300 M out and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Began fairly from wide draw and soon eased to race in rear section closer to rail. Switched out and ridden along to go forward at home bend. Made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Niggled along to race in mid-division 2 wide. Switched out and pushed along to maintain position at home bend. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on evenly to the line.

Tardy start and raced in rear section. After the 800 M was niggled along to go forward on the outside to be in better than midfield on straightening. Found nothing in straight and further weakened in closing stages.

Slow to begin and niggled along to race in midfield or worse on rail. Switched out on straightening to find clear running. Stayed one-pace in straight and ran past several weakened runners in the final stages.
Jumped well and ridden along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. Under pressure to improve position at home bend. Kept on well in straight but was overhauled by 2nd placegetter near the line.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and eased to race in midfield around 3 wide. Switched out and made steady improvement at home bend. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out but was never in position to trouble the placegetters.

Began well and ridden along to race in prominent position on rail. Switched out and took lead at 650 M. Ran on well in straight to fend off late challenge from 2nd placegetter to win by a narrow margin.

Niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail. Was checked at 700 M when crowded for room. Pushed along to hold position at home bend. One-paced in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Raced in rear section towards the outside. Pushed along to hold position turning for home. Made no impression in straight.
Ridden along to race in midfield on rail. Was checked at 700 M when crowded for room. Did not quicken when asked 300 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Slowly away, 6Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M on fence, 4Ls down at 800 M and into home straight, dropped out steadily.
In last 2-wide and 12Ls off pace at 1000 M, 7-wide (widest of all) into home straight and still in rear when 8Ls down, no impression.
In 11th on fence 9Ls off pace at 1200 M, 2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 9th entering straight, no impression.
In rear group on fence 10Ls off pace on fence at 1000 M, in 10th and 4-wide and 7Ls off pace into home straight, 6Ls down in midfield at 200 M, nearest at the finish.
Had the box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, 2-wide and 2Ls down in 4th at 800 M and at 400 M, led about 150 M out, pushed out.
Midfield early on, sent on to dispute lead out 3-wide from 1000 M to 600 M, led by 1L entering straight, narrowly in front at the 200 M, headed at the 150 M, no extra.
2-wide and 9Ls off pace towards rear at 1200 M, 2-wide and 5Ls down in 7th entering straight, 4Ls down at the 200 M, nearest at the finish.
Led by 2Ls on fence at 1300 M, headed at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at 800 M and at 400 M, weakened when 4Ls down in 5th at 200 M, faded further.
On fence 1L off pace out 4-wide in 4th at 1300 M, 2Ls down and 4-wide without cover in 4th at 800 M and entering straight, half a length down in 3rd at 200 M, no extra close home.
Never any better than midfield, 3-wide and 7Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, 6Ls down into home straight, soon faded out.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1300 M, led out 2-wide by 1L at 1000 M, disputed lead with MODERN PROSPECT from 800 M, ceded advantage entering straight, one-paced to line.
Very wide (5-wide) round first bend, 3-wide and 5Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, beaten when fading towards tail of field entering straight.
Awkwardly away, towards rear when 3-wide and 10Ls off pace at 1000 M, 4-wide without cover for much of back straight, 6-wide into home straight when 8Ls off pace, soon beaten.
2-wide and 6Ls off speed in 7th at 1200 M, 3-wide and 5Ls down in 8th into home straight, dropped out.
5Ls off pace in 9th at 900 M when 3-wide, 4-wide into stretch when 5Ls down, one-paced thereafter.
Keen down back straight, on fence about 8Ls off pace and towards rear at 900 M, 6Ls down and no better than midfield into straight, no impression.
Checked at 1200 M, 4-wide down back straight, 6Ls off pace at 800 M when about 9th, 5-wide and 6Ls down in midfield off home turn, 5Ls down at 200 M out, nearest at finish.
In midfield early on but kicked on to lead on fence at 800 M by 2Ls, still 2Ls clear at top of home straight, grabbed by winner at 200 M, hung on for 2nd okay.
Led early on, headed at 1000 M and on fence and 2Ls off speed in 2nd at 800 M, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 3rd entering straight, 4Ls down in 5th at 200 M, faded further.
Slowly away, 4 and 5-wide down backstretch and in rear at least 8Ls off pace, detached entering straight, never a factor.
3-wide down back straight when 5Ls off pace in midfield, 4-wide into straight when 4Ls off pace in 6th, faded steadily thereafter.
On fence 2Ls off pace at 1000 M in 4th, 3Ls down in 4th entering straight, led at the 200 M, drew clear.
Caught 4-wide without cover down back straight when about 5Ls off pace, 4Ls down and 5-wide into home straight, no impression.
2-wide down back straight when about 5Ls off pace in midfield, 3-wide and 4Ls off pace in 6th into home straight, 3Ls off speed in 4th at 200 M, no extra close home.
In 8th place at 800 M on fence 6Ls off pace, 5Ls down and worse than midfield at 400 M and 200 M, kept on, nearest at finish.
Awkwardly away, in rear about 8Ls off pace on the fence at 800 M, 6Ls down and 3 from rear into home straight, kept on fairly to be nearest at the finish.
5-wide and 6-wide without cover down back straight when towards rear, detached and 4-wide into homestretch, no chance.
2-wide and within 3Ls off pace from 1000 M, 2Ls off pace in 2nd off home turn and every chance at 300 M, faded markedly through final 200 M.
Led early on, disputed lead until about 600 M, 2Ls down at 400 M, 3Ls down at 200 M, faded.
2Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, 3Ls down at 400 M, 5Ls down at the 200 M, stayed on well for pressure final stages.
Half a length off the pace in 4th at 700 M, led at the 400 M, 1L clear at the 200 M, driven out to score decisively.
5Ls off pace towards rear at 700 M, struggling to hold this position when hard ridden at the 400 M, no impression.
Never any better than midfield, 3Ls down at the 800 M, 6Ls down at the 400 M, 7Ls down at the 200 M, no impression.
3Ls off pace in 7th at 700 M, lost place steadily from the 500 M, well beaten when clipping heels at 250 M, eased down.
On fence 3Ls off pace at 800 M in midfield, 4Ls down hard ridden at 200 M, kept on fairly close home to nick a place.
About 3Ls off pace in midfield through to the 400 M, 4Ls down at the 200 M, one-paced final stages.
Awkardly away, disputed lead from 700 M to 450 M out, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, faded further close home. (Bled.)
Slowly away but recovered to be 2Ls down in 5th at 800 M, 3Ls down and under pressure at the 400 M, no impression and eased close home.
In rear at 800 M when 5Ls off pace, struggling and still towards rear at the 400 M, never a factor.
5Ls down in rear at the 800 M, 9Ls off pace and outpaced at the 400 M, made some moderate late headway.
Slowly away, disputing lead down centre of course at 700 M, headed at 400 M and under pressure at 300 M, kept on fairly but no chance with winner.
Awkwardly away, 4Ls off pace at 700 M and niggled along when in rear bunch, never competitive. (See Racing Incidents.)
1L off pace out 3-wide in 3rd place at the 800 M, 3-wide when 2Ls off pace into home straight, soon faded out. (Mucus in trachea.)
2-wide and 6Ls off pace and one from rear at the 1000 M, 3-wide into home straight and still one from rear, never competitive.
Keen in places and led by about a neck out 2-wide until the 600 M, hung out turning for home and faded rapidly.
On fence 3Ls off pace at 1000 M in midfield, improved to be 2Ls off pace in 2nd off home straight, disputing lead at the 200 M, no chance with winner but stayed on well nonetheless.
Briefly keen at the 1000 M, had the run of the race 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th through to 600 M, 3-wide into home straight, led just inside the 200 M marker, kept on strongly.
Slowly away, niggled along to keep up when 5Ls off pace on fence in 9th at the 1000 M, 4Ls down into home straight, 3Ls down in 5th at the 200 M, no extra.
4Ls off pace and 3-wide in midfield at the 1000 M, 4-wide without cover at 600 M and 5-wide into home straight when 4Ls off pace, 5Ls down at 200 M, faded further.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, 4-wide into home straight when 2Ls off pace in 6th, 4Ls down in 4th at the 200 M, no extra close home.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 8th at 1000 M, in midfield and 4Ls down off home turn, staying on well when 3Ls down at the 200 M but faded noticeably closing stages.
On fence and a neck behind in 2nd place until the 600 M, led by 2Ls off home turn, grabbed by pursuers passing 200 M marker, no extra but hung for a place.
Always rear until the very final 20 M, never any better than 6Ls off the pace at any stage.
Among rear group turning for home before making steady headway final 300 M.
Always prominent. Took lead briefly 200 M, found winner too strong and held on for 2nd.
7th halfway and about 5th 400 M. Stayed on to take 3rd near finish.
Never on terms.
Towards rear before making up some ground in straight. Never nearer.
Midfield into home bend and weakened quickly shortly on straightening. (Lame.)
Was prominent before taking charge passing 1400 M. Was challenged shortly on straightening and headed 200 M. Dropped out steadily.
In touch to straight where he was steadied 300 M. Kept on one-pace under pressure close home.
In touch early and was 5th turning into straight where he made no show.
Well there to straight where he quickened to lead inside final 150 M.
Last rounding home bend. Kept on in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield on the rail. Kept on quite well final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch. Found no extra soon after straightening.
Never a factor.
Slowly away, behind midfield. Made progress final turn to be midfield turning in. Ran on well in straight to snatch 2nd near finish.
Held 5th until making progress home bend to be 3rd turning in. Failed to quicken 200 M.
Near rear throughout.
Midfield. Widest turning in. One-paced.
Sat outside leader. Was 3rd rounding home bend. Faded out of contention passing 400 M.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield. Made up some ground from outside closing stages.
Took lead from 1400 M. Was joined passing 200 M. Failed to resist challenges when headed close home.
Led early, then settled in a prominent position along rail. Held 2nd rounding home bend. Came to tackle leader passing 200 M, sustained effort to take command close home.
Tracked leader. Came to challenge upon straightening. Asserted authority closing stages. Impressive. (Lame.)
Never better than midfield. No extra in straight. (Stiff hind limb action.)
Settled in midfield. Slightly hampered turning in then kept on same pace.
Midfield to 400 M. No extra in straight.
Always prominent. Kept on one pace in straight.
Attempted to make all. Fought on determinedly under pressure but found winner too good closing stages.
Chased leaders throughout. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Raced in last few to straight. Ran on down inner to be nearest at finish.
Trailed field to straight. Made up good late ground to be nearest at finish.
Held up in midfield and 3-wide most of way. Kept on well.
Slightly slow out. Soon picked up to midfield. Faded gradually in straight.
Never in contention.
Well there. 1-1/2Ls 3rd rounding home bend. Ran on well in straight to take control 100 M. Won unchallenged.
Midfield. Checked passing 800 M, dropped to towards rear. Crowded 200 M. Never recovered.
Checked at start, never in contention.
Slightly better than midfield. Steadied 500 M. Made up good ground from 7th early straight to take 2nd close home.
Behind midfield. Widest final turn. Ran on quite well from outside, just missed 2nd at finish.
Towards rear. Checked approaching 800 M. Made up some ground inside 250 M.
Led briefly early, then settled in a prominent position. Inconvenienced 200 M. No extra.
Pushed along to lead or disputed for lead 800 M. Headed 200 M. Weakened closing stages.
Never a factor.
Prominent. Joined the lead passing 800 M. Obtained slender advantage briefly 200 M. Soon found no extra.
Around midfield. Severely checked 200 M. Unable quicken to recover.
In touch from widest draw. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Settled in midfield. Lost position turning in but recovered some late ground closing stages.
Settled at the back. Ran home very well to do best work at finish.
Towards rear throughout. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Forward of midfield to straight. One-paced.
Settled just behind midfield. Found no room early in straight until producing good late impression final 150 M.
Settled behind leaders. Commenced move turning in and hit front under pressure over 100 M out.
Mostly in midfield. Faded closing stages.
Made most till headed over 100 M out.
Midfield when checked and saddle shifted approaching home bend the first time. Pulled to dispute lead about 1400 M out. Dropped out after Rock. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent with brief lead rounding stables bend. Gradually faded in straight.
Settled in midfield. Disputed 3rd under pressure some 3Ls off lead early in straight but swamped close to home.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Began well and soon eased to race in midfield or worse 3-wide. Switched wide on straightening. Under pressure 250 M out and made up little ground in the closing stages.
On jumping stood flat footed and raced at back on rail. Ridden along and switched out on straightening. At the 100 M whilst closing off strongly was checked to avoid a weakening runner.

Jumped well and raced in mid-division around 3-wide. Went forward at 1300 M to race in better than midfield. Under pressure to hold position at home bend. Failed to respond in straight and weakened badly inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly from wide draw and soon eased to the rear section closer to rail through to straight. Was disappointed for running at 200 M and shifted in to find clear running. Made up little ground in the closing stages.
Ridden along in the early stages to race in better than midfield on rail. Switched out and placed under pressure to maintain position at home bend. Stayed one-pace to line when asked 250 M out.
Began well and raced in better than midfield 2-wide. Under pressure at home turn to improve position. Ran on well in straight but unable to find an extra gear to trouble the winner.
Soon settled in midfield 2-wide. Around the 1400 M whilst proving difficult to settle was steadied when closed to heels. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.

Began fairly and ridden along to race in prominent position on rail. Went forward to join leader after 1200 M and took outright lead going up the Rock. Responded well when asked 250 M out to win convincingly.
Slowly away and niggled along to race in midfield or worse 2 to 3-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened in the closing stages.
Slow to begin and raced in midfield or worse on fence. Made steady improvement turning for home. Made up steady ground when asked 250 M out to be closest at finish.

Began awkwardly and raced in worse than midfield on rail. Was checked shortly after the start and around the 1400 M was steadied when crowded for room. Commenced to give ground at 1100 M and became detached after the 800 M.

Jumped well and took lead on rail from 400 M 1st time. Was joined by the winner shortly after the 1200 M. Weakened slightly on entering the home turn. Found nothing in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
6Ls off pace in 10th at 800 M, in rear when 5Ls down into home straight, still 5Ls down at 200 M, nearest at the finish. (See Racing Incidents.)
In 2nd place 1L off pace out 2-wide through to home straight, all out at 200 M and still in 2nd place, faded thereafter.
On fence in rear about 5Ls off speed until home straight, slight improvement at 200 M, nearest at finish. (Moderately lame.)
Had run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th through to home straight, no better off at the 200 M, always held in closing stages.
Three back the fence about 4Ls off speed in midfield until straightening up, never troubled principals.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace at 800 M. 3-wide and 1L off pace into home straight, led at 300 M, hung on.
4Ls down in midfield at 800 M, 3Ls down in 5th when 2-wide into home straight, 2Ls down and still 5th at 200 M, kept on well but always looked held.
Very awkwardly away, towards rear about 5Ls off pace at 800 M, never threatened.
5Ls down on fence in midfield through to home straight, 3Ls down and staying on well at 200 M, finished off strongly but post came too soon.
Caught 3-wide without cover throughout in midfield and 3Ls or 4Ls off pace, very weak in home straight.
Soon led, about 1L clear on fence through to home straight, headed about 300 M out, faded.
In rear out 2-wide about 5Ls off pace until home stretch, never got into it.
Missed the kick slightly and was pressured hard early to get to the lead. Raced alongside leader from 800M until straightening. Unable to quicken after 200M and was one-paced to line.

Jumped well but was unable to muster enough early speed to race in front. Steadied at 1000M and raced on fence in rear division in back straight. Made up good ground in straight but just missed out on 2nd place.
Jumped awkwardly but ridden on to race about 3Ls behind leader from 800M on. 3-wide turning in. Improved steadily in the straight and drew clear inside final 100M.
Unable to find early speed and soon raced near rear. Remained at the rear of the field and ran past some beaten runners final stages.
Good jump from wide draw and was able to cross to the lead by 1000M. Remained on lead until being swamp just before the line to miss out on a minor placing.
Unable to find early speed and was soon racing 2-wide behind midfield. Improved steadily near the rock and was within 3Ls of the lead turning in. Stayed on well to the line.
Jumped well. No attempt to ride for speed and settled near midfield in the early and middle stages. Pressured 700 M to hold position. Only one-paced to line.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and was soon eased to the back. Remained at the rear of the field until commencing its run rounding home turn. Made up good ground towards the outside part to the straight.
Ridden along to be 3-wide and 3Ls behind pace 800M out. Continued to race close to the lead and was 4-wide turning in. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
Jumped a bit slow and was soon racing near rear at 1000M. Improved to near midfield at 600M. 3-wide turning in. Kept on well to line.
Quickest out. Remained on fence within 2Ls of the leader into home straight. Weakened final stages.
Began well but soon settled near rear. Pressured from 600 M and improved from 3-wide position rounding home. Made a strong run in the straight to be closest at finish.
Towards rear about 6Ls or 7Ls off pacer until straightening, 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, squeezed through narrow gap at 100 M to lead final strides.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 800 M, disputing lead into home straight, 1L clear at 200 M, headed at 100 M, faded.
Towards rear and 2-wide and 8Ls down at 800 M, 5Ls down at 400 M, 3Ls down and crowded at 200 M, never looked like the winner.
Soon led, never clear by more than 2Ls, joined into home straight, faded.
In midfield about 5Ls off pace at 800 M, 3Ls down and 6th into home straight and at 200 M, led about 100 M out, headed until final strides.
Had box-seat position in 3rd or 4th 2Ls off pace on fence until home straight, short of room at 200 M, never threatened.
2 and 3-wide about 5Ls off pace until home straight, one-paced thereafter.
4Ls down and 2-wide in 5th at 800 M, advanced when 3-wide without cover at 600 M, 4-wide and 2Ls down into straight, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, no extra close home.
Slowly away and never a factor.
Never got into it.
In rear about 7Ls off pace at 800 M, in 10th about 5Ls down at 400 M, 4Ls down at 200 M, nearest at the finish.
In 4th 2-wide 3Ls off pace at 800 M, closer into home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Rear early. Pushed along to recover ground to better than midfield. Crept closer to 2nd along rail early straight. Failed to quicken final 200 M.
Slightly better than midfield. Made up some ground inside 250 M.
Began awkwardly from a wide draw. Ridden along to join the leader near 1100 M. Faded final 400 M.
Slightly behind midfield. One-paced.
In touch early, soon dropped back steadily to the rear. No improvement.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight, just failing to catch the winner.
Among the rear group, last rounding home bend. Ran past a few beaten horses in straight.
Near rear throughout.
Prominent in 3-wide. Failed to hold place inside 250 M.
Led. Was joined near 1100 M. Re-gained 1L advantage turning in. Just held on.
Midfield. Dropped out from final turn.
Checked soon after start, near rear. Ran on well final 400 M.
Soon prominent. Weakened from 5th soon after straightening.
Towards rear. Widest final turn. Kept on moderately in straight.
Chased leader to straight then weakened.
Prominent and wide. Gave ground gradually in straight.
Mostly in midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Settled in midfield. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Broke well. Travelled in first few until finding no extra after straightening.
Settled in rear on rails. Ran on steadily on inner to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Behind midfield. Hampered into straight. Improving when steadied 200 M out. Sustained headway to finish.
Well there to 300 M. Dropped out.
Settled in midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening and ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Never seen with a chance.
Broke well and raced wide amongst leaders. Took over coming out of back straight. Kept on well to win readily.
Trailed field into straight. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Among the rear group. Crept closer on straightening. Made up good ground 300 M, never nearer.
Settled 5th. Weakened steadily soon after straightening.
Midfield. Made some minor progress final turn to early straight. Soon one-paced.
Behind midfield. Faded from 500 M.
Among the rear group. Made up some ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Held 2nd to early straight. Soon weakened.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield. Made progress from final turn to be 3rd 200 M out. Soon found no extra.
Towards rear throughout.
Soon last from the widest draw. Moved up from outside final turn. Ran on steadily in straight, just got up final strides.
Soon 3rd in 3-wide. Dropped out from final turn.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
In touch. Moved up early straight to chase the leader. Failed to hold 2nd place passing 200 M.
Led field until headed 100 M. No extra.
Towards rear. Ran on well 350 M, taking lead near 100 M. Just failed to resist winner's challenges near finish.
Broke well. Settled in midfield. Lost position when wide entering straight, then recovered ground steadily without threatening.
Settled at the back. No clear run behind runners around midfield before producing good late impression close home.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Raced wide throughout in forward of midfield. Made modest progress without threatening.
Better than midfield to straight. Weakened.
Around midfield. Faded under pressure in straight.
Prominent briefly. Dropped to midfield home bend. Lost further ground into straight.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Well there. Hit front 200 M out but worn down close to home.
Led till joined into straight. Unable to sustain effort and headed final 200 M.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well down inner to grab victory close to home.
Settled at the back. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Well back. Commenced move entering straight making some headway but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Midfield far side. Lost position coming out of back straight. No further impression thereafter.

On jumping reared and lost a lot of ground. Raced in rear section on rail. At 1000 M made slight improvement to be in midfield turning for home. Made up steady ground in straight to be closest at finish.
Pushed along in early stages to race in midfield 2 wide. Ridden along to maintain position at home bend. Under pressure 400 M out but only able to keep on evenly to the line.

Broke well and soon raced in prominent position on rail. Switched out on straightening to final clear running. Stayed one-pace when asked 350 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M. (Displayed mild heat stress.)

Raced in a forward position in the early stages. From 1300 M steadily dropped to mid-division 3 wide under pressure at home bend to hold position. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Pushed along in the early stages to race in midfield on inner. Switched out and ridden along to go forward at home bend. All out 350 M out and made up steady ground to snatch 3rd place on the line.
Soon eased to race in rear section towards the outside through to straight. Failed to respond to pressure in straight and only ran past couple of beaten runners.

Jumped fairly and raced in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Have difficulty obtaining clear running between 300 M to 200 M. Found the line well thereafter and missed the winner narrowly.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in worse than midfield around 3 wide. Gave ground steadily turning for home and tailed out in straight. (Sustained a cut to left hind pastern.)
Began very awkwardly and raced in rear section around 2 wide. Under pressure at home bend but failed to improve. Made no impression in straight. (Lost left hind plate.)
Raced keenly to lead on rail through to straight. Kept on fairly in straight, headed 100 M out and steadily weakened thereafter.
Began well from wide draw and eased towards the rear 4 wide. Under pressure at home bend but failed to respond. Made no impression in straight.
Began fairly and settled in midfield or worse 3 wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out and fended off late challenge from 2nd placegetter to win by a short margin.
Raced in worse than midfield on rail. At 1100 M went forward to race in midfield through to straight. Responded fairly when asked 300 M out but just missed out on the placing by a narrow margin.

Niggled along to race in prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 300 M out but failed to find any extra to fend off challenge from 3rd placegetter to be overhauled on the line.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, 2-wide and 4Ls down into home straight in 5th, never threatened principals.
In 2nd place 1L off pace and 2-wide at 800 M, 2Ls down and driven along to lie up with pacesetting winner into home straight, 4Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, one-paced.
Slowly away, 4-wide in rear down back straight at least 7Ls off lead, 5-wide into stretch when 6Ls down, finished off well through final 200 M to comfortably secure a place.
3-wide with cover at 800 M in 10th place when 5Ls off pace, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, still 5Ls down in 5th at 200 M, no extra.
On fence 1L off pace in 2nd at 800 M, soon driven along while losing position, eased down upon straightening, bled.
Very keen at 1200 M, caught at least 4-wide without cover until home straight, 2Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, 4Ls down in 4th and fading on straightening, faded further.
Prominent early, led on fence by 2Ls at 900 M, still 2Ls clear and travelling very well into home straight, shot 4Ls clear at 200 M, pushed out, easily.
Slightly worse than midfield about 5Ls off speed and 2-wide through to home straight, never got into it.
Awkwardly away and threw head around on jumping, 2-wide and about 6Ls off pace towards rear until home straight, never able to challenge.
Fractious in gates, 3-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 800 M and into home straight, all out and 4Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, one-paced to line.
On fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield until straightening, giving ground when steadied at 200 M, faded further.
Towards rear and 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, still at least 5Ls off speed in 11th off home turn, staying on well in 4th place when short of room at 200 M, kept on well for 2nd.
3-wide with cover in midfield about 4Ls off pace through to home straight, no impression.
Crossed from wide draw to inner, towards fence in 2nd last about 6Ls or more down back straight, 8Ls down off home bend in rear, made some moderate late headway.
2 and 3-wide down back straight in midfield about 5Ls off speed, 5-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, no extra.
Fractious in the gates and slowly away, in 2nd last place at least 10Ls off pace at 1000 M, 9Ls down and 5-wide into home straight, no chance.
Worse than midfield about 6Ls off pace at 800 M, 2-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in 8th, picked up well to lead at 150 M, driven out.
Soon in 2nd place about 1L off speed out 2-wide down, 2Ls down in 2nd into homestretch, found nothing under pressure.
No speed early and in last place at least 11Ls off pace down back straight, never competitive.
Soon led, 2Ls clear on fence at 900 M and into home straight, headed by winner at 150 M, hung on gamely for 2nd.
On fence no worse than about 3Ls off pace in 5th through to home straight, 2Ls down at 200 M and one-paced in 6th, faded thereafter.
2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in 5th or 6th until home straight when steadied, faded rapidly thereafter.
Niggled along towards rear at 800 M when 2-wide and 8Ls off pace, under strong pressure into home straight, never able to challenge.
3-wide and 3Ls off pace in 3rd at 800 M and into home straight, 2Ls down in 7th at 200 M, one-paced close home.
In midfield on fence about 5Ls off pace at 800 M, 4Ls down in 6th off home turn, 1L down in 3rd and with every chance at 200 M, couldn't follow through.
2 and 3-wide down back straight in midfield about 4Ls off speed, 4-wide entering home straight, 2Ls down and all out at 200 M in 5th place, one-paced close home.
Slowly away, towards rear when 3-wide and 8Ls off pace at 900 M, 4-wide into home straight when still 8Ls down, made some moderate late headway.
Always 3-wide worse than midfield and about 5Ls off pace until home straight, no impression.
3-wide without cover down back straight when prominent in 3rd or 4th place, gained cover 600 M out when 2Ls down but under pressure, dropped out from top of home straight.
3-wide in midfield about 3Ls off pace down back straight, 5-wide and 5Ls down into home straight and under pressure, faded steadily.
3 and 4-wide down back straight in midfield when about 4Ls off pace, 4-wide and under pressure into home straight, soon beaten.
Slowly away, 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield down back straight and 4-wide but with cover, widest of all (7-wide) into home straight when 6Ls down, faded out.
Slowly away, 4-wide down back straight when near rear and about 5Ls off pace, further adrift into home straight, dropped out.
