Keen early on, 2-wide and 6Ls off pace towards rear at 900 M, 4Ls down in midfield into home straight, soon outpaced.
4-wide in rear about 7Ls off speed down back straight, travelled well out 6-wide and still 7Ls off pace off home turn, improving but still 6Ls adrift at 200 M, nearest at the finish.
On fence about 2Ls off pace in 4th or 5th until home straight, outpaced from then on.
6Ls off pace and towards rear and niggled along at 1000 M, 4Ls down in midfield into home straight, never competitive.
Checked on fence at 1200 M, 4Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, 3Ls down in 5th into home straight, 3Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, ran on strongly but post came too soon.
Raced 4 and 5-wide without cover down back straight, improved to 2Ls off pace at 700 M, 6-wide and toiling entering straight, rapidly fell away.
Crossed from wide gate to lead on fence by 2Ls at 900 M, 1L clear entering homestretch, shot 3Ls clear at the 200 M, hung on well.
Slowly away losing 2Ls at start, over-raced early on, 2-wide and 3Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, 3-wide and 2Ls down in 3rd into home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Led at the 1200 M, headed by winner at 1000 M, 1L off pace in 2nd through to home straight, nearly 3Ls behind in 2nd at 200 M, when all out.
In last 3 and 4-wide down back straight and at least 12Ls off pace, 2-wide entering straight when 7Ls down in rear, held up at 300 M, ran on okay to be nearest at the finish.
Had the run of the race on fence disputing 2nd 2Ls or 3Ls off pace until home straight, all out at 200 M to hold this position, faded markedly through closing stages.
On fence 12Ls off pace in 12th at 900 M, 7Ls down in rear entering straight, short of room at the 300 M, never looked like getting into it.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, 2-wide into home straight and 5Ls down in midfield, dropped rapidly from the 300 M.
Awkwardly away, niggled along on fence 7Ls off pace in 7th at 1000 M, 5Ls down in midfield entering straight, never troubled leaders.
4Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, 4Ls down in 5th at top of home straight, well outpaced from 300 M.
2-wide in 10th place 9Ls off the pace at 1000 M, 3-wide into home straight in midfield and 5Ls off pace, 2Ls down in 5th at 200 M, one-paced closing stages.
2-wide and 11Ls off pace in 11th at 900 M, 3-wide into home straight when 6Ls off pace and still towards rear, 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, no extra.
7Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th at 1000 M, 3-wide into home straight in midfield and 5Ls down, 4Ls down at 200 M, one-paced concluding stages.
2-wide and 2Ls or 3Ls off pace through to home straight when disputing 2nd, 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, couldn't follow through.
In rear about 14Ls off pace at 900 M, widest of all (5-wide) into home straight when 6Ls off pace in rear bunch, faded rapidly.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 3Ls, 2Ls up into home straight and at 200 M, headed by winner at 100 M, hung on well for 2nd place.
In 9th 9Ls off pace on fence at 1000 M, 3-wide and 6Ls off speed and still rear into home straight, quickened up very well to lead at 100 M, impressive.
5-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in 4th, swamped at the 200 M, faded.
Towards rear before making up some ground in straight.
In rear to home bend before making up some ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield halfway and was 8th or 9th on straightening. Improved to be 3rd 100 M and was one-paced thereafter.
Took up running from 1200 M and led field to straight. Was headed 200 M out and found no extra.
2nd into straight where he faded rapidly.
Never troubled leaders.
Never in the hunt.
6th into home bend and was 5th at 400 M. Improved from 300 M to hold every chance final 200 M.
Well there to straight where he stayed on to lead breifly approaching 200 M. Soon headed and dropped out of contention.
Worse than midfield into straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Soon led till headed 1200 M. Shared 3rd into straight where he kept on to threaten 250 M. Soon beaten.
Towards rear till making up some late progress final 200 M.
Never far off to home bend and could make no impression on leaders final 200 M.
About 10th 1200 m and just behind midfield before home turn. Ran on in straight to dispute lead 200 M, gaining advantage near finish.
Slowly away and soon clipped heels. In the rear until making up some ground 200 M out.
Took lead from 1200 M. Faded when headed 250 M.
Better than midfield. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
In touch. Ran on from 3rd final turn to take lead 200 M. Kept on until headed final 50 M.
Towards rear. Made some moderate progress on inside in straight.
Midfield. Weakened inside 300 M.
Mainly 5th on inside. Kept on well final 300 M but failed to prevail final strides.
Towards rear. Made up good ground from outside in straight, never nearer.
Behind midfield. Dropped back steadily from home turn.
Sat outside leader until taking over briefly 250 M. Found no extra when beaten 200 M.
Prominent. Failed to hold place when 3rd at 500 M.
Towards rear. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Slowly away, raced in the rear. Made progress passing 800 M, being 4-wide 10th turning in. Ran on well inside 250 M to take command close home.
Settled towards rear from widest draw. Kept on moderately in straight.
Settled in midfield. Quickened to hold good chance early in straight but unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Never seen with chance.
Prominent to straight then gradually weakened.
Raced in rear of midfield. Ran on well in straight to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish while a difficult ride hanging in.
Disputed lead into straight then soon weakened.
Broke well and soon held narrow lead. Went 1L clear briefly on straightening but soon overhauled 200 M out.
Wide in midfield to straight. Weakened.
Settled behind leaders. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M but swamped close to home.
Raced wide in rear. Finished off race well down centre of straight.
Forward of midfield to straight. Faded gradually.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on to challenge upon straightening. Asserted authority close to home.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily on rails in straight.
Soon prominent. Tracked the leader 400 M until failing to quicken closing stages.
Towards rear throughout. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield or behind. No progress final 200 M.
Soon led. Was headed 400 M. Faded 200 M out.
Prominent. Gained slender advantage 400 M. Just beaten marginally in a ding-dong battle with the winner final 100 M.
Never a factor. (See Racing Incidents.)
Midfield. Dropped back steadily from 600 M.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield 400 M. Made up further ground while disappointed for a run near 300 M and 200 M. Held up a bit closing stages.
Jumped well and took lead early stages. Dropped back to 5th course proper. Kept on without quickening thereafter.
At rear throughout.
Soon behind midfield. Recovered some moderate ground inside 200 M.
Better than midfield. Kept on.
Always there. Sustained effort 250 M to just get up in a ding-dong battle final 100 M.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Made some progress halfway. Ran on very well 250 M out to miss narrowly near finish.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Raced wide towards rear. Quickened to hold every chance inside 200 M but found nothing close to home.
Held up just behind midfield. Steadied for a run on rails shortly after straightening. Produced good late impression after.
Raced in last few. Produced some late impression in straight.
Settled in midfield. Kept on when tight between runners early in straight. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Broke well. Settled behind leaders. Gradually weakened after straightening.
Midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Never on terms.
Prominent. Not much room behind runners early in straight. Found nothing closing stages.
Settled at the back. Ran on well in straight from last to first for confident victory.
Took up running 400 M after start. Overhauled final 200 M.
Mostly in forward of midfield to straight. One-paced.
Wide far side. Quickly moved up to prominent position before coming out of back straight. Remained well there before dropping out gradually in straight.
Never far off. Ridden and quickened to hit front inside 200 M but found winner too good.
Broke fairly and soon raced in midfield around 3 wide through to straight. Did not respond well when asked 350 M out and only able to run on evenly to the line.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and was soon steadied to the rear but closer to rail. Proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Switched wide turning for home and made up good ground in straight to be closest at finish.
Slow to begin and raced in midfield or worse on rail. Gradually switched out turning for home. All out 300 M out and made up good ground to snatch victory on the line.

Slowly away and raced in rear 3 wide. After 800 M was carried out wide without cover and soon went forward to be prominent on straightening. Kept on evenly in straight but weakened slightly in the closing stages.
Slow to begin and ridden along to race in mid-division 2 to 3 wide. Steadily shifted out on straightening but stayed one-pace to the line when asked 350 M out.
Pushed along to race in a forward position 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and weakened badly inside final 200 M.
Jumped well and raced in midfield towards the outside. Went forward to join leading pack at home bend. Failed to respond in straight and weakened quickly 250 M out.

On jumping bounded in the air and lost ground. Soon raced in rear section on rail. Steadily shifted to the outside turning for home. Kept on one-pace to the line when asked 300 M out. (Displaced soft palate.)

Began well and raced in midfield or better on rail. Was unable to improve position for some distance after the 500 M when awkwardly placed behind runners. Only able to run past several beaten runners in straight.
Hard ridden in the early stages to race in a forward position on rail. Under pressure at home bend to maintain position. Found nothing when asked 400 M and steadily weakened thereafter.
Soon raced towards the rear around 2 wide. Switched out on straightening and made up little ground when asked 300 M out. Near the 100 M was steadied when disappointed for running.

Raced in prominent position 2 wide and took up running on rail after the 1000 M mark. Under pressure 250 M out but only able to keep on evenly and was soon headed after the 200 M mark to settle for 4th place.
Began fairly and raced in midfield 2 wide. Peeled out to obtain clear running turning for home. Kept on well when asked 350 M out but unable to match speed with 1st pair in the closing stages.
Jumped well and raced in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M and kept on one-pace to the line.
Disputed lead out 3-wide early on before going on to lead from 1000 M, half a length clear off home turn, headed by winner at 300 M, faded steadily.
A neck 3rd out 2-wide 1000 M out, steadied to be 2Ls down at 800 M and 3Ls down into home straight when ridden along, beaten 200 M out. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Advanced to within 1L of pace out 4-wide without cover in 4th place at 1000 M, still well there in 2nd place on straightening, no chance with winner but hung on well for runners-up slot.
4-wide and 5Ls off pace in 12th place 900 M out, never got any closer to the lead than that.
Always detached in rear, never better than about 8Ls off pace at any point.
Well placed on fence 2Ls off pace at 1000 M, between 3Ls and 4Ls off speed on fence from 800 M to home straight, every chance of a place 250 M out, faded inside final 100 M.
Caught 4-wide without cover and 3Ls off the pace at 1000 M, 2Ls off lead and 3-wide entering straight, picked up well to lead at 300 M, driven clear.
Bumped at start, led on fence until 1000 M, no worse than 1L off speed until straightening for home, rather one-paced from then on.
Crowded at start, in midfield 3Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1000 M, 4Ls down on straightening, 3Ls off winner at 200 M, just missed out on 2nd place.
Best away, restrained to sit 2-wide and 5Ls off speed from 1000 M to homestretch, made some moderate late headway.
Crowded at start, on fence 5Ls off pace at 900 M, 4Ls down off home turn but soon outpaced.
One from rear 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, never looked like getting involved at any stage.
3-wide and 3Ls off pace in midfield at 1000 M, niggled slightly at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls down and hard ridden, kept on well for pressure on run-in.
3-wide and 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, 6Ls down and 3-wide into home straight, never competitive.

Towards rear section near 800 M. 3-wide turning in and was about 9Ls behind leader upon straightening. Shifted out and quickened rapidly when asked 400 M out and charged home strongly to claim victory inside final 50 M.
Jumped quickly to the lead. Remained in the lead until being challenged after the 400 M, unable to quicken and was one pace to line.
Eased to the rear from wide draw early on. Last one to enter the straight and did not get any closer in the straight.
Jumped well to race near pace early on. Raced 2-wide and 4Ls behind pace at 800 M. Under pressure 300 M out and kept on without threatening.
Settled on fence behind midfield at 800 M. Very one-paced in the straight and ran on without making any ground.
Travelled 2-wide behind midfield at 800 M. About 7Ls down entering home straight. Ran on without quickening much.
Settled at midfield about 6Ls behind pace at 800 M. Pressured 400 M out with good response. Led briefly inside final 150 M but failed to hold off winner in the closing stages.
Raced upside the leader near 800 M. 3-wide turning in. Every chance 350 M out but weakened quickly after 200 M.
Broke well and remained on fence and within 2Ls of leader entering home straight. Pressured from 400 M out and every chance at 300 M. Swamped thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and was ridden along early to remain close to midfield. Hung out near 800 M and was 4-wide rounding home turn. Closed the race off steadily but was not a threat to the top pair.
Drew wide barrier and was soon eased back to race at the rear. Remained at rear near fence at 600 M. Moved towards outside upon straightening and made up good ground in the straight.
Soon raced in rear section. Remained near rear and 2-wide rounding home turn. Quickened after 400 M and kept on well until finish.
Jumped fairly. Travelled on fence near midfield at 800 M. Improved gradually on fence rounding home turn. Ran into a tight run on fence at 300 M for disputed lead. Continued on only fairly.
Last one out and was niggled along to be midfield around 800 M. Pressure from 400 M out and ran on only fairly.
3-wide and 4Ls off pace at 900 M, closer turning for home when 4-wide, kept on well to be nearest at finish but never troubled principals.
Slowly away, on fence 3Ls off pace at 900 M, 2Ls down and 2-wide off home turn, kept on fairly but was outpaced by principals.
Keen when 6Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1000 M, 3-wide and 4Ls off pace on straightening, switched inside at 300 M for clear running, quickened up very well to lead 50 M out.
3-wide and in rear at least 8Ls off speed down back straight, never a factor.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off the pace until home straight, 1L down 200 M out, no extra.
2-wide and on fence in 2nd place at 1000 M, in 3rd place and driven along 1L off speed off home turn, weakened final 100 M.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace 900 M out, 3-wide into home straight, never on terms.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace at 800 M, 2Ls down into home straight, lost touch from about 200 M out.
4-wide and 6Ls off pace 900 M out, 5-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in 10th place, nearest at the finish.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, 4Ls down off home turn when worse than midfield, dropped out steadily.
Led early on, 1L to the good at the 800 M, disputed lead from home turn to 100 M, headed by winner at 50 M, kept on for 2nd place.
On fence 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, under pressure and 5Ls down off final bend, never competitive.
3-wide without cover and 2Ls off pace 900 M out, turned for home quite wide (5-wide) but disputing the lead, a neck down in 2nd 200 M out, faded slightly close home.
Caught 4 and 5-wide without cover down back straight when about 8Ls off speed, 7Ls down into stretch, moderate late headway to be nearest at the finish.
Well there to straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Among rear group into straight where he stayed on a bit.
Never a factor.
About 10th approaching home turn. Kept on same pace final 150 M.
About 5th into straight and was 3rd 200 M. Found no extra.
Never on terms.
Well there before losing ground final 250 M.
Towards rear before making up good ground closing stages to lead final strides.
Soon took up running and led field to straight. Was headed 200 M out and dropped out quickly.
Midfield home bend. Stayed on well in straight to lead passing 200 M before finding winner too strong close to finish.
Never far off to straight where he failed to hold place from the 250 M.
Worse than midfield into straight where he kept on well to threaten near finish.
Prominent to straight where he quickened to lead 200 M. Was soon headed but kept on well to line.
Mostly midfield to home bend and could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Towards rear from widest draw. Made up good ground from outside in straight, just failing to obtain a minor placing.
Rear. Recovered some late ground closing stages.
Prominent, 2nd from final turn. Weakened out of contention final 200 M.
Led field soon after start. Kept on until headed close home.
Led briefly early, soon settled just better than midfield. Slightly progressed to 4th home bend. Kept on until one-paced closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Behind midfield on inside. Made some minor progress early straight, then one-paced.
Never far off. Ran on steadily from 5th 400 M to assert authority inside 50 M.
In touch early, soon in midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Moved up to be prominent. Faded from 3rd passing 300 M. (Bled.)
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield early, gradually dropped back towards the rear. Recovered good ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Prominent early, soon dropped to 6th. Kept on until weakened 250 M out.
Near rear. Made up some ground from outside final 200 M.
Better than midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Always wide towards rear. One-paced.
Midfield or behind. Kept on steadily in centre of straight.
Midfield. Not much room inside 200 M. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Ran on steadily but raced tightly between runners closing stages.
Broke well. Travelled with leaders. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Wide in midfield. Quickened well upon straightening to take charge close to home.
Always well there. Failed to quicken to draw level final stages.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Mostly in front to straight. Swamped close to home.
Tailed off most of way.
Never better than midfield. No extra final 200 M.
Midfield into straight. Dropped out.
Well back. Ran on well down straight to be nearest at finish.
Well there to 300 M. Faded. (Heart irregularity.)
In touch. Gradual progress to dispute for lead course proper. Took clear advantage passing 400 M. Won unchallenged.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield from 400 M. Ran on quite well final 250 M.
Prominent to 200 M. Weakened.
In touch. Failed to quicken inside 200 M.
Always at the back.
Prominent on inside rail until weakening out of contention passing 200 M.
Mainly 4th or 5th until finding no extra final 150 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made ground to midfield passing course proper. Kept on.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily final 250 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield early, soon dropped to the rear group. Recovered some ground closing stages.
Midfield. Ran on final 400 M but unable to threaten the winner.
Near rear. Made up good ground on the outside rail inside 300 M, never nearer.
Towards rear throughout. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Broke well settling in first few. Faded gradually in straight.
Broke well and niggled along from poor draw but never quite get to the rails. Kept on steadily without quickening under pressure in straight.
Always in last few.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without quickening under pressure.
Well there to straight. Dropped out.
Settled around midfield. Finished off race well.
Midfield. Took closer order entering straight. Ran on steadily to claim 2nd final strides.
Held up just behind leaders. Kept on steadily in straight but swamped for placing closing stages.
Behind midfield. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Midfield. Ran on well between runners down straight to be nearest at finish.
Settled in last few. Kept on same pace in straight.
Never nearer.
Made all and went clear under pressure in straight.

Unable to muster early speed to race in worse than midfield 2 wide. Switched out to find clear running on straightening. Made up steady ground when asked 350 M but was never in position to trouble the 1st pair.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield 3 wide through to straight. Stayed on same pace when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M. (Rider dropped his whip near the 200 M.)
Began fairly and raced in midfield or worse 3 wide. Gradually shifted to the outside on straightening. Under pressure 350 M out but failed to quicken and stayed one-pace to the line.
Broke fairly from wide draw and niggled along to take lead on fence after 1100 M. Headed shortly after straightening. Failed to respond to pressure and further weakened inside final 150 M.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail. Near the 1000 M was checked when crowded for room. Failed to respond to pressure in straight and steadily dropped out from 250 M out.
Raced in rear section 2 to 3 wide. Switched out turning for home. Only able to keep on evenly to the line when asked 300 M out.

Jumped well and raced in better than midfield out wide. Went forward to race outside leader shortly after 1000 M mark. Responded well to pressure and took lead after 400 M but was unable to match speed with winner final 100 M.
Slowly away and ridden along to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out but unable to quicken and kept on evenly to the line.
Soon raced in mid-division towards the outside through to straight. Found nothing when asked 300 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Jumped fairly and raced in midfield or better 2 wide. In the early stages was proving difficult to settle. Switched out on straightening. Hung in and proved difficult to ride out when asked 200 M out but still able to win comfortably.
Slow to begin and raced at back on rail through to straight. Stayed one-pace when asked 300 M out and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Began well and raced in better than midfield 2 wide. Near the 1000 M was checked when crowded for room. Stayed in similar position through to straight. Only ran on evenly to the line when asked 300 M out.

Soon settled towards the rear on rail and stayed in similar position through to straight. Unable to find clear running in early part of straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M when clear running was obtained.
Slow to begin and raced towards the rear on the outside through to straight. Made no impression in straight.
Lay 7th on fence 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, niggled slightly at 800 M, 2-wide into straight, picked up well to be 2Ls off pace disputing 4th 200 M out, kept on gamely for hard driving, led on line.
On fence 3Ls off pace in 4th or 5th down back straight, lacked gears off home turn, kept on fairly well again close home to be nearest at the finish.
3-wide without cover and 3Ls off speed 1100 M out in 5th place, 2Ls 4th at 800 M, 3Ls 3rd off home turn, beaten over 200 M out.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide without cover when 6Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, toiling when caught 4-wide without cover into home straight, found nothing under pressure.
Slowly away, on fence 7Ls in 10th position at 1000 M, no better off and struggling into straight, very one-paced.
Broke tardily, in 11th place 2-wide and 7Ls off pace 1000 M out, 3-wide into straight when 5Ls off lead, 2Ls down and disputing 4th at the 200 M, led 50 M out, collared right on the line.
One from rear on fence 9Ls off pace at 1000 M, 2-wide into stretch when 8Ls down, made some moderate late headway.
In rear 2-wide and 9Ls off pace at 1000 M, still rear and 3-wide into straight when 8Ls off pace, never a factor.
Disputed lead very early on, 2Ls off pace in 3rd when on fence at 800 M, in trouble entering straight, emptied right out and was tailing off at the 200 M pole.
In 12th spot at 1000 M when 7Ls off speed and 3-wide, had cover when 6Ls down and 4-wide into straight, challenged out wider, 2Ls down at 200 M, narrowly missed a place.
In midfield 6Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1000 M, closer in 5th and 3-wide on straightening, half a length down in 2nd with very strong chance at 200 M, headed 50 M out, just hung on for a place.
Narrow lead out 2-wide at 1400 M, got to fence at 800 M to lead by 1L, clear by 2Ls off home turn, headed 50 M out, no extra, solid effort nonetheless.
2-wide and 5Ls off lead in 6th at 1000 M, closer but under pressure to keep in touch off home turn, dropped out from 250 M out.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd 1000 M out, 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, 2Ls down in 2nd off home turn, swamped 200 M out, eased close home.
Jumped well and raced upside the leader from 1000 M until straightening. Unable to quicken thereafter and weakened inside final 200 M.
Niggled along to be around midfield in the early stages. Caught wide rounding home. Made a run when being put under pressure 400 M out but was unable to threaten winner.
Raced 3-wide better than midfield early. 3-wide and 2 to 3Ls behind leader turning in. Kept on until tiring inside final 200 M.
Niggled along from 3-wide to race within 2Ls of pace until 800 M out. Remained 3-wide near pace rounding home turn. No response under pressure and gradually dropped out.
Raced wide behind midfield early stages. Pressured from 800 M out to hold position. Widest turning in and found nothing in the straight.

Quickest out from wide draw and led from 1100 M out. Continued to lead by no more than a length until being challenged by the eventual winner 400 M out. Fought on well before relinquishing lead inside 200 M.
Last one out and niggled along on fence near the rear. Crept closer to midfield rounding home turn. Made up some late ground in the final 200 M.
Settled 3-wide behind midfield until upon straightening. Made up some late ground in the final 200 M.
Travelled 2-wide near midfield early. Within 2Ls of leader 600 M out. Unable to make up much ground in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly from wide draw and was eased back to race at the rear of the field. Remained at rear until running past a few weakening runners in the straight.

Jumped from wide draw and settled near rear. 2-wide rounding home turn and moved further out for clear run upon straightening. Made up good ground in the straight and just missed out on a minor placing.

Jumped well and settled in prominent position. Right behind leader entering home straight. Shifted out to challenge leader 400 M out. Fought on well and gained lead 200 M out. Held off late challenge from 2nd placegetter.
Prominent early. Steadied when crowded near the 1000 M and continued its run on fence in midfield until being pressured upon straightening. Ran on without threatening.

Eased back to race behind midfield early. Improved to midfield rounding home turn. Held up in early straight. Quickened when asked 300 M out and closed off well in the final stages to be nearest at finish.
2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 11th place at 1000 M, 5-wide into home straight when still 8Ls down, beaten 200 M out.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace from 1000 M to home straight, led passing 200 M marker, ran on strongly.
Caught 3 and 4-wide without cover down back straight when about 4Ls off pace in midfield, niggled along out 3-wide at the 800 M, 3-wide into home straight, never looked like getting involved.
2-wide and 4Ls off speed in 4th at 800 M, same distance off pace off final bend, stayed on dourly to be nearest at the finish.
Very quickly away and crossed to fence to lead by 2Ls 1200 M out, held this advantage until home straight, grabbed by winner at 200 M, lost out on runners-up berth final strides.
Slowly away and checked at start, on fence 9Ls in 12th place 1000 M out, under pressure and outpaced entering straight, never a factor.
2-wide and 9Ls off pace when one from rear 1400 M out, same distance adrift but 3-wide into stretch, switched off heels at 300 M, 6Ls down at 200 M, ran on strongly to take 2nd on line.
Settled in 4th or 5th place about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace from back to home straight, 3Ls down in 3rd place at 200 M, one-paced final stages.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th at 1000 M, similarly placed when 3-wide into home straight, never a threat but made some late ground anyway.
Couldn't lead as he usually does, settled 3-wide early and 3Ls off pace at 1200 M, 2-wide and 2Ls down from 1000 M to home turn, soon dropped right out.
On fence 6Ls off pace in 9th 1000 M out, never looked like being better than midfield at any stage.
Awkwardly away, in rear on fence 11Ls off pace 1000 M out, still 10Ls down on straightening, never able to challenge.
Checked exiting gates, 2-wide and 5Ls off speed in 7th at 1000 M, 2-wide into straight in midfield, no impression.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 10th at 1000 M, never a factor, eased down final 100 M.
Always well there. Took lead 200 M but found winner too strong near finish.
Worse than midfield to straight where he made some headway final 100 M.
2nd last into straight where he stayed on close home.
Settled in rear to straight where he ran on a bit.
Never in contention.
Pulled hard in 5th before 1200 M and was about 7th on straightening. Made no show after.
Never a factor.
Showed early speed to be in front and led field to straight. Found no extra when headed 200 M.
About 4th turning into straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
Was 5th before improving from 800 M to be 2nd or 3rd coming into straight. Kept on without quickening final 250 M.
Mostly midfield to home bend. Quickened well when asked 300 M to take charge near finish.
Never far off to straight where he kept on well till close home when finding only one-pace.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield. Shifted out on straightening. Ran on quite well from outside to just miss the 3rd place.
Led. With 1L advantage early straight. Kept on but was caught inside 50 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Soon recovered some ground to just behind midfield. Dropped back when widest final turn. No impression thereafter.
Prominent early. Raced 4th from stable bend. In similar position until dropping back steadily rounding home turn.
Took no part.
Towards rear. Gradual progress rounding home bend to be 4th turning in. Ran on steadily to gain upper hand close home.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made some moderate progress from 250 M.
Mostly 3rd. Held up along rail rear 200 M. Just kept on for a minor placing.
Prominent. Sat outside leader to straight. One-paced final 200 M.
Towards rear. Last from home turn.
Jumped well but taken back to the rear. Made up some ground on inside final 300 M.
Remained 4th or 5th to 350 M. Weakened.
Mostly in midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Travelled in last few. Went past beaten horses in final stages.
Well back. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Raced 3-wide in better than midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening in straight.
Raced freely in midfield far side. One-paced before producing late impression close to home.
Settled in 5th in forward of midfield. Quickened upon straightening to take charge close to home.
Prominent to 200 M. Dropped out.
Attempted to make all, but swamped close to home.
Chased leader. Failed to quicken under pressure final 200 M.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out under pressure.
Never in the hunt.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground early straight, soon one-paced.
Prominent. 2nd passing 400 M. Won marginally in a ding-dong battle inside 100 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Moved to the outest on straightening. Ran on but without threatening the 1st pair.
Last to final turn. Ran past a couple of tiring horses in straight.
Midfield or behind. Dropped out on straightening.
In touch. Raced 4th or 5th until finding no extra final 200 M.
Soon prominent. Improved to 2nd from 1100 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Behind midfield. Crept closer to 4th final turn. Soon found no extra.
Never a factor.
Led. Tackled by the winner 100 M. Just lost narrowly.
Never rear. Crept closer to midfield final turn. Kept on quite well in straight.
Midfield. Soon advanced to 4th or 5th on inside. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Trailed the field throughout. (Stiff in action.)
Jumped best then settled in first few. Gradually faded in straight.
Made all. Hung on well.
Very slowly away. Settled in rear. Good effort passing Rock to be midfield into straight. One-paced.
Never far off. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled behind leaders. Fought on under pressure in straight.
Never in contention.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out.
Settled in midfield. Ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Steadied on rails turning in. Produced some late impression close to home.
Midfield. Made steady headway in straight.
Mostly in midfield. Found nothing in straight.

Tardy start and ridden hard in the early stages to race in midfield on rail. Switched out to find clear running on straightening. Made up little ground in the closing stages and missed 3rd placegetter by a short margin.

Slow to begin and raced in rear section around 2-wide. After the 800 M mark went forward on the outside to race in midfield turning for home. Only able to run on evenly in straight and weakened slightly in the closing stages.

Raced in prominent position towards the outside in the early stages. Steadily eased back to midfield but closer to rail. Near the 700 M whilst racing keenly was steadied to avoid heels. Kept on evenly to the line when asked 200 M out.
Slowly away and raced in rear section 2-wide. Under pressure to maintain position at home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Tardy start and niggled along to race in better than midfield on fence through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 200 M out and further weakened over the concluding stages.

Raced in midfield 2-wide in the early stages. Near the 1300 M was steadied when crowded for room and dropped to rear section. Under pressure to improve position at home bend and made up little ground inside final 200 M.

Jumped well from wide draw and soon took up running on rail with no more than 1L advantage to straight. Kept on well in straight but unable to fend off challenges from the 1st pair in the final stages to settle for 3rd.
Raced in better than midfield 2-wide. Under pressure at home bend but failed to maintain position. Found nothing in straight and faded inside final 200 M.

Prominent out wide in the early stages. Shortly after passing winning post the 1st time went forward to race 1/2L to 1L off leader through to straight. Responded well in straight and doing best work in the closing stages.
Began fairly and raced in midfield or worse 2-wide. Steadily shifted to the outside turning for home. Under pressure 200 M out but failed to quicken and kept on one-paced to the line.

Raced in midfield out wide without cover. After the 800 M mark edged forward to race in better than midfield closer to rail. Under pressure 400 M out and ran on well but unable to match speed with winner in the closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly and lost a lot of ground. Raced at back on rail through to straight. Stayed one-paced when asked 200 M out and ran past couple of beaten runners.
About 6Ls off pace and 2-wide until 800 M out in 8th place, soon 3-wide, 4-wide off home turn when 4Ls down in midfield, 2Ls down at 200 M, battled on well but couldn't get his head in front.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace at 1200 M when 10th, 3-wide at the 800 M, driven when 4-wide at 600 M and 6Ls off pace, 5-wide into stretch and 5Ls down, 2Ls down at 200 M, no extra late on.
Always rear, never better than 10Ls off the lead at any point.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 8Ls off pace when one from rear 1200 M out, still second last and 7Ls off speed entering straight, caught the eye making some good late ground.
Settled 1L off pace and 2-wide in 2nd position through to home straight, squeezed at the 200 M, faded steadily.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd through to home straight, too one-paced in home straight.
Slowly away, on fence when 6Ls off speed in 9th at 1200 M, 2-wide at 800 M, still worse than midfield when 5Ls down into home straight, never dangerous.
2-wide and 3Ls off speed in 4th at 1200 M, over-raced at 800 M, 4-wide into straight when 5th and 2Ls down, hung in off home turn but in front at 200 M, headed by quinella pair final strides.
On fence 3Ls off the pace in 5th at 1200 M, 3-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th into home straight, challenging when tight for room and checked at 200 M, didn't recover.
Took until 1100 M out before getting to lead on fence, held 1L advantage until home straight, soon under pressure and headed 200 M, faded.
On fence in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off lead until home straight, very one-paced thereafter.
Settled 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in midfield until turning for home, disappointed for running at 300 M, switched out, 2Ls down at 200 M, kept on strongly, led final strides.
Began well and was kept within 2Ls off the pace until straightening. Kept on but was unable to gain ground in the straight.
Slowly away and was racing 2nd to last 800 M out. Niggled along at the back and improved its position to midfield rounding home turn. Ran on well in the straight but unable to obtain a minor placing.
3-wide around midfield early. 3-wide turning for home and was near rear upon straightening. Unable to quicken and one-paced to line.
Broke well. Led by no more than 1L from 700 M out. Responded well when challenged upon straightening but was unable to hold off the winner inside the final 200 M, lost 2nd spot final strides.
Jumped quickly for disputed lead until 700 M. Tagged along on the outside of leader into the home straight. Continued with its good effort and drew clear in the final 150 M to win readily.
Taken back from wide draw and raced in last place until rounding home turn. Ran past a couple of weakening runners in the straight.
Slightly slow in jumping and was niggled along to be 2-wide around midfield in the early stages. Ran in similar position rounding home turn. Made up some ground in the straight.
Ridden along early to maintain position around midfield. Continued to drift back after the 700 M despite being under pressure and was racing near rear on straightening. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Unable to keep pace and soon travelled near the rear of the field. Last one into the straight and ran past beaten runners final stages.
Disputed lead early until outpaced near the 700 M. Hung out when 3-wide rounding home turn and steadily weakened final 200 M.
Broke away quickly from wide draw and disputed lead until 800 M. Soon out-paced and settled 4-wide and about 3Ls behind the lead. Widest turning in and ran on a bit in the straight, soon no extra.
Began well from wide draw. Eased back towards the fence after the 800 M. 2-wide and about 2Ls down rounding home turn. Ran on nicely but was unable to gain ground on winner in the final stages.
Slowly away, in 10th place about 7Ls off the speed until turning for home, 5Ls down at the 200 M, finished off strongly but too late.
Always on fence about 5Ls or 6L off speed in midfield until the swing for home, kept on only fairly.
Slowly away, in 2nd last place about 10Ls off pace at 800 M, in rear at 600 M, never a factor.
3Ls off pace in 6th at 800 M, 4Ls off pace into home straight, switched wider to challenge at 300 M, 1L down at 200 M, stayed on fairly well closing stages.
On fence 2Ls off pace in 4th until being checked at the 600 M, soon under pressure, 3Ls down in 5th into home straight, 2Ls down on fence at 200 M, no extra close home.
Soon led, tended to over-race, disputing lead from 700 M, headed off home turn, faded inside final 200 M.
Best away, always very prominent within 1L of the pace, turned for home 3-wide, shaken up to lead 200 M out, ran on well.
3-wide at 1000 M and 1L off pace, disputing lead from 700 M, brief advantage off home turn, grabbed by winner at 200 M, one-paced closing stages.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in midfield through to home straight, ran on strongly but never looked like getting to the winner.
Always slightly worse than midfield about 5Ls off pace and 2-wide through to home straight, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
3Ls off pace in 5th and 2-wide at 800 M, under pressure when 4-wide into home straight when still 3Ls off pace into home straight, weakened markedly thereafter.
Awkwardly into stride, in rear about 10Ls off the pace early on, never remotely competitive.
Sat outside leader to straight. Took brief lead 250 M but found no extra when headed 100 M out.
Near rear throughout. (Significant amount of blood in trachea and a roarer.)
Held 4th before advancing to 2nd inside 100 M. One-paced close home.
Towards rear. Last soon after straightening.
Soon last. Recovered some ground in straight.
Midfield early, soon moved up along inner to be 3rd. Kept on well in straight to gain advantage near 100 M. Just beaten final strides.
Midfield on outside. Made no impression while racing greenly in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Slowly away, was last early stages. Recovered ground steadily to be midfield final turn. Ran on to just get up near finish. (Suffered from heat stress, see Racing Incidents.)
Led field to 250 M. Weakened steadily.
Towards rear. Moved up to midfield first turn. Further improved to 5th turning in. One-paced thereafter.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily 800 M out.
Towards rear. Ran on to steadily between runners in straight.
Settled at the back. Finished off race well down centre of straight.
Towards rear into straight. Tight early on. Made up some ground.
Raced freely behind leaders home bend. Had no more to give soon after straightening.
Sluggish at start. Ran on steadily from rear into straight to be nearest at finish.
Attempted to make all, but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Broke well, settling outside leader. Came to challenge upon straightening and gained upper hand close to home.
Ridden to prominent position far side. Held some chance upon straightening but ran home one-paced.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Midfield into straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Niggled along behind midfield. Faded gradually in straight.
Rear throughout. Steadied 300 M out but kept on well to finish.
Made no show.
Jumped well and led briefly early. Remained in prominent position to straight. Held up along rail until 200 M. Ran on when in clear.
Prominent early, dropped back steadily to 5th or 6th. One-paced.
Never better than midfield.
Remained 8th at most of his trip.
Prominent early, soon dropped back a bit to 5th. Renewed effort to be 2nd passing 600 M. Tackled leader 300 M, gaining brief lead 200 M to 100 M. Kept on.
Slowly away, never a factor.
In touch. About 2Ls 4th final turn. Sustained effort to take lead near 100 M. Held on.
Slowly away, soon recovered ground to midfield. Moderate progress rounding home bend to be 5th final turn. Kept on same pace to finish.
Soon led. Kept on when headed 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Always thereabouts. Not much room early in straight. Kept on one pace.
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Travelled better than midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to reach 3rd place late.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily down centre of straight.
Midfield to straight. Weakened under pressure.
Wide in midfield till dropped out rounding home bend. (Jarred up.)
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out.
Prominent. One-paced early in straight before finding no extra under pressure closing stages.
Towards rear. Took closer order home bend. Found nothing from midfield into straight.
Rear into straight. Never nearer.
Towards rear. Produced some impression early in straight. Kept on.
Never seen with a chance.
Made all. Hung on well.
Niggled along to race in prominent position 2 wide. Ridden along to maintain position turning for home. Did not respond to pressure when asked 350 M out and steadily weakened thereafter.
Began fairly and led narrowly on fence through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on evenly to the line.

Broke fairly and raced behind midfield on inner. Switched out turning for home. On straightening was steadied when disappointed for running. Under pressure 300 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M.
On jumping reared and lost ground. Raced at back 2 wide through to home turn. Switched wide on straightening and made up little ground inside final 200 M when asked 300 M out.
Soon raced in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out but failed to respond and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
On jumping was hampered and raced in worse than midfield 2 to 3 wide. Switched out to find clear running on straightening but failed to respond to pressure and stayed one-pace to the line.

Raced in mid-division 2 to 3 wide. Slowly edged forward and shifted out turning for home. Responded well when asked 350 M out but unable to fend off challenge from winner and just held onto 2nd place.
Broke well and raced in midfield or better 2 wide through to straight. Found nothing in the straight and steadily faded after the 200 M mark.
Soon raced in midfield or better around 3 wide through to straight. Stayed one-pace in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.

On jumping was hampered and was eased to race in rear section 2 wide. Made steady improvement on the outside at home bend. Ran on well when asked 350 M out but just failed to run down the 2nd placegetter.
Niggled along to race in prominent position 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Kept on well when asked 350 M out but weakened slightly over the concluding stages.

Soon eased to race in rear section on rail. At the 400 M was steadied away from heels. Was slightly held up in early part of straight. Quickened well when clear running was obtained at 200 M to win convincingly.
Unable to muster early speed to race in midfield or worse on rail through to straight. Made no impression in straight.
On jumping was hampered and was soon taken to the back but closer to rail through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
2-wide and 3Ls off lead in 6th at 1000 M, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down, every chance when 1L down in 2nd place at 200 M, momentarily short of room 100 M out, always held.
Keen out wide early on, 3 and 4-wide and at least 6Ls off pace down back straight, awkward rounding circle, 6-wide into stretch, never competitive.
Well placed 2Ls off pace on fence in 4th through to home straight, failed to quicken up and beaten 200 M out.
Caught 3-wide in 3rd when 1L off pace at 1000 M, disputing lead out 3-wide at 800 M, 1L down into home straight, led travelling well at 300 M, 1L clear at 200 M, kept on gamely.
Slowly away, advanced racing keenly out 3-wide into 5th place 3Ls off the lead at 1000 M, began to lose position from 700 M out, back-pedalling markedly on straightening. (Bled.)
Slowest away, ran greenly early on, always rear and at least 6Ls off pace, steadied 700 M out, never a factor.
Awkwardly into stride, 4Ls down on fence in midfield down back straight, closer but held up for a run on inner from home turn to 200 M, didn't make up much ground once in the clear.
3-wide and 5Ls off pace in 10th when 1000 M from home, similarly placed off final turn, quickened up well to be 2Ls down in 5th 200 M out, ran on strongly but couldn't get head in front.
Always in 2nd place no worse than half a length off pace out 2-wide until home straight, led very briefly about 350 M out, headed by winner at 300 M, faded steadily.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 11th 1000 M out, 2-wide and 4Ls down in 8th place off home turn, 2Ls down in 6th at 200 M, one-paced through final stages.
Switched towards inner on jumping from widest gate, in rear group 2 and 3-wide and about 7Ls off pace down back straight, never a threat.
Always 4-wide without cover and about 4Ls off pace in midfield down back straight, 5-wide and 5Ls off pace off final bend, 4Ls down at 200 M, one-paced final stages.
Crowded at start, in midfield 2-wide and 4Ls off pace at 1000 M, in 7th and 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, no extra close home.
Led early on by half a length, held a slender advantage until home straight, headed off home turn, dropped out rapidly.
Slowly away and raced near the rear. Pulled hard and was allowed to stride to the lead out wide after 1000 M. Commenced to weaken after straightening and finished last.

Jumped well from widest draw and niggled along to keep pace with the lead. Remained 2-wide and within a length off the leader until straightening. Looked a threat 300 M out but found nothing thereafter.

Quickest out from wide draw. Raced comfortably behind pace from 1000 M until being pressured after straightening. Inched closer to leader before gaining a slim advantage inside final 200 M. Held on to a narrow lead until finish.
Soon travelled near rear. Steadied 800 M out to avoid heels and remained wide rounding home turn. Kept on without threatening.
Ridden hard early but was soon outpaced. Niggled along from 3-wide position behind midfield thereafter until straightening. Ran on fairly and made up some ground final stages.
Ridden early to be on fence near midfield. Continued to race on fence and drifted back slightly behind midfield rounding home turn. Did not quicken and was one paced to line.

Began well from wide draw and led from 1200 M out. Remained on lead or disputed lead until being challenged upon straightening. Fought on well in the closing stages despite losing narrowly its lead inside final 200 M.
Travelled 3-wide near midfield shortly after the start. Continued to race in similar position rounding home turn. Kept on fairly and made up some ground in the straight.
Settled well on fence near midfield in the early and middle stages. Under pressure from 400 M out and brief effort from 300 M, one-paced last bit.
In last place shortly after jumping and remained there until running past a weakening runner in the closing stages.
Ran in the rear section early. Niggled along from 2-wide position without much progress. Did not quicken much when put under pressure on straightening, ran past beaten runners close home.
Slow to jump and travelled on fence near the rear until straightening. Not much response when asked after straightening and only ran past a few weakening runners in the closing stages.

Travelled 2-wide and within 3Ls off the lead in the early stages. Clipped heels and blundered near 600 M. Continued well thereafter and made a late charge inside the final 300 M to make up ground for a minor placing.
Eased back to travel 2-wide near midfield in the early and middle stages. Hampered near the 600 M. Found nothing in the straight.
Crowded a little at start, 3 and 4-wide with cover down backstretch in midfield when about 6Ls off pace, 5-wide (widest of all) into straight, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, no extra.
3-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, a neck 2nd out 2-wide off final bend, disputing lead at 300 M, half a length 3rd at 200 M, lacked pace of principals.
Never better than midfield at any stage, on fence 6Ls off pace in 9th 1000 M out, short of running but always appeared held by about 4Ls in the home straight.
Travelled well on fence 3Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, similarly placed and still going well entering stretch, short of room along fence until 150 M out, kept on at same pace once in the clear.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, closer in midfield turning for home, never had any kind of clear run behind a wall of horses, eased when without a chance final 100 M.
Over-raced continually down back straight when 2-wide and no worse than 3Ls off pace in about 5th place, still on terms when 3-wide into stretch, faded from 300 M out.
In 7th 4Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1000 M, switching into clear out 4-wide entering straight when 5Ls off pace, 1L down at 200 M, led 50 M out, pushed out.
Caught 5-wide without cover early on, near rear and 3-wide with cover and 6Ls off pace at 800 M, steadied 500 M and 300 M out, never threatened but hadn't much running room on run-in.
Prominent 2Ls off pace but caught 4-wide without cover in 4th place 1000 M out, lost place and was 3-wide and 3Ls off pace in midfield on the swing, one-paced to line.
Soon led but only got to fence 950 M out, never clear by more than 1L until stretch, headed over 200 M out, kept on at same pace, narrowly missed out on a place.
Broke very badly losing at least 6Ls at start, 9Ls off pace on fence in rear at 1000 M, still rear entering straight, made some ground closing stages, was always very short of running room.
Had run of race on fence 2Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, 2Ls down and challenging when bumped, becoming unbalanced 300 M out, didn't recover and was too one-paced.
Slowly away, on fence 7Ls off speed and one from rear at 1000 M, switched out 4-wide turning for home when 6Ls down, 4Ls down in midfield at 200 M, nearest at finish.
Much closer to pace than usual, 2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 10th at 1000 M, took closer order and 2-wide and 3Ls off pace into straight, led passing 200 M marker, overhauled only 50 M out.
About 5th before home turn. Kept on to take 3rd inside final 200 M without threatening first two.
Worse than midfield home turn. Never nearer.
Ridden to take lead soon after start and was 2Ls clear into straight. Unable to hold winner 150 M but kept on well for 2nd.
Soon dropped to rear where he stayed.
Always going well in 2nd to straight where he cruised to lead 150 M. Won with plenty in hand.
Never on terms.
Mostly in 4th to straight where he made no show.
Never troubled leaders.
Never a factor.
Was midfield home bend and could make no impression on leaders in straight.
Ran 3rd into straight where he kept on same pace.
Mostly midfield to straight. Stayed on till finding no extra close home.
About 7th turning for home. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Raced 3rd from widest draw. 4-wide into straight. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Recovered a little ground far side to just behind midfield. Made further advancement from outside 250 M.
Mainly 5th to 400 M out. Made progress to be 3rd on straightening. Sustained effort to take lead 200 M. Won convincingly.
Tardy start, near rear. Made moderate progress when widest in straight.
Slowly away, last to 400 M. Ran past a few beaten horses thereafter.
Moved up to be in touch from a wide draw. Held up a bit home turn and was crowded 200 M. Failed to quicken thereafter.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made steady ground rounding home bend to be midfield early straight. Kept on without threatening.
Prominent. Took lead from 1400 M. Kept on for 2nd or 3rd before headed 400 M. Weakened out of contention final 200 M.
Well there on inside. Gained advantage near 400 M. Unable to match speed with winner when headed 200 M.
Checked soon after start, recovered ground to midfield from stable bend. Dropped out soon after straightening.
Midfield or behind. Dropped back to the rear group far side. No recovery.
Midfield throughout. Found nothing in straight.
Improved to prominent position behind leaders halfway out. Held every chance under pressure in straight but swamped close to home.
Never seen with a chance.
Midfield when hampered about 500 M out. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Always well there. Steadied for a run behind leaders turning in. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Settled at the back. Shifted onto rails upon straightening and improved well on inner despite baulked for a run briefly inside 200 M.
Led or disputed lead before headed close to home.
Never better than midfield. Hampered about 500 M out. Soon faded in straight.
Held up in rear. Ran on well from last into straight to get up on line.
Towards rear early. Improved steadily far side to be midfield home bend. Ran home one-paced.
Prominent early. Midfield when checked and lost about 2Ls over 500 M out. Made up good ground down home straight.
Always there, disputing lead into straight, before dropped out shortly after straightening.
Slowly away, made no show.
Never able to quicken.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit to 4th rounding home bend. Ran on inside 250 M to gain 3rd 100 M out.
Better than midfield. Was crowded for room 600 M. Kept on well on inside final 400 M.
Midfield. Widest turning in. One-paced.
Broke well and led field to 800 M. Slightly hampered 600 M and final turn. Kept on for 2nd.
Slowly away, near rear. Crept a bit closer final turn. Failed to quicken.
Began awkwardly, recovered ground steadily to be 3rd 600 M. Lost much ground when badly unbalanced 200 M. No recovery.
Was 3rd before taking lead 800 M out. Held on well to the finish.
Began badly, towards rear. Severely checked 200 M when making up some ground. Never recovered.
Midfield or slightly better. Dropped a bit to 7th 400 M. Kept on early straight until one-paced closing stages.
Began awkwardly, behind midfield throughout.
Always struggling at the back.
Well back. Made up good ground down home straight.
Raced wide in midfield throughout. One-paced.
Raced mainly in rear of midfield. Kept on steadily without threatening in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield. Tightened 200 M out before producing some late impression closing stages.
Led or disputed lead to straight then gradually weakened.
Settled in last few. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Always prominent. Fought on under pressure but lost 2nd position late.
Well there. Hung in early in straight before bumped about 200 M out. Not recovered.
Well there. Went 1L clear upon straightening and hung on well.
Mostly in forward of midfield. Hampered over 200 M out. Never recovered.
Tardy start and raced in mid-division 2 to 3-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Began well and settled in better than midfield on rail. Switched out on straightening and ran on strongly when asked 250 M out to win convincingly.
Raced in midfield and proved very difficult to settle in the early and middle stages. Switched wide on straightening but made no impression.
Slow to begin and raced in rear section on rail. Made the home turn awkwardly and bumped the running rail. Stayed one-paced in straight and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Began fairly from wide draw and soon eased to rear section closer to rail. Swift headway on outside going up Rock to be in midfield on straightening. Kept on well in straight but was overhauled by 2nd placegetter in closing stages.
Raced in better than midfield around 2-wide. On straightening shifted out but unable to quicken in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Jumped well from wide draw and steadily eased back to rear section closer to rail through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Jumped awkwardly and niggled along to race behind midfield on rail through to straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish when asked 250 M out.
Raced in midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out but only responded moderately and made up little ground in the final stages to be closest at finish.
Niggled along to race in prominent position on rail. Went forward at home bend to take lead at 400 M. Under pressure 250 M out but unable to quicken and kept on evenly to the line.
Slowly away and raced at back on inner. Steadily improved position from the outside at home bend. Made up good ground when asked 250 M out to miss the winner by 1/2L.
Soon took lead on rail. Headed at 400 M and found nothing in the straight. Weakened badly inside final 200 M.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 9th 1200 M out, 3Ls off speed and 3-wide with cover in 6th at 800 M, 4Ls down entering straight, no chance with winner but kept on fairly well to nick 2nd on the line.
Sluggish early on, detached 12Ls off lead at 1200 M, 2 and 3-wide down back straight, 10Ls down 600 M out, carried 7-wide entering straight, ran on well to be nearest at finish.
Stood totally flatfooted in stalls and lost at least 15Ls as a result, never a factor.
On fence in 7th place 4Ls off the front 1200 M out, 5Ls or 6Ls down towards rear from 800 M to home straight when unbalanced, no impression.
Caught 3-wide without cover in 6th place 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, pressured to hold this spot entering straight, faded out.
Led by a neck out 2-wide 1200 M, disputing lead with winner from 800 M to 500 M out, 1L down in 2nd off final turn, dropped out rapidly.
Switched from wide gate to fence on jumping, 2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover down back straight, unbalanced and 6-wide into stretch, moderate late headway.
Always 2-wide about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 8th or 9th place through to 500 M out, was checked when 5-wide on straightening, never able to challenge and checked again 100 M out.
In 4th place on fence 2Ls off pace at 1200 M, shuffled back to 5Ls off pace from 900 M to 500 M out, travelling well when severely checked and almost fell entering straight, eased down.
2-wide and prominent when checked 1300 M out, sent on to dispute lead out 2-wide from the 800 M, 1L clear off home turn, 3Ls clear at 200 M, always in command.
Led very early on, keen when 2Ls off pace on fence in 4th 1000 M out, soon settled and had the box-seat run through to home straight, kept on fairly final stages, lost 2nd place in last stride.
2-wide and 3Ls off speed in 5th place 1200 M out, similarly placed but under pressure turning for home, no impression.

Dropped to the rear section early on. Racing 2 off the fence near the rear in back straight. Under pressure from 400 M out and was wide turning in. Rallied from the outside and made up good ground in the straight.

3-wide and about 2Ls down entering first turn. Continued to be 3 off the fence and just behind pace 600 M out. Pressured rounding home turn but without response. Bumped near 300 M and no extra thereafter.

2-wide behind midfield entering first turn. Remained in similar position until being urged to improve 800 M out. Crept closer to pace rounding home along the inside and ran on nicely in the straight to be closest at finish.
Caught wide behind midfield entering first turn. Settled 3-wide behind midfield throughout back straight. 3-wide turning in and whilst under pressure. Unable to quicken and one-paced to line.
Raced comfortably off the lead until entering the home turn. Lack of response when pressured on straightening and commence to weaken 300 M out.

3-wide rounding first turn near midfield. Remained 3-wide and raced about 3Ls behind pace 600 M out. Did not quicken when asked on straightening and was disappointed for running at 300 M. Found nothing thereafter.

Jumped awkwardly and settled 2-wide near midfield in the early stages. Niggled along on fence to improve after 800 M and was racing right behind leader rounding home. Responded well under pressure and drew clear 200 M out.

Racing in last place shortly after the start and was well behind the field by the 1200 M. Niggled along in the back and caught up with main field at 400 M. Widest turning in and made up good ground in the straight.
Began awkwardly and was pushed along to race close to the lead. Caught wide first turn and found itself near midfield 1200 M. Commence to weaken thereafter and became detached from field. (Lame.)

Niggled along on fence and was about 2Ls down 1200 M out. Commence to drop back in the early part of back straight and drifted further back despite being pressured after the 700 M. Towards the rear on straightening and never recovered.
Jumped to an early lead and was setting a comfortable pace until entering the home turn. Had no answer to the winner's challenge inside final 250 M and held on for a minor placing.
Best away and soon led on fence, never clear by more than a length and a half until home straight, skipped 2Ls clear at 200 M, driven out, comfortably.
10Ls off the lead on fence 1200 M out in 11th place, a little closer but still in rear off home turn, outpaced and never able to challenge on fence, switched inside final 100 M.
In rear 2-wide and 10Ls off pace 1200 M out, 8Ls down and 4-wide and still in rear entering straight, good headway final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Couldn't lead early on, 3-wide without cover 2Ls off speed in 3rd place from 1200 M to 500 M out, soon under pressure and dropped out steadily in home straight.
3-wide with cover in 7th when 5Ls off the lead at 1200 M, 4Ls off pace but 5-wide (widest of all) off home turn, no impression.
On fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 6th place from 1200 M to home straight, never dangerous on run-in.
Had a nice run on fence 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, 2Ls down and disputing 2nd place off final bend, no chance with winner but hung for 2nd place okay.
Keen early on, still over-racing when 2-wide 2Ls off pace in 2nd place 1200 M out, settled eventually and held this spot until home turn, dropped out tamely quickly. (Lame.)
In 8th place 2-wide and 6Ls off speed at the 1200 M, 5Ls down 800 M out, still in midfield on the home turn, always much too one-paced to improve position.
Slowly away, on fence 7Ls off pace in 9th 1200 M out, 5Ls down and still 9th on straightening, never on terms with principals.
2-wide and 3Ls or 4Ls off speed in 5th place from 1200 M out to 600 M out, 4-wide off home turn, never able to challenge winner but stayed on fairly for a place nonetheless.
In 10th place 7Ls off pace out 2-wide at 1200 M, still 2-wide and 6Ls down towards rear and travelling well on home circle, didn't find much when asked to quicken up.
Slightly better than midfield. Crept closer to 4th on straightening. Soon weakened.
Slightly better than midfield. Made no show in straight.
Settled at rear from widest draw. Widest turning in. Made up good ground to be 2nd inside 250 M. Kept on.
Remained 3rd or 4th to 200 M where he failed to maintain position.
Towards rear. Last passing 1000 M. (Lame.)
Led field to 300 M. Faded steadily on inside.
Towards rear. Soon recovered some ground to be just behind midfield home bend. Kept on steadily in straight for a remote 4th.
Midfield. 5-wide 5th final turn. Kept on without quickening thereafter.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily from 400 M to take lead 250 M. Headed and lost 2nd close home.
Rear to straight. Steadied and shifted out for clear run 350 M. Ran on well to assert authority close home.
Towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Lack of galloping room early straight, being struck on the nose twice near 300 M. Recovered some ground inside 200 M.
Well there but wide. Dropped back steadily from final turn.
Held 2nd before taking advantage briefly near 300 M. Found no extra when headed 250 M.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Around midfield to straight then gradually faded.
Never in contention.
Travelled outside leader to straight then gradually weakened.
Never better than midfield.
Settled at the back. Ran on well final 400 M to be nearest at finish.
Settled in rear of midfield. Did not find much room in straight. Kept on steadily to finish.
Settled wide in midfield. Quickened well down centre of straight to hit front nearing finish but pipped at post.
Made no show.
Settled behind leaders. Came to challenge late on rails to claim victory by the narrowest of margins.
Attempted to make all but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Broke well setting in prominent position throughout. Failed to quicken and swamped closing stages.
Midfield throughout. One-paced.
Midfield into straight. Loomed up to hold every chance 200 M out but unable to sustain effort close to home.
Led with 3Ls advantage. Weakened when headed 200 M out. (See Racing Incidents.)
Soon 3rd. Remained similar until failing to hold place inside 150 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Was 2nd last to 250 M. Stayed on quite well.
Jumped well, settled in midfield. Moved up from final turn, taking lead 200 M. Won convincingly.
Soon 2nd. Kept on very well 300 M but failed quicken to challenge closing stages.
Midfield. Ran on 250 M, just failing to obtain a minor placing.
Held 4th or 5th to 250 M. Failed to quicken.
Towards rear. Ran on well from outside 350 M but unable to threaten the winner.
Began awkwardly, always at the back.
Better than midfield to straight. Weakened.
Sluggish at start. Rear when short-lived effort on outside rounding home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Settled towards rear. Came under pressure upon straightening. Only produced moderate progress.
Midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Held up in rear jumping out. Remained same into straight then ran on steadily down centre of track without threatening.
Began well. Restrained behind leader approaching home bend. Soon dropped out in straight.
Forward of midfield to straight. Weakened.
Never far off. Came to challenge under pressure in straight but failed to draw level throughout.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily in straight.
Settled in midfield. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Mostly in midfield then found nothing in straight.
Raced keenly in 3rd most of way to straight then dropped out.
Soon took up running and led to finish. Just held on.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Jumped well and raced in midfield or better. Ran home strongly when asked 350 M out and fended off late challenge from 2nd placegetter to win by 3/4L.
Slow to begin and raced in rear section. Under pressure 300 M out, responded and finished the race off well inside final 200 M.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield. Under pressure 400 M out but failed to quicken and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Niggled along to race in a forward position. Kept on well when asked 300 M out but was unable to fend off challenges from 2nd and 3rd placegetters to be overhauled near the line.
Began awkwardly and raced towards the rear. Made up little ground when asked 300 M out to be closest at finish.
Raced in rear position through to 400 M. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on same pace to the line.
Began well and took up a forward position through to 400 M out, steadily faded out of the race thereafter.
Unable to muster early speed and raced at back. Made up some ground inside final 100 M when asked 350 M out.
Jumped fairly and raced in prominent position. Only able to keep on evenly when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 100 M.
Raced in midfield. Ridden along to maintain position from around 500 M out but steadily dropped to rear section at 250 M out. Ran past several beaten runners inside final 150 M.
Raced in rear section. Ridden along to improve position 400 M out. All out 300 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.
Began fairly and soon settled in midfield. Had trouble finding clear running at 300 M. Made up good ground when clear running was obtained 200 M out but was unable to catch the winner.
Led narrowly to 400 M mark. Found nothing thereafter and lost ground quickly inside final 200 M.
Tardy start and raced in midfield or better. Unable to go up a gear when asked 350 M and stayed one-pace to the line.
Awkwardly away, had a soft run on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th or 5th until home straight when under pressure, faded steadily thereafter.
On fence in midfield about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace down back straight, staying on well when about 2Ls off lead in 4th at the 200 M, kept on well.
Slowly away, 2-wide and in rear bunch about 8Ls off pace from the 900 M to home straight, winding up when 4Ls down in midfield 200 M out, ran on very strongly and narrowly missed.
Caught 4-wide about 5Ls off pace in midfield early on, pushed out 5-wide at the 800 M, 4Ls down and 5-wide into home straight, dropped out quickly.
In 7th place 3-wide and 4Ls off speed at 1000 M, disputing lead out 3-wide 800 M out, under pressure to hold prominent spot off home turn, faded out. (Lame.)
Awkwardly placed and keen 900 M out when on fence 4Ls off pace in 6th, short of running room entering straight, didn't pick up, beaten 300 M out.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd 1000 M out, right there disputing lead turning for home and 200 M out, no extra closing stages.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 7th at the 900 M, 3-wide into home straight when still in midfield, about 3Ls down at the 200 M, outpaced concluding stages.
Soon led, clear advantage until 800 M out, disputing lead until 300 M out, faded through final 200 M.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, 4-wide into straight when driven along, beaten 200 M out.
Slowly away, in rear pack about 8Ls off pace and 3-wide for much of back straight, 5-wide into home stretch when 6Ls down, stayed on well late on, nearest at the finish.
Caught 4-wide without cover 3Ls off pace in 4th 1000 M out, disputing lead 800 M out and entering stretch when still 4-wide, narrow advantage 150 M out, all out to hang on.
In rear about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace and 3-wide and niggled along down far side, 4-wide into home stretch when 5Ls down, stayed on well from off pace, nearest at the finish.
On fence 8Ls off pace in rear at the 800 M, 3-wide and 7Ls down at 600 M, 5-wide into straight when 6Ls down, made some decent late headway, never nearer.
Jumped to an early lead. Maintained a 2Ls cushion until being challenged inside final 400 M. Lost lead inside final 100 M and was edged out for a minor placing.

Soon raced in the rear section. Was 4-wide turning in. Good response when asked on straightening and closed the race off well in the final stages to be nearest at finish despite hanging in over final 200 M.
Raced wide near rear section early. Pushed along to improve position 900 M out and was racing 3-wide near midfield rounding the turn. Failed to quicken upon straightening and one-paced thereafter.
Slowest to jump and was ridden hard to be near midfield. Niggled along but commence to drift back after 800 M. Weakened shortly after straightening.
Slowly away and was soon pushed along to race within 3Ls of the lead 800 M out until final 400 M. Ran on steadily to line.

Jumped well and was eased back to race on fence midfield after the 1000 M. Niggled along rounding home turn to keep pace. Pressured from 400 M out and charged home strongly final 200 M to snatch victory final strides.

Eased to race at the rear despite jumping well from widest draw and was in last place at 800 M. Near the rear and widest turning in. Made a strong run on straightening and recovered substantial ground in straight.
Prominent early. Raced comfortably and kept within 2Ls of pace through to home turn. Under pressure 300 M out and drew clear inside final 100 M before being caught by the winner near the line.
First out from wide draw and was ridden along. Soon outpaced and settled 3-wide around midfield until straightening. Gave a good run in the straight and made up good ground in the closing stages.
Settled 3-wide near midfield early. Lost ground when steadied near 900 M and was racing near the rear upon straightening. Found nothing in the straight.

Showed no early speed despite being urged and raced near the rear. Continued to drop back and was racing in last place after 600 M. No improvement thereafter and only ran past a weakening runner in the straight.
Niggled along to race near midfield in the early stages. Dropped back slightly near 800 M and was running behind midfield rounding home. Only one-paced on straightening.
Crowded on jumping and soon racing in last place. Reminded after 800 M and hung out wide rounding home turn. Ran on quite well on straightening and made up good ground in the straight.
Urged to go near pace shortly after start. Remained 2-wide and 2Ls behind pace until 400 M. Ran on steadily for a minor placing.
On fence and worse than midfield 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, still on rail and about 4Ls down in midfield on the swing, never rearlly threatened.
Very keen down with head up early on, checked at 800 M when 3-wide 2Ls off pace in 5th, similarly placed into home straight, always a little too one-paced from then on.
Always caught very deep without cover, 4-wide and 3Ls off pace at 900 M, 5-wide at 800 M when no worse than 2Ls off pace, under pressure to keep up at the 400 M, faded.
3-wide and 7Ls off pace in 11th place at 1000 M, still towards rear when 6-wide into home straight, never on terms.
Lay in 2nd place out 2-wide and 1L off speed at 1000 M, 2Ls down in 5th spot on straightening for the judge, always looked held by principals.
Always very wide (at least 5-wide) down back straight, managed to race in midfield for brief period, lost position from 800 M, no chance even before home turn.
Held up in 13th 2-wide and 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, 4-wide and 6Ls down into straight, switched out wider to challenge 400 M out, 4Ls down at 200 M, finished off very strongly to lead close home.
Prominent caught 3 and 4-wide down back straight, 1L off pace at 700 M when 3-wide, within half a length of pace and with every chance from home turn to 200 M, no extra close home.
Settled 4Ls off pace in 9th when 2-wide at 1000 M, tracked leaders to 600 M from similar distance, under pressure into straight, found very little off the bit.
In 4th place 2Ls off pace out 4-wide at 1000 M, sent on to dispute lead 900 M out, still right there when unbalanced 500 M out, 3-wide into stretch, beaten 200 M out.
Slowly into stride, always towards rear, never posed any kind of threat.
Slowly away, recovered well and led narrowly out 2-wide from 1200 M out, half a length to the good out 2-wide off final bend, grabbed by runner-up close home, good debut.
Slowly away, had a nice run on fence 1L off pace from 1000 M to home straight, half a length down in 2nd at 200 M, battled on well closing stages but powerless to repel winner's late surge.
Fractious in gates and reared at start losing considerable ground, on fence 7Ls off pace at 1000 M, never competitive.
Awkwardly away, one from rear when 7Ls off pace on fence, slightly better off on the swing, never troubled leaders.
Prominent early, on fence 3Ls off pace in 4th 700 M out, came off fence entering straight, 1L down in 3rd and with every chance 300 M out, couldn't follow through late on.
Settled at rear between 6Ls and 8Ls off pace and 3-wide through to 600 M, 6-wide into home straight and 6Ls down, 3Ls down at the 200 M, kept on strongly but couldn't get to winner.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 5th at 900 M, driven along to maintain this position off home turn and 200 M out, faded markedly close home.
