Always wide (4-wide) without cover down the back, 5Ls off speed in 8th 800 M out, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 5Ls down, finished off strongly to nick a place.
Best away, settled 2-wide in midfield about 5Ls off pace through to straightening for home, kept on fairly but never looked like finishing in the money.
5Ls off pace in 9th on fence 1000 M out, 4Ls down on the swing, very one-paced on run-in to line and posed no kind of threat.
2-wide and 2Ls from the lead in 3rd 900 M out, under pressure to hold this spot 700 M out, 3-wide into stretch when 4Ls off the front and weakening, kept on at same pace to line.
Broke well but soon lost place, 6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th 900 M out, always on and off the bridle, 4-wide into stretch when one from rear and 7Ls down, never competitive thereafter.
2nd early on fence 1L off pace, disputed lead from 700 M out to home straight (while moving off the rail to 3-wide), cracked over 200 M out, faded away.
Soon led but couldn't cross to fence, disputed lead with RUN AND WIN from 700 M to home straight (turned in 4-wide) when travelling smoothly, 1L clear 200 M out, ridden out.
Better than midfield and 4-wide early on, went 5th 3-wide 3Ls off pace 700 M out, 2Ls down into home straight, weakened out quickly passing the 300 M marker.
Settled in midfield when 3-wide (with cover) and 4Ls off speed 800 M out, under pressure when 5-wide into stretch and 3Ls down, all out at the 250 M when still 3Ls down, no extra.
Dropped out in rear at least 8Ls off pace and 2-wide until the 600 M, 5-wide into the home straight when at least 7Ls behind, closed off well, nearest at the finish.
Midfield into straight where he ran on to reach 2nd 150 M. Found no extra.
Never on terms.
Well there before taking lead from 1100 M to straight. Was headed 200 M out and found no extra.
About 7th early in straight. Found nothing when asked.
Soon pulled his way forward to be 2nd 800 M. Plugged on under pressure on straightening.
In touch to straight where he kept on without quickening closing stages.
Never far off to straight where he made steady headway to snatch 2nd placing final stride.
Last into straight where he ran on quite well.
Midfield at best.
Among rear group to home turn. Stayed on a bit closing stages.
Prominent to straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Soon settled in rear. Improved home bend and was widest of all into straight. Kept on and made up some ground final 300 M.
Always handy. Took command 200 M out and soon went clear. Eased down at the finish.
Mostly in rear, never a factor.
Midfield or behind. Faded in straight.
Began awkwardly, 2nd last to home turn. Made up a little ground in straight.
Severely checked after start, towards rear. Steadied approaching 200 M when making up some ground. Made no show thereafter.
Slowly away from widest draw, was last to final turn. Made up good ground inside 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Tardy start, towards rear. Moved up a bit on inside approaching the Rock and was 6th on straightening. Unable to quicken.
Held 3rd to home bend. Failed to hold place when dropping back steadily soon after straightening.
Better than midfield. Improved to 4th early straight. One-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. Under pressure in straight but failed to quicken.
In touch early, settling midfield or behind. Recovered some ground when under pressure 200 M out.
Jumped well. Led field passing 900 M, still holding 1L advantage early straight. Held on but was headed close home.
Took narrow lead to 850 M. Sat outside leader before re-gaining advantage to win by a short margin close home.
Midfield. Improved a bit far side, advancing to 3rd final turn. Kept on well in straight, doing best work final 100 M to just miss narrowly.
Ridden to take lead from poor draw. Kicked 2Ls clear turning in. Won easily.
Towards rear. Widest into straight. Ran on steadily.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Rear to straight. Made modest progress.
Settled behind midfield. Finished off race well though without threatening.
Midfield. Loomed up to hold some chance turning in but faded gradually shortly afterward.
Broke well and led briefly, then settled behind pace to straight. Kept on one pace.
Began well and prominent briefly. Dropped to rear before home bend. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Never better than midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Never a factor.
Midfield into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Took lead from 950 M. Held on until finding no extra when headed passing 200 M.
Towards rear. Made gradual improvement on inside rounding home bend. Continued to make ground but was hanging in final 200 M. Kept on for a minor placing close home.
Among the rear group throughout.
Midfield. Towards rear far side. Ran on inside 150 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer to midfield turning in. Ran on steadily to take 2nd inside 100 M.
In touch early, soon dropped to 5th on inside. Recovered ground from 400 M to be 3rd early straight. Weakened final 100 M.
Near rear. Made up some minor ground on outside closing stages.
Pushed along from widest draw to be 5th. Moved up further to 3rd 900 M. Faded from final turn.
Towards rear early, soon moved up to just behind midfield. Kept on 200 M.
Led field early stages. Held 2nd before re-gaining advantage passing 200 M. Won unchallenged.
Better than midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Never a factor.
Prominent. Quickened to hit front upon straightening but worn down close to home.
Midfield. Made moderate progress under pressure.
Ridden along towards rear. Never a danger.
Midfield to home bend then faded.
Forward of midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Settled at tail-end. Ran on well down straight to do best work at finish.
Made most to straight. Shifted ground upon straightening before weakening.
Settled in rear. Came to challenge under pressure approaching straight. Made steady headway without threatening.
Never better than midfield. Swung wide into straight. Kept on steadily.
Behind midfield. Shifted in for rails run upon straightening and hit front under pressure inside 200 M.
Prominent to straight. Faded.
Brief lead round stables bend. Settled inside leader on rails to straight, then dropped out under pressure.

Began well and soon eased to worse than midfield out wide without cover. In the early stages proved difficult to settle. Made slight progress going up Rock to be in midfield. Kept on one pace to the line when asked 250 M out.

Began well and ridden along to take lead on rail with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Responded well when asked 250 M out to fend off late challenge from 2nd placegetter to score a narrow victory.

Slow to begin and unable to muster early speed to race in midfield. Caught very wide making the stable bend. Went forward at back straight to be in prominent position. Gave ground at 400 M and became detached in straight.
Slowly away and niggled along to race in rear section towards to the outside. On straightening was steadied when crowded for room. Made no impression in straight.
Tardy start but soon recovered to race 1-1/2Ls off leader on rail through to straight. Made up steady ground when asked 250 M out and just failed to run down the winner.

Ridden along to race in midfield or better towards the outside. Under pressure at home bend to maintain position. Stayed one-paced when asked 250 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M. (Dropped whip 150 M.)

Began briefly and raced in midfield 2-wide. Ridden along to maintain position going up Rock. Switched out to find clear running on straightening. Unable to quicken when asked and kept on evenly to the line.
Broke fairly and raced in mid-division on fence. Switched out on straightening but was unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and plugged on evenly to the line.
Ridden along to race outside leader through to straight. Every chance in the early part of straight but steadily weakened inside final 150 M to settle for 4th place. (Lame in the right front leg.)
Raced in the rear section on rail through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Raced in rear section 2-wide through to straight. Found nothing in straight and faded inside final 200 M.

Soon eased and settled at the back of the field on rail. Made up little ground turning for home. Under pressure 250 M out and ran home strongly inside final 200 M to miss the 1st pair by a narrow margin.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, niggled along to pick up from this spot at 600 M, 4-wide into home straight, half a length down in 2nd at 200 M, all out, just failed.
2-wide 6Ls off pace in 10th place at the 1200 M, in rear 6Ls down entering straight, never remotely dangerous.
Slowly away losing 2Ls at start, 8Ls off pace and 2-wide in rear at 800 M, a little closer turning for home, made some late headway past beaten rivals.
3Ls off pace on fence in about 7th place at 1200 M, 5Ls down at 600 M, soon under pressure, no threat in straight.
Disputed lead on fence until 1200 M, 2Ls off pace in 3rd until 800 M, 3Ls adrift in 5th after that, switched out 3-wide entering straight 3Ls off speed, kept on same pace on run-in.
Disputing lead out 2-wide at 1200 M, had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace from the 800 M, staying on at same pace at the 200 M when held up for a run, soon beaten, eased.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th or 5th through to home straight, switched out and led at the 200 M, soon challenged but kept on gamely, won on the nod.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide early on, disputing lead out 2-wide at 1000 M, led by half a length at 800 M and by a neck in the straight, headed about 200 M, faded.
3-wide with cover and 5Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, caught 3-wide without cover at the 600 M when 6Ls off pace in 8th, soon off the bridle, 4-wide into the stretch, never able to challenge.
Slowly away, on fence 6Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, 2-wide at the 500 M when 4Ls off pace in 8th, ran on fairly for a place in straight without ever getting close to principals.
4-wide without cover when prominent at 1200 M, 3-wide without cover at 1000 M, 2-wide and a neck 2nd 600 M out, perfectly placed but couldn't quicken up in straight.

Wide and about 3Ls of pace going into first turn. Raced within 3Ls of the lead from 2-wide in back straight. Dropped off slightly near 600 M. Regained pace shortly and ran on without threatening the winner.

Jumped well and raced comfortably on the lead until being put under pressure on straightening. Held onto lead until being overtaken by the winner inside 100 M and just beaten for second place in final strides.
Niggled along to race on fence at midfield. Pressured 500 M out but failed to keep pace. Did not quicken after straightening.
Jumped well and settled 2-wide at midfield until 400 M. Ran on steadily in the straight without threatening. (Lame.)
Slowly away and was racing at the rear of the field through home turn. Did not quicken until 200 M and made up some late ground in the closing stages.
3-wide and at rear section early. Remained in similar position in back straight. Widest turning in and was in last place on entering home straight. Found nothing thereafter.
Slightly slow into stride and raced near the rear until straightening. Did not quicken and was one-paced to line.

Niggled along early to be near pace. Tracked leader in 2-wide position from 1200 M onwards. Pressured to keep pace 500 M out. Unable to pick up speed in the straight and weakened in the closing stages.

Midfield shortly after start. Steadied before first turn and settled 2-off the fence behind midfield until straightening. Made a strong run from the outside to grab second place in the closing stages.

Pushed along early and soon settled in a prominent position behind pace. Continued to travel on fence and no more than 2Ls of pace until being shifted out on straightening. Ran on nicely and had the race in control inside final 100 M.
From wide draw was soon eased to settle 2-off the fence near rear. Continued to race similar position until being pressured upon straightening. Made up late ground in the final stages.

3-wide and just behind midfield rounding first turn. Drifted back gradually from 700 M and was 3-wide and near the rear rounding home. No response when asked after straightening and finished in last place.
2-wide with cover and 5Ls off pace at 800 M, driven along at the 600 M when becoming detached, 8Ls down entering straight, one-paced.
Awkwardly away, 8Ls off pace at 800 M, never a factor.
Always outpaced, 3-wide 7Ls off pace at the 800 M in 10th place, never on terms.
On fence about 3Ls off pace in 7th until straightening up, 2Ls down and crowded on inner 200 M, held up for a run and not ridden out concluding stages.
Niggled along when 4-wide without cover 4Ls off pace at 800 M, got cover 3-wide at 600 M and 3-wide into straight and 4Ls off pace in 8th, 2Ls down at 200 M, ran on strongly for 2nd.
Best away and soon led on fence, never clear by more than 1L, half a length to the good entering straight, a neck clear at the 200 M, soon headed, no extra.
A little slowly away, 2-wide in midfield about 2Ls off pace through to home straight, short of room at the 200 M but never looked like picking up principals.
Always within 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in about 6th place but deep on track, mostly 3-wide, briefly 4-wide without cover at 500 M, half a length off pace at 200 M, led 100 M out, kept on well.
Had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off speed in 4th place until turning for home, half a length down in 3rd and with every chance 200 M out, outpaced closing stages.
2-wide 1L off pace in 2nd place 800 M out, a neck down in 2nd off home turn and with every chance, dropped out tamely.
Always 3-wide without cover in 3rd within 1L of the lead until home straight, a neck 2nd at the 200 M, couldn't sustain challenge.
Awkwardly away, always outpaced, 2-wide 10Ls off pace 800 M out, stayed on quite well to be nearest at the finish.
Towards rear. Made up some ground home bend and was widest turning in. Ran on in straight.
Behind midfield. Crossed to the fence stable bend. Towards rear far side. Did not respond when asked early straight.
Mostly midfield or slightly better to final turn. Ran on steadily 400 M to take 2nd final 50 M.
Checked soon after start, towards rear throughout.
Made all. Held on well.
Checked soon after start, towards rear. Made up some ground from outside 200 M out.
Midfield. Slightly improved to 5th from stable bend. Dropped back to midfield home bend. Made no progress when given reminders 400 M. (Significant blood in trachea.)
Slowly away, remained at rear. Given reminders final turn. Only ran past a few tiring horses closing stages.
Mainly 3rd to 400 M. Faded.
Slowly away, towards rear. Made progress rounding home bend to be midfield turning in. Weakened badly inside 200 M.
Jumped well and was 2nd to stable bend. Remained in touch far side. 4th rounding home bend and crept closer to 3rd 350 M. One-paced.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight. (Showed mild heat stress after race.)
Towards rear soon after start. Made up some ground final 150 M.
Soon prominent from a wide draw. Raced to 2nd stable bend. Kept on until finding no extra close home.
Well there early. Steadied and lost position approaching home bend. Dropped out from midfield into straight.
Ridden early. Never better than midfield.
Travelling well in midfield when badly hampered inside 200 M. Never recovered.
Waited with. Finished well down straight though without threatening first two.
Held up behind pace. Found nothing in straight.
Behind midfield to straight. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Prominent. Came to challenge rounding home bend. Gained upper hand final strides.
Wide in midfield. Took closer order turning in. Weakened passing 200 M.
Attempted to make all. Came under pressure to resist strong challenges down straight and just failed to hold on to finish.
Dropped to tail-end into straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Prominent early. Steadied to midfield before home bend. One-paced in straight.
Towards rear early. Soon moved up to be 6th 1200 M. Disappointed for a run on straightening. Shifted out 200 M to cause interference. Ran on.
In touch on inside. Mainly 3rd or 4th to 400 M. Soon found no extra.
Slowly away, slightly behind midfield. Checked at 1100 M. Remained similar until making ground steadily passing 400 M.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Rear. Severely hampered by the fallen horse 200 M.
Midfield or slightly behind. Clipped heels and fell 200 M.
Well there from widest draw. Took lead briefly approaching 1200 M. 2nd from 1000 M out. Responded well early straight to regain advantage 300 M. Found no extra when headed 100 M.
Midfield or better. Ran on from 5th early straight to assert authority near 100 M. Held on well to the line.
Pushed along to take lead from 1400 M to 1200 M. Regained advantage from 1000 M until headed near 300 M. Weakened closing stages.
Prominent. 2Ls 3rd early straight. Failed to maintain position when one-paced 250 M.
In touch early, gradually dropped back to the rear group. Rider unbalanced and dislodged when hampered 200 M.
Towards rear. Ran on quite well from outside in straight to claim 3rd close home.
Towards rear. Kept on moderately 250 M.
Settled in midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight. No extra.
Never in contention.
Chased leader to straight. Soon found no extra upon straightening.
Towards rear to straight. Shifted out for a run upon straightening and ran on late.
In similar position throughout. Kept on same pace down centre of straight.
Settled in forward of midfield to straight. Kept on steadily for 3rd.
Never a factor.
Made all to win convincingly. (Lame.)
Behind midfield. Made some late impression closing stages.
Midfield to straight. Faded.
Towards rear far side. Effort out wide home from bend. Ran home one-paced.
Raced keenly in prominent position to straight, then dropped out.
Never seen with a chance.
Raced in midfield 2 wide and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Hung in in straight and stayed one-pace to the line when asked 300 M out.
Tardy start and raced in worse than midfield 3 wide. Made slight improvement turning for home. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on evenly to the line.

Raced in worse than midfield towards the outside in the early stages. Steadily dropped to rear section after 1100 M. Made some progress home bend. Found nothing in straight and dropped out inside final 250 M.

Raced in midfield out wide without cover. At 900 M went forward from the outside to be in prominent position on straightening. Stayed on same pace when asked 350 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Began fairly from wide draw and was eased to the rear closer to rail. Switched wide turning for home and ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Jumped well and raced in mid-division 3 wide. Made progress at home bend to be in prominent position entering straight. Stayed one-pace when asked 350 M out and weakened slightly in the closing stages.
Broke fairly and raced in prominent position on rail through to straight. Took a while to get into gear when asked 350 M out and made up some ground in the closing stages to be closest at finish.
Jumped fairly and raced in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Under pressure 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M but was never in position to trouble the placegetters.
Began well and soon took up running on rail whilst racing keenly in the early and middle stages. Headed by winner shortly after the 400 M mark but still able to run on gamely to claim 2nd place.
Began fairly from wide draw and soon raced 1L off leader 2 wide. Took lead shortly after the 400 M mark. All out 200 M out and responded well to win convincingly.
Slowly away and raced in rear section on rail. Shifted wide on straightening to find clear running but failed to make any impression in straight.
Slow to begin and pushed along to race in worse than midfield 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to find clear running but failed to quicken and kept on same pace to the line.
Soon raced in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 150 M to be closest at finish.
Raced in worse than midfield on rail through to straight. Made up some ground inside final 200 M when asked 400 M out.
Slowly away but soon recovered and sent on for brief and narrow lead out 2-wide 1200 M out, disputed advantage until the 800 M when coming under pressure, dropped out steadily.
5Ls off pace in 7th and on fence at the 1200 M and same at 800 M, closer and travelling well turning for home, 2Ls down in 2nd place at the 200 M, stayed on well to lead 50 M from home.
In rear group at least 10Ls off pace at 1200 M, 4-wide and about 9Ls down on straightening, made some late ground out wide.
In about 6th 5Ls off pace out 2-wide at 1200 M and 800 M and into home straight, made some late ground but never threatened.
Soon led on fence, briefly headed by HOLY QUEST 1200 M out and pressured up front until the 800 M, travelled well 2Ls clear entering straight, caught 50 M out and lost 2nd final strides.
2-wide 10Ls off pace in 10th at the 1200 M, 8Ls down at the 800 M and still towards rear but 6Ls off pace entering straight, moderate late headway to be nearest at the finish.
Didn't break well, 2-wide and in rear at least 10Ls off pace at 1200 M, 5-wide (widest of all) when 7Ls off pace into home straight, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide 2Ls off pace in 3rd at the 1200 M, 4Ls down in 4th at the 800 M, 5Ls down off home turn, soon beaten.
2-wide 6Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M and for most of back straight, 3-wide 600 M and into home straight when 6Ls down and under pressure in midfield, no impression.
Always caught 3-wide without cover, in 5th place 4Ls off pace at 1200 M, still 4Ls down when driven along turning in, nothing more through final 200 M.
Slowly away, 3-wide 12Ls off pace in rear at 1200 M, never better than 8Ls off the speed thereafter, struggling turning in, no chance.
Broke well, had nice run on fence 2Ls off pace in 4th 1200 M, 4Ls 4th at 100 M and 3Ls 3rd at the 800 M, clear 2nd 2Ls down but driven along on straightening, faded steadily.
On fence 8Ls from front at 1200 M when in 9th, 6Ls down at the 800 M, a little closer in midfield on fence off home turn, 4Ls down in 4th 200 M out, kept on fairly to take 2nd place final strides.
Slowly away, never better than 10Ls off pace at any stage, tailed off entering straight. (Lame.)
Travelled 3-wide at midfield early. Moved further out to improve around the home turn. Charged on nicely down the home stretch when put under pressure to claim victory inside final 100 M.
Ridden early to sit behind pace. Remained racing close to the lead until straightening. Never gained any ground on leader in home straight and found no extra therafter.
Taken back to race near the rear from wide draw. Last one to enter home straight and did not quicken until final 300 M. Closed the race off well to make up good ground in the late stages.
Ran along on fence in rear section until straightening. Unable to quicken much and was one-paced to line.

Ridden for pace early but soon settled midfield. Raced keenly near 800 M. 2-wide and kept within 3Ls of pace rounding home turn. Switched out for a late run inside final 200 M to pick up a minor placing.
Jumped well and was near pace early. Dropped closer to midfield after 1000 M and raced in that position until final 300 M. Found nothing under the whip in the closing stages.
Ridden early from wide draw to keep close to pace. 3-wide and just behind leader rounding home turn. Unable to pick up speed on straightening and weakened 200 M out.
Quick jump from wide draw. Enjoyed a comfortable lead from 1100 M until being pressured 300 M out. Continued well but unable to hold off the winner in closing stages.
Pressured early to be behind midfield. Continued to be niggled along 2-wide rounding home turn. Quickened under the whip inside final 250 M for a late run to make the frame.

From widest draw was eased back to midfield early. Improved steadily from 900 M in 3-wide position to be within 2Ls of the lead upon straightening. Every chance 300 M but unable to sustain effort final stages.
Missed the kick badly and lost ground at the start. Rejoined the field near 900 M and was 4-wide rounding home turn. Never got into it on straightening and finished in last place.
Raced 2 off the fence and within 2Ls of the lead 1000 M. Improved steadily to race aside leader on straightening before being out-paced 400 M out. Hampered severely at 300 M and never recovered.
Jumped awkwardly, clipped heels soon after to end up racing in last place. Trailed field on fence rounding home turn. Switched out once straightened and ran on without threatening.
Never better than midfield, always at least 4Ls off the pace.
Prominent about 2Ls off pace early on, 1L down in 5th place 400 M and still with place prospects when 1L down 200 M out, couldn't follow through.
Slowly away, towards rear when niggled along 5Ls off pace at 600 M, 3Ls down at the 200 M in midfield, dashed well late to claim a place.
Never better than 3Ls off pace at any stage, outpaced once tempo quickened 400 M out, made a little late headway.
Inconvenienced at the start, 1L off pace in 3rd early on, under pressure to lie up 400 M out, faded badly.
Bounded and shifted sharply left exiting gates, disputed lead until about 400 M out, faded rapidly.
2Ls or 3Ls off pace in midfield through to 200 M out, always outpaced.
Badly checked on jumping, recovered to dispute lead from 900 M to 300 M from home when headed, dropped out quickly.
In rear about 6Ls or 7Ls off the speed until the 400 M, ran on a bit through beaten rivals late on.
2Ls off pace in midfield early on, about 1L 4th at the 400 M marker and 200 M out, no extra closing stages.
Slowly away, always worse than midfield about 5Ls off the speed early on, last 200 M out, eased down close home.
Always travelled sweetly, 2Ls off pace 800 M out, loomed up to go 2nd at 400 M and with a clear lead 300 M out, pushed out, comfortably.
Slowly away, 4Ls off pace when worse than midfield at 800 M out, ran on well but had no chance with winner.
3-wide with cover in rear group about 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, under pressure entering straight, made some moderate late headway down centre of track.
Always 2-wide and about 3Ls off pace in 5th through to home straight, steadied 300 M out when about to challenge, ran on well.
Settled 2 and 3-wide down in midfield when about 4Ls off pace down back straight, 4-wide into straight when 3Ls down, quickened up well, led 150 M out, tended to hang in, readily.
2-wide and 10Ls off pace in rear down back straight, no impression.
Prominent but quite keen early on out 3-wide without cover, 2Ls off pace in 4th 800 M out, under pressure entering straight, dropped out quickly.
Led very early on, 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at the 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd entering home straight, weakened steadily.
3-wide with cover down back straight when 5Ls off pace in midfield, inconvenienced 800 M out and forced 4-wide, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 5Ls down, stayed on at same pace.
2-wide and 6Ls off speed in 10th place 800 M out, driven along and 4-wide 5Ls off pace into home stretch, nearest at the finish.
Never looked like emerging from mid-division rank, 2-wide and about 5Ls off pace down back straight, always held in the lane.
Slowly away but quickly recovered to lead on fence, never clear by more than 2Ls, grabbed by winner 150 M out, stayed on well for 2nd place.
Slowly away, on fence 4Ls off pace in midfield through to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Always racing in 2nd last about 6Ls or 7Ls off the pace, never looked likely to challenge.
Had a soft run on fence about 2Ls off pace through to home straight, kept on gamely and just hung on for 3rd.
Never better than midfield at any point, always about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace on fence, posed no threat.
Settled in rear and was last approaching home turn. Ran on quite well final 250 M.
Was midfield before making steady headway home bend. Kept on to challenge final 200 M. Found one-pace near finish.
About 5th into straight where he ran on well to take charge close home.
Clear pacemaker to straight. Was headed 250 M and dropped out steadily.
Never troubled leaders.
Slowly away and was in rear to straight. Made up some ground final 250 M.
Mostly 5th or 6th to straight. Was asked 250 M and reached 4th 150 M. Found no extra.
Ran 3rd to home turn and held some chance 300 M. Soon beaten.
Was midfield before dropping to 9th 800 M. Not in contention thereafter.
Made no show.
Never better than mid-division.
2nd to straight where he ran on to lead 250 M. Unable to hold winner close home.
Never on terms.
Worse than midfield to halfway before improving a bit closing stages.
Slowly away, near rear. Ran on inside 200 M, never nearer.
Moved up to dispute for lead passing 1000 M. Held 2nd from first turn. Came to tackle leader 400 M, taking advantage briefly 250 M to 150 M. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Pushed along to take lead soon after start. Held 1-1/2Ls advantage final turn. Found no extra when headed 250 M.
Slowly away, near rear. Recovered some ground from last early straight.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground early straight. Slightly held up when lacked sufficient room final 100 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made ground from outside in straight, just missed a minor placing at finish.
Always there. Gained 3rd 750 M. Failed to hold place when one-paced 250 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight without threatening the winner.
Midfield early, soon dropped to the rear group. Tailed off inside 200 M.
Prominent early, soon raced 3rd or 4th to straight. Weakened out of contention 200 M out.
Midfield from widest draw. Made slight progress rounding home bend. Ran on from 5th early straight to take command 150 M. Won comfortably.
Prominent early, soon in midfield. Failed to respond when asked 350 M. One-paced.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily without quickening under pressure.
Towards rear throughout.
Soon dropped to rear. Ran past beaten horses final stages.
Well there, holding every chance through final 200 M, and just failed to peg back winner.
Made all virtually. Just held on under pressure.
Prominent. Gave ground gradually final 300 M.
Midfield most of way.
Trailed field throughout.
Towards rear. Made up late ground to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Produced moderate impression closing stages.
Never better than midfield. One-paced.
Never better than midfield.
Prominent before fading over 200 M out.
Prominent early. Gradually faded final 200 M.
Never a factor.
Settled behind midfield from widest draw. Moved up from 1400 M to reach 4th 1000 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
In touch early, dropped back gradually to midfield. Towards rear rounding home bend before recovering some ground in straight.
Slowly away, last to 1000 M. Circled field from outside to reach lead 650 M. Weakened when headed 200 M.
Towards rear. Made up some ground when under pressure in straight. Failed to ride out when held up closing stages.
Forward midfield. In midfield final turn. Made up good ground on outside, never nearer.
Better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Midfield or slightly behind. Shifted to the inside 1400 M. Maintained similar position until running on quite well in straight to just miss 2nd.
Towards rear throughout.
Well there. Weakened out of contention from 3rd 400 M.
Prominent to 800 M. Dropped back steadily despite under whip final turn.
Midfield early. Settled back from 1400 M to be in the rear group home bend. Made steady ground in straight and kept on well final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Towards rear. Steady progress on 4-wide far side to be 5th final turn. Sustained effort to take control 100 M out. Held on.
Took lead from a wide draw. Crossed to the fence 850 M out. Became 2nd from 650 M until regaining advantage 200 M. Unable to match speed with winner inside 100 M.
Quickly improved to prominent position, disputing lead into straight. Unable to sustain effort close to home.
Always well there. Fought on well under pressure to hold every chance in straight but swamped for placing close to home.
Led or disputed lead. Quickened up on straightening to gain 1/2L advantage passing 200 M. Just held on to the line.
Rear to straight. Made up good late ground.
Midfield to straight then gradually faded.
Behind midfield into straight. Ran on well to be nearest at finish.
In forward of midfield. Looked beaten when tightened passing 200 M.
Midfield. Ran on steadily despite tight between runners and squeezed about 100 M out.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
Soon dropped to rear.
Always in rear.
Behind midfield. Ran on down straight before steadied about 100 M out.
Towards rear. Ran on well down centre of straight to just get up on line.
Held up behind pace. Steadied for a stride coming out of back straight. Kept on same pace after turning in.
Jumped well and raced outside leader through to straight. Found nothing when asked 300 M out and further weakened final 200 M.
Broke well but was taken back to worse than midfield on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on same pace to the line.

Jumped awkwardly and rider became unbalanced. Soon recovered to better than midfield out wide without cover. Under pressure at home bend to hold position. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened inside 200 M.
Raced in mid-division 3-wide. Under pressure to maintain position at home bend. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Raced in worse than midfield 2-wide through to straight. Unable to find clear running until 150 M out and made up little ground to be closest at finish thereafter.

Broke fairly and ridden along to take up running on rail with no more than 1L advantage to home straight. Ran on well when asked 350 M out but unable to fend off challenge from winner to surrender lead in the closing stages.

Broke well from wide draw and was eased to the rear section on rail through to straight. Switched to the widest in straight to obtain clear running and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Began awkwardly and raced in worse than midfield 3-wide. Switched out on straightening and made up little ground inside final 200 M when asked 350 M out.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield on fence and proved difficult to settle in the early to middle stages. Found wanting in straight and steadily dropped out inside final 200 M.
Pushed along to race in better than midfield 2-wide through to straight. Under pressure 400 M but failed to respond and steadily weakened out of the race.
Soon settled in rear section 2-wide. Made progress from the outside at home bend to be in midfield on straightening. Made up steady ground in straight and just failed to run down the 2nd placegetter.
Began well and settled in midfield 2-wide through to straight. Near the 300 M was steadied when crowded for room. Soon recovered and made up little ground inside final 150 M to be closest at finish.
Began fairly and settled in midfield on rail through to straight. Once clear running was obtained at 200 M ran home strongly to grab winner spot near the line.

On jumping threw its head about, lost ground and raced at back 2-wide. Switched wide and went forward at home turn to be in midfield on straightening. Stayed one-paced in straight and weakened slightly in closing stages.
2-wide 11Ls off pace in 13th at the 1200 M, still in rear and 8Ls down entering straight, never a factor.
Soon led on fence, always 1L clear through to home straight, a neck clear at the 200 M, collared by winner final strides.
Slowly away and crowded at gates, 12Ls last at the 1200 M, never got into it.
Awkwardly away, 6Ls off pace in 8th and on fence at 1200 M, 5Ls down and 2-wide in midfield into stretch, short of room from 300 M to about 200 M, one-paced thereafter.
On fence 2Ls off pace on fence in 3rd through to home straight, ideally placed to challenge but could only stay on at the one pace.
In 12th 9Ls off pace on fence at 1200 M, still towards rear when 2-wide and 7Ls down off home turn, short of room at the 300 M, ran on strongly once clear final 150 M just missing a place.
2-wide 3Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, similarly placed entering straight but under pressure, was quite one-paced thereafter.
3-wide with cover in 10th 7Ls off pace at the 1200 M, 4-wide into home straight when in similar position, weakened rapidly.
In 2nd 2-wide and 1L off pace from 1200 M to home straight, weakened final 250 M. (Bled.)
Prominent but 3-wide without cover and 3Ls off pace in 5th until home straight, no response and beaten over 200 M out.
2-wide down back straight when about 5Ls off pace in 7th, 3-wide into straight when 4Ls down, picked up well and a neck 2nd 200 M out, driven hands and heels to lead final strides.
2-wide about 7Ls off pace in 9th place at the 1200 M, 6Ls off pace at the 800 M and into home straight when still 9th, never threatened.
Always tight to fence about 4Ls off place in 4th, 5th or 6th through to home straight, switched outside to challenge at the 300 M, 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on fairly well to hang on for 3rd.
2-wide 8Ls off pace in 11th at the 1200 M, 3-wide 8Ls off pace towards rear entering straight, 5Ls down 200 M out, made some late headway. (Bled.)

Eased back to race at rear shortly after start. Continued to travel in last place heading into home turn. Improved around the turn from 4-wide. Ran on well upon straightening and closed the race off well.

Jumped from a wide draw and improve steadily along the to race within a length of the lead 800 M out. Caught 3-wide rounding home turn. Every chance 300 M out but unable to sustain effort inside final 100 M.

Began well and was dropped back to race behind midfield. Urged to go forward after 900 M and improved steadily near fence rounding home turn. Responded well under pressure but unable to gain much ground on winner concluding stages.

Ridden early but still ended up running in rear section. Continued to drift back after 800M despite being pressured and was in last place upon straightening. Never quickened and finished in last place.

Jumped quickly and was soon eased back to settle behind the leader on fence. Travelled comfortably until being pressured for a run after the 400 M. Drove into the lead 200 M out and held advantage to line.
Began fairly but was soon taken back to race near the rear until straightening. Unable to quicken and made no show in the straight. (Lame.)
3-wide behind midfield at 1000 M and continued to race in similar position until home turn. Taken further out on straightening and kept on well to line.
Better than midfield early. Ridden near 900 M to keep pace and was 3-wide rounding home. Quickened when asked on straightening and continued well to line.
Niggled early to race alongside the lead 900 M out. to tag along leader going into the final 200 M before being swamped. Dropped out thereafter.
Quickest out but dropped back to race about 3Ls behind the lead in 2-wide position. Shifted out to be 4-wide near 500 M and remained close to pace. Ran on steadily in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and was soon racing in last place. Improved slightly on fence going around the home turn. Closed the race off strongly and made up good ground.
Jumped to an early lead. Continued to lead or disputed lead until being swamped near 200 M. Found nothing thereafter.
3-wide with cover and 8Ls off pace at the 1000 M when last but one, similarly placed entering straight, never looked like landing a blow.
2-wide without cover and 1L off pace from about 1000 M to home straight, inconvenienced when starting to give ground at the 200 M, one-paced concluding stages.
Well placed throughout, in 4th 2-wide and 3Ls off pace at 1000 M, 3-wide and 1L down entering straight, 1L down in 2nd with every chance at the 200 M, no extra.
Always 3-wide without cover down back straight, 5Ls down in midfield 900 M out, 4Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, dropped out tamely.
Driven to lead out wide early on, got to fence 900 M out, 1L clear until home straight and still at the 200 M, kept on gamely, just hung on for narrow win.
Bit keen early on when 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in midfield, closer when 3Ls down and 3-wide off home turn, briefly involved at the 200 M when 2Ls down, couldn't follow through.
Awkwardly away, on fence 4Ls off pace 800 M out and off home turn, faded steadily.
Disputed early lead, settled into 3rd 2Ls off pace through to straightening up, hemmed in on fence until about 150 M out when finally clear when 1L down, finished strongly, just failed.
Keen on fence at the 800 M when 6Ls off pace, checked at the 700 M and lost ground, 5Ls down in 10th place off final bend, never on terms with principals.
Steadied about 1300 M out when worse than midfield, 2-wide and about 6Ls off pace in 10th at the 800 M, 4Ls down and 2-wide into straight, ran on well, just missed a place.
2-wide and 8Ls off pace at 1000 M, 6Ls down and 3-wide towards rear into straight, kept on at same pace.
In midfield towards inside about 4Ls or 5Ls off speed until home straight, one-paced thereafter.
3-wide with cover in 9th place and 6Ls off pace at the 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, finishing off strongly when 2Ls down in 2nd 200 M out, kept on well to nick a place.
Always detached and niggled along at least 8Ls off pace from 1000 M out, never a factor.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 6th at the 1200 M, similarly placed turning for home, improved to be 1L down in 2nd at the 200 M, kept on but always just held by winner.
Closer to pace than usual, on fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at the 1200 M, 4Ls down and 2-wide entering straight, 3Ls down and all out at the 200 M, weakened close home.
2-wide 1L off pace in 2nd at the 1200 M, half a length down at the 800 M pole, under pressure to maintain this post turning for home, dropped out quickly.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 1L, all out when headed by winner at the 250 M, faded.
Had a soft run 2Ls off pace on fence in 3rd through to straightening up, was beating a hasty retreat as far as 300 M out.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at the 1200 M, 3-wide and 3Ls down in 4th entering straight, led 250 M out, dug deep to repel challenge by runner-up.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 8th at the 1200 M, 2-wide and 5Ls down in 7th off home turn, picked up well to be 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, ran on but couldn't get to quinella pair.
On fence 11Ls off pace in rear 1200 M out, 7Ls down and 2-wide and one from rear into home straight, never able to challenge.
Took no part.
3-wide with cover and 8Ls behind leader in 9th 1200 M out, 5-wide into stretch when at least 6Ls down, 3Ls down at the 200 M, finished strongly, nearest at the finish.
2-wide and 10Ls off pace in 10th at the 1200 M marker, in rear when 6-wide (widest of all) turning for home, never able to challenge.
Caught 3-wide without cover down back straight, 6Ls off pace at the 1200 M, travelled well when 4-wide into straight and 5Ls down, 2Ls down at the 200 M, no extra thereafter.
Among rear group into straight where he ran on a bit.
Never better than midfield.
Soon settled in 4th and remained there to straight. Kept on to hold some chance 200 M before being outpaced close to finish.
Well there briefly and was 7th into home bend. Made up good ground final 200 M.
Towards rear before making up some ground final 250 M.
Never on terms.
Always prominent. Took lead from 1200 M and kept on well in straight. Found winner too strong towards finish.
Prominent to straight. Found nothing when asked final 200 M.
Worse than midfield before improving approaching 1000 M and was about 6th into straight. Plugged on under pressure.
Last into straight. Never nearer.
Made no show.
Well there to straight. Unable to quicken under pressure closing stages.
5th into straight going well. Moved up nicely to challenge inside 150 M. Hit front final strides to win cleverly.
Midfield. Kept on quite well 250 M to just miss a minor placing.
Took lead from widest draw. Found no extra when headed near 250 M.
Towards rear. Kept on quite well in straight.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground inside 300 M.
Soon in 5th. Made ground steadily in straight to claim 3rd close home.
Began awkwardly, last to home turn. Steadied on straightening. Made up some ground on outside while hanging in final 400 M.
Took no part.
Prominent. 2nd early straight. Weakened out of contention inside 150 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Near rear. Crept closer to just behind midfield final turn. Kept on but failed to quicken closing stages.
Bounded at start, towards rear. Soon recovered ground to race in midfield. Was bumped and unbalanced near 800 M. Failed to respond on straightening. Faded.
Midfield or slightly behind. Made some progress inside 200 M.
Raced 5th early. Steady progress to 4th rounding the first turn. Ran on solidly in straight to assert authority approaching 200 M. Won going away.
Behind midfield early. Pushed along to be prominent. Dropped back steadily from 3rd early straight.
Settled in midfield. Finished strongly final 300 M to snatch victory final strides.
Wide in midfield. Effort around field home bend disputing lead into straight. Unable to sustain effort final 200 M and lost placing late.
Always in last few. Made no impression under pressure in straight.
Never a danger. Dropped out upon straightening.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Around midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Rear into straight. Ran past beaten horses.
Prominent to straight. One paced.
Raced wide throughout and never in contention.
Always in rear.
Ridden to lead from wide draw. Joined into straight but fought on well to retain advantage until over-shadowed by fast-finishing winner short of line.
Held up in forward of midfield. Some 3Ls back turning in. Ran on steadily down straight without threatening.
In touch. Moved up to 3rd from first turn. Weakened out of contention 250 M.
Never a factor.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made up some ground from outside final 400 M.
Slightly better than midfield. 3-wide 5th on straightening. Weakened 200 M out.
Held 2nd to final turn. Came to tackle leader and took advantage passing 300 M. Held on but just lost narrowly final stride.
Midfield early. Settled towards rear from the widest draw. Crept closer on outside home turn. Made up good ground in straight.
Slowly away, last to 200 M. Ran on to recover some ground at finish.
In touch early, was soon slightly better than midfield. One-paced.
Better than midfield. Slightly hampered 1100 m. 7th on inside turning in. Ran on steadily in straight to just get up on the line.
Midfield or behind. Steadied 1000 M. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Prominent. 2Ls 4th turning in. Kept on until finding no extra inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Failed to make any impression in straight.
Midfield early, steadily dropped back towards the rear. No improvement.
Led field to 300 M. Kept on for a 3rd thereafter.
Never nearer.
Well back. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Began from poor draw and crossed to front rounding stables bend. Led field till no extra shortly after straightening.
Behind midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Made moderate progress in straight.
Settled in rear. Circled field rounding home bend and widest runner turning in. Sustained effort to take charge inside final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Made modest headway down straight to claim remote 3rd close to home.
Well there to straight then soon weakened.
Towards rear. Kept on steadily under pressure in straight.
Never far off to straight, then weakened.
Around midfield into straight. Kept on same pace and lost 3rd late.
Prominent before dropping out approaching home turn.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Prominent. Hit front into straight but quickly overhauled passing 200 M.
Midfield before dropping out abruptly approaching home bend. (See Racing Incidents.)

Tardy start and raced in rear section in the early stages. At 1400 M went forward to race in midfield 3 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Slow to begin and raced in worse than midfield around 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to find clear running. All out 300 M out and made up steady ground inside 200 M but was unable to trouble the winner.
Steadily taken back to the rear section towards the outside through to straight. Made no impression in straight.
Slowly away and raced at back on rail. Made the turn after the 800 M awkwardly and got its head up on a number of occasions. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Pushed along to race in midfield towards the outside. Under pressure at home bend and made up little ground. Soon weakened after straightening and steadily dropped out inside final 350 M.

Led narrowly in the early stages and was headed shortly after the 1200 M mark. Settled in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken in straight and further weakened inside final 250 M.

Began fairly and settled in midfield or better 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure 300 M out and made up some ground inside final 200 M but was unable to hold off challenge from 2nd placegetter in the final stages.
Began well and raced in better than midfield 3 wide. Made progress rounding the home turn to take lead on straightening. Kept on well when asked 350 M to win convincingly.

Began well from wide draw and was soon taken back to rear section closer to fence. Switched out on straightening. Only kept on evenly when asked 300 M out and ran past several weakening runners inside final 200 M.
Broke well and settled in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Unable to find clear running until 150 M out and made up little ground thereafter. (See Racing Incidents.)
Jumped well and settled in rear section 3 wide. Switched out and made up little ground rounding the home turn. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Slow to begin and niggled along to race in a forward position on rail through to straight. Stayed one-pace when asked 350 M out and weakened quickly inside final 100 M.

Raced in midfield on fence. Lost a bit of ground rounding home turn to be in worse than midfield on straightening. Under pressure 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 350 M to be closest at finish.

Niggled along to race in prominent position towards the outside. At the 1000 M went forward to take lead on rail. Headed on straightening and failed to respond to pressure. Steadily faded inside final 200 M.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace at 1000 M, 3-wide without cover at 800 M, 3Ls down in 5th entering straight, 2Ls down in 4th at 200 M, just hung on for a place.
Awkwardly away, on fence in rear bunch 9Ls off pace 1000 M out, similarly placed and under pressure to take closer order off home turn, weakened out.
Bumped on exiting gates, led on fence very early on, headed and over-raced when 1L down in 2nd at the 1000 M, brief lead again off home turn, headed once again and folded tamely.
Slowly away, 3-wide with cover 9Ls off pace in rear 1000 M out, still towards rear about 6Ls down into straight, stayed on well down centre of track, 2Ls down at 200 M, no extra close home.
Sent on to lead by a neck out 2-wide 1100 M out, 2Ls clear 800 M out, disputing lead off home turn, headed about 300 M out, faded right out.
On fence 3Ls off pace in 4th place at the 1000 M, 2Ls down in 3rd turning in, quickened up well to lead 250 M out, pushed out, comfortably.
Slowly away, 2-wide in 11th place when 9Ls off pace at the 1000 M, still towards rear when 6Ls down entering straight, always a little short of room on run-in but never better than midfield.
Caught 4-wide without cover in last 9Ls off pace at the 1000 M, still wide on the circle, 8Ls behind leader in rear on straightening, moderate late headway.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide without cover 7Ls off pace in 9th at the 1000 M, widest of all (4-wide) into straight when about 5Ls down, always outpaced.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 7th at the 1000 M, shuffled back at the 800 M, 2-wide and 5Ls down on the swing, never dangerous.
2-wide and 4Ls behind leader in 5th at 1000 M, 2-wide and 3Ls down into home straight, 1L down in 3rd at the 200 M, no extra close home.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 3rd at the 1000 M, 1L down off home turn and still 3rd, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide and 7Ls down in 8th at 1000 M, driven along when 3-wide and 5Ls down entering straight, kept on evenly for pressure, just missed a place.
Bumped at start, on fence 5Ls off pace in 7th at the 1000 M, 3Ls down in 6th on straightening, battled on well for 2nd place but had no chance with winner.
Began fairly and enjoyed prominent position. Steadied near 700 M but soon regained composure and moved into a disputed lead at 400 M. Drew clear final 200 M and was not threatened.
Jumped awkwardly and raced near the rear until being put under heavy pressure heading into the home turn. Found nothing more in the straight to finish in last place.
Settled 2-off the fence behind midfield in the early and middle stages. Ran on fairly on straightening but could not sustain effort inside final 100 M.
Unable to muster speed despite being pressured and steadily dropped back to be running in last place at 800 M. Only ran past some beaten runners in the straight.

Quickest out from wide draw but unable to cross to the lead and ended up travelling within 2Ls of the lead shortly after. Kept in similar position and 3-wide rounding home turn. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Raced on fence behind midfield in the early stages. Pressured from 700 M out but unable to make up much ground on home turn. Found nothing in the straight.

Began fairly. Soon led without too much pressure. Was being challenged prior to straightening. Battled with the eventual winner but was outmatched inside final 200 M and just managed to hold a minor placing.

Pushed along early to be in pace. Within 3Ls of the lead rounding home. Hung in early straight and steadied away from heels near 300 M. Continued to gain steady ground in the closing stages without threatening.
Widest draw and was taken back to race at the rear in the early stages. Remained running in the last pair and was wide rounding home turn. No response when pressured in the straight.
Slowly away. Ridden along but still racing among the last few upon straightening. Found nothing when asked and tired in the closing stages.

Unable to keep a position near pace early despite being urged and was running in midfield after 800 M. 4-wide going around the turn. Made up steady ground in the straight and just missed a minor placing.
Near midfield early but drifted further back to be at the rear section near 800 M. Travelled 4-wide at the home turn and closed race off fairly to make up some ground.
Awkwardly away, always outpaced, in rear 600 M out, when 4Ls off pace and driven along, no chance.
Didn't break well, towards rear about 4Ls off pace until the 400 M marker, 1L down but only in midfield at the 200 M, kept finding all the way to line to nick a place.
Disputing lead on stand's rail 800 M out, in trouble 500 M out, soon beaten.
Always niggled along when about 4Ls off the pace in rear, finished off okay but was never on terms with leaders.
Very awkwardly away with rider almost unshipped, soon recovered and travelled smoothly, within 1L of the lead 200 M out, couldn't follow through final stages.
Awkwardly away, in midfield about 2Ls off pace until the 600 M, soon under pressure, found very little and was beaten over 200 M out.
Never better than midfield at any stage, at least 4Ls down until 400 M out, always outpaced.
No worse than 3Ls off pace in midfield and centre of track until 400 M out, picked up well to dispute lead at the 200 M, asserted closing stages.
Two off stand's rail disputing lead at the 800 M pole, 1L 3rd 400 M out but picked up to regain narrow advantage 200 M out, couldn't sustain effort.
About 1L off pace and three off the stand's rail 600 M out, disputing lead and with every chance at the 200 M, lacked winner's kick but ran on well for the quinella.
Always right on the speed closest to far rail for first half of race, 1L 2nd at the 400 M, closer and with every chance of a place 200 M out, no extra closing stages.
Prominent within 2Ls off the speed in about 5th place until the 400 M, weakened out thereafter.
Right there about 1L off pace in first 3 or 4 runners until the 500 M marker, soon driven along, no impression.
Disputed early towards far rail, clear advantage by 1L 500 M out, grabbed 200 M out and weakened concluding stages.
Awkwardly away, keen 1200 M out when 4Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover in 8th, driven along when 3-wide into straight and 3Ls down in 5th place, ran on quite well but no chance with winner.
Slowly away, in rear 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, 6Ls down and one from rear entering straight, making some moderate late headway when short of room 100 M out.
2-wide and 6Ls behind leader in 12th at the 1200 M, 3-wide and 7Ls off at 800 M, 4-wide (widest of all) into stretch when 5Ls down, ran on fairly to be nearest at the finish.
3-wide without cover when 3Ls off pace in 5th 1200 M out, 3-wide and 1L down in 2nd at 800 M, disputing lead and every chance into straight, soon dropped out rapidly.
Slowly away, on fence 6Ls off pace and one from rear at 1200 M, always rear from the 800 M marker, never on terms from then on.
Had the run of the race in 3rd on fence 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, switched out to lead on the bridle 350 M out, 2Ls clear 200 M out, always in command.
Slowly away, on fence 5Ls off pace in 10th 1200 M out, 4Ls down in midfield on straightening, kept on well along fence to run into the money.
On fence 4Ls off speed in 6th at 1200 M, closer and very well placed turning for home, no acceleration whatsoever.
4Ls off pace in 7th and 2-wide 1200 M out, similarly placed when close to heels entering straight, always outpaced in concluding stages.
Soon led, on fence 1200 M out, never clear by more than 1L through to home stretch, headed by winner 350 M out, dropped away steadily.
Well placed 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at the 1200 M, 3Ls down in 6th 800 M out and into home straight when clipping heels, one-paced thereafter.
3-wide with cover and 1L off pace in 2nd 1200 M out, 2-wide and 1L off pace in 3rd at 800 M, nudged along when 2Ls down in 4th entering straight, faded.
Always keen in midfield about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace but 4-wide without cover through to the 600 M, 3-wide into home straight, kept on okay without threatening in closing stages.
Never competitive at any stage, 5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 11th 1200 M out, never got much closer than that.
Towards rear before making up good ground final 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Took up running from 1600 M and led field to straight. Was headed passing 200 M and dropped out of contention.
Midfield to straight. Came with strong run from 300 M to take command passing 200 M. Kept on well to line.
Well there to home bend. Kept on same pace final 250 M.
Worse than midfield rounding home bend. Was steadied 200 M out before staying on a bit close home.
Never seen with a chance.
Never troubled leaders.
Midfield halfway before making some improvement closing stages.
Prominent to straight where he quickened to challenge 250 M. Found no extra close home.
Well there into straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Midfield into home bend and about 5th on straightening. Stayed on well to take 2nd close home despite no threat to winner.
About 5th 1200 M and shared 3rd turning into straight. Could make no impression on leaders.
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Found no clear run over 100 M and near finish.
Rear. Made up good ground from outside while hanging in in straight.
Held 5th from widest draw. One-paced in straight. Failed to find a cover throughout.
In touch early, settled in 5th or 6th from 1200 M. Ran on strongly 200 M out from a narrow gap on inside to take control closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Took lead from a wide draw. Mainly with 2Ls advantage to straight. Failed to match speed with winner when headed closing stages.
Prominent. 2nd rounding home bend. Dropped back steadily soon after straightening.
In touch early, dropped to behind midfield stable bend. Kept on same pace before weakened close home.
Prominent. Maintained 2nd or 3rd until failing to hold place closing stages.
Behind midfield. Made no impression in straight.
Towards rear. Became last passing 600 M. Ran on a bit from outside final 100 M.
Began awkwardly, rear to final turn. Made up good ground final 200 M to just miss 2nd place.
Settled in midfield. Improved well on leaders down straight.
Midfield most of way till weakening in straight.
Slightly slow out but sluggish early stages. Remained well back to straight. Improving when forced to steady about 150 M out.
Behind midfield. Took closer order far side. Soon weakened in straight.
Not far off leaders far side. Midfield into straight. Made steady headway.
Led till overhauled final 200 M.
Towards rear. Widest runner turning in. Made up good ground down straight to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Prominent to straight. Quickened well to take charge inside 200 M.
Travelled behind leaders. Found no room whatsoever in home straight.
Midfield. One-paced in straight.
Rear into straight. Awkwardly placed behind runners about 400 M out. Made no show after.
Well there to straight. Faded.
Behind midfield. Made up some ground early straight until one-paced closing stages.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear from widest draw. Ran on a bit final 200 M.
Led field to near 900 M. Dropped back steadily to be 5th rounding home bend. Weakened in straight.
Last to straight. Recovered some ground from outside closing stages.
Towards rear. Ran past a few beaten horses final 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Well there. Took lead from 850 M to 600 M, 1-1/2Ls behind lead turning in. Kept on well but was checked near 100 M.
In touch. Pulled to the 3rd 700 M. Ran on steadily in straight to take command inside 100 M.
Always well there. Took lead 600 M out, still with 1-1/2Ls advantage final turn. Held on well until headed near 100 M.
Well there early. Dropped back to 4th or 5th from 700 M. Kept on same pace when under pressure in straight. (See Racing Incidents.)
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily from 500 M.
Towards rear. Made up good ground down centre of straight.
Towards rear. Ran on well between runners to be nearest at finish.
Better than midfield to straight. Weakened.
Never better than midfield. Steadied for a run over 200 M out, then kept on same pace.
Settled in 5th just better than midfield. Commenced move passing Rock to hit front before home turn. Hung on gamely to the line.
Soon took up running and led until narrowly headed rounding home bend. Dropped out final 200 M.
Always well there. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Never far off behind leaders to straight. One-paced.
Midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Never in contention.
Well back. Ran on down straight despite finding not clear passage behind heels of runners.
Midfield. Ran on under pressure to be nearest at finish.

Jumped best and settled in behind pace maker on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Ran on well when asked 250 M out but was unable to match speed with winner in the closing stages to settle for 2nd.
Niggled along to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 250 M out.

Broke fairly and pushed along to race outside leader. Under pressure to maintain position turning for home. Ran on fairly in straight but hung in and proved difficult to ride. Was overhauled by 1st pair in the final stages.
Began fairly and was soon eased to the rear section 2-wide. Proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Switched out on straightening but unable to make any impression.
Slowly away and raced in rear section on rail through to straight. Ran home strongly when asked 250 M out and took charge in the final stages to win convincingly.
Began fairly from widest and settled in mid-division around 3-wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 200 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Ridden hard in the early stages to race in mid-division 2-wide. Under pressure at home bend to maintain position, unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Began very awkwardly and raced at back on rail through to straight. Stayed one-paced in straight and only ran past several beaten horses.
Jumped awkwardly and niggled along to race in worse than midfield towards the outside. Commenced to lose position turning for home and gradually faded in straight.
Began fairly and raced in worse than midfield 2-wide. Pushed along to hold position turning for home. No extra in straight and kept on one pace to the line.
Raced in better than midfield 3-wide throughout to straight. Stayed one-paced when asked 250 M out and further weakened inside final 150 M.

Broke well and ridden along to lead on rail through to straight. Around 1-1/4Ls up passing 200 M mark and was running on fairly but was unable to match speed with the principals in the closing stages to settle for a close 4th.
Slowly away, in 8th place on fence 6Ls off speed 1100 M out, still 8th but 4Ls down off home turn, stayed on fairly on fence without ever threatening principals.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 9th 1100 M out, advanced out 4-wide without cover from 800 M to be 5-wide into home straight and 3Ls off pace in 6th, quite one-paced on run-in.
On fence 8Ls off pace in 10th 1100 M out, 2-wide and 6Ls down at 800 M, 4-wide into straight when 5Ls behind and one from rear, quickened up very well to lead 100 M out, tidily.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 5th at the 1200 M, still 5Ls off pace but lost position and was 10th entering home straight, very one-paced thereafter.
Soon led, 2Ls clear on fence at 1200 M out, narrow advantage turning for home and at the 200 M, headed by winner about 100 M from line and run out of a place final stride.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 4Ls behind leader in 7th at the 1200 M, caught 3 and 4-wide down back straight, 3Ls down and 3-wide into stretch in 7th, 2Ls down at 200 M, one-paced late on.
Caught 4-wide 1300 M out, 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at the 1200 M, remained within 1L of pace in 2nd until the 200 M, no extra closing stages.
Held up one from rear on fence 10Ls off pace 1100 M out, in rear 600 M out when 7Ls behind, 3-wide and still rear entering straight, ran on strongly closing stages for a place.
4Ls off pace on fence in 6th 1100 M out, 2-wide and short of room in 5th when 2Ls off pace from 500 M to 300 M, 1L down in 3rd place and every chance 200 M out, no answer to winner's pace.
3-wide without cover when 2Ls off pace at the 1200 M while in 4th place, 3-wide in 3rd and 1L off pace entering home straight, soon back-pedalling.
Box-seat run on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th from 1200 M to home straight when driven along, found nothing under pressure.
Tended to over-race when held up in rear 2-wide and 10Ls off pace at the 1200 M, steadily improved to be 3-wide and 4Ls off pace in 9th entering straight, didn't follow through.
Slowly away and raced keenly at the rear of the field in the early and middle stages. Found nothing on straightening and finished at the rear.
Settled 2-off the fence near midfield early. Dropped slightly to behind midfield near 800 M and pressured 400 M out. Made a strong rally down the stretch to grab a share of the win.

Jumped well and soon settled at midfield but 3-wide. Continued to travel comfortably in that position into home straight. Quickened nicely when asked and headed inside final 100 M. Held on at the line for a dead-heat win.

Jumped from widest draw and sat behind midfield early. Allowed to stride forward once in the back straight to be about a length behind pace but 3-wide. Continued to race 3-wide rounding home. Faded in the closing stages.
Jumped to an early lead but raced keenly in the early stages. Continued to lead into the final stages until being swamped by the top three inside final 100 M.
Pushed along to race behind the leader in the early stages. Kept on fence and right behind the lead until final 200 M. Unable to get into a higher gear in the closing stages.
Soon racing in rear section. Struck on the heels near 700 M and was dragged behind. Last pair to enter home straight and made no impression.
Began fairly and raced on the fence at midfield. Continued to be held in similar position until being pressured on straightening. Responded only fairly in run to the line.

Began well and raced just behind pace until 800 M. Kept 2-wide and within 3Ls behind the lead going into the straight. No clear passage 300 M out but picked up nicely once finding daylight and closely followed winner home.

Hovering around midfield shortly after the jumped and was niggled along to improve to a disputed lead at 800 M. Continued to race upside the leader and led briefly near final 200 M. Unable to sustain effort thereafter.
Remained racing near the rear in the early stages despite being pressured. Made no improvement in the back straight. Ran on without threatening in home straight.
Jumped slow from wide draw and was near last at 1000 M. Improved position slightly in the back straight but still trapped 3-wide. 4-wide turning for home and ran on without threatening.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 10th 1100 M out, slightly closer and one from rear entering straight, short of room and switched out to challenge 200 M out, nearest at the finish.
Led early on fence, headed 800 M out into 2nd but held ground to be half a length down in 2nd entering straight, kept on well to lead at the 100 M, pushed out.
Didn't break at all well, 6Ls down and 3-wide in 9th place 1100 M out, 5Ls off speed towards rear when 6-wide, always outpaced.
Veered sharply left exiting gates, 2-wide and 9Ls off pace in rear 1100 M out, 6Ls off pace but very wide (7-wide) into home straight, made a little late progress.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at the 1100 M, 2Ls down 800 M and 1L 3rd out 3-wide entering straight, half a length 3rd at the 200 M, winner always had his measure.
3-wide without cover in 5th place 3Ls off pace 1100 M out, 3-wide and 1L off pace in 3rd 800 M out, hard pressed to hold this position turning for home, soon dropped out.
Tended to race freely on fence when 2Ls off pace in 4th or 5th from 1200 M to home straight, 2Ls down in 5th at the 200 M, made some late headway, never looked the winner.
In 2nd out 2-wide and 1L off pace 1100 M out, led 800 M out, never clear by more than 1L through to home straight, didn't quicken up, grabbed by winner and pursuers from 100 M out.
On fence 8Ls off pace in 11th place 1100 M out, closer about 5Ls off pace but still towards rear entering straight, made up some good late ground, nearest at the finish.
In 8th place 6Ls off pace 1100 M out, 3Ls down in midfield turning for home, kept on fairly well in straight without threatening, short of room final 100 M and was not fully ridden out.
2-wide in 7th place when 5Ls off pace 1100 M out, 3Ls 6th and still 2-wide entering straight, staying on well when 2Ls down 200 M out, kept on finding but post came too soon.
Never really travelled well, 4Ls off pace on fence in 6th 1100 M out, under pressure to hold this spot 800 M out, still only 4Ls down into home straight, never threatened.
Midfield or better. Ran on passing 300 M. Just failed to maintain the 3rd place at finish.
Well there. Held 2nd until 400 M. Failed to hold place when weakened 300 M.
Behind midfield. Failed to make any progress throughout.
Made no show.
Better than midfield. Kept on without quickening inside 200 M.
Began very awkwardly, never a factor.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily halfway.
Began awkwardly and was inconvenienced, towards rear. Recovered ground steadily 400 M out. Just managed to obtain a minor placing.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield halfway. Made up further ground final 200 M to be nearest at finish.
Well there and was soon in the front. Took clear lead passing 400 M. Won unchallenged.
Prominent on inside. Gave ground from 250 M.
Prominent. 1L behind lead at course proper. Kept on well but unable to threaten the winner.
Behind midfield. Made no impression final 400 M.
Prominent. Reached 3rd briefly 300 M. Soon weakened.
Never seen with a chance.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Well back to 300 M. Made up good ground late.
Raced keenly in forward of midfield before losing position twice far side. Found nothing from towards rear into straight.
Settled behind leaders. Found no room on rails in straight until 100 M when made up some late ground.
Never better than midfield. Kept on same pace.
Moved up to dispute lead approaching home bend. Unable to sustain effort over 200 M out.
Broke well. Restrained from taking lead early, sharing pace into straight. Weakened inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Commenced move turning in. Challenged leaders strongly final 200 M but failed to peg back winner.
Held up behind pace. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M and fought on under pressure to stave off challenges close to home.
Raced wide in midfield to straight then dropped out.
Well there to 300 M then gradually faded.
Mostly in midfield to straight. Ran on quite well.
Raced wide in forward of midfield. Improved from 2Ls off pace turning in to hold some chance 200 M out when quickly wilted.
Bounded at start, towards rear throughout.
Behind midfield and was soon towards rear. Remained similar position until running on well inside 200 M, just failing to catch the winner.
Slowly away, last to final turn. Widest turning in. Ran past a few beaten horses inside 300 M.
Led briefly early, soon raced mainly in 4th. Weakened out of contention from 3rd early straight.
Never in the hunt.
Midfield or slightly better. Found no clear run from 400 M to 200 M. Kept on without quickening when in clear.
Better than midfield. 3-wide 5th early straight. Ran on quite well final 250 M.
Midfield early. Moved up from first turn to be 2nd 700 M. Held on until failing to hold place 200 M.
Well there early. Dropped back steadily passing 1000 M to be midfield home bend. Failed to quicken on inside in straight.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered ground rounding home bend to be 8th turning in. Ran on steadily to take lead 100 M. Just held on.
Well there and was soon 2nd. Gave a little ground rounding home bend to be 2Ls 4th final turn. Kept on well until one-paced closing stages.
Towards rear. 4-wide turning into straight. Recovered good ground 200 M out.
Led field from 1000 M. Found no extra when headed 100 M out.
Behind midfield. Dropped further back when inconvenienced near 800 M. Never recovered.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without quickening.
Made no show.
Settled in midfield. Found nothing in straight.
Rear to straight. Ran on past beaten horses.
Prominent to straight, then weakened.
Never nearer.
Made all to win readily.
Towards rear. Made up good late ground closing stages.
Well there. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Always in rear.
Well back to straight. Made good headway early on but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Midfield to straight. Soon weakened.
Always well there but failed to quicken under pressure to threaten.
Never better than midfield.

Tardy start and soon recovered to race in better than midfield 3 wide. Made steady progress at home bend to be outside leader on straightening. Took charge 350 M out and kept on well but was run down by 1st pair in final stages.
Broke fairly and soon eased to race in mid-division 3 wide. Crept forward from the outside turning for home. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 400 M out.
Began well and niggled along to take lead on inner with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Headed soon after the 400 M and commenced to lose ground steadily thereafter.

Began fairly and raced in midfield out wide without cover. Went forward at home bend to be in prominent position on straightening. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on evenly to the line.

Unable to muster early speed to race in worse than midfield wide without cover. Made steady progress on outside of the field turning for home. Unable to quicken in straight and weakened steadily inside final 200 M.

Slowly away and raced towards the rear section 2 wide. At 1100 M was steadied away from heels. Switched wide on straightening to find clear running but failed to quicken and stayed one-pace to the line.

Began fairly and soon eased to race in mid-division 3 wide through to straight. Made up little ground in early part of straight but became one-pace inside final 200 M and was crowded for room near the winning post.
Pushed along to race in midfield on rail. Commenced to lose position from 500 M and dropped out in straight.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. 1-1/2Ls down on straightening, responded well when asked 300 M out and fended off late challenge from 2nd placegetter to win by a short margin.
Niggled along to race in a forward position on rail through to straight. Stayed one-pace when asked 350 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.

Jumped fairly and soon eased to the tail on rail. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Made up good ground 250 M and missed the winner by a narrow margin. Inside final 200 M hung in.

Slow to begin and was unable to muster early speed to be in rear section 3 wide. Made progress from the outside turning for home to be in midfield on straightening. Made up little ground inside 200 M but was crowded for room near finish.

Settled in midfield or better 2 wide. Lost its position turning for home to be near the rear section on straightening. Under pressure 400 M out but failed to quicken and plugged on evenly to the line.
Raced in rear section on rail through to straight. Took a while to get into gear when asked 350 M out and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Checked at the break, in 7th place on fence 7Ls off pace 1600 M out, 5Ls down in midfield entering straight, had very little room for manoeuvre on run-in, not fully tested.
In 2nd when about 1L off pace and 2-wide from 1600 M to home straight, every chance 300 M out, lacked any extra gears.
In 5th place on fence 5Ls off lead at 1600 M, 4Ls down at 800 M, driven along 600 M out, 2-wide and hard ridden into stretch, staying on when 2Ls down at 200 M, kept on dourly for a place.
Slowly away, 13th and 14Ls down 1500 M out, 12Ls down 800 M out, 4-wide (widest of all) into straight when 9Ls down, 4Ls down at 200 M, kept on well, nearest at finish.
Slowly away, 12Ls off pace in 12th and 2-wide 1600 M out, 10Ls down 800 M out, 3-wide and 8Ls down and still in rear on straightening, no impression.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace 5th 1600 M out, 4Ls down in 6th at 800 M and entering home straight, staying on well with every chance when 1L down 200 M out, no extra closing stages.
Inconvenienced on jumping, in last 14Ls off pace 1600 M out, still in last when 10Ls down entering straight, never remotely on terms.
