Very keen 1700 M out, 7Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th 1600 M out, relaxed 1200 M out, about 6Ls down in 7th 800 M out and into straight, battled on well just missing a place.
Soon led, always about 1L clear on fence through to home straight, headed 200 M out, weakened.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th 1600 M out and 800 M out when niggled along, 2Ls down in 4th into straight, led 200 M out, ran on gamely but was caught right on the line.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls off pace in 3rd through to home straight when under pressure, always outpaced thereafter.
3-wide without cover and 7Ls off pace in 9th 1600 M out, got cover 2 wide at 1000 M, 3-wide and 5Ls down and under pressure into straight, 1L 3rd 200 M out, kept on, led on line.
11Ls off pace in 11th when 2-wide at 1600 M, about 10Ls down 800 M out, still towards rear when 8Ls down entering straight, made good late headway without threatening principals.
8Ls or 9Ls off pace on fence in 10th at the 1500 M and through to home straight, 4Ls down and staying on fairly 200 M out, short of running room and not ridden out final stages.
Slowly away and raced in the rear section early. Did not quicken when ridden in the closing stages to finish near the back.
Jumped to an early lead and remained the pace-setter until 400 M. Stayed in contention for a while before fading out inside final 200 M.
Slow to jump and raced at the tail end. No improvement at any stage despite being ridden and finished in last place.
At midfield 800 M and urged to improve position after 500 M. Quickened nicely after the 400 M and went stride for stride with the eventual winner in the closing stages but just failed by a neck.
Travelled in a position behind midfield in the early and middle stages. No extra in the final stages and was one-paced to line.
Kept racing within 3Ls of pace until 400 M. Unable to quicken and faded steadily thereafter.
Niggled along behind midfield until pressured near 500 M. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Towards the rear in the early stages. Moved up the field steadily after the 500 M. Continued well under pressure and closed the race off well.
Settled nicely at midfield until being ridden hard inside final 400 M. Kept on well but was unable to draw closer to the top pair in the closing stages.
Jumped well. Travelled comfortably along the fence and kept within 2Ls of the pace. Responded well when asked inside 400 M and duelled with challenger before gaining a slight advantage near line.
Jumped awkwardly, unable to muster early speed and was soon racing near the rear. Made no progress at any stage of the race and was eased off near the end.
Stumbled on jumping. Raced near the rear in the early and middle stages. Did not quicken in the final stages.
Kept within 3Ls of pace until 400 M. Responded only fairly under the whip and ran on to line.
Raced just behind the pace from 800 M to 400 M. Not pressured until final 300 M. Continued well but had no answer when challenged inside 200 M.
Led on fence 1400 M out, never clear by more than 3Ls, less than 1L to the good entering straight, soon headed and dropped out disappointingly.
In 6th place 5Ls off speed on fence at 1200 M and 800 M, driven along when 4Ls 4th into home straight and 200 M out, one-paced final stages.
3-wide without cover and 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, lost position from 600 M out, 7Ls down at top of home straight, weakening when rightful running was taken and nearly fell, eased down.
2 wide and 7Ls behind leader in 10th at 1200 M, 6Ls down when 3-wide and awkwardly placed into straight, switched left 300 M out, 5Ls down in 5th 200 M out, produced huge finish to lead on line.
On fence 9Ls off pace in 11th 1200 M out, still well behind and under strong driving turning for home, made some late progress and nearest at finish.
2-wide in 2nd place between 2 and 3Ls off pace from 1200 M to 600 M, brief lead at top of home straight before being headed by SONGS OF PRAISE 350 M out, always just held thereafter.
Bounded at start, 3-wide with cover when 5Ls off pace in 8th place 1200 M out, under pressure when 5-wide (widest of all) entering straight, never troubled leaders and tended to hang.
Slowly away, in rear at least 12Ls off pace and 3-wide down back straight, 10Ls down and 3-wide off home turn, no chance.
2-wide and 10Ls off speed in 12th at the 1200 M, 8Ls down 800 M out and entering home straight when asked to improve along to fence, no impression.
Keen 1400 M out, settled better when 2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M and 800 M out, well placed but failed to quicken up off home turn and beaten 300 M out.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 7th at the 1200 M, niggled along to hold this spot at the 800 M, 4-wide and 6Ls down in midfield entering straight, posed no threat.
On fence 3Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, 3-wide into straight but just 1L down in 3rd, led 350 M out, 1L clear at 200 M, all out closing stages and collared right on the line.
6Ls off pace in 9th on fence at 1200 M, advanced to be 5Ls down in 5th off home turn, clear 3rd 3Ls off pace 200 M out, ran on fairly well but couldn't reach principals.
Awkwardly away and keen early on, 2 and 3-wide down back straight, 8Ls 10th at 800 M, 7Ls down off home turn, 5Ls down at the 200 M, nearest at the finish but was never really involved.
Slowly away and checked exiting gates, always 10Ls off pace towards rear down back straight, 7Ls down into home straight, never on terms.
Disputed lead very early on out 3-wide, settled in 3rd about 3Ls off pace on fence 1000 M out, 2Ls 3rd off home turn and 200 M out, kept on at same pace final stages.
Crossed from wide gate to fence, at least 10Ls off pace 1000 M out, improving when 2-wide and 6Ls off pace in midfield off home stretch, staying on 4Ls down 200 M out, couldn't follow through.
Always rear, never got within 10Ls of pace at any stage.
Disputed lead out 2-wide early on, 2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 1000 M out, disputing lead again off home turn and still locked in combat 200 M out, led final strides.
Raced 3 and 4-wide with cover down back straight and was never any nearer then 10Ls off pace until 800 M out, 5-wide (widest of all) and 7Ls down towards rear into straight, no impression.
10Ls off pace in 5th when 2-wide at the 1000 M, 6Ls down and 2-wide in 5th at the 800 M, 4Ls down entering straight, didn't quicken up.
On fence 10Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 7th at 800 M, 4Ls down in 6th off home turn, 3Ls down at the 200 M, weakened thereafter.
3-wide without cover and 10Ls off pace in 7th at the 1000 M, 5Ls down and still wide in 6th 800 M out, 4-wide into straight when 4Ls down, 2Ls 4th at the 200 M, kept finding all the way.
2-wide and towards rear when over 12Ls off pace 1200 M out, 7Ls down in 9th at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight when 6Ls down, 3Ls down at 200 M, kept on well, nearest at finish.
Disputing lead 1200 M out before taking clear 1L advantage on fence at 1000 M, joined for lead again off home turn, still disputing lead 200 M out, outgunned in shadows of post.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide with cover down the back, at least 12Ls off pace 1200 M out, 7Ls down in 8th at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 6Ls down, 4Ls down at 200 M, nearest at finish.
7Ls off pace in 4th on fence 1200 M out, 5Ls 4th at the 800 M and closer turning for home, still within 3Ls of pace but becoming swamped at the 200 M, outpaced therafter.
Soon took up running and led field till headed inside final 100 M.
Slightly worse than midfield turning for home. Came under pressure 300 M and kept on to take 2nd near finish.
2nd last into straight where he ran on strongly inside final 200 M.
Never on terms.
Never far off to straight. Kept on to challenge 150 M before finding only one-pace near finish.
Slow into stride and was last early. Made swift progress rounding home bend to share 3rd 400 M. Did not sustain effort closing stages.
About 6th halfway. Plugged on final 200 M.
Well there before failing to hold place passing 200 M.
Settled in rear into home bend and remained in similar position entering straight. Stayed on to be nearest at finish.
Was close up before dropping out quickly on straightening.
Well there early and was in midfield rounding home bend. Kept on quite well towards finish.
Midfield into straight where he ran on well to take charge close home.
Made no show.
Was prominent before finding no extra final 200 M.
Began very awkwardly, at rear throughout.
Slightly slowly away, behind midfield. Dropped back a bit towards the rear near 1000 M. Ran on steadily in straight, never nearer.
Behind midfield. Steadied for a run 300 M. Made up good ground inside 200 M.
Led field soon after start. Held on until headed when under pressure final 100 M.
Towards rear from widest draw. Made minor improvement rounding home bend. No further progress in straight.
Settled 4th before dropping back a bit rounding home bend. One-paced in straight.
Near the rear throughout.
Better than midfield on the rail. Responded well final 400 M to take control 100 M. Held on.
Midfield. Moved up on outside from 900 M to reach 3rd passing 700 M. Kept on but found no extra 150 M.
Tracked leader until failing to hold place inside 100 M.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Slightly behind midfield. Crept a bit closer on straightening. Kept on well to just miss 2nd at finish.
Held 3rd to early straight. Weakened steadily.
Began awkwardly. Made some minor progress while hanging in early straight. Soon weakened.
Midfield. Took closer order around 1200 M. Prominent into straight but failed to quicken to threaten.
Midfield before dropped out home bend.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Never in contention.
Mostly in midfield. Effort around home bend. One-paced from 3rd into straight.
Forward of midfield to straight. Ran home one-paced.
Attempted to make all but run down by winner over 100 M out.
Never a factor.
Niggled along in midfield before giving ground into straight. (Lame.)
Slightly missed the break. Soon moved up to race in rear of midfield before finding himself behind heels of runners approaching home bend. Made no show in straight.
Settled towards rear. Commenced move coming out of back straight gaining midfield turning in. Sustained progress to take charge over 100 M out.
Well there to 450 M then dropped out quickly.
Never seen with a chance.
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace under pressure.
Moved up from widest draw to be in touch. Dropped back to midfield far side. Kept on well in straight. Was crowded just before and after the line.
Rear. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Slowly away, never able to feature.
Led field to stable bend. Tracked leader until weakening out of contention upon straightening.
Prominent. Took lead from stable bend. Found no extra when headed 250 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Settled near rear. Ran on well from outside inside 250 M to just get up on the line.
Well there on 3-wide. Dropped back a bit from 800 M to be 4th home bend. No response when given reminders early straight.
Midfield and soon behind. Widest final turn. Made up good ground in straight, was crowded just before and after the line.
Always prominent. Held 2nd final turn. Kept on very well but was just beaten narrowly by the quinella pair.
Slightly behind midfield. Improved a bit rounding home bend. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Began very awkwardly, losing ground. Made no show.
Mainly 5th before checked at 600 M. Dropped back steadily thereafter.
Midfield. Steady progress from 600 M. Ran on from 2nd early straight to take lead 250 M. Held on but just lost narrowly near finish.
Settled just off the pace. Shifted out to challenge upon straightening. Finished off race well to take charge close to home.
Midfield when hampered and lost a few lengths coming out of back straight. Only kept on steadily in the run home.
Midfield and wide. Loomed up to challenge around home bend but soon faded into straight.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Chased leader to straight then soon weakened.
Raced in forward of midfield. Refused to settle and lost a few lengths coming out of back straight. Recovered good late ground down straight.
Well there. Improved to dispute lead home bend but only kept on at the same pace in straight.
Soon tailed-off. (Lame.)
Raced keenly in midfield to straight, then faded.
Led or disputed lead. Gained 1L break under pressure over 200 M out but unable to resist winner's strong late challenge.
Always wide and never better than midfield. Kept on same pace in straight.
Never in contention.
Prominent far side. Lost position home bend. Kept on from midfield into straight.
Behind midfield. Made some headway behind horses home bend. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Jumped well from widest and soon took lead on rail through to straight. Headed 300 M out and weakened badly thereafter.

Began fairly from wide draw and soon eased to worse than midfield on rail. Made slight progress at home bend. Made up steady ground when asked 350 M out to overhaul 2nd placegetter in the closing stages.

Broke well and niggled along to race in midfield 2 wide. Ridden along at home turn to maintain position. Ran on a bit in early part of straight but unable to sustain running and became one-pace inside final 150 M.
Raced in better than midfield on rail. Under pressure at home bend to maintain position. Failed to quicken when asked 350 M and steadily weakened thereafter.
Raced in midfield on rail. Commenced to lose ground turning for home. Tailed out in straight.

On jumping bounded in the air and lost ground. Raced in rear section 2 wide. Switched to widest and niggled along to go forward at home turn. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.
Shortly after the start knuckled and raced in rear section on rail. Steadily shifted out and made progress turning for home. Near the 300 M was inconvenienced, continued to run on fairly thereafter.

Tardy start and niggled along to race in worse than midfield 2 wide. Switched out and ridden along to go forward at home bend. Under pressure 350 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Broke fairly and settled in mid-division 2 to 3 wide. Made progress from outside turning for home. Responded well when asked 350 M out to take lead 200 M but unable to fend off challenge from winner in the final stages.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield 3 wide through to straight. Failed to respond to pressure and steadily dropped out inside final 250 M.
Niggled along to race in midfield out wide without cover through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Jumped well and raced in midfield 3 wide. Made up ground at home bend to be on terms with leaders on straightening. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out but became one-pace inside final 200 M.
Soon raced in better than midfield 2 wide. Made up little ground at home bend to be outside leader on straightening. Found nothing in the straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Slow to begin and raced at back on inner through to straight. Switched to middle of the track and made up some ground inside final 200 M when asked 300 M out.
Crowded at the start, held up towards rear, last by at least 8Ls off home turn, never a factor.
Held up on fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace in about 9th place through to the 600 M marker, 4Ls down entering home straight, ran on only fairly, never threatened.
Settled towards rear about 8Ls off the pace through to the 600 M marker, closer off home turn, soon well outpaced, never remotely dangerous.
About 3Ls off pace in 6th down backstretch when 3-wide with cover, 2Ls down on straightening, definite place chance 200 M out when just 1L down, no extra.
Crowded at the jump, 2-wide in rear bunch and at least 10Ls off pace down back straight, 3-wide off the home turn, never a threat.
Slowly away, 3-wide with cover in rear when about 10Ls off pace for first half of race, 4-wide (widest of all) into home straight, made some late headway past a few beaten rivals.
Very keen early on out 2-wide disputing lead, still over-racing 800 M out, led at top of home straight, headed over 200 M out, just hung on for 3rd place.
Always well placed on fence 2Ls off the speed in 4th through to the home straight, failed to pick up and was beaten 200 M out.
Settled 2-wide about 5Ls off pace in midfield down back straight, took closer order turning for home, quickened up well to lead at the 200 M, readily.
Raced 3-wide outside winner about 5Ls off pace in midfield down the back, a little closer when 3-wide into home straight, rather one-paced thereafter.
Caught 4-wide without cover early on, 3-wide without cover from 800 M when 2Ls down in 3rd, half a length down at top of home straight, disputing lead at the 200 M, winner too strong.
Always worse than midfield, 2-wide and at least 5Ls off the pace, bit part player.
Driven along to lead narrowly from the jump on fence, never clear by more than 1L, headed off top of home turn, weakened right out.
Slowly away, niggled along 800 M out to hold 5th place 2-wide and 3Ls off pace, closer but ridden along entering straight, soon outpaced but was staying on well again nearer the line.

Raced with the pace before easing back to a position better than midfield. Closed gap with leader before entering home straight but was held up near 400 M. Unable to find extra boost thereafter and ran on only moderately.
Began well from widest draw and was eased back to race 4-wide near the rear. Improved slightly rounding home turn in 4-wide position. Rallied strong from 400 M out to claim victory inside the 100 M.
Near pace early. Raced within 3Ls of the lead until straightening. Quickened well in the straight and raced into a disputed lead inside final 200 M. Unable to hold off the winner inside final 100 M.
Eased back early and raced at the rear from 800 M to 400 M. Charged on well and made up good ground in the straight.
Jumped well and led until 1000 M out. Stayed close to pace and regained lead inside 400 M before being overtaken by first three inside the final 100 M.
Bounded in the air on jumping and lost ground at the start. Raced in rear section until straightening. Found nothing in the straight and finished in last place.
Began fairly and was ridden hard to get to the lead after 1000 M. Maintained a 1L advantage but 2-wide until being overtaken 400 M. Weakened thereafter.
Began well but was immediately taken back to race at the rear. Remained racing near the back until making up some late ground through traffic in the closing stages.
Niggled along in the early stages and settled 2-wide better than midfield after 1000 M. Did not pick up when asked on straightening and ran home without threatening.
Last one out of the gates and was ridden to catch up. Raced 3-wide in rear section until pressured 400 M out. Responded nicely to make a late charge and just missed 2nd place.
Began well and was eased back to settle just behind midfield early. Dropped further back after being steadied at 800 M. Made up ground in the straight despite being steadied again near the 200 M.
Raced on fence behind midfield early. Continued in similar position until the closing stages and only managed to run past a weakening runner.
Settled on fence at midfield in the early and middle stages. No acceleration when asked and kept on same pace to line.
Pushed along in the early and middle stages to travel near midfield in 3-wide position. Unable to quicken much in the straight.
Left flat-footed at the jump losing at least 8Ls, about 10Ls last off home turn, never a factor.
Always deep on the track and without cover, 4-wide and 8Ls off pace in 12th 1200 M out, 5-wide (widest of all) into straight when 5Ls off pace, always outpaced.
3-wide in 6th when 3Ls off pace 1200 M out, similar position turning for home, one-paced thereafter.
Bumped at start, on fence 6Ls off speed in 10th 1200 M out, in 12th and still 6Ls down 800 M out, 5Ls down off home turn, never looked like getting into it.
Prominent but 3-wide without cover early on, went 2nd 1100 M out 1L behind leader, half a length 2nd at 800 M, led at top of home stretch, joined 200 M out but kept finding more, gamely.
Didn't break well, one from rear when 11Ls down on fence 1200 M out, 8Ls down in 13th 800 M out, stayed on pretty well through beaten rivals in home straight, never nearer.
Led on fence by 1L 1200 M out, never clear by more than 1L at any point, headed off home turn, faded out very quickly.
Driven along to hold rails position 4Ls off pace in midfield 1300 M out, 3Ls down on fence in 6th entering straight, kept on along fence and over 2Ls down 200 M out, one-paced close home.
2-wide 1L off pace in 3rd 1200 M out, over-raced 800 M out when 3-wide and 2Ls down in 3rd, a neck down in 2nd place off home turn and still there 200 M out, no extra final stages.
Broke best, well placed in 4th 2Ls off pace 1200 M out, 3Ls down 900 M out, 2Ls down off home turn, was always a little outpaced but kept on well nonetheless, nearest at finish.
Always about 2-wide and 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 8th from 1200 M to home straight, ran on fairly but never looked like troubling leaders.
Held up 3-wide and 7Ls off pace in 11th 1200 M out, switched to fence 1000 M out, 4Ls down in midfield off home turn, ran on strongly, nearest at the finish.
3 and 4-wide sometimes without cover down backstretch, 3Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, raced freely 4-wide into stretch, disputing lead 200 M out but always hanging in, outfought close home.
Held up 2-wide 5Ls off pace in 9th 1200 M out, 3-wide with cover 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight when 4Ls behind leader, 3Ls down 200 M out, never able to challenge.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 6th 1200 M out, 4Ls down in 5th at the 800 M, closer on straightening, kept on fairly well without threatening.
2-wide and 1L off pace at the 1200 M in 2nd place, still entering home straight, led 300 M out, headed by winner 150 M out, no extra closing stages and lost 2nd 50 M out.
Settled on from rear out 2-wide about 12Ls off the speed down backstretch, never competitive at any stage.
On fence 10Ls off pace in 10th position 1100 M out, 7Ls down and driven along on fence entering home straight, stayed on okay, nearest at the finish.
Awkwardly away, held up in rear about 13Ls off pace 1200 M out, still 8Ls off pace in rear entering home straight, stayed on strongly.
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than 1L, headed 300 M out, still only half a length down in 3rd at the 200 M, swamped through final 100 M.
Held up on fence at least 12Ls off pace 1200 M out, 2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 10th entering home straight, ran on strongly to be nearest at the finish.
10Ls off pace and 2-wide in 11th at the 1100 M and for the rest of backstretch, still towards rear when 4-wide and 6Ls down entering straight, no impression.
2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 9th 1200 M out, niggled along to take closer order 800 M out, 4-wide into stretch and 5Ls down, 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on well, no chance with winner.
In midfield 2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 7th at the 1200 M and at 800 M, 3-wide into home stretch when about 4Ls off pace, one-paced thereafter.
Had a nice run on fence 2Ls or 3Ls off pace on fence in 3rd through to home straight, switched out to challenge 350 M out, led 150 M out and ran on strongly.
Caught 3-wide without cover throughout, 3Ls off pace in 4th 1200 M out, driven along 600 M out when without cover to keep within 3Ls of the pace, dropped out on straightening.
Slowly away, on fence 8Ls off the speed in 8th place 1200 M out, driven along to be 5th 4Ls off the lead and still on fence entering straight, lacked any acceleration and was beaten 200 M out.
2-wide and 4Ls off the speed in 5th 1200 M out, became unbalanced 800 M out when similarly placed, 5Ls down and under pressure to hold position entering straight, weakened out.
Mostly 4th or 5th to straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
Settled in rear to straight where he ran on a bit closing stages.
Never a factor.
Never on terms.
Prominent to straight where he failed quicken to challenge.
Made no show.
Soon in midfield and remained there to home bend. Found nothing on straightening.
Mostly 4th or 5th to straight. Stayed on well to snatch 2nd placing near finish.
Made virtually all. Kept on under pressure when threatened close home.
Always there. Kept on well under pressure close home.
Worse than midfield to home turn. Stayed on to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to straight where he made up some ground final 200 M.
Towards rear. Widest final turn. Only minor progress 200 M out.
Jumped awkwardly, 2nd last to 500 M. Crept closer order on inside turning for home. Ran on from 6th early straight to take lead close home.
Behind midfield. Was inconvenienced near 1400 M. Shifted out to cause interference final turn when improved to 4th. Only one-paced thereafter.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily from final turn.
Midfield. Widest final turn. Made moderate progress in straight.
In touch early, took lead from 1200 M. Held on until headed 250 M. Found no extra.
Slightly better than midfield. Steady progress rounding home bend to be 3rd turning in. Kept on without threatening.
Prominent. Was 2nd from 1000 M. Dropped back a bit passing 400 M. Checked on straightening while weakening. Dropped out.
In touch. Faded in straight.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground in straight.
Led field and gradually shifted to inside from widest draw. 3rd passing 1200 M. Improved to 2nd 400 M. Re-gained advantage 250 M but failed to withhold winner's late challenge.
Very slowly away, last to 250 M. Ran past a few beaten horses after.
Well there. Disputed lead rounding home bend but unable to sustain effort in straight and soon faded under pressure.
Settled at the back. Commenced run rounding home bend and ran on to be nearest at finish.
Raced in midfield. Gave ground rapidly from Rock.
Attempted to make all. Joined in front rounding home bend. Kept on without quickening in straight and swamped over 200 M out.
Never far off in 4th position. Soon came to challenge upon straightening making steady headway towards leaders but rider eased too soon. (See Racing Incidents.)
Settled in forward of midfield. Took closer order rounding home bend. Gained 4th when holding some chance on rails turning in. Unable to sustain effort final 200 M.
Midfield into straight then faded.
Never better than midfield. One-paced in straight.
Settled in last few. Ran on steadily down straight until finding not much room near finish.
Never nearer.
Broke well settling towards rear. Dropped to tail-end approaching 500 M.
Tracked leaders. Came to challenge upon straightening and took charge 200 M out.
In touch early, settled 6th. Made up good ground on outside final 300 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made very minor progress 200 M out.
Remained 10th most of his trip.
Never better than midfield.
Led field to final turn. Kept on to just maintain a minor placing.
Held 4th to 450 M. Moved up on outside to take lead turning in. Held on well while shifting out in straight.
Prominent. Mainly 3rd to 200 M. Found no extra.
Began awkwardly, made no show.
Behind midfield. Made up a little ground inside 200 M.
Held 5th to final turn. Shifted out to make up some ground in straight, just missed 3rd narrowly.
Sat outside leader from widest draw. Weakened out of contention soon after straightening.
Towards rear throughout.
Settled behind leaders. Obtained split on rails about 200 M out when improved well to assert authority close to home.
Prominent to 200 M. No extra.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened to hold every chance turning for home but unable to draw level throughout closing stages.
Tracked leader before taking over up Rock. Held a 1L break turning in but folded up quickly.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of track in straight.
Led to Rock. Renewed effort when 2nd into straight holding every chance but unable to sustain progress 200 M out.
Last into straight. Produced some late impression.
Midfield. Lost some ground when steadied about 500 M out. Made up ground steadily under strong driving down home straight.
Rear of midfield. Forced to steady inside final 200 M.
Midfield to straight when only kept on at the same pace.
Settled at the back. Did not find much room behind runners in straight. Kept on to the line.
Mostly in forward of midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Tardy start and ridden along to race in prominent position 2-wide. Under pressure at home turn to hold position. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.
Slow to begin and settled in worse than midfield on rail through to straight. Under pressure 200 M out and made up little ground in the final stages to be closest at finish.
Settled in worse than midfield 2-wide. Good headway home bend. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and stayed one-paced to the line.
On jumping stood flat-footed and lost ground. Raced at back on rail through to straight. Switched to middle of the track to find running and made up some ground closing stages.
Began fairly and raced in better than midfield 2-wide but proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Found nothing in the straight and steadily faded inside final 200 M.

Broke well from widest and niggled along to take lead on rail with no more than 2Ls advantage through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 250 M out but was headed at 100 M and further weakened in the final stages.
Raced in better than midfield out wide without cover. Under pressure to hold position at home bend. Dropped out in straight.
Niggled along to race in midfield on fence through to straight. Under pressure 200 M out but was slightly held up at 150 M and made up little ground in the final stages.

Slow to begin and soon recovered to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Was slightly held up for a run in early part of straight. Cruised home to win convincingly when clear running was obtained inside final 200 M.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in midfield 2 to 3-wide. On straightening switched out to obtain clear running. Responded well when asked 200 M out but was unable to match speed with winner in the closing stages.
Jumped fairly and raced in prominent position on rail through to straight. Under pressure 250 M out and ran on fairly but was unable to trouble the 1st pair to settle for 3rd.
Raced in the rear section 2 to 3-wide through to straight. Made no impression when asked 200 M out.
Slowly away, in rear at least 8Ls off pace on fence through to home straight, was short of running room and wasn't properly tested on the run-in.
Always 3-wide, in midfield with cover about 5Ls off pace at 800 M, left without cover from 600 M out, 2Ls 3rd off home turn, kept on well to lead final strides.
Awkwardly away and crowded at start, 2-wide and 6Ls off pace slightly worse than midfield at the 800 M, 5Ls down into home straight, never able to challenge.
Always towards rear at least 6Ls off pace through to straightening up, never dangerous.
Slowly away and one from rear at least 7Ls off the pace through to home straight, no impression.
3-wide but had cover down back straight when about 6Ls off the pace in about 10th place, 4Ls down in 6th when 3-wide into home straight, made good late ground, nearest at the finish.
About 3Ls off pace in 4th but 3 and 4-wide without cover until the 600 M, improved into 1L 2nd entering straight, outpaced and 2Ls down 200 M out, no extra.
Best away but ceded the lead 1000 M out, on fence 2.5Ls 2nd at the 800 M, 2Ls 3rd off home turn and at the 200 M, ran on again close home.
In 4th or 5th place about 4Ls or 5Ls off the pace through to home straight, tended to hang in, never really threatened.
On fence about 4Ls off pace in midfield through to home straight, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Towards rear 2-wide and 8Ls off the pace 800 M out, improving when 5Ls off pace but 4-wide into stretch, still 4Ls down 200 M out, ran on very strongly final stages to dead-heat for 3rd.
Led out 2-wide at the 1000 M, on fence and 2.5Ls clear 800 M out, 1L clear off home turn and shot 2Ls clear at the 200 M, kept on but was collared final strides.

Settled 2-wide midfield shortly after the start and travelled comfortably until being pressured 500 M. Improved rounding home turn in 3-wide position. Responded well and burst into the lead inside final 100 M.
Ridden after the start to be at midfield but 4-wide. Ended up near the rear after the first turn. Pressured 500 M out and made a late rally to make up some ground in the closing stages.
Began well and led from 1200M out. Continued to lead until pressured on straightening. Started to drop out inside 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and soon settled near the back. Raced in last place from 1200 M out until running past a few beaten runners inside the final 200 M.

Led heading into the first turn before settling about 1L behind the pacesetter. Remained there until being pressured into a disputed lead on straightening. Stayed on well but was unable to hold off winner final 100 M.
Soon settled 2-deep in rear section and remained in similar position until straightening. Improved steadily in the straight despite not finding a clear run 100 M out.
Raced in a prominent position in the early and middle stages. Unable to quicken when asked on straightening.
Raced on fence at midfield until straightening. No response when pressured and was eased down in the concluding stages.
Urged to move into a position closer to the lead in the early stages. Settled 2-deep and within 3Ls of the pace until straightening. Continued steadily without threatening.

Began awkwardly from widest draw and was taken to race on fence near the rear. Continued to race in that position into the home straight. Made up some ground in the straight despite having difficultly finding clear run final 200 M.
Settled 3-wide and 2Ls down rounding first turn. Continued in same position in the backstraight. Pressured into a disputed lead on straightening and dropped out steadily inside final 100 M.
Travelled 3-deep midfield in early and middle stages. Pressed to go forward rounding home turn. Matched strides with eventual winner in the straight but unable to sustain effort inside final 100 M.
Settled off early pace, 3-wide and 5Ls off the speed in 10th entering home straight, staying on when 4Ls down 200 M out, ran on strongly final stages, nearest at the finish.
Caught at least 4-wide early and couldn't lead, 3-wide without cover thereafter, 2Ls down in 5th into home straight and at the 200 M, no extra close home.
Best away, better than midfield towards inner through to home straight when 3Ls behind leader, always outpaced by principals.
Prominent no worse than 2Ls off the pace in 5th through to home straight, picked up well to hold every chance when 1L down 200 M out, kept on.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in midfield 700 M out, 4Ls down entering straight and switched out wider to challenge, 3Ls down 200 M out, kept on strongly to lead final strides.
Couldn't lead and caught 5-wide without cover, without cover in midfield through to home straight when about 5Ls off pace, outpaced thereafter.
Checked at the start and always towards rear near fence about 5Ls off pace, switched wider into home straight for clear passage, ran on strongly close home, never nearer.
Slowly away but quickly recovered to dispute lead and be 1L clear on fence entering straight, faded out rapidly.
Always under pressure towards rear and never better than 5Ls off the speed at any stage.
Slowly into stride, at least 8Ls off pace in rear 800 M out, made some good late headway to be nearest at the finish.
Always prominent on fence no worse than 2Ls off pace, steadied at the 600 M, 2Ls down on fence in 3rd entering straight, failed to pick up and was beaten 200 M out.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide disputing lead 700 M out, a neck 2nd and 2-wide on straightening, skipped 1L clear 200 M out, kept on well but was caught final strides.
Led field from 1500 M. Was joined approaching 1000 M. Held on until headed on straightening. Soon found no extra.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily from far side.
Began awkwardly, midfield or slightly better. Failed to quicken in straight.
Around midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Shifted out to 5-wide turning into straight. Ran on steadily but without threatening the quinella pair.
Never a factor.
Last. Ran past a couple of beaten horses in straight.
Jumped well and soon raced 2-wide 6th. Moved up steadily far side to join the lead final turn. With 1L advantage 250 M, just managed to hold off runner-up's challenge by a nose.
Led field to 1500 M. Remained prominent in 3-wide position. Joined the leader 1000 M out. Was headed passing 600 M. Weakened from 4th in early straight.
Towards rear. Hung in final turn and early straight. Only made moderate progress final 200 M.
In touch. Was 2Ls 3rd passing 1000 M. Weakened steadily on inside final 300 M.
Towards rear from widest draw. Steady progress from 1000 M to reach midfield passing 800 M. Crept close final turn and came to tackle winner 250 M. Just missed narrowly.
Prominent in 4th to straight then weakened.
Settled in forward of midfield and 5th rounding home bend. Improving when tightened on rails 250 M out. Kept on to finish.
Raced mostly 3 or 4-wide in midfield, then faded.
Around midfield to straight then weakened.
Well back to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Settled at the back. Went widest into straight. Ran on steadily down centre of track without threatening.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to just get up on line.
Settled towards rear. Took closer order home turn. Ran on gamely down straight but just failed to peg back winner.
Well back. Made some late headway in straight.
Tracked leaders. Quickened to hit front turning in. Fought on under pressure to retain advantage but pipped at post.
Well there to straight then dropped quickly out of contention.
Soon took up running and led until joined into straight. Failed to sustain effort and swamped under pressure about 200 M out.
Midfield. Improved to 3rd or 4th final turn. Kept on without quickening.
Slowly away. Was last until making up some ground inside 200 M.
In touch. Dropping back steadily from 600 M to be midfield final turn. Weakened 200 M.
2nd last to straight. Ran on well from outside to take command closing stages. Won convincingly.
Prominent from a wide draw with no more than 2Ls behind pace. Improved to 2nd final turn. Every chance inside 200 M but soon found winner too good.
Led briefly early. 3rd rounding home bend. Soon faded. (Bled.)
Midfield from widest draw. Made progress rounding home bend to be 3rd or 4th early straight. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Remained at 10th throughout.
Towards rear. Widest on straightening. Ran on under pressure 250 M out.
Better than midfield. Dropped to midfield when stumbled near 500 M. One-paced thereafter.
Towards rear. Held up and failed to ride out closing stages.
Soon prominent. Pushed along to take lead passing 800 M. Kept on well but failed to match speed with winner closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Ran on under pressure to hold every chance but just failed to peg back winner.
Settled at the back. Made rapid progress around field rounding home bend. Soon weakened from midfield into straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Midfield throughout. One-paced under pressure.
Prominent, racing freely early, until one-paced in straight.
Settled in midfield. Burst through to take lead inside final 200 M and hung on gamely to the line.
Settled towards rear. Made good progress early in straight to reach 3rd closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Ridden along and held narrow advantage until overhauled inside final 200 M.
Never better than midfield. Steadied for a run 200 M out.
Well there. Ducked sideways away from whip closing stages. No extra. (Bled.)
Always at the back.

Began fairly from wide draw and soon eased to race in midfield 3 wide. At 600 M went forward from the outside to be 1L off leader on straightening. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.

On jumping reared and lost ground. Soon recovered to race in worse than midfield 2 wide. Made little progress from widest turning for home. Made up little ground in early part of straight but became one-pace inside final 200 M.
Slow to begin and raced in worse than midfield 3 wide. Under pressure to go forward from the outside turning for home. No extra in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Jumped fairly and steadily eased to midfield 2 wide. Under pressure to hold position at home bend. Made no impression in straight.
Niggled along to race 1-1/2Ls off leader 3 wide. Made little progress turning for home to be less than 1/2L off leader on straightening. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 200 M out.

Jumped well and led narrowly on the outside in the early stages. Took outright lead and crossed to the fence going up Rock. Kept on well in straight but was no match for winner and just hold off late challenge from the 3rd.
Soon eased towards the rear of the field on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Responded well when asked 200 M out and cruised home to win convincingly.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or better around 2 wide. Switched to middle of the track on straightening, found the line well when asked 200 M out and just failed to catch the 2nd placegetter.
Began fairly and pushed along to race 1-1/2L off leader 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 200 M out and steadily faded out.
Broke fairly from widest and was soon taken to the tail of field closer to rail through to straight. Made up some ground inside final 200 M when asked 250 M out.

Broke fairly and soon settled in midfield or worse on rail through to straight. Was held up for running in straight. Made up some ground to be closest at finish when clear running was obtained at 150 M.
Pushed along to race 1L off leader on rail through to straight. Found nothing when asked 200 M out and steadily weakened.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 8th at the 900 M, slightly closer turning for home, never able to challenge.
Prominent early on, 2-wide and 0.5L lead at 800 M, headed by winner off home turn, still only a head down in 2nd at the 200 M, tired closing stages and lost 3rd place final strides.
Settled in 5th place on fence 2Ls off pace 900 M out, 1.5Ls 3rd and with every chance 300 M out but became unbalanced and hit fence, kept on well again for a place final strides.
Caught 4-wide without cover when 0.5L off pace in 3rd at 900 M, began to tire from the 600 M, very weak in home straight.
Settled towards rear, on fence about 6Ls off the pace through to home straight, no impression.
Best away and led by half a length on fence 900 M out, headed at the 800 M but assumed lead again entering straight, drew clear final 200 M, comfortably.
On fence about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 7th or 8th place at the 900 M and when turning for home, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
3-wide and 5Ls off pace in 9th at the 800 M, soon niggled along but couldn't hold position, last entering straight, always outpaced.
Switched towards rail from wide gate, always towards rear early on, still 2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 11th at the 600 M, ran on past a few beaten rivals in straight.
3-wide and 2Ls off pace in 6th 900 M out, advanced out 4-wide from the 600 M to go 1L 3rd out entering straight, couldn't sustain run and quickly faded out. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
2-wide and between 1L and 2Ls off pace in about 4th through to the 600 M, still 2Ls 4th at the 200 M, finished off fairly well but had no chance with winner.
Caught 4-wide without cover in 10th place when 5Ls behind leader at the 800 M, gained cover at the 600 M again, 5-wide (widest of all) entering straight, had little hope.
Jumped awkwardly and was ridden to be close to he lead. Travelled on fence and 2Ls behind pace rounding home turn. Ran on without gaining ground on winner.
Stayed close to the lead but 3-wide until straightening. No response when asked and dropped out shortly after straightening. (Significant mucus and blood in trachea.)
Began fairly and niggled along to race within 3Ls of the lead until straightening. Unable to quicken much in the straight.
Slowly away and soon raced near the back. Continued to race in similar position on straightening. Made up some ground despite hanging in down the home stretch.
Niggled along from 2-deep to stay just behind pace until straightening. Closed in steadily on eventual winner in the straight but ran out of ground and missed by a narrow margin.
Raced near the back shortly after the start and remained there heading into home stretch. Found nothing in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and was in last place until running past a few beaten runners in the closing stages.
On fence behind midfield early and had to be ridden to keep position. Improved slightly on fence rounding home. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
Ridden hard from the start and raced in a disputed lead after 800 M. Continued to race there until holding onto a slight advantage inside the final 200 M. Held off a late challenger for a narrow win.
Quickest out from wide draw and was urged to race outside leader from 700 M onwards and was headed inside final 200 M. Stayed on well and was beaten by a narrow margin.

Began well from widest draw and was taken back to race 2-wide at midfield shortly. Clipped heels and stumbled 500 M out. Responded well on straightening and gained steady ground in the closing stages.
Soon racing 3-wide at midfield. Caught wide rounding home turn and made no impression in the straight.
Showed good speed to lead by 2Ls on fence at 1000 M, 1L clear entering home straight but shot over 2Ls clear at 200 M, ran on strongly.
Switched towards inside rail from wide draw on jumping, in 10th place about 8Ls at the 800 M, 6Ls down and travelling well in 8th off home turn, ran on well to be nearest at the finish.
Advanced to be 1L off pace in 2nd out 2-wide at the 800 M and on turning for home, found nothing under pressure, dropped out tamely. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Slowly away, in last at least 10Ls off pace at the 800 M, never a factor.
Couldn't lead and got head up when 2Ls 2nd on fence at 1000 M, 2Ls 3rd entering home straight, always outpaced in home stretch.
4-wide and 2Ls off pace in 6th at the 800 M, similarly placed but 4-wide into home straight, never threatened.
Caught 3-wide without cover down backstretch when about 7Ls off pace in 9th, never on terms.
On fence 7Ls off pace in 8th at the 800 M, took closer order in midfield on straightening, found nothing under pressure and was very weak final stages.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at the 800 M, brushed rail at 600 M and was still almost 4Ls 5th entering straight, ran on well for 2nd but had little hope of catching winner.
Slowly away, always one from rear about 9Ls off the pace through to home straight, never likely to get involved.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in 4th at the 800 M, niggled along to take closer order at the 600 M, 3Ls down and 3-wide off home turn when still 4th, ran on fairly for a place.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 7th at the 800 M, 6Ls down in midfield entering straight, lacked acceleration.
On fence 9Ls off pace and one from rear at the 1200 M, 7Ls behind at the 1200 M and entering home straight, lacked acceleration in the home straight.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 7th at the 1200 M, 4Ls behind 6th at 800 M and into home straight, kept on fairly without troubling principals.
Disputed lead out 2-wide at the 1200 M but settled 2Ls off pace on fence at the 1000 M, 2Ls 3rd turning for home and at 200 M, no extra close home.
Bounded in air and crowded at start, 2-wide and 9Ls off pace in rear 1200 M out, 3-wide and 6Ls off pace in 9th 800 M out, hard pressed to keep up entering straight, dropped out.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 7th in 10th 1200 M out, 8Ls off pace in rear entering straight, never got properly involved.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M and at the 800 M, 3Ls down in 4th but travelling well off home turn, picked up well to go 1L 2nd at the 200 M, led about 50 M out, kept on.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 8th at the 1200 M, 2-wide and 5Ls behind at 800 M and turning for home, staying at same pace and 4Ls down and well held when short of room 100 M out.
Soon led on fence, headed briefly 1100 M out but reasserted to be 2Ls up 1000 M out, 1L to the good off home turn and 200 M out, headed final 50 M and lost 2nd final strides.
Caught 3-wide without cover from 1400 M when 3Ls off pace, advanced to dispute lead briefly at the 800 M, 1L 2nd 400 M out and 2-wide, failed to kick again and was swamped at around the 200 M.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 6th at the 1200 M, 6Ls down in 7th turning for home, failed to pick up.
Settled in 9th place on fence 7Ls off pace at the 1200 M, 9Ls behind 1000 M out, one from rear and 2-wide 600 M out, 7Ls down entering straight, ran on very strongly, narrowly missed.
Settled on fence mostly in 5th place about 4Ls off pace through to home straight, was always outpaced on run-in to post.
Was 5th stable bend and similar position early in straight. Made up some ground final 200 M.
Worse than midfield into straight where he stayed on a bit close home.
Never on terms.
Mostly midfield to home bend where he ran on well to reach 2nd 200 M. Found winner too strong.
Well there in 4th rounding home bend. Unable quicken to challenge in straight.
About midfield into straight where he kept on without troubling leaders.
Chased winner under pressure into straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Well there before finding no extra under pressure in straight.
Midfield at best.
Made virtually all. Kept on strongly close home.
Rear till effort home bend. Kept on to be closest at finish.
Was last before making steady headway home bend. Kept on to be nearest at finish.
Near rear. Crept closer to midfield turning in. Kept on steadily to gain 3rd passing 150 M without threatening the 1st pair.
Prominent to 450 M. Faded.
Slowly away, soon recovered some ground to be in midfield. Dropped out from final turn.
Led field until headed 250 M. Found no extra.
Behind midfield. Dropped to the rear group from back straight.
Rear. Ran past a few tiring horses final 200 M.
Near rear from widest draw. Made up some ground soon after straightening.
Well there. Sat outside leader from 1200 M. Dropped back a bit to 4th far side. Still in prominent position before weakening out of contention soon after straightening.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered good ground 450 M to be 3rd into straight. Ran on steadily to win narrowly when raced tightly with the runner-up close home.
Never better than midfield. One-paced throughout.
Mainly 5th to home turn where he was hanging out. Made some minor progress early straight, then one-paced.
In touch. Slightly improved to 3rd passing 1000 M. Moved up to tackle leader final turn, taking narrow advantage 250 M. Fought on well but was just beaten narrowly in a tight finish.
Attempted to make all. Swamped closing stages.
Wide and around midfield before faded from approaching home bend.
Settled in forward of midfield. Quickened well under pressure upon straightening. Asserted authority close to home.
Well back. Made up good ground under pressure down centre of straight.
Midfield early. Behind midfield far side. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Always in last few.
Settled in midfield. Commenced run rounding home bend. Ran on in straight but not match speed of winner.
Well there to straight. No extra.
Prominent till gave ground steadily rounding home bend.
Behind midfield. Found no room early in straight before obtaining split 200 M out. Kept on same pace.
Prominent to straight. Soon faded.
Settled at the back. Switched inside for a run upon straightening. Improving when forced to steady inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground closing stages.
Mainly 3rd and was 3-wide. Faded out of contention soon after straightening.
Towards rear. 2nd last to straight. Made some moderate progress final 150 M.
In touch on inside. Dropped back from 3rd passing 250 M.
Led field to 100 M. Failed to quicken.
Midfield early. Moved up steadily to be 2nd rounding home bend. Ran on well in straight to take command inside 100 M.
Midfield from a wide draw. 4-wide in similar position turning in. Ran on steadily but failed to match speed with the winner.
Slowly away, behind midfield throughout.
Jumped awkwardly, trailed the field throughout.
Settled behind midfield from widest draw. Made up some ground inside 200 M.
Behind midfield to straight. Kept on quite well along rail 200 M.
Prominent briefly. Dropped back a bit to 5th rounding home bend. Made no show in straight.
Broke well but not fast enough to cross to rail. Settled wide in midfield to straight and only kept on steadily under pressure.
Midfield into straight then gradually faded.
Led till headed into straight then gradually overhauled.
Well back until made up good late ground in straight.
Behind midfield to straight then faded.
Steadied to rear early. Remained same to straight. Making ground when steadied 200 M out and baulked to the line.
Well back. Ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
In rear of midfield. Kept on steadily in straight.
Tracked leader. Hit front into straight. Hung on well despite shifted saddle closing stages.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled in midfield. Improved to join 4th rounding home bend, but only kept on at the one pace in straight.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Jumped fairly and pushed along to race in prominent position out wide without cover. Lost position steadily at home bend and tailed out in straight.

Broke fairly and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. Under pressure at home bend and made up little ground. Unable to sustain running in straight and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
Tardy start and raced in rear section on rail through to straight. Took a while to click into gear when asked 200 M out, made up little ground over concluding stages to be closest at finish.
Broke awkwardly and soon recovered to race in midfield or worse on fence through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 200 M out and stayed one-pace to the line.

Began well and soon took lead on rail with no more than 3/4L advantage. Ridden along to hold position at home bend but was soon headed after straightening. Unable to quicken when asked 200 M out and stayed one-pace to the line.
Refused to jump and took no part in the race.
Settled in midfield or worse 2 wide. Switched wide and ridden along to go forward at home bend. No extra in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Jumped fairly and raced in prominent position 2 wide. Edged forward to join leader at home bend and took outright lead shortly after straightening. Ran on fairly but failed to find extra to fend off challenge from winner.

Soon settled in rear section 2 wide. Made some progress turning for home. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running. Made up steady ground inside final 200 M and just failed to run down the 2nd placegetter.

Began awkwardly and threw its head about. Soon recovered to race in better than midfield on rail. Ridden along to maintain position at home turn. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 200 M out.
Began fairly from wide draw and soon settled in midfield 3 wide. Commenced to lose position turning for home. Dropped out in straight.

Jumped well and was soon taken back to the tail of the field. Made steady progress at home bend to be 4-1/2Ls off leader on straightening. Under pressure 200 M out and ran home strongly to win convincingly.

On fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off speed in mid-division until 600 M, 4Ls down in 4th off home turn, picked up well and 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, kept finding but couldn't reel in leader, lost 2nd final strides.
Awkwardly away and unbalanced, on fence 7Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 9th at 800 M and into straight when under pressure, nearest at finish but never threatened leaders.
2-wide in rear and 10Ls off pace 1200 M out, 3-wide with cover and 8Ls off pace at 700 M when one from rear, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight, made some late headway, nearest finish.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 10th from 1200 M until home straight when travelling well, 4Ls down in midfield but short of room 200 M out, ran on strongly to lead on line.
On fence 9Ls off pace in 11th place 1200 M out, 8Ls down and one from rear at 800 M, last off home turn and under pressure, short of room 200 M out, always well held but nearest at finish.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 6th 1200 M out, niggled along 800 M out when just over 3Ls down, lost place rounding home turn, 5-wide into stretch, very one-paced thereafter.
Always caught 3-wide without cover, 4Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, about 2Ls 4th without cover at 800 M, under pressure 500 M out and 4-wide and beaten entering straight. (Distressed.)
On fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, 2-wide and 3Ls in 3rd at the 1000 M, 2Ls down in 2nd off home turn and every chance, still 2Ls down at 200 M, closed final stages but lost place.
Led on fence early on but ceded advantage 1000 M out, was 2Ls off pace on fence in 3rd from then until home straight, one-paced through closing stages.
6Ls off pace out 2-wide in 8th at 1200 M, niggled along 800 M out when 5Ls down, still 5Ls 7th off home turn, always held but was short of running 100 M out, nearest at finish.
Keen, head up in 3rd place 2-wide 3Ls off pace at 1200 M, advanced to lead on fence 900 M out, on wrong leg down backstretch, 2Ls clear entering straight, balanced, kept on, caught on line.
Best away, over-raced early on when 2Ls 2nd at 1200 M on fence, shuffled back 3Ls 5th on fence 900 M out, 4Ls down in 5th at 400 M, too one-paced, hung out in straight under pressure.
Near the lead in the early stages but dropped to midfield after steadying near 1000 M. Drifted behind midfield 600 M out and was 3-wide rounding home. Made no impression in the straight.
Raced in a prominent position in the early and middle stages. On fence and about 2Ls behind the lead rounding home turn. Unable to pick up the pace on straightening and one-paced to line.
Better than midfield in the early and middle stages but was wide without cover. Drifted back despite being ridden at 500 M and weakened in straight.
Eased back from widest draw and raced near the rear in the early stages. Travelled 3-deep rear section in the backstraight. Caught wide turning for home and made up good ground in the straight.

Missed the kick badly and was far behind in the early stages. Caught up with the field near 800 M but remained racing near the back until straightening. Responded well and made a strong run in the closing stages.
Eased back to settle on fence at midfield before entering first turn and remained in that position in the early and middle stages. Unable to quicken much on straightening.
Jumped awkwardly. Led briefly at 1200 M before settling 2-wide and a length behind the leader. Unable to pick up when pressured at 500 M and was one-paced in the straight.
Behind midfield. Shifted in to race along the rails after 1000 M and dropped off slightly to be in rear section in the backstraight. Improved steadily on straightening despite being tightened 200 M.

Raced on fence in rear section early. Dropped further back after the 1200 M despite being urged and ended up racing in last place 800 M out. Remained in last place entering home straight and ran past a few beaten runners.
Quickest out and niggled to the front at 1200 M. Enjoyed a comfortable lead in the backstraight and began to pull away when asked after 500 M. Cruised home for easy win.
3-wide at midfield in the early and middle stages. Widest turning in and made a brief run in the early part of the straight but was unable to sustain effort in the closing stages.
3-wide and 2Ls behind the lead at the first turn and trailed the lead by not more than 3Ls in the backstraight. Found nothing on straightening and dropped out in the closing stages.
Soon led on fence, 4Ls clear 1100 M out, 3Ls clear at 600 M, headed off home turn and 1L 2nd at 200 M, faded.
10Ls off pace on fence in 9th at 1200 M and 800 M, still 9th but only 6Ls down entering straight, ran on well late to be nearest at the finish.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, still 5th but 7Ls behind down back straight, 2Ls 4th off home turn and with every chance, failed to pick up, one-paced to line.
Sent on from wide gate to 3Ls 2nd 1200 M out, 4Ls 3rd at the 1000 M and down back straight, lost position rapidly from the 500 M and was beaten into home straight, eased down.
2-wide and 10Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, further behind 800 M out, 2-wide and 6Ls down towards rear entering straight, staying on and 4Ls down 200 M out, ran on strongly close home.
2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 8th at the 1200 M and 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls off pace in midfield, 3Ls down at the 200 M, ran on strongly, failed narrowly.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, 3-wide without cover at 800 M when 5Ls down in 4th, soon progressed to lead turning for home, a neck clear at the 200 M, no extra close home.

3Ls 3rd on fence at 1200 M, in 2nd but 4Ls down at 1000 M, under pressure when 2Ls 3rd and 2-wide entering straight, beaten when checked 150 M out, eased down thereafter. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
In rear 12Ls off pace and 2-wide 1200 M out, always rear through to home straight when 4-wide and 7Ls off pace, ran on strongly down centre of track to be nearest at the finish.
On fence 8Ls off pace in 7th at 1200 M, crept closer 4Ls down in 5th on inner entering straight, kept on well to lead 100 M out, just hung on.
6Ls off pace in 6th out 2-wide at 1200 M, caught 3-wide but with cover down straight in midfield, widest out 5-deep into stretch and 4Ls off, chance when 2Ls down at 200 M, no extra.
Slowly away and checked at start, always one from rear on fence between 8Ls and 12Ls off pace through to home straight, kept on fairly well along inner final stages, never nearer.
Led. No match with the winner when headed passing 300 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Slowly away, trailed the field throughout.
Well there. Took lead passing 300 M. Won going away. (Hung in.)
Midfield or better. Dropped back 300 M out.
Midfield. Made ground steadily inside 250 M.
In touch. Failed to quicken final 150 M.
In touch. Weakened steadily inside 300 M.
Slowly away, soon in midfield. Ran on a bit from 500 M until weakened final 200 M.
Midfield or better. Steady progress from 400 M to reach 4th 150 M. Found no extra close home.
Towards rear. Made up a little late ground closing stages.
Prominent. Kept on quite well to just miss 2nd narrowly.
Slightly slowly away, never a factor.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily to reach midfield 200 M. Then one-paced.
Towards rear into straight. Kept on well.
Prominent to straight then weakened.
Travelled behind midfield. Kept on same pace before producing good late impression closing stages.
Held narrow lead to 300 M then gradually weakened.
Well back. Made up good ground down centre of straight.
Ridden to contest for early lead. Settled on rails just a head behind leader to straight. Soon found no extra. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Midfield to straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Very slow into stride. Travelled at the back to straight when found no clear passage on rails throughout.
Always thereabouts. Kept on steadily in straight without threatening.
Well there. Came to challenge upon straightening and took charge over 200 M out.
Well back. Produced some impression early in straight but only kept on same pace closing stages.
Around midfield. Making modest progress when forced to steady about 200 M out. Sustained progress to the line.
Missed the break before moving quickly up the field to forward of midfield. Baulked for a run most of way inside final 300 M.
Wide in midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Ran on a bit in the last pair from outside 300 M.
Held 5th in 4-wide. Made progress to reach 2nd 850 M. One-paced in straight.
Led field from widest draw. With 2Ls advantage 400 M, kept on well but failed to match speed with winner closing stages.
Began very awkwardly, towards rear. Kept on early straight to reach midfield briefly. Soon found no extra.
Mainly midfield to straight. Made no impression.
Slowly away, near rear. Made up some ground inside 250 M.
Behind midfield on inside. Weakened 300 M.
4th and 5th to straight. Failed to respond when under pressure 250 M.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily from outside final 300 M for a remote 3rd.
Prominent. Failed to quicken in straight.
Jumped well, 2nd to 950 M. Held 4th along rail to straight. Ran on well 300 M to assert authority 100 M.
Slowly away, remained at the back. Recovered some ground under pressure 200 M out.
Slightly better than midfield. Weakened closing stages. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Never nearer.
Well there to straight, then weakened.
Behind midfield. Only produced moderate headway under pressure.
Attempted to make all. Broke some 3Ls clear 200 M out but flattered and caught near finish.
Never on terms.
Chased leader into straight then dropped out quickly.
Wide in midfield. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on stoutly down straight to get up on line.
Midfield. Steadied for a run early in straight. Kept on same pace.
Well back. Made up some ground down centre of track.
Wide behind midfield. Made up good ground in straight.
Midfield into straight then soon weakened.
Very sluggish at start before moving up quickly to join rear of field. Found no room behind winner in straight. Finished off race well final 200 M.
Prominent to 200 M. No extra.
Tardy start and niggled along to race in worse than midfield. Under pressure 450 M out to maintain position but did not respond and ran on evenly thereafter.
Tardy start and raced in worse than midfield. Under pressure 400 M out but was momentarily crowded for room near the 300 M. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped well and niggled along to race in prominent position. Responded well when asked 200 M out and took charge in the closing stages to win convincingly.
Began well and raced in better than midfield. Under pressure 400 M out but failed to quicken and only able to run on evenly to the line.
Raced in midfield or better. Commenced to lose ground steadily 450 M out. Weakened badly inside final 300 M.
Jumped very awkwardly and lost significant amount of ground. Raced at the tail of the field and stayed in similar position through to the finish.
Jumped fairly and raced in better than midfield on inner rail away from rest of the field. Under pressure 400 M out but stayed one-pace and weakened quickly inside final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in midfield or worse. Under pressure 400 M out but unable to quicken and further weakened inside final 300 M. (Lame.)
Began fairly and raced in midfield. Ridden along at the 500 M to go forward, made up steady ground inside final 200 M to snatch 2nd place on the line.
Slowly away and raced in rear section. Ridden along 500 M out and made up little ground. All out 350 M out and ran on steadily to the line.

Jumped fairly and niggled along to take narrow lead 650 M out. Kept on well when asked 400 M but failed to match speed with winner in the closing stages and was overhauled by 3rd placegetter on the line.
Unable to muster early speed to race in rear section. Made no impression when asked 400 M out.
Jumped well and raced in better than midfield. Only able to keep on evenly to the line when asked 300 M out.
Began fairly and niggled along to race in prominent position. Kept on fairly when asked 350 M out but weakened slightly in the closing stage and was overhauled by the placegetters near the line.
A little slowly away, on fence 6Ls behind leader in 7th at 1400 M, improved into 5th 2-wide and 3Ls down on straightening, led 150 M out, grabbed final strides by quinella pair.
Slowest away and caught very wide early on before working hard to dispute lead out 2-wide at 1600 M, still right there entering home straight but soon retreated.
Awkwardly away, caught 3-wide without cover in 3rd 3Ls off pace 1400 M out, 2Ls 3rd in box-seat on fence 1000 M out, led 300 M out, grabbed 150 M out, no extra.
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than 1L, a neck to the good entering straight, headed 300 M out, faded out.
Caught 3-wide without cover 9Ls off pace in 10th 1400 M out, improved still 3-wide to 5Ls off speed in 5th at 900 M, 3Ls down and 3-wide into straight, soon beaten.
On fence 4Ls off speed in 5th at the 1400 M, held up a bit entering straight when 3Ls down in 4th, stayed on only fairly, always looked outpaced.
Bumped at start, on fence 9Ls off pace in 9th at 1400 M, 7Ls down in 9th at 800 M, 5Ls down and still 9th into home straight, ran on well late and nearest at the finish.
Settled in 12th place 12Ls off pace on fence at 1400 M, driven along to get closer 600 M out when 6Ls down in 12th, 4-wide and 5Ls down into straight, stayed on strongly to lead final strides.
Widest of all (8-wide) 1800 M out, in rear at least 13Ls off the speed 1400 M out, still in rear 6Ls off pace into stretch and at 200 M, no impression.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 8th at 1400 M, 5Ls down and worse than midfield entering straight, always held.
12Ls off pace and one from rear 1400 M out, 3-wide and 6Ls down in 11th at the 800 M, pushed 5-wide (widest of all) entering straight when 5Ls down, one-paced thereafter.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 6th at 1400 M, similarly placed on the swing but showed no dash.
2-wide and 10Ls behind in 11th at 1400 M, improved out 3-wide when 7Ls off pace in 9th at 800 M, 4-wide and 4Ls down entering straight, ran on strongly, failed narrowly.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 4th at the 1400 M, 3Ls 5th off home when under pressure, dropped out rapidly.
Kept 2-wide and ahead of midfield until final 400 M. Dropped out gradually thereafter.
Travelled well in 3rd place and 5Ls behind the lead at 1000 M. Continued to race comfortably in similar position until being pressured inside final 400 M. Surged into the lead at 100 M to win.
Niggled along from 3-wide to be at midfield in the early and middle stages. Not much when asked in the straight.
Wide and behind midfield in the early stages. Caught widest rounding home turn. Ran on strongly in the straight and just missed a minor placing.
Soon settled on fence behind midfield and kept in similar position entering home straight. Picked up well but was unable to gain ground on winner in the closing stages.
Jumped well from widest draw and built a sizeable lead from the rest of the field. Continued to race in the lead until being swamped inside final 200 M.

Travelled comfortably behind the pacesetter and built up a gap of no less than 5Ls ahead the field until straightening. Not pressured until 250 M. Quickened when asked but was unable to hold off winner in the closing stages.
Jumped very awkwardly and raced behind midfield in the early stages. Improved gradually after 1000 M. Made a brief charge inside final 400 M but unable to sustain effort in the closing stages.
Slowly away and raced in rear section. Fell near 1000 M.
Slowly away. Settled in rear section until being pressured just prior to straightening. Ran on steadily in the straight.

Taken back early from wide draw to race in a rearward position. Dropped to last place near 1000 M. Pressured just before straightening but no respond until final 200 M. Made up some ground in the closing stages.
4-wide in rear section early. Recovered quickly after being severely checked at 1000 M. Remained near the back and caught wide rounding home turn. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
Enjoyed a run on fence at midfield in the early and middle stages. Quickened well under pressure 300 M and just missed 2nd place.
Began awkwardly and was in last place until 1000 M. Remained near the back until straightening and was one-paced to line.
Settled 2 and 3-wide in rear about 5Ls off pace through to home straight, kept on at same pace to line.
Tended to hang out and over-race when disputing lead out 3-wide without cover 800 M out, forged clear out 3-wide entering straight, quickened 2Ls clear at 200 M, pushed out, readily.
4Ls off pace in about 9th place when checked at 800 M and relegated to rear, 5Ls down entering straight and always held.
On fence about 5Ls off pace towards rear through to home straight, ran on fairly to be nearest at the finish.
3Ls or 4Ls off pace and 3-wide through to home straight, 3-wide entering home straight, ran on without quickening.
Caught 3 and 4-wide sometimes without cover down back straight in midfield when 3Ls off pace, 3Ls down in 5th entering straight when 3-wide, failed to kick.
Worse than midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace through to home straight (when 4-wide, widest of all), no acceleration final stages.
Raced 2nd half a length outside leader through to home straight, soon under pressure and beaten. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
2-wide and 3Ls off pace down back straight, similarly at 600 M when niggled along, kept on well to go 3Ls 3rd at 200 M, ran on well and just missed runners-up slot.
3Ls or 4Ls off pace in midfield through to home straight, outpaced in home straight.
2Ls and 3-wide in 4th at 800 M and into home straight, 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, had no chance with winner.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than half a length, headed turning for home, beaten over 200 M out.
1L off lead in 2nd at 800 M, 2Ls down off home turn and under pressure, beaten over 200 M out.
Never able to challenge, always at least 4Ls off pace in rear half of field.
3 and 4-wide in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace until home straight, over 2Ls down with good prospects 200 M out, faded closing stages. (Significant blood in trachea.)
Prominent in 5th or 6th about 3Ls off pace through to home straight, never looked like finishing in the money.
On fence about 6Ls off pace towards rear until turning for home, kept on well to be nearest at the finish.
Settled in rear about 8Ls off pace down back straight, still in rear off home turn and 5Ls down in mid-division, stayed on strongly inside closing stages along inside rail to take 3rd place.
3-wide without cover when 1L off pace in 3rd through to home straight, soon under pressure and dropped out.
Always midfield and never better than 4Ls off pace at any stage, was under pressure entering straight.
Towards inner about 4Ls off pace and worse than midfield through to home straight, 3Ls down and with clear run 200 M out, impressive turn of foot to lead 60 M out, won eased down.
Pushed on to dispute lead out 4-wide early, couldn't lead outright and left wide without cover in stages, 3Ls in 6th entering straight, soon dropped out.
Enjoyed soft run on fence about 2Ls off pace in 5th through to home straight, all out to be 2Ls down in 2nd 200 M out, no extra and weakened.
Stood flat-footed in gates losing at least 15Ls, not sighted thereafter.
3 and 4-wide and 4Ls off pace down back straight, without cover 600 M out and 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight, never landed a blow.
Led on fence 800 M out by half a length, 2Ls clear off home turn and at 200 M, grabbed winner 150 M out but comfortably held onto 3rd.
Ridden early to be among leaders before losing ground quickly coming into straight.
Never in the hunt.
Never troubled leaders.
Midfield to straight where he ran on well despite not catching winner.
Always there, having every chance final 200 M and was steadied near the line.
Prominent to straight where he faded rapidly.
Settled in rear and was last rounding home bend. Made up good ground on the inside to threaten final 200 M.
Made no show.
Mostly in 5th to straight where he quickened to lead inside final 100 M.
Ran 6th to home turn. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Jumped best and led field before finding no extra inside final 150 M.
Settled in rear to straight where he ran on a bit.
Towards rear coming into straight where he made up some ground.
Worse than midfield to halfway. Improved along rail coming into straight to hold every chance 200 M. Was one-paced when steadied near finish.
Slowly away, towards rear. Found little when asked early straight.
Behind midfield. Dropped to the rear when checked 1200 M. Only made minor recovery soon after straightening.
Made all. Won unchallenged.
Towards rear throughout.
Always prominent. 2Ls 2nd turning in. Kept on but failed to quicken closing stages.
Began awkwardly, was 2nd last to 450 M. Made ground from outside final turn. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Slowly away, last to 300 M. Made ground from outside to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to final turn. Dropped out.
Ridden along from a wide draw to be 2nd 1100 M. Weakened out of contention 400 M.
Prominent. Dropped back a bit to 4th far side. Weakened 200 M out.
Midfield. Gradual progress from 1100 M to reach 4th 650 M. Held on until one-paced closing stages.
In touch. Dropped to midfield when checked passing 1200 M. Kept on same pace in straight.
Settled behind midfield. Steadied going up Rock. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Settled at the back. Made up good ground down straight to do best work at finish.
With leaders early, then settled just behind pace. Came to challenge upon straightening but only kept on steadily without threatening.
Settled towards rear. Tried to quicken early in straight but did not find much room. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Held up in midfield on rails. Steadied a few times in the run home. Never tested.
Niggled along in forward of midfield. Weakened soon after straightening.
Settled in midfield. Ran on to nearest at finish.
Never seen with a chance.
Prominent to straight. No extra.
Settled outside leader. Took lead into straight. Won readily.
Held narrow advantage to straight then gradually weakened.
Midfield and widest runner. Ran on steadily down centre of straight without threatening.
Well there. Dropped back a bit far side. Dropped out from midfield final turn.
Slowly away, behind midfield. Made some progress rounding home bend, advancing to the front early straight. Found no extra closing stages.
Towards rear from widest draw. Crept closer turning for home. Found no clear run approaching 200 M. Ran on when in clear.
Mainly 5th. Made no impression in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Stayed on.
Led field to 1000 M where he was joined to lead. Faded soon after straightening.
Rear to straight. Ran on well from outside inside 200 M, just missed 2nd narrowly.
Well there. Joined the lead from 1000 M. Weakened out of contention final 200 M.
In touch in a 4-wide position early. Behind midfield and wide far side. Kept on quite well from 350 M but failed to quicken closing stages.
Began awkwardly, rear to straight. Found no clear run when improving 250 M. Made up good ground when in clear inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Made some advancement from 600 m. Responded well passing 400 M, taking the lead 200 M out. Held on.
In touch. Improved to 3rd approaching 600 M. Found no extra final 150 M.
Made all. Hung on well.
Prominent. Came to challenge from approaching home turn but only kept on at the same pace under pressure.
Prominent briefly then mostly in midfield to straight. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Midfield to straight. Weakened.
