Settled at the back. Commenced run around field rounding home bend. Ran on steadily under pressure down centre of straight.
Midfield to home bend. Weakened gradually.
Slightly slow out. Settled behind midfield. Looked improving when not finding much room in crucial stage of race in final 200 M.
Tailed off throughout.
Wide in forward of midfield. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield home bend. Sustained progress down straight to do best work at finish.
Chased leader to straight then weakened under pressure.
Never better than midfield.
Broke well and ridden along to race in prominent position 2-wide. Under pressure to keep position at home bend. Failed to quicken in straight and dropped out inside final 200 M.

Jumped well from widest and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2-wide through to straight. Responded well when asked 200 M out but just failed to fend off late challenge from winner to be overhauled on the line.
Soon raced in worse than midfield 2-wide. At home bend switched wide and pushed along to go forward. Under pressure 200 M out but only able to run on evenly to the line.
Unable to muster early speed to race in midfield or worse or rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 200 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Broke well and soon settled in midfield on rail through to straight. At the 200 M mark was steadied when short for room. Made up little ground inside final 100 M when clear running was obtained.
A bit slow to begin and pushed along to race in midfield or worse 2-wide. Switched out and made steady progress at home bend. Made up steady ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped well and ridden along to race in prominent position on rail through to straight. Under pressure 200 m out and ran on fairly, just failed to catch the 3rd placegetter.
Tardy start and settled in rear section on rail. Switched to 2-wide and made little progress turning for home. Made up good ground inside final 200 M to overhaul 2nd placegetter on the line.

Jumped very awkwardly and lost a lot of ground. Raced at the tail of the field. Switched wide and made some progress at home turn. Only able to keep on one pace in straight and ran past couple of beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Began fairly and pushed along to take lead on rail with around 1-1/2Ls advantage through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 250 M out but unable to match speed with 1st pair inside final 200 M and just held on to 3rd.

Broke well and ridden along to race in prominent position 2-wide without cover. Ridden along to maintain position turning for home. Found nothing in straight and steadily faded inside final 200 M. (See Racing Incidents.)

Began fairly but was soon take to the rear section on rail and in the middle stages proved difficult to settle. After the 400 M was disappointed for running. Made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 8th 600 M out, 5Ls down entering home straight, beaten when steadied 100 M out.
3-wide without cover and 8Ls off pace in 10th 700 M out, 6Ls down and still 3-wide turning for home, posed no kind of threat.
Awkwardly away, severely hampered at the 800 M, 2-wide and 9Ls off pace in rear at 600 M, kept on quite well to be nearest at the finish.
Slowly away, on fence about 4Ls off pace in 5th 700 M out, bumped rail 500 M out, 3Ls down in 6th entering straight, kept on fairly without troubling principals.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd place 800 M out, upsides leader out 2-wide entering home straight, brief lead 250 M out, headed 200 M out and one-paced closing stages, lost 3rd place on line.
3Ld off pace and 2-wide in 4th place 700 M out, 2Ls down entering straight, led at the 200 M, hung a little right under pressure, always in command final stages.
On fence 8Ls off pace in 9th at the 600 M, closer turning for home, ran on strongly in the home straight, nearest at finish.
Slightly worse than midfield when clipping heels and unseating rider at the 800 M.
Soon led but couldn't cross to fence until 650 M out, disputing lead entering straight, beaten when steadied at the 200 M.
3-wide without cover and 4Ls off pace in 6th at the 700 M, hung in taking home bend, eased down closing stages when beaten.
2-wide and 4Ls behind leaders in 7th at the 700 M, one-paced in straight, never dangerous.
On fence 2Ls off pace in 2nd or 3rd through to home straight, 1L down and challenging when squeezed for room at 200 M, switched out, ran on but no chance with winner.
Ridden early to race near the lead. Settled back to race on fence behind the leaders after 1000 M. Urged to keep position at home turn and weakened shortly after straightening.
Settled 2-wide at midfield in the early and middle stages. Pressured just before straightening, rallied well in the straight to be closest at finish.
Jumped to the front early and continued to lead without pressure until the final stages. Hung on well despite being headed inside final 100 M.
Knuckled on jumping. Settled 2-off the fence behind midfield until being urged to improve at the home turn. Ran on steadily in the straight.
In last place shortly after the start and remained there until straightening. Made no impression in the straight.
On fence behind midfield early and continued to travel in that position until pressured on straightening. Ran on fairly in the straight.

Began well from widest draw and was quickly hustled into a prominent position. Raced 2-wide and behind the leader in the middle stages. Gained lead inside final 200 M and fought well for a narrow win.
Slowly away. Near the rear early despite being urged and continued in similar position until home straight. Ran past a few weakening runners in the straight.
Soon got into a position on fence just behind midfield and remained comfortably in that position until entering home straight. Made steady ground in the closing stages.
Slowly away and was kept towards the back until straightening. Ran on well and made up some late ground in the closing stages.
Enjoyed trip along the fence at midfield in the early and middle stages. Responded well on straightening and inched closer to the winner in the closing stages.
Niggled along early raced in a forward position. Ridden along at 700 M to keep position and remained in contention before dropping out quickly final 200 M.
Slowly away, steadied 1600 M out, in 9th place about 6Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1200 M and at 800 M, 5Ls down turning for home, kept on well but never able to challenge.
2Ls down in 2nd place out 2-wide at 1200 M, held this position through to home straight, couldn't pick up and weakened through final 200 M.
5Ls off pace and 2-wide in 7th at the 1200 M, in 6th but closer and 2-wide entering straight, 1L down and staying on well at 200 M, kept finding, narrowly failed.
Slowly away, on fence 8Ls off pace at 1200 M in 9th place, niggled along to get closer at 900 M, one-paced latter stages.
Led on fence at 1600 M but headed at 1400 M and settled 2Ls off pace on fence until home straight when racing keenly and became a little unbalanced, kept on at same pace.
In 5th place 3Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1200 M, pulled out 3-wide to challenge entering straight when 2Ls down, led 200 M out, all out, just held on.
8Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th place at 1200 M, 7Ls down and under pressure entering straight, not competitive.
10Ls down and 2-wide in rear 1200 M, never a factor.
Led on fence 1400 M out, never clear by more than 2Ls, driven along 600 M out, headed 200 M out, kept on at one pace and hung on for a place.
Slowly away, 10Ls off pace in 11th place on fence at 1200 M, never a factor.
Got head up at 1600 M, 3Ls off pace in 6th on fence at 1200 M, just over 2Ls down in 5th into home straight and going well, found nothing under pressure.
In 8th place 6Ls off pace on fence at 1200 M, travelled well entering straight when 4Ls down in 7th place, 3Ls down at 200 M, nearest at finish.
Led field to 1200 M, then raced 3rd within 1L behind leader to final turn. Sustained effort in straight to regain advantage passing 200 M. Held on.
In touch. 4th rounding home bend. Weakened steadily final 350 M.
Jumped well, raced towards rear. Made up some ground on outside 300 M until one-paced close home.
Midfield. Made no show in straight.
Sat outside leader before joining the lead rounding home bend. Failed to hold place inside 250 M.
Behind midfield. Ran on steadily in straight for a remote 3rd 100 M out.
Towards rear. Made very minor advancement in straight.
Pushed along on inside to take lead from 1200 M. In the first pair rounding home bend, having some advantage 300 M. Failed to withhold the winner when headed 200 M.
Better than midfield. Dropped back from 5th near 300 M.
Began awkwardly, remained in the rear. Kept on early straight but was weakened inside 200 M.
Mainly 4th or 5th. Kept on without quickening.
Last from 1000 M. Recovered some ground on the widest final 200 M.
Slowly away, soon recovered some ground to be behind midfield. Faded in straight.
Towards rear from widest draw. No improvement.
Sluggish at start. Improved steadily to forward of midfield before home bend. Only kept on at the one pace in straight.
Never better than midfield. Faded under pressure in straight.
Midfield to straight then faded gradually. (Bled.)
Led till no extra when headed over 200 M out.
Well back. Ran past beaten runners in straight.
Settled just behind leaders. Obtained split final 200 M after tight behind runners early in straight. Ran on strongly to get up final strides.
Well back. Made up good ground down centre of straight.
Worse than midfield into straight. No extra.
Well there. Quickened well to gain slender advantage inside 150 M but caught close home.
Better than midfield. Tightened on rails turning in. Kept on same pace in midfield position.
Ridden from wide draw to be prominent far side. Came to tackle leader under strong driving upon straightening, hitting front briefly 200 M out but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Mainly in forward of midfield to straight. Kept on early in straight before finding no extra final 200 M.
Never seen with a chance.
Towards rear. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Towards rear. Responded quite well 300 M to take 2nd near 100 M. Failed to threaten the winner.
Slowly away, never in contention. (Lame.)
In touch. Improved to 3rd passing 1200 M. Gained brief lead early straight but found no extra inside 200 M.
Soon led from a wide draw. Headed early straight. Soon faded.
Well there. Led briefly stable bend. Remained prominent far side. Found no extra from 5th 300 M.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily to midfield far side. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear. Made some moderate progress closing stages.
Near rear from a wide draw. Widest turning in. Only made minor progress in straight.
Began awkwardly, near rear. Crowded near 500 M and 350 M. No recovery.
Prominent on inside. Dropped back a bit to 5th far side. Ran on steadily final turn to assert authority 200 M. Stayed on.
Settled just behind midfield. Kept on final 200 M.
Midfield. Moved up quickly far side to be 2nd 1000 M. Stayed on well until weakening out of contention 250 M.
Behind midfield. Towards rear rounding home bend. Dropped out 250 M.
Shifted to the inside and raced in better than midfield. Found no clear run final turn and early straight. Stayed on quite well when in clear 200 M.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Prominent far side. Yielded ground under pressure rounding home bend. Faded further in straight.
Midfield till dropped out home bend.
Chased leader to straight then dropped out.
Well back into straight. Made up some ground under pressure.
Always in last few. Kept on.
Settled in midfield or worse. Ran on determinedly down straight to assert authority close to home.
Settled at the back. Made significant progress down straight to be nearest at finish.
Led to straight and weakened.
Always prominent. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Midfield into straight. Ran home one-paced.
Always thereabouts but failed to quicken to threaten in straight.
Wide in last few. Made steady headway down straight without threatening.
Well there. Quickened to gain narrow advantage upon straightening but unable to sustain effort and caught close home.
Broke well and soon settled in midfield 2 wide. Shuffled back to worse than midfield at home bend. Did not quicken in straight and only able to keep on evenly to the line.
Broke well and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Found nothing when asked 350 M out and faded quickly inside final 200 M.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race in midfield 3 to 4 wide through to straight. Stayed one-paced when asked 350 M out and slightly weakened inside final 200 M.
Soon settled in rear section on rail. Switched wide and made little progress turning for home. No extra final 300 M and slowly faded inside final 200 M.
Began awkwardly and raced in rear section 2 wide. Under pressure at 1000 M to maintain position. Commenced to lose ground quickly at home turn and dropped out in straight.
Raced in midfield or better 3 wide. Dropped back steadily at home bend and tailed out in straight.
Slow to begin and niggled along to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Made up some ground inside final 200 M when asked 350 M out but was never in position to trouble the 1st pair.
Raced 1/2L off leader on rail. Took lead at 800 M with no more than 1L advantage to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out but failed to fend off repeated challenge from winner closing stages.

Began fairly and soon eased to worse than midfield around 3 wide. Steady progress home bend to be 2-1/2Ls down on straightening. Ran on well when asked 300 M out to overhaul the 2nd placegetter final stages.
Ridden along to lead narrowly 2 wide. Dropped back to 2nd place at 800 M 1/2L down to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on same pace to the line.

Broke fairly but was soon eased to worse than midfield 2 wide. Switched out and niggled along to go forward at home bend. Under pressure 350 M out and made up some ground inside final 250 M but effort not sustained close home.
Slowly away and raced in rear section 2 wide. Switched wide and made slight progress at home turn. From 600 M to 350 M was held up. Made up steady ground inside final 200 M when asked 300 M out.

Raced in midfield towards the outside. Shortly after the 1000 M mark niggled along to go forward to be in prominent position on straightening. Found nothing in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Soon raced in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 300 M out.
Tended to race freely with head on side down back straight, 3-wide without cover and 3Ls 3rd at the 800 M, 2Ls down and under pressure entering straight, no dash and beaten 300 M out.
Towards rear when 3-wide with cover and about 6Ls off pace down backstretch, 4-wide into home straight when 5Ls down and one from rear, ran on fairly, nearest at finish.
Best away and soon led on fence but never more than 1L clear, headed entering home straight but still only a neck down 200 M out, hung on well for 2nd.
Very awkwardly away and soon at least 8Ls rear, 5Ls down and one from rear entering straight, made some late headway past beaten rivals.
On fence about 4Ls off pace in 4th or 5th down back straight, 2Ls 4th entering straight, one-paced and 3Ls 4th at 200 M, had every chance to finish in the money.
2-wide in 2nd at leader's quarters through to home straight, soon assumed narrow advantage, still only a neck to the good at 200 M, driven out and kept on well.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and about 4Ls off pace in about 6th at 800 M, over 2Ls 5th at top of home straight, 3Ls 3rd and staying on 200 M out, was run out of a place close home.
Bumped at start, steadied off heels 900 M out when at least 7Ls off pace and one from rear, in rear and detached entering straight, not at all competitive.
On fence in about 8th or 9th place and about 6Ls off speed down back straight, a little closer entering straight, always outpaced.
2 and 3-wide down back straight when about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace and slightly worse than midfield, very weak in home straight and was beaten well over 300 M out.
Mostly 3-wide with cover down back straight in 4th or 5th about 4Ls off pace, struggling to hold this spot on straightening, dropped out tamely.
Caught 4-wide without cover and 5Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, a little closer when 5-wide (widest) into home straight, kept on well late to nick a place final strides.
Slow to jump and raced in last place until straightening. Ran on well in the straight and made up good ground.
Slowly away and was niggled along to a position ahead of midfield. Dipped badly near 1200 M and dropped gradually to last place. Regained composure in on straightening and closed the race off nicely.
Disputed lead early, then settled 2Ls behind the pacesetter after 1200 M. Made a brief charge in early straight before dropping out inside final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly and raced at midfield until straightening. Never quickened and dropped out in the final stages.
Jumped well and soon led. Overtaken by the first pair inside final 200 M and held on for a minor placing.
Dropped back to race near the rear until straightening. Switched to the outside and rallied home strongly to claim victory final strides.
Ridden hard early. Raced alongside the leader until straightening. Unable to pick up when asked and weakened inside 200 M.
Ridden to keep position at midfield until 800 M. Responded only fairly in the straight and was not a threat in the closing stages.
Jumped slow and raced behind midfield. Only ran past a weakening runner in the straight.
Unable to muster early speed. Niggled along to keep position midfield at home turn. One-paced to line.
Raced within 3Ls of the pacesetter until straightening. Responded well when pressured inside 400 M and led briefly inside final 200 M before headed close to line.
Ridden hard early before settling behind midfield. Improved in 4-wide position rounding home turn. Quickened when asked and made up steady ground in the straight.
Niggled along near the back after jumping slow. Continued to race in rear section until straightening. Gained steady ground in the straight.
Prominent racing 2-wide and 2Ls off speed in 3rd at 1000 M, 2Ls 2nd and niggled along entering straight, failed to pick up and beaten over 200 M out.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, 6Ls down and towards rear entering straight, no impression.
Always deep on track, 5-wide without cover 900 M out and towards rear, 5-wide on straightening when 6Ls down, veered to stand's rail for better ground, ran on well, nearest at finish. (Bled.)
Beat away, pressed on to lead out 2-wide by 1L at 900 M, fly-leapt 600 M out, 2Ls to the good entering straight and going well, still 2Ls clear 200 M out, collared 50 M out and lost 2nd late on.
Led out 2-wide at 1200 M, onto fence at 1000 M, headed 900 M out, 3Ls down and struggling to hold position entering straight, quickly faded.
3-wide but with cover when 5Ls off pace in 10th at the 1000 M, 5-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, headed towards stand's rail for better ground, ran on well to nick 2nd place on line.
3-wide with cover and 6Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M and similarly placed entering stretch, ran on fairly well nearer the stand's rail without threatening principals.
3-wide and 4Ls off speed in 6th at 1000 M, checked at 800 M and knocked back to 6Ls off pace in 9th, 4Ls down and 4-wide on turn for home, always outpaced finishing off down centre of track.
Checked at 1200 M and knocked back to 6Ls off pace in 11th place at 1000 M when 2-wide, no better off and 3-wide on straightening, never a factor.
Settled in rear 9Ls off pace at 1000 M, at least 7Ls down and 5-wide entering straight, headed for better ground along stand's side, 2Ls 2nd and gaining 200 M out, led 50 M out, kept on.
Caught 4-wide without cover 4Ls off pace in 5th at the 1000 M, 3Ls down and 4-wide into home straight when in 4th place, much too one-paced thereafter.
Had a nice spot on fence and 2Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, switched out 2-wide and 4Ls down in 5th turning for home, found nothing under pressure.
Slowly away, checked at the 1000 M when on fence and 4Ls off pace in midfield, 5Ls down at 600 M and entering straight, very one-paced and no threat.
2-wide and 4Ls behind leader in midfield at 1000 M, under pressure to lie up turning for home, retreated rapidly.
Soon led on fence, never clear by much more than 2Ls, still 2Ls to the good entering home straight and 1L clear 200 M out, grabbed by winner at the 100 M, no extra.
2Ls off pace in 2nd on fence at 1200 M, 1L 2nd at 800 M, still in 2nd but under pressure to keep up when 2Ls down off home turn, faded.
3Ls off pace and 2-wide in 3rd at 1200 M, hung out at 800 M, losing place when 4Ls entering straight, beaten when very unbalanced 350 M out, soon eased out.
Dropped out in 11th place over 10Ls off the pace down back straight when 4-wide but with cover, 8Ls down and about 8-wide on the swing, made some moderate late headway.
In 7th place and 2-wide 6Ls behind the leader at 1200 M, niggled along to hold this position at 800 M, 3-wide and under strong pressure off final bend, found nothing.
Slowly away, on fence 5Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, advanced along inner to be 3Ls 4th at 1000 M, 3Ls down and under pressure to lie up off home turn, folded tamely.
Awkwardly away, had a very tough trip, in rear at least 14Ls behind leader and 6 and 7-wide without cover at the 1200 M, 9-wide (widest of all) into straight, kept on fairly, nearest at finish.
Had cover out 3-wide and 8Ls off the speed and worse than midfield at 1200 M, about 6Ls behind and 7-wide into home straight, never likely to pose a threat.
Settled 3-wide with cover and 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, 3-wide without cover at 1000 M, 6-wide into home straight and 3Ls down in 5th, one-paced thereafter.
Given plenty to do, at least 5-wide and 13Ls off pace in 12th 1200 M out, 8-wide and 6Ls down on straightening, ran on well along stand's rail to be nearest at finish.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, 2-wide at 1000 M, 3-wide into stretch when about 3Ls down in 4th, very one-paced thereafter.
Towards inner about 8Ls off pace in 9th at the 1200 M, 4-wide into home straight when 7Ls off pace, no impression.
Stumbled start, 3-wide but with cover 7Ls off pace in 8th 1200 M out, niggled along 700 M out, 5-wide into home straight and 5Ls down, picked up well to lead 100 M out, driven out.
Bumped at start, big task 3-wide with cover and 10Ls off pace in 10th 1200 M out, 6-wide into stretch when 7Ls off pace, always looked well held while finishing off down centre of track.
Never a factor.
Never on terms.
Midfield halway. Kept on to take 3rd close home.
Hit front approaching 1200 M and led field till headed and faded inside 150 M.
Prominent early and was 4th 1000 M. About same place early in straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
Well there to straight. Found no extra inside final 150 M.
Mostly in rear to straight where he kept on till finding no extra close home.
Midfield into straight where he soon dropped out of contention.
Settled in rear before improving home bend and was widest of all into straight. Stayed on well to lead final strides.
Always well there. Kept on to challenge 200 M and gain slender lead 100 M. Unable to hold winner towards finish.
Lost considerable ground at start and was in rear home bend. Plugged on under pressure before finding no extra near finish.
Made no show despite staying on a bit in straight.
At back to straight. Never nearer.
Midfield rounding home bend. Made no show on straightening.
Towards rear. Gradual progress to be better than midfield rounding home bend. Weakened 200 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Raced 4th but wide. Hung out from 700 M, losing ground. Kept on early straight but found no extra final 200 M.
Last to final turn. Recovered some ground in straight.
Near the rear. Sustained effort inside 300 M to just prevail final strides.
Midfield. Ridden out to improve to the front passing 800 M. Disputed for lead until taking 1L advantage 200 M out. Just beaten near finish.
In touch early, soon dropped back to midfield. Made no show from 500 M.
Slightly behind midfield. Improved steadily to be 3rd 700 M. Kept on well early straight, taking 2nd 200 M. One-paced closing stages.
Led briefly early. Remained prominent to final turn where he dropped a bit to 4th. Kept on without quickening.
Soon towards rear. 4-wide turning in. Ran on steadily final 250 M to obtain a minor placing close home.
Midfield. Dropped back slightly from 800 M to be behind midfield turning in. One-paced.
Prominent. Disputed lead from 800 M. Weakened when headed 200 M out. (Bled.)
Soon dropped to rear.
Never better than midfield.
Settled behind leaders. Ran on steadily despite tight between runners to get up on line.
Midfield. Kept on well without threatening.
Made no show.
Always prominent. Fought on under pressure to claim place.
Forward of midfield. Quickened well to hit front closing stages but pipped at post.
Mainly in rear of field. Made steady late progress closing stages.
Always thereabouts. Kept on without threatening.
Never better than midfield.
Broke well. Attempted to make all but swamped close home.
Stumbled badly jumping out nearly unseated rider. Settled mainly in rear of midfield. Never threatening.
Well there to 200 M. Weakened.
Took narrow lead to 400 M. Kept on for a remote 3rd.
Better than midfield. Made no show from course proper.
Began awkwardly, in midfield or better to 400 M. Faded.
Jumped awkwardly, soon in rear. Improved a bit on outside rail to midfield halfway. One-paced when hands and heels closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
In touch. Dropped back steadily passing 400 M.
Midfield. Improved a bit to be in touch course proper. Ran on inside 200 M to take command closing stages.
Always there. Raced greenly 400 M, rider had to stop momentarily to straighten.
Slowly away, soon recovered ground to be in touch. Kept on in similar position final 400 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield early. Soon raced towards the rear. Kept on but failed to quicken closing stages.
Never a factor.
Slightly better than midfield. Steadied 400 M. Responded well passing 300 M but failed to catch the winner close home.
Soon in touch. Advanced to the front 400 M. Maintained advantage until 200 M where he found no extra.
Tracked leaders. Quickened to challenge upon straightening. Asserted authority close to home.
Always in last few.
Behind midfield. Widest runner turning in. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Raced in midfield in straight. Made modest progress without threatening.
Always well there. Kept on one pace under pressure.
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled in 5th. Fought on under pressure to reach 2nd late but without threatening winner.
Towards rear into straight. Never nearer.
Never seen with a chance.
Always in rear.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Midfield. Slightly hampered turning in. One-paced in straight.
Led field till overhauled 200 M.

Jumped awkwardly and bounded in the air. Raced well back on rail and hung out rounding the home turn. Made up good steady ground in straight but over the concluding stages was not ridden out to the line when short for room.
Niggled along to race in midfield 2 wide through to straight. Failed to respond to pressure approaching the 200 M was steadied when crowded for room and further weakened thereafter.
Raced 2Ls off pace on rail in the early stages. Went forward to race outside leader at home turn. Under pressure 350 M out but only able to run on evenly and weakened slightly inside final 200 M.

Began awkwardly and soon recovered to race 2Ls off pace 2 wide. After the 600 M was awkwardly placed between runners. Obtained clear running on straightening and ran home strongly when asked 350 M out to win convincingly.

Jumped best and race in midfield on rail through to straight. Shifted to the middle of the track to obtain clear running and made up steady ground inside final 200 M to grab 2nd place in the closing stages.

Broke awkwardly and raced in rear section 2 wide through to straight. Had trouble obtaining a clear run in early part of straight, when clear running was obtained at 200 M made up good ground and took 3rd place near the line.
Jumped well and niggled along to race in midfield or better 3 wide through to straight. Found nothing when asked 300 M out and steadily faded thereafter.
Broke fairly from widest and soon took up running on rail through to straight. Stayed one-paced when asked 300 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.
Soon settled in rear section towards the outside through to straight. Only able to run on evenly when asked 300 M out and ran past couple of beaten runners inside final 200 M.

Pushed along early to race 1L off leader on rail through to straight. Whilest improving nicely was steadied at 200 M when disappointed for running. Soon regained running and continue to make up ground to be closest at finish.

Broke fairly and soon settled in rear section 3 wide. Made some progress rounding the home turn to be in midfield on straightening. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and stayed one-pace to the line.

Tardy start and raced in worse than midfield on rail through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out but ran out of room at 200 M. Regained running at 100 M and closed the race off well to be closest at finish.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, 3-wide with cover in midfield at 800 M, 5Ls down and off the bit entering straight, hung in under pressure, never threatened.
Keen early on when half a length down in 2nd on fence at 1200 M, still over-racing at 800 M when 1L off pace in 3rd, 1L 2nd with every chance 200 M out, kept on dourly, caught for 2nd on line.
4-wide without cover in 6th when 3Ls off pace at 1200 M, advanced to be 1L down in 2nd out 3-wide at 1000 M, disputing 2nd and under pressure entering straight, kept on at same pace.
Bounded in air at start but soon recovered to lead by half a length out 2-wide at 1200 M, led by 1L on fence at 800 M and entering straight when going well, always in command on run-in.
Had a nice spot on the fence 1200 M out when 2Ls off pace in 4th, 3Ls down in 6th at 800 M, 4Ls down and under pressure entering straight, faded steadily.
Never really got involved, between 6Ls and 9Ls off the pace in rear down backstretch, ran on past a few well-beaten ones in home straight.
3-wide with cover and 2Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, left short of cover at 800 M, 5-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in midfield, very one-paced thereafter.
Bit keen early on, 3-wide with cover towards rear about 7Ls off pace at 1200 M, similarly placed entering straight when hard pressed, never any kind of threat.
About 5Ls off pace towards inner down back straight, taking closer but niggled along at 600 M, kept on fairly in home straight but was always held by principals.
On fence 4Ls behind leader in 7th at 1200 M, 2-wide and 3Ls to 4Ls off pace from 800 M until home straight, no chance with winner but stayed on well to grab 2nd final stride.
4-wide with cover and about 5Ls off pace at 1200 M in 10th, left without cover at 800 M, 5-wide into home straight when 6Ls down and towards rear, never troubled leaders.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, about 5Ls down 800 M out and into home straight, held up at 300 M and switched inside for a run, finished off well, nearest finish.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 4th at 800 M, niggled along 600 M out to hold position, soon beaten off home turn.
Jumped well to race near the lead early. Gradually dropped to behind midfield after 1000 M and remained there until straightening. Unable to quicken much in the straight.
Eased back from widest draw to race in last place until straightening. Responded well in the closing stages and made up good ground.
Settled 2-wide and just behind the leaders until home straight. Responded well when asked and had the race in hand final 200 M.
Ridden hard early to race alongside the leader. Continued to race with the lead into home straight. Led briefly 300 M out before headed in the closing stages.
Raced on fence and within 2 to 3Ls of the lead before dropping back slightly at 700 M. Ran on well on straightening but was unable to gain much ground on winner.
Slowly away. On fence behind midfield before steadily dropping back to last place after 600 M. Never recovered thereafter.
Settled 3-wide and midfield in the early and middle stages. Unable to quicken when asked on straightening.
Niggled along behind midfield in the early stages. Ridden near 700 M to keep up. Only one-paced after straightening.
Jumped well and led until 300 M. Weakened thereafter.
Settled 3-wide and towards the rear in the early and middle stages. Near last place entering home straight but ran on strongly in the final stages and made up good ground.
Began awkwardly. Niggled along near the rear until straightening. Made up some ground in the straight.
Quickest out and settled behind the leaders early. On fence and 3Ls behind the lead 600 M out. Found nothing after straightening.
Bad break and lost 2Ls at start, 10Ls off pace in rear at 1400 M, 7Ls down at 800 M, 5-wide into home straight and still rear into homestretch, kept on fairly past beaten rivals, nearest finish.
4-wide without cover and 5Ls off pace 1600 M out in 7th position, 4Ls down and still no cover at 800 M, 5-wide into home straight and under pressure, soon beaten.
3-wide with cover 8Ls off pace in 11th at 1400 M, one from rear and 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight when at least 6Ls off pace, ran on fairly, nearest at the finish.
On fence 8Ls off pace in 12th at 1400 M, sometimes 2-wide through to home straight when 7Ls down in 10th and held up for a run, soon clear but never likely to trouble principals.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 8th at 1600 M, about 5Ls down in midfield at 800 M and entering home straight, one-paced to line.
2Ls 2nd on fence at 1600 M, one and a half lengths 3rd at 800 M out, 1L 2nd into home straight and led about 50 M out before being collared in the last bound by winner.
Bit slowly away, 2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 13th 1400 M out, still towards rear when 5-wide into stretch and 7Ls down, no threat thereafter.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1600 M, 3Ls down in 4th into home straight, staying on when 2Ls 3rd at 200 M, kept on gamely but no extra final 50 M.
Tended to hang out throughout, 2Ls 3rd out 2-wide at 1200 M, 1L 2nd at 800 M, under pressure when 2Ls 3rd into home straight, dropped out rapidly.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1600 M, 3Ls down and niggled along at 600 M, outpaced at top of home straight when 4Ls down, ran on again at same pace final stages, nearest finish.
4Ls off pace and 3-wide without cover in 4th place at 1600 M, 2Ls down and 3-wide 4th 800 M out, gave ground entering straight, well beaten 300 M out.
Advanced from midfield to lead by 2Ls on fence 1500 M, never more than 2Ls clear through to home straight, half a length up 200 M out, battled gamely but no extra when headed 50 M out.
3-wide and about 6Ls off pace in about 9th place virtually throughout, rather one-paced and posed no threat in home straight.
On fence 8Ls off speed in 10th 1600 M out, 5Ls down at 800 M and into home straight when midfield, picked up well to be 2Ls 4th at the 200 M, kept on strongly, all out to lead on line.
Began awkwardly, pushed along to be 3rd 1200 M. Found no extra when asked final turn. Weakened.
Towards rear. Made up some ground 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear throughout.
Was 2nd last before passing a few beaten horses in straight.
Jumped well. Held 2nd until weakening out of contention inside 100 M.
Slowly away, last or 2nd last to straight. Never in contention.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Moderate progress inside 250 M.
Better than midfield. Ran on steadily inside 300 M to reach 2nd 100 M. Kept on but was hampered close home.
Behind midfield. Made ground steadily 400 M to snatch 2nd close home.
Always there. Sustained effort in straight to take lead 300 M out. Held on well.
Better than midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Midfield to 400 M. Dropped back steadily.
Behind midfield. Made ground steadily from 7th early straight.
Led field to early straight. Faded.
Well back before making good late impression closing stages.
Towards rear. Made up good ground down straight.
Forward of midfield to straight, then gradually faded.
With leaders far side. Dropped out before coming onto home bend.
Never better than midfield.
Hard ridden to the front and led briefly before headed. Kept on same pace from midfield into straight.
Prominent far side. Took lead coming out of back straight. Weakened and headed over 200 M out.
Midfield to straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield to straight. Faded. (Bled.)
Tracked leaders. Hit front 200 M out. Won readily.
Very sluggish at start. Never seen with a chance.
Never nearer.
Near rear. Slight progress 500 M. 4-wide turning in. Ran on strongly 300 M to take charge closing stages.
Towards rear. Never a threat.
Towards rear while shifting in from widest draw. Made ground when under pressure in straight.
In touch. 3rd from stable bend. Kept on well until one-paced closing stages.
Midfield. Kept on early straight. Made no show inside 200 M.
Last from stable bend.
Held 5th to 200 M out. Ran on well to take lead approaching 100 M. Failed to withhold winner's challenge closing stages.
Led field before overhauled final 100 M.
Towards rear throughout.
In touch. 2nd from stable bend. Kept on well early straight but failed to quicken inside 100 M.
Prominent from a wide draw, 4th from stable bend. 4-wide turning in. Found no extra inside 200 M.
Midfield. Weakened steadily from 300 M.
Midfield or behind. Towards rear final turn. Kept on closing stages.
In touch early, soon behind midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Began awkwardly. Remained in rear until making up good ground in straight.
Chased leaders to 300 M then weakened.
Settled around midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to produce good late impression closing stages.
Towards rear into straight. Made moderate late headway closing stages.
Soon in rear. Never a factor.
Chased leader to 400 M then weakened.
Towards rear into straight. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Held up in midfield. Quickened to hold every chance early in straight but found winner too good.
Well back. Made some headway down centre of straight.
Raced wide in midfield. Came to challenge upon straightening. Asserted authority over 150 M out.
Never in contention. (Bled.)
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on to reach 3rd place passing 200 M without threatening.
Well there to 300 M. Found nothing under pressure.
Led to 300 M. Overhauled.

Broke fairly and niggled along to race in forward position out wide, slowly shifted in to be 2 wide after 1200 M. Took lead shortly after 400 M and ran on well but unable to fend off late challenge from winner final strides.
Began awkwardly and soon recovered to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Shortly after the start checked severely when crowded for room and raced in rear section 2 wide. Shifted out to find clear running for home but unable to make any impression when asked 300 M out.
Broke fairly from wide draw and soon eased to the tail but closer to fence. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running, made up steady ground when asked 350 M out to be closest at finish.
Jumped fairly and raced in midfield or worse 2 wide through to straight. Only kept on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.

Raced in midfield 3 wide and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Raced in similar position through to straight. Stayed one-pace when asked 350 M out and weakened slightly inside final 200 M.
Raced in mid-division on rail and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Slowly got shuffled back to rear section at home turn. Made up some ground inside final 200 M when asked 300 M out.

Soon settled in midfield 3 wide without cover. Went forward at the home bend to be 1L off pace on straightening. Kept on well when asked 350 M out but was unable to match speed with the 1st pair inside final 200 M.
Best out from widest and eased to race in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Under pressure at 400 M and made up good ground inside final 200 M to snatch victory near the line.
Soon settled in rear section 3 wide. Slowly edged forward at home bend to be in midfield on straightening. Under pressure 350 M out and made up good ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield on fence through to straight. No extra when asked 350 M out and steadily tailed out thereafter.

Prominent in the early stages and took outright lead on rail around the 1100 M. Soon after the 400 M mark was headed and kept on fairly in straight but was overhauled by 3rd placegetter near the line.

Unable to muster early speed to race in rear section on rail. Switched out in straight and made up steady ground. After the 200 M steadied when short for room, soon regained running and made ground to be closest at finish.

Tardy start and raced in worse than midfield. After the 800 M was caught wide without cover. Made little progress at home turn but unable to sustain effort in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.
2-wide and 9Ls off speed in 11th at 1100 M, 3-wide and 7Ls down at 800 M, 3-wide into straight and 5Ls off pace, 2Ls down and disputing 5th at 200 M, one-paced final stages.
pressed on to lead early, 2Ls clear at 1300 M on fence, headed at 800 M, 2Ls down in 4th and weakening at top of home straight, dropped out.
2-wide and 8Ls off pace at 1000 M in 10th, steadied at 700 M, 5Ls down and 2-wide in about 9th entering straight, never looked like winning.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, 2-wide and 4Ls down in 5th at 800 M, 2Ls 4th at top of home straight, disputing lead and all out at 200 M, no extra and wilted close home.
Awkwardly away, 9Ls off pace in 12th place on fence at 1000 M, niggled along when 8Ls off pace 600 M out, 7Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, kept finding for pressure, led 50 M out.
Slowly away, on fence 8Ls in 9th at 1200 M and 800 M, 6Ls down in 10th and short of room entering straight, 3Ls down at 200 M, ran on strongly final 200 M, nearest at finish.
Slowly away, 3-wide with cover and 4Ls off pace at 1000 M in midfield, without cover from 800 M out when 6Ls off pace, 4Ls down at 400 M, 2Ls down at 200 M and all out, no extra, eased down.
Never got involved, 12Ls last down back straight when 4-wide without cover as well, never looked a likely challenger.
On fence in 6th about 5Ls off pace at 1200 M, similarly placed but hard pressed to hold position at 600 M, beaten at top of home straight.
Fractious in stalls, broke through gates, reloaded, 2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 8th at 800 M, closer entering home straight, all out when held up at 200 M, weakened close home. (Lame.)
Keen and caught 3-wide without cover at 1400 M, advanced out wide to lead on fence at 800 M, 3Ls clear at 600 M, headed 300 M out, faded.
2-wide and 2Ls in 2nd at 1200 M, 3Ls 3rd at 800 M, kept on well to lead 300 M out, headed 150 M out, faded.
3Ls off pace on fence at 1200 M, 4Ls down in 4th at 800 M, 2Ls 3rd off home turn, kept on to lead 150 M out, grabbed by winner final 50 M, no extra.
Towards rear about 12Ls off pace down back straight, one from rear and 8Ls off pace entering home straight, picked up well to be 4Ls down at 200 M, couldn't sustain effort.
Got to the front 1600 M out and led comfortably into home straight. Stayed on until final 200 M before gradually dropping out.
On fence midfield until straightening. Found nothing in the straight.
Soon got behind midfield. In similar position until being urged 600 M. Did not quicken much on straightening.
Niggled early before settling behind the leader after the first turn. Always kept within 2Ls of the pace in the backstraight. Kept on in the straight.
Jumped good. Settled comfortably within 3ls of the pacesetter until 400 M. Quickened well when asked and took control at 200 M.
Settled near the rear in the early and middle stages. Made up good ground when placed under pressure in the final stages.
Went forward to be near the lead. Continued outside leader until straightening. Led briefly inside final 400 M before headed in the final stages.
Jumped slow and was taken back early to race in last place until 600 M. Made a late rally in the straight to be closest at finish.
Midfield until straightening. Ran on without threatening in the straight.
On fence and near the back in the early and middle stages. Ridden to stay on 600 M out before making up some ground inside final 300 M.
Stayed 3-wide and within 2Ls of the lead in the early and middle stages. One-paced in the straight.
3-wide midfield until straightening. Made no impression in the straight.
Soon led on fence, over-raced in places, headed at top of home straight and faded out.
Clipped heels and blundered at start, towards rear and 3 and 4-wide without cover down back straight when about 6Ls off home straight, very weak thereafter.
Slowly away and checked at start, 8Ls behind leader and on fence at 800 M, 2-wide into home straight when 5Ls down, no impression.
Keen in 2nd 2Ls off pace on fence at 1200 M, 2Ls 4th at 800 M, back-pedalling entering straight, soon eased down.
Settled in midfield on fence about 4Ls off pace through to 800 M, crept closer on circle and led 250 M out, battled on gamely under pressure.
Slowly away, always towards rear down back straight when about 8Ls off speed and 2-wide, 6Ls down into stretch when 2-wide, never threatened.
On fence 6Ls off pace in midfield down back straight, 2-wide and 4Ls off pace in midfield into home straight, steadied at 100 M when staying on at same pace.
Towards rear and 2-wide about 6Ls or 7Ls off pace down backstretch, 2-wide and 4Ls down in 9th off final bend, clear run at 300 M and 2Ls down at 200 M, hung left under pressure, just failed.
3-wide without cover and 4Ls off pace in 4th at 1000 M, 1L down in 3rd at 800 M and entering home straight, lacked any dash final stages.
Always in midfield or a little worse, 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 8th at 800 M, 4-wide on straightening and 3Ls off pace entering ome straight, always outpaced.
Had cover out 3-wide in 6th place when 3Ls off pace at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight and disputing 4th when just 1L off pace, looked held when steadied 100 M out.
Held up in rear about 8Ls off pace and at least 2 or 3-wide, 6-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 5Ls down, staying on well at 200 M, nearest at the finish.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, 2Ls 3rd at 800 M, 3-wide and 1L off pace and disputing 4th off home turn, 1L 3rd at 200 M, no extra.
In 3rd place 2Ls off pace and 2-wide at 1200 M, always well there and held brief lead entering home straight, headed 250 M out and no extra final stages.
Slowly away, on fence 8Ls off pace in 11th at 1400 M, 5Ls down at 800 M and 2-wide, 6Ls down off home turn, 3Ls down at 200 M, stayed on strongly closing stages, nearest at finish.
Soon led, 2Ls clear at 1800 M, 1L clear at 800 M and into home straight, headed at 300 M, faded.
On fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1400 M, 2Ls 3rd at 800 M and in 4th again on straightening, kept on stoutly on run-in, vastly improved effort.
Very wide (at least 7-wide) round stable bend, caught 3 and 4-wide without cover down back straight, 5Ls down in 10th or 11th at 800 M, very one-paced in home straight.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 2nd at 1400 M, 1L 2nd at 800 M and entering home straight, led 300 M out, ground down by winner closing stages.
3-wide and 9Ls off speed in 13th at 1400 M, 5Ls down at 800 M, still well back entering home straight when 3-wide, no threat.
Dropped out in rear about 12Ls off pace and 3-wide with cover at 1200 M, 7Ls rear at 800 M, 2-wide into straight and 6Ls down in 10th, was held up for a run late on but always looked held.
9Ls off pace and 2-wide in 12th at 1400 M, under pressure and in rear when 7Ls down entering home straight, very one-paced thereafter.
4-wide without cover in about 6th for most of back straight when about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace, gave ground on home bend and in rear turning for home, faded markedly.
3-wide and 6Ls off pace in 8th at 1400 M and 800 M, 5-wide into home straight and struggling when 7Ls down, faded out tamely.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 7th at 1400 M, 5Ls down in midfield at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 6Ls off pace, 3Ls down at 200 M, nearest at finish.
3-wide with cover and 4Ls off speed in 5th at 1400 M, 3Ls down at 800 M and 3-wide without cover, 2Ls 3rd into home straight, kept on gamely to assert final 50 M.
Clipped heels and almost fell at start, on fence 6Ls off pace at 1400 M, 4Ls down at 800 M and 400 M when 5th, 2Ls down with clear place prospects at 200 M, run out of money final strides.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 4th at 1400 M, hard ridden to maintain this position on the swing for home, one-paced to line.
Joint-leader from 1200 M and held every chance 250 M. Found no extra close home.
Never a factor.
Midfield to straight where he ran on well to lead near finish with a bit in hand.
Settled in rear to straight where he ran on to be nearest at the finish.
Always at the back despite making some late headway in straight.
Was worse than midfield approaching home turn before making up some ground closing stages.
Well there to straight where he ran on to lead passing 200 M and look winner. Unable to hold winner near finish.
Well there before finding no extra inside final 200 M.
At back into straight where he ran on a bit inside final 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Never in contention.
About 6th on straightening. Unable quicken to challenge.
About 6th turning into straight where he made no show.
Shared lead from 1200 M to straight where he gained slender advantage 300 M. Was headed passing 200 M and dropped out steadily.
About 5th or 6th rounding home bend. Kept on steadily on straightening.
Always prominent. Kept on well to take 2nd inside 100 M. No threat to the winner.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Well there. Took lead from 600 M. Failed to quicken when headed 200 M out. Just held on for a 3rd.
Midfield or slightly better. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Led field to 600 M. Was within 1L 2nd before regaining advantage 200 M out. Held on well. (Dropped whip 200 M.)
Held 5th to straight. One-paced.
Behind midfield. Failed to quicken.
Slowly away, never a threat.
Last from 700 M.
Soon 4th. One-paced.
Towards rear. Only found little when asked inside 200 M.
Jumped awkwardly. Recovered ground from outside 700 M to be 3-wide 7th turning in. No extra.
Prominent to home bend. Dropped out. (Bled.)
Always at the back.
Well back. Made moderate progress in straight.
Always towards rear.
Settled in midfield. Gained 4th position turning in. Sustained effort in straight to gain upper hand final stride.
Midfield. Attempted to challenge shortly after straightening but only kept on at the one pace.
Jumped best from poor draw. Ridden and crossed to inside gingerly to reach rails before home bend. No extra when headed over 100 M out.
Never in contention.
Tracked leader. Came to challenge upon straightening hitting front briefly inside 200 M but pipped at post.
Prominent to 200 M and faded.
Rear. Made up some late ground in straight.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Towards rear. Made progress from 600 M to reach 5th final turn. Stayed on well until one-paced closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield. Kept on early straight but was weakened final 100 M.
Mainly 3rd or 4th to home turn. Made no show in straight.
Towards rear throughout. (Badly distressed after race.)
Began awkwardly, ridden along to be in touch. Made advancement far side to reach 2nd 700 M. Stayed on until finding no extra inside 150 M.
Led early, then sat outside leader before regaining advantage passing 1000 M. Held no less than 3Ls advantage inside 200 M. Failed to resist winner's late burst when beaten close home.
Towards rear. Made progress to midfield far side. Faded in straight.
Slightly behind midfield. Dropped back towards the rear near the Rock. No improvement.
Took lead soon after start. Dropped to 2nd and then 3rd far side. Given reminders final turn. Weakened 200 M.
Towards rear. Recovered ground steadily to be 4th or 5th first time in straight. Dropped back from 700 M. Tailed off 300 M.
Near rear. Recovered a little ground home bend. Ran on from 9th final turn, never nearer.
Lost ground at start, last to 1200 M. Remained 2nd last before making progress from 600 M to reach 7th final turn. Stayed on strongly final 200 M to snatch victory close home.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily down straight to get up on line.
Made no show.
Attempted to make all. Flattered early in straight and caught final strides.
Mostly in midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace in straight.
Chased leaders to straight then weakened.
Prominent till weakened under pressure into straight. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Settled in midfield. Ran on between runners to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield. Came under pressure upon straightening but only produced moderate progress closing stages.
Rear into straight. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Well back into straight. Ran on past beaten horses to be nearest at finish.
Always in last few.

Tardy start and niggled along to race in midfield on fence through to straight. Responded well when asked 250 M and took lead inside final 100 M but just failed to hold out the late challenge from winner to be overhauled on the line.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race in midfield 2 wide. Ridden along to go forward at home bend. Kept on fairly when asked 250 M out but steadily weakened inside final 150 M.

Slow to begin and niggled along to race in worse than midfield on rail. Pushed along at home bend and made little progress. Raced tight in early part of straight and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped awkwardly and raced at the tail of the field on rail through to straight. Stayed one-pace when asked 250 M out and only able to run past couple of beaten runners.
Pushed along to race in midfield out wide without cover. Under pressure at 600 M to hold position but commenced to lose position at 400 M. Dropped out in straight.

Broke well and ridden along to take up running on rail with around 1L advantage. Under pressure at 400 M and was 2Ls up on straightening. Kept on fairly in straight but was headed at 100 M and weakened slightly thereafter.

Soon settled in rear section on rail and blundered at the 800 M. Made little progress at home bend. Was short for room in early to middle part of straight. Crashed home to win narrowly when clear running was obtained in final 100 M.
Jumped well and niggled along to race 1L off lead on rail. Under pressure at home turn to maintain position. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
Ridden along to race 1L off pace 2 wide. Under pressure at home bend to hold position. No extra in straight and faded quite quickly inside final 200 M.

Broke well and soon in midfield or worse. Difficult to settle early. Bumped out to 4-wide home turn and raced tight in early straight. Made up steady ground inside final 200 M to grab 3rd on the line.
Slowly away and raced in rear section 2 wide. Switched out at home turn to find clear running but failed to make any impression in straight.

Broke fairly from widest and soon eased to rear section but closer to rail. Switched wide to obtain running turning for home. Made up little ground in early part of straight but unable to sustain effort and became one-pace inside 100 M.
Very keen with head cocked when 5Ls behind leader at 800 M in 6th, better settled but similarly placed on straightening, 4Ls down in 4th at 200 M, ran on and nearest at finish.
Awkwardly away, always about 6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 9th place through to home straight when driven along, still 5Ls down at 200 M, ran on strongly final stages, nearest at finish.
2-wide and prominent in 3rd 2Ls off pace early on, driven along to maintain position at 500 M, gave ground off home turn and well beaten 300 M out.
Had run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd or 4th through to home straight when under pressure, 2Ls 3rd when attempting to savage GRANDWAY SHUTTLE at 200 M, kept on same pace.
2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 7th at 800 M and entering home straight, staying on when steadied and disappointed for running over 200 M out and again at 100 M, not fully tested.
Never better than midfield, on fence about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace in 8th through to home straight, moderate late headway closing stages.
Soon led, never clear by much more than 1L, travelling well entering straight, shot 2Ls clear at 200 M, kept on strongly.
Broke awkwardly, soon well behind, 10Ls down at 800 M, well detached entering straight, not sighted thereafter.
Hampered at start, one from rear and on fence at 800 M when about 8Ls down, no better off and under pressure entering straight, never remotely on terms.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, still 4Ls down but 3-wide into home straight, ran on well to take 2nd place on line.
Pressed on early to be 3-wide without cover within 1L of pace in 2nd place until 600 M when 2-wide, 1L 2nd entering straight, 2Ls down in 2nd at 200 M, weakened close home.
Checked and bumped at start and lost ground, 2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 10th at 800 M, one from rear and still well back on the swing, 4-wide into home straight, no impression.
Led shortly after start and set a comfortable pace until home straight. Fought on gamely when challenged in the closing stages for a narrow win.
Raced at the rear early and remained there mostly until home straight. One-paced to line.
Towards the rear shortly after start but improved to midfield after 1000 M. On fence rounding home and made a late rally.
On fence at midfield in the early and middle stages. Urged to improve rounding home turn and was 3Ls down heading into home straight. Continued to gain steady ground in the straight.
Raced mostly in the rear section in the early and middle stages. Ridden 500 M out and wide turning for home. Closed the race off well from the outside.
Slowly away and trailed the field until running past a few beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Best out and raced with the leaders before being checked severely at 1200 M. Remained within 3Ls of the lead but 3-wide in the middle stages. Caught wide turning in and found nothing in the straight.

Closed to the leaders early. Settled 2-wide at midfield after being hampered 1200 M out. Ridden 600 M onwards to get within 2Ls of the lead on straightening. Every chance 300 M but got no closer in the final stages.

Moved steadily towards the lead before settling a length behind the pacesetter after 1200 M. Continued to track winner closely into home straight. Fought well but failed to overtake the winner in the final stages.
Raced behind the leaders despite being slow to begin. Maintained position after being crowded at 1200 M and kept within 2Ls of the pace until straightening. Unable to quicken much on straightening.
Raced 2-wide behind midfield until 800 M. Ridden to improve after 600 M but was steadied when crowded at 400 M. Made up steady ground in the straight.
Caught wide at midfield into first turn and dropped back to race in the rear. Made no impression in the straight.
Fractious in stalls and awkwardly away, 2-wide and 9Ls behind leader and one from rear from 1200 M until home straight, never a factor.
Steadied at 1200 M when 2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 7th, 5Ls down in 6th place entering straight, over 2Ls down and staying on well at 200 M, short of room and steadied at 100 M, not recover.
Had the run of the race on fence about 2Ls down in 4th through to 600 M when shifted wider, 4-wide into stretch and took command 200 M out, hung left on run-in, driven out.
Switched inside from wide gate to 11Ls last at 1200 M on fence, still well behind in rear turnig for home, ran on past a few tired ones late on.
Sent on from wide gate to dispute lead out at least 2-wide at 1200 M, narrow lead out 2-wide at 800 M, 1L clear and 2-wide into stretch, headed over 200 M out, no extra close home.
Soon led on fence, headed at 800 M, checked and bumped rail at 600 M, 2Ls down on fence into home straight, all out and 1L 3rd at 200 M, one-paced.
On fence 6Ls off pace in 6th at 1200 M, raced in snatches down backstretch, 5Ls down at top of home straight, always held by winner but ran on strongly to take 2nd.
2-wide and 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M and at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls down under pressure, emptied out.
Bit slowly away, on fence 7Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M and through to home straight, 4Ls down at 200 M, got no closer, was always much too one-paced.
Crowded at start, on fence 9Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M and still there into home straight, never posed any kind of threat.
In 5th 2-wide and 5Ls off pace at 1200 M, 3Ls 5th at 800 M, 3-wide without cover at 500 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into straight and still 3Ls down, 2Ls down at 200 M, no extra.
2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M and in same place entering straight, very one-paced thereafter.
Mainly 2nd last to straight. Made up some ground on outside final 200 M.
In touch early, soon raced in 5th. Maintained similar but was only one-paced in straight.
Led field from widest draw. Headed early straight. Faded passing 200 M.
In touch. Improved steadily from 3-wide 4th final turn to take lead passing 250 M. Held on well.
Pushed along to be in touch. Held 3rd rounding home bend to 300 M. Weakened steadily.
Settled towards rear. Recovered good ground from outside final 350 M to miss 2nd narrowly.
Around midfield to straight. Ran on quite well to take 2nd closing stages.
Towards rear. Improved steadily 1000 M out to reach 5th early straight. Kept on but was weakened closing stages.
Prominent. Sat outside leader from 1100 M. Came to tackle leader early straight, gaining slender advantage very briefly 250 M. Held 2nd until weakened closing stages.
Around midfield throughout.
Checked after start. Was last to 100 M. Ran past a few tiring horses close home.
Towards rear. Checked 300 M. No recovery.
Towards rear. Improved well on inside in straight, never nearer.
Checked soon after start, towards rear. Was held up when trying to improve passing 250 M. Ran on when in clear closing stages.
Slowly away, then travelled towards rear. Produced good late impression between runners final 200 M.
Well there to 200 M, then weakened.
Broke well settling behind leaders. Only kept on steadily without threatening when a clear passage inside final 200 M.
Never nearer. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Always thereabouts. Finished off race well to narrowly miss first two.
Began awkwardly. Settled towards rear and made no impression.
Steadied in midfield coming out of back straight. Angled off rails upon straightening to quicken to snatch victory short of line.
Midfield throughout. Kept on.
Settled at the back. Made up a lot of ground in straight to be nearest at finish.
Held narrow lead to straight, then gradually faded under pressure.
Prominent to straight. One-paced.
Around midfield to straight then gradually weakened.
Well there. Gained about a length's advantage about 200 M out but caught final stride.
Midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Never able to feature. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Last throughout.
Midfield. Ridden under pressure inside 300 M. Failed to quicken.
Made all. Won readily.
Always there. Held 3rd near 300 M. Kept on.
Was 2nd last to 200 M. Ran on.
Always 2nd. Unable to threaten the winner. (Hung out.)
Around 4th to 200 M. Found no extra.
In touch early, dropped to midfield halfway. One-paced.
Attempted to make all, holding clear advantage most of way but caught final strides.
Raced in forward of midfield, gaining 4th into straight. Kept on but swamped close to home.
Well back. Made up good ground in straight.
Held up in midfield then ran on steadily down straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield to straight. Weakened. (Bled.)
Tracked leader. Quickened well final 200 M to get up on line.
Never in contention. (Lame.)
Always well there. Ran on under pressure down straight to just fail to peg back winner.
Never better than midfield.
Never beaten than midfield.
Towards rear when checked and lost position coming out of back straight. Ran past beaten horses in closing stages.
Prominent to straight. No extra.
Wide in forward of midfield to straight then dropped out.
Forward of midfield. Gradually faded under pressure in straight.
Broke fairly and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on evenly to the line.
Jumped awkwardly and pushed along to take lead on rail. Headed shortly after the 1000 M mark and raced 3Ls off leader to straight. Unable to quicken and steadily faded inside final 200 M.

Slowly to begin, clipped heels and blundered shortly after. Soon recovered and raced keenly in worse than midfield 2 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running but only able to run on evenly to the line.
Soon settled in worse than midfield 3 wide. When making the home turn hung out badly. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Raced in worse than midfield 3 to 4 wide. Niggled along to maintain position and carried wider at home turn. Only ran on evenly in straight and slightly weakened inside final 200 M.

Niggled along to race in midfield 3 wide. Approaching the 1000 M was hampered and carried wider without cover. Remain in similar position to straight under pressure 350 M and kept on fairly without threatening the placegetters.
Pushed along to race in midfield 2 wide through to straight. Baulked from top of straight and only able to obtain clear running at 150 M. Made up little ground thereafter.
Raced in better than midfield 3 wide. Went forward to take lead at 1000 M with 3Ls advantage to straight. Found nothing when asked 350 M out and weakened quite quickly inside final 200 M.

Tardy start and soon recovered to race in midfield or worse on rail. Niggled along to maintain position turning for home. All out 300 M out and made up steady ground inside final 250 M but was no match for the 1st pair.
Broke well and niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Cruised to lead shortly after 300 M and ran home strongly when asked 200 M out to win comfortably.
Tardy start and soon raced in rear section 3 wide. Switched to the widest on straightening to find clear running but failed to make any impression in straight.
Began well from wide draw and steadily eased to the rear section on rail through to straight. After the 300 M was checked when crowded for room and stayed one-pace thereafter.
Jumped fairly and pushed along to race in midfield on fence through to straight. Responded well when asked 350 M out but was unable to match speed with winner to settle for 2nd place.
Soon settled in rear section 2 wide through to straight. Shifted to the outside to find running but failed to quicken and stayed one-pace to the line.
2 and 3-wide in rear with cover about 7Ls off pace down back straight, 7-wide (widest of all) into home straight, 1L down in 5th at 200 M, couldn't sustain effort.
Dropped out in rear early at least 8Ls off pace, 5Ls down and still rear entering straight, no impression.
Didn't break well but quickly recovered to hold prominent spot on fence about 2Ls off pace through to home straight, lacked another gear.
Towards inner about 4Ls off pace in midfield at 800 M, 3-wide and 3Ls down in 4th off home turn, every chance when a neck down at 200 M, couldn't contain winner late on.
On fence about 5Ls off pace at 800 M, closer on the swing when 3Ls down in midfield, much too one-paced.
2-wide and no worse than 3Ls off pace in 4th until 800 M, a neck 2nd turning for home, led 300 M out, headed about 100 M out, no extra.
About 5Ls or 6Ls off pace in midfield down the back, 4Ls down off final bend, 2Ls down but looking held at 200 M, one-paced.
3-wide, sometimes without cover, down backstretch in midfield, 3Ls down and 4-wide in home straight, beaten 300 M out.
Slowly away but soon recovered to lead by 2Ls, under pressure and only half a length up entering straight, headed 300 M out and faded.
6Ls off pace down back straight, closer on home turn, never likely to get involved.
Settled towards rear, 7Ls down in 12th at 1000 M, still towards rear and 6-wide into home straight when 4Ls down, staying on in midfield when just over 1L down at 200 M, one-paced close home.
Had cover in midfield about 5Ls off pace early on, found nothing under pressure.
In 2nd place and 2 and 3-wide without cover early on, under pressure to lie up on the circle, dropped out markedly in straight.
Awkwardly away, settled in rear about 8Ls off pace down back straight, 4-wide into straight when 5Ls off pace, picked up well and 1L 3rd at 200 M, hung but led 100 M out, kept on.
Slightly behind midfield despite being niggled in the early stages. Ran on briefly when asked inside 400 M but weakened shortly after.
Midfield early but dropped back steadily shortly after. No response when asked and eased off after final 150 M.
Settled at midfield. Pressured 400 M out and ran on without threatening.
Jumped to an early lead. Headed after 600 M but kept pace with leader. Stayed on well and was just edged out close to home.
Kept within a length of the leaders heading into the final 400 M. Stayed on well for a minor placing.
Behind midfield early and dropped further back after being checked at 800 M. Remained near the rear until running past a few weakening runners in the closing stages.
Slow to jump and stayed 2Ls behind the pace until being pressured 500 M out. Ran on but could not sustain effort inside final 300 M.
Stumbled at the start. Raced mostly near the back until making up some ground in the closing stages.
Better than midfield until 400 M. Made a brief charge when placed under pressure but was swamped in the closing stages.
Behind midfield. Found nothing when asked in the closing stages.
Raced at midfield in the early and middle stages. Ran on well despite hanging out 400 M. Made up some ground in the final stages.
Kept within a length of the lead early. Ridden hard from 500 M without much response. Dropped off slightly at 300 M before regaining momentum in the final stages.
Soon raced in last place. Trailed the field until running past beaten runners in the final stages.
Among leaders in the early stages. Kept no more than a length's advantage from 600 M to 200 M. Hung in closing stages and lost a minor placing.
About 6Ls off pace in 8th place at 800 M, closer entering straight, 3Ls down and on fence at 200 M, nearest at the finish.
Tracked leader in 2nd within 1L of pace until home straight, under pressure 600 M out and dropped out off home turn.
4Ls off pace in midfield through to home straight and same at 200 M, faded close home.
On fence 4Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, 2Ls 3rd entering straight and at 200 M, kept on well without threatening quinella pair.
Slowly away, at least 10Ls off pace in rear down the back, detached and 8Ls down entering straight, no chance.
Soon led, never clear by more than 1L, half a length up off home turn, headed 200 M out, just hung on for 3rd place.
Settled about 8Ls off pace towards rear down the back, 3-wide and 6Ls down into home straight when steadied, 4Ls down at 200 M, kept on, nearest at finish.
Stumbled at start, on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd until home straight, led 200 M out, collared by winner final strides.
About 6Ls off pace in 9th down back straight and had cover, 4-wide and slightly closer entering straight, lacked a turn of foot.
Settled one from rear about 10Ls off the speed until 800 M, 6Ls down and 4-wide into home straight, stayed on well down centre of track and nearest at finish.
3-wide without cover and about 4Ls off pace through to home straight, 3Ls down and 5th at 200 M, no extra.
About 5Ls off pace and 2-wide down back straight in midfield, similar position but steadied entering straight, kept on only fairly.
Always within about 4Ls of pace in 4th but on and off the bridle until home straight when under strong pressure, 2Ls down at 200 M, rallied gamely to lead final strides.
Settled towards rear about 6Ls off pace down back straight before looping field from 600 M out to lead by 3Ls off home turn, ran on strongly.
Raced keenly when 2Ls off pace on fence at 1200 M, 5Ls down off home turn when held up for a run, still 5Ls down at 200 M, couldn't reach gap.
Caught 4-wide without cover in midfield down back straight, 8Ls down and struggling into home straight, faded.
3-wide without cover but within striking distance of lead in 4th until 600 M, 3Ls down off home turn, one-paced.
Settled in rear on fence 6Ls off pace at 1000 M, left 8Ls down and short of room entering straight, short of room again at 100 M, wasn't fully tested.
3-wide in midfield until home straight when under pressure and 6Ls down, never threatened.
In midfield 4Ls off pace at 100 M, 6Ls down in 5th entering straight and under pressure, very one-paced.
2-wide and about 5Ls or 6Ls off pace in rear bunch until 600 M, further behind entering straight, never dangerous.
Soon led, never clear by more than 2Ls , headed 600 M out, faded from top of home straight.
Over-raced at 1200 M when 5Ls off pace, left 7Ls down towards rear entering straight, posed no threat.
5Ls down slightly worse than midfield at 800 M, under pressure and dropping back 8Ls down off home turn, never a factor.
In midfield 4Ls off pace at 800 M, 6Ls down and under pressure on the swing, one-paced thereafter.
About 5Ls or 6Ls off pace in midfield through to home straight, 5Ls down in 5th at the 200 M, stayed on well and nearest at the finish.
Always prominent within 1L of pace in 2nd down the back though tended to carry head awkwardly, 3Ls 2nd off home turn, kept on well but couldn't peg back winner.
About 4th before home turn. Soon beaten on straightening.
Always thereabouts. Kept on closing stages.
At the back halfway. Never on terms.
Made no show.
In rear to straight where he improved a bit from the 250 M. Found no extra.
About 6th rounding home bend. Stayed on well to take 2nd near finish.
In rear to straight where he stayed on to be nearest at finish.
Led after 1400 M and was 2L clear into straight. Unable to hold winner 150 M and dropped out steadily.
Settled in rear to straight. Made up good ground final 250 M.
Never far off to straight where he could make no impression on leaders.
Worse than midfield to home turn. Was denied a run 300 M before running on quite well when clear close home.
Tracked leader into straight where he ran on to lead inside final 150 M. Held on under pressure.
Settled towards rear on inside. Crept closer to 6th early straight. Ran on steadily to take lead passing 100 M. Just held on.
Stumbled at start, behind midfield. Remained 8th until running on a bit in straight.
Held 3rd to straight. Weakened passing 200 M.
Near rear. Steadied for a run early straight. Recovered ground steadily.
Towards rear. Steady progress to midfield far side. Widest final turn. No extra.
Better than midfield. Made no show in straight.
Soon led. Was joined far side. Weakened out of contention from 3rd final turn.
Well there. Came to tackle leader passing 1000 M. Led or disputed for lead far side. Gained upper hand from home turn. Kept on until headed passing 100 M.
Around midfield. Improved a bit rounding home bend to be 4th 400 M. Kept on same pace thereafter.
Slowly away, recovered ground to be better than midfield. 4th from 1300 M. Dropped back steadily in straight.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made some moderate progress 250 M out.
Last to 250 M. Made up significant ground on outside to just miss marginally at finish.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Prominent to straight then gave ground gradually.
Never seen with a chance.
Always prominent. Improved steadily down straight to gain upper hand final 200 M.
Midfield. Commenced run into straight and ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Contested lead early then restrained to position off the pace. Found nothing under pressure turning in.
Led field. Joined early in straight. Dropped out inside final 200 M.
Towards rear to straight. Made up good ground late.
Towards rear to straight. Never nearer.
Well there. Gained narrow advantage early in straight but collared near home.
Vied for early lead from poor draw briefly but soon settled at the back. Made no show thereafter.
Raced wide in prominent position before dropping out coming out of back straight. (Lame.)
Began awkwardly, losing ground. Was 2nd last to home turn. Recovered good ground 250 M to be nearest at finish.
Mainly 3rd. Sustained effort final 200 M to take charge close home.
Led field until headed inside 50 M.
Midfield. Kept on moderately in straight.
Soon last. Not much to give when asked in straight.
Sat outside leader until weakening out of contention inside 200 M.
Always there. Kept on quite well in straight.
Midfield. Was one-paced before weakened close home.
Soon behind midfield. Dropped back passing 400 M.
Better than midfield in 3-wide without cover. 5-wide turning into straight. Soon weakened.
Began awkwardly from widest draw, towards rear. Last and widest turning in. Made up some ground inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Made up a little ground in straight.
Behind midfield when tightened. Remained towards rear into straight. Made moderate late progress closing stages.
Midfield to straight. Pulled out away from runner's heels early on, but only one-paced.
Better than midfield to straight. One-paced under pressure.
Never in contention.
Chased leader to straight then weakened.
Jumped best. Made all to win unchallenged.
Ridden 3-wide down back straight to join 2nd before home bend. Unable to sustain effort over 200 M out.
Towards rear. Faded into straight.
Behind midfield. Awkwardly placed behind runner home bend. Ran on down straight to be nearest at finish.
Never nearer. (See Racing Incidents.)
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without quickening under pressure.
Always in last few.

Began well from widest, niggled along to take lead and crossed to the rail passing the winning post 1st time. 1L up on straightening and kept on well when asked 250 M out but failed to match speed with winner in the closing stages.
Soon raced in prominent position 2 wide through to straight. Found nothing when asked 250 M out and dropped out quickly inside final 200 M.
Raced wide without cover in the early stages in midfield or better. Found cover at back straight. Switched out on straightening but failed to quicken and kept on evenly to the line.
Broke fairly and ridden along to race in prominent position on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 250 M out and just failed to catch the 2nd placegetter.
Broke well and niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail. Hard ridden to maintain position at home bend. No extra in straight and steadily faded inside final 200 M.
