Niggled along to race in midfield 2 wide. Steadily edged forward from the outside turning for home. Responded well when asked 250 M out and took lead inside final 100 M to win readily.
Jumped fairly and raced keenly in the early stages in midfield on fence. Shuffled back to worse than midfield at home bend. Made up little ground in the closing stages when asked 300 M out.
Niggled along to race in worse than midfield on rail. Shuffled back to the rear turning for home. Made no impression in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section 2 wide through to straight. In the early part of the straight was held up, obtained clear running at 200 M and made up little ground in the closing stages.

Soon raced in worse than midfield out wide without cover. Around the 600 M ridden along and made steady headway from the outside to be in better than midfield on straightening. Unable to quicken 250 M out and kept on evenly to the line.

Slow to begin and raced in the rear section on rail. At the 250 M was disappointed for running. Switched wide on straightening to find clear running. Made up little ground inside final 200 M without threatening the placegetters.

Slowly away and raced keenly in the early stages at back 2 wide. Switched out and made little progress at home bend. In the straight hung in and proved difficult to ride out but able to make up some ground to be closest at finish.
Soon in 2nd on fence, 3Ls down at 600 M, 2Ls down off home turn, led 200 M out, headed by winner 100 M out, no extra but held 2nd comfortably.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M, steadied at 700 M, hung out on the circle, 8Ls adrift turning for home, one-paced.
Slowly away, on fence about 9Ls off pace at 800 M, still well behind entering straight, staying on quite well when held up for a run at the 100 M and not ridden out in final stages.
Slowly away, switched to inside rail, always well off the pace and never a factor.
No speed early, 3-wide at 600 M and about 10Ls off the pace towards rear, tended to hang in but stayed on quite well in straight, much too late however.
2-wide and 4Ls down in 3rd at 700 M and off the home turn, all out to be 2Ls 4th at 200 M, no extra.
On fence about 6Ls off pace in 8th at 800 M, 7Ls down in 7th off home turn, stayed on fairly well late on.
Slowly away, 3-wide without cover and 6Ls off pace in about 7th place 800 M out, gained cover on circle, 2-wide and 6Ls down in 5th off home turn, stayed on well to take 3rd close home.
Flatfooted at the jump and lost at least 10Ls immediately, no chance thereafter.
Soon led, flying along 3Ls clear on fence at 600 M, 2Ls clear off home turn, headed at 200 M, faded.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 6Ls off pace at 800 M and entering home straight, 4Ls down and staying on only at the same pace at 200 M and late on.
Settled 3 back on the fence in 4th about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace through to home straight, switched out and went 2Ls 3rd at 200 M, kept on well to lead 100 M out, driven out.
2-wide and just behind the leaders before settling at midfield after 1600 M. Continued to be at midfield but 3-wide in back straight. Caught widest turning in and ran on without threatening.
On fence at midfield. Shifted 2-wide after 1000 M and improved position slightly after 600 M. Unable to pick up when pressured in the straight.
Ridden early and got to the front at 1600 M. Led until headed at 400 M. Reclaimed lead inside final 200 M but could not hold off winner at the line.
Taken back early to race near the rear. Ridden from 500 M out without much progress but closed the race off nicely after seeing daylight in the final 150 M.
Dropped back to settle on fence at midfield after 1600 M. Ridden hard on straightening and began to close in after 200 M to snatch win at the line.
Slowly away. On fence in rear section throughout. Made no impression in the straight. (Bled.)
Led shortly after start before settling behind the leader at 1600 M. Ridden from 400 M out but unable to gain ground until the final 100 M.
3-wide and in rear section in the early and middle stages. Hung out badly and dropped further to last place after 1200 M. Trailed field into home straight and weakened thereafter.
Jumped awkwardly and was soon racing in last place. Raced near the back and made up good ground in the closing stages.
Niggled to be near leaders early. Settled 2-wide and 3Ls behind the pace after 1600 M. Ridden up after 600 M to the lead at 400 M. Headed inside final 200 M and kept on well for a minor placing.
Ridden hard get to the front but was caught very wide at the first turn. Settled 2-wide and a length behind pace after 1400 M. Ridden hard to keep up after 500 M and weakened in the straight.
2-wide behind midfield in the early stages. Improved to midfield but 4-wide after 1000 M and was urged to keep pace 600 M out. Stayed one-paced in the straight.
Caught 4-wide without cover at 1300 M, 3-wide without cover from 900 M out when 4Ls off pace in 6th, 3Ls down 5th entering straight, always too one-paced on run-in.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide without cover and 4Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, gained cover 2-wide and 3Ls down 800 M out, one-paced when still 3Ls down at 200 M, faded.
In 8th place 6Ls off the speed and 2-wide at the 1200 M, 2-wide and 4Ls off speed in 7th entering home straight, ran on quite well in home straight without threatening principals.
2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 4th at 1200 M, on fence about 4Ls off pace from 1000 M to home straight in about 5th place, one-paced and not dangerous thereafter.
Checked when towards rear and 3-wide with cover at 1300 M, 6Ls off pace in 9th or so and 3-wide with cover from 1000 M through to until home straight, made only a little late headway.
Slowly away, on fence towards rear when bumping rails awkwardly 1300 M out, always one from rear about 7Ls or 8Ls off pace thereafter.
Soon led, never clear by more than 2Ls, driven along to stretch further ahead 500 M out, held 1L break at 200 M, kept on gamely under pressure to hang on.
Slowly away, recovered and had the run of the race on fence 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1200 M, same position entering home straight, had every chance to pick off winner but lacked the gears.
2-wide and 2Ls off the speed at 1200 M, always 1L from 1000 M to home straight when travelling well, every chance at 300 M, no extra closing stages.
Slowly away, 2-wide and about 7Ls off pace in 10th 1000 M out, always in rear half of the field and never dangerous.
Very awkwardly away with jockey unbalanced at the jump, hampered at 1400 M, never on terms.
On fence 5Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, worse than midfield but still only about 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed through to home straight, found nothing under pressure.
Lost ground at start, towards rear throughout.
Prominent early, settling better than midfield. 5-wide 6th turning in. Ran on to take 2nd approaching 200 M. Kept on while hanging in.
Towards rear. Soon recovered ground along rail to be just behind midfield. Crept closer to 5th home turn. Kept on quite well to gain 3rd close home.
Towards rear. Recovered ground gradually final 250 M, never nearer.
Led field from 1400 M. With 1L advantage final turn. Found no extra when headed 350 M out.
Midfield. Improved from outside to 2nd 1200 M. Dropped out from final turn.
Behind midfield. Made steady progress in straight to reach 3rd briefly final 100 M. Found no extra close home.
Slowly away, last to 600 M. Switched to the widest turning in. Made ground under pressure final 300 M.
Led briefly from the widest draw, then remained prominent. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Began awkwardly, never a factor.
In touch. Steady progress rounding home bend to be 1L 2nd final turn. Took lead soon after straightening to win unchallenged.
Towards rear. Moderate progress inside 200 M. (Bled.)
Slightly behind midfield. Minor improvement final turn. Failed to quicken in straight.
Better than midfield on inside. Switched to 3-wide on straightening when improved to 4th. Steadied passing 300 M and again near 100 M. Run ended.
Midfield. Baulked for a run early in straight. Ran on final 200 M to do best work at finish.
Niggled along at the back. Made no show.
Never far off. Kept on steadily without threatening.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Given reminders early. Never better than midfield.
Midfield to straight. Quickened well to hit front 200 M out. Hung on gamely to the line.
Never seen with a chance.
Behind midfield. Shifted out for a run early in straight. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Ran to hold some chance 200 M out but failed to sustain progress closing stages.
Well there. Took up running rounding home bend. Unable to sustain effort and overhauled inside 200 M.
Well there to straight then weakened under pressure.
Never in contention. (Heart irregularity.)
Towards rear. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Broke well then raced in forward in midfield. Ran home one-paced.
Led field until joined 650 M. Kicked clear inside 300 M. Won unchallenged.
Slowly away, towards rear. Ran on from 10th on outisde final 200 M.
Never in the hunt.
Soon prominent. Joined the lead 650 M. Was 2nd until fading out of contention 200 M out.
Mainly 3rd to straight. Failed to quicken closing stages.
Midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Rear. Ran past a few tiring horses closing stages. (See Racing Incidents.)
Lost ground at start, soon recovered some ground to be 8th. Remained in similar position until running on well from outside final 200 M to take 2nd closing stages.
Around midfield. Dropped back steadily final 250 M.
Better than midfield. 4-wide turning in. Kept on early straight but found no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. In the last pair rounding home bend. Made up good ground along rail in straight.
Always there. Raced awkwardly rounding home bend. Kept on.
Prominent. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Towards rear. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Always in last few.
Broke well then settled just off the pace. Quickened well to assert authority 200 M out. Won readily.
Raced keenly in midfield far side. Found nothing under pressure in straight.
Slowly away. Always travelling at the back.
Settled in midfield. Keeping on at the same pace when tightened for a stride on the rails passing 200 M.
Disputed lead into the straight. No extra when overhauled final 200 M.
Well there racing wide far side. Took lead coming onto home bend but soon joined into the straight. Swamped passing 200 M.
Mostly in midfield. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Ran wide in midfield. Ran on steadily in straight.
Disputed lead into straight. Soon weakened.
Settled at the back, steadied approaching home bend. Improved well on inner to be nearest at finish.
Slowly away and unable to muster early speed to race at the tail on rail. Switched wide and made up little ground turning for home. Ran past several beaten runners inside final 250 M.

Soon settled in midfield and was caught wide without cover in the early stages. Headway from the outside at home bend to be 1L off leader on straightening. Only ran on evenly when asked 300 M out and steadily faded inside final 200 M.

Began fairly and ridden along to race in midfield or better out wide without cover. Made slight headway at home bend to be 1L off leader on straightening. Kept on fairly in straight but weakened slightly in the closing stages.
Ridden along to race in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Found nothing when asked 350 M out and dropped out quickly inside final 250 M.

Began fairly and soon settled in worse than midfield on fence. Short for room in early part of straight, steadily shifted to the outside to obtain clear running. Made up good ground inside 200 M to be closest at finish.

Pushed along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. After the 1400 M lost its rightful running and checked. Soon recovered and remained in similar position to straight. No extra when asked 350 M out and steadily tailed out.
Jumped well and ridden along to take lead on rail with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Kept on fairly when asked 300 M out, but was headed at 150 M and steadily weakened thereafter.
Niggled along to race in midfield on rail through to straight. Ran on fairly when asked 350 M out but unable to match speed with placegetters over the concluding stages.

Jumped fairly from widest, soon settled in mid-division and steadily crossed to take up rail running. Stayed in similar position through to straight and was 3Ls behind leader at 200 M. Weakened after being bumped at 100 M.

Began well but was unable to muster early speed and raced in midfield 2 wide. At the 1100 M commenced to pull and was checked when closed to heels. Switched out at home bend and made up little ground inside final 200 M.

Broke fairly from wide draw and steadily eased to worse than midfield 2 wide. Switched wide and made little progress at home bend. Made up steady ground when asked 350 M out and tended to hang in. Took charge 150 M out and won well.
Slow to begin and settled in rear section on rail through to straight. Slightly short for room in early part of straight. All out 200 M out and made up steady ground to be closest at finish.

Ridden along and raced in better than midfield 3 wide. At 1100 M edged forward to race 1L off leader 2 wide to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and soon eased to the rear section 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Held up 300 M to 200 M. Made up some ground when clear running was obtained 150 M out and missed 3rd narrowly.
2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, 2Ls 4th entering home straight travelling well, led 250 M out, stayed on well but was grabbed by winner 50 M out.
Best away, worked hard to dispute lead out 2-wide until 1000 M, advanced to be 2Ls clear on fence at 800 M, under pressure off home turn and headed 250 M out, no extra.
On fence 6Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, 2-wide and 4Ls down and still 6th into home straight, 2Ls 4th at 200 M, kept on well to get up close home.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 7th at 1000 M, 3-wide and 3Ls down in 6th off final bend, every chance 200 M out when 1L 3rd, no extra late on.
On fence in 3rd place 2Ls off pace at 1000 M, bit keen at the 800 M, under pressure on straightening when 3Ls 5th, soon beaten.
Awkwardly away, over-raced down back straight, 9Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M on fence, 5Ls down into home straight, ran on past a few beaten rivals.
Slowly away, on fence 8Ls off the speed in 8th at 1000 M, 4Ls down and still in midfield turning for home, 3Ls 6th at 200 M, lacked a change of gear.
2-wide and 13Ls off pace in rear at 1000 M, 3-wide and 7Ls down in rear off final bend, kept on only steadily.
Keen early on, caught 4-wide without cover until the 800 M, 2-wide and 10Ls off pace in 11th at 1000 M, 5Ls 11th turning for home, didn't threaten.
2-wide and 2Ls off the speed in 4th at 1000 M, 3Ls 3rd at 800 M, 2-wide and all out to dispute lead off top of home straight, very weak final 200 M.
Dropped out 11Ls off pace in 12th at 1000 M, 4-wide (widest of all entering straight) and disappointed for running at 350 M, ran on strongly final 200 M, nearest at the finish.
Slowly away, 12Ls off pace in 13th and 2-wide at 1000 M, under pressure when 7Ls down on fence in rear off home turn, no impression.
9Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th place at 1000 M, 6Ls down in 9th entering home straight, hung out 300 M out, kept on fairly, nearest at finish.
Disputed lead on fence until the 1000 M, 2Ls down in 2nd and niggled along at 800 M and on straightening, beaten over 300 M out.
Stayed within 2Ls of pace. Improved position gradually after 600 M. Ridden from 400 M out and took lead inside final 200 M.
In rear section early. Dropped to last place after 600 M and no improvement thereafter.
Settled at midfield. Hard ridden 500 M out and made up some ground despite hanging in badly over the concluding stages.
Kept within 3Ls of the lead until 400 M. Continued well and made up some ground in the final stages.
Slowly away and travelled in last place until 600 M. No response when asked in the closing stages.
Always behind midfield. Failed to quicken when asked in the closing stages.
Settled behind midfield. Ridden from 400 M but was unable to pick up. Remained one-paced to line.
Raced just off the pace until 400 M. Kept on but was unable to find extra to challenge in the closing stages.
Settled behind midfield until being ridden 500 M out. Stayed on only one-pace in the closing stages.
Led until the final 200 M. Stayed on well and hung on for a minor placing.
Settled at midfield until final 400 M. Quickened well when asked in the final stages to be closest at finish.
Travelled in rear section. Made no impression in the closing stages.
Stayed just off pace. Every chance at 300 M but dropped out of contention thereafter.
Stayed within 3Ls of the lead until 600 M. Found no extra when asked at 400 M and dropped out gradually thereafter.
2-wide 4Ls off the pace at 1000 M, 3Ls 3rd at 800 M, 2-wide and 1L 2nd off final bend, led 300 M out, headed at 200 M, no extra through final 200 M.
Crowded at start, 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, 3-wide and 4Ls down in midfield entering straight, short of room at 250 M but always looked well held by principals on run-in.
2-wide and 5Ls off the speed in 8th at 1000 M, a little closer and tightly packed entering straight, stayed on fairly without threatening principals.
Disputed lead out 3-wide without cover until the 1000 M, had a 1L lead at the 700 M and at top of home straight, headed at 300 M, dropped out steadily.
3-wide with cover and 2Ls off pace in 6th at 1000 M, 4-wide into home straight when 2Ls down in 3rd, all out to be half a length down in 3rd at 200 M, faded close home.
9Ls off the speed and 2-wide in 13th at the 1000 M, 4-wide into home straight and one from rear when 5Ls down, staying on well when 3Ls down in midfield at 200 M, couldn't sustain run.
Always rear through to home straight, 9Ls down at 800 M, 7Ls down at 400 M, no impression.
Had a nice spot on fence about 3Ls off pace in midfield down back straight, 2-wide and under pressure and 4Ls down entering straight, posed no threat.
4-wide without cover and 5Ls off pace in 8th at 1000 M, gained cover from 800 M out, 4-wide on straightening when 3Ls down in midfield, weakened through final 200 M.
Disputing lead on fence 1000 M out, 2Ls down in 3rd on fence at 800 M, 2Ls 4th at top of home straight, in midfield squeezed for room at 200 M and again at 100 M, no chance to recover.
Switched inside from wide gate, 7Ls off pace on fence in 10th at 1000 M, 4Ls down on fence entering home straight, never once found a gap, finished hard held, not remotely tested.
7Ls off the pace and 2-wide in 11th at the 1000 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 4Ls down, showed a good turn of foot to lead 200 M out, ran on gamely.
Disputed lead out 2-wide 1000 M out, 1L 2nd at 700 M, unbalanced and hit fence 500 M out, short of room at about 300 M out but was soon beaten anyway.
Slowly away, raced keenly on fence 4Ls off the pace in 7th at 1000 M, hung out 700 M out, held up entering straight, burst through 200 M out when 1L down, couldn't pick up winner.
Slowly away, on fence 10Ls off pace at 1000 M, never got any closer to the lead.
Over-raced down the back straight, 2-wide and 6Ls off the speed in 6th at 1000 M, 8Ls down in 5th entering home straight, always much too one-paced.
Awkwardly away and checked at the jump, 2-wide and 11Ls off the speed at 1000 M, 4-wide (widest of all) entering home straight, kept on quite well down centre of track.
10Ls off pace and 2-wide in 12th at 1000 M, steadied entering home straight when 12Ls down, no chance.
On fence 5Ls off the speed in 5th at 1000 M, hard ridden and 8Ls down entering home straight in midfield, eased from 300 M out.
3-wide without cover and 4Ls off pace in 3rd at 1000 M, under pressure 600 M out, dropped out from top of home straight and eased 150 M out.
On fence 8Ls off the speed in 8th at the 1000 M, slightly worse off entering straight, kept on at same pace on run-in.
3-wide with cover and one from rear 10Ls off the pace at 1000 M, at least 11Ls off the speed turning for home, stayed on best of the main bunch for 3rd place, no chance with quinella pair.
2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 9th at 1000 M, never looked like getting much any closer.
3-wide and 8Ls off the pace in 10th at 1000 M, 10Ls down off home turn in midfield, no impression.
Pressed on to lead by 3Ls at 1000 M, 2Ls clear entering home straight, headed 250 M out, well held by winner but hung on for 2nd comfortably.
Best away, on fence 3Ls off pace in 2nd at 1000 M, niggled along to take closer order at 600 M, 2Ls down at 400 M, led 250 M out, ran on strongly.
2-wide and 4Ls off the speed in 4th at 1000 M, 5Ls down in 4th at 800 M, under pressure when 7Ls 3rd entering home straight, dropped away steadily.
Awkwardly away, 3-wide with cover and 6Ls off pace in 7th at 1000 M, left without cover at 800 M, 8Ls 6th entering straight, kept on only fairly, no chance with quinella pair.
Midfield rounding home bend. Kept on but didn't find much room passing 200 M.
About 6th halfway. Made no show on straightening.
In touch to straight where he failed to get a clear run to the 200 M. Kept on close home.
At back to straight where he ran on well to hold every chance close home.
Soon ridden towards leaders and was behind midfield home turn. Stayed on steadily when steadied 150 M.
Took up running from 1200 M. Was headed 200 M and dropped out steadily.
Never a factor.
Well there into straight where he gained slender lead passing 200 M. Unable to hold first two near finish.
About midfield turning into straight where he dropped out quickly.
Broke down 1100 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Prominent to straight. Was beaten when steadied passing 200 M.
Never far off to straight. Kept on without quite reaching leaders.
Well there before dropping to worse than midfield home bend. Ran on strongly final 200 M.
Trailed field to straight. Came with strong run down centre of track to snatch victory final strides.
Checked soon after start, never in contention.
Prominent. Dropped back steadily from 3rd 600 M out. (Finished mildly distressed.)
Towards rear. Ridden along to be in midfield 800 M. Weakened steadily from home bend.
Better than midfield from widest draw. 3-wide turning in. Failed to quicken.
In touch early, soon dropped back to 9th. Recovered moderate ground soon after straightening.
Soon in touch. Improved to 3rd 600 M out. Sustained effort in straight to take control inside 100 M. Held on.
Slowly away, towards rear throughout.
Towards rear. Improved gradually to be 4th 800 M. Was crowded on inside 700 M. Kept on until finding no extra closing stages.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily final 250 M, never nearer.
Tardy start, last early. Recovered ground on inside to be 5th home bend. Ran on steadily to claim 3rd close home.
Led. Held 2Ls advantage early straight. Found no extra when headed inside 100 M.
Pushed along to be 2nd 800 M out. Still 2Ls behind lead final turn. Kept on.
Never seen with a chance.
Chased leaders to straight. Giving ground under pressure when checked 200 M out.
In similar position throughout. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Jumped best. Held narrow advantage to 200 M then swamped.
Mostly in midfield. Improved well down straight without threatening.
Soon dropped to tail-end halfway out.
Disputed lead to straight and weakened.
Raced keenly in rear of midfield. One-paced under pressure in straight.
Well back. Improving when forced to steady inside 200 M. Kept on well to the line.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily in straight to be nearest at finish.
Quickend recovered to forward of midfield after sluggish start. Quickened well under pressure to assert authority inside 200 M.
Always there. Kept on but failed to threaten the placegetters.
Jumped well, led field to 850 M. Remained in touch before dropping back steadily near 600 M.
Slowly away, towards rear. Recovered ground from 650 M to reach 6th final turn. Ran on well to take 2nd close home.
Slowly away from widest draw, last to 200 M. Ran past a few beaten horses closing stages.
Well there. Joined the lead rounding home bend. Was 2nd soon after straightening, then always held 1/2L by the winner. Lost 2nd close home.
Pushed along to be better than midfield. Lost some ground when hung out 700 M and steadied passing 600 M. Ran on a bit from 9th early straight.
Towards rear on inside. Crept closer final turn. Ran on steadily final 200 M.
Around midfield throughout.
Behind midfield. Lost a little ground home bend. Never recovered.
Tardy start, near rear throughout.
In touch. Ridden along to take advantage 850 M out. Joint lead rounding home bend, gaining upper hand near 250 M. Held on.
In touch. 3Ls 3rd turning in. Dropped out final 200 M.
Always at the back.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Rear of midfield. Produced some late impression final 200 M.
Tracked leaders. Quickened well to take charge inside 200 M.
Midfield to home bend. Weakened into straight.
In similar position throughout. Kept on same pace closing stages.
Rear early. Made steady headway around home bend to be 4th turning in but unable to sustain effort in straight.
Never in contention.
Never better than midfield.
Midfield to straight. Dropped out.
Forward of midfield. Made some late impression closing stages.
Held up on midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Attempted to make all, but swamped inside final 200 M.
Disputed lead to straight. Weakened.

Niggled along to race in a forward position wide without cover in the early stages. At the 1100 M shifted in to race outside leader to straight. Stayed one-paced when asked out and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
Began well and raced in mid-division around 3-wide. Hard ridden at home turn to maintain position. No extra in straight and only able to run on evenly to the line.
Jumped fairly and soon raced in midfield or better on rail through to straight. Only able to run on evenly when asked 300 M out and weakened inside final 200 M.

Niggled along to behind midfield on rail. Made little headway at home bend. Shifted 4-wide in straight to find clear running. Under pressure 400 M out and made up good ground inside final 200 M to win convincingly.

Jumped awkwardly and rider became unbalanced. Recovered to race in worse than midfield 3-wide. Switched wide and made progress at home turn. Ran on well in straight but failed to match speed with winner in the final stages.
Pushed along to race in prominent position 2-wide. Switched out and ridden along to maintain position turning for home. Unable to quicken in straight and kept on evenly to the line.

Broke well from wide draw and was soon taken to the tail 2-wide through to straight. Responded fairly when asked 250 M out but ran out of room at 200 M. Switched out to obtain running at 100 M and made up little ground thereafter.
Unable to muster early speed and raced in worse than midfield 2-wide. Under pressure at home bend to hold position. Unable to sustain effort in straight and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Began awkwardly and soon recovered to race in midfield or better on fence. Headway at home turn to be 1L off leader on straightening. Responded briefly when asked 350 M out to match 3rd place near the line.
Broke fairly and niggled along to lead narrowly on rail through to straight. Found nothing when asked 350 M out and dropped out quickly inside final 200 M.
Slowly away and raced at back on rail through to straight. Made no impression in home straight.

Began fairly and niggled along to race in prominent position on rail through to straight. Took charge at around 300 M. but was unable to sustain effort inside final 100 M and was soon overhauled by the placegetters.

Slow to begin and ridden along to race in rear section 2 to 3-wide. Switched wide at home turn. Under pressure 350 M out but took a while to click into gear, made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Began well and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2-wide. Ridden along to hold position for home. All out 300 M out but only able to run on evenly and weakened slightly inside final 200 M.
Had the run of the race about 3Ls off pace from 1200 M to 600 M out, in 2nd 2Ls off pace and driven along entering straight, all out to lead 250 M out, headed 100 M out, no extra.
10Ls off pace and 2-wide in 10th place 1100 M out, keen at the 800 M, 8Ls down in 9th place towards inner entering straight, made up some late ground but never likely to threaten.
Missed the start and lost about 4Ls, had cover out 3-wide 12Ls off pace in rear at 1100 M, left without cover at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight when 8Ls down, never dangerous.
Soon led, disputed lead out 2-wide at 1200 M, 1L clear again at 800 M and 2Ls to the good off home turn, all out when collared passing 250 M, faded.
Caught 3-wide without cover 10Ls off pace in 11th about 1100 M out, raced and 3 and 4-wide without cover down back straight, 8Ls down entering straight, never able to challenge.
2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 7th 1100 M out, left 3-wide without cover from 1000 M out, 2-wide and about 5Ls off the speed entering home straight, weakened.
Held up on fence 12Ls off the pace in 12th 1100 M out, still in rear and 10Ls down and 4-wide entering home straight, ran on fairly but had too much ground to make up.
2-wide 9Ls off the speed in 8th at 1100 M, on and off the bridle down back straight, 8Ls down at 800 M, driven along when 6Ls down in midfield into stretch, no impression.
4Ls off pace in 5th at 1200 M, 3Ls 5th entering home straight, 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, finished one-paced but hung on for 3rd okay.
Dropped out one from rear 2-wide about 12Ls at 1200 M, still towards rear and 9Ls off the speed turning for home, moderate late headway.
Settled about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace when 2-wide in 4th down back straight, niggled along to take closer order on circle, 3-wide into straight, 1L down in 2nd at 200 M, led 100 M out, driven out.
On fence 7Ls off the speed in 6th 1100 M out, about 6Ls down in midfield entering home straight, found very little off the bit.
10Ls off the speed in 9th 1100 M out and no better off entering home straight, never a factor.
Disputed lead out 2-wide at 1200 M, under pressure to hold this prominent position at 800 M, 2Ls 3rd and fading entering home straight, soon eased down.
Jumped awkwardly and soon raced on fence in rear section. Only managed to run past a weakening runner in the straight.
Soon led and maintained a sizeable lead until straightening. Weakened quickly after 300 M.
Settled 3-wide in rear section. Widest turning in and was one-paced in the straight.
Settled 2-wide at midfield. Responded strongly when asked at 300 M and surged to the lead to take control inside final 150 M.
Settled 2-wide in a forward position until straightening. Kept on well and led briefly near 200 M but failed to withhold winner's challenge in the closing stages.
Ridden early to move into a forward position. Niggled to close in on leader after 600 M and led briefly near 300 M. Faded thereafter.
Slowly away and dropped to race in last place after 1100 M. Only ran past a few beaten runners in the straight.
2-wide behind midfield. Urged to improve after 600 M. Quickened only fairly in the straight.
Settled 2-wide in rear section until being niggled to improve after 600 M. Switched out on straightening and rallied strongly to make up good ground in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly from widest draw and raced near the back. Failed to respond when ridden near 500 M and made no impression in the straight.
Settled on fence behind midfield until straightening. Quickened well when ridden hard inside 300 M and made up some late ground.
Settled on fence at midfield. Quickened under pressure but had some difficulties finding a clear run final 200 M. Close the race off fairly thereafter for a minor placing.
Raced in a prominent position. Urged to improve near 600 M. Kept on well in the early part of the straight but could not sustain effort in the closing stages.
Positioned 3-wide and better than midfield until 500 M. Ridden from 3-wide to improve rounding home turn. Kept on steadily to line.
Slowly away, on fence 7Ls off pace in 9th at 1200 M, always niggled along, under strong pressure entering straight when 4-wide and 4Ls down in 7th, still 4Ls down at 200 M, one-paced.
2-wide and 2Ls off the speed in 4th from 1200 M to home straight, a little over 2Ls down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on only fairly for 2nd.
Slowest away, on fence 12Ls off pace in rear 1200 M out, 8Ls down and one from rear entering straight, no impression.
Caught very deep (5-wide) at first bend 1400 M, 3-wide without cover when 4Ls off pace in 6th 1200 M out, had cover from 1000 M out, 2Ls down entering straight, no acceleration.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 8th at 1200 M, advanced out 4-wide without cover to be 1L 3rd 800 M out, led by half a length out 3-wide into home straight, 2Ls clear at 200 M, stayed on well.
Slowly away, 2-wide and 12Ls off the pace in 12th at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 10th at 800 M and entering home straight when 4-wide, found very little under pressure.
Soon led on fence, disputing lead at 1200 M and at 800 M, 1L 3rd on fence and under pressure entering home straight, dropped out quickly.
2-wide and 4Ls off the speed in 7th at 1200 M, 3Ls down at 800 M and entering straight in 7th, staying on reasonably when 2.5Ls 4th at 200 M, couldn't sustain the run through final 200 M.
Had the run of the race in 5th place on fence 2Ls off the speed, 3Ls down in 5th entering straight, very one-paced thereafter.
Disputed lead out 2-wide at 1200 M, 1L 2nd and ridden along entering home straight, dropped out rapidly.
Hard ridden when 11Ls off pace in 11th on fence 1200 M out, 8Ls down in rear entering straight, stayed on past a few tired ones late in the piece.
Never dangerous, 9Ls off pace in 10th and 2-wide at 1200 M, 6Ls down in 11th at 800 M, 5Ls down into home straight, lacked any change of gear.
On fence 4Ls off the speed in 5th at 1200 M, losing position and under strong pressure entering straight, faded out.
Rear from widest draw. Was 9th 300 M. Responded well under pressure to be nearest at finish.
Slightly behind midfield. Checked passing 600 M. Widest turning in. Ran on well to grab lead near finish.
Led breifly early, settled 3rd on inside. Effort 400 M to take lead early straight. Found no extra when headed 100 M.
Led field to 400 M out. Faded soon after straightening.
Mainly 5th to back straight. Within 3Ls at 4th passing 800 M. Made no show in straight.
2nd last to final turn. Steadied on straightening. Made up good ground to gain 3rd closing stages.
Prominent. 2nd from 1300 M. Ridden along passing 600 M to take brief lead home bend. Kept on from 2nd 400 M until weakened 200 M.
Midfield or slightly behind. Severely checked passing 600 M. Was impeded again final turn. Never recovered.
Mainly 9th to final turn. Found little when asked early straight.
Always at the back.
2-wide 4th and within 4Ls behind lead to 1000 M. Dropped a bit to 5th or 6th far side. Ran on in straight to take lead 100 M. Just beaten narrowly final strides.
Tardy start, behind midfield. Soon recovered some ground to be 6th 1400 M. Further improved to 3rd home turn. Failed to hold place when one-paced final 200 M.
Led till joined into straight. Kept on for 2nd.
Towards rear. Improved to midfield into straight. One-paced.
Forward of midfield to straight. Dropped out. (Bled.)
Prominent into straight. One-paced under pressure.
Always thereabouts. Kept on same pace without quickening.
Never nearer.
Settled behind midfield. Shifted out for a run upon straightening. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Never in contention.
Prominent briefly. Mostly in midfield to home bend then weakened.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Tracked leader. Came to challenge upon straightening. Gained upper hand closing stages.
Never better than midfield.
Led field to 800 M. Remained 2nd before joining the lead home bend. Found no extra when beaten 250 M.
Towards rear throughout.
Midfield. Ran on well from 6th early straight but unable to threaten the winner.
Behind midfield. Made no show in straight.
Behind midfield. Failed to quicken in straight.
Tardy start, soon last.
Ridden along to take lead 800 M. Was joined rounding home bend. Took advantage soon after straightening. Held on.
Began awkwardly, 2nd last to 200 M. Ran past a few tiring horses closing stages.
Midfield. Improved to 4th 600 M. Kept on well final 300 M. Hung in 100 M and failed to ride out close home.
Never a factor.
Soon 3rd. Raced awkwardly passing 800 M, losing ground. Midfield rounding home bend, one-paced.
In touch. One-paced inside 200 M.
Attempted to make all, but overhauled final 100 M.
Well back to straight. Ran past beaten horses down centre of track.
Rear into straight. Made up some late ground.
Around midfield most of way. Kept on steadily in straight.
Always well there. Fought on under pressure but unable to peg back winner closing stages.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Well back. Ran past beaten horses in straight.
Better than midfield to straight then weakened.
Settled in midfield. Quickened into straight to take charge close to home.
Towards rear throughout.
Prominent to straight. Weakened.
Midfield. Ran on steadily under pressure without threatening.

Soon settled in midfield around 3 wide without cover. Made slight headway turning for home to be 1L off lead on straightening. Unable to sustain effort in straight and further weakened inside final 100 M.
Soon raced at the tail on rail. Ridden along and switched to the widest turning for home. Made no impression in straight.
Slow to begin and soon eased to the rear section on rail. Switched wide on straightening to obtain clear running. Unable to quicken when asked 200 M out and stayed one-pace to the line.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield on rail. For some distance after the 600 M was awkwardly placed. Unable to quicken when asked 250 M out and kept on evenly to the line.

Jumped fairly and ridden along to race in midfield or better 2 wide. Under pressure at 400 M to hold position but only able to run on evenly in straight and was steadied near the line when crowded for room.

Began well and niggled along to take lead on rail with no more than 1L advantage through to straight. Kept on gamely when asked 300 M out and just failed to fend off the challenge from winner to be overhauled on the line.

Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section in the early stages. At 1200 M went forward from the outside to be in midfield at back straight. Ran on fairly in straight and was crowded for room in the closing stages.
Jumped fairly and niggled along to race 1-1/2Ls off leader on rail through to straight. Ran on well when asked 300 M out to overhaul the 2nd placegetter in a ding dong finish.

Slowly away and was checked passing the winning post 1st time when crowded for room. Soon recovered to race in midfield or worse on rail through to straight. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 250 M out.

Slow to begin and soon raced in rear section 2 wide. At 600 M edged forward from the outside to be in midfield on straightening. Made up good ground when asked 300 M out and missed the 1st pair by a narrow margin.
Tardy start and raced in midfield or worse 2 to 3 wide through to straight. Kept on same pace to the line when asked 250 M out.

Jumped fairly from widest and raced keenly in prominent position 2 wide through to straight. No extra when asked 250 M out and weakened quickly inside final 150 M. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
Outpaced, niggled and detached passing winning post for 1st time, not much better off turning for home when 10Ls off pace, never a factor.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 8Ls off pace in 10th at 1200 M, caught 4-wide without cover 700 M out, well off the pace and 3-wide entering home straight, hadn't much of a chance.
3-wide without cover and 8Ls off pace in 11th at 1200 M, 6Ls off pace in 8th and still without cover 800 M out, posed no threat to principals through final 500 M.
On fence 7Ls off the speed in 9th 1200 M out, 9Ls down and 2-wide turning for home, no danger.
Caught 3-wide without cover at 1300 M, went 2-wide and 2Ls down in 4th place 1100 M out, under pressure and 3Ls down in 4th and 3-wide into stretch, was quite one-paced in latter stages.
7Ls off the speed in 7th and on fence 1100 M out, taken back slightly 500 M out and 8Ls down entering straight, made a little late ground.
Unbalanced at start and saddle shifted under jockey, disputed lead out 2-wide at 100 M out, dropped away very rapidly from Rock, tailed off.
Awkwardly away, 6Ls off pace and in 6th and 2-wide 1100 M out, 5Ls down and 2-wide at 800 M, hindered 600 M out and 8Ls down into stretch, lacked a change of gear.
Had the run of the race on fence in 2nd or 3rd from 1200 M through to home straight, hung in when about to grab to lead just over 200 M out, finished 1st placed 2nd after inquiry and objection.
4Ls off the pace on fence in 6th 1100 M out, 3Ls 3rd on fence into straight, squeezed for room at 250 M, switched out wider and ran on strongly, finished 2nd, placed 1st after inquiry and objection.
2-wide and 4Ls off the speed in 5th at 1100 M, met with interference at 600 M, 4Ls down in 5th on fence on the swing, 3Ls down in 5th at 200 M, ran on well through final stages.
Soon led on fence, disputing lead at 1100 M, left 2Ls clear at 600 M, headed just over 200 M out, just managed to hang on for 3rd place.
Towards the rear. Ridden to keep up at 700 M but was still last to enter home straight. Hampered by a fallen runner shortly after straightening and made no impression thereafter.
Ridden early to race alongside the lead from 1000 M to 400 M. Unable to pick up when asked and remained on same pace to finish.
Jumped quickly and settled within 3Ls of the pace until straightening. Went over a fallen runner shortly after straightening, was badly hampered and eased down.
Quickest out and led into home straight. Held a 3Ls advantage at 200 M but was powerless when the top pair closed in. Just missed 2nd place.
Niggled to race just behind midfield in the early stages. Improved slightly in the back straight. Steadied and shifted out to find running inside final 300 M and closed the race off well.
Ridden hard from wide draw to race with the leaders in the early stages. Niggled continuously to keep pace behind the leaders until straightening. One-paced thereafter.
Unable to muster early speed and raced near the rear and 3-wide until straightening. Responded well and made up good ground in the straight.

Began well from wide draw and was taken back to race 3-wide in a rearward position. Urged forward 700 M out and made ground rounding home turn. Quickened well on straightening but unable to match winner's pace final 200 M.

Jumped well and soon settled on fence midfield. Began to drift back after 600 M despite being nudged and was near the back on straightening. Soon hampered by a faller and ran past some beaten runners closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly. Remained in a rearward position 2-wide in the back straight. Ridden from 400 M out and was 4-wide turning in. Surged past the field in the straight to claim victory inside 100 M.
Midfield and caught wide into first turn. Wide without cover in the back straight and moved forward to be behind the leaders after 800 M. 3-wide turning in and couldn't find extra after 300 M.
Kept on fence and within 2Ls of the lead. Hung out rounding home turn and then on straightening clipped heels and fell.
No speed early, 2-wide and 8Ls off pace sharing rear 800 M out, 8Ls down and clearly last entering straight, no impression.
1L off pace in 3rd at 800 M, 3Ls down from 600 M to 350 M when very tight and awkwardly placed and held on fence, couldn't regain any momentum.
Away well and either disputed lead or raced prominently with 2Ls off pace in 2nd through to home straight, picked up well to lead 200 M out, comfortably, smart debut.
Awkwardly away, showed good speed while racing 3-wide without cover to be 2Ls 3rd at 600 M, 2Ls 3rd into home straight and just 1L down at 200 M, no extra final stages, good debut.
Best away and pressed on from wide gate, led out 2-wide at 700 M and led by 2Ls on fence 500 M out, headed by winner at the 200 M, just hung for runners-up berth.
Always about 4Ls or 5Ls off pace and slightly worse than midfield, always looked held.
Never better than 5Ls or 6Ls off the speed towards rear, never troubled leaders.
2-wide and 3Ls off pace in midfield early on, 3-wide into straight when 4Ls down in 5th, tended to hang in under pressure, made some good late ground.
Always in midfield about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace on fence or at most 2-wide through to home striaght, failed to pick up and never threatened leaders.
Raced ungenerously in the main, very keen with his head up, awkward on the circle, and left in rear shortly after final bend.
Always 2-wide and within 3Ls of pace through to home straight when 4th, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, no chance with winner and lost a place final strides.
Had cover when 3-wide and 3Ls off pace in 8th place 700 M out, 4-wide (widest of all) into home straight when about 4Ls down in midfield, ran on quite well closing stages.
Driven from gates, soon over-racing when 4Ls off pace in 5th at 1000 M, under pressure to lie up when 4Ls down in 5th entering straight, dropped away.
Settled about 3Ls off the speed in about 4th or 5th through to home straight, picked up well to lead about 100 M out, driven out.
Caught 3 and 4-wide without cover early on when worse than midfield, 5-wide (widest of all) into straight when 5Ls down in midfield, one-paced.
Always about 2-wide and 5Ls off the speed until being held up for a run 500 M out, 4-wide into stretch, ran on very strongly closing stages to nick 2nd place final stride.
Caught 3 and 4-wide without cover early on towards rear, got in 2-wide and 6Ls off pace in 10th at 500 M, switched inside towards stand's rail 300 M, ran on well, nearest at finish.
Never looked comfortable, always in rear couple at least 5Ls or 6Ls off the pace, tended to hang in also.
Detached and driven 1000 M out, 10Ls rear at 800 M and 8Ls down off home turn when 4-wide into straight, 6Ls down 200 M out, flew through final stages, just missed a place.
Stumbled at start, on fence about 6Ls off the speed in 9th through to home straight, ran on well and nearest at finish.
Best away, disputed lead on fence from 900 M out, narrow 2nd from 600 M, disputing lead again but vulnerable at 200 M, headed 100 M out and no extra, clipped heels and fell after line.
Head up and was checked at 1000 M, 2-wide and 5Ls off pace in 5th at 800 M and into home straight, always looked well held.
Always 2Ls or 3Ls off pace in 3rd and at least 2-wide until the 600 M when he tended to hang in, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, stuck to his task gamely late on.
Disputed lead out 2-wide from 900 M out, narrow lead at 600 M, disputing lead again but vulnerable at 200 M, headed 100 M out and no extra.
Worse than midfield halfway and made no show after.
Slow into stride. Never on terms despite making some headway in straight.
About 5th approaching home turn. Kept on without threatening closing stages.
Took up running before the Rock and led field till finding no extra 200 M.
Never troubled leaders.
Midfield rounding home bend. Kept on well under pressure in straight.
In rear to straight where he made up some late progress.
Prominent to straight where he held every chance 200 M. Found one-paced near finish.
Close up before losing some ground approaching hoem bend. Midfield into straight where he ran on strongly to just fail to get up on line.
Was 4th 600 M before running on well to lead inside final 200 M. Just held on to retain advantage.
Prominent to home bend. Unable quicken to challenge in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Jumped well and led early until 850 M. Kept on for 2nd thereafter but failed to threaten the winner.
Towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield. Dropped back steadily in straight.
Checked soon after start, near rear. Made up a little ground from 300 M until finding no extra closing stages.
Midfield or slightly behind. Was 3Ls 6th turning in. No clear run inside 200 M and failed to ride out closing stages.
Slightly better than midfield. Found no extra final 200 M.
Always thereabout. Kept on same pace in straight.
Within 1-1/2L 3rd to final turn. Responded well when given reminders early straight. Took lead 200 M and never threatened.
Slowly away, never a factor.
Towards rear. Found no clear run when improving 300 M. Recovered good ground when in clear.
Began awkwardly, last to straight. Made up some ground from outside inside 150 M.
Prominent. Led field from 850 M. Headed 200 M. Just kept on for a 3rd.
Made all to win easily.
Raced behind leaders. Steadied for a stride around Rock. Faded gradually in straight.
In similar position throughout. One-paced in straight.
Never better than midfield.
Jumped best. Held up outside leader. Hung on for placing without threatening.
Towards rear. Made some moderate progress under pressure in straight.
Always in last few.
Always thereabouts. Shifted out for a run upon straightening but kept on only at the same pace under pressure.
Always at the back.
Never seen with a chance.
Towards rear. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Settled in midfield. Ran on steadily down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield on inside. Made progress to 3rd on straightening. Held up near 200 M. Kept on when in clear closing stages.
Towards rear. Broke down on straightening.
Towards rear throughout. (Lame.)
Pushed along from a wide draw to take lead early stages. With 1L advantage final turn, found no extra when headed 200 M.
Prominent. 2Ls 4th on inside far side. Ran on in straight to take lead 200 M. Unable to resist winner's challenges when headed inside 100 M.
Towards rear. Mainly 10th to final turn. Crept closer to 5th turning in. Responded well to take lead inside 100 M. Held on.
Began awkwardly, towards rear early. Recovered ground gradually to be 3rd near 900 M. Held on but was hanging out 600 M. Faded 400 M.
Midfield. Switched to widest final turn. Made up a little ground soon after straightening but failed to respond inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Steadied on straightening. Kept on early straight but was one-paced closing stages.
Mainly 5th to straight. Kept on.
Soon 2nd. Weakened out of contention 400 M out.
Slightly slowly away, last to final turn. Made ground steadily in straight, steadied for a run 100 M out.
In similar position throughout.
Jumped slowly then raced at the back. Made up good late ground closing stages.
Held up to race outside leader to 400 M, then weakened.
Midfield to straight. No clear run early on. One-paced closing stages.
Made all. Hung on well to win readily.
Forward of midfield. Obtained clear passage over 200 M out and ran on steadily to grab 2nd late.
Midfield early, dropping to back of field coming into stable bend. Produced moderate late headway in straight.
Always well there. Fought on under pressure but lost placing late.
Behind midfield. Found no room whatsoever early in straight. No further impression.
Forward of midfield. One-paced in straight. Tightened on rails and lost position when beaten inside 200 M.
Wide in midfield then ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Always in last few.
Soon eased to rear section 2-wide. Switched out and ridden along to go forward turning for home. Kept on one-paced in straight and only ran past several beaten runners inside final 150 M.
Niggled along to race in midfield or better out wide without cover. Commenced to give ground after the 800 M and tailed out in straight.
Soon eased to the rear section on rail. Switched to the outside and made steady progress at home bend. Made up little ground in straight to be closest at finish.
Ridden along to race 1L off leader 2-wide. Commenced to give ground shortly after the 600 M. Dropped out in straight.

Broke fairly and raced in midfield on rail and hung in in the back straight. Under pressure at 700 M and made up steady ground to be 1L off leader on straightening. Was held up in straight and was not properly tested.
Slow to begin and raced at the tail on rail. Ridden along from 600 M and switched out on straightening but failed to quicken in straight and kept on one pace to the line.

Jumped fairly and soon settled in worse than midfield 2-wide. At 600 M went forward from the outside to be 1L off leader on straightening. Responded fairly when asked 300 M out but was no match with winner in the final 100 M.
Slowly away and pushed along to race in midfield 2-wide. Shortly after the 600 M was checked when disappointed for running. Unable to quicken in straight and stayed one-paced to the line.
Jumped well and raced in better than midfield on rail. Under pressure at home bend to maintain position shortly after straightening was checked when crowded for room and steadily faded thereafter.
Ridden along to take up running on rail with no more than 1-1/2L advantage through to straight. Only able to run on evenly when asked 300 M out and was overhauled by 3rd placegetter near the line.

Began well and soon eased to worse than midfield on rail. Made little headway going up the Rock to be in midfield on straightening. Switched 4-wide in straight and ran on well when asked 300 M out to win convincingly.

Ridden along in better than midfield 2-wide and raced keenly early. Ridden along at home bend to hold position and was crowded shortly after straightening. Kept on fairly when asked 300 M out to grab 3rd near finish.
Towards inner 7Ls off pace in 9th 1100 M out, still towards rear but travelling well when held up for a run 400 M out, turned in 6-wide, picked up very well to lead 50 M out, ran on well.
Soon led on fence, led by about 1L through to home straight, a neck to the good at 200 M and just about joined 150 M out, just about hung on for 3rd.
Had a nice run on fence about 2Ls off the speed in 4th or 5th through to home straight, one-paced thereafter.
Bit slowly away, 2-wide and 8Ls off speed in 10th 1100 M out, 5Ls down and taking closer order out 5-wide off final bend, ran on well and narrowly missed a place.
Slowly away, on fence 9Ls behind lead and one from rear at 1100 M, 5Ls down on fence but still in rear off home turn, couldn't find clear running and not fully extended late on.
Raced 2 and 3-wide with cover until 700 M when 4Ls or 5Ls off speed in midfield, checked at 600 M, 4-wide into home straight, always held despite making some decent late headway.
Caught 3-wide without cover 2Ls off pace in 3rd at 1100 M, hard ridden to lie up and crowded when 3-wide into home straight, faded.
3-wide but had cover 4Ls off pace in 6th at 1100M, niggled along to keep up 700 M out, 4-wide into straight and all out when 3Ls down in 5th, checked when beaten 200 M out.
Always in 2nd place, 2-wide and 1L off speed from 1200 M out to home straight, a neck down at 200 M, no extra closing stages, winner had too many gears.
Never travelled well, slowly away, keen early on when 2Ls off pace in 4th 1200 M out, about 3Ls or 4Ls off pace in 5th or 6th down back straight, beat a hasty retreat from 500 M out.
Switched from wide gate to fence and 10Ls down in rear 1200 M out, still rear but only 7Ls down and 2-wide 700 M out, 7-wide (widest of all) entering straight, no impression.
On fence 5Ls off the speed in 7th 1100 M out, 4Ls down in midfield at 800 M, crowded at 600 M, 4Ls down entering straight in midfield, one-paced. (Bled.)

Raced in a forward position before settling behind the lead near 1200 M. Continued to race on fence and 2 to 3Ls behind the pace in the back straight. Did not pick up on straightening and ran on without threatening.
Best out and raced within a length of the lead until 1000 M. Disputed lead thereafter until straightening. Kept a length's lead before headed by winner inside final 200 M. Just held on for 2nd place.
Slowly away and settled at the rear. Ridden hard near 400 M and shifted out on straightening. Charged home strongly to be closest at finish.

2-wide behind midfield in the early stages. Hampered near 1200 M. Remained in rear section in back straight. Ridden hard on straightening and was steadied 250 M. Continued to make steady ground thereafter.

Raced 2-wide and 2Ls behind the lead in the early stages. Checked after 1200 M and continued to race within 2Ls of the leaders until straightening. Continued well early in the straight but was disappointed for running 250 M. One-paced.
Slowly away and then settled in a rearward position. Quickened to midfield after 400 M and was turned out for a clear run on straightening. Ran on strongly to claim win inside final 200 M.
Taken back to race near the rear in the early stages. Hampered near 1000 M and raced 3-wide in rear section in the back straight. Staged a late rally to be closest at finish.
4-wide at midfield in the early stages. Hampered 1200 M and continued to race wide and without cover in a forward position. Commenced to drop back after 700 M and never recovered thereafter.
Raced in the lead after 1400 M. Headed 400 M out but remained in contention. Weakened in the final 200 M.

3-wide behind midfield heading into first turn and was severely checked at 1200 M. Improved to 2-wide midfield in the back straight. Responded well on straightening and every chance 200 M out. Unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Caught 3-wide entering first turn and was hampered 1200 M out. Improved to a disputed lead after 1000 M before settling just behind pace. Ran on before tiring inside final 200 M.
On fence midfield in the early stages. Ended up travelling 3-wide at midfield in the back straight after being severely checked at 1200 M and being hampered 1000 M. Found nothing on straightening.
Towards rear. Lack of galloping room near 300 M. Ran on quite well when in clear 200 M out. Grabbed 3rd close home.
Midfield early. Ridden along outside from 1000 M to reach 2nd or 3rd home bend. Kept on until weakening steadily inside 250 M.
Towards rear. Made progress from 800 M to be better than midfield 600 M out. Kept on until finding no extra 300 M.
Midfield from widest draw. Made progress passing 1100 M to be 2nd 800 M. Held on until weakened badly inside 300 M.
Prominent early, dropped back to 5th passing 1000 M. Held up early straight and 200 M out, failed to ride out.
Checked soon after start, remained 2nd last to final turn. Found no clear run early straight before making up some ground when in clear final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped back in straightening. Eased down closing stages.
Raced 5th on inside. Gave a little ground to 7th rounding home bend. Kept on same pace in straight.
Prominent. 2Ls 2nd early straight. Faded 200 M out.
Led, with 1-1/2Ls advantage early straight. Held on until finding no extra when headed 100 M out.
Midfield. Raced 9th rounding home bend. Switched 5-wide final turn. Ran on steadily to assert authority 100 M out.
Slightly slowly away, last to 300 M. Responded well under pressure to make up good ground on outside.
Towards rear. Made up good ground in straight to take 2nd passing 150 M. Failed to threaten the winner closing stages.
Rear to straight. Kept on steadily without quickening.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Settled behind midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish despite tight between runners throughout straight.
Well there. Kept on before finding no extra final 200 M.
Joint leader most of way to 400 M then weakened under pressure.
Soon took up running and crossed to rails coming onto stables bend. Then steadied to share pace far side. Still holding some 1L advantage over 200 M out but unable to sustain effort near finish.
Settled in forward of midfield. Ran on steadily to gain upper hand inside 200 M.
Well there to straight then weakened. Beaten when hampered 200 M out. (Lame.)
Wide behind midfield. Ran on to be nearest at finish.
Held up in midfield. Tightened on rails 400 M out. Produced good late impression closing stages.
Forward of midfield to straight. Kept on before fading final 200 M.
Midfield or worse. Ran on steadily in straight before finding no extra close to home.
Never in contention. (Bled.)
Settled at the back. Found no room in straight until too late inside final 200 M.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield. Maintained similar position and was 2-wide final turn. Made up good ground on outside 200 M out.
Settled better than midfield on inside. Stayed on until finding no extra 200 M out.
Towards rear. Found no clear run when trying to improve near 300 M. Ran on well final 250 M when clear.
Around midfield. Stayed on same pace throughout.
Mainly 4th and 3-wide without cover. Stayed on early straight but weakened badly final 250 M.
Settled in 11th within 10Ls behind lead. Made ground soon after straightening. Responded well when under pressure 250 M to take lead closing stages.
Rear. Widest into straight. Recovered some ground inside final 300 M.
Near rear. Recovered some ground on outside from 1000 M to be 9th rounding home bend. Faded in straight.
Mainly 5th before dropping back a bit to midfield final turn. Weakened 200 M out.
Remained 8th on inside to final turn. Switched 4 wide turning in. Ran on well to take lead approaching 200 M. Failed to withhold winner's challenges closing stages.
Led field to 400 M. Dropped back rapidly. (Finished distressed.)
Mainly 3rd and within 2Ls of lead on rail. Stayed on well in straight but unable quicken to challenge.
Slowly away and then shifted to inside near rear to straight. Stayed on quite well final 200 M.
Was 2-wide 2nd and no more than 2Ls behind leader. Came to tackle leader final turn, taking lead from 400 M to 200 M. Kept on but was impeded 100 M out.
Chased leader to straight. Dropped out.
Attempted to make all. Outsprinted closing stages.
Towards rear. Hampered and lost position coming out of back straight. Did not find much room at the back after home turn. Kept on closing stages.
Raced keenly in prominent position far side. Not much room and shifted out for a run early in straight, but only kept on steadily under pressure.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily without threatening first two.
Never better than midfield.
Refused to settle and raced awkwardly far side and around home bend, dropping to last into straight. (Significant amount of blood in trachea.)
Jumped fairly then settled at the back. Made good progress down inner of straight.
Midfield throughout. Kept on same pace.
Prominent to straight. Dropped out.
Not far off to straight, then faded gradually.
Raced in forward of midfield. Quickened well in straight to assert authority over 100 M out.
Towards rear most of way. Kept on in straight.
Well back. Made up some late ground in straight.
Broke best and soon settled around 1L off leader. Pushed along to improve position at 400 M, powered home inside final 200 M to win convincingly. (Lost its left front plate.)
Began fairly and niggled along to race around 4Ls off leader on widest. All out 300 M out and made good impression inside final 200 M to grab 3rd place near the line.
Shortly after the start was checked when crowded for room. Soon recovered to race 2-1/2Ls off leader. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and stayed one-pace to the line.
Jumped fairly and raced in midfield. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and steadily weakened inside final 300 M.
Broke fairly and raced in mid-division. Only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 400 M out.
Raced in midfield or better. Kept on fairly when asked 400 M out but weakened quickly inside final 200 M.
Began well and settled in rearward position with cover. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground without threatening the placegetters.
Raced around 1-1/2Ls off leader. Made no impression when asked 400 M out.
Jumped fairly and soon took charge with no more than 1-1/2L advantage. Responded well when asked 400 M out, but was unable to match speed with winner inside final 150 M.
Raced in midfield or better. Under pressure at 500 M to maintain position but continue to give ground and steadily tailed out inside final 300 M.
Slow to begin and raced 3Ls off leader. Responded fairly when asked 350 M out but failed to fend off late challenge from 3rd placegetter in the closing stages.
Ridden along to race around 5Ls off leader. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Slow to begin and was unable to muster early speed to race at the tail. Kept niggling along to keep in touch. Made up little ground inside final 200 M when asked 400 M out.
Niggled along to race in midfield or worse. Ridden along from 500 M to maintain position. Kept on one-pace to the finish.
In 10th place 8Ls off the speed at the 900 M, 5Ls off the pace and 4-wide into home straight in 11th place, 3Ls down in midfield 200 M out, no extra close home.
6Ls off pace and 2-wide in 9th at 1000 M, had cover out 3-wide when 4Ls off speed 800 M, checked when 3-wide entering straight, 3Ls down staying on at 200 M, one-paced close home.
Disputed lead out 2-wide with GREAT DELIGHT, tended to hang out from 700 M out, faded out rapidly from top of home straight.
Hard ridden to race prominently from the gates, 2-wide and 2Ls off the pace in 5th 900 M out, under severe pressure to hold this spot over 700 M out, beaten well before home turn.
Knuckled start, 2-wide and 4Ls off pace in 8th 1000 M out, travelled well and 3-wide into straight in 7th and 3Ls down, picked up well to lead 300 M out, over 1L clear at 200 M, ran on strongly.
Settled in rear about 10Ls off pace down back straight, 5-wide (widest of all) into stretch when 5Ls off the speed and three from rear, all out to be 4Ls down in midfield at 200 M, faded.
Prominent early on and had the run of the race in 5th 2Ls off the speed from 900 M to home straight when holding every chance, didn't pick up and beaten over 200 M out.
Disputed lead on fence with OUR CLASS through to home straight, found nothing under pressure, faded right out at the 300 M.
8Ls off pace in 11th and 2-wide at 800 M, had cover out 3-wide at 600 M, 4-wide into straight when 3Ls off pace in midfield, every chance of being placed at 200 M, faded in final 100 M.
Slowest away, switched from wide gate towards fence, 8Ls off pace in 12th at 800 M, crept to 4Ls down in midfield entering straight, clear run at 300 M, ran on well for a place.
Prominent but caught 4-wide without cover early on, 3-wide without cover from 800 M to home straight when 1L off pace in 3rd, found little under pressure, beaten at 200 M.
On fence 4Ls off speed in 7th at 800 M, 2Ls down in 5th and going well when 2Ls off pace entering straight, every chance 300 M out when 0.5L 2nd, no chance with winner.
Awkwardly away, had cover out 3-wide 3Ls off pace in 6th at the 800 M, closer but under pressure turning for home, beaten when steadied 300 M out, weakened badly.
Never on terms, one from rear and 3-wide with cover 8Ls off pace 800 M out, 6Ls last off home turn, always well outpaced.
Best out and was in disputed lead until settling 1 to 2Ls behind the pace after 1200 M. Caught wide without cover rounding home turn. Led briefly inside final 200 M but was headed inside 100 M.
Severely checked at 1500 M and ended up racing on fence behind midfield. Found nothing more on straightening.
On fence and always within 2Ls of the lead. Improved to the lead just before straightening but did not pick up pace when challenge at 400 M and was swamped inside final 200 M.
Slow to jump and raced near the back. Commenced to make ground 600 M out. Improved steadily in the straight.
3-wide and in rear section early. Dropped to last place 600 M and only ran past a few weakening runners in the straight.
Taken back to race in last place. Ridden 700 M out and improved to a position behind midfield rounding home turn. Continued to make ground in the straight but unable to catch winner.
Slowly away and niggled along in rear section early. Improved to midfield after 800 M and got within 2Ls of the lead on straightening. Couldn't keep up after 300 M and weakened in the closing stages.
Jumped awkwardly and raced on fence near the back. Urged from 600 M out. Ran on fairly in the straight.
Settled 3-wide midfield in the early stages. Closed to within a length of the pace at 600 M and got to the lead shortly after straightening. Kept on well but was headed final 200 M.
2-wide midfield until straightening. Quickened well inside 300 M but unable to draw closer to winner in the closing stages.
Slow to jump and was niggled along in midfield. Caught wide rounding home turn. Found nothing when pressured on straightening.
Settled behind midfield. Commenced to drop back at 800 M and was eased down after 600 M.
Travelled in a prominent position. Responded well when ridden inside 400 M and gain steady ground on leader before taking over inside final 100 M.
Led after 1400 M. Hung out rounding home turn and weakened on straightening.

Settled 2-wide and 7Ls off pace in 8th 1600 m out, 6Ls down in 8th 800 M out, travelled well 4Ls down in 7th and 3-wide off home turn, showed wicked acceleration to lead 200 M out, pushed out, impressive.
2-wide and 5Ls off the speed in 6th 1600 M out, 4Ls 6th at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight when 3Ls down in 6th, always outpaced from then on.
Soon led on fence, never clear by more than 1L at any stage, headed by SELF FLIT off home turn, dropped out.
9Ls off the speed on fence in 10th 1600 M out, 8Ls down at 800 M, 5Ls down in 9th entering home straight, 3Ls down and staying on in 5th at 200 M, kept on well.
Raced prominently 2-wide and between 2Ls 3Ls off the speed in 4th from 1600 M to 800 M out, 1L down in 3rd entering home straight, took brief lead at 300 M, headed again 200 M out, kept on.
Held up in rear at least 13Ls off the speed at the mile pole, 8Ls last entering straight, made a little late headway.
12Ls off speed in 12th 1600 M out, bit keen out 2-wide 1200 M out, eased along fence to be 8Ls down at 1000 M, 3Ls 6th when bumped by FALBRAV into stretch, 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, stayed on well.
8Ls off the speed and 2-wide in 9th 1600 M out, under pressure at the 800 M marker when 3-wide with cover, 4-wide into home straight and one-paced when 8Ls down and one from rear, no chance.
Never dangerous, dropped out 10Ls off pace and 2-wide a mile out, 9Ls down with 700 M to race, 7Ls down in 7th off final bend, no impression.
Did very well to sit 2Ls off pace on fence in 3rd at the 1600 M marker despite wide draw, still 2Ls down in 4th at 800 M and 400 M out, lacked any kind of acceleration.
Raced 3-wide without cover 1600 M out when 4Ls off the pace in 5th, still no cover when 2Ls 3rd at 800 M, 4Ls down and giving ground off home turn, slipped further back.
Settled one from rear about 12Ls off the speed 1600 M out when 2-wide, niggled along 800 M out when 10Ls down, could only get within 6Ls of the speed off home turn, faded out.
5Ls off the speed and on fence in 7th 1600 M out, 4Ls 7th at 800 M, 2Ls down off home turn and 3Ls down at 200 M, no extra.
Settled in 2nd place 1L off pace and 2-wide from over 1600 M out, a neck 2nd at 800 M and sent on to lead at top of home straight, headed at about 300 M but stayed on fairly for some prize money.
Slowest away, 2-wide 11Ls off pace in rear 1200 M out, bit keen, 9Ls rear at 800 M, 5Ls down on fence into stretch, 4Ls down 250 M out, switched right, ran on very strongly, nearest finish.
Awkwardly away, on fence 10Ls off the speed in 11th 1100 M out, 8Ls down at 800 M, 4Ls down on inner in 7th off home turn, didn't find clear running and wasn't fully extended from 300 M.
On fence 2Ls off the speed in 5th 1200 M out, 3Ls down at 800 M, 2Ls down in 3rd at top of straight, half a length 2nd with every chance at 200 M, squeezed for room and not ridden fully final 50 M.
8Ls off pace and 2-wide in 7th 1100 M out, 6Ls down in 7th at 800 M, 4-wide into home straight when 3Ls off pace, quickened well to lead briefly at 200 M, ran on well, lost on bob of heads.
2-wide and 2Ls off the speed in 4th 1200 M out, sent on out 3-wide without cover from 800 M when 2Ls 3rd to dispute lead out 3-wide turning for home, swamped 200 M out and one-paced.
Caught 3-wide without cover 10Ls off the speed in 10th 1100 M from home, 6Ls down in 8th and no cover at 800 M, 5Ls down towards rear entering straight, ran on okay without threatening.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd at 1200 M, 2Ls off pace in 3rd on fence at 800 M and at top of home straight, 1L down in 4th at 200 M, drove through gamely to lead on line.
Broke well, led by 1L on fence 1200 M out, a neck to the good 800 M out and at top of home straight, headed 250 M out, faded.
Prominent early on, 2-wide and 4Ls off the pace in 6th at 800 M, niggled along to keep up 700 M out, outpaced from top of home straight.
Didn't break well, always rear and detached entering straight, never a factor.
9Ls off pace on fence in 8th at 1100 M, 7Ls down at 800 M, 3Ls down in 5th at top of stretch, short of room from 300 M and wasn't fully tested.
9Ls off pace and 2-wide in 9th 1100 M out, 6Ls down 800 M out, 4Ls down and 2-wide in midfield into straight, ran on well through final 300 M and nearest at the finish.
Caught 3-wide without cover 1L off pace in 3rd 1200 M out, a neck off pace out 2-wide at 800 M, travelled well disputing lead entering home straight, headed 200 M out, ran on gamely, just missed.
3-wide with cover in rear 11Ls off pace towards rear at 1200 M, 8Ls down at 800 M, 5-wide into straight when 5Ls down and one from rear, ran on at same pace.
Was 4th 1000 M and 5th before home turn. Unable quicken to challenge and faded close home.
Worse than midfield to straight. Kept on well despite not reaching leaders.
Towards rear till making up some ground in straight.
Midfield to straight. Kept on without quickening closing stages.
Made rapid progress from rear 1200 M to be 2nd 800 M. Unable to hold place 250 M out.
Towards rear till running on a bit final 200 M.
Led field before headed passing 200 M. Found no extra.
Well there to straight where he was steadied 250 M. Soon beaten.
Midfield home bend. Ran on well to lead close home.
Never a factor though making up some late headway.
Well there to straight where he kept on same pace.
6th halfway and similar place on straightening. Ran on to lead passing 200 M but unable to hold winner close home.
9th into home bend. Stayed on to be nearest at the finish.
Last into straight where he made up considerable ground. Doing best work at the finish.
Mainly 3rd or 4th to straight. Responded well on inside final 150 M to score narrowly near finish.
Jumped well and was prominent briefly, soon dropped back to the rear group. Only made very minor improvement in straight.
Towards rear. Minor progress rounding home bend. Widest into straight. Made no show.
Led early before racing 1/2L inside leader through to straight. Kept on very well to just miss marginally close home.
Better than midfield. Hampered 300 M while weakening.
Mainly 3rd or 4th. Kept on until one-paced close home.
Midfield on inside. Switched out to race 3-wide early straight. One-paced.
Behind midfield. No response when whipped 200 M.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Crept closer turning in. Kept on well to just miss a minor placing.
Slightly slowly away, soon last. Ran past a few beaten horses final 200 M.
Soon 2nd last. Ran on quite well 300 M to be nearest at finish.
Ridden along early to take lead 950 M out. Maintained advantage until headed inside final 50 M.
Settled in midfield. Ran on stoutly down straight to assert authority close to home.
Broke well and led to 200 M. No extra.
Better than midfield to straight. Weakened.
Never seen with a chance.
Settled in striking distance. Quickened to hit front upon straightening but collared near finish.
Midfield. Ran on under pressure between runners to narrowly miss the placegetters.
Never in contention.
Towards rear. Shifted in early in straight but still no clear run. Kept on to the line.
Prominent. Not much room early in straight before giving ground gradually.
Rear. Hampered and lost momentum early in straight. Soon renewed effort and made up some late ground.
Well there. Fought on under pressure down straight but unable to sustain effort closing stages.
Towards rear. Finished off race well down centre of straight.
Last to 200 M. Failed to find clear run closing stages.
Led. With 1-1/2L advantage 300 M. Found no extra when headed 150 M.
Towards rear. Ran on a bit on outside closing stages.
Ridden along to be 3rd soon after start. Kept on steadily to reach lead 150 M out. Just got up in a ding-dong battle closing stages.
Began awkwardly, towards rear throughout. Failed to ride out when no clear run inside 100 M.
Raced 5th from widest draw. Dropped back steadily rounding home bend. Dropped out 200 M.
Settled 7th. Made ground steadily 250 M. Found no clear run and unable to ride out final 50 M.
Settled 4th on inside. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Mostly 3rd on the rail within 1L behind lead. Ran on in straight to be just beaten in a ding-dong battle final 150 M.
Began awkwardly, towards rear. Made up significant ground on outside to be 4th 400 M. Widest (5-wide) turning in. Stayed on.
Mainly 6th and 4Ls behind lead to straight. Failed to quicken when under pressure 200 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped back a bit towards rear from 800 M. Made up some ground 250 M out but found no clear run inside 100 M.
Midfield to straight. Ran on well to grab lead close to home.
Midfield. Kept on steadily without quickening in straight.
Slow out. Never better than midfield.
Chased leaders throughout. Kept on same pace without quickening in straight.
Never seen with a chance.
Towards rear. Made up some late ground closing stages.
Well there to straight. Weakened.
Ridden in forward of midfield. Dropped out gradually rounding home bend.
Midfield into straight. Ran on well.
Nearly made all. Only caught near finish.
Well back to straight. Ran on down inner to be nearest at finish.
Never far off. Overhauled for placing final stages.
Jumped fairly and soon raced in better than midfield on rail. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running ran on well in straight to win comfortably.
Broke well and raced in a forward position on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 300 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Began fairly from widest and niggled along to take lead. Took rail running near the 1200 M mark and ran away from the pack at back straight. Headed shortly after the 200 M mark and became one-paced thereafter.
Soon raced in worse than midfield on rail and rounding the home turn got shuffled back to rear position. Kept on one-paced in straight and ran past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Niggled along to race in better than midfield 2-wide. Ridden along at home bend to maintain position. Unable to quicken in straight and steadily faded inside final 250 M.

Slow to begin and soon settled in midfield or worse 2 to 3 wide. Switched wide and improved position turning for home. Responded fairly when asked 300 M out but never threatened the 1st pair to settle for 3rd place.
Jumped very awkwardly and raced at the tail on rail through to straight. Unable to make any impression when asked 250 M out.

Began fairly and raced in midfield on rail. Was awkwardly placed on heels 1000 M. Switched out and made little progress at home turn. All out 200 M out and responded fairly but was never in position to trouble the winner.
