Raced in mid-division 2-wide in the early stages. After the 1100 M was steadied and shifted to 3-wide to avoid heels. Carried wide and commenced to give ground at home bend. Made no impression in the straight.

Tardy start and soon raced in rear position around 2-wide. Switched out and made little headway turning for home. Under pressure 300 M out and made little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.

Broke well and raced in better than midfield 2-wide in the early stages. At 1100 M was shuffled back to midfield. Ridden along and switched wide turning for home. No extra in straight and dropped out quickly inside final 200 M.
Unable to muster early speed and raced in midfield or worse 2-wide through to straight. Made up little ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Caught 3-wide without cover early but gained cover 2-wide and 5Ls off speed in 6th at 1100 M, 3-wide into home straight when 4Ls down in 5th, staying on when just over 1L 3rd at 200 M, no extra.
2-wide about 7Ls off pace in 7th or 8th from 1100 M to 600 M, 3-wide and 4Ls down in 7th into straight, staying on well over 2Ls down 4th at 200 M, kept on strongly to lead 50 M, ran on.
Awkwardly away, 9Ls off the speed in 9th 1100 M out, niggled along to take closer order 700 M out, 6Ls down entering straight when 4-wide, made no impression.
Dropped far too off pace, 12Ls down in rear 1100 M out, about 10Ls down and one from rear entering straight, made some late headway past a few tired horses.
On fence 5Ls off the speed in 5th at 1100 M, about 3Ls down in 6th entering straight, always too one-paced to trouble principals.
Settled in 2nd place about 2Ls off the pace on fence from 1200 M to home straight, led 200 M out, headed about 100 M out, no extra.
On fence 10Ls off the speed in 11th 1100 M out, still 10Ls down and driven along out 3-wide without cover at 600 M, 5-wide (widest of all) into straight, ran on very strongly, nearest finish.
Awkwardly away, 4Ls off pace on fence in 3rd from 1000 M to 600 M, under 3Ls 3rd and going well entering straight, 2Ls down at 200 M, upsides leader 100 M out, winner a shade too strong.
Settled on fence 7Ls off pace in 7th 1100 M out, 4Ls down in about 8th place off home turn, ran on fairly without threatening.
2-wide and 4Ls off the speed in 4th 1100 M out and at 600 M, 3Ls down but under pressure entering straight, folded tamely.
Never travelled, 9Ls down and 2-wide in 10th at 1100 M, 3-wide without cover from 1000 M to 700 M out when driven along, all out when 10Ls down in rear entering straight, no chance.
Soon led on fence, always about 2Ls clear from 1200 M to home straight, headed 200 M out, faded.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield. Urged to improve 600 M and was one-paced on straightening.
On fence and raced within a length inside the leader until straightening. Weakened thereafter.
Ridden hard from wide draw to be leading in 2-wide position. Continued to lead until headed by winner last 50 M. Just beaten out for 2nd place.
Raced 3-wide in rear section until straightening. Made up some ground in the closing stages.
Raced prominently. Quickened well on straightening and got into a disputed lead at 200 M. Unable to withhold the winner last 50 M.
Fastest out but held back to race in last place. Trailed field into home straight and improved nicely along the inside to be closest at finish.
Jumped well and urged to a forward position. Raced just off pace after 1000 M. Unable to pick up after 300 M.
Slowly away. Niggled along 2-wide midfield. Every chance final 300 M but could not sustain effort in the closing stages.
Ridden hard but only managed to race behind midfield. Wide without cover throughout and tailed out in the straight.
Jumped awkwardly and raced along the fence in rear section. Picked up well in the straight and sprinted to the lead final 50 M.
Settled 2-wide near the back. Made up some ground in the closing stages.
Settled on fence behind midfield. Made ground rounding home turn and shifted out on straightening. Kept on well to line.
On fence 4Ls or 5Ls off pace in 4th or 5th from 1100 M to home straight, 2Ls down in 3rd 200 M out, had every chance staying on well along fence but couldn't reel in the winner.
4Ls behind lead and 2-wide in 5th at 1100 M, still 4Ls down but in 4th entering straight out 3-wide, was rather one-paced thereafter.
Raced keenly 1100 M out when 2Ls off pace in 3rd, bumped through to dispute lead out 2-wide from 1000 M to home straight, led by 1L from 300 M to 200 M, headed 150 M out and faded.
Soon led on fence, 1L clear 1100 M out, disputed lead from 1000 M to home straight, dropped out rapidly.
8Ls off speed in 8th and 2-wide at 1100 M, 3-wide into stretch when 6Ls off the speed in the midfield, 4Ls down at 200 M when steadied, ran on strongly close home.
Always towards rear, 2-wide and 10Ls down in 11th 1000 M out, 8Ls down and 4-wide (widest of all) off final bend, no impression.
Disputed lead out 2-wide from 1200 M to 1000 M when bumped 3-wide without cover, dropped back to 2Ls off pace on fence at 800 M, 3Ls 3rd entering straight, led 150 M out, ran on well.
On fence 6Ls off the speed in 7th 1100 M out, 6Ls down at the 800 M and soon niggled along to take closer order, 4Ls down in midfield at 200 M, short of room closing stages and wasn't ridden out.
Bounded at start, 10Ls off pace on fence in 10th when clipping heels and nearly coming down 1100 M out, still 10Ls down at off home turn, ran on pretty well, nearest at finish.
2-wide and 6Ls off the speed in 6th 1100 M out and at 600 M, 5Ls down and 3-wide into home straight in 6th, ran on fairly well, nearest at finish.
On fence 8Ls behind the leader in 9th 1100 M out, 8Ls down at 800 M and entering straight when still 9th, ran on quite well late on, never nearer, hung in slightly final 50 M.
Never there, 12Ls down in rear 1100 M out when checked, still 10Ls adrift at 600 M, never on terms.
Began awkwardly, near rear throughout.
Behind midfield. Kept on without quickening in straight.
Towards rear. Widest in 12th final turn. No significant progress.
Well there. Took lead from 1200 M to 1000 M. Remained 2nd until failing to hold place final 250 M.
Behind midfield. Dropped back 400 M.
Soon towards rear. Lacked of daylight early straight. Made up good ground when in clear, just missed a minor placing.
Jumped well and led early. Was 2nd from 1200 M before regaining advantage passing 1000 M. Kept on well but failed to resist winner's challenges inside 100 M.
In touch early. Dropped back a bit from 1200 M to be midfield 1000 M. Sustained effort final 400 M to take command inside 100 M.
In touch. Improved to 3rd 900 M out. Kept on well in straight.
Lost ground at start, towards rear. Made up a little ground final 200 M.
Never rear. Ridden along to soon be in midfield. Weakened steadily in straight.
Towards rear. Made up some ground from 13th on straightening.
Midfield or better. Weakened inside 200 M.
Prominent. 2Ls 4th final turn. Kept on without quickening 300 M out.
Close up. Fought on under pressure without threatening first two.
Soon in rear.
Midfield most of way. Kept on steadily without quickening closing stages.
Always well there, sharing pace early on. Kept on but narrowly missed the placegetters.
Settled in midfield. Ran on well under pressure final 200 M to just fail to get up on line.
Midfield to halfway. Dropped out.
Led or disputed lead. Unable to sustain effort when shifted out gradually closing stages.
Never far off. Improving under pressure when carried inward closing stages. Asserted authority final strides.
Midfield or behind. Ran home one-paced.
Never in contention.
Forward of midfield most of way. Kept on same pace.
Midfield most of way. Kept on well closing stages.
Well back. Ran on past beaten runners closing stages.
Well there to 250 M then weakened.
Towards rear. Ran on steadily final 300 M.
Behind midfield. Crept a bit closer on straightening. One-paced thereafter.
Towards rear. Recovered some ground 200 M out.
In touch. Moved up to 2nd 1100 M. Faded out of contention 300 M out.
Towards rear throughout.
Better than midfield on inside. Ran on steadily from 5th early straight to gain upper hand near finish.
Soon midfield or better. Found not much room near 300 M. Ran on when in clear until one-paced closing stages.
Midfield. 5-wide final turn. Kept on until weakened closing stages.
Slightly behind midfield. Made no show in straight. (Lame.)
Mainly 12th. Made up good ground 250 M out.
Soon last. Tailed off in straight.
In touch. Ran on well in straight, however effort not sustained.
Always prominent. Took lead 200 M to 100 M. Kept on for 2nd.
Led. Weakened out of contention when headed 200 M out.
Raced keenly in prominent position, some 3 or 4-wide. Weakened gradually after straightening.
Broke well. Settled just off the pace. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M. Won readily.
Behind leaders racing keenly early. Steadied for a run upon straightening. Fought on steadily despite finding not much room throughout home straight.
Never better than midfield. Kept on one pace closing stages.
Better than midfield to straight then weakened under pressure.
Raced keenly and wide in midfield far side. Remained same into straight but soon gave ground.
Settled in rear. Ran on well down centre of straight to be nearest at finish.
Forward of midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish.
Never seen with a chance.
Missed the break badly. Remained in rear before making up some ground final stages.
Led field to 250 M, no extra.
Settled just behind midfield. Ran on well down inner of straight to be nearest at finish.
Midfield. Ran on steadily without threatening.
Began fairly from widest and soon eased to a rearward position around 3 wide. Switched out on straightening to obtain clear running but only able to run on evenly to the line when asked 350 M out.

Slow to begin and checked shortly after the start. Raced keenly in better than midfield 3 wide in the early stages. Took lead at 1000 M and remained there to straight. One-pace in straight and further weakened final 200 M.

Unable to muster early speed and raced in worse than midfield on rail. Was short for room in the early part of the home straight. Made up steady ground when clear running was obtained at 200 M to be closest at finish.
Began well and niggled along to race in better than midfield 2 wide. Edged closer to the leader at home turn. Ran on well when asked 300 M out but was never in position to trouble the winner.

Jumped awkwardly and soon recovered to race in mid-division 2 wide. Switched to the outside and hard ridden to maintain position at home bend. One-paced in straight and weakened quickly inside final 200 M.
Began fairly and niggled along to race in a forward position on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and kept on one-pace to the line.
Broke well and soon raced in prominent position 2 wide. Went forward to join leader turning for home. Responded well when asked 400 M out and cruised home to win convincingly.
Jumped well and steadily eased to midfield 2 wide. Switched out and edged forward at home bend. Kept on same pace when asked 350 M out and further weakened in the closing stages.
Soon settled in worse than midfield 2 wide. Switched out and made steady progress turning for home. Under pressure 300 M out and made up some ground inside final 200 M to be closest at finish.
Jumped well and ridden along to race in better than midfield on rail through to straight. Took a while to click into gear when asked 350 M out, did make up some late ground inside final 150 M.
Unable to muster early speed and raced in the rear section 2 wide through to straight. Made no impression in home straight.
On jumping bounded in the air and raced in the rear section on rail. Under pressure and switched to the widest on straightening. Made no impression in straight.
Began fairly and raced in midfield on rail through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 350 M out and steadily weakened inside final 200 M.
Sent on to lead on fence by 1L at the 1600 M, still 1L to the good off home turn, soon headed and dropped out tamely.
4Ls off pace and 2-wide in 7th 1400 M out and similarly placed at the 800 M, 3-wide and 3Ls down in midfield off final bend, outpaced.
Settled in 4th 3Ls off pace on fence 1500 M out, 2-wide and 3Ls down in 5th at 800 M and entering home straight, 1L down in 5th at 200 M, kept on quite well but always outpaced by principals.
Keen early on, 2-wide and 8Ls off the speed in 12th 1200 M out, one from rear and 7Ls off the pace at 800 M, driven along 6-wide into straight when 3Ls down in midfield, faded out quickly.

Crowded at start, 10Ls off pace in rear 1600 M out, 2 and 3-wide down the back with cover, 8Ls down 800 M out, 7-wide (widest of all) into stretch when 5Ls last, picked up well to lead at 200 M, driven out.
3-wide without cover in 8th 1400 M out when 4Ls off the lead, 3Ls off pace in 6th 800 M out and 4-wide without cover at 600 M, still wide and 2Ls down in 4th into straight, beaten over 300 M out.
3-wide but had cover 6Ls off the speed in 11th 1400 M out and at 800 M, 5-wide into home straight when about 3Ls down in about 9th place, made no impression and beaten 200 M out.
Awkward break, very wide (5-wide) on first bend, sent on to 3Ls off pace in 5th out 2-wide 1500 M out, prominent but 3-wide without cover until stretch when 1L down in 3rd, one-paced thereafter.
3 and 4-wide without cover down the back, in 13th and 8Ls off pace 1200 M out, still towards rear and 6-wide 4Ls down into straight, picked up well and 1L down in 3rd at 200 M, kept on well.
2-wide and 1L off pace in 2nd from 1600 M through to home straight, led 300 M out, headed at 200 M out, no extra final 100 M.
On fence 6Ls down in 10th 1400 M out, held up for a run off home turn when 4Ls down and 2-wide in 12th, clear at 300 M when 3Ls down, ran on well but had too tough a task to catch the winner.
In 9th place 6Ls off the speed out 2-wide at 1400 M and at 800 M, in rear about 5Ls down off final bend when 3-wide, found nothing off the bit.
4Ls off the pace on fence in 6th at 1400 M and roughly at the same spot at 800 M and turning for home, never threatened staying on at the same pace along the fence through final stages.
Led early on fence, dropped back to have the run of the race 2Ls off the pace in 3rd at 1600 M, 2Ls down on fence in 4th entering home straight, very one-paced on run-in.
Jumped awkwardly and urged along to stay in midfield. Under heavy pressure at halfway mark but did not pick up pace until final 200 M. Closed the race off well.
Jumped awkwardly. Pushed along but still remained behind midfield. Not much improvement in the closing stages.
Settled in rear section until being pressured at halfway mark. Close the race off strongly for a minor placing.
Raced better than midfield. Quickened when pressured in the closing stages but unable to draw closer to winner.
Slowly away and settled in last place. Responded only fairly when asked in the closing stages.
Raced just off the pace. Found nothing when asked at 400 M. Weakened closing stages.
Niggled along to keep within 2Ls of the leader. Under pressure 300 M, assumed lead inside final 200 M and cruised home for victory.
Jumped well and was pressured into the lead. Remained the leader until headed inside final 200 M.
Behind midfield. Pressured 600 M out but no improvement. One-paced to line.
Began well and stayed within 2Ls of the pace. Unable to quicken when asked at 400 M and was one-paced to line.
Slowly away but niggled to race within a length of the lead. Every chance at 250 M but unable to sustain effort in the final stages.
Caught 3-wide without cover in 5th place 1000 M out when about 4Ls off the speed, similarly placed but under strong pressure entering straight, faded out.
pressed on from wide gate to be 2-wide and about half a length off the pace from 1000 M to home straight when holding every chance, one-paced and swamped 200 M out, dropped out.

Didn't break well, 2-wide and 5Ls off the pace in 9th 800 M out, 3-wide and 4Ls down in 11th and held up for a run off final bend, clear at 300 M and 1L down in 6th at 200 M, kept on well to lead 50 M out.
Never on terms, on fence 8Ls off the speed 800 M out, 4-wide into home straight when one from rear and 6Ls off the pace, no impression.
2-wide and 4Ls off the pace in 6th 1000 M out, driven along entering straight when 3-wide and 3Ls off the pace in 6th, very one-paced.
On fence 5Ls off the pace in 10th 800 M out, 2-wide and 5Ls down in 12th entering home straight, kept on at the one-pace.
Settled about 7Ls off the pace in 12th and 2-wide down the back straight, closer but 5-wide in midfield turning for home, good pace to just about lead 200 M out, grabbed by winner 50 M out, no extra.
Had the run of the race in 4th 2Ls off the speed on fence from 1200 M out to home straight, couldn't accelerate with principals and always held.
Always prominent, 2-wide and 3Ls off the pace in 4th at 800 M, 3-wide and 1L down in 3rd into home straight, disputing lead and every chance 300 M out, no extra through final stages.

Caught 3-wide without cover at 1200 M and 1L off pace in 3rd position, 3-wide without cover in 5th when 3Ls off the speed at 800 M, soon in trouble, detached entering straight, tailed off. (Significant amount of mucus in trachea.)
2-wide and 6Ls off the pace in 11th 800 M out, 3-wide off home turn in midfield when 4Ls down, picked up well to dispute lead 250 M out, ran on well but was narrowly held by quinella pair.
Led on fence 1100 M out, led by about half a length through to home straight, headed about 250 M out, faded.

2 and 3-wide with cover down back straight and was one from rear 8Ls off the speed 800 M out, 4-wide without cover 700 M out, and 6-wide (widest of all) turning for home, 1L down in 7th at 200 M, no extra. (See Racing Incidents.)
On fence 4Ls off the pace in 7th at 1000 M and similarly placed turning for home, always outpaced by principals in home straight and hung out under pressure.
Slowly away, checked at 1600 M, 2-wide and 8Ls behind leader in 10th at 1200 M and same at 800 M, 6Ls down in 10th off home turn, 5Ls down at 200 M, always one-paced.
2-wide and 7Ls off the speed in 7th at 1200 M and 800 M, 5Ls down in 9th and driven along entering straight, very flat and beaten 300 M out.
2-wide and 4Ls off the speed in 4th at 1200 M, 3Ls 3rd at 800 M, under pressure turning for home when 3Ls down in 6th, no impression thereafter.
On fence 9Ls off the speed in 9th at 1200 M, 7Ls down in 10th at 800 M, never got any closer than that.
Led early on, headed at 1200 M and dropped in 2Ls 2nd on fence, 1L down in 2nd and 2-wide at 800 M, disputed lead entering straight and briefly led 300 M out, headed 250 M out, no extra.
Led on fence at 1200 M by 2Ls, 1L clear at 800 M but was joined off home turn, headed over 300 M, much too one-paced on run-in.
Stood completely flat-footed in the gates and gave the field at start of at least 15Ls, never on terms thereafter.

Bit keen early on, 2-wide and 6Ls behind leader in 5th 1200 M out, 5Ls down in 6th at 800 M, 3-wide into home straight when 2Ls down in 4th, quickened up to lead 250 M out, shifted out but ran on well.
6Ls down in 6th on fence at 1200 M, 5Ls down in 7th at 800 M, 3Ls down in 5th entering straight and 200 M, always outpaced by principals.
Checked at 1600 M, raced 3 and 4-wide down back straight and sometimes lacked cover, 8Ls off pace in 11th 1200 M out, hard driven when 3-wide and 7Ls off pace in 12th off final bend, no chance.
On fence 7Ls off the speed in 9th at 1200 M and roughly the same at the 800 M, chased along to be 2-wide and 4Ls down in 7th off home turn, ran on well, carried wider at 100 M, always looked held.
Never a factor, 11Ls off the pace on fence and one from rear at 1000 M, still well behind turning for home, finished off well beaten down middle of track.
Very keen early, on fence 4Ls off the pace and still racing freely in 3rd at 1200 M, 3Ls down in 4th on fence at 800 M, 1L down in 3rd off home turn, half a length 2nd 200 M out, no extra.
3-wide without cover 7Ls off pace in 8th at 1200 M, 3-wide without cover and 4Ls 5th at the 800 M, 4-wide into home straight and still 4Ls down, no impression.
2nd last approaching home turn. Didn't find much room 250 M. Kept on close home.
Soon settled in rear and trailed field to straight. Finished strongly inside final 200 M.
Midfield into straight. Kept on same pace under pressure.
Always well there. Quickened to lead passing 200 M. Held on under strong pressure.
About 5th or 6th turning into straight. Unable quicken to challenge.
Shared pace from 1300 M before dropping to 3rd home bend. Found no extra 200 M out.
6th 1200 M and about 8th before home turn. Unable to get a clear run 300 M and soon beaten.
Among rear group to straight where he made steady headway along rail to line.
Led or shared lead before gaining clear advantage passing 1000 M. Unable to hold winner passing 200 M and faded steadily.
Never far off to straight. Kept on final 250 M.
Just behind midfield home bend. Kept on well final 250 M for 3rd.
Worse than midfield into straight. Was baulked 250 M before staying on a bit close home.
Towards rear till running on strongly final 250 M to just fail to get up on line.
In touch into straight where he made no show.
Never able to feature.
In touch. Found no extra passing 200 M. Wide without cover throughout.
Towards rear throughout.
Slightly behind midfield. Ran on well final 300 M to assert authority 50 M out. Won readily.
Began awkwardly, near rear. Made up good ground 200 M out but was never a threat to the winner.
Behind midfield. Steady progress from 900 M to soon be better than midfield. Advanced to 3rd along the rail before straightening. Failed to hold place 200 M out.
Never far off. Kept on well from 4th early straight.
In touch. Advanced to 2nd 800 M. Dropped out of contention from 500 M. (See Racing Incidents.)
Last to early straight. Just ran past a couple of beaten horses.
Towards rear. Minor improvement to 9th rounding home bend. Kept on moderately in straight.
Towards rear. Made ground steadily to be 7th 900 M. Crept closer to 5th on inside final turn. Kept on without quickening.
Took lead to 200 M. Weakened.
Midfield. Dropped back steadily passing 900 M.
Mainly 2nd or 3rd within 2Ls behind lead. Came to tackle leader passing 400 M, gaining upper hand 200 M out. One-paced when headed closing stages.
Held up wide behind midfield far side. Remained same into straight. Kept on well.
Never nearer.
Midfield, racing keenly far side. Ran on to challenge final 200 M hitting front briefly before pipped at post.
Raced wide in better than midfield. Improved to hold some chance early in straight. Dropped out quickly closing stages.
Midfield or behind. Not much room early in straight when shifted out to obtain run over 200 M out but only kept on at the same pace.
Made no show.
Midfield. Ran on steadily in straight to hit front briefly final 100 M.
Behind midfield most of way. Produced some late impression closing stages.
Well there. Not much room early in straight and steadied 200 M out. No further impression closing stages.
Well back to straight. Ran on past beaten runners final stages.
Ridden to muster speed jumping out and led till no extra over 250 M out.
Always prominent. Held some chance early in straight but had no more to give close to home.
Tracked leader. Hit front under pressure over 250 M out but unable to sustain effort and swamped close to home.
Raced keenly in 5th on rails. Obtained clear passage over 200 M out and ran on steadily to get up on line.
Slightly better than midfield. Ran on steadily from 7th early straight, just missed a minor placing.
Began awkwardly, near rear. Was last final turn before making some minor progress final 250 M.
Jumped well and was prominent briefly. Dropped back steadily to the rear group near 900 M.
Towards rear. Slightly improved to 8th home bend. Weakened from 500 M.
Led. One-paced when headed 250 M.
Towards rear early. Recovered some ground to midfield 800 M. Ran on well in straight but failed to match speed with winner closing stages.
Checked soon after start, last to 800 M. Recovered some ground home bend. Kept on moderately from 10th early straight.
Moved up from midfield to 5th approaching 1000 M. Remained there until fading out of contention 400 M.
In touch on inside. Advanced to 2nd final turn. Responded well to take control 250 M. Held on well.
Midfield early, soon dropped to 9th. Made some moderate progress inside 200 M.
Towards rear. Crept closer on inside to midfield final turn. Kept on without quickening.
Midfield early. Moved up to become 2nd 850 M. Held on until failing to hold place soon after straightening.
Prominent. Was crowded near 500 M, dropping to 6th turning in. Kept on well 250 M out to obtain a remote 3rd close home.
Near rear throughout.
Forward of midfield. Ran on steadily to be nearest at finish but just failed to peg back winner.
Close up. Quickened to hit front inside 200 M but caught final strides.
Always well there. Kept on steadily under pressure without threatening.
Well back to straight. Kept on steadily under pressure.
Well there to straight. Dropped out.
Behind midfield. Ran on well to just get up on line.
Well back. Ran on well past beaten runners in straight.
Midfield to straight. No extra.
Never seen with a chance.
Made no show.
Forward of midfield throughout. One-paced.
Towards rear throughout. Kept on well in straight.
Attempted to make all. Overhauled final 200 M.
Midfield throughout. Kept on one pace.
Began fairly and niggled along to race in midfield or worse wide without cover through to straight. Unable to quicken when asked 400 M out and kept on same pace to the line.
Soon eased to a rearward position on rail. Made little progress turning for home. All out 300 M out but was unable to quicken and kept on same pace to the line.
Jumped awkwardly and raced in rear section on fence through to straight. Kept on one-pace when asked 350 M out and only able to run past several beaten runners inside final 200 M.
Tardy start and soon recovered to race in better than midfield 3 wide without cover through to straight. Near the 300 M was checked when crowded for room and steadily faded thereafter.
Raced in better than midfield 2 wide and proved difficult to settle in the early stages. Under pressure to maintain position at home bend. Tailed out in straight. (Bled.)
Niggled along to take lead on rail through to straight. No extra when asked 400 M out and dropped out quickly inside final 200 M.

Jumped fairly from wide draw and soon settled in midfield 2 wide. Switched wide turning for home to obtain clear running. Under pressure 400 M out and made up little ground inside final 200 M to miss the 3rd narrowly.
Began fairly and soon raced in rear section 2 wide. Ridden along and steadily shifted to the outisde turning for home. Did not quicken when asked 350 M out and ran on evenly to the line.

Crowded on jumping and soon recovered to race in worse than midfield on rail. Switched out and made little progress turning for home. Responded well when asked 400 M out and just failed to overhaul the winner. (Bled.)

Began fairly and soon settled in midfield on fence through to straight. Near the 300 M was hampered and lost rightful running. Ran on well thereafter to fend off challenge from 2nd placegetter to win narrowly.
Jumped well from widest and was soon restrained to the back closer to rail. Switched wide on straightening to find clear running. Made up little ground inside final 200 M when asked 350 M out.
Soon raced in midfield or better around 3 wide. Edged forward from the outside turning for home. Under pressure 400 M out but was crowded for room at 300 M and only ran on evenly thereafter.
Ridden along to race in midfield or better 2 wide through to straight. Found nothing when asked 400 M out and further weakened inside final 200 M.

Began well and pushed along to race in better than midfield on rail. Ridden along to improve position at home bend. Ran on fairly when asked 400 M out but failed to match speed with the 1st pair inside final 200 M.
In midfield about 5Ls off pace until 800 M and was 3-wide without cover on circle, 4Ls down in 5th off home turn, just over 2Ls 3rd at 200 M, ran on okay but no chance with winner.
Settled 3-wide with cover in 8th place about 6Ls off pace down the back and into home straight, plugged on at the same pace, no threat.
Pushed on to go 2nd early on, 2Ls down in 2nd on fence at 800 M, driven and 2.5Ls down in 3rd 400 M out and at 200 M, weakened closing stages.
4Ls or 5Ls off pace on fence in about 6th place until home straight when driven along, still 4Ls 6th and held at 200 M, crowded and not fully ridden out final 150 M or so.
2-wide about 5Ls off the speed in midfield through to home straight when under strong pressure, beaten over 300 M out.
Wide and under pressure from a long way out, well detached entering straight, poor effort.
Broke awkwardly, good early speed to lead on fence, 2Ls clear at 800 M, 1L to the good off home turn, headed 300 M out, folded tamely final 200 M.
Slowest away, quickly switched from wide gate to fence, 7Ls down on inner in 11th place at 800 M and off home turn, very weak effort in straight.
Had cover on fence about 3Ls off the speed in 4th through to 800 M, 2-wide and 4Ls down in 4th entering straight, 3Ls down at 200 M, one-paced closing stages.
Never better than 4Ls off the pace in midfield at any stage, mostly 2-wide with cover and about 5Ls off the pace on 9th, lacked a turn of foot.
Caught deep on track about 8Ls off pace and one from rear at 1000 M, 4-wide without cover from 700 M out, 5-wide (widest of all) into home straight when 6Ls down, no impression.
Prominent though a little wide early, left 2-wide without cover 3Ls down in 3rd at 800 M, 1L down in 2nd entering straight, led at 300 M, hung in at 200 M, well clear when eased final 100 M.
Awkwardly away, about 6Ls off the speed in 8th place down the back straight, very weak and eased out steadily from 600 M out. (Bled.)
Slowly away, keen early on, 3-wide towards rear about 8Ls off pace 900 M out, 4-wide off home turn when about 6Ls down, one-paced.
Slowly away and raced on fence at the rear until 700 M. Improved slightly rounding home turn and closed the race off well.
Raced in the lead until hanging out badly rounding home turn. Dropped to last place on straightening and never recovered.
Settled 2-wide behind midfield before dropping back further after 700 M. Unable to pick up when asked on straightening.
Jumped well and raced in or near the lead until straightening. Matched pace with winner until 300 M but couldn't find extra to challenge thereafter.

Pushed along early to maintain position behind leaders. Continued to be niggled rounding home turn and gained a slight advantage at 400 M. Drew clear final 300 M and easily held off a late challenger.
Raced 3-wide behind midfield despite being pushed along. Quickened well on straightening and made up some ground in the final stages.
Raced wide and near the back until straightening. Found no extra in the straight.
3-wide in rear section early. Dropped further to last place 600 M. One-paced in the closing stages.
Stumbled on jumping and then raced 3-wide at midfield. Improved to within 2Ls of the leaders 400 M but weakened thereafter.
Jumped well but needed to be ridden to keep pace at midfield. 3-wide turning in and improved steadily in the straight to be closest at finish.
Slow to begin and was niggled along to race behind midfield at 800 M. Made up some ground rounding home turn but was one-paced in the straight.
Prominent position in the early and middle stages. Switched out on straightening and continued well in the straight. Unable to draw closer to winner in the final stages.
9Ls off the pace on fence in 10th 1200 M out, about 8Ls down still towards rear and under strong pressure 600 M out, very laboured in home straight.
About 14Ls down and 2-wide 1200 M out in rear, progressed to be 4-wide with cover towards rear when 6Ls off pace at 800 M, all out to get within 4Ls of lead at 200 M, faded close home.
Pressed to fence from wide gate early, narrow lead on inner at 1200 M, 2Ls clear at 800 M and into home straight when driven along, all out when headed 150 M out, hung on okay for 2nd.
12Ls down towards rear at 1200 M, still 10Ls down towards rear when 4-wide into home straight, ran on past a few beaten rivals.
Bumped rail when about 12Ls off pace in rear group at 1200 M, 7Ls last at 800 M, no threat whatsoever.
On fence 8Ls off the speed in 7th at 1200 M, 5Ls down and still in midfield at 800 M and entering home straight, soon completely outpaced.
Awkwardly away, 2-wide and 3Ls off the pace in 3rd at 1200 M, losing ground when 5Ls down in 5th at 800 M, soon well detached, tailed off.
Hard driven from widest alley to take a narrow lead out 2-wide 1400 M out, lost place and 3Ls 3rd at 800 M, lost place from as far as 600 M out, tailed off.
6Ls down in 6th and 2-wide at 1200 M, under pressure to lie up 1000 M out, back-pedalled rapidly from 600 M out, tailed off.
On fence 3Ls off the pace in 4th at 1200 M generally had the run of the race, 2Ls down in 2nd off home turn, eased to the front at 150 M, drew away, comfortably.
Always wide without cover, 12Ls down and 3-wide at 1200 M, 6-wide in 10th place and 5Ls down at 800 M, hindered at 700 M, 4-wide into straight, 3Ls down in 5th at 200 M, no extra.
Had a torrid trip, checked at start, 2-wide and 9Ls off pace in 9th 1200 M out, improving out 5-wide 5Ls off pace when hindered twice 700 M out and steadied, beaten off home turn.
2-wide and 8Ls off the speed in 8th at 1200 M, 4Ls down and 4-wide with cover in 6th at 800 M, 3-wide and 4Ls down entering straight, always held but ran on fairly in straight.
6Ls off the speed in 5th 1200 M out when on fence, 4Ls down in 4th at 800 M, 2-wide and 3Ls down in 3rd entering straight, rather one-paced through final 300 M.
3Ls down in about 5th place through to the 400 M, couldn't go with principals thereafter.
Managed to stay within 4Ls of the pace nearest the stand's rail until about the 400 M before falling away.
Held up about 4Ls off pace in rear early on, still 4Ls down but in midfield at 400 M, ran on only fairly for a remote 3rd place.
Good early pace to be about 2Ls down in 4th at 800 M, 3Ls down in 5th at 400 M, became further detached.
Awkwardly away, 3Ls down in midfield early on, struggling in rear at 400 M when about 5Ls behind, no chance.
Awkwardly away and keen early on when 3Ls down in about 10th place, tended to hang in against far rail, 4Ls down in 8th at 400 M, no headway.
3Ls down in about 11th place 800 M out, 4Ls down in 8th at 400 M, soon well beaten.
Fairly prominent early on about 3Ls off pace 700 M out in midfield, soon started to give ground and was well beaten as far as 350 M out.
Awkwardly away, never on terms. (Bled.)
Away well, about 2Ls down in 3rd from gates to the 400 M when still on the bridle, ran on well (big gap back to place) but had no chance with winner.
Good early pace to shadow winner, soon under pressure and all out to be 1L down in 2nd at the 400 M, soon drifted away.
Broke best of all, always led, travelled smoothly when 1L clear 400 M out and went 2Ls ahead at 200 M, pulled further ahead, easily.
Midfield to straight where he made no show.
About 6th into straight where he quickened well to take command passing 200 M. Soon went clear.
In rear to straight where he ran on a bit final 200 M.
Among rear group swinging into straight. Kept on well under pressure closing stages.
Never a factor.
About 5th passing 800 M. Held some chance 200 M out. Kept on same pace under pressure.
Never far off to straight where he didn't find much room 300 M. Not in contention thereafter.
Tracked leader to straight where he held every chance approaching 200 M. Found winner too strong and lost 2nd placing final stride.
Soon in midfield and remained there to straight. Kept on without threatening.
Ran 3rd into home bend. Hit front briefly 200 M out. Found no extra.
Behind midfield home turn. Switched out 300 M and ran on strongly to take 2nd at the finish.
Made running to 250 M where he could find no more.
Last to home turn before making up some ground final 250 M.
Towards rear when blundered and almost fell 300 M.
